result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上验证了方法的准确性与可扩展性，能够高效处理大规模分配问题。
conclusion: 提出的分布式BADMM框架为互联网行业的大规模用户决策问题提供了高效求解方案。
search_text: A Practical Distributed ADMM Solver for Billion-Scale Generalized Assignment Problems 针对十亿级广义分配问题的实用分布式 ADMM 求解器 Assigning items to owners is a common problem found in various real-world applications, for example, audience-channel matching in marketing campaigns, borrower-lender matching in loan management, and shopper-merchant matching in e-commerce. Given an objective and multiple constraints, an assignment problem can be formulated as a constrained optimization problem. Such assignment problems are usually NP-hard, so when the number of items or the number of owners is large, solving for exact solutions becomes challenging. In this paper, we are interested in solving constrained assignment problems with hundreds of millions of items. Thus, with just tens of owners, the number of decision variables is at billion-scale. This scale is usually seen in the internet industry, which makes decisions for large groups of users. We relax the possible integer constraint, and formulate a general optimization problem that covers commonly seen assignment problems. Its objective function is convex. Its constraints are either linear, or convex and separable by items. We study to solve our generalized assignment problems in the Bregman Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers (BADMM) framework where we exploit Bregman divergence to transform the Augmented Lagrangian into a separable form, and solve many subproblems in parallel. The entire solution can thus be implemented using a MapReduce-style distributed computation framework. We present experiment results on both synthetic and real-world datasets to verify its accuracy and scalability. 将物品分配给所有者是各种现实应用中的常见问题，例如营销活动中的受众渠道匹配、贷款管理中的借款人-贷款人匹配以及电子商务中的购物者-商家匹配。给定目标和多个约束，分配问题可以表示为约束优化问题。此类分配问题通常是 NP 困难的，因此当项目数量或所有者数量很大时，求解精确解就变得具有挑战性。在本文中，我们感兴趣的是解决数亿个项目的约束分配问题。因此，在几十个业主的情况下，决策变量的数量就达到了十亿级。这种规模通常出现在互联网行业，因为互联网行业为大量用户做出决策。我们放宽了可能的整数约束，并制定了一个涵盖常见分配问题的通用优化问题。其目标函数是凸的。它的约束要么是线性的，要么是凸的，并且可以按项目分离。我们研究在布雷格曼交替方向乘子法（BADMM）框架中解决广义分配问题，其中我们利用布雷格曼散度将增广拉格朗日变换为可分离形式，并并行解决许多子问题。因此，整个解决方案可以使用 MapReduce 风格的分布式计算框架来实现。我们在合成数据集和真实数据集上提供了实验结果，以验证其准确性和可扩展性。 本文提出一种基于BADMM框架的分布式求解器，用于解决百亿规模的广义分配问题。 Jun Zhou,Feng Qi,Zhigang Hua,Daohong Jian,Ziqi Liu,Hua Wu,Xingwen Zhang,Shuang Yang cs.DS

authors_text: Gwendal Le Vaillant,Thierry Dutoit
title: Synthesizer Preset Interpolation using Transformer Auto-Encoders
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 自动编码器的合成器预设插值
abstract: Sound synthesizers are widespread in modern music production but they increasingly require expert skills to be mastered. This work focuses on interpolation between presets, i.e., sets of values of all sound synthesis parameters, to enable the intuitive creation of new sounds from existing ones. We introduce a bimodal auto-encoder neural network, which simultaneously processes presets using multi-head attention blocks, and audio using convolutions. This model has been tested on a popular frequency modulation synthesizer with more than one hundred parameters. Experiments have compared the model to related architectures and methods, and have demonstrated that it performs smoother interpolations. After training, the proposed model can be integrated into commercial synthesizers for live interpolation or sound design tasks.
summary: Sound synthesizers are widespread in modern music production but they increasingly require expert skills to be mastered. This work focuses on interpolation between presets, i.e., sets of values of all sound synthesis parameters, to enable the intuitive creation of new sounds from existing ones. We introduce a bimodal auto-encoder neural network, which simultaneously processes presets using multi-head attention blocks, and audio using convolutions. This model has been tested on a popular frequency modulation synthesizer with more than one hundred parameters. Experiments have compared the model to related architectures and methods, and have demonstrated that it performs smoother interpolations. After training, the proposed model can be integrated into commercial synthesizers for live interpolation or sound design tasks.
abstract_zh: 声音合成器在现代音乐制作中广泛使用，但它们越来越需要掌握专业技能。这项工作的重点是预设之间的插值，即所有声音合成参数的值集，以便能够从现有声音直观地创建新声音。我们引入了双模自动编码器神经网络，它使用多头注意块同时处理预设，并使用卷积处理音频。该模型已在具有一百多个参数的流行调频合成器上进行了测试。实验将该模型与相关架构和方法进行了比较，并证明它可以执行更平滑的插值。训练后，所提出的模型可以集成到商业合成器中，用于实时插值或声音设计任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Transformer自编码器在合成器预设之间进行插值，以直观生成新声音。
AI.motivation: 现代合成器需要高超技能，而插值可简化新声音的创建，降低使用门槛。
AI.method: 采用双模态自编码器，结合多头注意力处理参数预设与卷积处理音频信号，实现参数与声音的联合建模。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型插值更平滑，且可集成到商业合成器用于实时插值和声音设计。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决合成器预设插值问题，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Hani Sami,Hadi Otrok,Jamal Bentahar,Azzam Mourad,Ernesto Damiani
title: Reward Shaping Using Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络进行奖励塑造
abstract: In this paper, we propose Value Iteration Network for Reward Shaping (VIN-RS), a potential-based reward shaping mechanism using Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). The proposed VIN-RS embeds a CNN trained on computed labels using the message passing mechanism of the Hidden Markov Model. The CNN processes images or graphs of the environment to predict the shaping values. Recent work on reward shaping still has limitations towards training on a representation of the Markov Decision Process (MDP) and building an estimate of the transition matrix. The advantage of VIN-RS is to construct an effective potential function from an estimated MDP while automatically inferring the environment transition matrix. The proposed VIN-RS estimates the transition matrix through a self-learned convolution filter while extracting environment details from the input frames or sampled graphs. Due to (1) the previous success of using message passing for reward shaping; and (2) the CNN planning behavior, we use these messages to train the CNN of VIN-RS. Experiments are performed on tabular games, Atari 2600 and MuJoCo, for discrete and continuous action space. Our results illustrate promising improvements in the learning speed and maximum cumulative reward compared to the state-of-the-art.
summary: In this paper, we propose Value Iteration Network for Reward Shaping (VIN-RS), a potential-based reward shaping mechanism using Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). The proposed VIN-RS embeds a CNN trained on computed labels using the message passing mechanism of the Hidden Markov Model. The CNN processes images or graphs of the environment to predict the shaping values. Recent work on reward shaping still has limitations towards training on a representation of the Markov Decision Process (MDP) and building an estimate of the transition matrix. The advantage of VIN-RS is to construct an effective potential function from an estimated MDP while automatically inferring the environment transition matrix. The proposed VIN-RS estimates the transition matrix through a self-learned convolution filter while extracting environment details from the input frames or sampled graphs. Due to (1) the previous success of using message passing for reward shaping; and (2) the CNN planning behavior, we use these messages to train the CNN of VIN-RS. Experiments are performed on tabular games, Atari 2600 and MuJoCo, for discrete and continuous action space. Our results illustrate promising improvements in the learning speed and maximum cumulative reward compared to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了奖励塑造价值迭代网络（VIN-RS），这是一种使用卷积神经网络（CNN）的基于势的奖励塑造机制。所提出的 VIN-RS 嵌入了一个使用隐马尔可夫模型的消息传递机制在计算标签上训练的 CNN。 CNN 处理环境图像或图表来预测整形值。最近关于奖励塑造的工作在马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）表示的训练和建立转移矩阵的估计方面仍然存在局限性。 VIN-RS 的优点是根据估计的 MDP 构造有效的势函数，同时自动推断环境转移矩阵。所提出的 VIN-RS 通过自学习卷积滤波器估计转换矩阵，同时从输入帧或采样图中提取环境细节。由于（1）之前使用消息传递进行奖励塑造的成功； (2) CNN 规划行为，我们使用这些消息来训练 VIN-RS 的 CNN。在表格游戏、Atari 2600 和 MuJoCo 上针对离散和连续动作空间进行了实验。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，学习速度和最大累积奖励有希望的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的潜在奖励塑形方法VIN-RS，用于强化学习中的环境建模与策略优化。
AI.motivation: 现有奖励塑形方法在训练马尔可夫决策过程表示及转移矩阵估计方面存在局限，难以有效处理复杂环境信息。
AI.method: 通过隐马尔可夫模型的消息传递机制训练CNN，利用卷积滤波器自动推断环境转移矩阵，并从输入图像或图中提取特征生成势函数。
AI.result: 在表格游戏、Atari 2600和MuJoCo环境中，VIN-RS显著提升了学习速度和最大累积奖励，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: VIN-RS通过结合CNN与潜在奖励塑形，有效解决了复杂环境下的MDP建模问题，为强化学习提供了新的技术路径。

search_text: Reward Shaping Using Convolutional Neural Network 使用卷积神经网络进行奖励塑造 In this paper, we propose Value Iteration Network for Reward Shaping (VIN-RS), a potential-based reward shaping mechanism using Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). The proposed VIN-RS embeds a CNN trained on computed labels using the message passing mechanism of the Hidden Markov Model. The CNN processes images or graphs of the environment to predict the shaping values. Recent work on reward shaping still has limitations towards training on a representation of the Markov Decision Process (MDP) and building an estimate of the transition matrix. The advantage of VIN-RS is to construct an effective potential function from an estimated MDP while automatically inferring the environment transition matrix. The proposed VIN-RS estimates the transition matrix through a self-learned convolution filter while extracting environment details from the input frames or sampled graphs. Due to (1) the previous success of using message passing for reward shaping; and (2) the CNN planning behavior, we use these messages to train the CNN of VIN-RS. Experiments are performed on tabular games, Atari 2600 and MuJoCo, for discrete and continuous action space. Our results illustrate promising improvements in the learning speed and maximum cumulative reward compared to the state-of-the-art. 在本文中，我们提出了奖励塑造价值迭代网络（VIN-RS），这是一种使用卷积神经网络（CNN）的基于势的奖励塑造机制。所提出的 VIN-RS 嵌入了一个使用隐马尔可夫模型的消息传递机制在计算标签上训练的 CNN。 CNN 处理环境图像或图表来预测整形值。最近关于奖励塑造的工作在马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）表示的训练和建立转移矩阵的估计方面仍然存在局限性。 VIN-RS 的优点是根据估计的 MDP 构造有效的势函数，同时自动推断环境转移矩阵。所提出的 VIN-RS 通过自学习卷积滤波器估计转换矩阵，同时从输入帧或采样图中提取环境细节。由于（1）之前使用消息传递进行奖励塑造的成功； (2) CNN 规划行为，我们使用这些消息来训练 VIN-RS 的 CNN。在表格游戏、Atari 2600 和 MuJoCo 上针对离散和连续动作空间进行了实验。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，学习速度和最大累积奖励有希望的提高。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的潜在奖励塑形方法VIN-RS，用于强化学习中的环境建模与策略优化。 Hani Sami,Hadi Otrok,Jamal Bentahar,Azzam Mourad,Ernesto Damiani cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Karthik Desingu,Mirunalini P.,Aravindan Chandrabose
title: Few-Shot Classification of Skin Lesions from Dermoscopic Images by Meta-Learning Representative Embeddings
title_zh: 通过元学习代表性嵌入对皮肤镜图像中的皮肤病变进行少样本分类
abstract: Annotated images and ground truth for the diagnosis of rare and novel diseases are scarce. This is expected to prevail, considering the small number of affected patient population and limited clinical expertise to annotate images. Further, the frequently occurring long-tailed class distributions in skin lesion and other disease classification datasets cause conventional training approaches to lead to poor generalization due to biased class priors. Few-shot learning, and meta-learning in general, aim to overcome these issues by aiming to perform well in low data regimes. This paper focuses on improving meta-learning for the classification of dermoscopic images. Specifically, we propose a baseline supervised method on the meta-training set that allows a network to learn highly representative and generalizable feature embeddings for images, that are readily transferable to new few-shot learning tasks. We follow some of the previous work in literature that posit that a representative feature embedding can be more effective than complex meta-learning algorithms. We empirically prove the efficacy of the proposed meta-training method on dermoscopic images for learning embeddings, and show that even simple linear classifiers trained atop these representations suffice to outperform some of the usual meta-learning methods.
summary: Annotated images and ground truth for the diagnosis of rare and novel diseases are scarce. This is expected to prevail, considering the small number of affected patient population and limited clinical expertise to annotate images. Further, the frequently occurring long-tailed class distributions in skin lesion and other disease classification datasets cause conventional training approaches to lead to poor generalization due to biased class priors. Few-shot learning, and meta-learning in general, aim to overcome these issues by aiming to perform well in low data regimes. This paper focuses on improving meta-learning for the classification of dermoscopic images. Specifically, we propose a baseline supervised method on the meta-training set that allows a network to learn highly representative and generalizable feature embeddings for images, that are readily transferable to new few-shot learning tasks. We follow some of the previous work in literature that posit that a representative feature embedding can be more effective than complex meta-learning algorithms. We empirically prove the efficacy of the proposed meta-training method on dermoscopic images for learning embeddings, and show that even simple linear classifiers trained atop these representations suffice to outperform some of the usual meta-learning methods.
abstract_zh: 用于诊断罕见和新型疾病的带注释的图像和真实情况很少。考虑到受影响的患者群体数量较少以及注释图像的临床专业知识有限，预计这种情况将会盛行。此外，皮肤病变和其他疾病分类数据集中经常出现的长尾类分布导致传统的训练方法由于类先验的偏差而导致泛化能力较差。小样本学习和一般的元学习旨在通过在低数据条件下表现良好来克服这些问题。本文重点关注改进皮肤镜图像分类的元学习。具体来说，我们在元训练集上提出了一种基线监督方法，允许网络学习图像的高度代表性和可概括的特征嵌入，这些特征嵌入很容易转移到新的少样本学习任务。我们遵循之前的一些文献工作，这些工作认为代表性特征嵌入可以比复杂的元学习算法更有效。我们凭经验证明了所提出的在皮肤镜图像上学习嵌入的元训练方法的有效性，并表明即使是在这些表示上训练的简单线性分类器也足以胜过一些常见的元学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的监督方法，用于改进皮肤病变的少样本分类任务。
AI.motivation: 皮肤病变诊断数据稀缺且存在长尾分布问题，传统方法因数据不足和类别偏差导致泛化能力差，需通过元学习解决少样本分类挑战。
AI.method: 设计监督元训练方法学习高代表性的可迁移特征嵌入，使用简单线性分类器在目标任务中实现优于复杂元学习算法的效果。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在皮肤镜图像上能有效学习嵌入，线性分类器性能超越常规元学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 代表性嵌入学习在少样本分类中具有优势，为皮肤病变诊断提供有效解决方案。

search_text: Few-Shot Classification of Skin Lesions from Dermoscopic Images by Meta-Learning Representative Embeddings 通过元学习代表性嵌入对皮肤镜图像中的皮肤病变进行少样本分类 Annotated images and ground truth for the diagnosis of rare and novel diseases are scarce. This is expected to prevail, considering the small number of affected patient population and limited clinical expertise to annotate images. Further, the frequently occurring long-tailed class distributions in skin lesion and other disease classification datasets cause conventional training approaches to lead to poor generalization due to biased class priors. Few-shot learning, and meta-learning in general, aim to overcome these issues by aiming to perform well in low data regimes. This paper focuses on improving meta-learning for the classification of dermoscopic images. Specifically, we propose a baseline supervised method on the meta-training set that allows a network to learn highly representative and generalizable feature embeddings for images, that are readily transferable to new few-shot learning tasks. We follow some of the previous work in literature that posit that a representative feature embedding can be more effective than complex meta-learning algorithms. We empirically prove the efficacy of the proposed meta-training method on dermoscopic images for learning embeddings, and show that even simple linear classifiers trained atop these representations suffice to outperform some of the usual meta-learning methods. 用于诊断罕见和新型疾病的带注释的图像和真实情况很少。考虑到受影响的患者群体数量较少以及注释图像的临床专业知识有限，预计这种情况将会盛行。此外，皮肤病变和其他疾病分类数据集中经常出现的长尾类分布导致传统的训练方法由于类先验的偏差而导致泛化能力较差。小样本学习和一般的元学习旨在通过在低数据条件下表现良好来克服这些问题。本文重点关注改进皮肤镜图像分类的元学习。具体来说，我们在元训练集上提出了一种基线监督方法，允许网络学习图像的高度代表性和可概括的特征嵌入，这些特征嵌入很容易转移到新的少样本学习任务。我们遵循之前的一些文献工作，这些工作认为代表性特征嵌入可以比复杂的元学习算法更有效。我们凭经验证明了所提出的在皮肤镜图像上学习嵌入的元训练方法的有效性，并表明即使是在这些表示上训练的简单线性分类器也足以胜过一些常见的元学习方法。 本文提出一种基于元学习的监督方法，用于改进皮肤病变的少样本分类任务。 Karthik Desingu,Mirunalini P.,Aravindan Chandrabose cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yaoyiran Li,Fangyu Liu,Ivan Vulić,Anna Korhonen
title: Improving Bilingual Lexicon Induction with Cross-Encoder Reranking
title_zh: 通过交叉编码器重新排序改进双语词典归纳
abstract: Bilingual lexicon induction (BLI) with limited bilingual supervision is a crucial yet challenging task in multilingual NLP. Current state-of-the-art BLI methods rely on the induction of cross-lingual word embeddings (CLWEs) to capture cross-lingual word similarities; such CLWEs are obtained 1) via traditional static models (e.g., VecMap), or 2) by extracting type-level CLWEs from multilingual pretrained language models (mPLMs), or 3) through combining the former two options. In this work, we propose a novel semi-supervised post-hoc reranking method termed BLICEr (BLI with Cross-Encoder Reranking), applicable to any precalculated CLWE space, which improves their BLI capability. The key idea is to 'extract' cross-lingual lexical knowledge from mPLMs, and then combine it with the original CLWEs. This crucial step is done via 1) creating a word similarity dataset, comprising positive word pairs (i.e., true translations) and hard negative pairs induced from the original CLWE space, and then 2) fine-tuning an mPLM (e.g., mBERT or XLM-R) in a cross-encoder manner to predict the similarity scores. At inference, we 3) combine the similarity score from the original CLWE space with the score from the BLI-tuned cross-encoder. BLICEr establishes new state-of-the-art results on two standard BLI benchmarks spanning a wide spectrum of diverse languages: it substantially outperforms a series of strong baselines across the board. We also validate the robustness of BLICEr with different CLWEs.
summary: Bilingual lexicon induction (BLI) with limited bilingual supervision is a crucial yet challenging task in multilingual NLP. Current state-of-the-art BLI methods rely on the induction of cross-lingual word embeddings (CLWEs) to capture cross-lingual word similarities; such CLWEs are obtained 1) via traditional static models (e.g., VecMap), or 2) by extracting type-level CLWEs from multilingual pretrained language models (mPLMs), or 3) through combining the former two options. In this work, we propose a novel semi-supervised post-hoc reranking method termed BLICEr (BLI with Cross-Encoder Reranking), applicable to any precalculated CLWE space, which improves their BLI capability. The key idea is to 'extract' cross-lingual lexical knowledge from mPLMs, and then combine it with the original CLWEs. This crucial step is done via 1) creating a word similarity dataset, comprising positive word pairs (i.e., true translations) and hard negative pairs induced from the original CLWE space, and then 2) fine-tuning an mPLM (e.g., mBERT or XLM-R) in a cross-encoder manner to predict the similarity scores. At inference, we 3) combine the similarity score from the original CLWE space with the score from the BLI-tuned cross-encoder. BLICEr establishes new state-of-the-art results on two standard BLI benchmarks spanning a wide spectrum of diverse languages: it substantially outperforms a series of strong baselines across the board. We also validate the robustness of BLICEr with different CLWEs.
abstract_zh: 有限双语监督下的双语词典归纳（BLI）是多语言 NLP 中一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务。当前最先进的 BLI 方法依赖于跨语言词嵌入（CLWE）的归纳来捕获跨语言词的相似性；这样的 CLWE 是通过 1）通过传统静态模型（例如 VecMap）获得的，或 2）通过从多语言预训练语言模型（mPLM）中提取类型级 CLWE 获得的，或 3）通过组合前两个选项获得的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的半监督事后重排序方法，称为 BLICEr（BLI with Cross-Encoder Reranking），适用于任何预先计算的 CLWE 空间，从而提高了它们的 BLI 能力。关键思想是从 mPLM 中“提取”跨语言词汇知识，然后将其与原始 CLWE 相结合。这一关键步骤是通过以下方式完成的：1) 创建单词相似度数据集，其中包含从原始 CLWE 空间导出的正单词对（即真实翻译）和硬负单词对，然后 2) 以交叉编码器的方式微调 mPLM（例如 mBERT 或 XLM-R）以预测相似度分数。在推理时，我们 3) 将原始 CLWE 空间的相似度得分与 BLI 调整的交叉编码器的得分相结合。 BLICEr 在涵盖多种不同语言的两个标准 BLI 基准上建立了新的最先进结果：它全面优于一系列强大的基准。我们还使用不同的 CLWE 验证了 BLICEr 的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种基于跨编码器重排序的双语词典归纳方法BLICEr，通过结合预计算的跨语言词向量与多语言预训练模型的语义相似度预测，提升有限双语监督下的双语词典生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有双语词典归纳方法依赖跨语言词向量（CLWEs）捕捉词相似性，但静态模型和预训练语言模型提取的CLWEs存在局限性，难以充分挖掘多语言语义对齐信息，导致性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 1) 构建包含正例（真实翻译对）和难负例（CLWEs空间中相似但非翻译对）的词相似度数据集；2) 微调多语言预训练模型（如mBERT/XLM-R）作为交叉编码器预测相似度；3) 将原始CLWEs相似度与交叉编码器输出加权融合，实现重排序。
AI.result: 在两个涵盖多种语言的标准BLI基准测试中，BLICEr显著超越包括VecMap、mPLM直接提取等在内的多个强基线方法，建立新的SOTA结果，并验证了方法对不同CLWEs的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: BLICEr通过有效结合CLWEs与多语言预训练模型的语义知识，为双语词典归纳任务提供了通用且高效的后处理框架，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Xu Cao,Wenqian Ye,Elena Sizikova,Xue Bai,Megan Coffee,Hongwu Zeng,Jianguo Cao
title: ViTASD: Robust Vision Transformer Baselines for Autism Spectrum Disorder Facial Diagnosis
title_zh: ViTASD：用于自闭症谱系障碍面部诊断的强大视觉变压器基线
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, Accepted by the ICASSP 2023
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, Accepted by the ICASSP 2023
abstract: Autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a lifelong neurodevelopmental disorder with very high prevalence around the world. Research progress in the field of ASD facial analysis in pediatric patients has been hindered due to a lack of well-established baselines. In this paper, we propose the use of the Vision Transformer (ViT) for the computational analysis of pediatric ASD. The presented model, known as ViTASD, distills knowledge from large facial expression datasets and offers model structure transferability. Specifically, ViTASD employs a vanilla ViT to extract features from patients' face images and adopts a lightweight decoder with a Gaussian Process layer to enhance the robustness for ASD analysis. Extensive experiments conducted on standard ASD facial analysis benchmarks show that our method outperforms all of the representative approaches in ASD facial analysis, while the ViTASD-L achieves a new state-of-the-art. Our code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/IrohXu/ViTASD.
summary: Autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a lifelong neurodevelopmental disorder with very high prevalence around the world. Research progress in the field of ASD facial analysis in pediatric patients has been hindered due to a lack of well-established baselines. In this paper, we propose the use of the Vision Transformer (ViT) for the computational analysis of pediatric ASD. The presented model, known as ViTASD, distills knowledge from large facial expression datasets and offers model structure transferability. Specifically, ViTASD employs a vanilla ViT to extract features from patients' face images and adopts a lightweight decoder with a Gaussian Process layer to enhance the robustness for ASD analysis. Extensive experiments conducted on standard ASD facial analysis benchmarks show that our method outperforms all of the representative approaches in ASD facial analysis, while the ViTASD-L achieves a new state-of-the-art. Our code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/IrohXu/ViTASD.
abstract_zh: 自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）是一种终生神经发育障碍，在世界各地的患病率非常高。由于缺乏完善的基线，儿科患者 ASD 面部分析领域的研究进展受到阻碍。在本文中，我们建议使用 Vision Transformer (ViT) 对儿科 ASD 进行计算分析。所提出的模型称为 ViTASD，从大型面部表情数据集中提取知识并提供模型结构可迁移性。具体来说，ViTASD 采用普通 ViT 从患者面部图像中提取特征，并采用带有高斯处理层的轻量级解码器来增强 ASD 分析的鲁棒性。在标准 ASD 面部分析基准上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法优于 ASD 面部分析中的所有代表性方法，而 ViTASD-L 则达到了新的最先进水平。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/IrohXu/ViTASD 获取。

AI.motivation: 当前ASD面部分析研究因缺乏成熟基线而进展缓慢，亟需一种鲁棒且可迁移的模型框架来提升诊断准确性。
AI.method: ViTASD采用标准ViT提取面部特征，并通过轻量解码器与高斯过程层增强模型鲁棒性，同时通过知识蒸馏技术从大规模表情数据集中迁移学习。
AI.result: 在标准ASD面部分析基准测试中，ViTASD超越所有现有方法，其中ViTASD-L版本达到新SOTA，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: ViTASD为ASD面部诊断提供了高效且鲁棒的基线模型，验证了视觉Transformer在医疗影像分析中的潜力。

authors_text: Sunil Pai,Olav Solgaard,Shanhui Fan,David A. B. Miller
title: Scalable and self-correcting photonic computation using balanced photonic binary tree cascades
title_zh: 使用平衡光子二叉树级联的可扩展和自校正光子计算
abstract: Programmable unitary photonic networks that interfere hundreds of modes are emerging as a key technology in energy-efficient sensing, machine learning, cryptography, and linear optical quantum computing applications. In this work, we establish a theoretical framework to quantify error tolerance and scalability in a more general class of "binary tree cascade'' programmable photonic networks that accept up to tens of thousands of discrete input modes $N$. To justify this scalability claim, we derive error tolerance and configuration time that scale with $\log_2 N$ for balanced trees versus $N$ in unbalanced trees, despite the same number of total components. Specifically, we use second-order perturbation theory to compute phase sensitivity in each waveguide of balanced and unbalanced networks, and we compute the statistics of the sensitivity given random input vectors. We also evaluate such networks after they self-correct, or self-configure, themselves for errors in the circuit due to fabrication error and environmental drift. Our findings have important implications for scaling photonic circuits to much larger circuit sizes; this scaling is particularly critical for applications such as principal component analysis and fast Fourier transforms, which are important algorithms for machine learning and signal processing.
summary: Programmable unitary photonic networks that interfere hundreds of modes are emerging as a key technology in energy-efficient sensing, machine learning, cryptography, and linear optical quantum computing applications. In this work, we establish a theoretical framework to quantify error tolerance and scalability in a more general class of "binary tree cascade'' programmable photonic networks that accept up to tens of thousands of discrete input modes $N$. To justify this scalability claim, we derive error tolerance and configuration time that scale with $\log_2 N$ for balanced trees versus $N$ in unbalanced trees, despite the same number of total components. Specifically, we use second-order perturbation theory to compute phase sensitivity in each waveguide of balanced and unbalanced networks, and we compute the statistics of the sensitivity given random input vectors. We also evaluate such networks after they self-correct, or self-configure, themselves for errors in the circuit due to fabrication error and environmental drift. Our findings have important implications for scaling photonic circuits to much larger circuit sizes; this scaling is particularly critical for applications such as principal component analysis and fast Fourier transforms, which are important algorithms for machine learning and signal processing.
abstract_zh: 干涉数百种模式的可编程单一光子网络正在成为节能传感、机器学习、密码学和线性光学量子计算应用中的关键技术。在这项工作中，我们建立了一个理论框架来量化更通用的“二叉树级联”可编程光子网络中的容错性和可扩展性，该网络接受多达数万个离散输入模式$N$。为了证明这种可扩展性声明的合理性，我们导出了平衡树的容错能力和配置时间，与不平衡树中的$N$相比，平衡树的容错能力和配置时间与不平衡树的$N$成比例，尽管总组件数量相同。具体来说，我们使用二阶扰动理论来计算平衡树和非平衡树的每个波导中的相位灵敏度。我们还计算了给定随机输入向量的灵敏度统计数据，我们还在这些网络自我校正或自我配置后评估了由于制造误差和环境漂移而导致的电路错误，我们的发现对于将光子电路扩展到更大的电路尺寸具有重要意义；这种缩放对于主成分分析和快速傅立叶变换等应用尤其重要，这些应用是机器学习和信号处理的重要算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展且可自我校正的光子计算框架，利用平衡光子二叉树级联结构量化误差容忍度和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 可编程光子网络在传感、机器学习等领域具有潜力，但现有网络在误差容忍度和扩展性方面存在局限，需解决大规模应用中的误差校正问题。
AI.method: 通过二阶微扰理论计算平衡与非平衡网络中各波导的相位灵敏度，并分析随机输入向量下的统计特性，评估自校正后网络性能。
AI.result: 平衡树结构的误差容忍度和配置时间随log₂N缩放，而非平衡树则随N线性增长，且平衡树在制造误差和环境漂移下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 平衡二叉树级联为光子电路扩展至更大规模提供了理论支持，对主成分分析和快速傅里叶变换等算法的实现具有重要意义。

authors_text: Abdel Ghani Labassi,Didier Chételat,Andrea Lodi
title: Learning to Compare Nodes in Branch and Bound with Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 学习使用图神经网络比较分支定界中的节点
abstract: Branch-and-bound approaches in integer programming require ordering portions of the space to explore next, a problem known as node comparison. We propose a new siamese graph neural network model to tackle this problem, where the nodes are represented as bipartite graphs with attributes. Similar to prior work, we train our model to imitate a diving oracle that plunges towards the optimal solution. We evaluate our method by solving the instances in a plain framework where the nodes are explored according to their rank. On three NP-hard benchmarks chosen to be particularly primal-difficult, our approach leads to faster solving and smaller branch- and-bound trees than the default ranking function of the open-source solver SCIP, as well as competing machine learning methods. Moreover, these results generalize to instances larger than used for training. Code for reproducing the experiments can be found at https://github.com/ds4dm/learn2comparenodes.
summary: Branch-and-bound approaches in integer programming require ordering portions of the space to explore next, a problem known as node comparison. We propose a new siamese graph neural network model to tackle this problem, where the nodes are represented as bipartite graphs with attributes. Similar to prior work, we train our model to imitate a diving oracle that plunges towards the optimal solution. We evaluate our method by solving the instances in a plain framework where the nodes are explored according to their rank. On three NP-hard benchmarks chosen to be particularly primal-difficult, our approach leads to faster solving and smaller branch- and-bound trees than the default ranking function of the open-source solver SCIP, as well as competing machine learning methods. Moreover, these results generalize to instances larger than used for training. Code for reproducing the experiments can be found at https://github.com/ds4dm/learn2comparenodes.
abstract_zh: 整数编程中的分支定界方法需要对空间的各个部分进行排序以进行下一步探索，这个问题称为节点比较。我们提出了一种新的暹罗图神经网络模型来解决这个问题，其中节点表示为具有属性的二分图。与之前的工作类似，我们训练我们的模型来模仿跳水神谕，跳向最佳解决方案。我们通过在一个简单的框架中解决实例来评估我们的方法，其中根据节点的等级来探索节点。在三个被选择为特别困难的 NP-hard 基准测试中，与开源求解器 SCIP 的默认排序函数以及竞争的机器学习方法相比，我们的方法可以实现更快的求解速度和更小的分支定界树。此外，这些结果可以推广到比用于训练的实例更大的实例。重现实验的代码可以在 https://github.com/ds4dm/learn2comparenodes 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用图神经网络（GNN）的暹罗模型，用于改进整数规划中分支定界法的节点比较问题，以提升求解效率。
AI.motivation: 传统的分支定界法依赖默认的节点排序策略，难以有效处理NP难问题。通过机器学习方法优化节点比较，可提升求解速度并减少搜索树规模。
AI.method: 构建暹罗图神经网络，将节点表示为带属性的二分图，通过模仿‘下潜Oracle’的训练策略学习节点排序，指导搜索方向。
AI.result: 在三个NP难基准测试中，该方法相比SCIP默认策略及其他机器学习方法，显著提升了求解速度并缩小了分支定界树规模，且结果可推广至训练集外的更大实例。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络能有效提升分支定界法的节点比较能力，为解决复杂组合优化问题提供新思路，代码已开源供复现。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种使用图神经网络（GNN）的暹罗模型，用于改进整数规划中分支定界法的节点比较问题，以提升求解效率。

search_text: Learning to Compare Nodes in Branch and Bound with Graph Neural Networks 学习使用图神经网络比较分支定界中的节点 Branch-and-bound approaches in integer programming require ordering portions of the space to explore next, a problem known as node comparison. We propose a new siamese graph neural network model to tackle this problem, where the nodes are represented as bipartite graphs with attributes. Similar to prior work, we train our model to imitate a diving oracle that plunges towards the optimal solution. We evaluate our method by solving the instances in a plain framework where the nodes are explored according to their rank. On three NP-hard benchmarks chosen to be particularly primal-difficult, our approach leads to faster solving and smaller branch- and-bound trees than the default ranking function of the open-source solver SCIP, as well as competing machine learning methods. Moreover, these results generalize to instances larger than used for training. Code for reproducing the experiments can be found at https://github.com/ds4dm/learn2comparenodes. 整数编程中的分支定界方法需要对空间的各个部分进行排序以进行下一步探索，这个问题称为节点比较。我们提出了一种新的暹罗图神经网络模型来解决这个问题，其中节点表示为具有属性的二分图。与之前的工作类似，我们训练我们的模型来模仿跳水神谕，跳向最佳解决方案。我们通过在一个简单的框架中解决实例来评估我们的方法，其中根据节点的等级来探索节点。在三个被选择为特别困难的 NP-hard 基准测试中，与开源求解器 SCIP 的默认排序函数以及竞争的机器学习方法相比，我们的方法可以实现更快的求解速度和更小的分支定界树。此外，这些结果可以推广到比用于训练的实例更大的实例。重现实验的代码可以在 https://github.com/ds4dm/learn2comparenodes 找到。 本文提出了一种使用图神经网络（GNN）的暹罗模型，用于改进整数规划中分支定界法的节点比较问题，以提升求解效率。 Abdel Ghani Labassi,Didier Chételat,Andrea Lodi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Igor Vozniak,Philipp Mueller,Lorena Hell,Nils Lipp,Ahmed Abouelazm,Christian Mueller
title: Context-empowered Visual Attention Prediction in Pedestrian Scenarios
title_zh: 行人场景中情境增强的视觉注意力预测
abstract: Effective and flexible allocation of visual attention is key for pedestrians who have to navigate to a desired goal under different conditions of urgency and safety preferences. While automatic modelling of pedestrian attention holds great promise to improve simulations of pedestrian behavior, current saliency prediction approaches mostly focus on generic free-viewing scenarios and do not reflect the specific challenges present in pedestrian attention prediction. In this paper, we present Context-SalNET, a novel encoder-decoder architecture that explicitly addresses three key challenges of visual attention prediction in pedestrians: First, Context-SalNET explicitly models the context factors urgency and safety preference in the latent space of the encoder-decoder model. Second, we propose the exponentially weighted mean squared error loss (ew-MSE) that is able to better cope with the fact that only a small part of the ground truth saliency maps consist of non-zero entries. Third, we explicitly model epistemic uncertainty to account for the fact that training data for pedestrian attention prediction is limited. To evaluate Context-SalNET, we recorded the first dataset of pedestrian visual attention in VR that includes explicit variation of the context factors urgency and safety preference. Context-SalNET achieves clear improvements over state-of-the-art saliency prediction approaches as well as over ablations. Our novel dataset will be made fully available and can serve as a valuable resource for further research on pedestrian attention prediction.
summary: Effective and flexible allocation of visual attention is key for pedestrians who have to navigate to a desired goal under different conditions of urgency and safety preferences. While automatic modelling of pedestrian attention holds great promise to improve simulations of pedestrian behavior, current saliency prediction approaches mostly focus on generic free-viewing scenarios and do not reflect the specific challenges present in pedestrian attention prediction. In this paper, we present Context-SalNET, a novel encoder-decoder architecture that explicitly addresses three key challenges of visual attention prediction in pedestrians: First, Context-SalNET explicitly models the context factors urgency and safety preference in the latent space of the encoder-decoder model. Second, we propose the exponentially weighted mean squared error loss (ew-MSE) that is able to better cope with the fact that only a small part of the ground truth saliency maps consist of non-zero entries. Third, we explicitly model epistemic uncertainty to account for the fact that training data for pedestrian attention prediction is limited. To evaluate Context-SalNET, we recorded the first dataset of pedestrian visual attention in VR that includes explicit variation of the context factors urgency and safety preference. Context-SalNET achieves clear improvements over state-of-the-art saliency prediction approaches as well as over ablations. Our novel dataset will be made fully available and can serve as a valuable resource for further research on pedestrian attention prediction.
abstract_zh: 对于必须在不同的紧急程度和安全偏好条件下导航到所需目标的行人来说，有效且灵活的视觉注意力分配是关键。虽然行人注意力的自动建模有望改善行人行为的模拟，但当前的显着性预测方法主要关注通用的自由观看场景，并没有反映行人注意力预测中存在的具体挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 Context-SalNET，这是一种新颖的编码器-解码器架构，它明确解决了行人视觉注意力预测的三个关键挑战：首先，Context-SalNET 明确地对编码器-解码器模型的潜在空间中的上下文因素紧迫性和安全偏好进行建模。其次，我们提出了指数加权均方误差损失（ew-MSE），它能够更好地应对只有一小部分地面实况显着性图由非零条目组成的事实。第三，我们明确地对认知不确定性进行建模，以解释行人注意力预测的训练数据有限的事实。为了评估 Context-SalNET，我们记录了 VR 中行人视觉注意力的第一个数据集，其中包括上下文因素紧迫性和安全偏好的显式变化。 Context-SalNET 比最先进的显着性预测方法以及消融方法取得了明显的改进。我们的新颖数据集将完全可用，并可以作为行人注意力预测进一步研究的宝贵资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Context-SalNET模型，通过融合上下文因素（紧急性和安全偏好）改进行人视觉注意力预测，并构建了首个包含这些因素的VR数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有显著性预测方法多针对通用场景，无法有效处理行人导航中紧急性和安全偏好等上下文因素对注意力的影响，且缺乏专用数据集。
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器架构显式建模上下文因素，提出指数加权均方误差损失（ew-MSE）处理稀疏标注，通过贝叶斯推断建模认识不确定性，并构建包含上下文变量的VR行人注意力数据集。
AI.result: 在新数据集上优于现有最佳方法及消融实验，验证了上下文建模、损失函数和不确定性处理的有效性，数据集将公开促进后续研究。
AI.conclusion: Context-SalNET通过上下文感知建模和专用数据集为行人注意力预测提供了新范式，推动了该领域的研究进展。

authors_text: Samyak Prajapati,Amrit Raj,Yash Chaudhari,Akhilesh Nandwal,Japman Singh Monga
title: OGInfra: Geolocating Oil & Gas Infrastructure using Remote Sensing based Active Fire Data
title_zh: OGInfra：使用基于遥感的主动火灾数据对石油和天然气基础设施进行地理定位
abstract: Remote sensing has become a crucial part of our daily lives, whether it be from triangulating our location using GPS or providing us with a weather forecast. It has multiple applications in domains such as military, socio-economical, commercial, and even in supporting humanitarian efforts. This work proposes a novel technique for the automated geo-location of Oil & Gas infrastructure with the use of Active Fire Data from the NASA FIRMS data repository & Deep Learning techniques; achieving a top accuracy of 90.68% with the use of ResNet101.
summary: Remote sensing has become a crucial part of our daily lives, whether it be from triangulating our location using GPS or providing us with a weather forecast. It has multiple applications in domains such as military, socio-economical, commercial, and even in supporting humanitarian efforts. This work proposes a novel technique for the automated geo-location of Oil & Gas infrastructure with the use of Active Fire Data from the NASA FIRMS data repository & Deep Learning techniques; achieving a top accuracy of 90.68% with the use of ResNet101.
abstract_zh: 遥感已成为我们日常生活的重要组成部分，无论是使用 GPS 三角测量我们的位置，还是为我们提供天气预报。它在军事、社会经济、商业、甚至支持人道主义努力等领域有多种应用。这项工作提出了一种利用来自 NASA FIRMS 数据存储库的主动火灾数据和深度学习技术对石油和天然气基础设施进行自动地理定位的新技术；使用 ResNet101 实现了 90.68% 的最高准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于NASA FIRMS主动火点数据和深度学习技术的自动化方法，用于精确定位油气基础设施。
AI.motivation: 遥感技术在多个领域广泛应用，但现有方法在油气设施定位上存在数据获取困难和精度不足的问题，需开发自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 利用NASA FIRMS的主动火点数据作为输入，结合ResNet101深度学习模型进行特征提取与分类，实现基础设施的地理定位。
AI.result: 在实验中达到90.68%的最高准确率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了遥感数据与深度学习结合在自动化地理定位中的潜力，为油气设施监测提供了新思路。

It has multiple applications in domains such as military, socio-economical, commercial, and even in supporting humanitarian efforts. This work proposes a novel technique for the automated geo-location of Oil & Gas infrastructure with the use of Active Fire Data from the NASA FIRMS data repository & Deep Learning techniques; achieving a top accuracy of 90.68% with the use of ResNet101. 遥感已成为我们日常生活的重要组成部分，无论是使用 GPS 三角测量我们的位置，还是为我们提供天气预报。它在军事、社会经济、商业、甚至支持人道主义努力等领域有多种应用。这项工作提出了一种利用来自 NASA FIRMS 数据存储库的主动火灾数据和深度学习技术对石油和天然气基础设施进行自动地理定位的新技术；使用 ResNet101 实现了 90.68% 的最高准确率。 本文提出一种基于NASA FIRMS主动火点数据和深度学习技术的自动化方法，用于精确定位油气基础设施。 Samyak Prajapati,Amrit Raj,Yash Chaudhari,Akhilesh Nandwal,Japman Singh Monga cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Megan Heath,Ali Imran,David St-Onge
title: See as a Bee: UV Sensor for Aerial Strawberry Crop Monitoring
title_zh: 像蜜蜂一样看待：用于空中草莓作物监测的紫外线传感器
comment: The video reference is: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZSasfgOsjAY. This paper has been submitted to ICRA 2023
comments: The video reference is: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZSasfgOsjAY. This paper has been submitted to ICRA 2023
abstract: Precision agriculture aims to use technological tools for the agro-food sector to increase productivity, cut labor costs, and reduce the use of resources. This work takes inspiration from bees vision to design a remote sensing system tailored to incorporate UV-reflectance into a flower detector. We demonstrate how this approach can provide feature-rich images for deep learning strawberry flower detection and we apply it to a scalable, yet cost effective aerial monitoring robotic system in the field. We also compare the performance of our UV-G-B image detector with a similar work that utilizes RGB images.
summary: Precision agriculture aims to use technological tools for the agro-food sector to increase productivity, cut labor costs, and reduce the use of resources. This work takes inspiration from bees vision to design a remote sensing system tailored to incorporate UV-reflectance into a flower detector. We demonstrate how this approach can provide feature-rich images for deep learning strawberry flower detection and we apply it to a scalable, yet cost effective aerial monitoring robotic system in the field. We also compare the performance of our UV-G-B image detector with a similar work that utilizes RGB images.
abstract_zh: 精准农业旨在利用农业食品领域的技术工具来提高生产力、降低劳动力成本并减少资源的使用。这项工作从蜜蜂视觉中汲取灵感，设计了一种专门将紫外线反射率融入花朵探测器的遥感系统。我们演示了这种方法如何为深度学习草莓花检测提供功能丰富的图像，并将其应用于现场可扩展且具有成本效益的空中监测机器人系统。我们还将 UV-G-B 图像检测器的性能与使用 RGB 图像的类似工作进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于紫外线传感器的空中草莓作物监测系统，通过模仿蜜蜂视觉特性提升花检测性能。
AI.motivation: 精准农业需要高效低成本的作物监测技术，而蜜蜂对紫外线敏感的视觉特性可增强花朵检测能力，现有RGB图像方法存在局限。
AI.method: 开发集成UV反射检测的UV-G-B图像传感器，结合深度学习算法实现草莓花检测，并与RGB图像方法进行性能对比测试。
AI.result: UV-G-B图像检测器在草莓花识别准确率上优于RGB方法，且适用于低成本规模化无人机监测系统。
AI.conclusion: 基于生物启发的紫外线传感技术能有效提升农业监测精度，为精准农业提供可行的传感器解决方案。

authors_text: Riad Ibadulla,Thomas M. Chen,Constantino Carlos Reyes-Aldasoro
title: FatNet: High Resolution Kernels for Classification Using Fully Convolutional Optical Neural Networks
title_zh: FatNet：使用全卷积光神经网络进行分类的高分辨率内核
abstract: This paper describes the transformation of a traditional in-silico classification network into an optical fully convolutional neural network with high-resolution feature maps and kernels. When using the free-space 4f system to accelerate the inference speed of neural networks, higher resolutions of feature maps and kernels can be used without the loss in frame rate. We present FatNet for the classification of images, which is more compatible with free-space acceleration than standard convolutional classifiers. It neglects the standard combination of convolutional feature extraction and classifier dense layers by performing both in one fully convolutional network. This approach takes full advantage of the parallelism in the 4f free-space system and performs fewer conversions between electronics and optics by reducing the number of channels and increasing the resolution, making the network faster in optics than off-the-shelf networks. To demonstrate the capabilities of FatNet, it trained with the CIFAR100 dataset on GPU and the simulator of the 4f system, then compared the results against ResNet-18. The results show 8.2 times fewer convolution operations at the cost of only 6% lower accuracy compared to the original network. These are promising results for the approach of training deep learning with high-resolution kernels in the direction towards the upcoming optics era.
summary: This paper describes the transformation of a traditional in-silico classification network into an optical fully convolutional neural network with high-resolution feature maps and kernels. When using the free-space 4f system to accelerate the inference speed of neural networks, higher resolutions of feature maps and kernels can be used without the loss in frame rate. We present FatNet for the classification of images, which is more compatible with free-space acceleration than standard convolutional classifiers. It neglects the standard combination of convolutional feature extraction and classifier dense layers by performing both in one fully convolutional network. This approach takes full advantage of the parallelism in the 4f free-space system and performs fewer conversions between electronics and optics by reducing the number of channels and increasing the resolution, making the network faster in optics than off-the-shelf networks. To demonstrate the capabilities of FatNet, it trained with the CIFAR100 dataset on GPU and the simulator of the 4f system, then compared the results against ResNet-18. The results show 8.2 times fewer convolution operations at the cost of only 6% lower accuracy compared to the original network. These are promising results for the approach of training deep learning with high-resolution kernels in the direction towards the upcoming optics era.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了传统的计算机分类网络到具有高分辨率特征图和内核的光学全卷积神经网络的转变。当使用自由空间4f系统来加速神经网络的推理速度时，可以使用更高分辨率的特征图和内核，而不会损失帧率。我们提出了用于图像分类的 FatNet，它比标准卷积分类器更兼容自由空间加速。它通过在一个全卷积网络中执行卷积特征提取和分类器密集层来忽略卷积特征提取和分类器密集层的标准组合。这种方法充分利用了 4f 自由空间系统中的并行性，通过减少通道数量和提高分辨率来执行更少的电子和光学之间的转换，使光学网络比现成的网络更快。为了展示 FatNet 的功能，它使用 GPU 上的 CIFAR100 数据集和 4f 系统的模拟器进行训练，然后将结果与 ResNet-18 进行比较。结果显示，与原始网络相比，卷积运算减少了 8.2 倍，而精度仅降低了 6%。这些对于在即将到来的光学时代的方向上使用高分辨率内核训练深度学习的方法来说是有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FatNet，一种利用高分辨率内核和全卷积结构的光学神经网络，用于图像分类任务，并通过4f自由空间系统加速推理过程。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积网络在光学加速系统中因分辨率限制导致性能下降，需设计兼容光学加速的网络结构以提升计算效率并减少电子与光学模块间的转换。
AI.method: 通过全卷积网络整合特征提取与分类功能，提高内核分辨率并减少通道数量，利用4f系统并行性；在CIFAR100数据集上训练并与ResNet-18对比验证。
AI.result: 相比ResNet-18，FatNet减少8.2倍卷积运算量，仅损失6%准确率，验证了高分辨率内核在光学加速中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FatNet为光学计算时代的深度学习提供了可行方案，证明了高分辨率内核与全卷积结构在光学加速中的潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出FatNet，一种利用高分辨率内核和全卷积结构的光学神经网络，用于图像分类任务，并通过4f自由空间系统加速推理过程。

When using the free-space 4f system to accelerate the inference speed of neural networks, higher resolutions of feature maps and kernels can be used without the loss in frame rate. We present FatNet for the classification of images, which is more compatible with free-space acceleration than standard convolutional classifiers. It neglects the standard combination of convolutional feature extraction and classifier dense layers by performing both in one fully convolutional network. To demonstrate the capabilities of FatNet, it trained with the CIFAR100 dataset on GPU and the simulator of the 4f system, then compared the results against ResNet-18. The results show 8.2 times fewer convolution operations at the cost of only 6% lower accuracy compared to the original network. Chen,Constantino Carlos Reyes-Aldasoro cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Mohammad Ali Alomrani,Mahdi Biparva,Yingxue Zhang,Mark Coates
title: DyG2Vec: Efficient Representation Learning for Dynamic Graphs
title_zh: DyG2Vec：动态图的高效表示学习
abstract: Temporal graph neural networks have shown promising results in learning inductive representations by automatically extracting temporal patterns. However, previous works often rely on complex memory modules or inefficient random walk methods to construct temporal representations. To address these limitations, we present an efficient yet effective attention-based encoder that leverages temporal edge encodings and window-based subgraph sampling to generate task-agnostic embeddings. Moreover, we propose a joint-embedding architecture using non-contrastive SSL to learn rich temporal embeddings without labels. Experimental results on 7 benchmark datasets indicate that on average, our model outperforms SoTA baselines on the future link prediction task by 4.23% for the transductive setting and 3.30% for the inductive setting while only requiring 5-10x less training/inference time. Lastly, different aspects of the proposed framework are investigated through experimental analysis and ablation studies. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/graph_atlas.
summary: Temporal graph neural networks have shown promising results in learning inductive representations by automatically extracting temporal patterns. However, previous works often rely on complex memory modules or inefficient random walk methods to construct temporal representations. To address these limitations, we present an efficient yet effective attention-based encoder that leverages temporal edge encodings and window-based subgraph sampling to generate task-agnostic embeddings. Moreover, we propose a joint-embedding architecture using non-contrastive SSL to learn rich temporal embeddings without labels. Experimental results on 7 benchmark datasets indicate that on average, our model outperforms SoTA baselines on the future link prediction task by 4.23% for the transductive setting and 3.30% for the inductive setting while only requiring 5-10x less training/inference time. Lastly, different aspects of the proposed framework are investigated through experimental analysis and ablation studies. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/graph_atlas.
abstract_zh: 时间图神经网络在通过自动提取时间模式来学习归纳表示方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，以前的工作通常依赖复杂的内存模块或低效的随机游走方法来构建时间表示。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种高效且有效的基于注意力的编码器，它利用时间边缘编码和基于窗口的子图采样来生成与任务无关的嵌入。此外，我们提出了一种使用非对比 SSL 的联合嵌入架构来学习丰富的无标签时间嵌入。 7 个基准数据集的实验结果表明，平均而言，我们的模型在未来链路预测任务上，在传导设置上比 SoTA 基线高 4.23%，在归纳设置上比 SoTA 基线高 3.30%，而只需要 5-10 倍的训练/推理时间。最后，通过实验分析和消融研究对所提出框架的不同方面进行了研究。代码公开于 https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/graph_atlas。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DyG2Vec动态图表示学习框架，专注于高效学习时序图结构并预测未来链接。
AI.motivation: 现有动态图神经网络依赖复杂记忆模块或低效随机游走方法，导致计算效率低下且难以提取时序特征。
AI.method: 设计基于注意力机制的编码器，结合时间边编码与窗口子图采样生成嵌入；采用无标签的非对比SSL联合嵌入架构学习时序特征。
AI.result: 在7个基准数据集上，未来链接预测任务中平均超越SOTA基线4.23%（归纳设置）和3.30%（转导设置），训练/推理时间减少5-10倍。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架在保持高预测精度的同时显著提升计算效率，代码开源便于复现与应用。

search_text: DyG2Vec: Efficient Representation Learning for Dynamic Graphs DyG2Vec：动态图的高效表示学习 Temporal graph neural networks have shown promising results in learning inductive representations by automatically extracting temporal patterns. However, previous works often rely on complex memory modules or inefficient random walk methods to construct temporal representations. To address these limitations, we present an efficient yet effective attention-based encoder that leverages temporal edge encodings and window-based subgraph sampling to generate task-agnostic embeddings. Moreover, we propose a joint-embedding architecture using non-contrastive SSL to learn rich temporal embeddings without labels. Experimental results on 7 benchmark datasets indicate that on average, our model outperforms SoTA baselines on the future link prediction task by 4.23% for the transductive setting and 3.30% for the inductive setting while only requiring 5-10x less training/inference time. Lastly, different aspects of the proposed framework are investigated through experimental analysis and ablation studies. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/graph_atlas. 时间图神经网络在通过自动提取时间模式来学习归纳表示方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，以前的工作通常依赖复杂的内存模块或低效的随机游走方法来构建时间表示。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种高效且有效的基于注意力的编码器，它利用时间边缘编码和基于窗口的子图采样来生成与任务无关的嵌入。此外，我们提出了一种使用非对比 SSL 的联合嵌入架构来学习丰富的无标签时间嵌入。 7 个基准数据集的实验结果表明，平均而言，我们的模型在未来链路预测任务上，在传导设置上比 SoTA 基线高 4.23%，在归纳设置上比 SoTA 基线高 3.30%，而只需要 5-10 倍的训练/推理时间。最后，通过实验分析和消融研究对所提出框架的不同方面进行了研究。代码公开于 https://github.com/huawei-noah/noah-research/tree/master/graph_atlas。 本文提出DyG2Vec动态图表示学习框架，专注于高效学习时序图结构并预测未来链接。 Mohammad Ali Alomrani,Mahdi Biparva,Yingxue Zhang,Mark Coates cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Travis Munyer,Daniel Brinkman,Xin Zhong,Chenyu Huang,Iason Konstantzos
title: Foreign Object Debris Detection for Airport Pavement Images based on Self-supervised Localization and Vision Transformer
title_zh: 基于自监督定位和视觉变换器的机场路面图像异物碎片检测
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication by the 2022 International Conference on Computational Science & Computational Intelligence (CSCI'22), Research Track on Signal & Image Processing, Computer Vision & Pattern Recognition
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication by the 2022 International Conference on Computational Science & Computational Intelligence (CSCI'22), Research Track on Signal & Image Processing, Computer Vision & Pattern Recognition
abstract: Supervised object detection methods provide subpar performance when applied to Foreign Object Debris (FOD) detection because FOD could be arbitrary objects according to the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) specification. Current supervised object detection algorithms require datasets that contain annotated examples of every to-be-detected object. While a large and expensive dataset could be developed to include common FOD examples, it is infeasible to collect all possible FOD examples in the dataset representation because of the open-ended nature of FOD. Limitations of the dataset could cause FOD detection systems driven by those supervised algorithms to miss certain FOD, which can become dangerous to airport operations. To this end, this paper presents a self-supervised FOD localization by learning to predict the runway images, which avoids the enumeration of FOD annotation examples. The localization method utilizes the Vision Transformer (ViT) to improve localization performance. The experiments show that the method successfully detects arbitrary FOD in real-world runway situations. The paper also provides an extension to the localization result to perform classification; a feature that can be useful to downstream tasks. To train the localization, this paper also presents a simple and realistic dataset creation framework that only collects clean runway images. The training and testing data for this method are collected at a local airport using unmanned aircraft systems (UAS). Additionally, the developed dataset is provided for public use and further studies.

Current supervised object detection algorithms require datasets that contain annotated examples of every to-be-detected object. While a large and expensive dataset could be developed to include common FOD examples, it is infeasible to collect all possible FOD examples in the dataset representation because of the open-ended nature of FOD. Limitations of the dataset could cause FOD detection systems driven by those supervised algorithms to miss certain FOD, which can become dangerous to airport operations. To this end, this paper presents a self-supervised FOD localization by learning to predict the runway images, which avoids the enumeration of FOD annotation examples. The localization method utilizes the Vision Transformer (ViT) to improve localization performance. The experiments show that the method successfully detects arbitrary FOD in real-world runway situations. The paper also provides an extension to the localization result to perform classification; a feature that can be useful to downstream tasks. To train the localization, this paper also presents a simple and realistic dataset creation framework that only collects clean runway images. The training and testing data for this method are collected at a local airport using unmanned aircraft systems (UAS). Additionally, the developed dataset is provided for public use and further studies.
abstract_zh: 监督对象检测方法在应用于异物碎片 (FOD) 检测时性能不佳，因为根据联邦航空管理局 (FAA) 规范，FOD 可能是任意对象。当前的监督对象检测算法需要包含每个待检测对象的带注释示例的数据集。虽然可以开发一个大型且昂贵的数据集来包含常见的 FOD 示例，但由于 FOD 的开放性，在数据集表示中收集所有可能的 FOD 示例是不可行的。数据集的局限性可能会导致由这些监督算法驱动的 FOD 检测系统错过某些 FOD，这可能对机场运营造成危险。为此，本文通过学习预测跑道图像提出了一种自监督的 FOD 定位，避免了 FOD 注释示例的枚举。该定位方法利用视觉变换器（ViT）来提高定位性能。实验表明，该方法成功地检测到现实跑道情况下的任意 FOD。论文还提供了对定位结果的扩展来执行分类；对下游任务有用的功能。为了训练定位，本文还提出了一个简单而现实的数据集创建框架，仅收集干净的跑道图像。该方法的训练和测试数据是使用无人机系统（UAS）在当地机场收集的。此外，开发的数据集可供公众使用和进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督定位和视觉Transformer（ViT）的机场道面图像异物检测方法，无需依赖全面标注数据集即可检测任意形状的异物。
AI.motivation: 传统监督检测方法因需标注所有可能异物而难以覆盖开放性异物检测需求，导致漏检风险；本文旨在通过自监督学习解决标注数据不足问题，提升机场运行安全。
AI.method: 利用自监督学习预测跑道图像并结合ViT进行定位，通过无人机采集清洁跑道图像构建数据集，扩展定位结果实现分类功能以支持下游任务。
AI.result: 实验表明方法可成功检测真实跑道场景中的任意异物，且提供的公开数据集为后续研究奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统监督检测的局限性，为开放性异物检测提供了可行方案，并通过公开数据集促进相关领域研究发展。

authors_text: Azin Jahedi,Maximilian Luz,Lukas Mehl,Marc Rivinius,Andrés Bruhn
title: High Resolution Multi-Scale RAFT (Robust Vision Challenge 2022)
title_zh: 高分辨率多尺度 RAFT（鲁棒视觉挑战赛 2022）
comment: Technical report for the Robust Vision Challenge 2022
comments: Technical report for the Robust Vision Challenge 2022
abstract: In this report, we present our optical flow approach, MS-RAFT+, that won the Robust Vision Challenge 2022. It is based on the MS-RAFT method, which successfully integrates several multi-scale concepts into single-scale RAFT. Our approach extends this method by exploiting an additional finer scale for estimating the flow, which is made feasible by on-demand cost computation. This way, it can not only operate at half the original resolution, but also use MS-RAFT's shared convex upsampler to obtain full resolution flow. Moreover, our approach relies on an adjusted fine-tuning scheme during training. This in turn aims at improving the generalization across benchmarks. Among all participating methods in the Robust Vision Challenge, our approach ranks first on VIPER and second on KITTI, Sintel, and Middlebury, resulting in the first place of the overall ranking.
summary: In this report, we present our optical flow approach, MS-RAFT+, that won the Robust Vision Challenge 2022. It is based on the MS-RAFT method, which successfully integrates several multi-scale concepts into single-scale RAFT. Our approach extends this method by exploiting an additional finer scale for estimating the flow, which is made feasible by on-demand cost computation. This way, it can not only operate at half the original resolution, but also use MS-RAFT's shared convex upsampler to obtain full resolution flow. Moreover, our approach relies on an adjusted fine-tuning scheme during training. This in turn aims at improving the generalization across benchmarks. Among all participating methods in the Robust Vision Challenge, our approach ranks first on VIPER and second on KITTI, Sintel, and Middlebury, resulting in the first place of the overall ranking.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了我们的光流方法 MS-RAFT+，该方法赢得了 2022 年鲁棒视觉挑战赛。它基于 MS-RAFT 方法，该方法成功地将多个多尺度概念集成到单尺度 RAFT 中。我们的方法通过利用额外的更精细的尺度来估计流量来扩展该方法，这通过按需成本计算变得可行。这样，它不仅可以在原始分辨率的一半下运行，还可以使用MS-RAFT的共享凸上采样器来获得全分辨率流。此外，我们的方法依赖于训练期间调整的微调方案。这反过来又旨在提高跨基准的泛化性。在 Robust Vision Challenge 的所有参赛方法中，我们的方法在 VIPER 上排名第一，在 KITTI、Sintel 和 Middlebury 上排名第二，从而获得总体排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MS-RAFT+的光流估计方法，在Robust Vision Challenge 2022中取得第一名，并通过多尺度优化和训练策略改进了模型性能。
AI.motivation: 为提升光流估计的鲁棒性和分辨率，需在单尺度RAFT基础上引入更精细的多尺度机制，并优化跨基准的泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于MS-RAFT方法，增加更细粒度的尺度进行流估计，结合按需成本计算实现半分辨率运算，并利用共享凸优化上采样器获得全分辨率结果；同时调整训练阶段的微调策略。
AI.result: 在VIPER数据集上排名第一，在KITTI、Sintel和Middlebury数据集上排名第二，最终综合排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 通过多尺度细化和训练策略优化，MS-RAFT+有效提升了光流估计的精度与鲁棒性，验证了方法在实际竞赛场景中的优越性。

motivation: 为提升光流估计的鲁棒性和分辨率，需在单尺度RAFT基础上引入更精细的多尺度机制，并优化跨基准的泛化能力。
method: 基于MS-RAFT方法，增加更细粒度的尺度进行流估计，结合按需成本计算实现半分辨率运算，并利用共享凸优化上采样器获得全分辨率结果；同时调整训练阶段的微调策略。
result: 在VIPER数据集上排名第一，在KITTI、Sintel和Middlebury数据集上排名第二，最终综合排名第一。
conclusion: 通过多尺度细化和训练策略优化，MS-RAFT+有效提升了光流估计的精度与鲁棒性，验证了方法在实际竞赛场景中的优越性。
search_text: High Resolution Multi-Scale RAFT (Robust Vision Challenge 2022) 高分辨率多尺度 RAFT（鲁棒视觉挑战赛 2022） In this report, we present our optical flow approach, MS-RAFT+, that won the Robust Vision Challenge 2022. It is based on the MS-RAFT method, which successfully integrates several multi-scale concepts into single-scale RAFT. Our approach extends this method by exploiting an additional finer scale for estimating the flow, which is made feasible by on-demand cost computation. This way, it can not only operate at half the original resolution, but also use MS-RAFT's shared convex upsampler to obtain full resolution flow. Moreover, our approach relies on an adjusted fine-tuning scheme during training. This in turn aims at improving the generalization across benchmarks. Among all participating methods in the Robust Vision Challenge, our approach ranks first on VIPER and second on KITTI, Sintel, and Middlebury, resulting in the first place of the overall ranking. 在本报告中，我们介绍了我们的光流方法 MS-RAFT+，该方法赢得了 2022 年鲁棒视觉挑战赛。它基于 MS-RAFT 方法，该方法成功地将多个多尺度概念集成到单尺度 RAFT 中。我们的方法通过利用额外的更精细的尺度来估计流量来扩展该方法，这通过按需成本计算变得可行。这样，它不仅可以在原始分辨率的一半下运行，还可以使用MS-RAFT的共享凸上采样器来获得全分辨率流。此外，我们的方法依赖于训练期间调整的微调方案。这反过来又旨在提高跨基准的泛化性。在 Robust Vision Challenge 的所有参赛方法中，我们的方法在 VIPER 上排名第一，在 KITTI、Sintel 和 Middlebury 上排名第二，从而获得总体排名第一。 本文提出了一种名为MS-RAFT+的光流估计方法，在Robust Vision Challenge 2022中取得第一名，并通过多尺度优化和训练策略改进了模型性能。 Azin Jahedi,Maximilian Luz,Lukas Mehl,Marc Rivinius,Andrés Bruhn cs.CV

authors_text: Ehsan Khodapanah Aghdam,Reza Azad,Maral Zarvani,Dorit Merhof
title: Attention Swin U-Net: Cross-Contextual Attention Mechanism for Skin Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: Attention Swin U-Net：皮肤病变分割的跨上下文注意力机制
abstract: Melanoma is caused by the abnormal growth of melanocytes in human skin. Like other cancers, this life-threatening skin cancer can be treated with early diagnosis. To support a diagnosis by automatic skin lesion segmentation, several Fully Convolutional Network (FCN) approaches, specifically the U-Net architecture, have been proposed. The U-Net model with a symmetrical architecture has exhibited superior performance in the segmentation task. However, the locality restriction of the convolutional operation incorporated in the U-Net architecture limits its performance in capturing long-range dependency, which is crucial for the segmentation task in medical images. To address this limitation, recently a Transformer based U-Net architecture that replaces the CNN blocks with the Swin Transformer module has been proposed to capture both local and global representation. In this paper, we propose Att-SwinU-Net, an attention-based Swin U-Net extension, for medical image segmentation. In our design, we seek to enhance the feature re-usability of the network by carefully designing the skip connection path. We argue that the classical concatenation operation utilized in the skip connection path can be further improved by incorporating an attention mechanism. By performing a comprehensive ablation study on several skin lesion segmentation datasets, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed attention mechanism.
summary: Melanoma is caused by the abnormal growth of melanocytes in human skin. Like other cancers, this life-threatening skin cancer can be treated with early diagnosis. To support a diagnosis by automatic skin lesion segmentation, several Fully Convolutional Network (FCN) approaches, specifically the U-Net architecture, have been proposed. The U-Net model with a symmetrical architecture has exhibited superior performance in the segmentation task. However, the locality restriction of the convolutional operation incorporated in the U-Net architecture limits its performance in capturing long-range dependency, which is crucial for the segmentation task in medical images. To address this limitation, recently a Transformer based U-Net architecture that replaces the CNN blocks with the Swin Transformer module has been proposed to capture both local and global representation. In this paper, we propose Att-SwinU-Net, an attention-based Swin U-Net extension, for medical image segmentation. In our design, we seek to enhance the feature re-usability of the network by carefully designing the skip connection path. We argue that the classical concatenation operation utilized in the skip connection path can be further improved by incorporating an attention mechanism. By performing a comprehensive ablation study on several skin lesion segmentation datasets, we demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed attention mechanism.
abstract_zh: 黑色素瘤是由人体皮肤黑色素细胞异常生长引起的。与其他癌症一样，这种危及生命的皮肤癌可以通过早期诊断进行治疗。为了支持自动皮肤病变分割的诊断，已经提出了几种全卷积网络（FCN）方法，特别是 U-Net 架构。具有对称架构的U-Net模型在分割任务中表现出了优越的性能。然而，U-Net 架构中卷积运算的局部性限制限制了其捕获长程依赖性的性能，而这对于医学图像的分割任务至关重要。为了解决这个限制，最近提出了一种基于 Transformer 的 U-Net 架构，用 Swin Transformer 模块取代 CNN 块来捕获局部和全局表示。在本文中，我们提出了 Att-SwinU-Net，一种基于注意力的 Swin U-Net 扩展，用于医学图像分割。在我们的设计中，我们寻求通过仔细设计跳过连接路径来增强网络的功能可重用性。我们认为，通过合并注意力机制，可以进一步改进跳跃连接路径中使用的经典串联操作。通过对几个皮肤病变分割数据集进行全面的消融研究，我们证明了我们提出的注意力机制的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的Swin U-Net模型（Att-SwinU-Net），用于改进皮肤病变分割任务中的长距离依赖捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net因卷积操作的局部性限制难以捕捉医学图像中的长距离依赖关系，而现有基于Swin Transformer的U-Net未充分优化跳跃连接的特征复用性。
AI.method: 设计Att-SwinU-Net模型，用Swin Transformer模块替代CNN块，并在跳跃连接路径中引入注意力机制以增强特征复用性。
AI.result: 在多个皮肤病变分割数据集上的消融实验表明，所提出的注意力机制有效提升了分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过注意力机制优化跳跃连接，Att-SwinU-Net在医学图像分割任务中实现了更优的特征利用与分割效果。

authors_text: Shan Zhang,Naila Murray,Lei Wang,Piotr Koniusz
title: Time-rEversed diffusioN tEnsor Transformer: A new TENET of Few-Shot Object Detection
title_zh: 时间反演扩散张量变换器：少样本目标检测的新原理
comment: Accepted at the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 17th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2022)
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the challenging problem of Few-shot Object Detection. Existing FSOD pipelines (i) use average-pooled representations that result in information loss; and/or (ii) discard position information that can help detect object instances. Consequently, such pipelines are sensitive to large intra-class appearance and geometric variations between support and query images. To address these drawbacks, we propose a Time-rEversed diffusioN tEnsor Transformer (TENET), which i) forms high-order tensor representations that capture multi-way feature occurrences that are highly discriminative, and ii) uses a transformer that dynamically extracts correlations between the query image and the entire support set, instead of a single average-pooled support embedding. We also propose a Transformer Relation Head (TRH), equipped with higher-order representations, which encodes correlations between query regions and the entire support set, while being sensitive to the positional variability of object instances. Our model achieves state-of-the-art results on PASCAL VOC, FSOD, and COCO.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the challenging problem of Few-shot Object Detection. Existing FSOD pipelines (i) use average-pooled representations that result in information loss; and/or (ii) discard position information that can help detect object instances. Consequently, such pipelines are sensitive to large intra-class appearance and geometric variations between support and query images. To address these drawbacks, we propose a Time-rEversed diffusioN tEnsor Transformer (TENET), which i) forms high-order tensor representations that capture multi-way feature occurrences that are highly discriminative, and ii) uses a transformer that dynamically extracts correlations between the query image and the entire support set, instead of a single average-pooled support embedding. We also propose a Transformer Relation Head (TRH), equipped with higher-order representations, which encodes correlations between query regions and the entire support set, while being sensitive to the positional variability of object instances. Our model achieves state-of-the-art results on PASCAL VOC, FSOD, and COCO.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了少镜头目标检测的挑战性问题。现有的 FSOD 管道 (i) 使用平均池化表示，导致信息丢失；和/或（ii）丢弃可以帮助检测对象实例的位置信息。因此，此类管道对大的类内外观以及支持图像和查询图像之间的几何变化敏感。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了一种时间反转扩散向量变换器（TENET），它 i）形成高阶张量表示，捕获具有高度辨别力的多路特征出现，ii）使用动态提取查询图像和整个支持集之间的相关性的变换器，而不是单个平均池支持嵌入。我们还提出了一个配备高阶表示的 Transformer Relation Head (TRH)，它对查询区域和整个支持集之间的相关性进行编码，同时对对象实例的位置变化敏感。我们的模型在 PASCAL VOC、FSOD 和 COCO 上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型少样本目标检测方法TENET，解决现有方法在特征表示和位置信息利用上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本检测方法因使用平均池化表示导致信息丢失，且忽略位置信息，难以应对类内外观和几何变化带来的挑战。
AI.method: 设计时序反转扩散张量Transformer（TENET），通过高阶张量捕捉多维特征关联，并采用动态Transformer提取查询图像与支持集的全局相关性，结合Transformer关系头（TRH）编码区域级位置可变性。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC、FSOD和COCO数据集上均达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: TENET通过高阶特征表示与动态相关性建模，有效提升了少样本目标检测对类内差异的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Sathvik Udupa,Prasanta Kumar Ghosh
title: Real-Time MRI Video synthesis from time aligned phonemes with sequence-to-sequence networks
title_zh: 使用序列到序列网络从时间对齐的音素进行实时 MRI 视频合成
abstract: Real-Time Magnetic resonance imaging (rtMRI) of the midsagittal plane of the mouth is of interest for speech production research. In this work, we focus on estimating utterance level rtMRI video from the spoken phoneme sequence. We obtain time-aligned phonemes from forced alignment, to obtain frame-level phoneme sequences which are aligned with rtMRI frames. We propose a sequence-to-sequence learning model with a transformer phoneme encoder and convolutional frame decoder. We then modify the learning by using intermediary features obtained from sampling from a pretrained phoneme-conditioned variational autoencoder (CVAE). We train on 8 subjects in a subject-specific manner and demonstrate the performance with a subjective test. We also use an auxiliary task of air tissue boundary (ATB) segmentation to obtain the objective scores on the proposed models. We show that the proposed method is able to generate realistic rtMRI video for unseen utterances, and adding CVAE is beneficial for learning the sequence-to-sequence mapping for subjects where the mapping is hard to learn.
summary: Real-Time Magnetic resonance imaging (rtMRI) of the midsagittal plane of the mouth is of interest for speech production research. In this work, we focus on estimating utterance level rtMRI video from the spoken phoneme sequence. We obtain time-aligned phonemes from forced alignment, to obtain frame-level phoneme sequences which are aligned with rtMRI frames. We propose a sequence-to-sequence learning model with a transformer phoneme encoder and convolutional frame decoder. We then modify the learning by using intermediary features obtained from sampling from a pretrained phoneme-conditioned variational autoencoder (CVAE). We train on 8 subjects in a subject-specific manner and demonstrate the performance with a subjective test. We also use an auxiliary task of air tissue boundary (ATB) segmentation to obtain the objective scores on the proposed models. We show that the proposed method is able to generate realistic rtMRI video for unseen utterances, and adding CVAE is beneficial for learning the sequence-to-sequence mapping for subjects where the mapping is hard to learn.
abstract_zh: 口腔正中矢状面的实时磁共振成像（rtMRI）对于语音产生研究很有意义。在这项工作中，我们专注于根据口语音素序列估计言语水平 rtMRI 视频。我们通过强制对齐获得时间对齐的音素，从而获得与 rtMRI 帧对齐的帧级音素序列。我们提出了一种带有变压器音素编码器和卷积帧解码器的序列到序列学习模型。然后，我们使用从预训练的音素条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）采样获得的中间特征来修改学习。我们以特定主题的方式对 8 个主题进行训练，并通过主观测试来展示表现。我们还使用空气组织边界（ATB）分割的辅助任务来获得所提出模型的客观分数。我们表明，所提出的方法能够为看不见的话语生成真实的 rtMRI 视频，并且添加 CVAE 有利于学习映射难以学习的受试者的序列到序列映射。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于序列到序列网络的实时磁共振成像（rtMRI）视频合成方法，通过时间对齐的音素序列生成口部中矢状面的实时MRI视频。
AI.motivation: 实时MRI对语音产生研究具有重要意义，但如何从音素序列估计完整utterance级别的rtMRI视频仍存在挑战，需探索更有效的序列映射学习方法。
AI.method: 采用Transformer音素编码器与卷积帧解码器的序列到序列模型，结合预训练音素条件变分自编码器（CVAE）的中间特征进行优化，并通过气-组织边界分割辅助任务提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在8名受试者上验证了方法有效性，主观测试显示可生成真实感rtMRI视频，CVAE的引入显著提升了映射困难受试者的模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能够生成未见过utterance的高质量rtMRI视频，CVAE特征融合有效增强了序列映射学习，尤其对复杂映射场景具有显著提升。

authors_text: Dilip Arumugam,Mark K. Ho,Noah D. Goodman,Benjamin Van Roy
title: On Rate-Distortion Theory in Capacity-Limited Cognition & Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 能力有限认知与强化学习中的率失真理论
comment: Accepted to the NeurIPS Workshop on Information-Theoretic Principles in Cognitive Systems (InfoCog) 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.02072
comments: Accepted to the NeurIPS Workshop on Information-Theoretic Principles in Cognitive Systems (InfoCog) 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.02072
abstract: Throughout the cognitive-science literature, there is widespread agreement that decision-making agents operating in the real world do so under limited information-processing capabilities and without access to unbounded cognitive or computational resources. Prior work has drawn inspiration from this fact and leveraged an information-theoretic model of such behaviors or policies as communication channels operating under a bounded rate constraint. Meanwhile, a parallel line of work also capitalizes on the same principles from rate-distortion theory to formalize capacity-limited decision making through the notion of a learning target, which facilitates Bayesian regret bounds for provably-efficient learning algorithms. In this paper, we aim to elucidate this latter perspective by presenting a brief survey of these information-theoretic models of capacity-limited decision making in biological and artificial agents.
summary: Throughout the cognitive-science literature, there is widespread agreement that decision-making agents operating in the real world do so under limited information-processing capabilities and without access to unbounded cognitive or computational resources. Prior work has drawn inspiration from this fact and leveraged an information-theoretic model of such behaviors or policies as communication channels operating under a bounded rate constraint. Meanwhile, a parallel line of work also capitalizes on the same principles from rate-distortion theory to formalize capacity-limited decision making through the notion of a learning target, which facilitates Bayesian regret bounds for provably-efficient learning algorithms. In this paper, we aim to elucidate this latter perspective by presenting a brief survey of these information-theoretic models of capacity-limited decision making in biological and artificial agents.
abstract_zh: 在整个认知科学文献中，人们普遍认为，在现实世界中运作的决策主体是在有限的信息处理能力和无法访问无限的认知或计算资源的情况下这样做的。先前的工作从这一事实中汲取了灵感，并利用了此类行为或政策的信息论模型作为在有界速率约束下运行的通信渠道。与此同时，并行的工作也利用了率失真理论的相同原理，通过学习目标的概念将容量有限的决策形式化，这有利于贝叶斯后悔界限，以实现可证明有效的学习算法。在本文中，我们旨在通过对生物和人工智能体中容量有限决策的信息论模型进行简要调查来阐明后一种观点。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了信息论模型在容量有限的认知与强化学习中的应用，探讨了生物和人工代理在有限资源下的决策机制。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的决策代理面临信息处理能力限制，需在有限资源下进行高效决策，而现有研究需整合不同信息论方法以形成统一框架。
AI.method: 通过回顾和分析信息论模型，特别是基于率失真理论的学习目标框架，探讨其在容量受限决策中的应用。
AI.result: 总结了不同信息论模型在容量有限决策中的应用，并指出了其在生物和人工系统中的潜在联系与挑战。
AI.conclusion: 整合通信通道模型与率失真理论可促进高效学习算法设计，未来需进一步探索其在实际系统中的应用。

authors_text: Xinyu Zhang,Yuanhao Huang,Kangyao Huang,Xiaoyu Wang,Dafeng Jin,Huaping Liu,Jun Li
title: A Multi-modal Deformable Land-air Robot for Complex Environments
title_zh: 适用于复杂环境的多模态可变形陆空机器人
abstract: Single locomotion robots often struggle to adapt in highly variable or uncertain environments, especially in emergencies. In this paper, a multi-modal deformable robot is introduced that can both fly and drive. Compatibility issues with multi-modal locomotive fusion for this hybrid land-air robot are solved using proposed design conceptions, including power settings, energy selection, and designs of deformable structure. The robot can also automatically transform between land and air modes during 3D planning and tracking. Meanwhile, we proposed a algorithms for evaluation the performance of land-air robots. A series of comparisons and experiments were conducted to demonstrate the robustness and reliability of the proposed structure in complex field environments.
summary: Single locomotion robots often struggle to adapt in highly variable or uncertain environments, especially in emergencies. In this paper, a multi-modal deformable robot is introduced that can both fly and drive. Compatibility issues with multi-modal locomotive fusion for this hybrid land-air robot are solved using proposed design conceptions, including power settings, energy selection, and designs of deformable structure. The robot can also automatically transform between land and air modes during 3D planning and tracking. Meanwhile, we proposed a algorithms for evaluation the performance of land-air robots. A series of comparisons and experiments were conducted to demonstrate the robustness and reliability of the proposed structure in complex field environments.
abstract_zh: 单运动机器人通常难以适应高度变化或不确定的环境，尤其是在紧急情况下。本文介绍了一种既能飞行又能驱动的多模态可变形机器人。使用所提出的设计理念解决了这种陆空混合机器人的多模态机车融合的兼容性问题，包括功率设置、能量选择和可变形结构的设计。该机器人还可以在3D规划和跟踪过程中自动在陆地和空中模式之间转换。同时，我们提出了一种评估陆空机器人性能的算法。进行了一系列的比较和实验，以证明所提出的结构在复杂现场环境中的鲁棒性和可靠性。

AI.tldr: 设计一种多模态变形陆空机器人，解决复杂环境下的适应性问题并实现自动模式转换与性能评估。
AI.motivation: 单体移动机器人难以适应高度变化或不确定的复杂环境，尤其在应急场景中存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过动力配置、能源选择及变形结构设计解决多模态融合兼容性问题，并提出3D路径规划下的自动模式转换算法与性能评估方法。
AI.result: 实验验证了机器人结构在复杂环境中的鲁棒性与可靠性，证明其适应多模态任务的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该设计有效解决了陆空机器人多模态融合难题，为复杂环境下的应急任务提供了可靠解决方案。

In this paper, a multi-modal deformable robot is introduced that can both fly and drive. Compatibility issues with multi-modal locomotive fusion for this hybrid land-air robot are solved using proposed design conceptions, including power settings, energy selection, and designs of deformable structure. The robot can also automatically transform between land and air modes during 3D planning and tracking. Meanwhile, we proposed a algorithms for evaluation the performance of land-air robots. A series of comparisons and experiments were conducted to demonstrate the robustness and reliability of the proposed structure in complex field environments. 单运动机器人通常难以适应高度变化或不确定的环境，尤其是在紧急情况下。本文介绍了一种既能飞行又能驱动的多模态可变形机器人。使用所提出的设计理念解决了这种陆空混合机器人的多模态机车融合的兼容性问题，包括功率设置、能量选择和可变形结构的设计。该机器人还可以在3D规划和跟踪过程中自动在陆地和空中模式之间转换。同时，我们提出了一种评估陆空机器人性能的算法。进行了一系列的比较和实验，以证明所提出的结构在复杂现场环境中的鲁棒性和可靠性。 设计一种多模态变形陆空机器人，解决复杂环境下的适应性问题并实现自动模式转换与性能评估。 Xinyu Zhang,Yuanhao Huang,Kangyao Huang,Xiaoyu Wang,Dafeng Jin,Huaping Liu,Jun Li cs.RO

authors_text: Sathvik Udupa,Siddarth C,Prasanta Kumar Ghosh
title: Improved acoustic-to-articulatory inversion using representations from pretrained self-supervised learning models
title_zh: 使用预训练的自监督学习模型的表示改进声学到发音的反转
abstract: In this work, we investigate the effectiveness of pretrained Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) features for learning the mapping for acoustic to articulatory inversion (AAI). Signal processing-based acoustic features such as MFCCs have been predominantly used for the AAI task with deep neural networks. With SSL features working well for various other speech tasks such as speech recognition, emotion classification, etc., we experiment with its efficacy for AAI. We train on SSL features with transformer neural networks-based AAI models of 3 different model complexities and compare its performance with MFCCs in subject-specific (SS), pooled and fine-tuned (FT) configurations with data from 10 subjects, and evaluate with correlation coefficient (CC) score on the unseen sentence test set. We find that acoustic feature reconstruction objective-based SSL features such as TERA and DeCoAR work well for AAI, with SS CCs of these SSL features reaching close to the best FT CCs of MFCC. We also find the results consistent across different model sizes.
summary: In this work, we investigate the effectiveness of pretrained Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) features for learning the mapping for acoustic to articulatory inversion (AAI). Signal processing-based acoustic features such as MFCCs have been predominantly used for the AAI task with deep neural networks. With SSL features working well for various other speech tasks such as speech recognition, emotion classification, etc., we experiment with its efficacy for AAI. We train on SSL features with transformer neural networks-based AAI models of 3 different model complexities and compare its performance with MFCCs in subject-specific (SS), pooled and fine-tuned (FT) configurations with data from 10 subjects, and evaluate with correlation coefficient (CC) score on the unseen sentence test set. We find that acoustic feature reconstruction objective-based SSL features such as TERA and DeCoAR work well for AAI, with SS CCs of these SSL features reaching close to the best FT CCs of MFCC. We also find the results consistent across different model sizes.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了预训练的自监督学习 (SSL) 特征在学习声学到发音反转 (AAI) 映射方面的有效性。基于信号处理的声学特征（例如 MFCC）主要用于深度神经网络的 AAI 任务。由于 SSL 功能适用于语音识别、情感分类等各种其他语音任务，因此我们尝试了其对 AAI 的功效。我们使用 3 种不同模型复杂度的基于变换器神经网络的 AAI 模型来训练 SSL 特征，并将其与来自 10 个受试者的数据的特定主题 (SS)、池化和微调 (FT) 配置中的 MFCC 性能进行比较，并在未见过的句子测试集上使用相关系数 (CC) 分数进行评估。我们发现基于声学特征重建目标的 SSL 特征（例如 TERA 和 DeCoAR）对于 AAI 效果很好，这些 SSL 特征的 SS CC 接近 MFCC 的最佳 FT CC。我们还发现不同模型尺寸的结果是一致的。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨使用预训练自监督学习（SSL）特征改进声学到发音逆转换（AAI）任务的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统声学特征（如MFCC）在AAI任务中表现有限，而SSL特征在语音识别等任务中表现优异，因此尝试其在AAI中的应用。
AI.method: 采用三种复杂度的Transformer模型，在特定受试者（SS）、混合及微调（FT）配置下，比较SSL特征与MFCC的性能，通过相关系数（CC）评估。
AI.result: 基于声学重建目标的SSL特征（如TERA、DeCoAR）在AAI中表现接近MFCC微调最佳值，且结果在不同模型规模下保持一致。
AI.conclusion: SSL特征可有效替代传统声学特征用于AAI，且其性能优势在多种模型配置中稳定存在。
