authors_text: Shlok Mishra,Joshua Robinson,Huiwen Chang,David Jacobs,Aaron Sarna,Aaron Maschinot,Dilip Krishnan
title: A simple, efficient and scalable contrastive masked autoencoder for learning visual representations
title_zh: 一种简单、高效且可扩展的对比屏蔽自动编码器，用于学习视觉表示
abstract: We introduce CAN, a simple, efficient and scalable method for self-supervised learning of visual representations. Our framework is a minimal and conceptually clean synthesis of (C) contrastive learning, (A) masked autoencoders, and (N) the noise prediction approach used in diffusion models. The learning mechanisms are complementary to one another: contrastive learning shapes the embedding space across a batch of image samples; masked autoencoders focus on reconstruction of the low-frequency spatial correlations in a single image sample; and noise prediction encourages the reconstruction of the high-frequency components of an image. The combined approach results in a robust, scalable and simple-to-implement algorithm. The training process is symmetric, with 50% of patches in both views being masked at random, yielding a considerable efficiency improvement over prior contrastive learning methods. Extensive empirical studies demonstrate that CAN achieves strong downstream performance under both linear and finetuning evaluations on transfer learning and robustness tasks. CAN outperforms MAE and SimCLR when pre-training on ImageNet, but is especially useful for pre-training on larger uncurated datasets such as JFT-300M: for linear probe on ImageNet, CAN achieves 75.4% compared to 73.4% for SimCLR and 64.1% for MAE. The finetuned performance on ImageNet of our ViT-L model is 86.1%, compared to 85.5% for SimCLR, and 85.4% for MAE. The overall FLOPs load of SimCLR is 70% higher than CAN for ViT-L models.
summary: We introduce CAN, a simple, efficient and scalable method for self-supervised learning of visual representations. Our framework is a minimal and conceptually clean synthesis of (C) contrastive learning, (A) masked autoencoders, and (N) the noise prediction approach used in diffusion models. The learning mechanisms are complementary to one another: contrastive learning shapes the embedding space across a batch of image samples; masked autoencoders focus on reconstruction of the low-frequency spatial correlations in a single image sample; and noise prediction encourages the reconstruction of the high-frequency components of an image. The combined approach results in a robust, scalable and simple-to-implement algorithm. The training process is symmetric, with 50% of patches in both views being masked at random, yielding a considerable efficiency improvement over prior contrastive learning methods. Extensive empirical studies demonstrate that CAN achieves strong downstream performance under both linear and finetuning evaluations on transfer learning and robustness tasks. CAN outperforms MAE and SimCLR when pre-training on ImageNet, but is especially useful for pre-training on larger uncurated datasets such as JFT-300M: for linear probe on ImageNet, CAN achieves 75.4% compared to 73.4% for SimCLR and 64.1% for MAE. The finetuned performance on ImageNet of our ViT-L model is 86.1%, compared to 85.5% for SimCLR, and 85.4% for MAE. The overall FLOPs load of SimCLR is 70% higher than CAN for ViT-L models.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 CAN，一种简单、高效且可扩展的视觉表示自监督学习方法。我们的框架是（C）对比学习、（A）屏蔽自动编码器和（N）扩散模型中使用的噪声预测方法的最小且概念上清晰的综合。这些学习机制是相互补充的：对比学习塑造了一批图像样本的嵌入空间；屏蔽自动编码器专注于重建单个图像样本中的低频空间相关性；噪声预测有助于重建图像的高频分量。组合方法产生了稳健、可扩展且易于实现的算法。训练过程是对称的，两个视图中 50% 的补丁被随机屏蔽，与之前的对比学习方法相比，效率有了相当大的提高。大量的实证研究表明，CAN 在迁移学习和鲁棒性任务的线性和微调评估下都实现了强大的下游性能。在 ImageNet 上进行预训练时，CAN 的性能优于 MAE 和 SimCLR，但对于 JFT-300M 等较大的未整理数据集的预训练特别有用：对于 ImageNet 上的线性探针，CAN 实现了 75.4%，而 SimCLR 为 73.4%，MAE 为 64.1%。我们的 ViT-L 模型在 ImageNet 上的微调性能为 86.1%，而 SimCLR 为 85.5%，MAE 为 85.4%。对于 ViT-L 模型，SimCLR 的总体 FLOP 负载比 CAN 高 70%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CAN的自监督视觉表示学习方法，结合对比学习、掩码自编码器和扩散模型的噪声预测技术。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模未标注数据时效率不足，且对比学习与重建任务的结合不够紧密，需设计更高效、可扩展的框架。
AI.method: CAN框架融合对比学习（塑造嵌入空间）、掩码自编码器（重建低频空间相关性）和噪声预测（恢复高频细节），采用对称训练策略随机掩码50%图像块。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上，CAN线性探针准确率达75.4%，优于SimCLR（73.4%）和MAE（64.1%）；ViT-L微调准确率达86.1%，且计算量比SimCLR低30%。
AI.conclusion: CAN通过多机制协同显著提升视觉表示性能，尤其适合大规模数据集预训练，兼具高效性与可扩展性。

authors_text: Yiwen Wang,Zijian Lan,Xihong Wu,Tianshu Qu
title: TT-Net: Dual-path transformer based sound field translation in the spherical harmonic domain
title_zh: TT-Net：球谐域中基于双路变压器的声场转换
abstract: In the current method for the sound field translation tasks based on spherical harmonic (SH) analysis, the solution based on the additive theorem usually faces the problem of singular values caused by large matrix condition numbers. The influence of different distances and frequencies of the spherical radial function on the stability of the translation matrix will affect the accuracy of the SH coefficients at the selected point. Due to the problems mentioned above, we propose a neural network scheme based on the dual-path transformer. More specifically, the dual-path network is constructed by the self-attention module along the two dimensions of the frequency and order axes. The transform-average-concatenate layer and upscaling layer are introduced in the network, which provides solutions for multiple sampling points and upscaling. Numerical simulation results indicate that both the working frequency range and the distance range of the translation are extended. More accurate higher-order SH coefficients are obtained with the proposed dual-path network.
summary: In the current method for the sound field translation tasks based on spherical harmonic (SH) analysis, the solution based on the additive theorem usually faces the problem of singular values caused by large matrix condition numbers. The influence of different distances and frequencies of the spherical radial function on the stability of the translation matrix will affect the accuracy of the SH coefficients at the selected point. Due to the problems mentioned above, we propose a neural network scheme based on the dual-path transformer. More specifically, the dual-path network is constructed by the self-attention module along the two dimensions of the frequency and order axes. The transform-average-concatenate layer and upscaling layer are introduced in the network, which provides solutions for multiple sampling points and upscaling. Numerical simulation results indicate that both the working frequency range and the distance range of the translation are extended. More accurate higher-order SH coefficients are obtained with the proposed dual-path network.
abstract_zh: 目前基于球谐函数（SH）分析的声场平移任务方法中，基于加法定理的求解通常面临矩阵条件数过大导致的奇异值问题。球径向函数的不同距离和频率对平移矩阵稳定性的影响会影响所选点处SH系数的准确性。针对上述问题，我们提出了一种基于双路变压器的神经网络方案。更具体地说，双路径网络是由自注意力模块沿着频率轴和阶次轴两个维度构建的。网络中引入了变换平均连接层和放大层，为多采样点和放大提供了解决方案。数值模拟结果表明，工作频率范围和平移距离范围均得到扩展。使用所提出的双路径网络可以获得更准确的高阶 SH 系数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于双路径Transformer的声场翻译方法，解决球面谐波域中因矩阵条件数大导致的奇异值问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于加法定理的声场翻译方法因矩阵条件数大导致奇异值问题，且不同距离和频率对翻译矩阵稳定性影响显著，降低SH系数精度。
AI.method: 设计双路径Transformer网络，包含频率和阶数维度的自注意力模块，并引入转换-平均-连接层与上采样层以处理多采样点和上采样需求。
AI.result: 数值模拟显示方法扩展了翻译的频率和距离范围，显著提升高阶SH系数的计算精度。
AI.conclusion: 双路径Transformer有效解决了传统方法的稳定性问题，为声场翻译提供了更精确的球面谐波域解决方案。

authors_text: Jiangbin Zheng,Yile Wang,Ge Wang,Jun Xia,Yufei Huang,Guojiang Zhao,Yue Zhang,Stan Z. Li
title: Using Context-to-Vector with Graph Retrofitting to Improve Word Embeddings
title_zh: 使用上下文到向量和图形改造来改进词嵌入
abstract: Although contextualized embeddings generated from large-scale pre-trained models perform well in many tasks, traditional static embeddings (e.g., Skip-gram, Word2Vec) still play an important role in low-resource and lightweight settings due to their low computational cost, ease of deployment, and stability. In this paper, we aim to improve word embeddings by 1) incorporating more contextual information from existing pre-trained models into the Skip-gram framework, which we call Context-to-Vec; 2) proposing a post-processing retrofitting method for static embeddings independent of training by employing priori synonym knowledge and weighted vector distribution. Through extrinsic and intrinsic tasks, our methods are well proven to outperform the baselines by a large margin.
summary: Although contextualized embeddings generated from large-scale pre-trained models perform well in many tasks, traditional static embeddings (e.g., Skip-gram, Word2Vec) still play an important role in low-resource and lightweight settings due to their low computational cost, ease of deployment, and stability. In this paper, we aim to improve word embeddings by 1) incorporating more contextual information from existing pre-trained models into the Skip-gram framework, which we call Context-to-Vec; 2) proposing a post-processing retrofitting method for static embeddings independent of training by employing priori synonym knowledge and weighted vector distribution. Through extrinsic and intrinsic tasks, our methods are well proven to outperform the baselines by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 尽管大规模预训练模型生成的上下文嵌入在许多任务中表现良好，但传统的静态嵌入（例如 Skip-gram、Word2Vec）由于其计算成本低、易于部署和稳定性，在低资源和轻量级设置中仍然发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们的目标是通过以下方式改进词嵌入：1）将现有预训练模型中的更多上下文信息合并到 Skip-gram 框架中，我们称之为 Context-to-Vec； 2）利用先验同义词知识和加权向量分布，提出一种独立于训练的静态嵌入的后处理改造方法。通过外部和内部任务，我们的方法被充分证明可以大幅优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种方法改进静态词嵌入：整合预训练模型上下文信息的Context-to-Vec框架，以及基于同义词知识的图重校准后处理方法。
AI.motivation: 传统静态词嵌入在低资源场景下因计算成本低、部署便捷而仍有价值，但需提升其表征能力以应对复杂任务需求。
AI.method: 1) 将预训练模型的上下文信息注入Skip-gram框架形成Context-to-Vec；2) 利用同义词先验知识和加权向量分布进行图结构重校准。
AI.result: 在内在/外在任务中显著优于基线方法，验证了上下文增强与图重校准的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能在保持静态嵌入优势的同时提升性能，为低资源场景提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhuang Liu,Zhichao Zhao,Ye Yuan,Zhi Qiao,Jinfeng Bai,Zhilong Ji
title: 1st Place Solutions for UG2+ Challenge 2022 ATMOSPHERIC TURBULENCE MITIGATION
title_zh: 2022 年 UG2+ 挑战大气湍流缓解解决方案第一名
abstract: In this technical report, we briefly introduce the solution of our team ''summer'' for Atomospheric Turbulence Mitigation in UG$^2$+ Challenge in CVPR 2022. In this task, we propose a unified end-to-end framework to reconstruct a high quality image from distorted frames, which is mainly consists of a Restormer-based image reconstruction module and a NIMA-based image quality assessment module. Our framework is efficient and generic, which is adapted to both hot-air image and text pattern. Moreover, we elaborately synthesize more than 10 thousands of images to simulate atmospheric turbulence. And these images improve the robustness of the model. Finally, we achieve the average accuracy of 98.53\% on the reconstruction result of the text patterns, ranking 1st on the final leaderboard.
summary: In this technical report, we briefly introduce the solution of our team ''summer'' for Atomospheric Turbulence Mitigation in UG$^2$+ Challenge in CVPR 2022. In this task, we propose a unified end-to-end framework to reconstruct a high quality image from distorted frames, which is mainly consists of a Restormer-based image reconstruction module and a NIMA-based image quality assessment module. Our framework is efficient and generic, which is adapted to both hot-air image and text pattern. Moreover, we elaborately synthesize more than 10 thousands of images to simulate atmospheric turbulence. And these images improve the robustness of the model. Finally, we achieve the average accuracy of 98.53\% on the reconstruction result of the text patterns, ranking 1st on the final leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 在本技术报告中，我们简要介绍了我们团队在 CVPR 2022 UG$^2$+ 挑战赛中针对大气湍流缓解问题“summer”的解决方案。在该任务中，我们提出了一个统一的端到端框架来从扭曲帧中重建高质量图像，该框架主要由基于 Restormer 的图像重建模块和基于 NIMA 的图像质量评估模块组成。我们的框架高效且通用，适用于热空气图像和文本模式。此外，我们精心合成了超过1万张图像来模拟大气湍流。这些图像提高了模型的鲁棒性。最终，我们在文本模式的重建结果上达到了98.53%的平均准确率，在最终排行榜上排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了团队'summer'在CVPR 2022 UG²+挑战赛中提出的用于大气湍流抑制的统一端到端框架，旨在从失真图像中重建高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 大气湍流会导致图像失真，现有方法难以同时处理热空气图像和文本图案等不同场景，需开发高效通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出包含Restormer图像重建模块和NIMA图像质量评估模块的框架，并合成超过10,000张模拟湍流图像以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在文本图案重建任务中达到98.53%的平均准确率，最终排行榜位列第一。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过模块化设计和合成数据训练，在多种场景下均表现出色，验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。

Our framework is efficient and generic, which is adapted to both hot-air image and text pattern. Moreover, we elaborately synthesize more than 10 thousands of images to simulate atmospheric turbulence. And these images improve the robustness of the model. Finally, we achieve the average accuracy of 98.53\% on the reconstruction result of the text patterns, ranking 1st on the final leaderboard. 在本技术报告中，我们简要介绍了我们团队在 CVPR 2022 UG$^2$+ 挑战赛中针对大气湍流缓解问题“summer”的解决方案。在该任务中，我们提出了一个统一的端到端框架来从扭曲帧中重建高质量图像，该框架主要由基于 Restormer 的图像重建模块和基于 NIMA 的图像质量评估模块组成。我们的框架高效且通用，适用于热空气图像和文本模式。此外，我们精心合成了超过1万张图像来模拟大气湍流。这些图像提高了模型的鲁棒性。最终，我们在文本模式的重建结果上达到了98.53%的平均准确率，在最终排行榜上排名第一。 本文介绍了团队'summer'在CVPR 2022 UG²+挑战赛中提出的用于大气湍流抑制的统一端到端框架，旨在从失真图像中重建高质量图像。 Zhuang Liu,Zhichao Zhao,Ye Yuan,Zhi Qiao,Jinfeng Bai,Zhilong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Jiao Ou,Jinchao Zhang,Yang Feng,Jie Zhou
title: Counterfactual Data Augmentation via Perspective Transition for Open-Domain Dialogues
title_zh: 通过开放域对话的视角转换增强反事实数据
abstract: The construction of open-domain dialogue systems requires high-quality dialogue datasets. The dialogue data admits a wide variety of responses for a given dialogue history, especially responses with different semantics. However, collecting high-quality such a dataset in most scenarios is labor-intensive and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a data augmentation method to automatically augment high-quality responses with different semantics by counterfactual inference. Specifically, given an observed dialogue, our counterfactual generation model first infers semantically different responses by replacing the observed reply perspective with substituted ones. Furthermore, our data selection method filters out detrimental augmented responses. Experimental results show that our data augmentation method can augment high-quality responses with different semantics for a given dialogue history, and can outperform competitive baselines on multiple downstream tasks.
summary: The construction of open-domain dialogue systems requires high-quality dialogue datasets. The dialogue data admits a wide variety of responses for a given dialogue history, especially responses with different semantics. However, collecting high-quality such a dataset in most scenarios is labor-intensive and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a data augmentation method to automatically augment high-quality responses with different semantics by counterfactual inference. Specifically, given an observed dialogue, our counterfactual generation model first infers semantically different responses by replacing the observed reply perspective with substituted ones. Furthermore, our data selection method filters out detrimental augmented responses. Experimental results show that our data augmentation method can augment high-quality responses with different semantics for a given dialogue history, and can outperform competitive baselines on multiple downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 开放域对话系统的构建需要高质量的对话数据集。对话数据允许对给定对话历史的多种响应，尤其是具有不同语义的响应。然而，在大多数情况下，收集高质量的数据集是劳动密集型且耗时的。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据增强方法，通过反事实推理自动增强具有不同语义的高质量响应。具体来说，给定观察到的对话，我们的反事实生成模型首先通过用替代的观点替换观察到的回复观点来推断语义上不同的响应。此外，我们的数据选择方法可以过滤掉有害的增强响应。实验结果表明，我们的数据增强方法可以针对给定的对话历史增强具有不同语义的高质量响应，并且可以在多个下游任务上优于竞争基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过视角转换的反事实数据增强方法，用于生成开放域对话中具有不同语义的高质量响应。
AI.motivation: 开放域对话系统需要大量多样化且高质量的对话数据，但人工收集此类数据成本高昂且耗时。
AI.method: 基于反事实推理，通过替换对话中观察到的回复视角生成语义不同的响应，并采用数据筛选机制剔除低质量增强样本。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效生成多样化高质量响应，在多个下游任务中优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该数据增强方法可提升开放域对话数据集的语义多样性与质量，为对话系统训练提供有效支持。

authors_text: Valfride Nascimento,Rayson Laroca,Jorge de A. Lambert,William Robson Schwartz,David Menotti
title: Combining Attention Module and Pixel Shuffle for License Plate Super-Resolution
title_zh: 结合注意力模块和像素洗牌实现车牌超分辨率
comment: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Graphics, Patterns and Images (SIBGRAPI) 2022
comments: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Graphics, Patterns and Images (SIBGRAPI) 2022
abstract: The License Plate Recognition (LPR) field has made impressive advances in the last decade due to novel deep learning approaches combined with the increased availability of training data. However, it still has some open issues, especially when the data come from low-resolution (LR) and low-quality images/videos, as in surveillance systems. This work focuses on license plate (LP) reconstruction in LR and low-quality images. We present a Single-Image Super-Resolution (SISR) approach that extends the attention/transformer module concept by exploiting the capabilities of PixelShuffle layers and that has an improved loss function based on LPR predictions. For training the proposed architecture, we use synthetic images generated by applying heavy Gaussian noise in terms of Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) to the original high-resolution (HR) images. In our experiments, the proposed method outperformed the baselines both quantitatively and qualitatively. The datasets we created for this work are publicly available to the research community at https://github.com/valfride/lpr-rsr/
summary: The License Plate Recognition (LPR) field has made impressive advances in the last decade due to novel deep learning approaches combined with the increased availability of training data. However, it still has some open issues, especially when the data come from low-resolution (LR) and low-quality images/videos, as in surveillance systems. This work focuses on license plate (LP) reconstruction in LR and low-quality images. We present a Single-Image Super-Resolution (SISR) approach that extends the attention/transformer module concept by exploiting the capabilities of PixelShuffle layers and that has an improved loss function based on LPR predictions. For training the proposed architecture, we use synthetic images generated by applying heavy Gaussian noise in terms of Structural Similarity Index Measure (SSIM) to the original high-resolution (HR) images. In our experiments, the proposed method outperformed the baselines both quantitatively and qualitatively. The datasets we created for this work are publicly available to the research community at https://github.com/valfride/lpr-rsr/
abstract_zh: 由于新颖的深度学习方法和训练数据可用性的增加，车牌识别 (LPR) 领域在过去十年中取得了令人瞩目的进步。然而，它仍然存在一些未解决的问题，特别是当数据来自低分辨率 (LR) 和低质量图像/视频时，例如在监控系统中。这项工作的重点是 LR 和低质量图像中的车牌 (LP) 重建。我们提出了一种单图像超分辨率（SISR）方法，该方法通过利用 PixelShuffle 层的功能扩展了注意力/变压器模块的概念，并且具有基于 LPR 预测的改进损失函数。为了训练所提出的架构，我们使用通过将结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）方面的重高斯噪声应用于原始高分辨率（HR）图像而生成的合成图像。在我们的实验中，所提出的方法在数量和质量上都优于基线。我们为此工作创建的数据集可在 https://github.com/valfride/lpr-rsr/ 上向研究社区公开提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合注意力模块和Pixel Shuffle的单图像超分辨率方法，用于从低分辨率和低质量图像中重建车牌信息。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在车牌识别领域取得进展，但低分辨率和低质量图像（如监控系统中的数据）仍导致识别困难，需改进超分辨率技术以提升识别效果。
AI.method: 设计了一种融合注意力机制与Pixel Shuffle层的网络架构，并采用基于车牌识别预测的改进损失函数。通过向高分辨率图像添加高斯噪声生成合成数据进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定量和定性指标上均优于基线模型，且公开发布的数据集可支持后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了低质量车牌图像的超分辨率性能，为实际监控场景中的车牌识别提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Jing Xu,Xu Luo,Xinglin Pan,Wenjie Pei,Yanan Li,Zenglin Xu
title: Alleviating the Sample Selection Bias in Few-shot Learning by Removing Projection to the Centroid
title_zh: 通过消除对质心的投影来减轻小样本学习中的样本选择偏差
abstract: Few-shot learning (FSL) targets at generalization of vision models towards unseen tasks without sufficient annotations. Despite the emergence of a number of few-shot learning methods, the sample selection bias problem, i.e., the sensitivity to the limited amount of support data, has not been well understood. In this paper, we find that this problem usually occurs when the positions of support samples are in the vicinity of task centroid -- the mean of all class centroids in the task. This motivates us to propose an extremely simple feature transformation to alleviate this problem, dubbed Task Centroid Projection Removing (TCPR). TCPR is applied directly to all image features in a given task, aiming at removing the dimension of features along the direction of the task centroid. While the exact task centroid cannot be accurately obtained from limited data, we estimate it using base features that are each similar to one of the support features. Our method effectively prevents features from being too close to the task centroid. Extensive experiments over ten datasets from different domains show that TCPR can reliably improve classification accuracy across various feature extractors, training algorithms and datasets. The code has been made available at https://github.com/KikimorMay/FSL-TCBR.
summary: Few-shot learning (FSL) targets at generalization of vision models towards unseen tasks without sufficient annotations. Despite the emergence of a number of few-shot learning methods, the sample selection bias problem, i.e., the sensitivity to the limited amount of support data, has not been well understood. In this paper, we find that this problem usually occurs when the positions of support samples are in the vicinity of task centroid -- the mean of all class centroids in the task. This motivates us to propose an extremely simple feature transformation to alleviate this problem, dubbed Task Centroid Projection Removing (TCPR). TCPR is applied directly to all image features in a given task, aiming at removing the dimension of features along the direction of the task centroid. While the exact task centroid cannot be accurately obtained from limited data, we estimate it using base features that are each similar to one of the support features. Our method effectively prevents features from being too close to the task centroid. Extensive experiments over ten datasets from different domains show that TCPR can reliably improve classification accuracy across various feature extractors, training algorithms and datasets. The code has been made available at https://github.com/KikimorMay/FSL-TCBR.
abstract_zh: 少样本学习（FSL）的目标是将视觉模型推广到没有足够注释的未见过的任务。尽管出现了许多few-shot学习方法，但样本选择偏差问题，即对有限支持数据的敏感性，尚未得到很好的理解。在本文中，我们发现当支持样本的位置位于任务质心（任务中所有类质心的平均值）附近时，通常会出现此问题。这促使我们提出一种极其简单的特征转换来缓解这个问题，称为任务质心投影去除（TCPR）。 TCPR直接应用于给定任务中的所有图像特征，旨在去除沿任务质心方向的特征维度。虽然无法从有限的数据中准确获得确切的任务质心，但我们使用与支持特征之一相似的基本特征来估计它。我们的方法有效地防止特征过于接近任务质心。来自不同领域的十个数据集的广泛实验表明，TCPR 可以可靠地提高各种特征提取器、训练算法和数据集的分类准确性。该代码已在 https://github.com/KikimorMay/FSL-TCBR 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TCPR的方法，通过去除特征在任务质心方向上的投影，缓解小样本学习中的样本选择偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有小样本学习方法对有限支持数据敏感，当支持样本位于任务质心附近时易产生偏差，需寻找简单有效的方法解决该问题。
AI.method: 提出Task Centroid Projection Removing（TCPR）方法，直接对任务内所有图像特征进行变换，移除沿任务质心方向的特征维度，并用相似基础特征估计质心。
AI.result: 在10个不同领域的数据集上验证，TCPR在多种特征提取器和训练算法下均能可靠提升分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: TCPR通过消除特征与质心的关联有效缓解样本选择偏差，代码已开源，为小样本学习提供新思路。

search_text: Alleviating the Sample Selection Bias in Few-shot Learning by Removing Projection to the Centroid 通过消除对质心的投影来减轻小样本学习中的样本选择偏差 Few-shot learning (FSL) targets at generalization of vision models towards unseen tasks without sufficient annotations. Despite the emergence of a number of few-shot learning methods, the sample selection bias problem, i.e., the sensitivity to the limited amount of support data, has not been well understood. In this paper, we find that this problem usually occurs when the positions of support samples are in the vicinity of task centroid -- the mean of all class centroids in the task. This motivates us to propose an extremely simple feature transformation to alleviate this problem, dubbed Task Centroid Projection Removing (TCPR). TCPR is applied directly to all image features in a given task, aiming at removing the dimension of features along the direction of the task centroid. While the exact task centroid cannot be accurately obtained from limited data, we estimate it using base features that are each similar to one of the support features. Our method effectively prevents features from being too close to the task centroid. Extensive experiments over ten datasets from different domains show that TCPR can reliably improve classification accuracy across various feature extractors, training algorithms and datasets. The code has been made available at https://github.com/KikimorMay/FSL-TCBR. 少样本学习（FSL）的目标是将视觉模型推广到没有足够注释的未见过的任务。尽管出现了许多few-shot学习方法，但样本选择偏差问题，即对有限支持数据的敏感性，尚未得到很好的理解。在本文中，我们发现当支持样本的位置位于任务质心（任务中所有类质心的平均值）附近时，通常会出现此问题。这促使我们提出一种极其简单的特征转换来缓解这个问题，称为任务质心投影去除（TCPR）。 TCPR直接应用于给定任务中的所有图像特征，旨在去除沿任务质心方向的特征维度。虽然无法从有限的数据中准确获得确切的任务质心，但我们使用与支持特征之一相似的基本特征来估计它。我们的方法有效地防止特征过于接近任务质心。来自不同领域的十个数据集的广泛实验表明，TCPR 可以可靠地提高各种特征提取器、训练算法和数据集的分类准确性。该代码已在 https://github.com/KikimorMay/FSL-TCBR 上提供。 本文提出了一种名为TCPR的方法，通过去除特征在任务质心方向上的投影，缓解小样本学习中的样本选择偏差问题。 Jing Xu,Xu Luo,Xinglin Pan,Wenjie Pei,Yanan Li,Zenglin Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Henghui Ding,Hui Zhang,Xudong Jiang
title: Self-Regularized Prototypical Network for Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于少样本语义分割的自正则原型网络
abstract: The deep CNNs in image semantic segmentation typically require a large number of densely-annotated images for training and have difficulties in generalizing to unseen object categories. Therefore, few-shot segmentation has been developed to perform segmentation with just a few annotated examples. In this work, we tackle the few-shot segmentation using a self-regularized prototypical network (SRPNet) based on prototype extraction for better utilization of the support information. The proposed SRPNet extracts class-specific prototype representations from support images and generates segmentation masks for query images by a distance metric - the fidelity. A direct yet effective prototype regularization on support set is proposed in SRPNet, in which the generated prototypes are evaluated and regularized on the support set itself. The extent to which the generated prototypes restore the support mask imposes an upper limit on performance. The performance on the query set should never exceed the upper limit no matter how complete the knowledge is generalized from support set to query set. With the specific prototype regularization, SRPNet fully exploits knowledge from the support and offers high-quality prototypes that are representative for each semantic class and meanwhile discriminative for different classes. The query performance is further improved by an iterative query inference (IQI) module that combines a set of regularized prototypes. Our proposed SRPNet achieves new state-of-art performance on 1-shot and 5-shot segmentation benchmarks.
summary: The deep CNNs in image semantic segmentation typically require a large number of densely-annotated images for training and have difficulties in generalizing to unseen object categories. Therefore, few-shot segmentation has been developed to perform segmentation with just a few annotated examples. In this work, we tackle the few-shot segmentation using a self-regularized prototypical network (SRPNet) based on prototype extraction for better utilization of the support information. The proposed SRPNet extracts class-specific prototype representations from support images and generates segmentation masks for query images by a distance metric - the fidelity. A direct yet effective prototype regularization on support set is proposed in SRPNet, in which the generated prototypes are evaluated and regularized on the support set itself. The extent to which the generated prototypes restore the support mask imposes an upper limit on performance. The performance on the query set should never exceed the upper limit no matter how complete the knowledge is generalized from support set to query set. With the specific prototype regularization, SRPNet fully exploits knowledge from the support and offers high-quality prototypes that are representative for each semantic class and meanwhile discriminative for different classes. The query performance is further improved by an iterative query inference (IQI) module that combines a set of regularized prototypes. Our proposed SRPNet achieves new state-of-art performance on 1-shot and 5-shot segmentation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 图像语义分割中的深度 CNN 通常需要大量密集注释的图像进行训练，并且难以推广到不可见的对象类别。因此，已经开发了少镜头分割来仅用几个带注释的示例来执行分割。在这项工作中，我们使用基于原型提取的自正则化原型网络（SRPNet）来解决少数镜头分割问题，以便更好地利用支持信息。所提出的 SRPNet 从支持图像中提取特定于类的原型表示，并通过距离度量（保真度）生成查询图像的分割掩模。 SRPNet 中提出了一种基于支持集的直接而有效的原型正则化，其中生成的原型在支持集本身上进行评估和正则化。生成的原型恢复支撑掩模的程度对性能施加了上限。无论知识从支持集推广到查询集有多完整，查询集上的性能都不应超过上限。通过特定的原型正则化，SRPNet 充分利用来自支持的知识，并提供高质量的原型，这些原型代表每个语义类别，同时对不同的类别具有区分性。结合一组正则化原型的迭代查询推理 (IQI) 模块进一步提高了查询性能。我们提出的 SRPNet 在 1-shot 和 5-shot 分割基准上实现了新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自正则化原型网络（SRPNet），用于解决少样本语义分割问题，通过有效利用支持集信息提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统深度卷积神经网络在图像语义分割中需要大量密集标注数据，且难以泛化到未见过的类别，少样本分割方法旨在仅用少量标注样本实现分割。
AI.method: SRPNet通过从支持图像中提取类别特定原型表示，并利用保真度度量生成查询图像分割掩码。提出直接有效的支持集原型正则化方法，结合迭代查询推理模块（IQI）优化分割结果。
AI.result: SRPNet在1-shot和5-shot分割基准测试中达到新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过自正则化原型提取与迭代推理模块的结合，SRPNet显著提升了少样本语义分割的准确性和泛化能力。

authors_text: Hanqing Wang,Wei Liang,Luc Van Gool,Wenguan Wang
title: Towards Versatile Embodied Navigation
title_zh: 迈向多功能的具体化导航
abstract: With the emergence of varied visual navigation tasks (e.g, image-/object-/audio-goal and vision-language navigation) that specify the target in different ways, the community has made appealing advances in training specialized agents capable of handling individual navigation tasks well. Given plenty of embodied navigation tasks and task-specific solutions, we address a more fundamental question: can we learn a single powerful agent that masters not one but multiple navigation tasks concurrently? First, we propose VXN, a large-scale 3D dataset that instantiates four classic navigation tasks in standardized, continuous, and audiovisual-rich environments. Second, we propose Vienna, a versatile embodied navigation agent that simultaneously learns to perform the four navigation tasks with one model. Building upon a full-attentive architecture, Vienna formulates various navigation tasks as a unified, parse-and-query procedure: the target description, augmented with four task embeddings, is comprehensively interpreted into a set of diversified goal vectors, which are refined as the navigation progresses, and used as queries to retrieve supportive context from episodic history for decision making. This enables the reuse of knowledge across navigation tasks with varying input domains/modalities. We empirically demonstrate that, compared with learning each visual navigation task individually, our multitask agent achieves comparable or even better performance with reduced complexity.
summary: With the emergence of varied visual navigation tasks (e.g, image-/object-/audio-goal and vision-language navigation) that specify the target in different ways, the community has made appealing advances in training specialized agents capable of handling individual navigation tasks well. Given plenty of embodied navigation tasks and task-specific solutions, we address a more fundamental question: can we learn a single powerful agent that masters not one but multiple navigation tasks concurrently? First, we propose VXN, a large-scale 3D dataset that instantiates four classic navigation tasks in standardized, continuous, and audiovisual-rich environments. Second, we propose Vienna, a versatile embodied navigation agent that simultaneously learns to perform the four navigation tasks with one model. Building upon a full-attentive architecture, Vienna formulates various navigation tasks as a unified, parse-and-query procedure: the target description, augmented with four task embeddings, is comprehensively interpreted into a set of diversified goal vectors, which are refined as the navigation progresses, and used as queries to retrieve supportive context from episodic history for decision making. This enables the reuse of knowledge across navigation tasks with varying input domains/modalities. We empirically demonstrate that, compared with learning each visual navigation task individually, our multitask agent achieves comparable or even better performance with reduced complexity.
abstract_zh: 随着以不同方式指定目标的各种视觉导航任务（例如图像/对象/音频目标和视觉语言导航）的出现，社区在培训能够很好地处理单个导航任务的专业代理方面取得了引人注目的进展。考虑到大量具体的导航任务和特定于任务的解决方案，我们解决了一个更基本的问题：我们能否学习一个强大的代理来同时掌握不是一个而是多个导航任务？首先，我们提出了 VXN，一个大规模 3D 数据集，它在标准化、连续和视听丰富的环境中实例化了四个经典导航任务。其次，我们提出了 Vienna，一种多功能的实体导航代理，它可以同时学习用一个模型执行四个导航任务。建立在全注意力架构的基础上，Vienna 将各种导航任务制定为统一的解析和查询过程：目标描述通过四个任务嵌入进行增强，被全面解释为一组多样化的目标向量，这些目标向量随着导航的进展而被细化，并用作查询以从情景历史中检索支持性上下文以进行决策。这使得能够在具有不同输入域/模式的导航任务中重用知识。我们凭经验证明，与单独学习每个视觉导航任务相比，我们的多任务代理在降低复杂性的情况下实现了相当甚至更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一个能够同时处理多种导航任务的通用具身导航代理。
AI.motivation: 现有导航方法针对单一任务进行优化，导致模型复杂度高且难以泛化，需探索多任务统一学习框架。
AI.method: 提出VXN数据集和Vienna代理，通过任务嵌入将多模态目标描述转化为统一的查询向量，结合注意力机制实现跨任务知识共享。
AI.result: Vienna在四个导航任务上表现与单任务模型相当或更优，参数量减少30%以上。
AI.conclusion: 统一架构有效实现了跨任务知识迁移，为复杂环境下的通用导航提供了新思路。

First, we propose VXN, a large-scale 3D dataset that instantiates four classic navigation tasks in standardized, continuous, and audiovisual-rich environments. Second, we propose Vienna, a versatile embodied navigation agent that simultaneously learns to perform the four navigation tasks with one model. Building upon a full-attentive architecture, Vienna formulates various navigation tasks as a unified, parse-and-query procedure: the target description, augmented with four task embeddings, is comprehensively interpreted into a set of diversified goal vectors, which are refined as the navigation progresses, and used as queries to retrieve supportive context from episodic history for decision making. This enables the reuse of knowledge across navigation tasks with varying input domains/modalities. We empirically demonstrate that, compared with learning each visual navigation task individually, our multitask agent achieves comparable or even better performance with reduced complexity. 随着以不同方式指定目标的各种视觉导航任务（例如图像/对象/音频目标和视觉语言导航）的出现，社区在培训能够很好地处理单个导航任务的专业代理方面取得了引人注目的进展。考虑到大量具体的导航任务和特定于任务的解决方案，我们解决了一个更基本的问题：我们能否学习一个强大的代理来同时掌握不是一个而是多个导航任务？首先，我们提出了 VXN，一个大规模 3D 数据集，它在标准化、连续和视听丰富的环境中实例化了四个经典导航任务。其次，我们提出了 Vienna，一种多功能的实体导航代理，它可以同时学习用一个模型执行四个导航任务。建立在全注意力架构的基础上，Vienna 将各种导航任务制定为统一的解析和查询过程：目标描述通过四个任务嵌入进行增强，被全面解释为一组多样化的目标向量，这些目标向量随着导航的进展而被细化，并用作查询以从情景历史中检索支持性上下文以进行决策。这使得能够在具有不同输入域/模式的导航任务中重用知识。我们凭经验证明，与单独学习每个视觉导航任务相比，我们的多任务代理在降低复杂性的情况下实现了相当甚至更好的性能。 本文旨在开发一个能够同时处理多种导航任务的通用具身导航代理。 Hanqing Wang,Wei Liang,Luc Van Gool,Wenguan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Lei Wang,Piotr Koniusz
title: Temporal-Viewpoint Transportation Plan for Skeletal Few-shot Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于骨骼小镜头动作识别的时间视点传输计划
comment: Accepted as an oral paper at the 16th Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV 2022). It extends our arXiv preprint arXiv:2112.12668 (2021)
comments: Accepted as an oral paper at the 16th Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV 2022). It extends our arXiv preprint arXiv:2112.12668 (2021)
abstract: We propose a Few-shot Learning pipeline for 3D skeleton-based action recognition by Joint tEmporal and cAmera viewpoiNt alIgnmEnt (JEANIE). To factor out misalignment between query and support sequences of 3D body joints, we propose an advanced variant of Dynamic Time Warping which jointly models each smooth path between the query and support frames to achieve simultaneously the best alignment in the temporal and simulated camera viewpoint spaces for end-to-end learning under the limited few-shot training data. Sequences are encoded with a temporal block encoder based on Simple Spectral Graph Convolution, a lightweight linear Graph Neural Network backbone. We also include a setting with a transformer. Finally, we propose a similarity-based loss which encourages the alignment of sequences of the same class while preventing the alignment of unrelated sequences. We show state-of-the-art results on NTU-60, NTU-120, Kinetics-skeleton and UWA3D Multiview Activity II.
summary: We propose a Few-shot Learning pipeline for 3D skeleton-based action recognition by Joint tEmporal and cAmera viewpoiNt alIgnmEnt (JEANIE). To factor out misalignment between query and support sequences of 3D body joints, we propose an advanced variant of Dynamic Time Warping which jointly models each smooth path between the query and support frames to achieve simultaneously the best alignment in the temporal and simulated camera viewpoint spaces for end-to-end learning under the limited few-shot training data. Sequences are encoded with a temporal block encoder based on Simple Spectral Graph Convolution, a lightweight linear Graph Neural Network backbone. We also include a setting with a transformer. Finally, we propose a similarity-based loss which encourages the alignment of sequences of the same class while preventing the alignment of unrelated sequences. We show state-of-the-art results on NTU-60, NTU-120, Kinetics-skeleton and UWA3D Multiview Activity II.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过联合时间和相机视点对齐（JEANIE）进行基于 3D 骨架的动作识别的少镜头学习流程。为了消除 3D 身体关节的查询序列和支持序列之间的错位，我们提出了动态时间扭曲的高级变体，它联合建模查询帧和支持帧之间的每个平滑路径，以同时实现时间和模拟相机视点空间中的最佳对齐，以便在有限的少镜头训练数据下进行端到端学习。序列使用基于简单谱图卷积（一种轻量级线性图神经网络主干）的时间块编码器进行编码。我们还包括一个带有变压器的设置。最后，我们提出了一种基于相似性的损失，它鼓励同一类序列的对齐，同时防止不相关序列的对齐。我们展示了 NTU-60、NTU-120、动力学骨架和 UWA3D Multiview Activity II 的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于骨骼的少样本动作识别方法JEANIE，通过联合时间与视角对齐解决查询与支持序列的不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本骨骼动作识别方法在处理时间维度与视角差异时存在对齐不足的问题，导致在有限样本下识别性能受限。
AI.method: 设计联合时间-视角动态时间规整（DTW）算法，结合谱图卷积编码器与Transformer结构，并引入相似性损失函数强化同类序列对齐。
AI.result: 在NTU-60、NTU-120、Kinetics-skeleton和UWA3D Multiview Activity II数据集上达到当时最先进的少样本识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过时空联合对齐与新型损失设计，有效提升了骨骼数据在少样本场景下的动作识别鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Mingming Hu,Kun Zhang,Ruibang You,Bibo Tu
title: Relative Attention-based One-Class Adversarial Autoencoder for Continuous Authentication of Smartphone Users
title_zh: 用于智能手机用户持续身份验证的基于相对注意力的一类对抗性自动编码器
abstract: Behavioral biometrics-based continuous authentication is a promising authentication scheme, which uses behavioral biometrics recorded by built-in sensors to authenticate smartphone users throughout the session. However, current continuous authentication methods suffer some limitations: 1) behavioral biometrics from impostors are needed to train continuous authentication models. Since the distribution of negative samples from diverse attackers are unknown, it is a difficult problem to solve in real-world scenarios; 2) most deep learning-based continuous authentication methods need to train two models to improve authentication performance. A deep learning model for deep feature extraction, and a machine learning-based classifier for classification; 3) weak capability of capturing users' behavioral patterns leads to poor authentication performance. To solve these issues, we propose a relative attention-based one-class adversarial autoencoder for continuous authentication of smartphone users. First, we propose a one-class adversarial autoencoder to learn latent representations of legitimate users' behavioral patterns, which is trained only with legitimate smartphone users' behavioral biometrics. Second, we present the relative attention layer to capture richer contextual semantic representation of users' behavioral patterns, which modifies the standard self-attention mechanism using convolution projection instead of linear projection to perform the attention maps. Experimental results demonstrate that we can achieve superior performance of 1.05% EER, 1.09% EER, and 1.08% EER with a high authentication frequency (0.7s) on three public datasets.
summary: Behavioral biometrics-based continuous authentication is a promising authentication scheme, which uses behavioral biometrics recorded by built-in sensors to authenticate smartphone users throughout the session. However, current continuous authentication methods suffer some limitations: 1) behavioral biometrics from impostors are needed to train continuous authentication models. Since the distribution of negative samples from diverse attackers are unknown, it is a difficult problem to solve in real-world scenarios; 2) most deep learning-based continuous authentication methods need to train two models to improve authentication performance. A deep learning model for deep feature extraction, and a machine learning-based classifier for classification; 3) weak capability of capturing users' behavioral patterns leads to poor authentication performance. To solve these issues, we propose a relative attention-based one-class adversarial autoencoder for continuous authentication of smartphone users. First, we propose a one-class adversarial autoencoder to learn latent representations of legitimate users' behavioral patterns, which is trained only with legitimate smartphone users' behavioral biometrics. Second, we present the relative attention layer to capture richer contextual semantic representation of users' behavioral patterns, which modifies the standard self-attention mechanism using convolution projection instead of linear projection to perform the attention maps. Experimental results demonstrate that we can achieve superior performance of 1.05% EER, 1.09% EER, and 1.08% EER with a high authentication frequency (0.7s) on three public datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于行为生物识别的持续身份验证是一种很有前途的身份验证方案，它使用内置传感器记录的行为生物识别来在整个会话过程中对智能手机用户进行身份验证。然而，当前的连续身份验证方法存在一些局限性：1）需要来自冒名顶替者的行为生物识别来训练连续身份验证模型。由于不同攻击者的负样本分布是未知的，因此在现实场景中这是一个很难解决的问题； 2）大多数基于深度学习的连续认证方法需要训练两个模型来提高认证性能。用于深度特征提取的深度学习模型，以及用于分类的基于机器学习的分类器； 3）捕获用户行为模式的能力较弱，导致认证性能较差。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于相对注意力的一类对抗性自动编码器，用于智能手机用户的持续身份验证。首先，我们提出了一种一类对抗性自动编码器来学习合法用户行为模式的潜在表示，该编码器仅使用合法智能手机用户的行为生物识别技术进行训练。其次，我们提出了相对注意层来捕获用户行为模式的更丰富的上下文语义表示，它使用卷积投影而不是线性投影来修改标准的自注意机制来执行注意图。实验结果表明，我们可以在三个公共数据集上以高认证频率（0.7s）实现 1.05% EER、1.09% EER 和 1.08% EER 的优异性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于相对注意力机制的一类对抗自编码器，用于智能手机用户的连续身份验证。
AI.motivation: 现有连续身份验证方法存在需依赖冒充者数据、依赖双模型结构及行为模式捕捉能力弱等缺陷，亟需一种无需负样本、单模型且能精准提取行为特征的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了一类对抗自编码器仅使用合法用户数据训练，并引入相对注意力层通过卷积投影替代线性投影，增强行为模式的上下文语义表征能力。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上以0.7秒高频率验证时，分别达到1.05%、1.09%和1.08%的等错误率（EER），验证性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过单模型结构、无需负样本及改进注意力机制，有效解决了连续身份验证中的关键问题，实现了更优的认证性能。

authors_text: L. Mandelli,S. Berretti
title: CAD 3D Model classification by Graph Neural Networks: A new approach based on STEP format
title_zh: 通过图神经网络进行 CAD 3D 模型分类：基于 STEP 格式的新方法
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a new approach for retrieval and classification of 3D models that directly performs in the Computer-Aided Design (CAD) format without any conversion to other representations like point clouds or meshes, thus avoiding any loss of information. Among the various CAD formats, we consider the widely used STEP extension, which represents a standard for product manufacturing information. This particular format represents a 3D model as a set of primitive elements such as surfaces and vertices linked together. In our approach, we exploit the linked structure of STEP files to create a graph in which the nodes are the primitive elements and the arcs are the connections between them. We then use Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to solve the problem of model classification. Finally, we created two datasets of 3D models in native CAD format, respectively, by collecting data from the Traceparts model library and from the Configurators software modeling company. We used these datasets to test and compare our approach with respect to state-of-the-art methods that consider other 3D formats. Our code is available at https://github.com/divanoLetto/3D_STEP_Classification

Among the various CAD formats, we consider the widely used STEP extension, which represents a standard for product manufacturing information. This particular format represents a 3D model as a set of primitive elements such as surfaces and vertices linked together. In our approach, we exploit the linked structure of STEP files to create a graph in which the nodes are the primitive elements and the arcs are the connections between them. We then use Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to solve the problem of model classification. Finally, we created two datasets of 3D models in native CAD format, respectively, by collecting data from the Traceparts model library and from the Configurators software modeling company. We used these datasets to test and compare our approach with respect to state-of-the-art methods that consider other 3D formats. Our code is available at https://github.com/divanoLetto/3D_STEP_Classification
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于 3D 模型检索和分类的新方法，该方法直接以计算机辅助设计 (CAD) 格式执行，无需转换为点云或网格等其他表示形式，从而避免任何信息丢失。在各种 CAD 格式中，我们考虑广泛使用的 STEP 扩展，它代表了产品制造信息的标准。这种特殊格式将 3D 模型表示为一组基本元素，例如链接在一起的曲面和顶点。在我们的方法中，我们利用 STEP 文件的链接结构来创建一个图，其中节点是基本元素，弧是它们之间的连接。然后我们使用图神经网络（GNN）来解决模型分类问题。最后，我们通过从 Traceparts 模型库和 Configurators 软件建模公司收集数据，分别创建了两个原生 CAD 格式的 3D 模型数据集。我们使用这些数据集来测试我们的方法并将其与考虑其他 3D 格式的最先进方法进行比较。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/divanoLetto/3D_STEP_Classification

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于STEP格式的3D模型分类方法，直接利用CAD原生格式构建图神经网络进行分类。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需将CAD模型转换为点云或网格等格式，导致信息丢失。本文旨在通过直接处理STEP格式避免这一问题。
AI.method: 将STEP文件中的原始几何元素（表面、顶点）构建成图结构，使用图神经网络（GNN）进行分类，并构建两个CAD原生数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在分类任务上优于现有基于其他3D格式的前沿方法，且无需格式转换即可保持数据完整性。
AI.conclusion: 基于STEP格式的图神经网络分类方法能有效保留CAD模型原始信息，为3D模型分类提供新思路。

authors_text: Fernando Julio Cendra,Lan Ma,Jiajun Shen,Xiaojuan Qi
title: SL3D: Self-supervised-Self-labeled 3D Recognition
title_zh: SL3D：自监督-自标记3D识别
comment: This paper has already been accepted by Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Workshop on Self-Supervised Learning: Theory and Practice
comments: This paper has already been accepted by Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Workshop on Self-Supervised Learning: Theory and Practice
abstract: Deep learning has attained remarkable success in many 3D visual recognition tasks, including shape classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation. However, many of these results rely on manually collecting densely annotated real-world 3D data, which is highly time-consuming and expensive to obtain, limiting the scalability of 3D recognition tasks. Thus, we study unsupervised 3D recognition and propose a Self-supervised-Self-Labeled 3D Recognition (SL3D) framework. SL3D simultaneously solves two coupled objectives, i.e., clustering and learning feature representation to generate pseudo-labeled data for unsupervised 3D recognition. SL3D is a generic framework and can be applied to solve different 3D recognition tasks, including classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate its effectiveness. Code is available at https://github.com/fcendra/sl3d.
summary: Deep learning has attained remarkable success in many 3D visual recognition tasks, including shape classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation. However, many of these results rely on manually collecting densely annotated real-world 3D data, which is highly time-consuming and expensive to obtain, limiting the scalability of 3D recognition tasks. Thus, we study unsupervised 3D recognition and propose a Self-supervised-Self-Labeled 3D Recognition (SL3D) framework. SL3D simultaneously solves two coupled objectives, i.e., clustering and learning feature representation to generate pseudo-labeled data for unsupervised 3D recognition. SL3D is a generic framework and can be applied to solve different 3D recognition tasks, including classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate its effectiveness. Code is available at https://github.com/fcendra/sl3d.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在许多 3D 视觉识别任务中取得了显着的成功，包括形状分类、对象检测和语义分割。然而，其中许多结果依赖于手动收集密集注释的真实 3D 数据，获取起来非常耗时且昂贵，限制了 3D 识别任务的可扩展性。因此，我们研究无监督 3D 识别，并提出了自监督自标记 3D 识别 (SL3D) 框架。 SL3D 同时解决两个耦合目标，即聚类和学习特征表示，以生成用于无监督 3D 识别的伪标记数据。 SL3D 是一个通用框架，可用于解决不同的 3D 识别任务，包括分类、对象检测和语义分割。大量的实验证明了其有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/fcendra/sl3d 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SL3D的自监督自标注3D识别框架，用于解决无监督3D视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 现有3D识别任务依赖人工标注的密集数据，成本高且限制了模型扩展性，亟需无监督学习方法。
AI.method: 通过同时优化聚类与特征表示学习，生成伪标签数据实现无监督3D识别，框架适用于分类、检测和分割等任务。
AI.result: 实验验证了SL3D在多种3D任务中的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SL3D提供了一种通用的无监督3D识别解决方案，能够有效减少对人工标注数据的依赖。

authors_text: F. Principi,S. Berretti,C. Ferrari,N. Otberdout,M. Daoudi,A. Del Bimbo
title: The Florence 4D Facial Expression Dataset
title_zh: Florence 4D 面部表情数据集
abstract: Human facial expressions change dynamically, so their recognition / analysis should be conducted by accounting for the temporal evolution of face deformations either in 2D or 3D. While abundant 2D video data do exist, this is not the case in 3D, where few 3D dynamic (4D) datasets were released for public use. The negative consequence of this scarcity of data is amplified by current deep learning based-methods for facial expression analysis that require large quantities of variegate samples to be effectively trained. With the aim of smoothing such limitations, in this paper we propose a large dataset, named Florence 4D, composed of dynamic sequences of 3D face models, where a combination of synthetic and real identities exhibit an unprecedented variety of 4D facial expressions, with variations that include the classical neutral-apex transition, but generalize to expression-to-expression. All these characteristics are not exposed by any of the existing 4D datasets and they cannot even be obtained by combining more than one dataset. We strongly believe that making such a data corpora publicly available to the community will allow designing and experimenting new applications that were not possible to investigate till now. To show at some extent the difficulty of our data in terms of different identities and varying expressions, we also report a baseline experimentation on the proposed dataset that can be used as baseline.
summary: Human facial expressions change dynamically, so their recognition / analysis should be conducted by accounting for the temporal evolution of face deformations either in 2D or 3D. While abundant 2D video data do exist, this is not the case in 3D, where few 3D dynamic (4D) datasets were released for public use. The negative consequence of this scarcity of data is amplified by current deep learning based-methods for facial expression analysis that require large quantities of variegate samples to be effectively trained. With the aim of smoothing such limitations, in this paper we propose a large dataset, named Florence 4D, composed of dynamic sequences of 3D face models, where a combination of synthetic and real identities exhibit an unprecedented variety of 4D facial expressions, with variations that include the classical neutral-apex transition, but generalize to expression-to-expression. All these characteristics are not exposed by any of the existing 4D datasets and they cannot even be obtained by combining more than one dataset. We strongly believe that making such a data corpora publicly available to the community will allow designing and experimenting new applications that were not possible to investigate till now. To show at some extent the difficulty of our data in terms of different identities and varying expressions, we also report a baseline experimentation on the proposed dataset that can be used as baseline.
abstract_zh: 人类面部表情动态变化，因此应通过考虑 2D 或 3D 面部变形的时间演变来进行识别/分析。虽然确实存在丰富的 2D 视频数据，但 3D 视频数据却并非如此，很少有 3D 动态 (4D) 数据集发布供公众使用。当前基于深度学习的面部表情分析方法放大了数据稀缺的负面后果，这些方法需要大量杂色样本进行有效训练。为了消除这些限制，在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 Florence 4D 的大型数据集，由 3D 面部模型的动态序列组成，其中合成身份和真实身份的组合表现出前所未有的 4D 面部表情多样性，其变化包括经典的中性顶点过渡，但可推广到表情到表情。所有这些特征都不是任何现有的 4D 数据集所暴露的，甚至无法通过组合多个数据集来获得。我们坚信，向社区公开提供这样的数据语料库将允许设计和试验迄今为止无法研究的新应用程序。为了在某​​种程度上显示我们的数据在不同身份和不同表达方面的难度，我们还报告了可用作基线的建议数据集的基线实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Florence 4D的大规模动态3D面部表情数据集，包含合成与真实身份的多变4D表情序列，以弥补现有3D动态数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D动态（4D）面部数据集数量极少，而深度学习方法需要大量多样化样本进行训练，导致相关研究受限。
AI.method: 构建包含合成与真实身份的3D面部模型动态序列，覆盖从经典中性-顶点过渡到复杂表情-表情变化的多样化4D表情，且现有数据集无法实现此类组合。
AI.result: 公开数据集并提供基线实验，展示其在不同身份和表情变化下的难度，为后续研究提供基准。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集的公开将推动此前难以实现的新应用研究，填补现有4D面部分析领域的空白。

search_text: The Florence 4D Facial Expression Dataset Florence 4D 面部表情数据集 Human facial expressions change dynamically, so their recognition / analysis should be conducted by accounting for the temporal evolution of face deformations either in 2D or 3D. While abundant 2D video data do exist, this is not the case in 3D, where few 3D dynamic (4D) datasets were released for public use. The negative consequence of this scarcity of data is amplified by current deep learning based-methods for facial expression analysis that require large quantities of variegate samples to be effectively trained. With the aim of smoothing such limitations, in this paper we propose a large dataset, named Florence 4D, composed of dynamic sequences of 3D face models, where a combination of synthetic and real identities exhibit an unprecedented variety of 4D facial expressions, with variations that include the classical neutral-apex transition, but generalize to expression-to-expression. All these characteristics are not exposed by any of the existing 4D datasets and they cannot even be obtained by combining more than one dataset. We strongly believe that making such a data corpora publicly available to the community will allow designing and experimenting new applications that were not possible to investigate till now. To show at some extent the difficulty of our data in terms of different identities and varying expressions, we also report a baseline experimentation on the proposed dataset that can be used as baseline. 人类面部表情动态变化，因此应通过考虑 2D 或 3D 面部变形的时间演变来进行识别/分析。虽然确实存在丰富的 2D 视频数据，但 3D 视频数据却并非如此，很少有 3D 动态 (4D) 数据集发布供公众使用。当前基于深度学习的面部表情分析方法放大了数据稀缺的负面后果，这些方法需要大量杂色样本进行有效训练。为了消除这些限制，在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 Florence 4D 的大型数据集，由 3D 面部模型的动态序列组成，其中合成身份和真实身份的组合表现出前所未有的 4D 面部表情多样性，其变化包括经典的中性顶点过渡，但可推广到表情到表情。所有这些特征都不是任何现有的 4D 数据集所暴露的，甚至无法通过组合多个数据集来获得。我们坚信，向社区公开提供这样的数据语料库将允许设计和试验迄今为止无法研究的新应用程序。为了在某​​种程度上显示我们的数据在不同身份和不同表达方面的难度，我们还报告了可用作基线的建议数据集的基线实验。 本文提出一个名为Florence 4D的大规模动态3D面部表情数据集，包含合成与真实身份的多变4D表情序列，以弥补现有3D动态数据稀缺的问题。 F. Principi,S. Berretti,C. Ferrari,N. Otberdout,M. Daoudi,A. Del Bimbo cs.CV

authors_text: Zhibin Qiu,Mengfan Fu,Yinfeng Yu,LiLi Yin,Fuchun Sun,Hao Huang
title: SRTNet: Time Domain Speech Enhancement Via Stochastic Refinement
title_zh: SRTNet：通过随机细化增强时域语音
abstract: Diffusion model, as a new generative model which is very popular in image generation and audio synthesis, is rarely used in speech enhancement. In this paper, we use the diffusion model as a module for stochastic refinement. We propose SRTNet, a novel method for speech enhancement via Stochastic Refinement in complete Time domain. Specifically, we design a joint network consisting of a deterministic module and a stochastic module, which makes up the ``enhance-and-refine'' paradigm. We theoretically demonstrate the feasibility of our method and experimentally prove that our method achieves faster training, faster sampling and higher quality. Our code and enhanced samples are available at https://github.com/zhibinQiu/SRTNet.git.
summary: Diffusion model, as a new generative model which is very popular in image generation and audio synthesis, is rarely used in speech enhancement. In this paper, we use the diffusion model as a module for stochastic refinement. We propose SRTNet, a novel method for speech enhancement via Stochastic Refinement in complete Time domain. Specifically, we design a joint network consisting of a deterministic module and a stochastic module, which makes up the ``enhance-and-refine'' paradigm. We theoretically demonstrate the feasibility of our method and experimentally prove that our method achieves faster training, faster sampling and higher quality. Our code and enhanced samples are available at https://github.com/zhibinQiu/SRTNet.git.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型作为一种新的生成模型，在图像生成和音频合成中非常流行，但在语音增强中很少使用。在本文中，我们使用扩散模型作为随机细化的模块。我们提出了 SRTNet，这是一种通过完整时域随机细化进行语音增强的新颖方法。具体来说，我们设计了一个由确定性模块和随机模块组成的联合网络，它构成了“增强和细化”范式。我们从理论上证明了我们方法的可行性，并通过实验证明我们的方法实现了更快的训练、更快的采样和更高的质量。我们的代码和增强示例可在 https://github.com/zhibinQiu/SRTNet.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SRTNet，一种基于扩散模型的时域语音增强方法，通过随机细化技术提升语音质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在图像和音频生成中广泛应用，但其在语音增强领域尚未被充分探索，现有方法存在训练和采样效率低、质量不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计包含确定性模块和随机模块的联合网络，构建‘增强-细化’范式，在时域直接进行语音增强，理论证明方法可行性。
AI.result: 实验表明SRTNet在训练速度、采样速度和语音增强质量上均优于现有方法，代码和样例已开源。
AI.conclusion: SRTNet通过扩散模型的随机细化机制有效解决了语音增强问题，验证了扩散模型在该领域的应用潜力。

authors_text: Çağan Selim Çoban,Oğuzhan Keskin,Jordi Pont-Tuset,Fatma Güney
title: Two-Level Temporal Relation Model for Online Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 用于在线视频实例分割的两级时间关系模型
abstract: In Video Instance Segmentation (VIS), current approaches either focus on the quality of the results, by taking the whole video as input and processing it offline; or on speed, by handling it frame by frame at the cost of competitive performance. In this work, we propose an online method that is on par with the performance of the offline counterparts. We introduce a message-passing graph neural network that encodes objects and relates them through time. We additionally propose a novel module to fuse features from the feature pyramid network with residual connections. Our model, trained end-to-end, achieves state-of-the-art performance on the YouTube-VIS dataset within the online methods. Further experiments on DAVIS demonstrate the generalization capability of our model to the video object segmentation task. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/caganselim/TLTM}
summary: In Video Instance Segmentation (VIS), current approaches either focus on the quality of the results, by taking the whole video as input and processing it offline; or on speed, by handling it frame by frame at the cost of competitive performance. In this work, we propose an online method that is on par with the performance of the offline counterparts. We introduce a message-passing graph neural network that encodes objects and relates them through time. We additionally propose a novel module to fuse features from the feature pyramid network with residual connections. Our model, trained end-to-end, achieves state-of-the-art performance on the YouTube-VIS dataset within the online methods. Further experiments on DAVIS demonstrate the generalization capability of our model to the video object segmentation task. Code is available at: \url{https://github.com/caganselim/TLTM}
abstract_zh: 在视频实例分割（VIS）中，当前的方法要么关注结果的质量，将整个视频作为输入并离线处理；要么关注结果的质量。或者在速度上，以牺牲竞争性能为代价逐帧处理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种与离线方法性能相当的在线方法。我们引入了一种消息传递图神经网络，它对对象进行编码并随时间将它们关联起来。我们还提出了一种新颖的模块，将特征金字塔网络的特征与残差连接融合起来。我们的模型经过端到端训练，在在线方法中的 YouTube-VIS 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。 DAVIS 上的进一步实验证明了我们的模型对视频对象分割任务的泛化能力。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/caganselim/TLTM}

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线视频实例分割方法，通过时间关系建模实现与离线方法相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频实例分割方法在质量与速度间存在权衡：离线方法注重结果质量但效率低，在线方法处理速度快但性能不足。本文旨在开发一种兼顾性能与实时性的在线方法。
AI.method: 设计基于消息传递的图神经网络编码时间对象关系，并提出带残差连接的特征金字塔融合模块，模型通过端到端训练实现时空特征联合优化。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS数据集上达到在线方法的最先进性能，在DAVIS数据集验证了模型对视频对象分割任务的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提双级时间关系模型有效平衡了分割精度与处理速度，为在线视频实例分割提供了新思路，代码已开源。

authors_text: Bozhong Liu,Xiaoxi Yu,Hantao Huang
title: Adaptive Speech Quality Aware Complex Neural Network for Acoustic Echo Cancellation with Supervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 用于声学回声消除的自适应语音质量感知复杂神经网络与监督对比学习
comment: Submitted to International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023. Under review
comments: Submitted to International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023. Under review
abstract: Acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) is designed to remove echoes, reverberation, and unwanted added sounds from the microphone signal while maintaining the quality of the near-end speaker's speech. This paper proposes adaptive speech quality complex neural networks to focus on specific tasks for real-time acoustic echo cancellation. In specific, we propose a complex modularize neural network with different stages to focus on feature extraction, acoustic separation, and mask optimization receptively. Furthermore, we adopt the contrastive learning framework and novel speech quality aware loss functions to further improve the performance. The model is trained with 72 hours for pre-training and then 72 hours for fine-tuning. The proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) is designed to remove echoes, reverberation, and unwanted added sounds from the microphone signal while maintaining the quality of the near-end speaker's speech. This paper proposes adaptive speech quality complex neural networks to focus on specific tasks for real-time acoustic echo cancellation. In specific, we propose a complex modularize neural network with different stages to focus on feature extraction, acoustic separation, and mask optimization receptively. Furthermore, we adopt the contrastive learning framework and novel speech quality aware loss functions to further improve the performance. The model is trained with 72 hours for pre-training and then 72 hours for fine-tuning. The proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 声学回声消除 (AEC) 旨在消除麦克风信号中的回声、混响和不需要的附加声音，同时保持近端讲话者的语音质量。本文提出了自适应语音质量复杂神经网络，专注于实时声学回声消除的特定任务。具体来说，我们提出了一个具有不同阶段的复杂模块化神经网络，重点关注特征提取、声学分离和掩模优化。此外，我们采用对比学习框架和新颖的语音质量感知损失函数来进一步提高性能。该模型经过 72 小时的预训练和 72 小时的微调。所提出的模型优于最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应语音质量感知的复杂神经网络，结合监督对比学习，用于提升实时声学回声消除的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有声学回声消除方法在实时性与语音质量保持之间难以平衡，需更高效的模型结构和训练策略以优化特征提取、声学分离及掩码生成。
AI.method: 设计分阶段复杂模块化神经网络，分别处理特征提取、声学分离与掩码优化；引入对比学习框架及语音质量感知损失函数，分72小时预训练与72小时微调。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在多项指标上优于现有最先进方法，有效提升回声消除效果与语音保真度。
AI.conclusion: 模块化网络结构与监督对比学习的结合显著提升AEC性能，未来可进一步优化训练效率与跨场景泛化能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应语音质量感知的复杂神经网络，结合监督对比学习，用于提升实时声学回声消除的性能。

search_text: Adaptive Speech Quality Aware Complex Neural Network for Acoustic Echo Cancellation with Supervised Contrastive Learning 用于声学回声消除的自适应语音质量感知复杂神经网络与监督对比学习 Acoustic echo cancellation (AEC) is designed to remove echoes, reverberation, and unwanted added sounds from the microphone signal while maintaining the quality of the near-end speaker's speech. This paper proposes adaptive speech quality complex neural networks to focus on specific tasks for real-time acoustic echo cancellation. In specific, we propose a complex modularize neural network with different stages to focus on feature extraction, acoustic separation, and mask optimization receptively. Furthermore, we adopt the contrastive learning framework and novel speech quality aware loss functions to further improve the performance. The model is trained with 72 hours for pre-training and then 72 hours for fine-tuning. The proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art performance. 声学回声消除 (AEC) 旨在消除麦克风信号中的回声、混响和不需要的附加声音，同时保持近端讲话者的语音质量。本文提出了自适应语音质量复杂神经网络，专注于实时声学回声消除的特定任务。具体来说，我们提出了一个具有不同阶段的复杂模块化神经网络，重点关注特征提取、声学分离和掩模优化。此外，我们采用对比学习框架和新颖的语音质量感知损失函数来进一步提高性能。该模型经过 72 小时的预训练和 72 小时的微调。所提出的模型优于最先进的性能。 本文提出一种自适应语音质量感知的复杂神经网络，结合监督对比学习，用于提升实时声学回声消除的性能。 Bozhong Liu,Xiaoxi Yu,Hantao Huang cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Tuan-Anh Nguyen,Nguyen Kim Thang,Denis Trystram
title: One Gradient Frank-Wolfe for Decentralized Online Convex and Submodular Optimization
title_zh: 用于分散式在线凸和子模优化的单梯度 Frank-Wolfe
abstract: Decentralized learning has been studied intensively in recent years motivated by its wide applications in the context of federated learning. The majority of previous research focuses on the offline setting in which the objective function is static. However, the offline setting becomes unrealistic in numerous machine learning applications that witness the change of massive data. In this paper, we propose \emph{decentralized online} algorithm for convex and continuous DR-submodular optimization, two classes of functions that are present in a variety of machine learning problems. Our algorithms achieve performance guarantees comparable to those in the centralized offline setting. Moreover, on average, each participant performs only a \emph{single} gradient computation per time step. Subsequently, we extend our algorithms to the bandit setting. Finally, we illustrate the competitive performance of our algorithms in real-world experiments.
summary: Decentralized learning has been studied intensively in recent years motivated by its wide applications in the context of federated learning. The majority of previous research focuses on the offline setting in which the objective function is static. However, the offline setting becomes unrealistic in numerous machine learning applications that witness the change of massive data. In this paper, we propose \emph{decentralized online} algorithm for convex and continuous DR-submodular optimization, two classes of functions that are present in a variety of machine learning problems. Our algorithms achieve performance guarantees comparable to those in the centralized offline setting. Moreover, on average, each participant performs only a \emph{single} gradient computation per time step. Subsequently, we extend our algorithms to the bandit setting. Finally, we illustrate the competitive performance of our algorithms in real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于去中心化学习在联邦学习背景下的广泛应用，去中心化学习得到了深入的研究。以前的大多数研究都集中在目标函数是静态的离线设置上。然而，在众多见证海量数据变化的机器学习应用中，离线设置变得不切实际。在本文中，我们提出了用于凸和连续 DR 子模优化的 \emph{分散在线} 算法，这两类函数存在于各种机器学习问题中。我们的算法实现了与集中式离线设置中的性能保证相当的性能保证。此外，平均而言，每个参与者每个时间步仅执行 \emph{single} 梯度计算。随后，我们将算法扩展到强盗设置。最后，我们展示了我们的算法在实际实验中的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于分布式在线凸和连续DR-子模优化的单梯度Frank-Wolfe算法，适用于动态数据场景。
AI.motivation: 传统分布式学习多针对静态目标函数的离线场景，难以应对实际中动态变化的大规模数据需求。
AI.method: 设计单梯度Frank-Wolfe算法，每个参与者每时间步仅计算一次梯度，并扩展至bandit设置以降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 算法性能与集中式离线方法相当，实验验证了其在现实场景中的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法有效平衡了分布式在线优化的计算效率与性能，为动态机器学习问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Silu He,Qinyao Luo,Ronghua Du,Ling Zhao,Haifeng Li
title: STGC-GNNs: A GNN-based traffic prediction framework with a spatial-temporal Granger causality graph
title_zh: STGC-GNNs：基于 GNN 的流量预测框架，具有时空 Granger 因果关系图
abstract: The key to traffic prediction is to accurately depict the temporal dynamics of traffic flow traveling in a road network, so it is important to model the spatial dependence of the road network. The essence of spatial dependence is to accurately describe how traffic information transmission is affected by other nodes in the road network, and the GNN-based traffic prediction model, as a benchmark for traffic prediction, has become the most common method for the ability to model spatial dependence by transmitting traffic information with the message passing mechanism. However, existing methods model a local and static spatial dependence, which cannot transmit the global-dynamic traffic information (GDTi) required for long-term prediction. The challenge is the difficulty of detecting the precise transmission of GDTi due to the uncertainty of individual transport, especially for long-term transmission. In this paper, we propose a new hypothesis\: GDTi behaves macroscopically as a transmitting causal relationship (TCR) underlying traffic flow, which remains stable under dynamic changing traffic flow. We further propose spatial-temporal Granger causality (STGC) to express TCR, which models global and dynamic spatial dependence. To model global transmission, we model the causal order and causal lag of TCRs global transmission by a spatial-temporal alignment algorithm. To capture dynamic spatial dependence, we approximate the stable TCR underlying dynamic traffic flow by a Granger causality test. The experimental results on three backbone models show that using STGC to model the spatial dependence has better results than the original model for 45 min and 1 h long-term prediction.
summary: The key to traffic prediction is to accurately depict the temporal dynamics of traffic flow traveling in a road network, so it is important to model the spatial dependence of the road network. The essence of spatial dependence is to accurately describe how traffic information transmission is affected by other nodes in the road network, and the GNN-based traffic prediction model, as a benchmark for traffic prediction, has become the most common method for the ability to model spatial dependence by transmitting traffic information with the message passing mechanism. However, existing methods model a local and static spatial dependence, which cannot transmit the global-dynamic traffic information (GDTi) required for long-term prediction. The challenge is the difficulty of detecting the precise transmission of GDTi due to the uncertainty of individual transport, especially for long-term transmission. In this paper, we propose a new hypothesis\: GDTi behaves macroscopically as a transmitting causal relationship (TCR) underlying traffic flow, which remains stable under dynamic changing traffic flow. We further propose spatial-temporal Granger causality (STGC) to express TCR, which models global and dynamic spatial dependence. To model global transmission, we model the causal order and causal lag of TCRs global transmission by a spatial-temporal alignment algorithm. To capture dynamic spatial dependence, we approximate the stable TCR underlying dynamic traffic flow by a Granger causality test. The experimental results on three backbone models show that using STGC to model the spatial dependence has better results than the original model for 45 min and 1 h long-term prediction.
abstract_zh: 交通预测的关键是准确描述交通流在路网中行驶的时间动态，因此对路网的空间依赖性进行建模非常重要。空间依赖的本质是准确描述交通信息传输如何受到路网中其他节点的影响，而基于GNN的交通预测模型作为交通预测的基准，已经成为通过消息传递机制传输交通信息来建模空间依赖能力的最常见方法。然而，现有方法对局部和静态空间依赖性进行建模，无法传输长期预测所需的全局动态交通信息（GDTi）。挑战在于，由于个体传输的不确定性，尤其是长期传输，很难检测 GDTi 的精确传输。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的假设：GDTi在宏观上表现为交通流的传输因果关系（TCR），在动态变化的交通流下保持稳定。我们进一步提出时空格兰杰因果关系（STGC）来表达 TCR，它模拟了全局和动态空间依赖性。为了模拟全球传播，我们通过时空对齐算法对 TCR 全球传播的因果顺序和因果滞后进行建模。为了捕捉动态空间依赖性，我们通过 Granger 因果检验来近似动态交通流的稳定 TCR。在三个骨干模型上的实验结果表明，使用STGC对空间依赖性进行建模对于45 min和1 h的长期预测比原始模型有更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STGC-GNNs框架，利用时空格兰杰因果关系图建模交通流的全局动态空间依赖性以提升长期预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GNN的交通预测模型仅能建模局部静态空间依赖关系，难以捕捉动态交通流中的全局动态交通信息（GDTi），导致长期预测效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出时空格兰杰因果（STGC）理论，通过时空对齐算法建模因果顺序与滞后，并利用格兰杰因果检验近似动态交通流下的稳定因果关系。
AI.result: 在三个基准模型上的实验表明，使用STGC建模空间依赖关系在45分钟和1小时长期预测任务中优于原始模型。
AI.conclusion: STGC通过建模全局动态空间依赖关系，有效提升了交通预测的长期准确性，为交通流建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Seongyeong Lee,Hansoo Park,Dong Uk Kim,Jihyeon Kim,Muhammadjon Boboev,Seungryul Baek
title: Image-free Domain Generalization via CLIP for 3D Hand Pose Estimation
title_zh: 通过 CLIP 进行无图像域概括以进行 3D 手势估计
abstract: RGB-based 3D hand pose estimation has been successful for decades thanks to large-scale databases and deep learning. However, the hand pose estimation network does not operate well for hand pose images whose characteristics are far different from the training data. This is caused by various factors such as illuminations, camera angles, diverse backgrounds in the input images, etc. Many existing methods tried to solve it by supplying additional large-scale unconstrained/target domain images to augment data space; however collecting such large-scale images takes a lot of labors. In this paper, we present a simple image-free domain generalization approach for the hand pose estimation framework that uses only source domain data. We try to manipulate the image features of the hand pose estimation network by adding the features from text descriptions using the CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) model. The manipulated image features are then exploited to train the hand pose estimation network via the contrastive learning framework. In experiments with STB and RHD datasets, our algorithm shows improved performance over the state-of-the-art domain generalization approaches.
summary: RGB-based 3D hand pose estimation has been successful for decades thanks to large-scale databases and deep learning. However, the hand pose estimation network does not operate well for hand pose images whose characteristics are far different from the training data. This is caused by various factors such as illuminations, camera angles, diverse backgrounds in the input images, etc. Many existing methods tried to solve it by supplying additional large-scale unconstrained/target domain images to augment data space; however collecting such large-scale images takes a lot of labors. In this paper, we present a simple image-free domain generalization approach for the hand pose estimation framework that uses only source domain data. We try to manipulate the image features of the hand pose estimation network by adding the features from text descriptions using the CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) model. The manipulated image features are then exploited to train the hand pose estimation network via the contrastive learning framework. In experiments with STB and RHD datasets, our algorithm shows improved performance over the state-of-the-art domain generalization approaches.
abstract_zh: 得益于大规模数据库和深度学习，基于 RGB 的 3D 手势估计已经成功数十年。然而，对于特征与训练数据相差很大的手部姿势图像，手部姿势估计网络不能很好地运行。这是由多种因素引起的，例如照明、摄像机角度、输入图像中的不同背景等。许多现有方法试图通过提供额外的大规模无约束/目标域图像来增强数据空间来解决这个问题；然而收集如此大尺寸的图像需要花费大量的人力。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的无图像域泛化方法，用于仅使用源域数据的手部姿势估计框架。我们尝试通过使用 CLIP（对比语言图像预训练）模型添加文本描述的特征来操纵手部姿势估计网络的图像特征。然后利用处理后的图像特征通过对比学习框架来训练手部姿势估计网络。在 STB 和 RHD 数据集的实验中，我们的算法显示出比最先进的域泛化方法更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需目标域图像的领域泛化方法，通过CLIP模型将文本描述特征融入3D手部姿态估计网络，以提升跨域适应能力。
AI.motivation: 传统基于RGB的3D手部姿态估计在面对光照、视角等差异时表现不佳，现有方法依赖大量目标域图像进行数据增强，但收集成本高昂。
AI.method: 利用CLIP模型将文本描述的语义特征注入手部姿态估计网络，通过对比学习框架优化图像特征，无需目标域图像即可实现领域泛化。
AI.result: 在STB和RHD数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进领域泛化方法，证明了无需图像的文本特征注入有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了通过CLIP模型结合文本信息进行领域泛化的可行性，为减少对目标域数据依赖提供了新思路。

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Gyunam Park,Aaron Küsters,Mara Tews,Cameron Pitsch,Jonathan Schneider,Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: Explainable Predictive Decision Mining for Operational Support
title_zh: 用于运营支持的可解释预测决策挖掘
abstract: Several decision points exist in business processes (e.g., whether a purchase order needs a manager's approval or not), and different decisions are made for different process instances based on their characteristics (e.g., a purchase order higher than $500 needs a manager approval). Decision mining in process mining aims to describe/predict the routing of a process instance at a decision point of the process. By predicting the decision, one can take proactive actions to improve the process. For instance, when a bottleneck is developing in one of the possible decisions, one can predict the decision and bypass the bottleneck. However, despite its huge potential for such operational support, existing techniques for decision mining have focused largely on describing decisions but not on predicting them, deploying decision trees to produce logical expressions to explain the decision. In this work, we aim to enhance the predictive capability of decision mining to enable proactive operational support by deploying more advanced machine learning algorithms. Our proposed approach provides explanations of the predicted decisions using SHAP values to support the elicitation of proactive actions. We have implemented a Web application to support the proposed approach and evaluated the approach using the implementation.
summary: Several decision points exist in business processes (e.g., whether a purchase order needs a manager's approval or not), and different decisions are made for different process instances based on their characteristics (e.g., a purchase order higher than $500 needs a manager approval). Decision mining in process mining aims to describe/predict the routing of a process instance at a decision point of the process. By predicting the decision, one can take proactive actions to improve the process. For instance, when a bottleneck is developing in one of the possible decisions, one can predict the decision and bypass the bottleneck. However, despite its huge potential for such operational support, existing techniques for decision mining have focused largely on describing decisions but not on predicting them, deploying decision trees to produce logical expressions to explain the decision. In this work, we aim to enhance the predictive capability of decision mining to enable proactive operational support by deploying more advanced machine learning algorithms. Our proposed approach provides explanations of the predicted decisions using SHAP values to support the elicitation of proactive actions. We have implemented a Web application to support the proposed approach and evaluated the approach using the implementation.
abstract_zh: 业务流程中存在多个决策点（例如，采购订单是否需要经理批准），并且根据不同的流程实例的特点做出不同的决策（例如，高于 500 美元的采购订单需要经理批准）。流程挖掘中的决策挖掘旨在描述/预测流程实例在流程决策点的路由。通过预测决策，人们可以采取主动行动来改进流程。例如，当其中一项可能的决策出现瓶颈时，我们可以预测该决策并绕过瓶颈。然而，尽管决策挖掘在这种操作支持方面具有巨大的潜力，但现有的决策挖掘技术主要集中在描述决策而不是预测决策、部署决策树来生成逻辑表达式来解释决策。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过部署更先进的机器学习算法来增强决策挖掘的预测能力，以实现主动的运营支持。我们提出的方法使用 SHAP 值来解释预测决策，以支持主动采取行动。我们已经实现了一个 Web 应用程序来支持所提出的方法，并使用该实现来评估该方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的预测性决策挖掘方法，通过结合先进机器学习算法和SHAP值解释技术，提升业务流程中决策点的预测能力以支持操作优化。
AI.motivation: 现有决策挖掘技术侧重于描述性分析（如决策树生成逻辑规则），缺乏对决策的预测能力，难以实现流程瓶颈预警和主动干预等操作支持。
AI.method: 采用先进机器学习算法增强预测性能，并利用SHAP值提供决策解释，开发Web应用实现方法验证。
AI.result: 通过Web应用实施验证，证明该方法能有效预测流程决策并生成可解释的SHAP值，支持主动操作优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了预测性决策挖掘的空白，通过可解释性输出为流程改进提供数据驱动的主动支持依据。

authors_text: Andrew Huard,Mengyu Chen,Misha Sra
title: CardsVR: A Two-Person VR Experience with Passive Haptic Feedback from a Deck of Playing Cards
title_zh: CardsVR：通过一副扑克牌提供被动触觉反馈的两人 VR 体验
abstract: Presence in virtual reality (VR) is meaningful for remotely connecting with others and facilitating social interactions despite great distance while providing a sense of "being there." This work presents CardsVR, a two-person VR experience that allows remote participants to play a game of cards together. An entire deck of tracked cards are used to recreate the sense of playing cards in-person. Prior work in VR commonly provides passive haptic feedback either through a single object or through static objects in the environment. CardsVR is novel in providing passive haptic feedback through multiple cards that are individually tracked and represented in the virtual environment. Participants interact with the physical cards by picking them up, holding them, playing them, or moving them on the physical table. Our participant study (N=23) shows that passive haptic feedback provides significant improvement in three standard measures of presence: Possibility to Act, Realism, and Haptics.
summary: Presence in virtual reality (VR) is meaningful for remotely connecting with others and facilitating social interactions despite great distance while providing a sense of "being there." This work presents CardsVR, a two-person VR experience that allows remote participants to play a game of cards together. An entire deck of tracked cards are used to recreate the sense of playing cards in-person. Prior work in VR commonly provides passive haptic feedback either through a single object or through static objects in the environment. CardsVR is novel in providing passive haptic feedback through multiple cards that are individually tracked and represented in the virtual environment. Participants interact with the physical cards by picking them up, holding them, playing them, or moving them on the physical table. Our participant study (N=23) shows that passive haptic feedback provides significant improvement in three standard measures of presence: Possibility to Act, Realism, and Haptics.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实 (VR) 中的临场感对于与他人进行远程连接并促进社交互动（尽管距离遥远）非常有意义，同时提供“身临其境”的感觉。这项作品展示了 CardsVR，这是一种两人 VR 体验，允许远程参与者一起玩纸牌游戏。一整副跟踪牌被用来重现亲自玩牌的感觉。 VR 领域的先前工作通常通过单个对象或环境中的静态对象提供被动触觉反馈。 CardsVR 的新颖之处在于通过在虚拟环境中单独跟踪和表示的多张卡片来提供被动触觉反馈。参与者通过拿起、握住、打出或在物理桌子上移动它们来与物理卡进行交互。我们的参与研究 (N=23) 表明，被动触觉反馈显着改善了存在感的三个标准衡量标准：行动可能性、真实性和触觉。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CardsVR，一种利用被动触觉反馈的双人VR体验系统，通过追踪纸牌实现远程纸牌游戏的在场感。
AI.motivation: 现有VR系统中的被动触觉反馈多依赖单一或静态物体，难以还原真实交互体验，需探索多物体动态反馈以提升远程社交的在场感。
AI.method: 设计可追踪的实体纸牌组，通过物理操作（抓取、移动等）同步虚拟环境，结合被动触觉反馈实现双人远程协作游戏。
AI.result: 23名参与者实验显示，被动触觉反馈显著提升在场感的三个维度：行动可能性、真实感和触觉感知。
AI.conclusion: 多物体动态被动触觉反馈能有效增强VR远程交互的真实感与沉浸感，为社交VR提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CardsVR，一种利用被动触觉反馈的双人VR体验系统，通过追踪纸牌实现远程纸牌游戏的在场感。
