search_text: CardsVR: A Two-Person VR Experience with Passive Haptic Feedback from a Deck of Playing Cards CardsVR：通过一副扑克牌提供被动触觉反馈的两人 VR 体验 Presence in virtual reality (VR) is meaningful for remotely connecting with others and facilitating social interactions despite great distance while providing a sense of "being there." This work presents CardsVR, a two-person VR experience that allows remote participants to play a game of cards together. An entire deck of tracked cards are used to recreate the sense of playing cards in-person. Prior work in VR commonly provides passive haptic feedback either through a single object or through static objects in the environment. CardsVR is novel in providing passive haptic feedback through multiple cards that are individually tracked and represented in the virtual environment. Participants interact with the physical cards by picking them up, holding them, playing them, or moving them on the physical table. Our participant study (N=23) shows that passive haptic feedback provides significant improvement in three standard measures of presence: Possibility to Act, Realism, and Haptics. 虚拟现实 (VR) 中的临场感对于与他人进行远程连接并促进社交互动（尽管距离遥远）非常有意义，同时提供“身临其境”的感觉。这项作品展示了 CardsVR，这是一种两人 VR 体验，允许远程参与者一起玩纸牌游戏。一整副跟踪牌被用来重现亲自玩牌的感觉。 VR 领域的先前工作通常通过单个对象或环境中的静态对象提供被动触觉反馈。 CardsVR 的新颖之处在于通过在虚拟环境中单独跟踪和表示的多张卡片来提供被动触觉反馈。参与者通过拿起、握住、打出或在物理桌子上移动它们来与物理卡进行交互。我们的参与研究 (N=23) 表明，被动触觉反馈显着改善了存在感的三个标准衡量标准：行动可能性、真实性和触觉。 本文提出CardsVR，一种利用被动触觉反馈的双人VR体验系统，通过追踪纸牌实现远程纸牌游戏的在场感。 Andrew Huard,Mengyu Chen,Misha Sra cs.HC

authors_text: Shengbang Tong,Xili Dai,Yubei Chen,Mingyang Li,Zengyi Li,Brent Yi,Yann LeCun,Yi Ma
title: Unsupervised Learning of Structured Representations via Closed-Loop Transcription
title_zh: 通过闭环转录进行结构化表示的无监督学习
abstract: This paper proposes an unsupervised method for learning a unified representation that serves both discriminative and generative purposes. While most existing unsupervised learning approaches focus on a representation for only one of these two goals, we show that a unified representation can enjoy the mutual benefits of having both. Such a representation is attainable by generalizing the recently proposed \textit{closed-loop transcription} framework, known as CTRL, to the unsupervised setting. This entails solving a constrained maximin game over a rate reduction objective that expands features of all samples while compressing features of augmentations of each sample. Through this process, we see discriminative low-dimensional structures emerge in the resulting representations. Under comparable experimental conditions and network complexities, we demonstrate that these structured representations enable classification performance close to state-of-the-art unsupervised discriminative representations, and conditionally generated image quality significantly higher than that of state-of-the-art unsupervised generative models. Source code can be found at https://github.com/Delay-Xili/uCTRL.
summary: This paper proposes an unsupervised method for learning a unified representation that serves both discriminative and generative purposes. While most existing unsupervised learning approaches focus on a representation for only one of these two goals, we show that a unified representation can enjoy the mutual benefits of having both. Such a representation is attainable by generalizing the recently proposed \textit{closed-loop transcription} framework, known as CTRL, to the unsupervised setting. This entails solving a constrained maximin game over a rate reduction objective that expands features of all samples while compressing features of augmentations of each sample. Through this process, we see discriminative low-dimensional structures emerge in the resulting representations. Under comparable experimental conditions and network complexities, we demonstrate that these structured representations enable classification performance close to state-of-the-art unsupervised discriminative representations, and conditionally generated image quality significantly higher than that of state-of-the-art unsupervised generative models. Source code can be found at https://github.com/Delay-Xili/uCTRL.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种无监督的方法来学习统一的表示，该表示既可以用于判别目的，也可以用于生成目的。虽然大多数现有的无监督学习方法只关注这两个目标之一的表示，但我们表明，统一的表示可以享受两者的共同利益。这种表示可以通过将最近提出的 \textit{闭环转录} 框架（称为 CTRL）推广到无监督设置来实现。这需要解决速率降低目标上的约束最大最小博弈，该目标扩展所有样本的特征，同时压缩每个样本的增强特征。通过这个过程，我们看到在结果表示中出现了有区别的低维结构。在可比较的实验条件和网络复杂性下，我们证明这些结构化表示能够使分类性能接近最先进的无监督判别表示，并且条件生成的图像质量显着高于最先进的无监督生成模型。源代码可以在 https://github.com/Delay-Xili/uCTRL 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督学习方法，通过扩展闭合循环转录框架（CTRL）来学习兼具判别和生成能力的统一表示。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督学习方法通常仅针对判别或生成目标中的一种，而本文旨在通过统一表示实现两者的协同增益。
AI.method: 将CTRL框架推广至无监督场景，通过约束最大化-最小化博弈优化率减目标，在扩展所有样本特征的同时压缩每个样本的增强特征。
AI.result: 在相似实验条件下，分类性能接近最先进无监督判别方法，生成图像质量显著优于最先进无监督生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 统一表示方法能有效捕捉低维结构，在判别和生成任务中均展现优势，为无监督表征学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Sriparna Majumdar,Aaron Brick
title: Recognizing Handwriting Styles in a Historical Scanned Document Using Unsupervised Fuzzy Clustering
title_zh: 使用无监督模糊聚类识别历史扫描文档中的手写风格
comment: 26 pages in total, 5 figures and 2 tables
comments: 26 pages in total, 5 figures and 2 tables
abstract: The forensic attribution of the handwriting in a digitized document to multiple scribes is a challenging problem of high dimensionality. Unique handwriting styles may be dissimilar in a blend of several factors including character size, stroke width, loops, ductus, slant angles, and cursive ligatures. Previous work on labeled data with Hidden Markov models, support vector machines, and semi-supervised recurrent neural networks have provided moderate to high success. In this study, we successfully detect hand shifts in a historical manuscript through fuzzy soft clustering in combination with linear principal component analysis. This advance demonstrates the successful deployment of unsupervised methods for writer attribution of historical documents and forensic document analysis.
summary: The forensic attribution of the handwriting in a digitized document to multiple scribes is a challenging problem of high dimensionality. Unique handwriting styles may be dissimilar in a blend of several factors including character size, stroke width, loops, ductus, slant angles, and cursive ligatures. Previous work on labeled data with Hidden Markov models, support vector machines, and semi-supervised recurrent neural networks have provided moderate to high success. In this study, we successfully detect hand shifts in a historical manuscript through fuzzy soft clustering in combination with linear principal component analysis. This advance demonstrates the successful deployment of unsupervised methods for writer attribution of historical documents and forensic document analysis.
abstract_zh: 将数字化文档中的笔迹归因于多个抄写员是一个具有挑战性的高维问题。独特的手写风格可能因多种因素的混合而有所不同，包括字符大小、笔画宽度、循环、导管、倾斜角度和草书连字。之前使用隐马尔可夫模型、支持向量机和半监督循环神经网络进行标记数据的工作已经取得了中等到高度的成功。在这项研究中，我们通过模糊软聚类结合线性主成分分析成功地检测了历史手稿中的手部移动。这一进展证明了无监督方法在历史文档作者归属和法医文档分析方面的成功部署。

AI.tldr: 本文通过模糊软聚类与主成分分析结合的方法，成功检测历史手稿中的笔迹切换问题。
AI.motivation: 历史文献中的手写体风格归属因高维特征（如字形大小、笔画宽度等）差异而难以处理，传统监督方法依赖标注数据且效果有限。
AI.method: 采用模糊软聚类算法结合线性主成分分析（PCA），在无需标注数据的情况下实现对手写风格的无监督分类。
AI.result: 有效识别出手稿中不同抄写员的笔迹切换点，验证了无监督方法在历史文献笔迹归属任务中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为历史文档的法医分析提供了新的无监督解决方案，降低了对标注数据的依赖性。

authors_text: Jiadi Yao,Xing Chen,Xiao-Lei Zhang,Wei-Qiang Zhang,Kunde Yang
title: Symmetric Saliency-based Adversarial Attack To Speaker Identification
title_zh: 基于对称显着性的说话人识别对抗攻击
abstract: Adversarial attack approaches to speaker identification either need high computational cost or are not very effective, to our knowledge. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a novel generation-network-based approach, called symmetric saliency-based encoder-decoder (SSED), to generate adversarial voice examples to speaker identification. It contains two novel components. First, it uses a novel saliency map decoder to learn the importance of speech samples to the decision of a targeted speaker identification system, so as to make the attacker focus on generating artificial noise to the important samples. It also proposes an angular loss function to push the speaker embedding far away from the source speaker. Our experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SSED yields the state-of-the-art performance, i.e. over 97% targeted attack success rate and a signal-to-noise level of over 39 dB on both the open-set and close-set speaker identification tasks, with a low computational cost.
summary: Adversarial attack approaches to speaker identification either need high computational cost or are not very effective, to our knowledge. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a novel generation-network-based approach, called symmetric saliency-based encoder-decoder (SSED), to generate adversarial voice examples to speaker identification. It contains two novel components. First, it uses a novel saliency map decoder to learn the importance of speech samples to the decision of a targeted speaker identification system, so as to make the attacker focus on generating artificial noise to the important samples. It also proposes an angular loss function to push the speaker embedding far away from the source speaker. Our experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SSED yields the state-of-the-art performance, i.e. over 97% targeted attack success rate and a signal-to-noise level of over 39 dB on both the open-set and close-set speaker identification tasks, with a low computational cost.
abstract_zh: 据我们所知，说话人识别的对抗性攻击方法要么需要很高的计算成本，要么不是很有效。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于生成网络的方法，称为基于对称显着性的编码器解码器（SSED），来生成对抗性语音示例以进行说话人识别。它包含两个新颖的组件。首先，它使用一种新颖的显着图解码器来学习语音样本对目标说话人识别系统决策的重要性，从而使攻击者专注于对重要样本生成人工噪声。它还提出了一个角度损失函数，以将嵌入的扬声器推离源扬声器。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的 SSED 具有最先进的性能，即在开放集和封闭集说话人识别任务上超过 97% 的目标攻击成功率和超过 39 dB 的信噪比，且计算成本较低。

AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法存在计算成本高或效果差的问题，需更高效的方法
AI.method: 采用对称显著性图解码器和角度损失函数，生成对抗样本并优化攻击效果
AI.result: 实验表明在低计算成本下，攻击成功率超97%，信噪比超39dB
AI.conclusion: SSED在攻击效果和计算效率上优于现有方法，具有实际应用价值

search_text: Symmetric Saliency-based Adversarial Attack To Speaker Identification 基于对称显着性的说话人识别对抗攻击 Adversarial attack approaches to speaker identification either need high computational cost or are not very effective, to our knowledge. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a novel generation-network-based approach, called symmetric saliency-based encoder-decoder (SSED), to generate adversarial voice examples to speaker identification. It contains two novel components. First, it uses a novel saliency map decoder to learn the importance of speech samples to the decision of a targeted speaker identification system, so as to make the attacker focus on generating artificial noise to the important samples. It also proposes an angular loss function to push the speaker embedding far away from the source speaker. Our experimental results demonstrate that the proposed SSED yields the state-of-the-art performance, i.e. over 97% targeted attack success rate and a signal-to-noise level of over 39 dB on both the open-set and close-set speaker identification tasks, with a low computational cost. 据我们所知，说话人识别的对抗性攻击方法要么需要很高的计算成本，要么不是很有效。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于生成网络的方法，称为基于对称显着性的编码器解码器（SSED），来生成对抗性语音示例以进行说话人识别。它包含两个新颖的组件。首先，它使用一种新颖的显着图解码器来学习语音样本对目标说话人识别系统决策的重要性，从而使攻击者专注于对重要样本生成人工噪声。它还提出了一个角度损失函数，以将嵌入的扬声器推离源扬声器。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的 SSED 具有最先进的性能，即在开放集和封闭集说话人识别任务上超过 97% 的目标攻击成功率和超过 39 dB 的信噪比，且计算成本较低。 提出一种基于对称显著性的对抗攻击方法，生成对抗语音样本以攻击说话人识别系统 Jiadi Yao,Xing Chen,Xiao-Lei Zhang,Wei-Qiang Zhang,Kunde Yang cs.SD,cs.CR,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Veysel Kocaman,Ofer M. Shir,Thomas Bäck,Ahmed Nabil Belbachir
title: Saliency Can Be All You Need In Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 在对比自我监督学习中，显着性可以满足您的所有需求
comment: Accepted for the 17th International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC 2022)
comments: Accepted for the 17th International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC 2022)
abstract: We propose an augmentation policy for Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) in the form of an already established Salient Image Segmentation technique entitled Global Contrast based Salient Region Detection. This detection technique, which had been devised for unrelated Computer Vision tasks, was empirically observed to play the role of an augmentation facilitator within the SSL protocol. This observation is rooted in our practical attempts to learn, by SSL-fashion, aerial imagery of solar panels, which exhibit challenging boundary patterns. Upon the successful integration of this technique on our problem domain, we formulated a generalized procedure and conducted a comprehensive, systematic performance assessment with various Contrastive SSL algorithms subject to standard augmentation techniques. This evaluation, which was conducted across multiple datasets, indicated that the proposed technique indeed contributes to SSL. We hypothesize whether salient image segmentation may suffice as the only augmentation policy in Contrastive SSL when treating downstream segmentation tasks.
summary: We propose an augmentation policy for Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) in the form of an already established Salient Image Segmentation technique entitled Global Contrast based Salient Region Detection. This detection technique, which had been devised for unrelated Computer Vision tasks, was empirically observed to play the role of an augmentation facilitator within the SSL protocol. This observation is rooted in our practical attempts to learn, by SSL-fashion, aerial imagery of solar panels, which exhibit challenging boundary patterns. Upon the successful integration of this technique on our problem domain, we formulated a generalized procedure and conducted a comprehensive, systematic performance assessment with various Contrastive SSL algorithms subject to standard augmentation techniques. This evaluation, which was conducted across multiple datasets, indicated that the proposed technique indeed contributes to SSL. We hypothesize whether salient image segmentation may suffice as the only augmentation policy in Contrastive SSL when treating downstream segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们以已经建立的显着图像分割技术（名为基于全局对比度的显着区域检测）的形式提出了对比自监督学习（SSL）的增强策略。这种检测技术是为不相关的计算机视觉任务而设计的，根据经验观察，它在 SSL 协议中发挥了增强促进者的作用。这一观察植根于我们通过 SSL 时尚学习太阳能电池板航空图像的实际尝试，这些图像表现出具有挑战性的边界模式。在将该技术成功集成到我们的问题领域后，我们制定了通用程序，并根据标准增强技术对各种对比 SSL 算法进行了全面、系统的性能评估。这项评估是在多个数据集上进行的，表明所提出的技术确实有助于 SSL。我们假设在处理下游分割任务时，显着图像分割是否足以作为对比 SSL 中唯一的增强策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将显著性图像分割技术作为对比自监督学习的增强策略，并验证其在多种下游分割任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 为解决太阳能板等复杂边界模式图像的自监督学习难题，探索是否可通过显著性分割技术替代传统数据增强策略。
AI.method: 采用基于全局对比的显著区域检测技术作为增强策略，集成到对比自监督学习框架中，并在多个数据集上进行系统评估。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个数据集上均能提升对比自监督学习效果，支持显著性分割可能成为唯一增强策略的假设。
AI.conclusion: 显著性分割技术可作为对比自监督学习的有效增强手段，尤其在处理需要精确边界信息的下游分割任务时表现突出。

authors_text: Songhua Liu,Kai Wang,Xingyi Yang,Jingwen Ye,Xinchao Wang
title: Dataset Distillation via Factorization
title_zh: 通过分解进行数据集蒸馏
abstract: In this paper, we study \xw{dataset distillation (DD)}, from a novel perspective and introduce a \emph{dataset factorization} approach, termed \emph{HaBa}, which is a plug-and-play strategy portable to any existing DD baseline. Unlike conventional DD approaches that aim to produce distilled and representative samples, \emph{HaBa} explores decomposing a dataset into two components: data \emph{Ha}llucination networks and \emph{Ba}ses, where the latter is fed into the former to reconstruct image samples. The flexible combinations between bases and hallucination networks, therefore, equip the distilled data with exponential informativeness gain, which largely increase the representation capability of distilled datasets. To furthermore increase the data efficiency of compression results, we further introduce a pair of adversarial contrastive constraints on the resultant hallucination networks and bases, which increase the diversity of generated images and inject more discriminant information into the factorization. Extensive comparisons and experiments demonstrate that our method can yield significant improvement on downstream classification tasks compared with previous state of the arts, while reducing the total number of compressed parameters by up to 65\%. Moreover, distilled datasets by our approach also achieve \textasciitilde10\% higher accuracy than baseline methods in cross-architecture generalization. Our code is available \href{https://github.com/Huage001/DatasetFactorization}{here}.
summary: In this paper, we study \xw{dataset distillation (DD)}, from a novel perspective and introduce a \emph{dataset factorization} approach, termed \emph{HaBa}, which is a plug-and-play strategy portable to any existing DD baseline. Unlike conventional DD approaches that aim to produce distilled and representative samples, \emph{HaBa} explores decomposing a dataset into two components: data \emph{Ha}llucination networks and \emph{Ba}ses, where the latter is fed into the former to reconstruct image samples. The flexible combinations between bases and hallucination networks, therefore, equip the distilled data with exponential informativeness gain, which largely increase the representation capability of distilled datasets. To furthermore increase the data efficiency of compression results, we further introduce a pair of adversarial contrastive constraints on the resultant hallucination networks and bases, which increase the diversity of generated images and inject more discriminant information into the factorization. Extensive comparisons and experiments demonstrate that our method can yield significant improvement on downstream classification tasks compared with previous state of the arts, while reducing the total number of compressed parameters by up to 65\%. Moreover, distilled datasets by our approach also achieve \textasciitilde10\% higher accuracy than baseline methods in cross-architecture generalization. Our code is available \href{https://github.com/Huage001/DatasetFactorization}{here}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们从一个新颖的角度研究\xw{数据集蒸馏（DD）}，并引入一种\emph{数据集分解}方法，称为\emph{HaBa}，这是一种可移植到任何现有DD基线的即插即用策略。与旨在产生蒸馏和代表性样本的传统​​ DD 方法不同，\emph{HaBa} 探索将数据集分解为两个部分：数据 \emph{Ha}llucination 网络和 \emph{Ba}ses，其中后者被输入到前者中以重建图像样本。因此，碱基和幻觉网络之间的灵活组合使蒸馏数据具有指数级的信息量增益，这大大提高了蒸馏数据集的表示能力。为了进一步提高压缩结果的数据效率，我们进一步在产生的幻觉网络和基础上引入一对对抗性对比约束，这增加了生成图像的多样性，并为分解注入更多判别信息。广泛的比较和实验表明，与之前的技术水平相比，我们的方法可以在下游分类任务上产生显着的改进，同时将压缩参数的总数减少高达 65%。此外，通过我们的方法提取的数据集在跨架构泛化方面也比基线方法提高了 \textasciitilde10\% 的准确性。我们的代码可在 \href{https://github.com/Huage001/DatasetFactorization}{here} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HaBa的数据集蒸馏方法，通过将数据集分解为生成网络和基础组件，提升蒸馏数据的表示能力和效率。
AI.motivation: 传统数据集蒸馏方法生成的样本代表性不足，无法充分挖掘压缩数据的潜力，因此需要一种更高效的分解策略。
AI.method: HaBa方法将数据集分解为两部分：生成幻觉网络（Ha）和基础组件（Ba），通过两者的组合重构图像，并引入对抗性对比约束以增强生成多样性与判别性。
AI.result: 在下游分类任务中，该方法相比现有方法提升显著，参数压缩率高达65%，跨架构泛化准确率提高约10%。
AI.conclusion: HaBa通过分解与对抗约束有效提升了数据集蒸馏的效率与性能，为压缩数据的表示能力提供了新思路。

search_text: Dataset Distillation via Factorization 通过分解进行数据集蒸馏 In this paper, we study \xw{dataset distillation (DD)}, from a novel perspective and introduce a \emph{dataset factorization} approach, termed \emph{HaBa}, which is a plug-and-play strategy portable to any existing DD baseline. Unlike conventional DD approaches that aim to produce distilled and representative samples, \emph{HaBa} explores decomposing a dataset into two components: data \emph{Ha}llucination networks and \emph{Ba}ses, where the latter is fed into the former to reconstruct image samples. The flexible combinations between bases and hallucination networks, therefore, equip the distilled data with exponential informativeness gain, which largely increase the representation capability of distilled datasets. To furthermore increase the data efficiency of compression results, we further introduce a pair of adversarial contrastive constraints on the resultant hallucination networks and bases, which increase the diversity of generated images and inject more discriminant information into the factorization. Extensive comparisons and experiments demonstrate that our method can yield significant improvement on downstream classification tasks compared with previous state of the arts, while reducing the total number of compressed parameters by up to 65\%. Moreover, distilled datasets by our approach also achieve \textasciitilde10\% higher accuracy than baseline methods in cross-architecture generalization. Our code is available \href{https://github.com/Huage001/DatasetFactorization}{here}. 在本文中，我们从一个新颖的角度研究\xw{数据集蒸馏（DD）}，并引入一种\emph{数据集分解}方法，称为\emph{HaBa}，这是一种可移植到任何现有DD基线的即插即用策略。与旨在产生蒸馏和代表性样本的传统​​ DD 方法不同，\emph{HaBa} 探索将数据集分解为两个部分：数据 \emph{Ha}llucination 网络和 \emph{Ba}ses，其中后者被输入到前者中以重建图像样本。因此，碱基和幻觉网络之间的灵活组合使蒸馏数据具有指数级的信息量增益，这大大提高了蒸馏数据集的表示能力。为了进一步提高压缩结果的数据效率，我们进一步在产生的幻觉网络和基础上引入一对对抗性对比约束，这增加了生成图像的多样性，并为分解注入更多判别信息。广泛的比较和实验表明，与之前的技术水平相比，我们的方法可以在下游分类任务上产生显着的改进，同时将压缩参数的总数减少高达 65%。此外，通过我们的方法提取的数据集在跨架构泛化方面也比基线方法提高了 \textasciitilde10\% 的准确性。我们的代码可在 \href{https://github.com/Huage001/DatasetFactorization}{here} 获取。 本文提出了一种名为HaBa的数据集蒸馏方法，通过将数据集分解为生成网络和基础组件，提升蒸馏数据的表示能力和效率。 Songhua Liu,Kai Wang,Xingyi Yang,Jingwen Ye,Xinchao Wang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuxiang Wu,Yu Zhao,Baotian Hu,Pasquale Minervini,Pontus Stenetorp,Sebastian Riedel
title: An Efficient Memory-Augmented Transformer for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
title_zh: 用于知识密集型 NLP 任务的高效记忆增强转换器
comment: EMNLP 2022 main conference long paper. 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: EMNLP 2022 main conference long paper. 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Access to external knowledge is essential for many natural language processing tasks, such as question answering and dialogue. Existing methods often rely on a parametric model that stores knowledge in its parameters, or use a retrieval-augmented model that has access to an external knowledge source. Parametric and retrieval-augmented models have complementary strengths in terms of computational efficiency and predictive accuracy. To combine the strength of both approaches, we propose the Efficient Memory-Augmented Transformer (EMAT) -- it encodes external knowledge into a key-value memory and exploits the fast maximum inner product search for memory querying. We also introduce pre-training tasks that allow EMAT to encode informative key-value representations, and to learn an implicit strategy to integrate multiple memory slots into the transformer. Experiments on various knowledge-intensive tasks such as question answering and dialogue datasets show that, simply augmenting parametric models (T5-base) using our method produces more accurate results (e.g., 25.8 -> 44.3 EM on NQ) while retaining a high throughput (e.g., 1000 queries/s on NQ). Compared to retrieval-augmented models, EMAT runs substantially faster across the board and produces more accurate results on WoW and ELI5. Our code and datasets are available at https://github. com/uclnlp/EMAT.
summary: Access to external knowledge is essential for many natural language processing tasks, such as question answering and dialogue. Existing methods often rely on a parametric model that stores knowledge in its parameters, or use a retrieval-augmented model that has access to an external knowledge source. Parametric and retrieval-augmented models have complementary strengths in terms of computational efficiency and predictive accuracy. To combine the strength of both approaches, we propose the Efficient Memory-Augmented Transformer (EMAT) -- it encodes external knowledge into a key-value memory and exploits the fast maximum inner product search for memory querying. We also introduce pre-training tasks that allow EMAT to encode informative key-value representations, and to learn an implicit strategy to integrate multiple memory slots into the transformer. Experiments on various knowledge-intensive tasks such as question answering and dialogue datasets show that, simply augmenting parametric models (T5-base) using our method produces more accurate results (e.g., 25.8 -> 44.3 EM on NQ) while retaining a high throughput (e.g., 1000 queries/s on NQ). Compared to retrieval-augmented models, EMAT runs substantially faster across the board and produces more accurate results on WoW and ELI5. Our code and datasets are available at https://github. com/uclnlp/EMAT.
abstract_zh: 获取外部知识对于许多自然语言处理任务（例如问答和对话）至关重要。现有方法通常依赖于将知识存储在其参数中的参数模型，或者使用可以访问外部知识源的检索增强模型。参数化模型和检索增强模型在计算效率和预测准确性方面具有互补的优势。为了结合这两种方法的优势，我们提出了高效内存增强变压器（EMAT）——它将外部知识编码到键值内存中，并利用快速最大内积搜索进行内存查询。我们还引入了预训练任务，允许 EMAT 对信息丰富的键值表示进行编码，并学习将多个内存插槽集成到变压器中的隐式策略。对各种知识密集型任务（例如问答和对话数据集）的实验表明，使用我们的方法简单地增强参数模型（T5-base）可以产生更准确的结果（例如，NQ 上的 25.8 -> 44.3 EM），同时保持高吞吐量（例如，NQ 上的 1000 个查询/秒）。与检索增强模型相比，EMAT 的整体运行速度要快得多，并且在 WoW 和 ELI5 上产生更准确的结果。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github 上获取。 com/uclnlp/EMAT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的记忆增强型Transformer（EMAT），旨在提升知识密集型自然语言处理任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在参数化模型和检索增强模型之间存在计算效率与预测准确性的权衡，需结合两者优势以提升效果。
AI.method: EMAT通过键值记忆编码外部知识，利用快速最大内积搜索进行记忆查询，并引入预训练任务以学习多记忆槽的整合策略。
AI.result: 在NQ数据集上，EMAT将T5-base模型的准确率从25.8提升至44.3 EM，同时保持高吞吐量（1000查询/秒）；在WOW和ELI5任务中优于检索增强模型。
AI.conclusion: EMAT有效结合了参数化与检索增强方法的优势，在准确率和效率上均优于现有模型。

authors_text: Jiawei Lian,Shaohui Mei,Shun Zhang,Mingyang Ma
title: Benchmarking Adversarial Patch Against Aerial Detection
title_zh: 针对空中检测的对抗性补丁进行基准测试
abstract: DNNs are vulnerable to adversarial examples, which poses great security concerns for security-critical systems. In this paper, a novel adaptive-patch-based physical attack (AP-PA) framework is proposed, which aims to generate adversarial patches that are adaptive in both physical dynamics and varying scales, and by which the particular targets can be hidden from being detected. Furthermore, the adversarial patch is also gifted with attack effectiveness against all targets of the same class with a patch outside the target (No need to smear targeted objects) and robust enough in the physical world. In addition, a new loss is devised to consider more available information of detected objects to optimize the adversarial patch, which can significantly improve the patch's attack efficacy (Average precision drop up to 87.86% and 85.48% in white-box and black-box settings, respectively) and optimizing efficiency. We also establish one of the first comprehensive, coherent, and rigorous benchmarks to evaluate the attack efficacy of adversarial patches on aerial detection tasks. Finally, several proportionally scaled experiments are performed physically to demonstrate that the elaborated adversarial patches can successfully deceive aerial detection algorithms in dynamic physical circumstances. The code is available at https://github.com/JiaweiLian/AP-PA.
summary: DNNs are vulnerable to adversarial examples, which poses great security concerns for security-critical systems. In this paper, a novel adaptive-patch-based physical attack (AP-PA) framework is proposed, which aims to generate adversarial patches that are adaptive in both physical dynamics and varying scales, and by which the particular targets can be hidden from being detected. Furthermore, the adversarial patch is also gifted with attack effectiveness against all targets of the same class with a patch outside the target (No need to smear targeted objects) and robust enough in the physical world. In addition, a new loss is devised to consider more available information of detected objects to optimize the adversarial patch, which can significantly improve the patch's attack efficacy (Average precision drop up to 87.86% and 85.48% in white-box and black-box settings, respectively) and optimizing efficiency. We also establish one of the first comprehensive, coherent, and rigorous benchmarks to evaluate the attack efficacy of adversarial patches on aerial detection tasks. Finally, several proportionally scaled experiments are performed physically to demonstrate that the elaborated adversarial patches can successfully deceive aerial detection algorithms in dynamic physical circumstances. The code is available at https://github.com/JiaweiLian/AP-PA.
abstract_zh: DNN 很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，这给安全关键系统带来了巨大的安全隐患。在本文中，提出了一种新颖的基于自适应补丁的物理攻击（AP-PA）框架，其目的是生成在物理动力学和不同尺度上都具有自适应性的对抗性补丁，并且通过该框架可以隐藏特定目标而不被检测到。此外，对抗性补丁还具有对目标外补丁（无需涂抹目标对象）的同类所有目标的攻击有效性，并且在物理世界中具有足够的鲁棒性。此外，设计了一种新的损失来考虑检测到的对象的更多可用信息来优化对抗补丁，这可以显着提高补丁的攻击功效（在白盒和黑盒设置中平均精度分别下降高达87.86％和85.48％）和优化效率。我们还建立了第一个全面、连贯且严格的基准来评估对抗性补丁对空中检测任务的攻击效果。最后，在物理上进行了几个按比例缩放的实验，以证明精心设计的对抗性补丁可以在动态物理环境下成功欺骗空中检测算法。代码可在 https://github.com/JiaweiLian/AP-PA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应物理攻击框架（AP-PA），用于生成可动态适应尺度和物理环境的对抗性补丁，以隐藏特定目标并干扰航拍检测系统。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络（DNN）对对抗样本的脆弱性可能威胁安全关键系统。现有攻击方法存在针对性强、物理鲁棒性不足等问题，需设计无需直接接触目标且适用于多尺度动态场景的通用攻击方案。
AI.method: 提出自适应补丁生成框架，结合物理动态特性与尺度变化设计补丁；引入新型损失函数，利用检测目标的多维度信息优化补丁效果；建立首个针对航拍检测任务的对抗补丁评估基准，并通过物理实验验证攻击有效性。
AI.result: 在白盒/黑盒设置下平均精度分别下降87.86%/85.48%，补丁对同类目标具有泛化攻击能力；物理实验表明补丁能在动态场景中成功欺骗航拍检测算法。
AI.conclusion: AP-PA框架通过自适应补丁设计和新型损失函数显著提升了对抗攻击的物理鲁棒性与泛化能力，为航拍检测系统的安全评估提供了首个系统性基准，揭示了当前模型在物理世界中的脆弱性。

search_text: Benchmarking Adversarial Patch Against Aerial Detection 针对空中检测的对抗性补丁进行基准测试 DNNs are vulnerable to adversarial examples, which poses great security concerns for security-critical systems. In this paper, a novel adaptive-patch-based physical attack (AP-PA) framework is proposed, which aims to generate adversarial patches that are adaptive in both physical dynamics and varying scales, and by which the particular targets can be hidden from being detected. Furthermore, the adversarial patch is also gifted with attack effectiveness against all targets of the same class with a patch outside the target (No need to smear targeted objects) and robust enough in the physical world. In addition, a new loss is devised to consider more available information of detected objects to optimize the adversarial patch, which can significantly improve the patch's attack efficacy (Average precision drop up to 87.86% and 85.48% in white-box and black-box settings, respectively) and optimizing efficiency. We also establish one of the first comprehensive, coherent, and rigorous benchmarks to evaluate the attack efficacy of adversarial patches on aerial detection tasks. Finally, several proportionally scaled experiments are performed physically to demonstrate that the elaborated adversarial patches can successfully deceive aerial detection algorithms in dynamic physical circumstances. The code is available at https://github.com/JiaweiLian/AP-PA. DNN 很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，这给安全关键系统带来了巨大的安全隐患。在本文中，提出了一种新颖的基于自适应补丁的物理攻击（AP-PA）框架，其目的是生成在物理动力学和不同尺度上都具有自适应性的对抗性补丁，并且通过该框架可以隐藏特定目标而不被检测到。此外，对抗性补丁还具有对目标外补丁（无需涂抹目标对象）的同类所有目标的攻击有效性，并且在物理世界中具有足够的鲁棒性。此外，设计了一种新的损失来考虑检测到的对象的更多可用信息来优化对抗补丁，这可以显着提高补丁的攻击功效（在白盒和黑盒设置中平均精度分别下降高达87.86％和85.48％）和优化效率。我们还建立了第一个全面、连贯且严格的基准来评估对抗性补丁对空中检测任务的攻击效果。最后，在物理上进行了几个按比例缩放的实验，以证明精心设计的对抗性补丁可以在动态物理环境下成功欺骗空中检测算法。代码可在 https://github.com/JiaweiLian/AP-PA 获取。 本文提出一种自适应物理攻击框架（AP-PA），用于生成可动态适应尺度和物理环境的对抗性补丁，以隐藏特定目标并干扰航拍检测系统。 Jiawei Lian,Shaohui Mei,Shun Zhang,Mingyang Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Xianghu Yue,Junyi Ao,Xiaoxue Gao,Haizhou Li
title: token2vec: A Joint Self-Supervised Pre-training Framework Using Unpaired Speech and Text
title_zh: token2vec：使用不配对语音和文本的联合自监督预训练框架
abstract: Self-supervised pre-training has been successful in both text and speech processing. Speech and text offer different but complementary information. The question is whether we are able to perform a speech-text joint pre-training on unpaired speech and text. In this paper, we take the idea of self-supervised pre-training one step further and propose token2vec, a novel joint pre-training framework for unpaired speech and text based on discrete representations of speech. Firstly, due to the distinct characteristics between speech and text modalities, where speech is continuous while text is discrete, we first discretize speech into a sequence of discrete speech tokens to solve the modality mismatch problem. Secondly, to solve the length mismatch problem, where the speech sequence is usually much longer than text sequence, we convert the words of text into phoneme sequences and randomly repeat each phoneme in the sequences. Finally, we feed the discrete speech and text tokens into a modality-agnostic Transformer encoder and pre-train with token-level masking language modeling (tMLM). Experiments show that token2vec is significantly superior to various speech-only pre-training baselines, with up to 17.7% relative WER reduction. Token2vec model is also validated on a non-ASR task, i.e., spoken intent classification, and shows good transferability.
summary: Self-supervised pre-training has been successful in both text and speech processing. Speech and text offer different but complementary information. The question is whether we are able to perform a speech-text joint pre-training on unpaired speech and text. In this paper, we take the idea of self-supervised pre-training one step further and propose token2vec, a novel joint pre-training framework for unpaired speech and text based on discrete representations of speech. Firstly, due to the distinct characteristics between speech and text modalities, where speech is continuous while text is discrete, we first discretize speech into a sequence of discrete speech tokens to solve the modality mismatch problem. Secondly, to solve the length mismatch problem, where the speech sequence is usually much longer than text sequence, we convert the words of text into phoneme sequences and randomly repeat each phoneme in the sequences. Finally, we feed the discrete speech and text tokens into a modality-agnostic Transformer encoder and pre-train with token-level masking language modeling (tMLM). Experiments show that token2vec is significantly superior to various speech-only pre-training baselines, with up to 17.7% relative WER reduction. Token2vec model is also validated on a non-ASR task, i.e., spoken intent classification, and shows good transferability.
abstract_zh: 自监督预训练在文本和语音处理方面都取得了成功。语音和文本提供不同但互补的信息。问题是我们是否能够对不成对的语音和文本进行语音-文本联合预训练。在本文中，我们进一步采用自监督预训练的思想，提出了 token2vec，一种基于语音离散表示的不成对语音和文本的联合预训练框架。首先，由于语音和文本模态之间的独特特征，其中语音是连续的而文本是离散的，我们首先将语音离散化为离散语音标记序列以解决模态不匹配问题。其次，为了解决长度不匹配问题，其中语音序列通常比文本序列长得多，我们将文本单词转换为音素序列，并随机重复序列中的每个音素。最后，我们将离散语音和文本标记输入模态无关的 Transformer 编码器，并使用标记级掩码语言模型 (tMLM) 进行预训练。实验表明，token2vec 明显优于各种纯语音预训练基线，相对 WER 降低高达 17.7%。 Token2vec 模型还在非 ASR 任务（即语音意图分类）上进行了验证，并显示出良好的可迁移性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于未配对语音和文本的联合自监督预训练框架token2vec
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理未配对的语音和文本数据，需解决模态不匹配与长度不匹配问题以提升多模态模型性能
AI.method: 通过离散化语音为语音标记、文本转音素并随机重复解决模态与长度差异，使用模态无关Transformer编码器进行token级掩码语言模型预训练
AI.result: 相对WER降低17.7%，在非ASR任务中展现良好迁移能力
AI.conclusion: token2vec有效实现未配对语音文本联合预训练，为多模态学习提供新思路

authors_text: Qingquan Zhang,Jialin Liu,Zeqi Zhang,Junyi Wen,Bifei Mao,Xin Yao
title: Mitigating Unfairness via Evolutionary Multi-objective Ensemble Learning
title_zh: 通过进化多目标集成学习减轻不公平现象
abstract: In the literature of mitigating unfairness in machine learning, many fairness measures are designed to evaluate predictions of learning models and also utilised to guide the training of fair models. It has been theoretically and empirically shown that there exist conflicts and inconsistencies among accuracy and multiple fairness measures. Optimising one or several fairness measures may sacrifice or deteriorate other measures. Two key questions should be considered, how to simultaneously optimise accuracy and multiple fairness measures, and how to optimise all the considered fairness measures more effectively. In this paper, we view the mitigating unfairness problem as a multi-objective learning problem considering the conflicts among fairness measures. A multi-objective evolutionary learning framework is used to simultaneously optimise several metrics (including accuracy and multiple fairness measures) of machine learning models. Then, ensembles are constructed based on the learning models in order to automatically balance different metrics. Empirical results on eight well-known datasets demonstrate that compared with the state-of-the-art approaches for mitigating unfairness, our proposed algorithm can provide decision-makers with better tradeoffs among accuracy and multiple fairness metrics. Furthermore, the high-quality models generated by the framework can be used to construct an ensemble to automatically achieve a better tradeoff among all the considered fairness metrics than other ensemble methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/qingquan63/FairEMOL
summary: In the literature of mitigating unfairness in machine learning, many fairness measures are designed to evaluate predictions of learning models and also utilised to guide the training of fair models. It has been theoretically and empirically shown that there exist conflicts and inconsistencies among accuracy and multiple fairness measures. Optimising one or several fairness measures may sacrifice or deteriorate other measures. Two key questions should be considered, how to simultaneously optimise accuracy and multiple fairness measures, and how to optimise all the considered fairness measures more effectively. In this paper, we view the mitigating unfairness problem as a multi-objective learning problem considering the conflicts among fairness measures. A multi-objective evolutionary learning framework is used to simultaneously optimise several metrics (including accuracy and multiple fairness measures) of machine learning models. Then, ensembles are constructed based on the learning models in order to automatically balance different metrics. Empirical results on eight well-known datasets demonstrate that compared with the state-of-the-art approaches for mitigating unfairness, our proposed algorithm can provide decision-makers with better tradeoffs among accuracy and multiple fairness metrics. Furthermore, the high-quality models generated by the framework can be used to construct an ensemble to automatically achieve a better tradeoff among all the considered fairness metrics than other ensemble methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/qingquan63/FairEMOL
abstract_zh: 在减轻机器学习不公平性的文献中，许多公平性措施旨在评估学习模型的预测，并用于指导公平模型的训练。理论和经验都表明，准确性和多种公平性指标之间存在冲突和不一致。优化一项或多项公平措施可能会牺牲或恶化其他措施。应该考虑两个关键问题，如何同时优化准确性和多种公平性度量，以及如何更有效地优化所有考虑的公平性度量。在本文中，我们将减轻不公平问题视为考虑公平措施之间冲突的多目标学习问题。多目标进化学习框架用于同时优化机器学习模型的多个指标（包括准确性和多个公平性指标）。然后，基于学习模型构建集成，以自动平衡不同的指标。八个著名数据集的实证结果表明，与减轻不公平性的最先进方法相比，我们提出的算法可以为决策者提供准确性和多个公平性指标之间更好的权衡。此外，该框架生成的高质量模型可用于构建集成，以自动实现比其他集成方法更好的所有考虑的公平性指标之间的权衡。我们的代码公开在 https://github.com/qingquan63/FairEMOL

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化多目标集成学习的方法，用于同时优化机器学习模型的准确性及多个公平性指标，以缓解算法中的不公平问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示，优化单一或部分公平性指标可能导致其他指标恶化，而如何同时有效优化准确性与多个公平性指标仍是关键挑战。
AI.method: 将缓解不公平问题建模为多目标优化问题，采用进化学习框架同时优化多个指标，并通过集成学习自动平衡不同指标。
AI.result: 在八个知名数据集上的实验表明，该算法相比现有方法能提供更优的准确性与公平性指标权衡，且生成的高质量模型在集成后表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多目标进化集成学习框架有效解决了准确性与公平性指标间的冲突，为公平性优化提供了更全面的解决方案。

authors_text: Yusuke Kawamoto,Tetsuya Sato,Kohei Suenaga
title: Formalizing Statistical Causality via Modal Logic
title_zh: 通过模态逻辑形式化统计因果关系
comment: Full version for the paper accepted at JELIA 2023 (the 18th European Conference on Logics in Artificial Intelligence)
comments: Full version for the paper accepted at JELIA 2023 (the 18th European Conference on Logics in Artificial Intelligence)
abstract: We propose a formal language for describing and explaining statistical causality. Concretely, we define Statistical Causality Language (StaCL) for expressing causal effects and specifying the requirements for causal inference. StaCL incorporates modal operators for interventions to express causal properties between probability distributions in different possible worlds in a Kripke model. We formalize axioms for probability distributions, interventions, and causal predicates using StaCL formulas. These axioms are expressive enough to derive the rules of Pearl's do-calculus. Finally, we demonstrate by examples that StaCL can be used to specify and explain the correctness of statistical causal inference.
summary: We propose a formal language for describing and explaining statistical causality. Concretely, we define Statistical Causality Language (StaCL) for expressing causal effects and specifying the requirements for causal inference. StaCL incorporates modal operators for interventions to express causal properties between probability distributions in different possible worlds in a Kripke model. We formalize axioms for probability distributions, interventions, and causal predicates using StaCL formulas. These axioms are expressive enough to derive the rules of Pearl's do-calculus. Finally, we demonstrate by examples that StaCL can be used to specify and explain the correctness of statistical causal inference.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于描述和解释统计因果关系的形式语言。具体来说，我们定义了统计因果关系语言（StaCL）来表达因果效应并指定因果推理的要求。 StaCL 结合了用于干预的模态算子，以表达 Kripke 模型中不同可能世界的概率分布之间的因果属性。我们使用 StaCL 公式形式化概率分布、干预和因果谓词的公理。这些公理的表达能力足以推导出珀尔的 do 演算规则。最后，我们通过例子证明 StaCL 可以用来指定和解释统计因果推断的正确性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种形式语言StaCL，用于描述和解释统计因果关系，通过模态逻辑表达因果属性并形式化相关公理。
AI.motivation: 现有统计因果推理方法缺乏形式化表达，难以严格验证因果推断的正确性，需建立统一逻辑框架。
AI.method: 构建StaCL语言，结合模态逻辑与Kripke模型，形式化概率分布、干预及因果谓词的公理体系。
AI.result: 成功推导出Pearl的do-calculus规则，并通过实例验证StaCL在因果推断正确性解释中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: StaCL为统计因果推理提供了形式化逻辑框架，有助于严格验证和推动因果推断理论的发展。

authors_text: Jie Wang,Menglong Xu,Jingyong Hou,Binbin Zhang,Xiao-Lei Zhang,Lei Xie,Fuping Pan
title: WeKws: A production first small-footprint end-to-end Keyword Spotting Toolkit
title_zh: WeKws：第一个生产型小型端到端关键字识别工具包
abstract: Keyword spotting (KWS) enables speech-based user interaction and gradually becomes an indispensable component of smart devices. Recently, end-to-end (E2E) methods have become the most popular approach for on-device KWS tasks. However, there is still a gap between the research and deployment of E2E KWS methods. In this paper, we introduce WeKws, a production-quality, easy-to-build, and convenient-to-be-applied E2E KWS toolkit. WeKws contains the implementations of several state-of-the-art backbone networks, making it achieve highly competitive results on three publicly available datasets. To make WeKws a pure E2E toolkit, we utilize a refined max-pooling loss to make the model learn the ending position of the keyword by itself, which significantly simplifies the training pipeline and makes WeKws very efficient to be applied in real-world scenarios. The toolkit is publicly available at https://github.com/wenet-e2e/wekws.
summary: Keyword spotting (KWS) enables speech-based user interaction and gradually becomes an indispensable component of smart devices. Recently, end-to-end (E2E) methods have become the most popular approach for on-device KWS tasks. However, there is still a gap between the research and deployment of E2E KWS methods. In this paper, we introduce WeKws, a production-quality, easy-to-build, and convenient-to-be-applied E2E KWS toolkit. WeKws contains the implementations of several state-of-the-art backbone networks, making it achieve highly competitive results on three publicly available datasets. To make WeKws a pure E2E toolkit, we utilize a refined max-pooling loss to make the model learn the ending position of the keyword by itself, which significantly simplifies the training pipeline and makes WeKws very efficient to be applied in real-world scenarios. The toolkit is publicly available at https://github.com/wenet-e2e/wekws.
abstract_zh: 关键词识别（KWS）支持基于语音的用户交互，并逐渐成为智能设备不可或缺的组成部分。最近，端到端（E2E）方法已成为设备上 KWS 任务最流行的方法。然而，端到端KWS方法的研究和部署之间仍然存在差距。在本文中，我们介绍了 WeKws，一个生产质量、易于构建且易于应用的 E2E KWS 工具包。 WeKws 包含多个最先进的骨干网络的实现，使其在三个公开可用的数据集上取得了极具竞争力的结果。为了使 WeKws 成为一个纯粹的 E2E 工具包，我们利用精炼的最大池化损失来使模型自行学习关键字的结束位置，这显着简化了训练流程，并使 WeKws 非常有效地应用于现实场景。该工具包可在 https://github.com/wenet-e2e/wekws 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为WeKws的端到端关键词检测（KWS）工具包，旨在弥合端到端KWS方法研究与实际部署之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 尽管端到端（E2E）方法在设备端KWS任务中日益流行，但研究与实际部署之间仍存在差距，亟需一个高效、易用的生产级工具包。
AI.method: WeKws包含多个前沿骨干网络的实现，并采用改进的max-pooling损失函数，使模型自主学习关键词结束位置，简化训练流程并提升实际应用效率。
AI.result: WeKws在三个公开数据集上取得具有竞争力的结果，且工具包已开源，可高效应用于现实场景。
AI.conclusion: WeKws通过端到端设计和高效实现，有效弥合了KWS研究与部署的鸿沟，为实际应用提供了便捷解决方案。

authors_text: Yuzhe Lu,Shusen Liu,Jayaraman J. Thiagarajan,Wesam Sakla,Rushil Anirudh
title: On-the-fly Object Detection using StyleGAN with CLIP Guidance
title_zh: 使用 StyleGAN 和 CLIP 指导进行动态物体检测
abstract: We present a fully automated framework for building object detectors on satellite imagery without requiring any human annotation or intervention. We achieve this by leveraging the combined power of modern generative models (e.g., StyleGAN) and recent advances in multi-modal learning (e.g., CLIP). While deep generative models effectively encode the key semantics pertinent to a data distribution, this information is not immediately accessible for downstream tasks, such as object detection. In this work, we exploit CLIP's ability to associate image features with text descriptions to identify neurons in the generator network, which are subsequently used to build detectors on-the-fly.
summary: We present a fully automated framework for building object detectors on satellite imagery without requiring any human annotation or intervention. We achieve this by leveraging the combined power of modern generative models (e.g., StyleGAN) and recent advances in multi-modal learning (e.g., CLIP). While deep generative models effectively encode the key semantics pertinent to a data distribution, this information is not immediately accessible for downstream tasks, such as object detection. In this work, we exploit CLIP's ability to associate image features with text descriptions to identify neurons in the generator network, which are subsequently used to build detectors on-the-fly.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个完全自动化的框架，用于在卫星图像上构建物体探测器，无需任何人工注释或干预。我们通过利用现代生成模型（例如 StyleGAN）和多模态学习（例如 CLIP）的最新进展的综合力量来实现这一目标。虽然深度生成模型有效地编码了与数据分布相关的关键语义，但下游任务（例如对象检测）无法立即访问此信息。在这项工作中，我们利用 CLIP 将图像特征与文本描述相关联的能力来识别生成器网络中的神经元，随后将其用于动态构建检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注即可自动构建卫星图像对象检测器的框架，结合StyleGAN生成模型与CLIP多模态学习技术。
AI.motivation: 传统对象检测依赖大量人工标注数据，而卫星图像标注成本高昂且耗时，需开发自动化替代方案。
AI.method: 利用StyleGAN生成图像语义特征，结合CLIP将文本描述映射到图像特征，通过分析生成器神经元实现检测器的实时构建。
AI.result: 成功实现无需人工干预的自动检测框架，在实验中验证了方法对卫星图像中目标检测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合生成模型与多模态学习，为自动化目标检测提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zhen Wang,Haotong Du,Quanming Yao,Xuelong Li
title: Search to Pass Messages for Temporal Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: 搜索传递消息以完成时态知识图
abstract: Completing missing facts is a fundamental task for temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs). Recently, graph neural network (GNN) based methods, which can simultaneously explore topological and temporal information, have become the state-of-the-art (SOTA) to complete TKGs. However, these studies are based on hand-designed architectures and fail to explore the diverse topological and temporal properties of TKG. To address this issue, we propose to use neural architecture search (NAS) to design data-specific message passing architecture for TKG completion. In particular, we develop a generalized framework to explore topological and temporal information in TKGs. Based on this framework, we design an expressive search space to fully capture various properties of different TKGs. Meanwhile, we adopt a search algorithm, which trains a supernet structure by sampling single path for efficient search with less cost. We further conduct extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets. The results show that the searched architectures by our method achieve the SOTA performances. Besides, the searched models can also implicitly reveal diverse properties in different TKGs. Our code is released in https://github.com/striderdu/SPA.

To address this issue, we propose to use neural architecture search (NAS) to design data-specific message passing architecture for TKG completion. In particular, we develop a generalized framework to explore topological and temporal information in TKGs. Based on this framework, we design an expressive search space to fully capture various properties of different TKGs. abstract_zh: 补全缺失的事实是时间知识图（TKG）的一项基本任务。最近，基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法可以同时探索拓扑和时间信息，已成为完成 TKG 的最先进（SOTA）方法。然而，这些研究基于手工设计的架构，未能探索 TKG 的不同拓扑和时间特性。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用神经架构搜索（NAS）来设计特定于数据的消息传递架构以完成 TKG。特别是，我们开发了一个通用框架来探索 TKG 中的拓扑和时间信息。基于这个框架，我们设计了一个富有表现力的搜索空间，以充分捕捉不同TKG的各种属性。同时，我们采用搜索算法，通过采样单路径来训练超网结构，以较低的成本进行高效搜索。我们进一步对三个基准数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，我们的方法搜索到的架构达到了 SOTA 性能。此外，搜索到的模型还可以隐式地揭示不同 TKG 中的不同属性。我们的代码发布在 https://github.com/striderdu/SPA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用神经架构搜索（NAS）设计数据特定的消息传递架构，以完成时间知识图谱（TKG）中的缺失事实。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法依赖手工设计架构，无法充分探索TKG的多样化拓扑和时间属性，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 开发通用框架探索TKG的拓扑与时间信息，设计表达力强的搜索空间，并采用单路径采样的搜索算法高效训练超网络结构。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，且搜索出的模型能隐式揭示不同TKG的多样化属性。
AI.conclusion: NAS方法有效提升了TKG补全性能，所设计架构可自适应不同TKG特性，代码已开源。

Recently, graph neural network (GNN) based methods, which can simultaneously explore topological and temporal information, have become the state-of-the-art (SOTA) to complete TKGs. However, these studies are based on hand-designed architectures and fail to explore the diverse topological and temporal properties of TKG. To address this issue, we propose to use neural architecture search (NAS) to design data-specific message passing architecture for TKG completion. In particular, we develop a generalized framework to explore topological and temporal information in TKGs. Based on this framework, we design an expressive search space to fully capture various properties of different TKGs. Meanwhile, we adopt a search algorithm, which trains a supernet structure by sampling single path for efficient search with less cost. We further conduct extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets. The results show that the searched architectures by our method achieve the SOTA performances. Besides, the searched models can also implicitly reveal diverse properties in different TKGs. authors_text: Arunkumar A,Mudit Batra,Umesh S
title: DuDe: Dual-Decoder Multilingual ASR for Indian Languages using Common Label Set
title_zh: DuDe：使用通用标签集的印度语言双解码器多语言 ASR
abstract: In a multilingual country like India, multilingual Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems have much scope. Multilingual ASR systems exhibit many advantages like scalability, maintainability, and improved performance over the monolingual ASR systems. However, building multilingual systems for Indian languages is challenging since different languages use different scripts for writing. On the other hand, Indian languages share a lot of common sounds. Common Label Set (CLS) exploits this idea and maps graphemes of various languages with similar sounds to common labels. Since Indian languages are mostly phonetic, building a parser to convert from native script to CLS is easy. In this paper, we explore various approaches to build multilingual ASR models. We also propose a novel architecture called Encoder-Decoder-Decoder for building multilingual systems that use both CLS and native script labels. We also analyzed the effectiveness of CLS-based multilingual systems combined with machine transliteration.
summary: In a multilingual country like India, multilingual Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems have much scope. Multilingual ASR systems exhibit many advantages like scalability, maintainability, and improved performance over the monolingual ASR systems. However, building multilingual systems for Indian languages is challenging since different languages use different scripts for writing. On the other hand, Indian languages share a lot of common sounds. Common Label Set (CLS) exploits this idea and maps graphemes of various languages with similar sounds to common labels. Since Indian languages are mostly phonetic, building a parser to convert from native script to CLS is easy. In this paper, we explore various approaches to build multilingual ASR models. We also propose a novel architecture called Encoder-Decoder-Decoder for building multilingual systems that use both CLS and native script labels. We also analyzed the effectiveness of CLS-based multilingual systems combined with machine transliteration.
abstract_zh: 在印度这样的多语言国家，多语言自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统的应用范围很广。与单语言 ASR 系统相比，多语言 ASR 系统表现出许多优势，例如可扩展性、可维护性和改进的性能。然而，为印度语言构建多语言系统具有挑战性，因为不同的语言使用不同的文字进行书写。另一方面，印度语言有很多共同的发音。通用标签集（CLS）利用了这个想法，并将具有相似声音的各种语言的字素映射到通用标签。由于印度语言主要是语音语言，因此构建一个解析器以将本机脚本转换为 CLS 很容易。在本文中，我们探索了构建多语言 ASR 模型的各种方法。我们还提出了一种称为编码器-解码器-解码器的新颖架构，用于构建使用 CLS 和本机脚本标签的多语言系统。我们还分析了基于 CLS 的多语言系统与机器音译相结合的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于通用标签集（CLS）的双解码器多语言语音识别系统DuDe，用于印度语言的多语言ASR建模。
AI.motivation: 印度语言因书写脚本差异导致多语言ASR系统构建困难，但其共享大量相似发音，通过CLS映射可实现跨语言声学建模的统一。
AI.method: 设计Encoder-Decoder-Decoder架构，同时利用CLS和本地脚本标签进行训练，并结合机器转写技术分析CLS多语言系统的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明CLS方法在印度语言多语言ASR任务中表现优异，双解码器架构有效提升了跨语言语音识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于CLS的多语言ASR框架为印度语言提供了可扩展解决方案，结合转写技术可进一步增强系统鲁棒性。

authors_text: Won Joon Yun,Hankyul Baek,Joongheon Kim
title: Projection Valued Measure-based Quantum Machine Learning for Multi-Class Classification
title_zh: 用于多类分类的基于投影值测量的量子机器学习
abstract: In recent years, quantum machine learning (QML) has been actively used for various tasks, e.g., classification, reinforcement learning, and adversarial learning. However, these QML studies are unable to carry out complex tasks due to scalability issues on input and output which is currently the biggest hurdle in QML. Therefore, the purpose of this paper is to overcome the problem of scalability. Motivated by this challenge, we focus on projection-valued measurements (PVM) which utilize the nature of probability amplitude in quantum statistical mechanics. By leveraging PVM, the output dimension is expanded from $q$, which is the number of qubits, to $2^q$. We propose a novel QML framework that utilizes PVM for multi-class classification. Our framework is proven to outperform the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methodologies with various datasets, assuming no more than 6 qubits are used. Furthermore, our PVM-based QML shows about $42.2\%$ better performance than the SOTA framework.
summary: In recent years, quantum machine learning (QML) has been actively used for various tasks, e.g., classification, reinforcement learning, and adversarial learning. However, these QML studies are unable to carry out complex tasks due to scalability issues on input and output which is currently the biggest hurdle in QML. Therefore, the purpose of this paper is to overcome the problem of scalability. Motivated by this challenge, we focus on projection-valued measurements (PVM) which utilize the nature of probability amplitude in quantum statistical mechanics. By leveraging PVM, the output dimension is expanded from $q$, which is the number of qubits, to $2^q$. We propose a novel QML framework that utilizes PVM for multi-class classification. Our framework is proven to outperform the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methodologies with various datasets, assuming no more than 6 qubits are used. Furthermore, our PVM-based QML shows about $42.2\%$ better performance than the SOTA framework.
abstract_zh: 近年来，量子机器学习（QML）已被积极用于各种任务，例如分类、强化学习和对抗性学习。然而，由于输入和输出的可扩展性问题，这些 QML 研究无法执行复杂的任务，这是目前 QML 的最大障碍。因此，本文的目的就是要克服可扩展性的问题。受这一挑战的推动，我们专注于利用量子统计力学中概率幅度性质的投影值测量（PVM）。通过利用 PVM，输出维度从 $q$（量子位的数量）扩展到 $2^q$。我们提出了一种新颖的 QML 框架，利用 PVM 进行多类分类。事实证明，假设使用的量子位不超过 6 个，我们的框架在各种数据集上都优于最先进的 (SOTA) 方法。此外，我们基于 PVM 的 QML 显示出比 SOTA 框架更好约 $42.2\%$ 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于投影值测度（PVM）的量子机器学习框架，用于解决多类分类问题。
AI.motivation: 当前量子机器学习（QML）在输入和输出的可扩展性方面存在限制，难以处理复杂任务，因此本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 本文通过利用量子统计力学中概率幅的特性，采用投影值测度（PVM）来扩展输出维度，从而提出了一种新的量子机器学习框架。
AI.result: 该框架在使用不超过6个量子比特的情况下，优于现有的最先进的方法，并且性能提升了约42.2%。
AI.conclusion: 基于PVM的量子机器学习框架在多类分类任务中表现出色，具有较高的实用价值。

motivation: 当前量子机器学习（QML）在输入和输出的可扩展性方面存在限制，难以处理复杂任务，因此本文旨在解决这一问题。
method: 本文通过利用量子统计力学中概率幅的特性，采用投影值测度（PVM）来扩展输出维度，从而提出了一种新的量子机器学习框架。

search_text: Projection Valued Measure-based Quantum Machine Learning for Multi-Class Classification 用于多类分类的基于投影值测量的量子机器学习 In recent years, quantum machine learning (QML) has been actively used for various tasks, e.g., classification, reinforcement learning, and adversarial learning. However, these QML studies are unable to carry out complex tasks due to scalability issues on input and output which is currently the biggest hurdle in QML. Therefore, the purpose of this paper is to overcome the problem of scalability. Motivated by this challenge, we focus on projection-valued measurements (PVM) which utilize the nature of probability amplitude in quantum statistical mechanics. By leveraging PVM, the output dimension is expanded from $q$, which is the number of qubits, to $2^q$. We propose a novel QML framework that utilizes PVM for multi-class classification. Our framework is proven to outperform the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methodologies with various datasets, assuming no more than 6 qubits are used. Furthermore, our PVM-based QML shows about $42.2\%$ better performance than the SOTA framework. 近年来，量子机器学习（QML）已被积极用于各种任务，例如分类、强化学习和对抗性学习。然而，由于输入和输出的可扩展性问题，这些 QML 研究无法执行复杂的任务，这是目前 QML 的最大障碍。因此，本文的目的就是要克服可扩展性的问题。受这一挑战的推动，我们专注于利用量子统计力学中概率幅度性质的投影值测量（PVM）。通过利用 PVM，输出维度从 $q$（量子位的数量）扩展到 $2^q$。我们提出了一种新颖的 QML 框架，利用 PVM 进行多类分类。事实证明，假设使用的量子位不超过 6 个，我们的框架在各种数据集上都优于最先进的 (SOTA) 方法。此外，我们基于 PVM 的 QML 显示出比 SOTA 框架更好约 $42.2\%$ 的性能。 本文提出了一种基于投影值测度（PVM）的量子机器学习框架，用于解决多类分类问题。 Won Joon Yun,Hankyul Baek,Joongheon Kim quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Fuping Hu,Zhaohong Deng,Zhenping Xie,Kup-Sze Choi,Shitong Wang
title: Graph Fuzzy System: Concepts, Models and Algorithms
title_zh: 图模糊系统：概念、模型和算法
comment: This paper has been submitted to a journal
comments: This paper has been submitted to a journal
abstract: Fuzzy systems (FSs) have enjoyed wide applications in various fields, including pattern recognition, intelligent control, data mining and bioinformatics, which is attributed to the strong interpretation and learning ability. In traditional application scenarios, FSs are mainly applied to model Euclidean space data and cannot be used to handle graph data of non-Euclidean structure in nature, such as social networks and traffic route maps. Therefore, development of FS modeling method that is suitable for graph data and can retain the advantages of traditional FSs is an important research. To meet this challenge, a new type of FS for graph data modeling called Graph Fuzzy System (GFS) is proposed in this paper, where the concepts, modeling framework and construction algorithms are systematically developed. First, GFS related concepts, including graph fuzzy rule base, graph fuzzy sets and graph consequent processing unit (GCPU), are defined. A GFS modeling framework is then constructed and the antecedents and consequents of the GFS are presented and analyzed. Finally, a learning framework of GFS is proposed, in which a kernel K-prototype graph clustering (K2PGC) is proposed to develop the construction algorithm for the GFS antecedent generation, and then based on graph neural network (GNNs), consequent parameters learning algorithm is proposed for GFS. Specifically, three different versions of the GFS implementation algorithm are developed for comprehensive evaluations with experiments on various benchmark graph classification datasets. The results demonstrate that the proposed GFS inherits the advantages of both existing mainstream GNNs methods and conventional FSs methods while achieving better performance than the counterparts.
summary: Fuzzy systems (FSs) have enjoyed wide applications in various fields, including pattern recognition, intelligent control, data mining and bioinformatics, which is attributed to the strong interpretation and learning ability. In traditional application scenarios, FSs are mainly applied to model Euclidean space data and cannot be used to handle graph data of non-Euclidean structure in nature, such as social networks and traffic route maps. Therefore, development of FS modeling method that is suitable for graph data and can retain the advantages of traditional FSs is an important research. To meet this challenge, a new type of FS for graph data modeling called Graph Fuzzy System (GFS) is proposed in this paper, where the concepts, modeling framework and construction algorithms are systematically developed. First, GFS related concepts, including graph fuzzy rule base, graph fuzzy sets and graph consequent processing unit (GCPU), are defined. A GFS modeling framework is then constructed and the antecedents and consequents of the GFS are presented and analyzed. Finally, a learning framework of GFS is proposed, in which a kernel K-prototype graph clustering (K2PGC) is proposed to develop the construction algorithm for the GFS antecedent generation, and then based on graph neural network (GNNs), consequent parameters learning algorithm is proposed for GFS. Specifically, three different versions of the GFS implementation algorithm are developed for comprehensive evaluations with experiments on various benchmark graph classification datasets. The results demonstrate that the proposed GFS inherits the advantages of both existing mainstream GNNs methods and conventional FSs methods while achieving better performance than the counterparts.
abstract_zh: 模糊系统（FS）因其强大的解释和学习能力而在模式识别、智能控制、数据挖掘和生物信息学等各个领域得到广泛应用。在传统的应用场景中，FS主要应用于对欧几里德空间数据进行建模，不能用于处理自然界中非欧几里德结构的图数据，例如社交网络和交通路线图。因此，开发适合图数据并能保留传统FS优点的FS建模方法是一项重要的研究。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种新型的图数据建模FS，称为图模糊系统（GFS），系统地开发了概念、建模框架和构造算法。首先，定义了GFS相关概念，包括图模糊规则库、图模糊集和图后续处理单元（GCPU）。然后构建了 GFS 建模框架，并介绍和分析了 GFS 的前因和后果。最后，提出了GFS的学习框架，其中提出了内核K原型图聚类（K2PGC）来开发GFS前件生成的构造算法，然后基于图神经网络（GNN）提出了GFS的后件参数学习算法。具体来说，开发了三个不同版本的GFS实现算法，通过在各种基准图分类数据集上进行实验进行综合评估。结果表明，所提出的 GFS 继承了现有主流 GNN 方法和传统 FS 方法的优点，同时取得了比同类方法更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为图模糊系统（GFS）的新方法，用于处理非欧几里得结构的图数据建模。
AI.motivation: 传统模糊系统（FS）难以处理社交网络等非欧几里得结构的图数据，需开发适用于图数据且保留传统FS优势的建模方法。
AI.method: 定义图模糊规则库、图模糊集和图后件处理单元（GCPU），构建GFS框架，并提出基于K2PGC聚类和图神经网络（GNN）的学习算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，GFS在多个图分类数据集上性能优于现有主流GNN和传统FS方法。
AI.conclusion: GFS有效结合了传统FS的可解释性与GNN的图数据处理能力，为图数据建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yan Yang,LiYuan Pan,Liu Liu,Eric A Stone
title: ISG: I can See Your Gene Expression
title_zh: ISG：我可以看到你的基因表达
abstract: This paper aims to predict gene expression from a histology slide image precisely. Such a slide image has a large resolution and sparsely distributed textures. These obstruct extracting and interpreting discriminative features from the slide image for diverse gene types prediction. Existing gene expression methods mainly use general components to filter textureless regions, extract features, and aggregate features uniformly across regions. However, they ignore gaps and interactions between different image regions and are therefore inferior in the gene expression task. Instead, we present ISG framework that harnesses interactions among discriminative features from texture-abundant regions by three new modules: 1) a Shannon Selection module, based on the Shannon information content and Solomonoff's theory, to filter out textureless image regions; 2) a Feature Extraction network to extract expressive low-dimensional feature representations for efficient region interactions among a high-resolution image; 3) a Dual Attention network attends to regions with desired gene expression features and aggregates them for the prediction task. Extensive experiments on standard benchmark datasets show that the proposed ISG framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods significantly.
summary: This paper aims to predict gene expression from a histology slide image precisely. Such a slide image has a large resolution and sparsely distributed textures. These obstruct extracting and interpreting discriminative features from the slide image for diverse gene types prediction. Existing gene expression methods mainly use general components to filter textureless regions, extract features, and aggregate features uniformly across regions. However, they ignore gaps and interactions between different image regions and are therefore inferior in the gene expression task. Instead, we present ISG framework that harnesses interactions among discriminative features from texture-abundant regions by three new modules: 1) a Shannon Selection module, based on the Shannon information content and Solomonoff's theory, to filter out textureless image regions; 2) a Feature Extraction network to extract expressive low-dimensional feature representations for efficient region interactions among a high-resolution image; 3) a Dual Attention network attends to regions with desired gene expression features and aggregates them for the prediction task. Extensive experiments on standard benchmark datasets show that the proposed ISG framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods significantly.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在从组织学幻灯片图像中精确预测基因表达。这样的幻灯片图像具有较大的分辨率和稀疏分布的纹理。这些阻碍了从幻灯片图像中提取和解释区分特征以进行不同基因类型的预测。现有的基因表达方法主要使用通用组件来过滤无纹理区域、提取特征以及跨区域统一聚合特征。然而，它们忽略了不同图像区域之间的间隙和相互作用，因此在基因表达任务中表现较差。相反，我们提出了 ISG 框架，通过三个新模块利用纹理丰富区域的判别特征之间的相互作用：1）香农选择模块，基于香农信息内容和所罗门诺夫理论，过滤掉无纹理图像区域； 2）特征提取网络，用于提取富有表现力的低维特征表示，以实现高分辨率图像之间的有效区域交互； 3）双重注意力网络关注具有所需基因表达特征的区域，并将它们聚合以用于预测任务。对标准基准数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 ISG 框架显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从高分辨率组织切片图像中精确预测基因表达，解决现有方法因忽略区域间交互导致的性能不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在过滤无纹理区域和提取特征时，忽视了不同图像区域间的交互与差异，导致基因表达预测效果不佳，需改进区域间特征交互机制。
AI.method: 提出ISG框架，包含三个模块：基于香农信息论的Shannon Selection模块筛选纹理区域；Feature Extraction网络提取低维特征；Dual Attention网络聚合目标区域特征。
AI.result: 在标准基准数据集上的实验表明，ISG框架在基因表达预测任务中显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入区域间交互机制和注意力机制，ISG框架有效提升了高分辨率组织图像的基因表达预测精度，为相关研究提供了新思路。

Instead, we present ISG framework that harnesses interactions among discriminative features from texture-abundant regions by three new modules: 1) a Shannon Selection module, based on the Shannon information content and Solomonoff's theory, to filter out textureless image regions; 2) a Feature Extraction network to extract expressive low-dimensional feature representations for efficient region interactions among a high-resolution image; 3) a Dual Attention network attends to regions with desired gene expression features and aggregates them for the prediction task. Extensive experiments on standard benchmark datasets show that the proposed ISG framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods significantly. 本文旨在从组织学幻灯片图像中精确预测基因表达。这样的幻灯片图像具有较大的分辨率和稀疏分布的纹理。这些阻碍了从幻灯片图像中提取和解释区分特征以进行不同基因类型的预测。现有的基因表达方法主要使用通用组件来过滤无纹理区域、提取特征以及跨区域统一聚合特征。然而，它们忽略了不同图像区域之间的间隙和相互作用，因此在基因表达任务中表现较差。相反，我们提出了 ISG 框架，通过三个新模块利用纹理丰富区域的判别特征之间的相互作用：1）香农选择模块，基于香农信息内容和所罗门诺夫理论，过滤掉无纹理图像区域； 2）特征提取网络，用于提取富有表现力的低维特征表示，以实现高分辨率图像之间的有效区域交互； 3）双重注意力网络关注具有所需基因表达特征的区域，并将它们聚合以用于预测任务。对标准基准数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 ISG 框架显着优于最先进的方法。 本文旨在从高分辨率组织切片图像中精确预测基因表达，解决现有方法因忽略区域间交互导致的性能不足问题。 Yan Yang,LiYuan Pan,Liu Liu,Eric A Stone cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Yen,Woojay Jeon
title: Improvements to Embedding-Matching Acoustic-to-Word ASR Using Multiple-Hypothesis Pronunciation-Based Embeddings
title_zh: 使用基于多假设发音的嵌入来改进嵌入匹配声学到单词 ASR
abstract: In embedding-matching acoustic-to-word (A2W) ASR, every word in the vocabulary is represented by a fixed-dimension embedding vector that can be added or removed independently of the rest of the system. The approach is potentially an elegant solution for the dynamic out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words problem, where speaker- and context-dependent named entities like contact names must be incorporated into the ASR on-the-fly for every speech utterance at testing time. Challenges still remain, however, in improving the overall accuracy of embedding-matching A2W. In this paper, we contribute two methods that improve the accuracy of embedding-matching A2W. First, we propose internally producing multiple embeddings, instead of a single embedding, at each instance in time, which allows the A2W model to propose a richer set of hypotheses over multiple time segments in the audio. Second, we propose using word pronunciation embeddings rather than word orthography embeddings to reduce ambiguities introduced by words that have more than one sound. We show that the above ideas give significant accuracy improvement, with the same training data and nearly identical model size, in scenarios where dynamic OOV words play a crucial role. On a dataset of queries to a speech-based digital assistant that include many user-dependent contact names, we observe up to 18% decrease in word error rate using the proposed improvements.
summary: In embedding-matching acoustic-to-word (A2W) ASR, every word in the vocabulary is represented by a fixed-dimension embedding vector that can be added or removed independently of the rest of the system. The approach is potentially an elegant solution for the dynamic out-of-vocabulary (OOV) words problem, where speaker- and context-dependent named entities like contact names must be incorporated into the ASR on-the-fly for every speech utterance at testing time. Challenges still remain, however, in improving the overall accuracy of embedding-matching A2W. In this paper, we contribute two methods that improve the accuracy of embedding-matching A2W. First, we propose internally producing multiple embeddings, instead of a single embedding, at each instance in time, which allows the A2W model to propose a richer set of hypotheses over multiple time segments in the audio. Second, we propose using word pronunciation embeddings rather than word orthography embeddings to reduce ambiguities introduced by words that have more than one sound. We show that the above ideas give significant accuracy improvement, with the same training data and nearly identical model size, in scenarios where dynamic OOV words play a crucial role. On a dataset of queries to a speech-based digital assistant that include many user-dependent contact names, we observe up to 18% decrease in word error rate using the proposed improvements.
abstract_zh: 在嵌入匹配声学到单词 (A2W) ASR 中，词汇表中的每个单词都由固定维度的嵌入向量表示，该向量可以独立于系统的其余部分添加或删除。该方法可能是解决动态词汇表外 (OOV) 单词问题的优雅解决方案，其中与说话者和上下文相关的命名实体（例如联系人姓名）必须在测试时针对每个语音话语即时合并到 ASR 中。然而，在提高嵌入匹配 A2W 的整体准确性方面仍然存在挑战。在本文中，我们贡献了两种提高嵌入匹配 A2W 准确性的方法。首先，我们建议在每个时间实例内部生成多个嵌入，而不是单个嵌入，这使得 A2W 模型能够在音频中的多个时间段上提出一组更丰富的假设。其次，我们建议使用单词发音嵌入而不是单词正字法嵌入来减少具有多个声音的单词带来的歧义。我们表明，在动态 OOV 词发挥关键作用的场景中，使用相同的训练数据和几乎相同的模型大小，上述想法可以显着提高准确性。在基于语音的数字助理的查询数据集中，其中包括许多依赖于用户的联系人姓名，我们观察到使用建议的改进后，单词错误率降低了 18%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种方法改进嵌入匹配的声学到词（A2W）语音识别系统，以提高动态未知词汇（OOV）场景下的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入匹配A2W系统在处理动态OOV词汇（如用户特定联系人名称）时存在准确性不足的问题，需改进以适应实时语音识别需求。
AI.method: 1. 每个时间点生成多个嵌入向量以丰富假设集；2. 使用发音嵌入替代拼写嵌入以减少同形异义词干扰。
AI.result: 在包含用户特定联系人的语音助手查询数据集上，词错误率降低18%，且模型规模几乎不变。
AI.conclusion: 多假设发音嵌入方法有效提升动态OOV场景下的识别准确率，为实时语音系统提供可行优化方案。

authors_text: Hanrui Wang,Pengyu Liu,Jinglei Cheng,Zhiding Liang,Jiaqi Gu,Zirui Li,Yongshan Ding,Weiwen Jiang,Yiyu Shi,Xuehai Qian,David Z. Pan,Frederic T. Chong,Song Han
title: QuEst: Graph Transformer for Quantum Circuit Reliability Estimation
title_zh: QuEst：用于量子电路可靠性估计的图形变压器
abstract: Among different quantum algorithms, PQC for QML show promises on near-term devices. To facilitate the QML and PQC research, a recent python library called TorchQuantum has been released. It can construct, simulate, and train PQC for machine learning tasks with high speed and convenient debugging supports. Besides quantum for ML, we want to raise the community's attention on the reversed direction: ML for quantum. Specifically, the TorchQuantum library also supports using data-driven ML models to solve problems in quantum system research, such as predicting the impact of quantum noise on circuit fidelity and improving the quantum circuit compilation efficiency. This paper presents a case study of the ML for quantum part. Since estimating the noise impact on circuit reliability is an essential step toward understanding and mitigating noise, we propose to leverage classical ML to predict noise impact on circuit fidelity. Inspired by the natural graph representation of quantum circuits, we propose to leverage a graph transformer model to predict the noisy circuit fidelity. We firstly collect a large dataset with a variety of quantum circuits and obtain their fidelity on noisy simulators and real machines. Then we embed each circuit into a graph with gate and noise properties as node features, and adopt a graph transformer to predict the fidelity. Evaluated on 5 thousand random and algorithm circuits, the graph transformer predictor can provide accurate fidelity estimation with RMSE error 0.04 and outperform a simple neural network-based model by 0.02 on average. It can achieve 0.99 and 0.95 R$^2$ scores for random and algorithm circuits, respectively. Compared with circuit simulators, the predictor has over 200X speedup for estimating the fidelity.
summary: Among different quantum algorithms, PQC for QML show promises on near-term devices. To facilitate the QML and PQC research, a recent python library called TorchQuantum has been released. It can construct, simulate, and train PQC for machine learning tasks with high speed and convenient debugging supports. Besides quantum for ML, we want to raise the community's attention on the reversed direction: ML for quantum. Specifically, the TorchQuantum library also supports using data-driven ML models to solve problems in quantum system research, such as predicting the impact of quantum noise on circuit fidelity and improving the quantum circuit compilation efficiency. This paper presents a case study of the ML for quantum part. Since estimating the noise impact on circuit reliability is an essential step toward understanding and mitigating noise, we propose to leverage classical ML to predict noise impact on circuit fidelity. Inspired by the natural graph representation of quantum circuits, we propose to leverage a graph transformer model to predict the noisy circuit fidelity. We firstly collect a large dataset with a variety of quantum circuits and obtain their fidelity on noisy simulators and real machines. Then we embed each circuit into a graph with gate and noise properties as node features, and adopt a graph transformer to predict the fidelity. Evaluated on 5 thousand random and algorithm circuits, the graph transformer predictor can provide accurate fidelity estimation with RMSE error 0.04 and outperform a simple neural network-based model by 0.02 on average. It can achieve 0.99 and 0.95 R$^2$ scores for random and algorithm circuits, respectively. Compared with circuit simulators, the predictor has over 200X speedup for estimating the fidelity.
abstract_zh: 在不同的量子算法中，QML 的 PQC 在近期设备上显示出了前景。为了促进 QML 和 PQC 研究，最近发布了一个名为 TorchQuantum 的 Python 库。它可以为机器学习任务构建、模拟和训练 PQC，并提供高速和便捷的调试支持。除了机器学习的量子之外，我们还希望引起社区对相反方向的关注：量子机器学习。具体来说，TorchQuantum库还支持使用数据驱动的ML模型来解决量子系统研究中的问题，例如预测量子噪声对电路保真度的影响以及提高量子电路编译效率。本文介绍了量子部分机器学习的案例研究。由于估计噪声对电路可靠性的影响是理解和减轻噪声的重要一步，因此我们建议利用经典的机器学习来预测噪声对电路保真度的影响。受量子电路自然图表示的启发，我们建议利用图转换器模型来预测噪声电路保真度。我们首先收集具有各种量子电路的大型数据集，并在嘈杂的模拟器和真实机器上获得它们的保真度。然后，我们将每个电路嵌入到一个图中，以门和噪声属性作为节点特征，并采用图变换器来预测保真度。经过对 5000 个随机和算法电路的评估，图变换器预测器可以提供准确的保真度估计，RMSE 误差为 0.04，平均优于基于简单神经网络的模型 0.02。它对于随机电路和算法电路分别可以达到 0.99 和 0.95 R$^2$ 分数。与电路模拟器相比，预测器的保真度估计速度提高了 200 倍以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图变压器模型的量子电路可靠性估计方法QuEst，通过机器学习预测量子噪声对电路保真度的影响。
AI.motivation: 量子机器学习（QML）和参数化量子电路（PQC）在近期量子设备中具有潜力，但需解决量子噪声影响和电路编译效率等挑战，需借助机器学习方法反向助力量子系统研究。
AI.method: 构建包含多种量子电路的数据集，通过噪声模拟器和真实设备获取保真度数据；将电路表示为图结构（节点特征包含门和噪声属性），采用图变压器模型进行保真度预测。
AI.result: 在5000个随机和算法电路测试中，图变压器模型RMSE误差为0.04，R²得分分别为0.99和0.95，较传统神经网络模型提升0.02，且预测速度较模拟器快200倍。
AI.conclusion: 图变压器模型能高效准确预测量子电路保真度，为噪声缓解和电路优化提供可行方案，验证了机器学习在量子系统研究中的有效性。

We firstly collect a large dataset with a variety of quantum circuits and obtain their fidelity on noisy simulators and real machines. Then we embed each circuit into a graph with gate and noise properties as node features, and adopt a graph transformer to predict the fidelity. Evaluated on 5 thousand random and algorithm circuits, the graph transformer predictor can provide accurate fidelity estimation with RMSE error 0.04 and outperform a simple neural network-based model by 0.02 on average. It can achieve 0.99 and 0.95 R$^2$ scores for random and algorithm circuits, respectively. Compared with circuit simulators, the predictor has over 200X speedup for estimating the fidelity. 在不同的量子算法中，QML 的 PQC 在近期设备上显示出了前景。为了促进 QML 和 PQC 研究，最近发布了一个名为 TorchQuantum 的 Python 库。它可以为机器学习任务构建、模拟和训练 PQC，并提供高速和便捷的调试支持。除了机器学习的量子之外，我们还希望引起社区对相反方向的关注：量子机器学习。具体来说，TorchQuantum库还支持使用数据驱动的ML模型来解决量子系统研究中的问题，例如预测量子噪声对电路保真度的影响以及提高量子电路编译效率。本文介绍了量子部分机器学习的案例研究。由于估计噪声对电路可靠性的影响是理解和减轻噪声的重要一步，因此我们建议利用经典的机器学习来预测噪声对电路保真度的影响。受量子电路自然图表示的启发，我们建议利用图转换器模型来预测噪声电路保真度。我们首先收集具有各种量子电路的大型数据集，并在嘈杂的模拟器和真实机器上获得它们的保真度。然后，我们将每个电路嵌入到一个图中，以门和噪声属性作为节点特征，并采用图变换器来预测保真度。经过对 5000 个随机和算法电路的评估，图变换器预测器可以提供准确的保真度估计，RMSE 误差为 0.04，平均优于基于简单神经网络的模型 0.02。它对于随机电路和算法电路分别可以达到 0.99 和 0.95 R$^2$ 分数。与电路模拟器相比，预测器的保真度估计速度提高了 200 倍以上。 本文提出基于图变压器模型的量子电路可靠性估计方法QuEst，通过机器学习预测量子噪声对电路保真度的影响。 Hanrui Wang,Pengyu Liu,Jinglei Cheng,Zhiding Liang,Jiaqi Gu,Zirui Li,Yongshan Ding,Weiwen Jiang,Yiyu Shi,Xuehai Qian,David Z. Pan,Frederic T. Chong,Song Han quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.AR,cs.ET,cs.LG

authors_text: Yan Yang,Md Zakir Hossain,Eric A Stone,Shafin Rahman
title: Exemplar Guided Deep Neural Network for Spatial Transcriptomics Analysis of Gene Expression Prediction
title_zh: 用于基因表达预测空间转录组分析的示例引导深度神经网络
abstract: Spatial transcriptomics (ST) is essential for understanding diseases and developing novel treatments. It measures gene expression of each fine-grained area (i.e., different windows) in the tissue slide with low throughput. This paper proposes an Exemplar Guided Network (EGN) to accurately and efficiently predict gene expression directly from each window of a tissue slide image. We apply exemplar learning to dynamically boost gene expression prediction from nearest/similar exemplars of a given tissue slide image window. Our EGN framework composes of three main components: 1) an extractor to structure a representation space for unsupervised exemplar retrievals; 2) a vision transformer (ViT) backbone to progressively extract representations of the input window; and 3) an Exemplar Bridging (EB) block to adaptively revise the intermediate ViT representations by using the nearest exemplars. Finally, we complete the gene expression prediction task with a simple attention-based prediction block. Experiments on standard benchmark datasets indicate the superiority of our approach when comparing with the past state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
summary: Spatial transcriptomics (ST) is essential for understanding diseases and developing novel treatments. It measures gene expression of each fine-grained area (i.e., different windows) in the tissue slide with low throughput. This paper proposes an Exemplar Guided Network (EGN) to accurately and efficiently predict gene expression directly from each window of a tissue slide image. We apply exemplar learning to dynamically boost gene expression prediction from nearest/similar exemplars of a given tissue slide image window. Our EGN framework composes of three main components: 1) an extractor to structure a representation space for unsupervised exemplar retrievals; 2) a vision transformer (ViT) backbone to progressively extract representations of the input window; and 3) an Exemplar Bridging (EB) block to adaptively revise the intermediate ViT representations by using the nearest exemplars. Finally, we complete the gene expression prediction task with a simple attention-based prediction block. Experiments on standard benchmark datasets indicate the superiority of our approach when comparing with the past state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
abstract_zh: 空间转录组学 (ST) 对于了解疾病和开发新疗法至关重要。它以低通量测量组织载玻片中每个细粒度区域（即不同窗口）的基因表达。本文提出了一种范例引导网络（EGN），可以直接从组织切片图像的每个窗口准确有效地预测基因表达。我们应用样本学习来动态增强来自给定组织切片图像窗口的最接近/相似样本的基因表达预测。我们的 EGN 框架由三个主要组件组成：1）一个提取器，用于构建用于无监督样本检索的表示空间； 2）视觉变换器（ViT）主干，用于逐步提取输入窗口的表示； 3) Exemplar Bridging (EB) 块通过使用最近的样本自适应地修改中间 ViT 表示。最后，我们用一个简单的基于注意力的预测模块完成了基因表达预测任务。标准基准数据集上的实验表明，与过去最先进的（SOTA）方法相比，我们的方法具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种示例引导的深度神经网络（EGN），用于从组织切片图像中直接预测每个区域的基因表达，提升空间转录组学分析的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统空间转录组学方法因通量低且预测精度不足，难以满足疾病研究和治疗开发的需求，亟需更高效且精准的基因表达预测模型。
AI.method: EGN框架包含三部分：1）构建无监督示例检索表示空间的提取器；2）通过视觉Transformer（ViT）逐步提取输入窗口特征；3）利用最近邻示例动态调整ViT中间表示的Exemplar Bridging模块，最终通过注意力机制完成预测。
AI.result: 在标准基准数据集上的实验表明，EGN在预测性能上显著优于现有最先进方法（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: EGN通过示例引导学习机制有效提升了空间转录组学的基因表达预测能力，为相关研究提供了新思路和技术支持。
