authors_text: Yu Zheng,Zhangxuan Dang,Chunlei Peng,Chao Yang,Xinbo Gao
title: Multi-view Multi-label Anomaly Network Traffic Classification based on MLP-Mixer Neural Network
title_zh: 基于MLP-Mixer神经网络的多视图多标签异常网络流量分类
abstract: Network traffic classification is the basis of many network security applications and has attracted enough attention in the field of cyberspace security. Existing network traffic classification based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) often emphasizes local patterns of traffic data while ignoring global information associations. In this paper, we propose an MLP-Mixer based multi-view multi-label neural network for network traffic classification. Compared with the existing CNN-based methods, our method adopts the MLP-Mixer structure, which is more in line with the structure of the packet than the conventional convolution operation. In our method, one packet is divided into the packet header and the packet body, together with the flow features of the packet as input from different views. We utilize a multi-label setting to learn different scenarios simultaneously to improve the classification performance by exploiting the correlations between different scenarios. Taking advantage of the above characteristics, we propose an end-to-end network traffic classification method. We conduct experiments on three public datasets, and the experimental results show that our method can achieve superior performance.
summary: Network traffic classification is the basis of many network security applications and has attracted enough attention in the field of cyberspace security. Existing network traffic classification based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) often emphasizes local patterns of traffic data while ignoring global information associations. In this paper, we propose an MLP-Mixer based multi-view multi-label neural network for network traffic classification. Compared with the existing CNN-based methods, our method adopts the MLP-Mixer structure, which is more in line with the structure of the packet than the conventional convolution operation. In our method, one packet is divided into the packet header and the packet body, together with the flow features of the packet as input from different views. We utilize a multi-label setting to learn different scenarios simultaneously to improve the classification performance by exploiting the correlations between different scenarios. Taking advantage of the above characteristics, we propose an end-to-end network traffic classification method. We conduct experiments on three public datasets, and the experimental results show that our method can achieve superior performance.
abstract_zh: 网络流量分类是许多网络安全应用的基础，在网络空间安全领域引起了足够的重视。现有的基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的网络流量分类通常强调流量数据的局部模式，而忽略全局信息关联。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 MLP-Mixer 的多视图多标签神经网络，用于网络流量分类。与现有的基于CNN的方法相比，我们的方法采用MLP-Mixer结构，比传统的卷积运算更符合数据包的结构。在我们的方法中，一个数据包被分为数据包头和数据包主体，以及数据包的流特征作为来自不同视图的输入。我们利用多标签设置同时学习不同的场景，通过利用不同场景之间的相关性来提高分类性能。利用上述特点，我们提出了一种端到端的网络流量分类方法。我们在三个公共数据集上进行了实验，实验结果表明我们的方法可以获得优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于MLP-Mixer神经网络的多视角多标签网络流量分类方法，用于提升网络异常检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法侧重局部特征而忽略全局关联，且难以处理多标签场景间的相关性，需改进模型结构与多视角特征融合方式。
AI.method: 采用MLP-Mixer结构替代卷积操作，将数据包分为头部、正文及流特征作为多视角输入，通过多标签学习挖掘场景间关联性，构建端到端分类模型。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实验表明，该方法在分类准确率和鲁棒性方面优于现有CNN基方法。
AI.conclusion: MLP-Mixer结构结合多视角多标签学习能有效提升网络流量分类性能，为异常检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Abhishek Srivastava,Debesh Jha,Bulent Aydogan,Mohamed E. Abazeed,Ulas Bagci
title: Multi-Scale Fusion Methodologies for Head and Neck Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: 头颈肿瘤分割的多尺度融合方法
abstract: Head and Neck (H\&N) organ-at-risk (OAR) and tumor segmentations are essential components of radiation therapy planning. The varying anatomic locations and dimensions of H\&N nodal Gross Tumor Volumes (GTVn) and H\&N primary gross tumor volume (GTVp) are difficult to obtain due to lack of accurate and reliable delineation methods. The downstream effect of incorrect segmentation can result in unnecessary irradiation of normal organs. Towards a fully automated radiation therapy planning algorithm, we explore the efficacy of multi-scale fusion based deep learning architectures for accurately segmenting H\&N tumors from medical scans.
summary: Head and Neck (H\&N) organ-at-risk (OAR) and tumor segmentations are essential components of radiation therapy planning. The varying anatomic locations and dimensions of H\&N nodal Gross Tumor Volumes (GTVn) and H\&N primary gross tumor volume (GTVp) are difficult to obtain due to lack of accurate and reliable delineation methods. The downstream effect of incorrect segmentation can result in unnecessary irradiation of normal organs. Towards a fully automated radiation therapy planning algorithm, we explore the efficacy of multi-scale fusion based deep learning architectures for accurately segmenting H\&N tumors from medical scans.
abstract_zh: 头颈 (H\&N) 危险器官 (OAR) 和肿瘤分割是放射治疗计划的重要组成部分。由于缺乏准确可靠的勾画方法，很难获得 H\&N 淋巴结大体肿瘤体积 (GTVn) 和 H\&N 原发性大体肿瘤体积 (GTVp) 的不同解剖位置和尺寸。不正确分割的下游影响可能导致正常器官不必要的照射。为了实现全自动放射治疗规划算法，我们探索了基于多尺度融合的深度学习架构的功效，以从医学扫描中准确分割 H\&N 肿瘤。

AI.result: 提升分割准确性，减少正常组织照射
AI.conclusion: 多尺度融合方法有效支持自动放疗计划

The varying anatomic locations and dimensions of H\&N nodal Gross Tumor Volumes (GTVn) and H\&N primary gross tumor volume (GTVp) are difficult to obtain due to lack of accurate and reliable delineation methods. The downstream effect of incorrect segmentation can result in unnecessary irradiation of normal organs. authors_text: Nazish Tahir,Ramviyas Parasuraman
title: Analog Twin Framework for Human and AI Supervisory Control and Teleoperation of Robots
title_zh: 用于人类和人工智能监督控制以及机器人远程操作的模拟孪生框架
abstract: Resource-constrained mobile robots that lack the capability to be completely autonomous can rely on a human or AI supervisor acting at a remote site (e.g., control station or cloud) for their control. Such a supervised autonomy or cloud-based control of a robot poses high networking and computing capabilities requirements at both sites, which are not easy to achieve. This paper introduces and analyzes a new analog twin framework by synchronizing mobility between two mobile robots, where one robot acts as an analog twin to the other robot. We devise a novel priority-based supervised bilateral teleoperation strategy for goal navigation tasks to validate the proposed framework. The practical implementation of a supervised control strategy on this framework entails a mobile robot system divided into a Master-Client scheme over a communication channel where the Client robot resides on the site of operation guided by the Master robot through an agent (human or AI) from a remote location. The Master robot controls the Client robot with its autonomous navigation algorithm, which reacts to the predictive force received from the Client robot. We analyze the proposed strategy in terms of network performance (throughput and delay), task performance (tracking error and goal reach accuracy), and computing efficiency (memory and CPU utilization). Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate the method's novelty, flexibility, and versatility in realizing reactive planning applications with remote computational offloading capabilities compared to conventional offloading schemes.
summary: Resource-constrained mobile robots that lack the capability to be completely autonomous can rely on a human or AI supervisor acting at a remote site (e.g., control station or cloud) for their control. Such a supervised autonomy or cloud-based control of a robot poses high networking and computing capabilities requirements at both sites, which are not easy to achieve. This paper introduces and analyzes a new analog twin framework by synchronizing mobility between two mobile robots, where one robot acts as an analog twin to the other robot. We devise a novel priority-based supervised bilateral teleoperation strategy for goal navigation tasks to validate the proposed framework. The practical implementation of a supervised control strategy on this framework entails a mobile robot system divided into a Master-Client scheme over a communication channel where the Client robot resides on the site of operation guided by the Master robot through an agent (human or AI) from a remote location. The Master robot controls the Client robot with its autonomous navigation algorithm, which reacts to the predictive force received from the Client robot. We analyze the proposed strategy in terms of network performance (throughput and delay), task performance (tracking error and goal reach accuracy), and computing efficiency (memory and CPU utilization). Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate the method's novelty, flexibility, and versatility in realizing reactive planning applications with remote computational offloading capabilities compared to conventional offloading schemes.
abstract_zh: 资源受限的移动机器人缺乏完全自主的能力，可以依靠在远程站点（例如控制台或云）进行操作的人类或人工智能主管来进行控制。这种机器人的监督自主或基于云的控制对两个站点的网络和计算能力提出了很高的要求，而这并不容易实现。本文介绍并分析了一种新的模拟双胞胎框架，通过同步两个移动机器人之间的移动性，其中一个机器人充当另一个机器人的模拟双胞胎。我们为目标导航任务设计了一种新颖的基于优先级的监督双边远程操作策略，以验证所提出的框架。在该框架上实际实施监督控制策略需要将移动机器人系统分为通过通信通道的主-客户端方案，其中客户端机器人驻留在操作现场，由主机器人通过远程代理（人类或人工智能）进行引导。主机器人通过其自主导航算法控制客户端机器人，该算法对从客户端机器人接收到的预测力做出反应。我们从网络性能（吞吐量和延迟）、任务性能（跟踪误差和目标到达精度）和计算效率（内存和 CPU 利用率）方面分析了所提出的策略。大量的模拟和真实实验证明了与传统的卸载方案相比，该方法在实现具有远程计算卸载功能的反应式规划应用方面具有新颖性、灵活性和多功能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种类双胞胎框架，通过同步两个移动机器人的运动，实现远程人类或AI监督下的机器人控制与遥操作。
AI.motivation: 现有远程控制方案对网络和计算资源要求高，难以满足资源受限移动机器人的实际需求。
AI.method: 构建主从机器人系统（Master-Client架构），通过优先级策略实现双边遥操作，主机器人基于从机器人的预测力进行自主导航控制。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明该框架在任务跟踪精度、网络延迟容忍度及计算效率方面优于传统方案，具备灵活的远程计算卸载能力。
AI.conclusion: 类双胞胎框架为资源受限场景下的机器人远程控制提供了低开销、高适应性的新解决方案。

authors_text: Rakshith Subramanyam,Kowshik Thopalli,Spring Berman,Pavan Turaga,Jayaraman J. Thiagarajan
title: Single-Shot Domain Adaptation via Target-Aware Generative Augmentation
title_zh: 通过目标感知生成增强进行单次域适应
abstract: The problem of adapting models from a source domain using data from any target domain of interest has gained prominence, thanks to the brittle generalization in deep neural networks. While several test-time adaptation techniques have emerged, they typically rely on synthetic data augmentations in cases of limited target data availability. In this paper, we consider the challenging setting of single-shot adaptation and explore the design of augmentation strategies. We argue that augmentations utilized by existing methods are insufficient to handle large distribution shifts, and hence propose a new approach SiSTA (Single-Shot Target Augmentations), which first fine-tunes a generative model from the source domain using a single-shot target, and then employs novel sampling strategies for curating synthetic target data. Using experiments with a state-of-the-art domain adaptation method, we find that SiSTA produces improvements as high as 20\% over existing baselines under challenging shifts in face attribute detection, and that it performs competitively to oracle models obtained by training on a larger target dataset.
summary: The problem of adapting models from a source domain using data from any target domain of interest has gained prominence, thanks to the brittle generalization in deep neural networks. While several test-time adaptation techniques have emerged, they typically rely on synthetic data augmentations in cases of limited target data availability. In this paper, we consider the challenging setting of single-shot adaptation and explore the design of augmentation strategies. We argue that augmentations utilized by existing methods are insufficient to handle large distribution shifts, and hence propose a new approach SiSTA (Single-Shot Target Augmentations), which first fine-tunes a generative model from the source domain using a single-shot target, and then employs novel sampling strategies for curating synthetic target data. Using experiments with a state-of-the-art domain adaptation method, we find that SiSTA produces improvements as high as 20\% over existing baselines under challenging shifts in face attribute detection, and that it performs competitively to oracle models obtained by training on a larger target dataset.
abstract_zh: 由于深度神经网络的脆弱泛化，使用来自任何感兴趣的目标域的数据来适应来自源域的模型的问题已经变得突出。虽然已经出现了几种测试时适应技术，但在目标数据可用性有限的情况下，它们通常依赖于合成数据增强。在本文中，我们考虑了单次适应的挑战性设置，并探索了增强策略的设计。我们认为现有方法使用的增强不足以处理大的分布变化，因此提出了一种新方法 SiSTA（单次目标增强），它首先使用单次目标从源域微调生成模型，然后采用新颖的采样策略来管理合成目标数据。通过使用最先进的域适应方法进行实验，我们发现 SiSTA 在人脸属性检测的挑战性变化下比现有基线提高了 20%，并且它的性能与通过在更大的目标数据集上训练获得的预言机模型具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单次域适应方法SiSTA，通过生成目标感知的数据增强来提高模型在目标域上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的域适应方法在面对目标域数据有限时，依赖于合成数据增强，但这些方法在处理大分布偏移时效果不足。
AI.method: 提出SiSTA方法，首先利用单个目标样本微调源域生成模型，然后采用新的采样策略生成合成目标数据。
AI.result: 在人脸属性检测任务中，SiSTA相比现有基线方法性能提升了高达20%，并且在挑战性分布偏移下表现与使用更大目标数据集训练的模型相当。
AI.conclusion: SiSTA方法有效解决了单次域适应中的数据增强问题，为域适应任务提供了新的思路和方法。

Using experiments with a state-of-the-art domain adaptation method, we find that SiSTA produces improvements as high as 20\% over existing baselines under challenging shifts in face attribute detection, and that it performs competitively to oracle models obtained by training on a larger target dataset. 由于深度神经网络的脆弱泛化，使用来自任何感兴趣的目标域的数据来适应来自源域的模型的问题已经变得突出。虽然已经出现了几种测试时适应技术，但在目标数据可用性有限的情况下，它们通常依赖于合成数据增强。在本文中，我们考虑了单次适应的挑战性设置，并探索了增强策略的设计。我们认为现有方法使用的增强不足以处理大的分布变化，因此提出了一种新方法 SiSTA（单次目标增强），它首先使用单次目标从源域微调生成模型，然后采用新颖的采样策略来管理合成目标数据。通过使用最先进的域适应方法进行实验，我们发现 SiSTA 在人脸属性检测的挑战性变化下比现有基线提高了 20%，并且它的性能与通过在更大的目标数据集上训练获得的预言机模型具有竞争力。 本文提出了一种单次域适应方法SiSTA，通过生成目标感知的数据增强来提高模型在目标域上的性能。 Rakshith Subramanyam,Kowshik Thopalli,Spring Berman,Pavan Turaga,Jayaraman J. Thiagarajan cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Shan Lin,Albert J. Miao,Jingpei Lu,Shunkai Yu,Zih-Yun Chiu,Florian Richter,Michael C. Yip
title: Semantic-SuPer: A Semantic-aware Surgical Perception Framework for Endoscopic Tissue Identification, Reconstruction, and Tracking
title_zh: Semantic-SuPer：用于内窥镜组织识别、重建和跟踪的语义感知手术感知框架
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Accurate and robust tracking and reconstruction of the surgical scene is a critical enabling technology toward autonomous robotic surgery. Existing algorithms for 3D perception in surgery mainly rely on geometric information, while we propose to also leverage semantic information inferred from the endoscopic video using image segmentation algorithms. In this paper, we present a novel, comprehensive surgical perception framework, Semantic-SuPer, that integrates geometric and semantic information to facilitate data association, 3D reconstruction, and tracking of endoscopic scenes, benefiting downstream tasks like surgical navigation. The proposed framework is demonstrated on challenging endoscopic data with deforming tissue, showing its advantages over our baseline and several other state-of the-art approaches. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/ucsdarclab/Python-SuPer.
summary: Accurate and robust tracking and reconstruction of the surgical scene is a critical enabling technology toward autonomous robotic surgery. Existing algorithms for 3D perception in surgery mainly rely on geometric information, while we propose to also leverage semantic information inferred from the endoscopic video using image segmentation algorithms. In this paper, we present a novel, comprehensive surgical perception framework, Semantic-SuPer, that integrates geometric and semantic information to facilitate data association, 3D reconstruction, and tracking of endoscopic scenes, benefiting downstream tasks like surgical navigation. The proposed framework is demonstrated on challenging endoscopic data with deforming tissue, showing its advantages over our baseline and several other state-of the-art approaches. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/ucsdarclab/Python-SuPer.
abstract_zh: 准确而强大的手术场景跟踪和重建是实现自主机器人手术的关键支持技术。手术中现有的 3D 感知算法主要依赖于几何信息，而我们建议还利用图像分割算法从内窥镜视频推断出的语义信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖、全面的手术感知框架 Semantic-SuPer，它集成了几何和语义信息，以促进数据关联、3D 重建和内窥镜场景跟踪，有利于手术导航等下游任务。所提出的框架在具有变形组织的挑战性内窥镜数据上进行了论证，显示了其相对于我们的基线和其他几种最先进方法的优势。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/ucsdarclab/Python-SuPer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个结合语义信息与几何信息的手术场景感知框架Semantic-SuPer，用于内窥镜下的组织识别、三维重建与跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有手术场景3D感知方法仅依赖几何信息，难以应对组织形变等复杂情况，需引入语义信息提升鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.method: 设计Semantic-SuPer框架，通过图像分割算法从内窥镜视频中提取语义信息，并与几何信息融合，实现数据关联、三维重建及动态跟踪。
AI.result: 在包含变形组织的内窥镜数据集上，该框架优于基线方法及多种前沿算法，验证了语义-几何联合建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Semantic-SuPer通过整合语义与几何信息，显著提升了手术场景感知性能，为自主机器人手术提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Nairouz Shehata,Wulfie Bain,Ben Glocker
title: A Comparative Study of Graph Neural Networks for Shape Classification in Neuroimaging
title_zh: 用于神经影像形状分类的图神经网络的比较研究
comment: Accepted at GeoMedIA Workshop 2022 (Proceedings of Machine Learning Research). Code available on https://github.com/biomedia-mira/medmesh
comments: Accepted at GeoMedIA Workshop 2022 (Proceedings of Machine Learning Research). Code available on https://github.com/biomedia-mira/medmesh
abstract: Graph neural networks have emerged as a promising approach for the analysis of non-Euclidean data such as meshes. In medical imaging, mesh-like data plays an important role for modelling anatomical structures, and shape classification can be used in computer aided diagnosis and disease detection. However, with a plethora of options, the best architectural choices for medical shape analysis using GNNs remain unclear. We conduct a comparative analysis to provide practitioners with an overview of the current state-of-the-art in geometric deep learning for shape classification in neuroimaging. Using biological sex classification as a proof-of-concept task, we find that using FPFH as node features substantially improves GNN performance and generalisation to out-of-distribution data; we compare the performance of three alternative convolutional layers; and we reinforce the importance of data augmentation for graph based learning. We then confirm these results hold for a clinically relevant task, using the classification of Alzheimer's disease.
summary: Graph neural networks have emerged as a promising approach for the analysis of non-Euclidean data such as meshes. In medical imaging, mesh-like data plays an important role for modelling anatomical structures, and shape classification can be used in computer aided diagnosis and disease detection. However, with a plethora of options, the best architectural choices for medical shape analysis using GNNs remain unclear. We conduct a comparative analysis to provide practitioners with an overview of the current state-of-the-art in geometric deep learning for shape classification in neuroimaging. Using biological sex classification as a proof-of-concept task, we find that using FPFH as node features substantially improves GNN performance and generalisation to out-of-distribution data; we compare the performance of three alternative convolutional layers; and we reinforce the importance of data augmentation for graph based learning. We then confirm these results hold for a clinically relevant task, using the classification of Alzheimer's disease.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络已成为分析网格等非欧几里得数据的一种有前景的方法。在医学成像中，网格状数据在解剖结构建模中发挥着重要作用，形状分类可用于计算机辅助诊断和疾病检测。然而，由于选项过多，使用 GNN 进行医学形状分析的最佳架构选择仍不清楚。我们进行比较分析，为从业者提供神经影像形状分类几何深度学习最新技术的概述。使用生物性别分类作为概念验证任务，我们发现使用 FPFH 作为节点特征大大提高了 GNN 的性能和对分布外数据的泛化；我们比较了三个替代卷积层的性能；我们强调了数据增强对于基于图的学​​习的重要性。然后，我们使用阿尔茨海默氏病的分类来确认这些结果适用于临床相关任务。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了图神经网络（GNN）在神经影像学形状分类中的应用效果，旨在为医学形状分析提供最佳架构选择。
AI.motivation: 尽管图神经网络在处理非欧几里得数据（如网格）方面表现出潜力，但医学影像中形状分类任务的最佳GNN架构仍不明确。
AI.method: 以生物性别分类作为概念验证任务，比较三种卷积层性能，验证FPFH节点特征和数据增强对GNN的影响，并在阿尔茨海默病分类中验证结果。
AI.result: 使用FPFH特征显著提升GNN性能及泛化能力，数据增强至关重要，且结果在临床相关任务中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: FPFH特征与数据增强策略能有效提升医学形状分类的GNN模型性能，研究结果对临床任务具有指导意义。

authors_text: Yosuke Higuchi,Brian Yan,Siddhant Arora,Tetsuji Ogawa,Tetsunori Kobayashi,Shinji Watanabe
title: BERT Meets CTC: New Formulation of End-to-End Speech Recognition with Pre-trained Masked Language Model
title_zh: BERT 与 CTC 的结合：使用预训练的屏蔽语言模型实现端到端语音识别的新形式
comment: v1: Accepted to Findings of EMNLP2022, v2: Minor corrections and clearer derivation of Eq. (21)
comments: v1: Accepted to Findings of EMNLP2022, v2: Minor corrections and clearer derivation of Eq. (21)
abstract: This paper presents BERT-CTC, a novel formulation of end-to-end speech recognition that adapts BERT for connectionist temporal classification (CTC). Our formulation relaxes the conditional independence assumptions used in conventional CTC and incorporates linguistic knowledge through the explicit output dependency obtained by BERT contextual embedding. BERT-CTC attends to the full contexts of the input and hypothesized output sequences via the self-attention mechanism. This mechanism encourages a model to learn inner/inter-dependencies between the audio and token representations while maintaining CTC's training efficiency. During inference, BERT-CTC combines a mask-predict algorithm with CTC decoding, which iteratively refines an output sequence. The experimental results reveal that BERT-CTC improves over conventional approaches across variations in speaking styles and languages. Finally, we show that the semantic representations in BERT-CTC are beneficial towards downstream spoken language understanding tasks.
summary: This paper presents BERT-CTC, a novel formulation of end-to-end speech recognition that adapts BERT for connectionist temporal classification (CTC). Our formulation relaxes the conditional independence assumptions used in conventional CTC and incorporates linguistic knowledge through the explicit output dependency obtained by BERT contextual embedding. BERT-CTC attends to the full contexts of the input and hypothesized output sequences via the self-attention mechanism. This mechanism encourages a model to learn inner/inter-dependencies between the audio and token representations while maintaining CTC's training efficiency. During inference, BERT-CTC combines a mask-predict algorithm with CTC decoding, which iteratively refines an output sequence. The experimental results reveal that BERT-CTC improves over conventional approaches across variations in speaking styles and languages. Finally, we show that the semantic representations in BERT-CTC are beneficial towards downstream spoken language understanding tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 BERT-CTC，这是一种新颖的端到端语音识别方案，它采用 BERT 进行联结时序分类 (CTC)。我们的公式放宽了传统 CTC 中使用的条件独立性假设，并通过 BERT 上下文嵌入获得的显式输出依赖来合并语言知识。 BERT-CTC 通过自注意力机制关注输入和假设输出序列的完整上下文。这种机制鼓励模型学习音频和令牌表示之间的内部/相互依赖性，同时保持 CTC 的训练效率。在推理过程中，BERT-CTC 将掩码预测算法与 CTC 解码相结合，迭代地细化输出序列。实验结果表明，BERT-CTC 在不同说话风格和语言方面比传统方法有所改进。最后，我们表明 BERT-CTC 中的语义表示有利于下游口语理解任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BERT-CTC，将BERT与CTC结合，改进端到端语音识别方法。
AI.motivation: 传统CTC假设输出条件独立，忽略语言学知识，而BERT的上下文嵌入能捕捉语言依赖关系，需将其与CTC结合提升性能。
AI.method: 通过BERT的自注意力机制建模音频与token的内外依赖，结合CTC训练效率，并采用掩码预测算法与CTC解码迭代优化输出序列。
AI.result: 在不同说话风格和语言中优于传统方法，且语义表征对下游语音理解任务有帮助。
AI.conclusion: BERT-CTC通过融合预训练语言模型与CTC，有效提升语音识别性能并增强语义表征能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出BERT-CTC，将BERT与CTC结合，改进端到端语音识别方法。

search_text: BERT Meets CTC: New Formulation of End-to-End Speech Recognition with Pre-trained Masked Language Model BERT 与 CTC 的结合：使用预训练的屏蔽语言模型实现端到端语音识别的新形式 This paper presents BERT-CTC, a novel formulation of end-to-end speech recognition that adapts BERT for connectionist temporal classification (CTC). Our formulation relaxes the conditional independence assumptions used in conventional CTC and incorporates linguistic knowledge through the explicit output dependency obtained by BERT contextual embedding. BERT-CTC attends to the full contexts of the input and hypothesized output sequences via the self-attention mechanism. This mechanism encourages a model to learn inner/inter-dependencies between the audio and token representations while maintaining CTC's training efficiency. During inference, BERT-CTC combines a mask-predict algorithm with CTC decoding, which iteratively refines an output sequence. The experimental results reveal that BERT-CTC improves over conventional approaches across variations in speaking styles and languages. Finally, we show that the semantic representations in BERT-CTC are beneficial towards downstream spoken language understanding tasks. 本文提出了 BERT-CTC，这是一种新颖的端到端语音识别方案，它采用 BERT 进行联结时序分类 (CTC)。我们的公式放宽了传统 CTC 中使用的条件独立性假设，并通过 BERT 上下文嵌入获得的显式输出依赖来合并语言知识。 BERT-CTC 通过自注意力机制关注输入和假设输出序列的完整上下文。这种机制鼓励模型学习音频和令牌表示之间的内部/相互依赖性，同时保持 CTC 的训练效率。在推理过程中，BERT-CTC 将掩码预测算法与 CTC 解码相结合，迭代地细化输出序列。实验结果表明，BERT-CTC 在不同说话风格和语言方面比传统方法有所改进。最后，我们表明 BERT-CTC 中的语义表示有利于下游口语理解任务。 本文提出BERT-CTC，将BERT与CTC结合，改进端到端语音识别方法。 Yosuke Higuchi,Brian Yan,Siddhant Arora,Tetsuji Ogawa,Tetsunori Kobayashi,Shinji Watanabe eess.AS,cs.CL

authors_text: Sidhika Balachandar,Adrien Poulenard,Congyue Deng,Leonidas Guibas
title: Breaking the Symmetry: Resolving Symmetry Ambiguities in Equivariant Neural Networks
title_zh: 打破对称性：解决等变神经网络中的对称性歧义
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, NeurIPS Symmetry and Geometry in Neural Representations Conference
comments: 13 pages, 8 figures, NeurIPS Symmetry and Geometry in Neural Representations Conference
abstract: Equivariant networks have been adopted in many 3-D learning areas. Here we identify a fundamental limitation of these networks: their ambiguity to symmetries. Equivariant networks cannot complete symmetry-dependent tasks like segmenting a left-right symmetric object into its left and right sides. We tackle this problem by adding components that resolve symmetry ambiguities while preserving rotational equivariance. We present OAVNN: Orientation Aware Vector Neuron Network, an extension of the Vector Neuron Network. OAVNN is a rotation equivariant network that is robust to planar symmetric inputs. Our network consists of three key components. 1) We introduce an algorithm to calculate symmetry detecting features. 2) We create a symmetry-sensitive orientation aware linear layer. 3) We construct an attention mechanism that relates directional information across points. We evaluate the network using left-right segmentation and find that the network quickly obtains accurate segmentations. We hope this work motivates investigations on the expressivity of equivariant networks on symmetric objects.
summary: Equivariant networks have been adopted in many 3-D learning areas. Here we identify a fundamental limitation of these networks: their ambiguity to symmetries. Equivariant networks cannot complete symmetry-dependent tasks like segmenting a left-right symmetric object into its left and right sides. We tackle this problem by adding components that resolve symmetry ambiguities while preserving rotational equivariance. We present OAVNN: Orientation Aware Vector Neuron Network, an extension of the Vector Neuron Network. OAVNN is a rotation equivariant network that is robust to planar symmetric inputs. Our network consists of three key components. 1) We introduce an algorithm to calculate symmetry detecting features. 2) We create a symmetry-sensitive orientation aware linear layer. 3) We construct an attention mechanism that relates directional information across points. We evaluate the network using left-right segmentation and find that the network quickly obtains accurate segmentations. We hope this work motivates investigations on the expressivity of equivariant networks on symmetric objects.
abstract_zh: 等变网络已在许多 3D 学习领域得到采用。在这里，我们确定了这些网络的一个基本限制：它们的对称性不明确。等变网络无法完成依赖于对称性的任务，例如将左右对称对象分割为其左侧和右侧。我们通过添加组件来解决这个问题，这些组件可以解决对称性模糊性，同时保持旋转等变性。我们提出了 OAVNN：方向感知矢量神经元网络，它是矢量神经元网络的扩展。 OAVNN 是一种旋转等变网络，对平面对称输入具有鲁棒性。我们的网络由三个关键组成部分组成。 1）我们引入了一种计算对称检测特征的算法。 2）我们创建一个对称敏感的方向感知线性层。 3）我们构建了一种关注机制，将跨点的方向信息联系起来。我们使用左右分割来评估网络，发现网络可以快速获得准确的分割。我们希望这项工作能够激发对对称对象上等变网络表达能力的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为OAVNN的旋转等变网络，用于解决等变神经网络在处理对称物体时的对称性模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 等变网络在处理3D学习任务时存在对称性模糊的固有缺陷，无法完成如左右分割对称物体等依赖对称性的任务。
AI.method: 设计了包含三个核心组件的OAVNN网络：1) 对称性检测特征算法；2) 方向感知线性层；3) 跨点方向信息注意力机制，在保持旋转等变性的同时解决对称性模糊问题。
AI.result: 在左右分割任务中，OAVNN能够快速实现准确的分割结果，验证了其对平面对称输入的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为等变网络在对称物体上的表达能力研究提供了新方向，推动相关领域进一步探索。

authors_text: Darshan Singh S,Anchit Gupta,C. V. Jawahar,Makarand Tapaswi
title: Unsupervised Audio-Visual Lecture Segmentation
title_zh: 无监督视听讲座分段
comment: 17 pages, 14 figures, 14 tables, Accepted to WACV 2023. Project page: https://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/avlectures
comments: 17 pages, 14 figures, 14 tables, Accepted to WACV 2023. Project page: https://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/avlectures
abstract: Over the last decade, online lecture videos have become increasingly popular and have experienced a meteoric rise during the pandemic. However, video-language research has primarily focused on instructional videos or movies, and tools to help students navigate the growing online lectures are lacking. Our first contribution is to facilitate research in the educational domain, by introducing AVLectures, a large-scale dataset consisting of 86 courses with over 2,350 lectures covering various STEM subjects. Each course contains video lectures, transcripts, OCR outputs for lecture frames, and optionally lecture notes, slides, assignments, and related educational content that can inspire a variety of tasks. Our second contribution is introducing video lecture segmentation that splits lectures into bite-sized topics that show promise in improving learner engagement. We formulate lecture segmentation as an unsupervised task that leverages visual, textual, and OCR cues from the lecture, while clip representations are fine-tuned on a pretext self-supervised task of matching the narration with the temporally aligned visual content. We use these representations to generate segments using a temporally consistent 1-nearest neighbor algorithm, TW-FINCH. We evaluate our method on 15 courses and compare it against various visual and textual baselines, outperforming all of them. Our comprehensive ablation studies also identify the key factors driving the success of our approach.
summary: Over the last decade, online lecture videos have become increasingly popular and have experienced a meteoric rise during the pandemic. However, video-language research has primarily focused on instructional videos or movies, and tools to help students navigate the growing online lectures are lacking. Our first contribution is to facilitate research in the educational domain, by introducing AVLectures, a large-scale dataset consisting of 86 courses with over 2,350 lectures covering various STEM subjects. Each course contains video lectures, transcripts, OCR outputs for lecture frames, and optionally lecture notes, slides, assignments, and related educational content that can inspire a variety of tasks. Our second contribution is introducing video lecture segmentation that splits lectures into bite-sized topics that show promise in improving learner engagement. We formulate lecture segmentation as an unsupervised task that leverages visual, textual, and OCR cues from the lecture, while clip representations are fine-tuned on a pretext self-supervised task of matching the narration with the temporally aligned visual content. We use these representations to generate segments using a temporally consistent 1-nearest neighbor algorithm, TW-FINCH. We evaluate our method on 15 courses and compare it against various visual and textual baselines, outperforming all of them. Our comprehensive ablation studies also identify the key factors driving the success of our approach.
abstract_zh: 过去十年来，在线讲座视频越来越受欢迎，并在疫情期间迅速崛起。然而，视频语言研究主要集中在教学视频或电影上，缺乏帮助学生驾驭日益增长的在线讲座的工具。我们的第一个贡献是通过引入 AVLectures 来促进教育领域的研究，AVLectures 是一个大型数据集，包含 86 门课程和超过 2,350 个讲座，涵盖各种 STEM 主题。每门课程都包含视频讲座、成绩单、讲座框架的 OCR 输出，以及可选的讲义、幻灯片、作业和可以激发各种任务的相关教育内容。我们的第二个贡献是引入视频讲座分段，将讲座分成小主题，这有望提高学习者的参与度。我们将讲座分段制定为一项无监督任务，利用讲座中的视觉、文本和 OCR 线索，而剪辑表示则以将叙述与时间对齐的视觉内容相匹配的自我监督任务为借口进行微调。我们使用这些表示来使用时间一致的 1-最近邻算法 TW-FINCH 来生成片段。我们在 15 门课程上评估了我们的方法，并将其与各种视觉和文本基线进行比较，结果优于所有基线。我们全面的消融研究还确定了推动我们的方法成功的关键因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的音频-视觉讲座分割方法，通过结合视觉、文本和OCR线索，将在线课程分割为更易理解的短小主题。
AI.motivation: 在线讲座数量激增但缺乏有效的导航工具，现有研究多集中于教学视频或电影，教育领域亟需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含86门STEM课程的AVLectures数据集，设计基于自监督学习的预训练任务匹配语音与视觉内容，并采用TW-FINCH算法进行时序一致的分割。
AI.result: 在15门课程测试中优于多种视觉和文本基线方法，消融实验验证了多模态线索与自监督预训练的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督分割方法显著提升学习者参与度，为教育领域的视频分析提供了可复用的数据集和有效技术框架。

We formulate lecture segmentation as an unsupervised task that leverages visual, textual, and OCR cues from the lecture, while clip representations are fine-tuned on a pretext self-supervised task of matching the narration with the temporally aligned visual content. We use these representations to generate segments using a temporally consistent 1-nearest neighbor algorithm, TW-FINCH. We evaluate our method on 15 courses and compare it against various visual and textual baselines, outperforming all of them. Our comprehensive ablation studies also identify the key factors driving the success of our approach. 过去十年来，在线讲座视频越来越受欢迎，并在疫情期间迅速崛起。然而，视频语言研究主要集中在教学视频或电影上，缺乏帮助学生驾驭日益增长的在线讲座的工具。我们的第一个贡献是通过引入 AVLectures 来促进教育领域的研究，AVLectures 是一个大型数据集，包含 86 门课程和超过 2,350 个讲座，涵盖各种 STEM 主题。每门课程都包含视频讲座、成绩单、讲座框架的 OCR 输出，以及可选的讲义、幻灯片、作业和可以激发各种任务的相关教育内容。我们的第二个贡献是引入视频讲座分段，将讲座分成小主题，这有望提高学习者的参与度。我们将讲座分段制定为一项无监督任务，利用讲座中的视觉、文本和 OCR 线索，而剪辑表示则以将叙述与时间对齐的视觉内容相匹配的自我监督任务为借口进行微调。我们使用这些表示来使用时间一致的 1-最近邻算法 TW-FINCH 来生成片段。我们在 15 门课程上评估了我们的方法，并将其与各种视觉和文本基线进行比较，结果优于所有基线。我们全面的消融研究还确定了推动我们的方法成功的关键因素。 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的音频-视觉讲座分割方法，通过结合视觉、文本和OCR线索，将在线课程分割为更易理解的短小主题。 Darshan Singh S,Anchit Gupta,C. V. Jawahar,Makarand Tapaswi cs.CV

authors_text: Roshan Sharma,Bhiksha Raj
title: XNOR-FORMER: Learning Accurate Approximations in Long Speech Transformers
title_zh: XNOR-FORMER：在长语音变压器中学习准确的近似值
abstract: Transformers are among the state of the art for many tasks in speech, vision, and natural language processing, among others. Self-attentions, which are crucial contributors to this performance have quadratic computational complexity, which makes training on longer input sequences challenging. Prior work has produced state-of-the-art transformer variants with linear attention, however, current models sacrifice performance to achieve efficient implementations. In this work, we develop a novel linear transformer by examining the properties of the key-query product within self-attentions. Our model outperforms state of the art approaches on speech recognition and speech summarization, resulting in 1 % absolute WER improvement on the Librispeech-100 speech recognition benchmark and a new INTERVIEW speech recognition benchmark, and 5 points on ROUGE for summarization with How2.
summary: Transformers are among the state of the art for many tasks in speech, vision, and natural language processing, among others. Self-attentions, which are crucial contributors to this performance have quadratic computational complexity, which makes training on longer input sequences challenging. Prior work has produced state-of-the-art transformer variants with linear attention, however, current models sacrifice performance to achieve efficient implementations. In this work, we develop a novel linear transformer by examining the properties of the key-query product within self-attentions. Our model outperforms state of the art approaches on speech recognition and speech summarization, resulting in 1 % absolute WER improvement on the Librispeech-100 speech recognition benchmark and a new INTERVIEW speech recognition benchmark, and 5 points on ROUGE for summarization with How2.
abstract_zh: Transformer 是语音、视觉和自然语言处理等许多任务的最先进技术之一。自注意力是这种性能的关键贡献者，它具有二次计算复杂性，这使得对较长输入序列的训练变得具有挑战性。之前的工作已经产生了具有线性注意力的最先进的变压器变体，然而，当前模型牺牲了性能来实现高效的实现。在这项工作中，我们通过检查自注意力中键查询产品的属性来开发一种新颖的线性变换器。我们的模型在语音识别和语音摘要方面优于最先进的方法，在 Librispeech-100 语音识别基准和新的 INTERVIEW 语音识别基准上绝对 WER 提高了 1%，在使用 How2 进行摘要的 ROUGE 上提高了 5 分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XNOR-FORMER模型，通过改进自注意力机制解决长语音处理中的计算复杂度问题，同时提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer的自注意力机制存在二次计算复杂度，导致处理长序列效率低下，现有线性注意力模型牺牲了性能。
AI.method: 通过分析自注意力中键-查询乘积的数学性质，设计新型线性注意力机制，构建XNOR-FORMER模型。
AI.result: 在Librispeech-100语音识别任务中绝对WER降低1%，INTERVIEW基准取得新成绩，How2摘要任务ROUGE得分提升5点。
AI.conclusion: XNOR-FORMER在保持线性复杂度的同时实现了优于现有方法的性能，为长语音处理提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Roshan Sharma,Hira Dhamyal,Bhiksha Raj,Rita Singh
title: Unifying the Discrete and Continuous Emotion labels for Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 统一语音情感识别的离散和连续情感标签
abstract: Traditionally, in paralinguistic analysis for emotion detection from speech, emotions have been identified with discrete or dimensional (continuous-valued) labels. Accordingly, models that have been proposed for emotion detection use one or the other of these label types. However, psychologists like Russell and Plutchik have proposed theories and models that unite these views, maintaining that these representations have shared and complementary information. This paper is an attempt to validate these viewpoints computationally. To this end, we propose a model to jointly predict continuous and discrete emotional attributes and show how the relationship between these can be utilized to improve the robustness and performance of emotion recognition tasks. Our approach comprises multi-task and hierarchical multi-task learning frameworks that jointly model the relationships between continuous-valued and discrete emotion labels. Experimental results on two widely used datasets (IEMOCAP and MSPPodcast) for speech-based emotion recognition show that our model results in statistically significant improvements in performance over strong baselines with non-unified approaches. We also demonstrate that using one type of label (discrete or continuous-valued) for training improves recognition performance in tasks that use the other type of label. Experimental results and reasoning for this approach (called the mismatched training approach) are also presented.
summary: Traditionally, in paralinguistic analysis for emotion detection from speech, emotions have been identified with discrete or dimensional (continuous-valued) labels. Accordingly, models that have been proposed for emotion detection use one or the other of these label types. However, psychologists like Russell and Plutchik have proposed theories and models that unite these views, maintaining that these representations have shared and complementary information. This paper is an attempt to validate these viewpoints computationally. To this end, we propose a model to jointly predict continuous and discrete emotional attributes and show how the relationship between these can be utilized to improve the robustness and performance of emotion recognition tasks. Our approach comprises multi-task and hierarchical multi-task learning frameworks that jointly model the relationships between continuous-valued and discrete emotion labels. Experimental results on two widely used datasets (IEMOCAP and MSPPodcast) for speech-based emotion recognition show that our model results in statistically significant improvements in performance over strong baselines with non-unified approaches. We also demonstrate that using one type of label (discrete or continuous-valued) for training improves recognition performance in tasks that use the other type of label. Experimental results and reasoning for this approach (called the mismatched training approach) are also presented.
abstract_zh: 传统上，在从语音检测情绪的副语言分析中，情绪是用离散或维度（连续值）标签来识别的。因此，已提出用于情绪检测的模型使用这些标签类型中的一种或另一种。然而，罗素和普拉奇克等心理学家提出了统一这些观点的理论和模型，并认为这些表征具有共享和互补的信息。本文试图通过计算来验证这些观点。为此，我们提出了一种模型来联合预测连续和离散情感属性，并展示如何利用这些属性之间的关系来提高情感识别任务的鲁棒性和性能。我们的方法包括多任务和分层多任务学习框架，共同建模连续值和离散情感标签之间的关系。基于语音的情感识别的两个广泛使用的数据集（IEMOCAP 和 MSPPodcast）的实验结果表明，与使用非统一方法的强基线相比，我们的模型在性能上取得了统计上的显着改进。我们还证明，使用一种类型的标签（离散或连续值）进行训练可以提高使用另一种类型标签的任务中的识别性能。还介绍了这种方法（称为不匹配训练方法）的实验结果和推理。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过统一离散与连续情绪标签，提升语音情绪识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统情绪检测分别使用离散或连续标签，而心理学理论认为两者存在互补信息，需验证该观点。
AI.method: 提出多任务与分层多任务学习框架，联合建模连续与离散情绪标签的关系。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP和MSPPodcast数据集上，模型性能显著优于非统一方法，且跨标签训练可提升另一类任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 统一离散与连续标签的方法有效，跨标签训练策略能增强情绪识别的鲁棒性与性能。

This paper is an attempt to validate these viewpoints computationally. To this end, we propose a model to jointly predict continuous and discrete emotional attributes and show how the relationship between these can be utilized to improve the robustness and performance of emotion recognition tasks. We also demonstrate that using one type of label (discrete or continuous-valued) for training improves recognition performance in tasks that use the other type of label. authors_text: Lingwei Meng,Di Dong,Xin Chen,Mengjie Fang,Rongpin Wang,Jing Li,Zaiyi Liu,Jie Tian
title: 2D and 3D CT Radiomic Features Performance Comparison in Characterization of Gastric Cancer: A Multi-center Study
title_zh: 2D 和 3D CT 放射组学特征在胃癌表征中的性能比较：一项多中心研究
comment: Published in IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
comments: Published in IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
abstract: Objective: Radiomics, an emerging tool for medical image analysis, is potential towards precisely characterizing gastric cancer (GC). Whether using one-slice 2D annotation or whole-volume 3D annotation remains a long-time debate, especially for heterogeneous GC. We comprehensively compared 2D and 3D radiomic features' representation and discrimination capacity regarding GC, via three tasks. Methods: Four-center 539 GC patients were retrospectively enrolled and divided into the training and validation cohorts. From 2D or 3D regions of interest (ROIs) annotated by radiologists, radiomic features were extracted respectively. Feature selection and model construction procedures were customed for each combination of two modalities (2D or 3D) and three tasks. Subsequently, six machine learning models (Model_2D^LNM, Model_3D^LNM; Model_2D^LVI, Model_3D^LVI; Model_2D^pT, Model_3D^pT) were derived and evaluated to reflect modalities' performances in characterizing GC. Furthermore, we performed an auxiliary experiment to assess modalities' performances when resampling spacing is different. Results: Regarding three tasks, the yielded areas under the curve (AUCs) were: Model_2D^LNM's 0.712 (95% confidence interval, 0.613-0.811), Model_3D^LNM's 0.680 (0.584-0.775); Model_2D^LVI's 0.677 (0.595-0.761), Model_3D^LVI's 0.615 (0.528-0.703); Model_2D^pT's 0.840 (0.779-0.901), Model_3D^pT's 0.813 (0.747-0.879). Moreover, the auxiliary experiment indicated that Models_2D are statistically more advantageous than Models3D with different resampling spacings. Conclusion: Models constructed with 2D radiomic features revealed comparable performances with those constructed with 3D features in characterizing GC. Significance: Our work indicated that time-saving 2D annotation would be the better choice in GC, and provided a related reference to further radiomics-based researches.

Conclusion: Models constructed with 2D radiomic features revealed comparable performances with those constructed with 3D features in characterizing GC. Significance: Our work indicated that time-saving 2D annotation would be the better choice in GC, and provided a related reference to further radiomics-based researches.
abstract_zh: 目的：放射组学是一种新兴的医学图像分析工具，具有精确表征胃癌（GC）的潜力。使用单切片 2D 注释还是全体积 3D 注释仍然是一个长期争论，特别是对于异构 GC。我们通过三个任务全面比较了 2D 和 3D 放射组学特征在 GC 方面的表示和辨别能力。方法：回顾性纳入四中心 539 名 GC 患者，并将其分为训练组和验证组。从放射科医生注释的 2D 或 3D 感兴趣区域 (ROI) 中，分别提取放射组学特征。为两种模式（2D 或 3D）和三种任务的每种组合定制特征选择和模型构建程序。随后，推导并评估了六个机器学习模型（Model_2D^LNM、Model_3D^LNM；Model_2D^LVI、Model_3D^LVI；Model_2D^pT、Model_3D^pT），以反映模态在表征GC方面的性能。此外，我们进行了辅助实验来评估重采样间距不同时模态的性能。结果：对于三个任务，曲线下面积（AUC）为：Model_2D^LNM 的 0.712（95% 置信区间，0.613-0.811）、Model_3D^LNM 的 0.680（0.584-0.775）； Model_2D^LVI 的 0.677 (0.595-0.761)，Model_3D^LVI 的 0.615 (0.528-0.703)； Model_2D^pT 为 0.840 (0.779-0.901)，Model_3D^pT 为 0.813 (0.747-0.879)。此外，辅助实验表明，在不同重采样间隔下，Models_2D 在统计上比 Models3D 更有优势。结论：使用 2D 放射组学特征构建的模型在表征 GC 方面表现出与使用 3D 特征构建的模型相当的性能。意义：我们的工作表明，节省时间的二维注释将是GC中更好的选择，并为进一步的放射组学研究提供了相关参考。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了2D和3D CT影像组学特征在胃癌表征中的性能差异，通过三个任务评估其表现。
AI.motivation: 针对胃癌异质性，探讨使用2D单层标注还是3D全容积标注的争议，寻找更高效且准确的影像组学分析方法。
AI.method: 纳入多中心539例胃癌患者，按训练和验证队列划分，分别从放射科医生标注的2D/3D感兴趣区提取特征，构建六种机器学习模型（对应三个任务），并进行不同重采样间距的辅助实验。
AI.result: 2D模型在三个任务中AUC分别为0.712（LNM）、0.677（LVI）、0.840（pT），均优于或接近3D模型（AUC 0.680、0.615、0.813）。辅助实验显示2D模型在不同重采样间距下更具优势。
AI.conclusion: 2D影像组学特征构建的模型在胃癌表征中表现与3D相当，且因标注效率高更适合作为优选方案。

search_text: 2D and 3D CT Radiomic Features Performance Comparison in Characterization of Gastric Cancer: A Multi-center Study 2D 和 3D CT 放射组学特征在胃癌表征中的性能比较：一项多中心研究 Objective: Radiomics, an emerging tool for medical image analysis, is potential towards precisely characterizing gastric cancer (GC). Whether using one-slice 2D annotation or whole-volume 3D annotation remains a long-time debate, especially for heterogeneous GC. We comprehensively compared 2D and 3D radiomic features' representation and discrimination capacity regarding GC, via three tasks. Methods: Four-center 539 GC patients were retrospectively enrolled and divided into the training and validation cohorts. From 2D or 3D regions of interest (ROIs) annotated by radiologists, radiomic features were extracted respectively. Feature selection and model construction procedures were customed for each combination of two modalities (2D or 3D) and three tasks. Subsequently, six machine learning models (Model_2D^LNM, Model_3D^LNM; Model_2D^LVI, Model_3D^LVI; Model_2D^pT, Model_3D^pT) were derived and evaluated to reflect modalities' performances in characterizing GC. Furthermore, we performed an auxiliary experiment to assess modalities' performances when resampling spacing is different. Results: Regarding three tasks, the yielded areas under the curve (AUCs) were: Model_2D^LNM's 0.712 (95% confidence interval, 0.613-0.811), Model_3D^LNM's 0.680 (0.584-0.775); Model_2D^LVI's 0.677 (0.595-0.761), Model_3D^LVI's 0.615 (0.528-0.703); Model_2D^pT's 0.840 (0.779-0.901), Model_3D^pT's 0.813 (0.747-0.879). Moreover, the auxiliary experiment indicated that Models_2D are statistically more advantageous than Models3D with different resampling spacings. Conclusion: Models constructed with 2D radiomic features revealed comparable performances with those constructed with 3D features in characterizing GC. Significance: Our work indicated that time-saving 2D annotation would be the better choice in GC, and provided a related reference to further radiomics-based researches. 目的：放射组学是一种新兴的医学图像分析工具，具有精确表征胃癌（GC）的潜力。使用单切片 2D 注释还是全体积 3D 注释仍然是一个长期争论，特别是对于异构 GC。我们通过三个任务全面比较了 2D 和 3D 放射组学特征在 GC 方面的表示和辨别能力。方法：回顾性纳入四中心 539 名 GC 患者，并将其分为训练组和验证组。从放射科医生注释的 2D 或 3D 感兴趣区域 (ROI) 中，分别提取放射组学特征。为两种模式（2D 或 3D）和三种任务的每种组合定制特征选择和模型构建程序。随后，推导并评估了六个机器学习模型（Model_2D^LNM、Model_3D^LNM；Model_2D^LVI、Model_3D^LVI；Model_2D^pT、Model_3D^pT），以反映模态在表征GC方面的性能。此外，我们进行了辅助实验来评估重采样间距不同时模态的性能。结果：对于三个任务，曲线下面积（AUC）为：Model_2D^LNM 的 0.712（95% 置信区间，0.613-0.811）、Model_3D^LNM 的 0.680（0.584-0.775）； Model_2D^LVI 的 0.677 (0.595-0.761)，Model_3D^LVI 的 0.615 (0.528-0.703)； Model_2D^pT 为 0.840 (0.779-0.901)，Model_3D^pT 为 0.813 (0.747-0.879)。此外，辅助实验表明，在不同重采样间隔下，Models_2D 在统计上比 Models3D 更有优势。结论：使用 2D 放射组学特征构建的模型在表征 GC 方面表现出与使用 3D 特征构建的模型相当的性能。意义：我们的工作表明，节省时间的二维注释将是GC中更好的选择，并为进一步的放射组学研究提供了相关参考。 本文比较了2D和3D CT影像组学特征在胃癌表征中的性能差异，通过三个任务评估其表现。 Lingwei Meng,Di Dong,Xin Chen,Mengjie Fang,Rongpin Wang,Jing Li,Zaiyi Liu,Jie Tian eess.IV,cs.CV,eess.SP,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Zhe Li,Man-Wai Mak
title: Speaker Representation Learning via Contrastive Loss with Maximal Speaker Separability
title_zh: 通过具有最大说话人可分离性的对比损失进行说话人表示学习
comment: Accept by APSIPA ASC 2022, 6 pages, 2 figures
comments: Accept by APSIPA ASC 2022, 6 pages, 2 figures
abstract: A great challenge in speaker representation learning using deep models is to design learning objectives that can enhance the discrimination of unseen speakers under unseen domains. This work proposes a supervised contrastive learning objective to learn a speaker embedding space by effectively leveraging the label information in the training data. In such a space, utterance pairs spoken by the same or similar speakers will stay close, while utterance pairs spoken by different speakers will be far apart. For each training speaker, we perform random data augmentation on their utterances to form positive pairs, and utterances from different speakers form negative pairs. To maximize speaker separability in the embedding space, we incorporate the additive angular-margin loss into the contrastive learning objective. Experimental results on CN-Celeb show that this new learning objective can cause ECAPA-TDNN to find an embedding space that exhibits great speaker discrimination. The contrastive learning objective is easy to implement, and we provide PyTorch code at https://github.com/shanmon110/AAMSupCon.
summary: A great challenge in speaker representation learning using deep models is to design learning objectives that can enhance the discrimination of unseen speakers under unseen domains. This work proposes a supervised contrastive learning objective to learn a speaker embedding space by effectively leveraging the label information in the training data. In such a space, utterance pairs spoken by the same or similar speakers will stay close, while utterance pairs spoken by different speakers will be far apart. For each training speaker, we perform random data augmentation on their utterances to form positive pairs, and utterances from different speakers form negative pairs. To maximize speaker separability in the embedding space, we incorporate the additive angular-margin loss into the contrastive learning objective. Experimental results on CN-Celeb show that this new learning objective can cause ECAPA-TDNN to find an embedding space that exhibits great speaker discrimination. The contrastive learning objective is easy to implement, and we provide PyTorch code at https://github.com/shanmon110/AAMSupCon.
abstract_zh: 使用深度模型进行说话人表示学习的一个巨大挑战是设计能够增强对未见过的领域中未见过的说话人的辨别力的学习目标。这项工作提出了一种监督对比学习目标，通过有效利用训练数据中的标签信息来学习说话者嵌入空间。在这样的空间中，由相同或相似的说话者说出的话语对将保持接近，而由不同说话者说出的话语对将相距很远。对于每个训练说话者，我们对其话语进行随机数据增强以形成正对，来自不同说话者的话语形成负对。为了最大化嵌入空间中说话人的可分离性，我们将加性角度裕度损失纳入对比学习目标中。 CN-Celeb 上的实验结果表明，这个新的学习目标可以使 ECAPA-TDNN 找到一个表现出良好说话人辨别能力的嵌入空间。对比学习目标很容易实现，我们在 https://github.com/shanmon110/AAMSupCon 提供了 PyTorch 代码。

AI.tldr: 通过对比损失与最大说话人分离性进行说话人表示学习
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型在未见领域下难以有效区分未见说话人，需设计增强区分度的学习目标
AI.method: 结合有监督对比学习与加性角度边距损失，利用数据增强生成正负样本对以最大化说话人分离度
AI.result: 在CN-Celeb数据集上，ECAPA-TDNN展现出色说话人区分能力，方法实现简单并提供代码
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升说话人嵌入区分度，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Huimin Xiong,Kunle Li,Kaiyuan Tan,Yang Feng,Joey Tianyi Zhou,Jin Hao,Zuozhu Liu
title: TFormer: 3D Tooth Segmentation in Mesh Scans with Geometry Guided Transformer
title_zh: TFormer：使用几何引导变压器进行网格扫描中的 3D 牙齿分割
abstract: Optical Intra-oral Scanners (IOS) are widely used in digital dentistry, providing 3-Dimensional (3D) and high-resolution geometrical information of dental crowns and the gingiva. Accurate 3D tooth segmentation, which aims to precisely delineate the tooth and gingiva instances in IOS, plays a critical role in a variety of dental applications. However, segmentation performance of previous methods are error-prone in complicated tooth-tooth or tooth-gingiva boundaries, and usually exhibit unsatisfactory results across various patients, yet the clinically applicability is not verified with large-scale dataset. In this paper, we propose a novel method based on 3D transformer architectures that is evaluated with large-scale and high-resolution 3D IOS datasets. Our method, termed TFormer, captures both local and global dependencies among different teeth to distinguish various types of teeth with divergent anatomical structures and confusing boundaries. Moreover, we design a geometry guided loss based on a novel point curvature to exploit boundary geometric features, which helps refine the boundary predictions for more accurate and smooth segmentation. We further employ a multi-task learning scheme, where an additional teeth-gingiva segmentation head is introduced to improve the performance. Extensive experimental results in a large-scale dataset with 16,000 IOS, the largest IOS dataset to our best knowledge, demonstrate that our TFormer can surpass existing state-of-the-art baselines with a large margin, with its utility in real-world scenarios verified by a clinical applicability test.
summary: Optical Intra-oral Scanners (IOS) are widely used in digital dentistry, providing 3-Dimensional (3D) and high-resolution geometrical information of dental crowns and the gingiva. Accurate 3D tooth segmentation, which aims to precisely delineate the tooth and gingiva instances in IOS, plays a critical role in a variety of dental applications. However, segmentation performance of previous methods are error-prone in complicated tooth-tooth or tooth-gingiva boundaries, and usually exhibit unsatisfactory results across various patients, yet the clinically applicability is not verified with large-scale dataset. In this paper, we propose a novel method based on 3D transformer architectures that is evaluated with large-scale and high-resolution 3D IOS datasets. Our method, termed TFormer, captures both local and global dependencies among different teeth to distinguish various types of teeth with divergent anatomical structures and confusing boundaries. Moreover, we design a geometry guided loss based on a novel point curvature to exploit boundary geometric features, which helps refine the boundary predictions for more accurate and smooth segmentation. We further employ a multi-task learning scheme, where an additional teeth-gingiva segmentation head is introduced to improve the performance. Extensive experimental results in a large-scale dataset with 16,000 IOS, the largest IOS dataset to our best knowledge, demonstrate that our TFormer can surpass existing state-of-the-art baselines with a large margin, with its utility in real-world scenarios verified by a clinical applicability test.
abstract_zh: 光学口内扫描仪 (IOS) 广泛应用于数字牙科，提供牙冠和牙龈的 3 维 (3D) 和高分辨率几何信息。准确的 3D 牙齿分割旨在在 IOS 中精确描绘牙齿和牙龈实例，在各种牙科应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，先前方法的分割性能在复杂的牙齿-牙齿或牙齿-牙龈边界上容易出错，并且通常在不同患者中表现出不令人满意的结果，但临床适用性尚未得到大规模数据集的验证。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 3D Transformer 架构的新颖方法，该方法使用大规模、高分辨率 3D IOS 数据集进行评估。我们的方法称为 TFormer，捕获不同牙齿之间的局部和全局依赖性，以区分具有不同解剖结构和令人困惑的边界的各种类型的牙齿。此外，我们设计了一种基于新颖点曲率的几何引导损失来利用边界几何特征，这有助于细化边界预测以实现更准确和平滑的分割。我们进一步采用多任务学习方案，其中引入了额外的牙齿牙龈分割头以提高性能。在包含 16,000 个 IOS 的大型数据集（据我们所知最大的 IOS 数据集）中进行的大量实验结果表明，我们的 TFormer 可以大幅度超越现有的最先进的基线，其在现实场景中的实用性已通过临床适用性测试得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于三维Transformer架构的TFormer方法，用于在高分辨率的光学内窥扫描数据中实现精准的牙齿和牙龈分割。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂牙齿边界和牙龈区域分割时存在误差，且缺乏大规模临床数据集的验证，亟需更精确且具有临床适用性的分割方案。
AI.method: 设计几何引导的Transformer模型，结合点曲率损失函数捕捉边界特征，并引入多任务学习框架增强牙齿-牙龈分割性能。
AI.result: 在包含16,000个IOS数据的大型数据集上显著超越现有方法，临床适用性测试验证了其实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: TFormer通过全局依赖建模与几何特征优化，在复杂边界分割任务中表现出色，为数字牙科提供了可靠的技术支持。

search_text: TFormer: 3D Tooth Segmentation in Mesh Scans with Geometry Guided Transformer TFormer：使用几何引导变压器进行网格扫描中的 3D 牙齿分割 Optical Intra-oral Scanners (IOS) are widely used in digital dentistry, providing 3-Dimensional (3D) and high-resolution geometrical information of dental crowns and the gingiva. Accurate 3D tooth segmentation, which aims to precisely delineate the tooth and gingiva instances in IOS, plays a critical role in a variety of dental applications. However, segmentation performance of previous methods are error-prone in complicated tooth-tooth or tooth-gingiva boundaries, and usually exhibit unsatisfactory results across various patients, yet the clinically applicability is not verified with large-scale dataset. In this paper, we propose a novel method based on 3D transformer architectures that is evaluated with large-scale and high-resolution 3D IOS datasets. Our method, termed TFormer, captures both local and global dependencies among different teeth to distinguish various types of teeth with divergent anatomical structures and confusing boundaries. Moreover, we design a geometry guided loss based on a novel point curvature to exploit boundary geometric features, which helps refine the boundary predictions for more accurate and smooth segmentation. We further employ a multi-task learning scheme, where an additional teeth-gingiva segmentation head is introduced to improve the performance. Extensive experimental results in a large-scale dataset with 16,000 IOS, the largest IOS dataset to our best knowledge, demonstrate that our TFormer can surpass existing state-of-the-art baselines with a large margin, with its utility in real-world scenarios verified by a clinical applicability test. 光学口内扫描仪 (IOS) 广泛应用于数字牙科，提供牙冠和牙龈的 3 维 (3D) 和高分辨率几何信息。准确的 3D 牙齿分割旨在在 IOS 中精确描绘牙齿和牙龈实例，在各种牙科应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，先前方法的分割性能在复杂的牙齿-牙齿或牙齿-牙龈边界上容易出错，并且通常在不同患者中表现出不令人满意的结果，但临床适用性尚未得到大规模数据集的验证。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 3D Transformer 架构的新颖方法，该方法使用大规模、高分辨率 3D IOS 数据集进行评估。我们的方法称为 TFormer，捕获不同牙齿之间的局部和全局依赖性，以区分具有不同解剖结构和令人困惑的边界的各种类型的牙齿。此外，我们设计了一种基于新颖点曲率的几何引导损失来利用边界几何特征，这有助于细化边界预测以实现更准确和平滑的分割。我们进一步采用多任务学习方案，其中引入了额外的牙齿牙龈分割头以提高性能。在包含 16,000 个 IOS 的大型数据集（据我们所知最大的 IOS 数据集）中进行的大量实验结果表明，我们的 TFormer 可以大幅度超越现有的最先进的基线，其在现实场景中的实用性已通过临床适用性测试得到验证。 本文提出了一种基于三维Transformer架构的TFormer方法，用于在高分辨率的光学内窥扫描数据中实现精准的牙齿和牙龈分割。 Huimin Xiong,Kunle Li,Kaiyuan Tan,Yang Feng,Joey Tianyi Zhou,Jin Hao,Zuozhu Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Zhe Li,Man-Wai Mak,Helen Mei-Ling Meng
title: Discriminative Speaker Representation via Contrastive Learning with Class-Aware Attention in Angular Space
title_zh: 通过角度空间中的类感知注意力的对比学习进行有区别的说话人表示
abstract: The challenges in applying contrastive learning to speaker verification (SV) are that the softmax-based contrastive loss lacks discriminative power and that the hard negative pairs can easily influence learning. To overcome the first challenge, we propose a contrastive learning SV framework incorporating an additive angular margin into the supervised contrastive loss in which the margin improves the speaker representation's discrimination ability. For the second challenge, we introduce a class-aware attention mechanism through which hard negative samples contribute less significantly to the supervised contrastive loss. We also employed gradient-based multi-objective optimization to balance the classification and contrastive loss. Experimental results on CN-Celeb and Voxceleb1 show that this new learning objective can cause the encoder to find an embedding space that exhibits great speaker discrimination across languages.
summary: The challenges in applying contrastive learning to speaker verification (SV) are that the softmax-based contrastive loss lacks discriminative power and that the hard negative pairs can easily influence learning. To overcome the first challenge, we propose a contrastive learning SV framework incorporating an additive angular margin into the supervised contrastive loss in which the margin improves the speaker representation's discrimination ability. For the second challenge, we introduce a class-aware attention mechanism through which hard negative samples contribute less significantly to the supervised contrastive loss. We also employed gradient-based multi-objective optimization to balance the classification and contrastive loss. Experimental results on CN-Celeb and Voxceleb1 show that this new learning objective can cause the encoder to find an embedding space that exhibits great speaker discrimination across languages.
abstract_zh: 将对比学习应用于说话人验证（SV）的挑战是基于 softmax 的对比损失缺乏判别力，并且硬负对很容易影响学习。为了克服第一个挑战，我们提出了一种对比学习 SV 框架，将加性角度裕度合并到监督对比损失中，其中裕度提高了说话者表示的辨别能力。对于第二个挑战，我们引入了一种类感知注意机制，通过该机制，硬负样本对监督对比损失的贡献较小。我们还采用基于梯度的多目标优化来平衡分类和对比损失。 CN-Celeb 和 Voxceleb1 上的实验结果表明，这个新的学习目标可以使编码器找到一个嵌入空间，该空间在不同语言之间表现出良好的说话人辨别能力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合角度边距和类别感知注意力的对比学习框架，以提升说话人验证中的判别能力
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习在说话人验证中因损失函数判别力不足及难负样本干扰导致效果受限
AI.method: 在监督对比损失中引入加性角度边距增强判别性，结合类别感知注意力机制降低难负样本影响，并采用梯度优化平衡分类与对比损失
AI.result: 在CN-Celeb和Voxceleb1数据集上验证，新方法显著提升了跨语言说话人识别的判别能力
AI.conclusion: 通过优化对比学习框架和注意力机制，有效解决了说话人验证中的判别性不足问题，实现了跨语言的高判别性嵌入空间

authors_text: Abhijeet Awasthi,Ashutosh Sathe,Sunita Sarawagi
title: Diverse Parallel Data Synthesis for Cross-Database Adaptation of Text-to-SQL Parsers
title_zh: 用于文本到 SQL 解析器跨数据库适配的多种并行数据合成
abstract: Text-to-SQL parsers typically struggle with databases unseen during the train time. Adapting parsers to new databases is a challenging problem due to the lack of natural language queries in the new schemas. We present ReFill, a framework for synthesizing high-quality and textually diverse parallel datasets for adapting a Text-to-SQL parser to a target schema. ReFill learns to retrieve-and-edit text queries from the existing schemas and transfers them to the target schema. We show that retrieving diverse existing text, masking their schema-specific tokens, and refilling with tokens relevant to the target schema, leads to significantly more diverse text queries than achievable by standard SQL-to-Text generation methods. Through experiments spanning multiple databases, we demonstrate that fine-tuning parsers on datasets synthesized using ReFill consistently outperforms the prior data-augmentation methods.
summary: Text-to-SQL parsers typically struggle with databases unseen during the train time. Adapting parsers to new databases is a challenging problem due to the lack of natural language queries in the new schemas. We present ReFill, a framework for synthesizing high-quality and textually diverse parallel datasets for adapting a Text-to-SQL parser to a target schema. ReFill learns to retrieve-and-edit text queries from the existing schemas and transfers them to the target schema. We show that retrieving diverse existing text, masking their schema-specific tokens, and refilling with tokens relevant to the target schema, leads to significantly more diverse text queries than achievable by standard SQL-to-Text generation methods. Through experiments spanning multiple databases, we demonstrate that fine-tuning parsers on datasets synthesized using ReFill consistently outperforms the prior data-augmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 文本到 SQL 解析器通常会处理训练期间看不见的数据库。由于新模式中缺乏自然语言查询，使解析器适应新数据库是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们提出了 ReFill，一个用于合成高质量和文本多样化并行数据集的框架，用于使文本到 SQL 解析器适应目标模式。 ReFill 学习从现有架构中检索和编辑文本查询，并将它们传输到目标架构。我们表明，检索不同的现有文本、屏蔽其特定于模式的标记并重新填充与目标模式相关的标记，会导致比标准 SQL 到文本生成方法可实现的文本查询更加多样化。通过跨越多个数据库的实验，我们证明了使用 ReFill 合成的数据集上的微调解析器始终优于先前的数据增强方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReFill框架，通过合成多样化平行数据集解决Text-to-SQL解析器在跨数据库适应中的数据不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL解析器难以适应新数据库，因缺乏目标模式的自然语言查询数据，传统方法生成的文本多样性不足。
AI.method: ReFill通过检索现有模式文本、掩码模式相关标记并替换为目标模式相关标记，生成高质量且文本多样的平行数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于ReFill合成数据微调的解析器在多个数据库上性能优于传统数据增强方法。
AI.conclusion: ReFill通过生成多样化合成数据有效提升解析器跨数据库适应能力，为数据稀缺场景提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Mine Kerpicci,Van Nguyen,Shuhua Zhang,Erik Visser
title: Application of Knowledge Distillation to Multi-task Speech Representation Learning
title_zh: 知识蒸馏在多任务语音表示学习中的应用
comment: Speech representation learning, multi-task training, wav2vec, HuBERT, knowledge distillation
comments: Speech representation learning, multi-task training, wav2vec, HuBERT, knowledge distillation
abstract: Model architectures such as wav2vec 2.0 and HuBERT have been proposed to learn speech representations from audio waveforms in a self-supervised manner. When they are combined with downstream tasks such as keyword spotting and speaker verification, they provide state-of-the-art performance. However, these models use a large number of parameters, the smallest version of which has 95 million parameters. This constitutes a challenge for edge AI device deployments. In this paper, we investigate the application of knowledge distillation to speech representation learning (SRL) models followed by joint fine-tuning with multiple downstream voice-activated tasks. In our experiments on two such tasks, our approach results in nearly 75% reduction in model size while suffering only 0.1% accuracy and 0.9% equal error rate degradation compared to the full-size model. In addition, we show that fine-tuning the SRL models results in a significant performance boost compared to using frozen SRL models.
summary: Model architectures such as wav2vec 2.0 and HuBERT have been proposed to learn speech representations from audio waveforms in a self-supervised manner. When they are combined with downstream tasks such as keyword spotting and speaker verification, they provide state-of-the-art performance. However, these models use a large number of parameters, the smallest version of which has 95 million parameters. This constitutes a challenge for edge AI device deployments. In this paper, we investigate the application of knowledge distillation to speech representation learning (SRL) models followed by joint fine-tuning with multiple downstream voice-activated tasks. In our experiments on two such tasks, our approach results in nearly 75% reduction in model size while suffering only 0.1% accuracy and 0.9% equal error rate degradation compared to the full-size model. In addition, we show that fine-tuning the SRL models results in a significant performance boost compared to using frozen SRL models.
abstract_zh: 人们提出了诸如 wav2vec 2.0 和 HuBERT 之类的模型架构，以自监督的方式从音频波形中学习语音表示。当它们与关键字识别和说话人验证等下游任务相结合时，它们可以提供最先进的性能。然而，这些模型使用了大量的参数，最小的版本有 9500 万个参数。这对边缘人工智能设备的部署构成了挑战。在本文中，我们研究了知识蒸馏在语音表示学习（SRL）模型中的应用，然后与多个下游语音激活任务进行联合微调。在我们对两项此类任务的实验中，与全尺寸模型相比，我们的方法使模型尺寸减少了近 75%，而准确率仅下降了 0.1%，等错误率下降了 0.9%。此外，我们还表明，与使用冻结的 SRL 模型相比，微调 SRL 模型可以显着提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了知识蒸馏在多任务语音表征学习中的应用，以减小模型规模并保持较高的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的语音表征学习模型如wav2vec 2.0和HuBERT参数量较大，难以部署在边缘AI设备上，因此需要寻找更轻量的解决方案。
AI.method: 作者采用知识蒸馏方法对语音表征学习模型进行压缩，并结合多任务下游任务进行联合微调。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在模型规模上减少了近75%，同时仅损失了0.1%的准确率和0.9%的等错误率。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏结合多任务微调可以有效减小模型规模，同时保持较高的性能，适用于边缘设备部署。

authors_text: Peter Belcak,Roger Wattenhofer
title: Neural Combinatorial Logic Circuit Synthesis from Input-Output Examples
title_zh: 从输入输出示例进行神经组合逻辑电路综合
comment: Accepted to the 2nd Workshop on Math-AI (MATH-AI@NeurIPS'22). 10 pages, 1 figure
comments: Accepted to the 2nd Workshop on Math-AI (MATH-AI@NeurIPS'22). 10 pages, 1 figure
abstract: We propose a novel, fully explainable neural approach to synthesis of combinatorial logic circuits from input-output examples. The carrying advantage of our method is that it readily extends to inductive scenarios, where the set of examples is incomplete but still indicative of the desired behaviour. Our method can be employed for a virtually arbitrary choice of atoms - from logic gates to FPGA blocks - as long as they can be formulated in a differentiable fashion, and consistently yields good results for synthesis of practical circuits of increasing size. In particular, we succeed in learning a number of arithmetic, bitwise, and signal-routing operations, and even generalise towards the correct behaviour in inductive scenarios. Our method, attacking a discrete logical synthesis problem with an explainable neural approach, hints at a wider promise for synthesis and reasoning-related tasks.
summary: We propose a novel, fully explainable neural approach to synthesis of combinatorial logic circuits from input-output examples. The carrying advantage of our method is that it readily extends to inductive scenarios, where the set of examples is incomplete but still indicative of the desired behaviour. Our method can be employed for a virtually arbitrary choice of atoms - from logic gates to FPGA blocks - as long as they can be formulated in a differentiable fashion, and consistently yields good results for synthesis of practical circuits of increasing size. In particular, we succeed in learning a number of arithmetic, bitwise, and signal-routing operations, and even generalise towards the correct behaviour in inductive scenarios. Our method, attacking a discrete logical synthesis problem with an explainable neural approach, hints at a wider promise for synthesis and reasoning-related tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的、完全可解释的神经方法，用于从输入输出示例合成组合逻辑电路。我们的方法的优势在于，它很容易扩展到归纳场景，其中示例集不完整，但仍然表明了所需的行为。我们的方法可以用于几乎任意的原子选择——从逻辑门到FPGA块——只要它们可以以可微分的方式表达，并且在合成尺寸不断增加的实际电路时始终产生良好的结果。特别是，我们成功地学习了许多算术、按位和信号路由操作，甚至概括了归纳场景中的正确行为。我们的方法用可解释的神经方法来解决离散逻辑综合问题，这暗示了综合和推理相关任务的更广泛前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的可解释方法，从输入输出示例中合成组合逻辑电路，并能处理不完整数据集的归纳场景。
AI.motivation: 传统逻辑电路综合方法难以处理不完整示例集，且缺乏可解释性，需探索神经网络在离散逻辑问题中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用可微分神经网络框架，支持逻辑门到FPGA模块等任意原子结构，通过输入输出示例训练模型并生成可解释的电路设计。
AI.result: 成功合成算术、位操作及信号路由电路，在归纳场景中实现正确行为推广，且适用于不同规模的实用电路。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明神经网络可有效解决离散逻辑综合问题，为自动化设计与推理任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Tsukasa Kusakabe,Sho Sakaino,Toshiaki Tsuji
title: Design of non-diagonal stiffness matrix for assembly task
title_zh: 用于装配任务的非对角刚度矩阵设计
abstract: Compliance control is an increasingly employed technique used in the robotic field. It is known that various mechanical properties can be reproduced depending on the design of the stiffness matrix, but the design theory that takes advantage of this high degree of design freedom has not been elucidated. This paper, therefore, discusses the non-diagonal elements of the stiffness matrix. We proposed a design method according to the conditions required for achieving stable motion. Additionally, we analyzed the displacement induced by the non-diagonal elements in response to an external force and found that to obtain stable contact with a symmetric matrix, the matrix should be positive definite, i.e., all eigenvalues must be positive, however its parameter design is complicated. In this study, we focused on the use of asymmetric matrices in compliance control and showed that the design of eigenvalues can be simplified by using a triangular matrix. This approach expands the range of the stiffness design and enhances the ability of the compliance control to induce motion. We conducted experiments using the stiffness matrix and confirmed that assembly could be achieved without complicated trajectory planning.
summary: Compliance control is an increasingly employed technique used in the robotic field. It is known that various mechanical properties can be reproduced depending on the design of the stiffness matrix, but the design theory that takes advantage of this high degree of design freedom has not been elucidated. This paper, therefore, discusses the non-diagonal elements of the stiffness matrix. We proposed a design method according to the conditions required for achieving stable motion. Additionally, we analyzed the displacement induced by the non-diagonal elements in response to an external force and found that to obtain stable contact with a symmetric matrix, the matrix should be positive definite, i.e., all eigenvalues must be positive, however its parameter design is complicated. In this study, we focused on the use of asymmetric matrices in compliance control and showed that the design of eigenvalues can be simplified by using a triangular matrix. This approach expands the range of the stiffness design and enhances the ability of the compliance control to induce motion. We conducted experiments using the stiffness matrix and confirmed that assembly could be achieved without complicated trajectory planning.
abstract_zh: 顺从控制是机器人领域越来越多采用的技术。众所周知，根据刚度矩阵的设计可以再现各种机械性能，但利用这种高设计自由度的设计理论尚未阐明。因此，本文讨论刚度矩阵的非对角元素。我们根据实现稳定运动所需的条件提出了一种设计方法。另外，我们分析了非对角单元响应外力引起的位移，发现为了获得与对称矩阵的稳定接触，矩阵应该是正定的，即所有特征值必须为正，但其参数设计比较复杂。在本研究中，我们重点关注非对称矩阵在柔量控制中的使用，并表明可以通过使用三角矩阵来简化特征值的设计。这种方法扩大了刚度设计的范围，并增强了柔顺控制引起运动的能力。我们使用刚度矩阵进行了实验，并证实无需复杂的轨迹规划即可实现组装。

AI.tldr: 设计非对角刚度矩阵以提升装配任务中的顺从控制性能
AI.motivation: 现有刚度矩阵设计理论未充分挖掘非对角元素潜力，对称矩阵参数设计复杂且难以保证稳定性
AI.method: 提出基于稳定运动条件的非对角元素设计方法，通过三角矩阵简化特征值设计并验证装配可行性
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可在无需复杂轨迹规划的情况下实现稳定装配
AI.conclusion: 非对称矩阵设计有效简化参数配置，扩展了顺从控制的运动诱导能力

motivation: 现有刚度矩阵设计理论未充分挖掘非对角元素潜力，对称矩阵参数设计复杂且难以保证稳定性
method: 提出基于稳定运动条件的非对角元素设计方法，通过三角矩阵简化特征值设计并验证装配可行性
result: 实验表明该方法可在无需复杂轨迹规划的情况下实现稳定装配
conclusion: 非对称矩阵设计有效简化参数配置，扩展了顺从控制的运动诱导能力
search_text: Design of non-diagonal stiffness matrix for assembly task 用于装配任务的非对角刚度矩阵设计 Compliance control is an increasingly employed technique used in the robotic field. It is known that various mechanical properties can be reproduced depending on the design of the stiffness matrix, but the design theory that takes advantage of this high degree of design freedom has not been elucidated. This paper, therefore, discusses the non-diagonal elements of the stiffness matrix. We proposed a design method according to the conditions required for achieving stable motion. Additionally, we analyzed the displacement induced by the non-diagonal elements in response to an external force and found that to obtain stable contact with a symmetric matrix, the matrix should be positive definite, i.e., all eigenvalues must be positive, however its parameter design is complicated. In this study, we focused on the use of asymmetric matrices in compliance control and showed that the design of eigenvalues can be simplified by using a triangular matrix. This approach expands the range of the stiffness design and enhances the ability of the compliance control to induce motion. We conducted experiments using the stiffness matrix and confirmed that assembly could be achieved without complicated trajectory planning. 顺从控制是机器人领域越来越多采用的技术。众所周知，根据刚度矩阵的设计可以再现各种机械性能，但利用这种高设计自由度的设计理论尚未阐明。因此，本文讨论刚度矩阵的非对角元素。我们根据实现稳定运动所需的条件提出了一种设计方法。另外，我们分析了非对角单元响应外力引起的位移，发现为了获得与对称矩阵的稳定接触，矩阵应该是正定的，即所有特征值必须为正，但其参数设计比较复杂。在本研究中，我们重点关注非对称矩阵在柔量控制中的使用，并表明可以通过使用三角矩阵来简化特征值的设计。这种方法扩大了刚度设计的范围，并增强了柔顺控制引起运动的能力。我们使用刚度矩阵进行了实验，并证实无需复杂的轨迹规划即可实现组装。 设计非对角刚度矩阵以提升装配任务中的顺从控制性能 Tsukasa Kusakabe,Sho Sakaino,Toshiaki Tsuji cs.RO

authors_text: Yifang Qin,Yifan Wang,Fang Sun,Wei Ju,Xuyang Hou,Zhe Wang,Jia Cheng,Jun Lei,Ming Zhang
title: DisenPOI: Disentangling Sequential and Geographical Influence for Point-of-Interest Recommendation
title_zh: DisenPOI：解开兴趣点推荐的顺序和地理影响
comment: Accepted by ACM International Conference on Web Search and Data Mining (WSDM'23)
comments: Accepted by ACM International Conference on Web Search and Data Mining (WSDM'23)
abstract: Point-of-Interest (POI) recommendation plays a vital role in various location-aware services. It has been observed that POI recommendation is driven by both sequential and geographical influences. However, since there is no annotated label of the dominant influence during recommendation, existing methods tend to entangle these two influences, which may lead to sub-optimal recommendation performance and poor interpretability. In this paper, we address the above challenge by proposing DisenPOI, a novel Disentangled dual-graph framework for POI recommendation, which jointly utilizes sequential and geographical relationships on two separate graphs and disentangles the two influences with self-supervision. The key novelty of our model compared with existing approaches is to extract disentangled representations of both sequential and geographical influences with contrastive learning. To be specific, we construct a geographical graph and a sequential graph based on the check-in sequence of a user. We tailor their propagation schemes to become sequence-/geo-aware to better capture the corresponding influences. Preference proxies are extracted from check-in sequence as pseudo labels for the two influences, which supervise the disentanglement via a contrastive loss. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model.

It has been observed that POI recommendation is driven by both sequential and geographical influences. In this paper, we address the above challenge by proposing DisenPOI, a novel Disentangled dual-graph framework for POI recommendation, which jointly utilizes sequential and geographical relationships on two separate graphs and disentangles the two influences with self-supervision. The key novelty of our model compared with existing approaches is to extract disentangled representations of both sequential and geographical influences with contrastive learning. To be specific, we construct a geographical graph and a sequential graph based on the check-in sequence of a user. We tailor their propagation schemes to become sequence-/geo-aware to better capture the corresponding influences. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 兴趣点（POI）推荐在各种位置感知服务中发挥着至关重要的作用。据观察，POI 推荐受到顺序和地理影响的驱动。然而，由于在推荐过程中没有对主导影响进行标注，现有的方法往往将这两种影响纠缠在一起，这可能会导致推荐性能次优和可解释性差。在本文中，我们通过提出 DisenPOI 来解决上述挑战，这是一种新颖的用于 POI 推荐的解缠结双图框架，它联合利用两个独立图上的顺序关系和地理关系，并通过自我监督来解开这两种影响。与现有方法相比，我们的模型的关键新颖之处在于通过对比学习提取顺序和地理影响的解开表示。具体来说，我们根据用户的签到顺序构建了一个地理图和一个时序图。我们定制他们的传播方案，使其具有序列/地理意识，以更好地捕获相应的影响。从签入序列中提取偏好代理作为两种影响的伪标签，通过对比损失来监督解开。对三个数据集的广泛实验证明了所提出模型的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DisenPOI模型，通过解耦序列和地理影响来改进兴趣点（POI）推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 现有POI推荐方法未能有效区分序列影响与地理影响，导致推荐效果次优且可解释性差。
AI.method: 构建双图框架（地理图与序列图），利用对比学习提取解耦表征，并通过伪标签监督分离两种影响。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验验证了DisenPOI在推荐性能上的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦序列与地理影响能显著提升POI推荐的准确性与可解释性。

authors_text: Zheyang Xiong,Fangshuo Liao,Anastasios Kyrillidis
title: Strong Lottery Ticket Hypothesis with $\varepsilon$--perturbation
title_zh: $\varepsilon$-扰动的强彩票假设
abstract: The strong Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) claims the existence of a subnetwork in a sufficiently large, randomly initialized neural network that approximates some target neural network without the need of training. We extend the theoretical guarantee of the strong LTH literature to a scenario more similar to the original LTH, by generalizing the weight change in the pre-training step to some perturbation around initialization. In particular, we focus on the following open questions: By allowing an $\varepsilon$-scale perturbation on the random initial weights, can we reduce the over-parameterization requirement for the candidate network in the strong LTH? Furthermore, does the weight change by SGD coincide with a good set of such perturbation? We answer the first question by first extending the theoretical result on subset sum to allow perturbation on the candidates. Applying this result to the neural network setting, we show that such $\varepsilon$-perturbation reduces the over-parameterization requirement of the strong LTH. To answer the second question, we show via experiments that the perturbed weight achieved by the projected SGD shows better performance under the strong LTH pruning.
summary: The strong Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) claims the existence of a subnetwork in a sufficiently large, randomly initialized neural network that approximates some target neural network without the need of training. We extend the theoretical guarantee of the strong LTH literature to a scenario more similar to the original LTH, by generalizing the weight change in the pre-training step to some perturbation around initialization. In particular, we focus on the following open questions: By allowing an $\varepsilon$-scale perturbation on the random initial weights, can we reduce the over-parameterization requirement for the candidate network in the strong LTH? Furthermore, does the weight change by SGD coincide with a good set of such perturbation? We answer the first question by first extending the theoretical result on subset sum to allow perturbation on the candidates. Applying this result to the neural network setting, we show that such $\varepsilon$-perturbation reduces the over-parameterization requirement of the strong LTH. To answer the second question, we show via experiments that the perturbed weight achieved by the projected SGD shows better performance under the strong LTH pruning.
abstract_zh: 强彩票假说 (LTH) 声称在足够大的、随机初始化的神经网络中存在子网络，该子网络无需训练即可逼近某个目标神经网络。我们通过将预训练步骤中的权重变化推广到初始化周围的一些扰动，将强大的 LTH 文献的理论保证扩展到更类似于原始 LTH 的场景。特别是，我们关注以下开放性问题：通过允许对随机初始权重进行 $\varepsilon$ 规模的扰动，我们是否可以减少强 LTH 中候选网络的过度参数化要求？此外，SGD 的权重变化是否与一组良好的此类扰动一致？我们通过首先扩展子集和的理论结果来回答第一个问题，以允许对候选者进行扰动。将此结果应用于神经网络设置，我们表明这种 $\varepsilon$ 扰动降低了强 LTH 的过度参数化要求。为了回答第二个问题，我们通过实验表明，预计 SGD 实现的扰动权重在强 LTH 剪枝下表现出更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在强彩票票假设（LTH）框架下，通过引入ε扰动来降低神经网络的过参数化需求，并验证SGD权重变化与扰动的关系。
AI.motivation: 强LTH要求候选网络需高度过参数化，而实际训练中权重变化可能更接近初始化扰动。论文旨在探索扰动对降低过参数化需求的影响，并验证SGD是否生成有效的扰动。
AI.method: 将子集和理论扩展至允许候选权重扰动，结合神经网络设置证明ε扰动可降低过参数化需求；通过实验分析投影SGD生成的扰动在强LTH剪枝中的性能。
AI.result: 理论证明ε扰动可减少强LTH的过参数化需求，实验显示投影SGD的扰动权重在剪枝任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 引入ε扰动可使强LTH在更小网络中实现，且SGD的权重变化与有效扰动一致，为高效网络设计提供理论支持。
