authors_text: Nikolas McNeal,Jennifer Huang,Aniekan Umoren,Shuqi Dai,Roger Dannenberg,Richard Randall,Tai Sing Lee
title: Relating Human Perception of Musicality to Prediction in a Predictive Coding Model
title_zh: 将人类对音乐的感知与预测编码模型中的预测联系起来
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, currently in peer review
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, currently in peer review
abstract: We explore the use of a neural network inspired by predictive coding for modeling human music perception. This network was developed based on the computational neuroscience theory of recurrent interactions in the hierarchical visual cortex. When trained with video data using self-supervised learning, the model manifests behaviors consistent with human visual illusions. Here, we adapt this network to model the hierarchical auditory system and investigate whether it will make similar choices to humans regarding the musicality of a set of random pitch sequences. When the model is trained with a large corpus of instrumental classical music and popular melodies rendered as mel spectrograms, it exhibits greater prediction errors for random pitch sequences that are rated less musical by human subjects. We found that the prediction error depends on the amount of information regarding the subsequent note, the pitch interval, and the temporal context. Our findings suggest that predictability is correlated with human perception of musicality and that a predictive coding neural network trained on music can be used to characterize the features and motifs contributing to human perception of music.
summary: We explore the use of a neural network inspired by predictive coding for modeling human music perception. When the model is trained with a large corpus of instrumental classical music and popular melodies rendered as mel spectrograms, it exhibits greater prediction errors for random pitch sequences that are rated less musical by human subjects. We found that the prediction error depends on the amount of information regarding the subsequent note, the pitch interval, and the temporal context. Our findings suggest that predictability is correlated with human perception of musicality and that a predictive coding neural network trained on music can be used to characterize the features and motifs contributing to human perception of music.
abstract_zh: 我们探索使用受预测编码启发的神经网络来建模人类音乐感知。该网络是基于分层视觉皮层中循环交互的计算神经科学理论开发的。当使用自我监督学习使用视频数据进行训练时，该模型表现出与人类视觉错觉一致的行为。在这里，我们采用该网络来模拟分层听觉系统，并研究它是否会在一组随机音高序列的音乐性方面做出与人类类似的选择。当使用大量器乐古典音乐和呈现为梅尔声谱图的流行旋律对模型进行训练时，它对人类受试者评定的音乐性较差的随机音高序列表现出更大的预测误差。我们发现预测误差取决于有关后续音符、音高间隔和时间上下文的信息量。我们的研究结果表明，可预测性与人类对音乐的感知相关，并且经过音乐训练的预测编码神经网络可用于表征有助于人类对音乐感知的特征和主题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨基于预测编码理论的神经网络模型在音乐感知中的应用，通过分析模型预测误差与人类对随机音高序列音乐性评价的关系，验证可预测性与音乐感知的关联性。
AI.motivation: 通过将视觉皮层预测编码理论迁移至听觉系统，研究音乐感知的神经机制，并探索模型能否量化人类对音乐性的判断标准。
AI.method: 基于自监督学习构建预测编码神经网络，使用古典音乐和流行旋律的梅尔频谱图进行训练，对比模型预测误差与人类对随机音高序列音乐性评分的数据关联性。
AI.result: 模型对人类评价为低音乐性的随机序列产生更大预测误差，且误差受后续音符信息量、音高间隔及时序上下文的影响。
AI.conclusion: 预测编码模型可有效表征音乐性感知的特征与模式，揭示可预测性与人类音乐性判断存在显著相关性。

search_text: Relating Human Perception of Musicality to Prediction in a Predictive Coding Model 将人类对音乐的感知与预测编码模型中的预测联系起来 We explore the use of a neural network inspired by predictive coding for modeling human music perception. This network was developed based on the computational neuroscience theory of recurrent interactions in the hierarchical visual cortex. When trained with video data using self-supervised learning, the model manifests behaviors consistent with human visual illusions. Here, we adapt this network to model the hierarchical auditory system and investigate whether it will make similar choices to humans regarding the musicality of a set of random pitch sequences. When the model is trained with a large corpus of instrumental classical music and popular melodies rendered as mel spectrograms, it exhibits greater prediction errors for random pitch sequences that are rated less musical by human subjects. We found that the prediction error depends on the amount of information regarding the subsequent note, the pitch interval, and the temporal context. Our findings suggest that predictability is correlated with human perception of musicality and that a predictive coding neural network trained on music can be used to characterize the features and motifs contributing to human perception of music. 我们探索使用受预测编码启发的神经网络来建模人类音乐感知。该网络是基于分层视觉皮层中循环交互的计算神经科学理论开发的。当使用自我监督学习使用视频数据进行训练时，该模型表现出与人类视觉错觉一致的行为。在这里，我们采用该网络来模拟分层听觉系统，并研究它是否会在一组随机音高序列的音乐性方面做出与人类类似的选择。当使用大量器乐古典音乐和呈现为梅尔声谱图的流行旋律对模型进行训练时，它对人类受试者评定的音乐性较差的随机音高序列表现出更大的预测误差。我们发现预测误差取决于有关后续音符、音高间隔和时间上下文的信息量。我们的研究结果表明，可预测性与人类对音乐的感知相关，并且经过音乐训练的预测编码神经网络可用于表征有助于人类对音乐感知的特征和主题。 本文探讨基于预测编码理论的神经网络模型在音乐感知中的应用，通过分析模型预测误差与人类对随机音高序列音乐性评价的关系，验证可预测性与音乐感知的关联性。 Nikolas McNeal,Jennifer Huang,Aniekan Umoren,Shuqi Dai,Roger Dannenberg,Richard Randall,Tai Sing Lee cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Jinning Li,Shubhanshu Mishra,Ahmed El-Kishky,Sneha Mehta,Vivek Kulkarni
title: NTULM: Enriching Social Media Text Representations with Non-Textual Units
title_zh: NTULM：用非文本单元丰富社交媒体文本表示
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, Accepted to the Proceedings of the Eighth Workshop on Noisy User-generated Text (W-NUT 2022). URL: https://aclanthology.org/2022.wnut-1.7/
comments: 14 pages, 5 figures, Accepted to the Proceedings of the Eighth Workshop on Noisy User-generated Text (W-NUT 2022). URL: https://aclanthology.org/2022.wnut-1.7/
abstract: On social media, additional context is often present in the form of annotations and meta-data such as the post's author, mentions, Hashtags, and hyperlinks. We refer to these annotations as Non-Textual Units (NTUs). We posit that NTUs provide social context beyond their textual semantics and leveraging these units can enrich social media text representations. In this work we construct an NTU-centric social heterogeneous network to co-embed NTUs. We then principally integrate these NTU embeddings into a large pretrained language model by fine-tuning with these additional units. This adds context to noisy short-text social media. Experiments show that utilizing NTU-augmented text representations significantly outperforms existing text-only baselines by 2-5\% relative points on many downstream tasks highlighting the importance of context to social media NLP. We also highlight that including NTU context into the initial layers of language model alongside text is better than using it after the text embedding is generated. Our work leads to the generation of holistic general purpose social media content embedding.
summary: On social media, additional context is often present in the form of annotations and meta-data such as the post's author, mentions, Hashtags, and hyperlinks. We refer to these annotations as Non-Textual Units (NTUs). We posit that NTUs provide social context beyond their textual semantics and leveraging these units can enrich social media text representations. In this work we construct an NTU-centric social heterogeneous network to co-embed NTUs. We then principally integrate these NTU embeddings into a large pretrained language model by fine-tuning with these additional units. This adds context to noisy short-text social media. Experiments show that utilizing NTU-augmented text representations significantly outperforms existing text-only baselines by 2-5\% relative points on many downstream tasks highlighting the importance of context to social media NLP. We also highlight that including NTU context into the initial layers of language model alongside text is better than using it after the text embedding is generated. Our work leads to the generation of holistic general purpose social media content embedding.
abstract_zh: 在社交媒体上，附加上下文通常以注释和元数据的形式存在，例如帖子的作者、提及、主题标签和超链接。我们将这些注释称为非文本单元 (NTU)。我们认为 NTU 提供超出其文本语义的社会背景，并且利用这些单元可以丰富社交媒体文本表示。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个以 NTU 为中心的社会异构网络来共同嵌入 NTU。然后，我们主要通过使用这些附加单元进行微调，将这些 NTU 嵌入集成到大型预训练语言模型中。这为嘈杂的短文本社交媒体添加了背景。实验表明，在许多下游任务中，利用 NTU 增强的文本表示明显优于现有的纯文本基线 2-5% 相对点，这凸显了上下文对社交媒体 NLP 的重要性。我们还强调，将 NTU 上下文与文本一起包含到语言模型的初始层中比在生成文本嵌入后使用它更好。我们的工作导致了整体通用社交媒体内容嵌入的生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NTULM方法，通过整合社交媒体中的非文本单元（如作者、标签、链接）来增强文本表示。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体文本存在噪声且简短，仅依赖文本语义难以捕捉完整上下文，需利用非文本单元（NTUs）补充信息以提升NLP任务效果。
AI.method: 构建以NTU为中心的异构网络进行联合嵌入，并将NTU嵌入通过微调整合至预训练语言模型的早期层中。
AI.result: 在多个下游任务中，NTU增强的文本表示较纯文本基线提升2-5%相对精度，且早期融合NTU效果优于后期添加。
AI.conclusion: 非文本单元能有效丰富社交内容表示，将其与文本早期融合可生成更全面的社交媒体嵌入。

authors_text: Shengchao Chen,Sufen Ren,Guanjun Wang,Mengxing Huang,Chenyang Xue
title: Interpretable CNN-Multilevel Attention Transformer for Rapid Recognition of Pneumonia from Chest X-Ray Images
title_zh: 可解释的 CNN-多级注意力变压器，用于从胸部 X 射线图像快速识别肺炎
comment: Accepted by the IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatic, doi: 10.1109/JBHI.2023.3247949
comments: Accepted by the IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatic, doi: 10.1109/JBHI.2023.3247949
abstract: Chest imaging plays an essential role in diagnosing and predicting patients with COVID-19 with evidence of worsening respiratory status. Many deep learning-based approaches for pneumonia recognition have been developed to enable computer-aided diagnosis. However, the long training and inference time makes them inflexible, and the lack of interpretability reduces their credibility in clinical medical practice. This paper aims to develop a pneumonia recognition framework with interpretability, which can understand the complex relationship between lung features and related diseases in chest X-ray (CXR) images to provide high-speed analytics support for medical practice. To reduce the computational complexity to accelerate the recognition process, a novel multi-level self-attention mechanism within Transformer has been proposed to accelerate convergence and emphasize the task-related feature regions. Moreover, a practical CXR image data augmentation has been adopted to address the scarcity of medical image data problems to boost the model's performance. The effectiveness of the proposed method has been demonstrated on the classic COVID-19 recognition task using the widespread pneumonia CXR image dataset. In addition, abundant ablation experiments validate the effectiveness and necessity of all of the components of the proposed method.
summary: Chest imaging plays an essential role in diagnosing and predicting patients with COVID-19 with evidence of worsening respiratory status. Many deep learning-based approaches for pneumonia recognition have been developed to enable computer-aided diagnosis. However, the long training and inference time makes them inflexible, and the lack of interpretability reduces their credibility in clinical medical practice. This paper aims to develop a pneumonia recognition framework with interpretability, which can understand the complex relationship between lung features and related diseases in chest X-ray (CXR) images to provide high-speed analytics support for medical practice. To reduce the computational complexity to accelerate the recognition process, a novel multi-level self-attention mechanism within Transformer has been proposed to accelerate convergence and emphasize the task-related feature regions. Moreover, a practical CXR image data augmentation has been adopted to address the scarcity of medical image data problems to boost the model's performance. The effectiveness of the proposed method has been demonstrated on the classic COVID-19 recognition task using the widespread pneumonia CXR image dataset. In addition, abundant ablation experiments validate the effectiveness and necessity of all of the components of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 胸部影像学在诊断和预测有呼吸状况恶化证据的 COVID-19 患者中发挥着重要作用。许多基于深度学习的肺炎识别方法已经被开发出来，以实现计算机辅助诊断。然而，较长的训练和推理时间使得它们缺乏灵活性，并且缺乏可解释性降低了它们在临床医疗实践中的可信度。本文旨在开发一种具有可解释性的肺炎识别框架，能够理解胸部X光（CXR）图像中肺部特征与相关疾病之间的复杂关系，为医疗实践提供高速分析支持。为了降低计算复杂度以加速识别过程，Transformer 中提出了一种新颖的多级自注意力机制来加速收敛并强调与任务相关的特征区域。此外，还采用了实用的 CXR 图像数据增强来解决医学图像数据稀缺的问题，以提高模型的性能。该方法的有效性已在使用广泛肺炎 CXR 图像数据集的经典 COVID-19 识别任务中得到证明。此外，大量的消融实验验证了该方法所有组成部分的有效性和必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的CNN-多级注意力Transformer框架，用于加速胸部X光片中的肺炎识别。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在肺炎识别中存在训练推理时间长、可解释性不足的问题，影响临床可信度。
AI.method: 设计多级自注意力机制优化Transformer结构以降低计算复杂度，并采用数据增强技术解决医学图像数据稀缺问题。
AI.result: 在经典COVID-19识别任务中验证了方法有效性，消融实验证实各组件的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过可解释性与高效性结合，为临床肺炎诊断提供了可靠的快速分析支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的CNN-多级注意力Transformer框架，用于加速胸部X光片中的肺炎识别。
ai_content.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在肺炎识别中存在训练推理时间长、可解释性不足的问题，影响临床可信度。
ai_content.method: 设计多级自注意力机制优化Transformer结构以降低计算复杂度，并采用数据增强技术解决医学图像数据稀缺问题。
ai_content.result: 在经典COVID-19识别任务中验证了方法有效性，消融实验证实各组件的必要性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架通过可解释性与高效性结合，为临床肺炎诊断提供了可靠的快速分析支持。

search_text: Interpretable CNN-Multilevel Attention Transformer for Rapid Recognition of Pneumonia from Chest X-Ray Images 可解释的 CNN-多级注意力变压器，用于从胸部 X 射线图像快速识别肺炎 Chest imaging plays an essential role in diagnosing and predicting patients with COVID-19 with evidence of worsening respiratory status. Many deep learning-based approaches for pneumonia recognition have been developed to enable computer-aided diagnosis. However, the long training and inference time makes them inflexible, and the lack of interpretability reduces their credibility in clinical medical practice. This paper aims to develop a pneumonia recognition framework with interpretability, which can understand the complex relationship between lung features and related diseases in chest X-ray (CXR) images to provide high-speed analytics support for medical practice. To reduce the computational complexity to accelerate the recognition process, a novel multi-level self-attention mechanism within Transformer has been proposed to accelerate convergence and emphasize the task-related feature regions. Moreover, a practical CXR image data augmentation has been adopted to address the scarcity of medical image data problems to boost the model's performance. The effectiveness of the proposed method has been demonstrated on the classic COVID-19 recognition task using the widespread pneumonia CXR image dataset. In addition, abundant ablation experiments validate the effectiveness and necessity of all of the components of the proposed method. 胸部影像学在诊断和预测有呼吸状况恶化证据的 COVID-19 患者中发挥着重要作用。许多基于深度学习的肺炎识别方法已经被开发出来，以实现计算机辅助诊断。然而，较长的训练和推理时间使得它们缺乏灵活性，并且缺乏可解释性降低了它们在临床医疗实践中的可信度。本文旨在开发一种具有可解释性的肺炎识别框架，能够理解胸部X光（CXR）图像中肺部特征与相关疾病之间的复杂关系，为医疗实践提供高速分析支持。为了降低计算复杂度以加速识别过程，Transformer 中提出了一种新颖的多级自注意力机制来加速收敛并强调与任务相关的特征区域。此外，还采用了实用的 CXR 图像数据增强来解决医学图像数据稀缺的问题，以提高模型的性能。该方法的有效性已在使用广泛肺炎 CXR 图像数据集的经典 COVID-19 识别任务中得到证明。此外，大量的消融实验验证了该方法所有组成部分的有效性和必要性。 本文提出一种可解释的CNN-多级注意力Transformer框架，用于加速胸部X光片中的肺炎识别。 Shengchao Chen,Sufen Ren,Guanjun Wang,Mengxing Huang,Chenyang Xue eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Bipasha Sen,Aditya Agarwal,Vinay P Namboodiri,C. V. Jawahar
title: INR-V: A Continuous Representation Space for Video-based Generative Tasks
title_zh: INR-V：基于视频的生成任务的连续表示空间
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (10/2022); https://openreview.net/forum?id=aIoEkwc2oB
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (10/2022); https://openreview.net/forum?id=aIoEkwc2oB
abstract: Generating videos is a complex task that is accomplished by generating a set of temporally coherent images frame-by-frame. This limits the expressivity of videos to only image-based operations on the individual video frames needing network designs to obtain temporally coherent trajectories in the underlying image space. We propose INR-V, a video representation network that learns a continuous space for video-based generative tasks. INR-V parameterizes videos using implicit neural representations (INRs), a multi-layered perceptron that predicts an RGB value for each input pixel location of the video. The INR is predicted using a meta-network which is a hypernetwork trained on neural representations of multiple video instances. Later, the meta-network can be sampled to generate diverse novel videos enabling many downstream video-based generative tasks. Interestingly, we find that conditional regularization and progressive weight initialization play a crucial role in obtaining INR-V. The representation space learned by INR-V is more expressive than an image space showcasing many interesting properties not possible with the existing works. For instance, INR-V can smoothly interpolate intermediate videos between known video instances (such as intermediate identities, expressions, and poses in face videos). It can also in-paint missing portions in videos to recover temporally coherent full videos. In this work, we evaluate the space learned by INR-V on diverse generative tasks such as video interpolation, novel video generation, video inversion, and video inpainting against the existing baselines. INR-V significantly outperforms the baselines on several of these demonstrated tasks, clearly showcasing the potential of the proposed representation space.
summary: Generating videos is a complex task that is accomplished by generating a set of temporally coherent images frame-by-frame. This limits the expressivity of videos to only image-based operations on the individual video frames needing network designs to obtain temporally coherent trajectories in the underlying image space. We propose INR-V, a video representation network that learns a continuous space for video-based generative tasks. INR-V parameterizes videos using implicit neural representations (INRs), a multi-layered perceptron that predicts an RGB value for each input pixel location of the video. The INR is predicted using a meta-network which is a hypernetwork trained on neural representations of multiple video instances. Later, the meta-network can be sampled to generate diverse novel videos enabling many downstream video-based generative tasks. Interestingly, we find that conditional regularization and progressive weight initialization play a crucial role in obtaining INR-V. The representation space learned by INR-V is more expressive than an image space showcasing many interesting properties not possible with the existing works. For instance, INR-V can smoothly interpolate intermediate videos between known video instances (such as intermediate identities, expressions, and poses in face videos). It can also in-paint missing portions in videos to recover temporally coherent full videos. In this work, we evaluate the space learned by INR-V on diverse generative tasks such as video interpolation, novel video generation, video inversion, and video inpainting against the existing baselines. INR-V significantly outperforms the baselines on several of these demonstrated tasks, clearly showcasing the potential of the proposed representation space.
abstract_zh: 生成视频是一项复杂的任务，它是通过逐帧生成一组时间连贯的图像来完成的。这将视频的表现力限制为仅对各个视频帧进行基于图像的操作，需要网络设计才能在底层图像空间中获得时间相干的轨迹。我们提出了 INR-V，一种视频表示网络，可以为基于视频的生成任务学习连续空间。 INR-V 使用隐式神经表示 (INR) 对视频进行参数化，INR 是一种多层感知器，可预测视频每个输入像素位置的 RGB 值。 INR 是使用元网络来预测的，元网络是根据多个视频实例的神经表示进行训练的超网络。随后，可以对元网络进行采样以生成各种新颖的视频，从而实现许多下游基于视频的生成任务。有趣的是，我们发现条件正则化和渐进权重初始化在获得 INR-V 中起着至关重要的作用。 INR-V 学习到的表示空间比图像空间更具表现力，展示了现有作品不可能实现的许多有趣的属性。例如，INR-V 可以在已知视频实例之间平滑地插入中间视频（例如面部视频中的中间身份、表情和姿势）。它还可以修复视频中缺失的部分，以恢复时间连贯的完整视频。在这项工作中，我们根据现有基线评估了 INR-V 在各种生成任务上学习的空间，例如视频插值、新颖视频生成、视频反转和视频修复。 INR-V 在其中几个演示任务上显着优于基线，清楚地展示了所提出的表示空间的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出INR-V，一种基于连续隐式神经表示（INR）的视频生成方法，通过元网络学习视频的连续表示空间，实现更高效的视频生成与编辑任务。
AI.motivation: 传统视频生成依赖逐帧图像操作，难以保证时间一致性且表达能力受限，需设计复杂网络结构。现有方法在视频插值、修复等任务中存在不足，需更高效的连续表示空间。
AI.method: 利用隐式神经网络（INR）参数化视频，通过元网络（hypernetwork）学习多视频实例的神经表示。元网络采样生成新视频，并引入条件正则化与渐进权重初始化策略优化表示空间。
AI.result: INR-V在视频插值、生成、逆向生成及修复任务中显著优于现有基线方法，能实现身份、表情、姿态的平滑插值及缺失部分的时序一致性修复。
AI.conclusion: INR-V通过连续表示空间提升了视频生成任务的表达能力，验证了隐式神经表示在视频生成中的有效性，为后续研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Resul Dagdanov,Halil Durmus,Nazim Kemal Ure
title: Self-Improving Safety Performance of Reinforcement Learning Based Driving with Black-Box Verification Algorithms
title_zh: 基于黑盒验证算法的强化学习驾驶安全性能自我提升
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables, published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), June 2, 2023, London, UK
comments: 7 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables, published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), June 2, 2023, London, UK
abstract: In this work, we propose a self-improving artificial intelligence system to enhance the safety performance of reinforcement learning (RL)-based autonomous driving (AD) agents using black-box verification methods. RL algorithms have become popular in AD applications in recent years. However, the performance of existing RL algorithms heavily depends on the diversity of training scenarios. A lack of safety-critical scenarios during the training phase could result in poor generalization performance in real-world driving applications. We propose a novel framework in which the weaknesses of the training set are explored through black-box verification methods. After discovering AD failure scenarios, the RL agent's training is re-initiated via transfer learning to improve the performance of previously unsafe scenarios. Simulation results demonstrate that our approach efficiently discovers safety failures of action decisions in RL-based adaptive cruise control (ACC) applications and significantly reduces the number of vehicle collisions through iterative applications of our method. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/data-and-decision-lab/self-improving-RL.
summary: In this work, we propose a self-improving artificial intelligence system to enhance the safety performance of reinforcement learning (RL)-based autonomous driving (AD) agents using black-box verification methods. RL algorithms have become popular in AD applications in recent years. However, the performance of existing RL algorithms heavily depends on the diversity of training scenarios. A lack of safety-critical scenarios during the training phase could result in poor generalization performance in real-world driving applications. We propose a novel framework in which the weaknesses of the training set are explored through black-box verification methods. After discovering AD failure scenarios, the RL agent's training is re-initiated via transfer learning to improve the performance of previously unsafe scenarios. Simulation results demonstrate that our approach efficiently discovers safety failures of action decisions in RL-based adaptive cruise control (ACC) applications and significantly reduces the number of vehicle collisions through iterative applications of our method. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/data-and-decision-lab/self-improving-RL.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自我改进的人工智能系统，使用黑盒验证方法来增强基于强化学习（RL）的自动驾驶（AD）代理的安全性能。近年来，强化学习算法在 AD 应用中变得流行。然而，现有强化学习算法的性能在很大程度上取决于训练场景的多样性。训练阶段缺乏安全关键场景可能会导致现实驾驶应用中泛化性能不佳。我们提出了一种新颖的框架，其中通过黑盒验证方法探索训练集的弱点。发现 AD 故障场景后，通过迁移学习重新启动 RL 代理的训练，以提高先前不安全场景的性能。仿真结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地发现基于强化学习的自适应巡航控制（ACC）应用中行动决策的安全故障，并通过我们方法的迭代应用显着减少车辆碰撞的次数。源代码可在 https://github.com/data-and-decision-lab/self-improving-RL 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合黑盒验证与迁移学习的框架，用于提升基于强化学习的自动驾驶系统安全性能。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法在自动驾驶中的表现依赖训练场景多样性，缺乏安全关键场景会导致实际应用中泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 通过黑盒验证算法识别训练集中的安全薄弱环节，利用迁移学习重新训练以增强危险场景处理能力。
AI.result: 仿真验证显示该方法可有效发现自适应巡航控制中的安全漏洞，迭代应用后显著降低车辆碰撞次数。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自改进框架能系统性提升强化学习在自动驾驶中的安全性，开源代码可供复现验证。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合黑盒验证与迁移学习的框架，用于提升基于强化学习的自动驾驶系统安全性能。

search_text: Self-Improving Safety Performance of Reinforcement Learning Based Driving with Black-Box Verification Algorithms 基于黑盒验证算法的强化学习驾驶安全性能自我提升 In this work, we propose a self-improving artificial intelligence system to enhance the safety performance of reinforcement learning (RL)-based autonomous driving (AD) agents using black-box verification methods. RL algorithms have become popular in AD applications in recent years. However, the performance of existing RL algorithms heavily depends on the diversity of training scenarios. A lack of safety-critical scenarios during the training phase could result in poor generalization performance in real-world driving applications. We propose a novel framework in which the weaknesses of the training set are explored through black-box verification methods. After discovering AD failure scenarios, the RL agent's training is re-initiated via transfer learning to improve the performance of previously unsafe scenarios. Simulation results demonstrate that our approach efficiently discovers safety failures of action decisions in RL-based adaptive cruise control (ACC) applications and significantly reduces the number of vehicle collisions through iterative applications of our method. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/data-and-decision-lab/self-improving-RL. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种自我改进的人工智能系统，使用黑盒验证方法来增强基于强化学习（RL）的自动驾驶（AD）代理的安全性能。近年来，强化学习算法在 AD 应用中变得流行。然而，现有强化学习算法的性能在很大程度上取决于训练场景的多样性。训练阶段缺乏安全关键场景可能会导致现实驾驶应用中泛化性能不佳。我们提出了一种新颖的框架，其中通过黑盒验证方法探索训练集的弱点。发现 AD 故障场景后，通过迁移学习重新启动 RL 代理的训练，以提高先前不安全场景的性能。仿真结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地发现基于强化学习的自适应巡航控制（ACC）应用中行动决策的安全故障，并通过我们方法的迭代应用显着减少车辆碰撞的次数。源代码可在 https://github.com/data-and-decision-lab/self-improving-RL 上公开获取。 本文提出一种结合黑盒验证与迁移学习的框架，用于提升基于强化学习的自动驾驶系统安全性能。 Resul Dagdanov,Halil Durmus,Nazim Kemal Ure cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Youngseok Kim,Sanmin Kim,Sangmin Sim,Jun Won Choi,Dongsuk Kum
title: Boosting Monocular 3D Object Detection with Object-Centric Auxiliary Depth Supervision
title_zh: 通过以对象为中心的辅助深度监督增强单目 3D 对象检测
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transaction on Intelligent Transportation System (T-ITS)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transaction on Intelligent Transportation System (T-ITS)
abstract: Recent advances in monocular 3D detection leverage a depth estimation network explicitly as an intermediate stage of the 3D detection network. Depth map approaches yield more accurate depth to objects than other methods thanks to the depth estimation network trained on a large-scale dataset. However, depth map approaches can be limited by the accuracy of the depth map, and sequentially using two separated networks for depth estimation and 3D detection significantly increases computation cost and inference time. In this work, we propose a method to boost the RGB image-based 3D detector by jointly training the detection network with a depth prediction loss analogous to the depth estimation task. In this way, our 3D detection network can be supervised by more depth supervision from raw LiDAR points, which does not require any human annotation cost, to estimate accurate depth without explicitly predicting the depth map. Our novel object-centric depth prediction loss focuses on depth around foreground objects, which is important for 3D object detection, to leverage pixel-wise depth supervision in an object-centric manner. Our depth regression model is further trained to predict the uncertainty of depth to represent the 3D confidence of objects. To effectively train the 3D detector with raw LiDAR points and to enable end-to-end training, we revisit the regression target of 3D objects and design a network architecture. Extensive experiments on KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks show that our method can significantly boost the monocular image-based 3D detector to outperform depth map approaches while maintaining the real-time inference speed.
summary: Recent advances in monocular 3D detection leverage a depth estimation network explicitly as an intermediate stage of the 3D detection network. Depth map approaches yield more accurate depth to objects than other methods thanks to the depth estimation network trained on a large-scale dataset. However, depth map approaches can be limited by the accuracy of the depth map, and sequentially using two separated networks for depth estimation and 3D detection significantly increases computation cost and inference time. In this work, we propose a method to boost the RGB image-based 3D detector by jointly training the detection network with a depth prediction loss analogous to the depth estimation task. In this way, our 3D detection network can be supervised by more depth supervision from raw LiDAR points, which does not require any human annotation cost, to estimate accurate depth without explicitly predicting the depth map. Our novel object-centric depth prediction loss focuses on depth around foreground objects, which is important for 3D object detection, to leverage pixel-wise depth supervision in an object-centric manner. Our depth regression model is further trained to predict the uncertainty of depth to represent the 3D confidence of objects. To effectively train the 3D detector with raw LiDAR points and to enable end-to-end training, we revisit the regression target of 3D objects and design a network architecture. Extensive experiments on KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks show that our method can significantly boost the monocular image-based 3D detector to outperform depth map approaches while maintaining the real-time inference speed.
abstract_zh: 单目 3D 检测的最新进展明确利用深度估计网络作为 3D 检测网络的中间阶段。得益于在大规模数据集上训练的深度估计网络，深度图方法比其他方法能产生更准确的物体深度。然而，深度图方法可能受到深度图精度的限制，并且依次使用两个独立的网络进行深度估计和 3D 检测会显着增加计算成本和推理时间。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过使用类似于深度估计任务的深度预测损失联合训练检测网络来增强基于 RGB 图像的 3D 检测器的方法。通过这种方式，我们的 3D 检测网络可以通过来自原始 LiDAR 点的更多深度监督来进行监督，这不需要任何人工注释成本，无需显式预测深度图即可估计准确的深度。我们新颖的以对象为中心的深度预测损失侧重于前景对象周围的深度，这对于 3D 对象检测非常重要，可以以对象为中心的方式利用像素级深度监督。我们的深度回归模型经过进一步训练，可以预测深度的不确定性，以表示对象的 3D 置信度。为了使用原始 LiDAR 点有效训练 3D 检测器并实现端到端训练，我们重新审视 3D 对象的回归目标并设计网络架构。对 KITTI 和 nuScenes 基准的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提升基于单目图像的 3D 检测器，使其优于深度图方法，同时保持实时推理速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过对象中心辅助深度监督提升单目3D目标检测性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D检测方法依赖深度图估计，但深度图精度受限且计算成本高，需寻找更高效的深度监督方式。
AI.method: 联合训练3D检测网络与深度预测损失，利用原始LiDAR点云数据进行无监督深度学习，聚焦前景对象深度并预测深度不确定性。
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes基准测试中，该方法在保持实时推理速度的同时显著优于基于深度图的检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 对象中心深度监督策略有效提升了单目3D检测精度，同时降低了计算复杂度。

authors_text: Zhong-Min Tsai,Yu-Ju Tsai,Chien-Yao Wang,Hong-Yuan Liao,Youn-Long Lin,Yung-Yu Chuang
title: SearchTrack: Multiple Object Tracking with Object-Customized Search and Motion-Aware Features
title_zh: SearchTrack：具有对象定制搜索和运动感知功能的多对象跟踪
abstract: The paper presents a new method, SearchTrack, for multiple object tracking and segmentation (MOTS). To address the association problem between detected objects, SearchTrack proposes object-customized search and motion-aware features. By maintaining a Kalman filter for each object, we encode the predicted motion into the motion-aware feature, which includes both motion and appearance cues. For each object, a customized fully convolutional search engine is created by SearchTrack by learning a set of weights for dynamic convolutions specific to the object. Experiments demonstrate that our SearchTrack method outperforms competitive methods on both MOTS and MOT tasks, particularly in terms of association accuracy. Our method achieves 71.5 HOTA (car) and 57.6 HOTA (pedestrian) on the KITTI MOTS and 53.4 HOTA on MOT17. In terms of association accuracy, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among 2D online methods on the KITTI MOTS. Our code is available at https://github.com/qa276390/SearchTrack.
summary: The paper presents a new method, SearchTrack, for multiple object tracking and segmentation (MOTS). To address the association problem between detected objects, SearchTrack proposes object-customized search and motion-aware features. By maintaining a Kalman filter for each object, we encode the predicted motion into the motion-aware feature, which includes both motion and appearance cues. For each object, a customized fully convolutional search engine is created by SearchTrack by learning a set of weights for dynamic convolutions specific to the object. Experiments demonstrate that our SearchTrack method outperforms competitive methods on both MOTS and MOT tasks, particularly in terms of association accuracy. Our method achieves 71.5 HOTA (car) and 57.6 HOTA (pedestrian) on the KITTI MOTS and 53.4 HOTA on MOT17. In terms of association accuracy, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among 2D online methods on the KITTI MOTS. Our code is available at https://github.com/qa276390/SearchTrack.
abstract_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于多对象跟踪和分割（MOTS）的新方法 SearchTrack。为了解决检测到的对象之间的关联问题，SearchTrack 提出了对象定制搜索和运动感知功能。通过为每个对象维护一个卡尔曼滤波器，我们将预测的运动编码到运动感知特征中，其中包括运动和外观线索。对于每个对象，SearchTrack 通过学习一组特定于该对象的动态卷积权重来创建定制的全卷积搜索引擎。实验表明，我们的 SearchTrack 方法在 MOTS 和 MOT 任务上都优于竞争方法，特别是在关联准确性方面。我们的方法在 KITTI MOTS 上实现了 71.5 HOTA（汽车）和 57.6 HOTA（行人），在 MOT17 上实现了 53.4 HOTA。在关联精度方面，我们的方法在 KITTI MOTS 上的 2D 在线方法中实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/qa276390/SearchTrack 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SearchTrack的新方法，用于多目标跟踪与分割（MOTS），通过对象定制化搜索和运动感知特征解决检测对象之间的关联问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多目标跟踪中面临检测对象关联准确性不足的问题，尤其在复杂场景下难以有效结合运动与外观信息。
AI.method: 为每个目标维护卡尔曼滤波器，将预测运动编码为包含运动和外观线索的运动感知特征；通过动态卷积学习对象特定权重，构建定制化全卷积搜索引擎。
AI.result: 在KITTI MOTS数据集上，SearchTrack在汽车类别达到71.5 HOTA，在行人类别达到57.6 HOTA；在MOT17上达到53.4 HOTA，关联准确率在2D在线方法中达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: SearchTrack通过对象定制化搜索与运动感知特征有效提升了多目标跟踪的关联准确性，为在线2D跟踪任务提供了先进解决方案。

method: 为每个目标维护卡尔曼滤波器，将预测运动编码为包含运动和外观线索的运动感知特征；通过动态卷积学习对象特定权重，构建定制化全卷积搜索引擎。
result: 在KITTI MOTS数据集上，SearchTrack在汽车类别达到71.5 HOTA，在行人类别达到57.6 HOTA；在MOT17上达到53.4 HOTA，关联准确率在2D在线方法中达到SOTA。
conclusion: SearchTrack通过对象定制化搜索与运动感知特征有效提升了多目标跟踪的关联准确性，为在线2D跟踪任务提供了先进解决方案。
search_text: SearchTrack: Multiple Object Tracking with Object-Customized Search and Motion-Aware Features SearchTrack：具有对象定制搜索和运动感知功能的多对象跟踪 The paper presents a new method, SearchTrack, for multiple object tracking and segmentation (MOTS). To address the association problem between detected objects, SearchTrack proposes object-customized search and motion-aware features. By maintaining a Kalman filter for each object, we encode the predicted motion into the motion-aware feature, which includes both motion and appearance cues. For each object, a customized fully convolutional search engine is created by SearchTrack by learning a set of weights for dynamic convolutions specific to the object. Experiments demonstrate that our SearchTrack method outperforms competitive methods on both MOTS and MOT tasks, particularly in terms of association accuracy. Our method achieves 71.5 HOTA (car) and 57.6 HOTA (pedestrian) on the KITTI MOTS and 53.4 HOTA on MOT17. In terms of association accuracy, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among 2D online methods on the KITTI MOTS. Our code is available at https://github.com/qa276390/SearchTrack. 该论文提出了一种用于多对象跟踪和分割（MOTS）的新方法 SearchTrack。为了解决检测到的对象之间的关联问题，SearchTrack 提出了对象定制搜索和运动感知功能。通过为每个对象维护一个卡尔曼滤波器，我们将预测的运动编码到运动感知特征中，其中包括运动和外观线索。对于每个对象，SearchTrack 通过学习一组特定于该对象的动态卷积权重来创建定制的全卷积搜索引擎。实验表明，我们的 SearchTrack 方法在 MOTS 和 MOT 任务上都优于竞争方法，特别是在关联准确性方面。我们的方法在 KITTI MOTS 上实现了 71.5 HOTA（汽车）和 57.6 HOTA（行人），在 MOT17 上实现了 53.4 HOTA。在关联精度方面，我们的方法在 KITTI MOTS 上的 2D 在线方法中实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/qa276390/SearchTrack 获取。 本文提出了一种名为SearchTrack的新方法，用于多目标跟踪与分割（MOTS），通过对象定制化搜索和运动感知特征解决检测对象之间的关联问题。 Zhong-Min Tsai,Yu-Ju Tsai,Chien-Yao Wang,Hong-Yuan Liao,Youn-Long Lin,Yung-Yu Chuang cs.CV

authors_text: Resul Dagdanov,Feyza Eksen,Halil Durmus,Ferhat Yurdakul,Nazim Kemal Ure
title: DeFIX: Detecting and Fixing Failure Scenarios with Reinforcement Learning in Imitation Learning Based Autonomous Driving
title_zh: DeFIX：在基于模仿学习的自动驾驶中使用强化学习检测和修复故障场景
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, published in IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC), October 12, 2022, Macau, China
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, published in IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC), October 12, 2022, Macau, China
abstract: Safely navigating through an urban environment without violating any traffic rules is a crucial performance target for reliable autonomous driving. In this paper, we present a Reinforcement Learning (RL) based methodology to DEtect and FIX (DeFIX) failures of an Imitation Learning (IL) agent by extracting infraction spots and re-constructing mini-scenarios on these infraction areas to train an RL agent for fixing the shortcomings of the IL approach. DeFIX is a continuous learning framework, where extraction of failure scenarios and training of RL agents are executed in an infinite loop. After each new policy is trained and added to the library of policies, a policy classifier method effectively decides on which policy to activate at each step during the evaluation. It is demonstrated that even with only one RL agent trained on failure scenario of an IL agent, DeFIX method is either competitive or does outperform state-of-the-art IL and RL based autonomous urban driving benchmarks. We trained and validated our approach on the most challenging map (Town05) of CARLA simulator which involves complex, realistic, and adversarial driving scenarios. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/data-and-decision-lab/DeFIX
summary: Safely navigating through an urban environment without violating any traffic rules is a crucial performance target for reliable autonomous driving. In this paper, we present a Reinforcement Learning (RL) based methodology to DEtect and FIX (DeFIX) failures of an Imitation Learning (IL) agent by extracting infraction spots and re-constructing mini-scenarios on these infraction areas to train an RL agent for fixing the shortcomings of the IL approach. DeFIX is a continuous learning framework, where extraction of failure scenarios and training of RL agents are executed in an infinite loop. After each new policy is trained and added to the library of policies, a policy classifier method effectively decides on which policy to activate at each step during the evaluation. It is demonstrated that even with only one RL agent trained on failure scenario of an IL agent, DeFIX method is either competitive or does outperform state-of-the-art IL and RL based autonomous urban driving benchmarks. We trained and validated our approach on the most challenging map (Town05) of CARLA simulator which involves complex, realistic, and adversarial driving scenarios. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/data-and-decision-lab/DeFIX
abstract_zh: 在不违反任何交通规则的情况下安全地在城市环境中行驶是可靠自动驾驶的关键性能目标。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的方法，通过提取违规点并在这些违规区域上重建迷你场景来检测和修复模仿学习（IL）代理的故障，以训练 RL 代理来修复 IL 方法的缺点。 DeFIX 是一个持续学习框架，其中故障场景的提取和 RL 代理的训练在无限循环中执行。在训练每个新策略并将其添加到策略库后，策略分类器方法会有效地决定在评估期间的每个步骤激活哪个策略。事实证明，即使只有一个 RL 智能体接受过 IL 智能体故障场景的训练，DeFIX 方法也具有竞争力，或者优于最先进的基于 IL 和 RL 的自动城市驾驶基准。我们在 CARLA 模拟器最具挑战性的地图 (Town05) 上训练和验证了我们的方法，该地图涉及复杂、现实和对抗性的驾驶场景。源代码可在 https://github.com/data-and-decision-lab/DeFIX 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeFIX方法，利用强化学习检测并修复基于模仿学习的自动驾驶系统中的故障场景。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需在复杂城市环境中安全运行，而模仿学习（IL）方法存在无法处理复杂或对抗性场景的缺陷，需通过强化学习（RL）进行补充。
AI.method: DeFIX通过提取IL代理的违规场景，构建局部场景训练RL代理，并在无限循环中持续优化。结合策略分类器动态选择最优策略进行决策。
AI.result: 在CARLA模拟器Town05地图的复杂场景测试中，DeFIX在仅使用单个RL代理的情况下，性能优于或与现有IL和RL基准方法相当。
AI.conclusion: DeFIX通过持续学习框架有效弥补IL方法的不足，为自动驾驶系统提供了更安全可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhiheng Hu,Yongzhen Wang,Peng Li,Jie Qin,Haoran Xie,Mingqiang Wei
title: iSmallNet: Densely Nested Network with Label Decoupling for Infrared Small Target Detection
title_zh: iSmallNet：用于红外小目标检测的具有标签解耦的密集嵌套网络
abstract: Small targets are often submerged in cluttered backgrounds of infrared images. Conventional detectors tend to generate false alarms, while CNN-based detectors lose small targets in deep layers. To this end, we propose iSmallNet, a multi-stream densely nested network with label decoupling for infrared small object detection. On the one hand, to fully exploit the shape information of small targets, we decouple the original labeled ground-truth (GT) map into an interior map and a boundary one. The GT map, in collaboration with the two additional maps, tackles the unbalanced distribution of small object boundaries. On the other hand, two key modules are delicately designed and incorporated into the proposed network to boost the overall performance. First, to maintain small targets in deep layers, we develop a multi-scale nested interaction module to explore a wide range of context information. Second, we develop an interior-boundary fusion module to integrate multi-granularity information. Experiments on NUAA-SIRST and NUDT-SIRST clearly show the superiority of iSmallNet over 11 state-of-the-art detectors.
summary: Small targets are often submerged in cluttered backgrounds of infrared images. Conventional detectors tend to generate false alarms, while CNN-based detectors lose small targets in deep layers. To this end, we propose iSmallNet, a multi-stream densely nested network with label decoupling for infrared small object detection. On the one hand, to fully exploit the shape information of small targets, we decouple the original labeled ground-truth (GT) map into an interior map and a boundary one. The GT map, in collaboration with the two additional maps, tackles the unbalanced distribution of small object boundaries. On the other hand, two key modules are delicately designed and incorporated into the proposed network to boost the overall performance. First, to maintain small targets in deep layers, we develop a multi-scale nested interaction module to explore a wide range of context information. Second, we develop an interior-boundary fusion module to integrate multi-granularity information. Experiments on NUAA-SIRST and NUDT-SIRST clearly show the superiority of iSmallNet over 11 state-of-the-art detectors.
abstract_zh: 小目标通常淹没在红外图像杂乱的背景中。传统的检测器往往会产生误报，而基于 CNN 的检测器会丢失深层的小目标。为此，我们提出了 iSmallNet，一种用于红外小物体检测的具有标签解耦的多流密集嵌套网络。一方面，为了充分利用小目标的形状信息，我们将原始标记的地面实况（GT）图解耦为内部图和边界图。 GT 贴图与另外两个贴图配合，解决了小物体边界分布不平衡的问题。另一方面，两个关键模块经过精心设计并融入到所提出的网络中，以提高整体性能。首先，为了维护深层的小目标，我们开发了一个多尺度嵌套交互模块来探索广泛的上下文信息。其次，我们开发了一个内部边界融合模块来集成多粒度信息。 NUAA-SIRST 和 NUDT-SIRST 上的实验清楚地表明了 iSmallNet 相对于 11 个最先进检测器的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iSmallNet，一种用于红外小目标检测的多流密集嵌套网络，通过标签解耦和模块设计提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统检测器在红外图像中易产生误报，基于CNN的检测器在深层丢失小目标，需解决小目标边界分布不均衡及深层信息丢失问题。
AI.method: 解耦原始标签为内部图和边界图，设计多尺度嵌套交互模块与内外部融合模块，结合多流密集网络增强上下文与多粒度信息整合。
AI.result: 在NUAA-SIRST和NUDT-SIRST数据集上，iSmallNet优于11种先进检测器，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过标签解耦与模块创新，iSmallNet有效提升了红外小目标检测的精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Yunqing Zhao,Keshigeyan Chandrasegaran,Milad Abdollahzadeh,Ngai-Man Cheung
title: Few-shot Image Generation via Adaptation-Aware Kernel Modulation
title_zh: 通过适应感知内核调制生成少量图像
comment: The Thirty-Sixth Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), 14 pages
comments: The Thirty-Sixth Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), 14 pages
abstract: Few-shot image generation (FSIG) aims to learn to generate new and diverse samples given an extremely limited number of samples from a domain, e.g., 10 training samples. Recent work has addressed the problem using transfer learning approach, leveraging a GAN pretrained on a large-scale source domain dataset and adapting that model to the target domain based on very limited target domain samples. Central to recent FSIG methods are knowledge preserving criteria, which aim to select a subset of source model's knowledge to be preserved into the adapted model. However, a major limitation of existing methods is that their knowledge preserving criteria consider only source domain/source task, and they fail to consider target domain/adaptation task in selecting source model's knowledge, casting doubt on their suitability for setups of different proximity between source and target domain. Our work makes two contributions. As our first contribution, we re-visit recent FSIG works and their experiments. Our important finding is that, under setups which assumption of close proximity between source and target domains is relaxed, existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods which consider only source domain/source task in knowledge preserving perform no better than a baseline fine-tuning method. To address the limitation of existing methods, as our second contribution, we propose Adaptation-Aware kernel Modulation (AdAM) to address general FSIG of different source-target domain proximity. Extensive experimental results show that the proposed method consistently achieves SOTA performance across source/target domains of different proximity, including challenging setups when source and target domains are more apart. Project Page: https://yunqing-me.github.io/AdAM/
summary: Few-shot image generation (FSIG) aims to learn to generate new and diverse samples given an extremely limited number of samples from a domain, e.g., 10 training samples. Recent work has addressed the problem using transfer learning approach, leveraging a GAN pretrained on a large-scale source domain dataset and adapting that model to the target domain based on very limited target domain samples. Central to recent FSIG methods are knowledge preserving criteria, which aim to select a subset of source model's knowledge to be preserved into the adapted model. However, a major limitation of existing methods is that their knowledge preserving criteria consider only source domain/source task, and they fail to consider target domain/adaptation task in selecting source model's knowledge, casting doubt on their suitability for setups of different proximity between source and target domain. Our work makes two contributions. As our first contribution, we re-visit recent FSIG works and their experiments. Our important finding is that, under setups which assumption of close proximity between source and target domains is relaxed, existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods which consider only source domain/source task in knowledge preserving perform no better than a baseline fine-tuning method. To address the limitation of existing methods, as our second contribution, we propose Adaptation-Aware kernel Modulation (AdAM) to address general FSIG of different source-target domain proximity. Extensive experimental results show that the proposed method consistently achieves SOTA performance across source/target domains of different proximity, including challenging setups when source and target domains are more apart. Project Page: https://yunqing-me.github.io/AdAM/
abstract_zh: 少样本图像生成 (FSIG) 旨在学习在给定域中极其有限数量的样本（例如 10 个训练样本）的情况下生成新的多样化样本。最近的工作使用迁移学习方法解决了这个问题，利用在大规模源域数据集上预训练的 GAN，并基于非常有限的目标域样本将该模型适应目标域。最近 FSIG 方法的核心是知识保存标准，其目的是选择要保存到适应模型中的源模型知识的子集。然而，现有方法的一个主要限制是它们的知识保存标准仅考虑源域/源任务，而在选择源模型知识时没有考虑目标域/适应任务，这使人们怀疑它们是否适合源域和目标域之间不同邻近度的设置。我们的工作有两个贡献。作为我们的第一个贡献，我们重新审视了 FSIG 最近的工作及其实验。我们的重要发现是，在放宽源域和目标域之间紧密接近的假设的设置下，仅考虑知识保存中的源域/源任务的现有最先进（SOTA）方法的表现并不比基线微调方法更好。为了解决现有方法的局限性，作为我们的第二个贡献，我们提出了适应感知内核调制（AdAM）来解决不同源-目标域邻近度的通用 FSIG。大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法在不同接近度的源/目标域中一致实现了 SOTA 性能，包括当源域和目标域相距较远时具有挑战性的设置。项目页面：https://yunqing-me.github.io/AdAM/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AdAM的适应感知核调制方法，用于解决不同源域和目标域接近度下的少样本图像生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在知识保留时仅考虑源域/源任务，未考虑目标域/适应任务，导致在源目标域接近度较低时性能不佳。
AI.method: 提出AdAM方法，通过调整核调制机制，使知识保留过程同时考虑源域和目标域的适应需求。
AI.result: 在多种源目标域接近度设置下，AdAM均达到SOTA性能，尤其在域间差异较大的挑战性场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: AdAM通过引入适应感知机制，有效解决了传统方法在不同域接近度下的性能局限性，为少样本图像生成提供了更通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Guangzhi Sun,Chao Zhang,Philip C. Woodland
title: End-to-end Spoken Language Understanding with Tree-constrained Pointer Generator
title_zh: 使用树约束指针生成器进行端到端口语理解
abstract: End-to-end spoken language understanding (SLU) suffers from the long-tail word problem. This paper exploits contextual biasing, a technique to improve the speech recognition of rare words, in end-to-end SLU systems. Specifically, a tree-constrained pointer generator (TCPGen), a powerful and efficient biasing model component, is studied, which leverages a slot shortlist with corresponding entities to extract biasing lists. Meanwhile, to bias the SLU model output slot distribution, a slot probability biasing (SPB) mechanism is proposed to calculate a slot distribution from TCPGen. Experiments on the SLURP dataset showed consistent SLU-F1 improvements using TCPGen and SPB, especially on unseen entities. On a new split by holding out 5 slot types for the test, TCPGen with SPB achieved zero-shot learning with an SLU-F1 score over 50% compared to baselines which can not deal with it. In addition to slot filling, the intent classification accuracy was also improved.
summary: End-to-end spoken language understanding (SLU) suffers from the long-tail word problem. This paper exploits contextual biasing, a technique to improve the speech recognition of rare words, in end-to-end SLU systems. Specifically, a tree-constrained pointer generator (TCPGen), a powerful and efficient biasing model component, is studied, which leverages a slot shortlist with corresponding entities to extract biasing lists. Meanwhile, to bias the SLU model output slot distribution, a slot probability biasing (SPB) mechanism is proposed to calculate a slot distribution from TCPGen. Experiments on the SLURP dataset showed consistent SLU-F1 improvements using TCPGen and SPB, especially on unseen entities. On a new split by holding out 5 slot types for the test, TCPGen with SPB achieved zero-shot learning with an SLU-F1 score over 50% compared to baselines which can not deal with it. In addition to slot filling, the intent classification accuracy was also improved.
abstract_zh: 端到端口语理解（SLU）面临长尾词问题。本文利用上下文偏差，这是一种在端到端 SLU 系统中改进稀有词语音识别的技术。具体来说，研究了树约束指针生成器（TCPGen），这是一种强大且高效的偏置模型组件，它利用具有相应实体的槽候选列表来提取偏置列表。同时，为了偏置SLU模型输出时隙分布，提出了时隙概率偏置（SPB）机制来从TCPGen计算时隙分布。 SLURP 数据集上的实验表明，使用 TCPGen 和 SPB，SLU-F1 得到了一致的改进，尤其是在看不见的实体上。在新的划分中，通过提供 5 个槽类型进行测试，TCPGen 与 SPB 实现了零样本学习，与无法处理它的基线相比，SLU-F1 分数超过 50%。除了槽位填充之外，意图分类的准确性也得到了提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合树约束指针生成器（TCPGen）和槽位概率偏差（SPB）机制的端到端语音语言理解方法，以解决长尾词问题并提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 端到端语音语言理解（SLU）在处理罕见词（长尾词）时表现不佳，现有方法难以有效提升对未见过实体的识别能力。
AI.method: 设计TCPGen模型通过槽位短名单和实体提取偏差列表，并引入SPB机制调整槽位分布，从而在SLU中引入上下文偏差以优化罕见词识别。
AI.result: 在SLURP数据集上，TCPGen与SPB联合使用使SLU-F1分数显著提升，尤其在未见过的实体上实现零样本学习（F1>50%），同时意图分类准确率也提高。
AI.conclusion: TCPGen与SPB有效缓解了SLU中的长尾词问题，在罕见词识别和零样本场景下表现优异，为端到端SLU提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Johan Liedgren,Pieter Desmet,Andrea Gaggioli
title: Liminal Design: A Conceptual Framework and Three-Step Approach for Developing Technology that Delivers Transcendence and Deeper Experiences
title_zh: 阈限设计：开发提供超越和更深入体验的技术的概念框架和三步方法
abstract: As ubiquitous technology is increasingly mediating our relationships with the world and others, we argue that the sublime is struggling to find room in product design primarily aimed at commercial and transactional goals such as speed and efficiency. We suggest a new category of products to promote deeper and more meaningful experiences, specifically those offering liminality, transcendence, and personal transformation. This paper introduces a conceptual framework and related three-step design approach that looks at narrative participation in design through abstractions to promote, hold and deepen more complex emotions. We explore implications from a theoretical point of view and suggest some liminal product design ideas as examples of how the model might be applied in practice.
summary: As ubiquitous technology is increasingly mediating our relationships with the world and others, we argue that the sublime is struggling to find room in product design primarily aimed at commercial and transactional goals such as speed and efficiency. We suggest a new category of products to promote deeper and more meaningful experiences, specifically those offering liminality, transcendence, and personal transformation. This paper introduces a conceptual framework and related three-step design approach that looks at narrative participation in design through abstractions to promote, hold and deepen more complex emotions. We explore implications from a theoretical point of view and suggest some liminal product design ideas as examples of how the model might be applied in practice.
abstract_zh: 随着无处不在的技术越来越多地调解我们与世界和他人的关系，我们认为，崇高正在努力在主要针对速度和效率等商业和交易目标的产品设计中寻找空间。我们建议推出一类新的产品来促进更深入、更有意义的体验，特别是那些提供阈限、超越和个人转变的产品。本文介绍了一个概念框架和相关的三步设计方法，该方法通过抽象来看待设计中的叙事参与，以促进、保持和加深更复杂的情感。我们从理论角度探讨了影响，并提出了一些有限的产品设计理念，作为该模型如何在实践中应用的示例。

AI.tldr: 提出一个概念框架和三步设计方法，开发促进超越感和深度体验的技术产品。
AI.motivation: 现有技术设计过于追求商业效率，缺乏对深层情感体验（如超越感）的关注，需新方法促进有意义体验。
AI.method: 构建概念框架并提出三步设计法，通过叙事参与的抽象化促进复杂情感。

search_text: Liminal Design: A Conceptual Framework and Three-Step Approach for Developing Technology that Delivers Transcendence and Deeper Experiences 阈限设计：开发提供超越和更深入体验的技术的概念框架和三步方法 As ubiquitous technology is increasingly mediating our relationships with the world and others, we argue that the sublime is struggling to find room in product design primarily aimed at commercial and transactional goals such as speed and efficiency. We suggest a new category of products to promote deeper and more meaningful experiences, specifically those offering liminality, transcendence, and personal transformation. This paper introduces a conceptual framework and related three-step design approach that looks at narrative participation in design through abstractions to promote, hold and deepen more complex emotions. We explore implications from a theoretical point of view and suggest some liminal product design ideas as examples of how the model might be applied in practice. 随着无处不在的技术越来越多地调解我们与世界和他人的关系，我们认为，崇高正在努力在主要针对速度和效率等商业和交易目标的产品设计中寻找空间。我们建议推出一类新的产品来促进更深入、更有意义的体验，特别是那些提供阈限、超越和个人转变的产品。本文介绍了一个概念框架和相关的三步设计方法，该方法通过抽象来看待设计中的叙事参与，以促进、保持和加深更复杂的情感。我们从理论角度探讨了影响，并提出了一些有限的产品设计理念，作为该模型如何在实践中应用的示例。 提出一个概念框架和三步设计方法，开发促进超越感和深度体验的技术产品。 Johan Liedgren,Pieter Desmet,Andrea Gaggioli cs.HC

authors_text: Zhilin Lu,Xudong Zhang,Rui Zeng,Jintao Wang
title: Better Lightweight Network for Free: Codeword Mimic Learning for Massive MIMO CSI feedback
title_zh: 免费更好的轻量级网络：用于大规模 MIMO CSI 反馈的码字模拟学习
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Copyright may be transferred without notice
comments: 4 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Copyright may be transferred without notice
abstract: The channel state information (CSI) needs to be fed back from the user equipment (UE) to the base station (BS) in frequency division duplexing (FDD) multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) system. Recently, neural networks are widely applied to CSI compressed feedback since the original overhead is too large for the massive MIMO system. Notably, lightweight feedback networks attract special attention due to their practicality of deployment. However, the feedback accuracy is likely to be harmed by the network compression. In this paper, a cost free distillation technique named codeword mimic (CM) is proposed to train better feedback networks with the practical lightweight encoder. A mimic-explore training strategy with a special distillation scheduler is designed to enhance the CM learning. Experiments show that the proposed CM learning outperforms the previous state-of-the-art feedback distillation method, boosting the performance of the lightweight feedback network without any extra inference cost.
summary: The channel state information (CSI) needs to be fed back from the user equipment (UE) to the base station (BS) in frequency division duplexing (FDD) multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) system. Recently, neural networks are widely applied to CSI compressed feedback since the original overhead is too large for the massive MIMO system. Notably, lightweight feedback networks attract special attention due to their practicality of deployment. However, the feedback accuracy is likely to be harmed by the network compression. In this paper, a cost free distillation technique named codeword mimic (CM) is proposed to train better feedback networks with the practical lightweight encoder. A mimic-explore training strategy with a special distillation scheduler is designed to enhance the CM learning. Experiments show that the proposed CM learning outperforms the previous state-of-the-art feedback distillation method, boosting the performance of the lightweight feedback network without any extra inference cost.
abstract_zh: 在频分双工(FDD)多输入多输出(MIMO)系统中，需要从用户设备(UE)向基站(BS)反馈信道状态信息(CSI)。近年来，由于原始开销对于大规模 MIMO 系统来说太大，神经网络被广泛应用于 CSI 压缩反馈。值得注意的是，轻量级反馈网络由于其部署的实用性而引起特别关注。然而，反馈精度可能会受到网络压缩的损害。在本文中，提出了一种名为码字模拟（CM）的免费蒸馏技术，以使用实用的轻量级编码器训练更好的反馈网络。具有特殊蒸馏调度程序的模拟探索训练策略旨在增强 CM 学习。实验表明，所提出的 CM 学习优于之前最先进的反馈蒸馏方法，提高了轻量级反馈网络的性能，而无需任何额外的推理成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为码字模仿学习（CM）的无成本蒸馏技术，用于训练更高效的轻量级网络以提升大规模MIMO系统中CSI反馈的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有轻量级反馈网络因压缩导致CSI反馈精度下降，而传统蒸馏方法需额外推理成本，难以满足实际部署需求。
AI.method: 设计码字模仿学习（CM）技术，结合模仿探索训练策略与特殊蒸馏调度器，在无需额外推理成本的情况下优化轻量级网络参数。
AI.result: 实验表明，CM方法在保持轻量级网络低复杂度的同时，显著优于现有最先进的反馈蒸馏方法，提升反馈精度。
AI.conclusion: CM学习通过无成本蒸馏有效提升轻量级网络性能，为大规模MIMO系统的实际部署提供了可行的CSI反馈解决方案。

authors_text: Yi Wang,Jiajun Deng,Tianzi Wang,Bo Zheng,Shoukang Hu,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Exploiting prompt learning with pre-trained language models for Alzheimer's Disease detection
title_zh: 利用预先训练的语言模型进行即时学习来检测阿尔茨海默病
comment: Accepted ICASSP 2023 (will update with IEEE vision later)
comments: Accepted ICASSP 2023 (will update with IEEE vision later)
abstract: Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is crucial in facilitating preventive care and to delay further progression. Speech based automatic AD screening systems provide a non-intrusive and more scalable alternative to other clinical screening techniques. Textual embedding features produced by pre-trained language models (PLMs) such as BERT are widely used in such systems. However, PLM domain fine-tuning is commonly based on the masked word or sentence prediction costs that are inconsistent with the back-end AD detection task. To this end, this paper investigates the use of prompt-based fine-tuning of PLMs that consistently uses AD classification errors as the training objective function. Disfluency features based on hesitation or pause filler token frequencies are further incorporated into prompt phrases during PLM fine-tuning. The decision voting based combination among systems using different PLMs (BERT and RoBERTa) or systems with different fine-tuning paradigms (conventional masked-language modelling fine-tuning and prompt-based fine-tuning) is further applied. Mean, standard deviation and the maximum among accuracy scores over 15 experiment runs are adopted as performance measurements for the AD detection system. Mean detection accuracy of 84.20% (with std 2.09%, best 87.5%) and 82.64% (with std 4.0%, best 89.58%) were obtained using manual and ASR speech transcripts respectively on the ADReSS20 test set consisting of 48 elderly speakers.
summary: Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is crucial in facilitating preventive care and to delay further progression. Speech based automatic AD screening systems provide a non-intrusive and more scalable alternative to other clinical screening techniques. Textual embedding features produced by pre-trained language models (PLMs) such as BERT are widely used in such systems. However, PLM domain fine-tuning is commonly based on the masked word or sentence prediction costs that are inconsistent with the back-end AD detection task. To this end, this paper investigates the use of prompt-based fine-tuning of PLMs that consistently uses AD classification errors as the training objective function. Disfluency features based on hesitation or pause filler token frequencies are further incorporated into prompt phrases during PLM fine-tuning. The decision voting based combination among systems using different PLMs (BERT and RoBERTa) or systems with different fine-tuning paradigms (conventional masked-language modelling fine-tuning and prompt-based fine-tuning) is further applied. Mean, standard deviation and the maximum among accuracy scores over 15 experiment runs are adopted as performance measurements for the AD detection system. Mean detection accuracy of 84.20% (with std 2.09%, best 87.5%) and 82.64% (with std 4.0%, best 89.58%) were obtained using manual and ASR speech transcripts respectively on the ADReSS20 test set consisting of 48 elderly speakers.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的早期诊断对于促进预防性护理和延缓进一步进展至关重要。基于语音的自动 AD 筛查系统为其他临床筛查技术提供了一种非侵入性且更具可扩展性的替代方案。由预训练语言模型（PLM）（例如 BERT）生成的文本嵌入特征在此类系统中广泛使用。然而，PLM 域微调通常基于与后端 AD 检测任务不一致的屏蔽词或句子预测成本。为此，本文研究了基于提示的 PLM 微调的使用，该微调始终使用 AD 分类误差作为训练目标函数。基于犹豫或暂停填充标记频率的不流畅特征在 PLM 微调期间进一步纳入提示短语中。进一步应用使用不同 PLM 的系统（BERT 和 RoBERTa）或具有不同微调范式（传统掩码语言建模微调和基于提示的微调）的系统之间基于决策投票的组合。采用 15 次实验运行的平均值、标准差和最大准确度分数作为 AD 检测系统的性能测量。在由 48 名老年说话人组成的 ADReSS20 测试集上，使用手动和 ASR 语音记录分别获得了 84.20%（标准为 2.09%，最佳 87.5%）和 82.64%（标准为 4.0%，最佳 89.58%）的平均检测准确度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用预训练语言模型（PLM）的提示微调方法，结合语言流畅性特征，提升阿尔茨海默病（AD）检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统PLM微调方法依赖掩码预测任务，与AD分类目标不一致，且未充分利用语音文本中的语言流畅性特征，导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 基于AD分类错误设计提示微调目标，引入犹豫词/停顿填充词频率作为语言流畅性特征，结合BERT和RoBERTa模型及不同微调范式的系统投票融合策略。
AI.result: 在ADReSS20测试集上，手动转录文本检测准确率为84.20%（标准差2.09%，最佳87.5%），ASR转录文本为82.64%（标准差4.0%，最佳89.58%）。
AI.conclusion: 提示微调结合语言流畅性特征能有效提升AD检测性能，多模型多方法融合进一步增强鲁棒性，为语音辅助AD筛查提供新思路。

search_text: Exploiting prompt learning with pre-trained language models for Alzheimer's Disease detection 利用预先训练的语言模型进行即时学习来检测阿尔茨海默病 Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is crucial in facilitating preventive care and to delay further progression. Speech based automatic AD screening systems provide a non-intrusive and more scalable alternative to other clinical screening techniques. Textual embedding features produced by pre-trained language models (PLMs) such as BERT are widely used in such systems. However, PLM domain fine-tuning is commonly based on the masked word or sentence prediction costs that are inconsistent with the back-end AD detection task. To this end, this paper investigates the use of prompt-based fine-tuning of PLMs that consistently uses AD classification errors as the training objective function. Disfluency features based on hesitation or pause filler token frequencies are further incorporated into prompt phrases during PLM fine-tuning. The decision voting based combination among systems using different PLMs (BERT and RoBERTa) or systems with different fine-tuning paradigms (conventional masked-language modelling fine-tuning and prompt-based fine-tuning) is further applied. Mean, standard deviation and the maximum among accuracy scores over 15 experiment runs are adopted as performance measurements for the AD detection system. Mean detection accuracy of 84.20% (with std 2.09%, best 87.5%) and 82.64% (with std 4.0%, best 89.58%) were obtained using manual and ASR speech transcripts respectively on the ADReSS20 test set consisting of 48 elderly speakers. 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的早期诊断对于促进预防性护理和延缓进一步进展至关重要。基于语音的自动 AD 筛查系统为其他临床筛查技术提供了一种非侵入性且更具可扩展性的替代方案。由预训练语言模型（PLM）（例如 BERT）生成的文本嵌入特征在此类系统中广泛使用。然而，PLM 域微调通常基于与后端 AD 检测任务不一致的屏蔽词或句子预测成本。为此，本文研究了基于提示的 PLM 微调的使用，该微调始终使用 AD 分类误差作为训练目标函数。基于犹豫或暂停填充标记频率的不流畅特征在 PLM 微调期间进一步纳入提示短语中。进一步应用使用不同 PLM 的系统（BERT 和 RoBERTa）或具有不同微调范式（传统掩码语言建模微调和基于提示的微调）的系统之间基于决策投票的组合。采用 15 次实验运行的平均值、标准差和最大准确度分数作为 AD 检测系统的性能测量。在由 48 名老年说话人组成的 ADReSS20 测试集上，使用手动和 ASR 语音记录分别获得了 84.20%（标准为 2.09%，最佳 87.5%）和 82.64%（标准为 4.0%，最佳 89.58%）的平均检测准确度。 本文研究利用预训练语言模型（PLM）的提示微调方法，结合语言流畅性特征，提升阿尔茨海默病（AD）检测的准确性。 Yi Wang,Jiajun Deng,Tianzi Wang,Bo Zheng,Shoukang Hu,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ebbie Awino,Lilian Wanzare,Lawrence Muchemi,Barack Wanjawa,Edward Ombui,Florence Indede,Owen McOnyango,Benard Okal
title: Phonemic Representation and Transcription for Speech to Text Applications for Under-resourced Indigenous African Languages: The Case of Kiswahili
title_zh: 资源贫乏的非洲土著语言的语音到文本应用程序的音位表示和转录：以斯瓦希里语为例
abstract: Building automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems is a challenging task, especially for under-resourced languages that need to construct corpora nearly from scratch and lack sufficient training data. It has emerged that several African indigenous languages, including Kiswahili, are technologically under-resourced. ASR systems are crucial, particularly for the hearing-impaired persons who can benefit from having transcripts in their native languages. However, the absence of transcribed speech datasets has complicated efforts to develop ASR models for these indigenous languages. This paper explores the transcription process and the development of a Kiswahili speech corpus, which includes both read-out texts and spontaneous speech data from native Kiswahili speakers. The study also discusses the vowels and consonants in Kiswahili and provides an updated Kiswahili phoneme dictionary for the ASR model that was created using the CMU Sphinx speech recognition toolbox, an open-source speech recognition toolkit. The ASR model was trained using an extended phonetic set that yielded a WER and SER of 18.87% and 49.5%, respectively, an improved performance than previous similar research for under-resourced languages.
summary: Building automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems is a challenging task, especially for under-resourced languages that need to construct corpora nearly from scratch and lack sufficient training data. It has emerged that several African indigenous languages, including Kiswahili, are technologically under-resourced. ASR systems are crucial, particularly for the hearing-impaired persons who can benefit from having transcripts in their native languages. However, the absence of transcribed speech datasets has complicated efforts to develop ASR models for these indigenous languages. This paper explores the transcription process and the development of a Kiswahili speech corpus, which includes both read-out texts and spontaneous speech data from native Kiswahili speakers. The study also discusses the vowels and consonants in Kiswahili and provides an updated Kiswahili phoneme dictionary for the ASR model that was created using the CMU Sphinx speech recognition toolbox, an open-source speech recognition toolkit. The ASR model was trained using an extended phonetic set that yielded a WER and SER of 18.87% and 49.5%, respectively, an improved performance than previous similar research for under-resourced languages.
abstract_zh: 构建自动语音识别（ASR）系统是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是对于资源匮乏的语言来说，这些语言需要几乎从头开始构建语料库并且缺乏足够的训练数据。包括斯瓦希里语在内的几种非洲土著语言已经出现技术资源不足的情况。 ASR 系统至关重要，特别是对于有听力障碍的人来说，他们可以从母语转录中受益。然而，由于缺乏转录的语音数据集，为这些土著语言开发 ASR 模型的工作变得更加复杂。本文探讨了斯瓦希里语语音语料库的转录过程和开发，其中包括斯瓦希里语母语人士的朗读文本和自发语音数据。该研究还讨论了斯瓦希里语的元音和辅音，并为 ASR 模型提供了更新的斯瓦希里语音素词典，该模型是使用 CMU Sphinx 语音识别工具箱（一个开源语音识别工具包）创建的。 ASR 模型使用扩展语音集进行训练，WER 和 SER 分别为 18.87% 和 49.5%，比之前针对资源贫乏语言的类似研究提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了为资源匮乏的斯瓦希里语构建语音识别系统的过程，包括语音语料库的创建、音素分析及改进的ASR模型开发。
AI.motivation: 非洲本土语言如斯瓦希里语缺乏语音数据和转录资源，限制了自动语音识别（ASR）技术的发展，而该技术对听障人士尤为重要。
AI.method: 通过收集母语者朗读和自发语音数据构建语料库，分析斯瓦希里语元音和辅音，利用CMU Sphinx工具箱开发包含扩展音素集的ASR模型。
AI.result: ASR模型在测试中达到18.87%的词错误率（WER）和49.5%的句子错误率（SER），优于同类资源匮乏语言的先前研究。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为资源匮乏语言的ASR系统开发提供了可行方法，并为斯瓦希里语的语音技术应用奠定了基础。

authors_text: Luca Castri,Sariah Mghames,Marc Hanheide,Nicola Bellotto
title: Causal Discovery of Dynamic Models for Predicting Human Spatial Interactions
title_zh: 用于预测人类空间交互的动态模型的因果发现
comment: Published at 2022 International Conference on Social Robotics (ICSR)
comments: Published at 2022 International Conference on Social Robotics (ICSR)
abstract: Exploiting robots for activities in human-shared environments, whether warehouses, shopping centres or hospitals, calls for such robots to understand the underlying physical interactions between nearby agents and objects. In particular, modelling cause-and-effect relations between the latter can help to predict unobserved human behaviours and anticipate the outcome of specific robot interventions. In this paper, we propose an application of causal discovery methods to model human-robot spatial interactions, trying to understand human behaviours from real-world sensor data in two possible scenarios: humans interacting with the environment, and humans interacting with obstacles. New methods and practical solutions are discussed to exploit, for the first time, a state-of-the-art causal discovery algorithm in some challenging human environments, with potential application in many service robotics scenarios. To demonstrate the utility of the causal models obtained from real-world datasets, we present a comparison between causal and non-causal prediction approaches. Our results show that the causal model correctly captures the underlying interactions of the considered scenarios and improves its prediction accuracy.
summary: Exploiting robots for activities in human-shared environments, whether warehouses, shopping centres or hospitals, calls for such robots to understand the underlying physical interactions between nearby agents and objects. In particular, modelling cause-and-effect relations between the latter can help to predict unobserved human behaviours and anticipate the outcome of specific robot interventions. In this paper, we propose an application of causal discovery methods to model human-robot spatial interactions, trying to understand human behaviours from real-world sensor data in two possible scenarios: humans interacting with the environment, and humans interacting with obstacles. New methods and practical solutions are discussed to exploit, for the first time, a state-of-the-art causal discovery algorithm in some challenging human environments, with potential application in many service robotics scenarios. To demonstrate the utility of the causal models obtained from real-world datasets, we present a comparison between causal and non-causal prediction approaches. Our results show that the causal model correctly captures the underlying interactions of the considered scenarios and improves its prediction accuracy.
abstract_zh: 利用机器人在人类共享的环境中进行活动，无论是仓库、购物中心还是医院，都要求此类机器人了解附近代理和物体之间潜在的物理交互。特别是，对后者之间的因果关系进行建模可以帮助预测未观察到的人类行为并预测特定机器人干预的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种应用因果发现方法来模拟人机空间交互的方法，试图在两种可能的场景中从现实世界的传感器数据中理解人类的行为：人类与环境交互，以及人类与障碍物交互。讨论了新方法和实用解决方案，首次在一些具有挑战性的人类环境中利用最先进的因果发现算法，并在许多服务机器人场景中具有潜在应用。为了证明从现实世界数据集中获得的因果模型的实用性，我们对因果和非因果预测方法进行了比较。我们的结果表明，因果模型正确地捕捉了所考虑场景的潜在相互作用，并提高了其预测准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将因果发现方法应用于建模人类与机器人在共享环境中的空间交互，通过分析真实传感器数据预测人类行为。
AI.motivation: 在共享环境中（如仓库、医院），机器人需理解人类与环境/障碍物的物理交互关系，以预测人类行为并优化机器人干预策略。
AI.method: 首次在具有挑战性的实际人类环境中应用前沿因果发现算法，通过对比因果模型与非因果预测方法验证有效性。
AI.result: 因果模型准确捕捉了场景中的交互关系，并显著提升了预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为服务机器人场景中的动态交互建模提供了有效解决方案。

New methods and practical solutions are discussed to exploit, for the first time, a state-of-the-art causal discovery algorithm in some challenging human environments, with potential application in many service robotics scenarios. To demonstrate the utility of the causal models obtained from real-world datasets, we present a comparison between causal and non-causal prediction approaches. Our results show that the causal model correctly captures the underlying interactions of the considered scenarios and improves its prediction accuracy. 利用机器人在人类共享的环境中进行活动，无论是仓库、购物中心还是医院，都要求此类机器人了解附近代理和物体之间潜在的物理交互。特别是，对后者之间的因果关系进行建模可以帮助预测未观察到的人类行为并预测特定机器人干预的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种应用因果发现方法来模拟人机空间交互的方法，试图在两种可能的场景中从现实世界的传感器数据中理解人类的行为：人类与环境交互，以及人类与障碍物交互。讨论了新方法和实用解决方案，首次在一些具有挑战性的人类环境中利用最先进的因果发现算法，并在许多服务机器人场景中具有潜在应用。为了证明从现实世界数据集中获得的因果模型的实用性，我们对因果和非因果预测方法进行了比较。我们的结果表明，因果模型正确地捕捉了所考虑场景的潜在相互作用，并提高了其预测准确性。 本文提出将因果发现方法应用于建模人类与机器人在共享环境中的空间交互，通过分析真实传感器数据预测人类行为。 Luca Castri,Sariah Mghames,Marc Hanheide,Nicola Bellotto cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Jingyang Zhao,Mingyu Xiao
title: Improved Approximation Algorithms for Capacitated Vehicle Routing with Fixed Capacity
title_zh: 固定容量车辆路径改进近似算法
abstract: The Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) is one of the most extensively studied problems in combinatorial optimization. Based on customer demand, we distinguish three variants of CVRP: unit-demand, splittable, and unsplittable. In this paper, we consider $k$-CVRP in general metrics and on general graphs, where $k$ is the vehicle capacity. All three versions are APX-hard for any fixed $k\geq3$. Assume that the approximation ratio of metric TSP is $\frac{3}{2}$. We present a $(\frac{5}{2}-Θ(\frac{1}{\sqrt{k}}))$-approximation algorithm for the splittable and unit-demand cases, and a $(\frac{5}{2}+\ln2-Θ(\frac{1}{\sqrt{k}}))$-approximation algorithm for the unsplittable case. Our approximation ratio is better than the previous results when $k$ is less than a sufficiently large value, approximately $1.7\times10^7$. For small values of $k$, we design independent and elegant algorithms with further improvements. For the splittable and unit-demand cases, we improve the approximation ratio from $1.792$ to $1.500$ for $k=3$, and from $1.750$ to $1.500$ for $k=4$. For the unsplittable case, we improve the approximation ratio from $1.792$ to $1.500$ for $k=3$, from $2.051$ to $1.750$ for $k=4$, and from $2.249$ to $2.157$ for $k=5$. The approximation ratio for $k=3$ surprisingly achieves the same value as in the splittable case. Our techniques, such as EX-ITP -- an extension of the classic ITP method, have the potential to improve algorithms for other routing problems as well.

abstract_zh: 容量车辆路径问题（CVRP）是组合优化中研究最广泛的问题之一。根据客户需求，我们区分了 CVRP 的三种变体：单位需求型、可拆分型和不可拆分型。在本文中，我们在一般指标和一般图表上考虑 $k$-CVRP，其中 $k$ 是车辆容量。对于任何固定的 $k\geq3$，所有三个版本都是 APX-hard。假设度量 TSP 的近似比率为 $\frac{3}{2}$。我们针对可分割和单位需求情况提出了 $(\frac{5}{2}-θ(\frac{1}{\sqrt{k}}))$ 近似算法，并针对不可分割情况提出了 $(\frac{5}{2}+\ln2-θ(\frac{1}{\sqrt{k}}))$ 近似算法。当 $k$ 小于足够大的值（大约 $1.7\times10^7$）时，我们的近似比优于之前的结果。对于较小的$k$值，我们设计了独立且优雅的算法并进一步改进。对于可分割和单位需求的情况，我们将 $k=3$ 的近似率从 $1.792$ 提高到 $1.500$，将 $k=4$ 的近似率从 $1.750$ 提高到 $1.500$。对于不可分割的情况，我们将 $k=3$ 的近似率从 $1.792$ 提高到 $1.500$，将 $k=4$ 的近似率从 $2.051$ 提高到 $1.750$，将 $k=5$ 的近似率从 $2.249$ 提高到 $2.157$。 $k=3$ 的近似比率令人惊讶地达到了与可拆分情况相同的值。我们的技术，例如 EX-ITP——经典 ITP 方法的扩展，也有可能改进其他路由问题的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文针对固定容量的容量车辆路径问题（CVRP）提出改进的近似算法，分别处理单位需求、可拆分和不可拆分三种变体，并在不同车辆容量下实现了更优的近似比。
AI.motivation: CVRP是组合优化中经典且重要的问题，但现有算法在车辆容量较小（k较小时）的场景下仍有改进空间，尤其当k小于约1.7×10⁷时，需设计更高效的近似算法。
AI.method: 扩展经典ITP方法（EX-ITP）并结合针对小k值的独立算法设计，分别优化可拆分/单位需求和不可拆分场景的近似策略。
AI.result: 对可拆分和单位需求场景，k=3时近似比从1.792提升至1.500，k=4时从1.750提升至1.500；对不可拆分场景，k=3时从1.792提升至1.500，k=4时从2.051提升至1.750，k=5时从2.249提升至2.157。
AI.conclusion: 提出的EX-ITP方法在CVRP中取得突破性近似比改进，尤其在小k值场景下表现显著，且该技术可能推广至其他路由问题的优化中。

authors_text: Seyed Roozbeh Razavi Rohani,Saeed Hedayatian,Mahdieh Soleymani Baghshah
title: BIMRL: Brain Inspired Meta Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: BIMRL：大脑启发元强化学习
comment: Accepted to 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Accepted to 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Sample efficiency has been a key issue in reinforcement learning (RL). An efficient agent must be able to leverage its prior experiences to quickly adapt to similar, but new tasks and situations. Meta-RL is one attempt at formalizing and addressing this issue. Inspired by recent progress in meta-RL, we introduce BIMRL, a novel multi-layer architecture along with a novel brain-inspired memory module that will help agents quickly adapt to new tasks within a few episodes. We also utilize this memory module to design a novel intrinsic reward that will guide the agent's exploration. Our architecture is inspired by findings in cognitive neuroscience and is compatible with the knowledge on connectivity and functionality of different regions in the brain. We empirically validate the effectiveness of our proposed method by competing with or surpassing the performance of some strong baselines on multiple MiniGrid environments.
summary: Sample efficiency has been a key issue in reinforcement learning (RL). An efficient agent must be able to leverage its prior experiences to quickly adapt to similar, but new tasks and situations. Meta-RL is one attempt at formalizing and addressing this issue. Inspired by recent progress in meta-RL, we introduce BIMRL, a novel multi-layer architecture along with a novel brain-inspired memory module that will help agents quickly adapt to new tasks within a few episodes. We also utilize this memory module to design a novel intrinsic reward that will guide the agent's exploration. Our architecture is inspired by findings in cognitive neuroscience and is compatible with the knowledge on connectivity and functionality of different regions in the brain. We empirically validate the effectiveness of our proposed method by competing with or surpassing the performance of some strong baselines on multiple MiniGrid environments.
abstract_zh: 样本效率一直是强化学习（RL）的关键问题。高效的代理必须能够利用其先前的经验来快速适应类似但新的任务和情况。 Meta-RL 是形式化和解决这个问题的一种尝试。受元强化学习最新进展的启发，我们引入了 BIMRL，这是一种新颖的多层架构以及新颖的受大脑启发的记忆模块，将帮助智能体在几集中快速适应新任务。我们还利用这个记忆模块来设计一种新颖的内在奖励，以指导代理的探索。我们的架构受到认知神经科学发现的启发，并且与大脑不同区域的连接和功能的知识兼容。我们通过在多个 MiniGrid 环境中竞争或超越一些强基线的性能来实证验证我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受大脑启发的元强化学习框架BIMRL，旨在提高强化学习中样本效率，使智能体能快速适应新任务。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习面临样本效率低的问题，智能体需要大量交互才能适应新任务，而元强化学习通过利用先验经验提升适应能力，但现有方法仍需改进。
AI.method: 设计了多层架构与脑启发记忆模块，结合认知神经科学原理，提出内在奖励机制以引导探索，模拟大脑不同区域的连接与功能。
AI.result: 在多个MiniGrid环境中，BIMRL在样本效率上优于或匹配现有强基线方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: BIMRL通过模拟大脑机制，有效提升了元强化学习的样本效率，为复杂任务快速适应提供了新思路。
