We also utilize this memory module to design a novel intrinsic reward that will guide the agent's exploration. Our architecture is inspired by findings in cognitive neuroscience and is compatible with the knowledge on connectivity and functionality of different regions in the brain. We empirically validate the effectiveness of our proposed method by competing with or surpassing the performance of some strong baselines on multiple MiniGrid environments. 样本效率一直是强化学习（RL）的关键问题。高效的代理必须能够利用其先前的经验来快速适应类似但新的任务和情况。 Meta-RL 是形式化和解决这个问题的一种尝试。受元强化学习最新进展的启发，我们引入了 BIMRL，这是一种新颖的多层架构以及新颖的受大脑启发的记忆模块，将帮助智能体在几集中快速适应新任务。我们还利用这个记忆模块来设计一种新颖的内在奖励，以指导代理的探索。我们的架构受到认知神经科学发现的启发，并且与大脑不同区域的连接和功能的知识兼容。我们通过在多个 MiniGrid 环境中竞争或超越一些强基线的性能来实证验证我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种受大脑启发的元强化学习框架BIMRL，旨在提高强化学习中样本效率，使智能体能快速适应新任务。 Seyed Roozbeh Razavi Rohani,Saeed Hedayatian,Mahdieh Soleymani Baghshah cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Elijah Pelofske
title: Mapping State Transition Susceptibility in Quantum Annealing
title_zh: 绘制量子退火中的状态转变敏感性
abstract: Quantum annealing is a novel type of analog computation that aims to use quantum mechanical fluctuations to search for optimal solutions of Ising problems. Quantum annealing in the transverse field Ising model, implemented on D-Wave devices, works by applying a time dependent transverse field, which puts all qubits into a uniform state of superposition, and then applying a Hamiltonian over time which describes a user programmed Ising problem. We present a method which utilizes two control features of D-Wave quantum annealers, reverse annealing and an h-gain schedule, to quantify the susceptibility, or the distance, between two classical states of an Ising problem. The starting state is encoded using reverse annealing, and the second state is encoded on the linear terms of problem Hamiltonian. An h-gain schedule is specified which incrementally increases the strength of the linear terms, thus allowing a quantification of the h-gain strength required to transition the anneal into a specific state at the final measurement. By the nature of quantum annealing, the state tends towards global minima and therefore we restrict the second classical state to a minimum solution of the given Ising problem. This susceptibility mapping, when enumerated across all initial states, shows in detail the behavior of the quantum annealer during reverse annealing. The procedure is experimentally demonstrated on three small test Ising's which were embedded in parallel on the D-Wave Advantage_system4.1. Analysis of the state transition mapping shows detailed characteristics of the reverse annealing process including intermediate state transition paths, which are visually represented as state transition networks.
summary: Quantum annealing is a novel type of analog computation that aims to use quantum mechanical fluctuations to search for optimal solutions of Ising problems. Quantum annealing in the transverse field Ising model, implemented on D-Wave devices, works by applying a time dependent transverse field, which puts all qubits into a uniform state of superposition, and then applying a Hamiltonian over time which describes a user programmed Ising problem. We present a method which utilizes two control features of D-Wave quantum annealers, reverse annealing and an h-gain schedule, to quantify the susceptibility, or the distance, between two classical states of an Ising problem. The starting state is encoded using reverse annealing, and the second state is encoded on the linear terms of problem Hamiltonian. An h-gain schedule is specified which incrementally increases the strength of the linear terms, thus allowing a quantification of the h-gain strength required to transition the anneal into a specific state at the final measurement. By the nature of quantum annealing, the state tends towards global minima and therefore we restrict the second classical state to a minimum solution of the given Ising problem. This susceptibility mapping, when enumerated across all initial states, shows in detail the behavior of the quantum annealer during reverse annealing. The procedure is experimentally demonstrated on three small test Ising's which were embedded in parallel on the D-Wave Advantage_system4.1. Analysis of the state transition mapping shows detailed characteristics of the reverse annealing process including intermediate state transition paths, which are visually represented as state transition networks.
abstract_zh: 量子退火是一种新型的模拟计算，旨在利用量子力学涨落来寻找伊辛问题的最优解。横向场 Ising 模型中的量子退火在 D-Wave 器件上实现，其工作原理是应用与时间相关的横向场，将所有量子位置于均匀叠加状态，然后随时间应用哈密顿量来描述用户编程的 Ising 问题。我们提出了一种利用 D-Wave 量子退火器的两个控制特征（反向退火和 h 增益计划）来量化伊辛问题的两个经典状态之间的敏感性或距离的方法。起始状态使用反向退火进行编码，第二状态根据问题哈密顿量的线性项进行编码。指定了 h 增益时间表，该时间表逐渐增加线性项的强度，从而允许量化最终测量时将退火转变为特定状态所需的 h 增益强度。根据量子退火的性质，状态趋向于全局最小值，因此我们将第二经典状态限制为给定伊辛问题的最小解。当对所有初始状态进行枚举时，该磁化率映射详细显示了量子退火器在反向退火过程中的行为。该过程在并行嵌入 D-Wave Advantage_system4.1 上的三个小型测试 Ising 上进行了实验演示。对状态转换映射的分析显示了反向退火过程的详细特征，包括中间状态转换路径，这些路径在视觉上表示为状态转换网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，利用逆退火和h-gain计划量化量子退火过程中经典状态之间的易感性，并通过实验展示状态转换网络。
AI.motivation: 理解量子退火器在逆退火过程中的状态转换行为，以揭示其动态特性并优化求解性能。
AI.method: 通过逆退火编码初始状态，结合h-gain计划逐步增强线性项强度，量化达到目标状态所需的参数阈值，并构建状态转换网络。
AI.result: 在三个嵌入D-Wave Advantage_system4.1的小型Ising模型上验证了方法，可视化了中间状态转换路径和网络结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分析量子退火器的逆退火过程提供了详细的行为洞察，有助于优化控制参数和问题映射策略。

authors_text: Kohei Honda,Hiroyuki Okuda,Tatsuya Suzuki,Akira Ito
title: MPC Builder for Autonomous Drive: Automatic Generation of MPCs for Motion Planning and Control
title_zh: 用于自动驾驶的 MPC Builder：自动生成用于运动规划和控制的 MPC
abstract: This study presents a new framework for vehicle motion planning and control based on the automatic generation of model predictive controllers (MPCs) named MPC Builder. In this framework, several components necessary for MPC, such as prediction models, constraints, and cost functions, are prepared in advance. The MPC Builder then generates various MPCs online in a unified manner according to traffic situations. This scheme enabled us to represent various driving tasks with less design effort than typical switched MPC systems. The proposed framework was implemented considering the continuation/generalized minimum residual (C/GMRES) method optimization solver, which can reduce computational costs. Finally, numerical experiments on multiple driving scenarios were presented.
summary: This study presents a new framework for vehicle motion planning and control based on the automatic generation of model predictive controllers (MPCs) named MPC Builder. In this framework, several components necessary for MPC, such as prediction models, constraints, and cost functions, are prepared in advance. The MPC Builder then generates various MPCs online in a unified manner according to traffic situations. This scheme enabled us to represent various driving tasks with less design effort than typical switched MPC systems. The proposed framework was implemented considering the continuation/generalized minimum residual (C/GMRES) method optimization solver, which can reduce computational costs. Finally, numerical experiments on multiple driving scenarios were presented.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种基于自动生成模型预测控制器 (MPC) 的车辆运动规划和控制新框架，名为 MPC Builder。在这个框架中，预先准备了MPC所需的几个组件，例如预测模型、约束和成本函数。然后MPC Builder根据流量情况在线统一生成各种MPC。与典型的交换 MPC 系统相比，该方案使我们能够用更少的设计工作来表示各种驾驶任务。所提出的框架是考虑连续/广义最小残差（C/GMRES）方法优化求解器来实现的，这可以降低计算成本。最后，提出了多种驾驶场景的数值实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MPC Builder的框架，用于自动驾驶中运动规划与控制的模型预测控制器（MPC）自动在线生成。
AI.motivation: 传统切换式MPC系统需要大量人工设计工作，而本文旨在通过统一框架减少设计成本并提升多场景适应性。
AI.method: 预先定义MPC所需组件（预测模型、约束、代价函数），根据交通状况在线生成多种MPC，并采用C/GMRES优化求解器降低计算成本。
AI.result: 在多种驾驶场景的数值实验中验证了框架有效性，证明其能以更少设计工作量实现多样化驾驶任务。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自动驾驶提供了高效、灵活的MPC生成方案，相比传统方法在计算效率和设计复杂度上具有优势。

authors_text: Kohei Honda,Kenji Koide,Masashi Yokozuka,Shuji Oishi,Atsuhiko Banno
title: Generalized LOAM: LiDAR Odometry Estimation with Trainable Local Geometric Features
title_zh: 广义 LOAM：具有可训练局部几何特征的 LiDAR 里程计估计
abstract: This paper presents a LiDAR odometry estimation framework called Generalized LOAM. Our proposed method is generalized in that it can seamlessly fuse various local geometric shapes around points to improve the position estimation accuracy compared to the conventional LiDAR odometry and mapping (LOAM) method. To utilize continuous geometric features for LiDAR odometry estimation, we incorporate tiny neural networks into a generalized iterative closest point (GICP) algorithm. These neural networks improve the data association metric and the matching cost function using local geometric features. Experiments with the KITTI benchmark demonstrate that our proposed method reduces relative trajectory errors compared to the other LiDAR odometry estimation methods.
summary: This paper presents a LiDAR odometry estimation framework called Generalized LOAM. Our proposed method is generalized in that it can seamlessly fuse various local geometric shapes around points to improve the position estimation accuracy compared to the conventional LiDAR odometry and mapping (LOAM) method. To utilize continuous geometric features for LiDAR odometry estimation, we incorporate tiny neural networks into a generalized iterative closest point (GICP) algorithm. These neural networks improve the data association metric and the matching cost function using local geometric features. Experiments with the KITTI benchmark demonstrate that our proposed method reduces relative trajectory errors compared to the other LiDAR odometry estimation methods.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种名为 Generalized LOAM 的 LiDAR 里程计估计框架。我们提出的方法具有普遍性，与传统的激光雷达里程计和测绘（LOAM）方法相比，它可以无缝融合点周围的各种局部几何形状，以提高位置估计精度。为了利用连续几何特征进行 LiDAR 里程计估计，我们将微型神经网络纳入广义迭代最近点（GICP）算法中。这些神经网络使用局部几何特征改进数据关联度量和匹配成本函数。 KITTI 基准测试表明，与其他 LiDAR 里程计估计方法相比，我们提出的方法减少了相对轨迹误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的LiDAR里程计估计框架Generalized LOAM，通过融合局部几何特征提升定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统LOAM方法在处理复杂环境时存在数据关联度量不足的问题，难以有效利用局部几何特征提升估计准确性。
AI.method: 将微型神经网络嵌入广义迭代最近点（GICP）算法，通过学习局部几何特征优化数据关联度量与匹配成本函数。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中，该方法相比其他LiDAR里程计方法显著降低了相对轨迹误差。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合神经网络特征提取与GICP算法，Generalized LOAM在复杂场景下实现了更精确的LiDAR里程计估计。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的LiDAR里程计估计框架Generalized LOAM，通过融合局部几何特征提升定位精度。

search_text: Generalized LOAM: LiDAR Odometry Estimation with Trainable Local Geometric Features 广义 LOAM：具有可训练局部几何特征的 LiDAR 里程计估计 This paper presents a LiDAR odometry estimation framework called Generalized LOAM. Our proposed method is generalized in that it can seamlessly fuse various local geometric shapes around points to improve the position estimation accuracy compared to the conventional LiDAR odometry and mapping (LOAM) method. To utilize continuous geometric features for LiDAR odometry estimation, we incorporate tiny neural networks into a generalized iterative closest point (GICP) algorithm. These neural networks improve the data association metric and the matching cost function using local geometric features. Experiments with the KITTI benchmark demonstrate that our proposed method reduces relative trajectory errors compared to the other LiDAR odometry estimation methods. 本文提出了一种名为 Generalized LOAM 的 LiDAR 里程计估计框架。我们提出的方法具有普遍性，与传统的激光雷达里程计和测绘（LOAM）方法相比，它可以无缝融合点周围的各种局部几何形状，以提高位置估计精度。为了利用连续几何特征进行 LiDAR 里程计估计，我们将微型神经网络纳入广义迭代最近点（GICP）算法中。这些神经网络使用局部几何特征改进数据关联度量和匹配成本函数。 KITTI 基准测试表明，与其他 LiDAR 里程计估计方法相比，我们提出的方法减少了相对轨迹误差。 本文提出一种改进的LiDAR里程计估计框架Generalized LOAM，通过融合局部几何特征提升定位精度。 Kohei Honda,Kenji Koide,Masashi Yokozuka,Shuji Oishi,Atsuhiko Banno cs.RO

authors_text: Yuhe Guo,Zhewei Wei
title: Clenshaw Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: Clenshaw 图神经网络
abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs), which use a message-passing paradigm with stacked convolution layers, are foundational methods for learning graph representations. Recent GCN models use various residual connection techniques to alleviate the model degradation problem such as over-smoothing and gradient vanishing. Existing residual connection techniques, however, fail to make extensive use of underlying graph structure as in the graph spectral domain, which is critical for obtaining satisfactory results on heterophilic graphs. In this paper, we introduce ClenshawGCN, a GNN model that employs the Clenshaw Summation Algorithm to enhance the expressiveness of the GCN model. ClenshawGCN equips the standard GCN model with two straightforward residual modules: the adaptive initial residual connection and the negative second-order residual connection. We show that by adding these two residual modules, ClenshawGCN implicitly simulates a polynomial filter under the Chebyshev basis, giving it at least as much expressive power as polynomial spectral GNNs. In addition, we conduct comprehensive experiments to demonstrate the superiority of our model over spatial and spectral GNN models.
summary: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs), which use a message-passing paradigm with stacked convolution layers, are foundational methods for learning graph representations. Recent GCN models use various residual connection techniques to alleviate the model degradation problem such as over-smoothing and gradient vanishing. Existing residual connection techniques, however, fail to make extensive use of underlying graph structure as in the graph spectral domain, which is critical for obtaining satisfactory results on heterophilic graphs. In this paper, we introduce ClenshawGCN, a GNN model that employs the Clenshaw Summation Algorithm to enhance the expressiveness of the GCN model. ClenshawGCN equips the standard GCN model with two straightforward residual modules: the adaptive initial residual connection and the negative second-order residual connection. We show that by adding these two residual modules, ClenshawGCN implicitly simulates a polynomial filter under the Chebyshev basis, giving it at least as much expressive power as polynomial spectral GNNs. In addition, we conduct comprehensive experiments to demonstrate the superiority of our model over spatial and spectral GNN models.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）使用具有堆叠卷积层的消息传递范例，是学习图表示的基础方法。最近的 GCN 模型使用各种残差连接技术来缓解模型退化问题，例如过度平滑和梯度消失。然而，现有的残差连接技术未能广泛使用图谱域中的底层图结构，而这对于在异亲图上获得满意的结果至关重要。在本文中，我们介绍了 ClenshawGCN，这是一种 GNN 模型，它采用 Clenshaw 求和算法来增强 GCN 模型的表达能力。 ClenshawGCN 为标准 GCN 模型配备了两个简单的残差模块：自适应初始残差连接和负二阶残差连接。我们证明，通过添加这两个残差模块，ClenshawGCN 隐式模拟了切比雪夫基础下的多项式滤波器，使其至少具有与多项式谱 GNN 一样多的表达能力。此外，我们还进行了全面的实验来证明我们的模型相对于空间和光谱 GNN 模型的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ClenshawGCN的图神经网络模型，通过引入Clenshaw求和算法增强GCN的表达能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络的残差连接技术未能充分利用图谱域结构，导致在异质图上表现不佳，需改进模型表达能力。
AI.method: 设计两种残差模块（自适应初始残差连接和负二阶残差连接），通过Chebyshev基模拟多项式滤波器，提升模型表达能力。
AI.result: 实验表明ClenshawGCN在空间和谱域图神经网络模型中表现更优，尤其在异质图任务中效果显著。
AI.conclusion: ClenshawGCN通过谱域结构建模有效解决了异质图学习难题，为图神经网络设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sam Ganzfried
title: Observable Perfect Equilibrium
title_zh: 可观测的完美平衡
abstract: While Nash equilibrium has emerged as the central game-theoretic solution concept, many important games contain several Nash equilibria and we must determine how to select between them in order to create real strategic agents. Several Nash equilibrium refinement concepts have been proposed and studied for sequential imperfect-information games, the most prominent being trembling-hand perfect equilibrium, quasi-perfect equilibrium, and recently one-sided quasi-perfect equilibrium. These concepts are robust to certain arbitrarily small mistakes, and are guaranteed to always exist; however, we argue that neither of these is the correct concept for developing strong agents in sequential games of imperfect information. We define a new equilibrium refinement concept for extensive-form games called observable perfect equilibrium in which the solution is robust over trembles in publicly-observable action probabilities (not necessarily over all action probabilities that may not be observable by opposing players). Observable perfect equilibrium correctly captures the assumption that the opponent is playing as rationally as possible given mistakes that have been observed (while previous solution concepts do not). We prove that observable perfect equilibrium is always guaranteed to exist, and demonstrate that it leads to a different solution than the prior extensive-form refinements in no-limit poker. We expect observable perfect equilibrium to be a useful equilibrium refinement concept for modeling many important imperfect-information games of interest in artificial intelligence.
summary: While Nash equilibrium has emerged as the central game-theoretic solution concept, many important games contain several Nash equilibria and we must determine how to select between them in order to create real strategic agents. Several Nash equilibrium refinement concepts have been proposed and studied for sequential imperfect-information games, the most prominent being trembling-hand perfect equilibrium, quasi-perfect equilibrium, and recently one-sided quasi-perfect equilibrium. These concepts are robust to certain arbitrarily small mistakes, and are guaranteed to always exist; however, we argue that neither of these is the correct concept for developing strong agents in sequential games of imperfect information. We define a new equilibrium refinement concept for extensive-form games called observable perfect equilibrium in which the solution is robust over trembles in publicly-observable action probabilities (not necessarily over all action probabilities that may not be observable by opposing players). Observable perfect equilibrium correctly captures the assumption that the opponent is playing as rationally as possible given mistakes that have been observed (while previous solution concepts do not). We prove that observable perfect equilibrium is always guaranteed to exist, and demonstrate that it leads to a different solution than the prior extensive-form refinements in no-limit poker. We expect observable perfect equilibrium to be a useful equilibrium refinement concept for modeling many important imperfect-information games of interest in artificial intelligence.
abstract_zh: 虽然纳什均衡已成为博弈论解决方案的核心概念，但许多重要的博弈都包含多个纳什均衡，我们必须确定如何在它们之间进行选择，以创建真正的战略代理。针对连续不完美信息博弈，人们提出并研究了几种纳什均衡细化概念，其中最突出的是颤手完美均衡、拟完美均衡和最近的单边拟完美均衡。这些概念对于某些任意小的错误是鲁棒的，并且保证始终存在；然而，我们认为，这些都不是在不完美信息的序列博弈中开发强代理的正确概念。我们为广泛形式的博弈定义了一个新的均衡细化概念，称为可观察完美均衡，其中解决方案对于公开可观察的行动概率（不一定是对立玩家可能无法观察到的所有行动概率）的颤动具有鲁棒性。可观察的完美均衡正确地捕捉了这样的假设：在给定已观察到的错误的情况下，对手正在尽可能理性地进行游戏（而以前的解决方案概念则不然）。我们证明了可观察的完美均衡总是保证存在，并证明它会导致与无限注扑克中先前的扩展形式改进不同的解决方案。我们期望可观察的完美均衡成为一个有用的均衡细化概念，用于对人工智能中许多重要的不完美信息博弈进行建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的博弈论均衡精炼概念——可观测完美均衡，用于解决不完全信息序贯博弈中均衡选择问题。
AI.motivation: 现有均衡精炼概念（如颤抖手完美均衡）无法准确反映对手在观察到错误情况下的理性行为，导致在复杂博弈（如德州扑克）中难以生成有效策略。
AI.method: 定义基于公开可观察动作概率颤抖的均衡概念，假设对手会根据已观测到的错误进行理性决策，而非考虑所有潜在不可观测的错误。
AI.result: 证明可观测完美均衡必然存在，并在无限德州扑克中验证其与传统方法得出不同解，显示其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该概念为AI领域中不完全信息博弈的建模提供了更符合实际的均衡分析工具。

Observable perfect equilibrium correctly captures the assumption that the opponent is playing as rationally as possible given mistakes that have been observed (while previous solution concepts do not). We prove that observable perfect equilibrium is always guaranteed to exist, and demonstrate that it leads to a different solution than the prior extensive-form refinements in no-limit poker. We expect observable perfect equilibrium to be a useful equilibrium refinement concept for modeling many important imperfect-information games of interest in artificial intelligence. 虽然纳什均衡已成为博弈论解决方案的核心概念，但许多重要的博弈都包含多个纳什均衡，我们必须确定如何在它们之间进行选择，以创建真正的战略代理。针对连续不完美信息博弈，人们提出并研究了几种纳什均衡细化概念，其中最突出的是颤手完美均衡、拟完美均衡和最近的单边拟完美均衡。这些概念对于某些任意小的错误是鲁棒的，并且保证始终存在；然而，我们认为，这些都不是在不完美信息的序列博弈中开发强代理的正确概念。我们为广泛形式的博弈定义了一个新的均衡细化概念，称为可观察完美均衡，其中解决方案对于公开可观察的行动概率（不一定是对立玩家可能无法观察到的所有行动概率）的颤动具有鲁棒性。可观察的完美均衡正确地捕捉了这样的假设：在给定已观察到的错误的情况下，对手正在尽可能理性地进行游戏（而以前的解决方案概念则不然）。我们证明了可观察的完美均衡总是保证存在，并证明它会导致与无限注扑克中先前的扩展形式改进不同的解决方案。我们期望可观察的完美均衡成为一个有用的均衡细化概念，用于对人工智能中许多重要的不完美信息博弈进行建模。 本文提出一种新的博弈论均衡精炼概念——可观测完美均衡，用于解决不完全信息序贯博弈中均衡选择问题。 Sam Ganzfried cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.MA,econ.TH

authors_text: Jiayi Yao,Ping Li,Xiatao Kang,Yuzhe Wang
title: A pruning method based on the dissimilarity of angle among channels and filters
title_zh: 一种基于通道和滤波器角度不相似的剪枝方法
abstract: Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is more and more widely used in various fileds, and its computation and memory-demand are also increasing significantly. In order to make it applicable to limited conditions such as embedded application, network compression comes out. Among them, researchers pay more attention to network pruning. In this paper, we encode the convolution network to obtain the similarity of different encoding nodes, and evaluate the connectivity-power among convolutional kernels on the basis of the similarity. Then impose different level of penalty according to different connectivity-power. Meanwhile, we propose Channel Pruning base on the Dissimilarity of Angle (DACP). Firstly, we train a sparse model by GL penalty, and impose an angle dissimilarity constraint on the channels and filters of convolutional network to obtain a more sparse structure. Eventually, the effectiveness of our method is demonstrated in the section of experiment. On CIFAR-10, we reduce 66.86% FLOPs on VGG-16 with 93.31% accuracy after pruning, where FLOPs represents the number of floating-point operations per second of the model. Moreover, on ResNet-32, we reduce FLOPs by 58.46%, which makes the accuracy after pruning reach 91.76%.
summary: Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is more and more widely used in various fileds, and its computation and memory-demand are also increasing significantly. In order to make it applicable to limited conditions such as embedded application, network compression comes out. Among them, researchers pay more attention to network pruning. In this paper, we encode the convolution network to obtain the similarity of different encoding nodes, and evaluate the connectivity-power among convolutional kernels on the basis of the similarity. Then impose different level of penalty according to different connectivity-power. Meanwhile, we propose Channel Pruning base on the Dissimilarity of Angle (DACP). Firstly, we train a sparse model by GL penalty, and impose an angle dissimilarity constraint on the channels and filters of convolutional network to obtain a more sparse structure. Eventually, the effectiveness of our method is demonstrated in the section of experiment. On CIFAR-10, we reduce 66.86% FLOPs on VGG-16 with 93.31% accuracy after pruning, where FLOPs represents the number of floating-point operations per second of the model. Moreover, on ResNet-32, we reduce FLOPs by 58.46%, which makes the accuracy after pruning reach 91.76%.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在各个领域的应用越来越广泛，其计算量和内存需求也显着增加。为了使其适用于嵌入式应用等有限条件，网络压缩应运而生。其中，研究人员更加关注网络剪枝。在本文中，我们对卷积网络进行编码以获得不同编码节点的相似度，并根据相似度评估卷积核之间的连接能力。然后根据不同的连接功率施加不同程度的惩罚。同时，我们提出了基于角度相异性的通道剪枝（DACP）。首先，我们通过GL惩罚训练稀疏模型，并对卷积网络的通道和滤波器施加角度相异约束，以获得更稀疏的结构。最终，我们的方法的有效性在实验部分得到了证明。在 CIFAR-10 上，剪枝后我们在 VGG-16 上减少了 66.86% 的 FLOP，准确率达到 93.31%，其中 FLOPs 代表模型每秒的浮点运算数。此外，在ResNet-32上，我们将FLOPs减少了58.46%，这使得剪枝后的准确率达到91.76%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于通道和滤波器角度差异的剪枝方法（DACP），用于压缩卷积神经网络（CNN）以降低计算量和内存需求。
AI.motivation: 随着CNN在各领域的广泛应用，其计算和内存需求显著增加，需通过网络压缩（如剪枝）适配嵌入式等资源受限场景。
AI.method: 通过编码网络获取节点相似性，评估卷积核连通性并施加不同惩罚；提出DACP方法，利用GL惩罚训练稀疏模型，并对通道和滤波器施加角度差异约束以获得更稀疏结构。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，VGG-16剪枝后FLOPs减少66.86%且准确率保持93.31%；ResNet-32剪枝后FLOPs减少58.46%，准确率达91.76%。
AI.conclusion: DACP方法有效平衡了网络剪枝的稀疏性与精度，显著降低计算量，适用于资源受限场景的CNN部署。

authors_text: Meng Li,Xue-Ping Wang
title: The solution set of fuzzy relation equations with addition-min composition
title_zh: 加法最小组合模糊关系方程的解集
abstract: This paper deals with the resolutions of fuzzy relation equations with addition-min composition. When the fuzzy relation equations have a solution, we first propose an algorithm to find all minimal solutions of the fuzzy relation equations and also supply an algorithm to find all maximal solutions of the fuzzy relation equations, which will be illustrated, respectively, by numeral examples. Then we prove that every solution of the fuzzy relation equations is between a minimal solution and a maximal one, so that we describe the solution set of the fuzzy relation equations completely.
summary: This paper deals with the resolutions of fuzzy relation equations with addition-min composition. When the fuzzy relation equations have a solution, we first propose an algorithm to find all minimal solutions of the fuzzy relation equations and also supply an algorithm to find all maximal solutions of the fuzzy relation equations, which will be illustrated, respectively, by numeral examples. Then we prove that every solution of the fuzzy relation equations is between a minimal solution and a maximal one, so that we describe the solution set of the fuzzy relation equations completely.
abstract_zh: 本文研究具有加法最小组合的模糊关系方程的求解。当模糊关系方程有解时，我们首先提出一种求模糊关系方程所有极小解的算法，并给出一种求模糊关系方程所有极大解的算法，并分别用数值例子来说明。然后证明了模糊关系方程的每一个解都介于最小解和最大解之间，从而完整地描述了模糊关系方程的解集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了加法-最小合成模糊关系方程的解集结构，提出算法求解极小解与极大解，并证明所有解介于二者之间。
AI.motivation: 模糊关系方程在处理不确定性问题中应用广泛，但现有方法对加法-最小合成结构的解集描述不够系统，需建立完整解集刻画方法。
AI.method: 提出两阶段算法：首先通过降序遍历求取所有极小解，再通过升序遍历求取极大解，并利用数值实例验证算法有效性。
AI.result: 证明任意解必位于某个极小解与极大解区间内，从而通过极解集合完整表征整个解集结构。
AI.conclusion: 建立了加法-最小合成模糊关系方程解集的系统描述框架，为相关应用提供了理论支撑与计算工具。

authors_text: Jiachen Lian,Alan W Black,Yijing Lu,Louis Goldstein,Shinji Watanabe,Gopala K. Anumanchipalli
title: Articulatory Representation Learning Via Joint Factor Analysis and Neural Matrix Factorization
title_zh: 通过联合因子分析和神经矩阵分解进行发音表示学习
abstract: Articulatory representation learning is the fundamental research in modeling neural speech production system. Our previous work has established a deep paradigm to decompose the articulatory kinematics data into gestures, which explicitly model the phonological and linguistic structure encoded with human speech production mechanism, and corresponding gestural scores. We continue with this line of work by raising two concerns: (1) The articulators are entangled together in the original algorithm such that some of the articulators do not leverage effective moving patterns, which limits the interpretability of both gestures and gestural scores; (2) The EMA data is sparsely sampled from articulators, which limits the intelligibility of learned representations. In this work, we propose a novel articulatory representation decomposition algorithm that takes the advantage of guided factor analysis to derive the articulatory-specific factors and factor scores. A neural convolutive matrix factorization algorithm is then employed on the factor scores to derive the new gestures and gestural scores. We experiment with the rtMRI corpus that captures the fine-grained vocal tract contours. Both subjective and objective evaluation results suggest that the newly proposed system delivers the articulatory representations that are intelligible, generalizable, efficient and interpretable.
summary: Articulatory representation learning is the fundamental research in modeling neural speech production system. Our previous work has established a deep paradigm to decompose the articulatory kinematics data into gestures, which explicitly model the phonological and linguistic structure encoded with human speech production mechanism, and corresponding gestural scores. We continue with this line of work by raising two concerns: (1) The articulators are entangled together in the original algorithm such that some of the articulators do not leverage effective moving patterns, which limits the interpretability of both gestures and gestural scores; (2) The EMA data is sparsely sampled from articulators, which limits the intelligibility of learned representations. In this work, we propose a novel articulatory representation decomposition algorithm that takes the advantage of guided factor analysis to derive the articulatory-specific factors and factor scores. A neural convolutive matrix factorization algorithm is then employed on the factor scores to derive the new gestures and gestural scores. We experiment with the rtMRI corpus that captures the fine-grained vocal tract contours. Both subjective and objective evaluation results suggest that the newly proposed system delivers the articulatory representations that are intelligible, generalizable, efficient and interpretable.
abstract_zh: 发音表示学习是神经语音产生系统建模的基础研究。我们之前的工作建立了一个深层范式，将关节运动学数据分解为手势，明确地模拟了用人类语音产生机制编码的语音和语言结构以及相应的手势分数。我们继续这一工作，提出了两个问题：（1）咬合器在原始算法中纠缠在一起，使得一些咬合器没有利用有效的移动模式，这限制了手势和手势分数的可解释性； (2) EMA 数据是从发音器官中稀疏采样的，这限制了学习表示的可理解性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的发音表示分解算法，该算法利用引导因子分析的优势来导出特定于发音的因子和因子得分。然后对因子分数采用神经卷积矩阵分解算法来导出新的手势和手势分数。我们对捕捉细粒度声道轮廓的 rtMRI 语料库进行了实验。主观和客观评估结果都表明，新提出的系统提供了可理解、可概括、高效和可解释的发音表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合引导因子分析与神经矩阵分解的算法，用于改进发音运动数据的可解释性和表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因发音器官运动模式纠缠及EMA数据采样稀疏，导致手势和得分表示的可解释性受限。
AI.method: 通过引导因子分析提取发音特异性因子及得分，再利用神经卷积矩阵分解生成新的手势与得分表示。
AI.result: 基于rtMRI数据集的实验表明，新方法在可理解性、泛化性、效率及可解释性方面均优于原有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提系统有效解决了发音表示学习中的关键问题，为神经语音生产建模提供了更高效可解释的解决方案。

search_text: Articulatory Representation Learning Via Joint Factor Analysis and Neural Matrix Factorization 通过联合因子分析和神经矩阵分解进行发音表示学习 Articulatory representation learning is the fundamental research in modeling neural speech production system. Our previous work has established a deep paradigm to decompose the articulatory kinematics data into gestures, which explicitly model the phonological and linguistic structure encoded with human speech production mechanism, and corresponding gestural scores. We continue with this line of work by raising two concerns: (1) The articulators are entangled together in the original algorithm such that some of the articulators do not leverage effective moving patterns, which limits the interpretability of both gestures and gestural scores; (2) The EMA data is sparsely sampled from articulators, which limits the intelligibility of learned representations. In this work, we propose a novel articulatory representation decomposition algorithm that takes the advantage of guided factor analysis to derive the articulatory-specific factors and factor scores. A neural convolutive matrix factorization algorithm is then employed on the factor scores to derive the new gestures and gestural scores. We experiment with the rtMRI corpus that captures the fine-grained vocal tract contours. Both subjective and objective evaluation results suggest that the newly proposed system delivers the articulatory representations that are intelligible, generalizable, efficient and interpretable. 发音表示学习是神经语音产生系统建模的基础研究。我们之前的工作建立了一个深层范式，将关节运动学数据分解为手势，明确地模拟了用人类语音产生机制编码的语音和语言结构以及相应的手势分数。我们继续这一工作，提出了两个问题：（1）咬合器在原始算法中纠缠在一起，使得一些咬合器没有利用有效的移动模式，这限制了手势和手势分数的可解释性； (2) EMA 数据是从发音器官中稀疏采样的，这限制了学习表示的可理解性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的发音表示分解算法，该算法利用引导因子分析的优势来导出特定于发音的因子和因子得分。然后对因子分数采用神经卷积矩阵分解算法来导出新的手势和手势分数。我们对捕捉细粒度声道轮廓的 rtMRI 语料库进行了实验。主观和客观评估结果都表明，新提出的系统提供了可理解、可概括、高效和可解释的发音表示。 本文提出一种结合引导因子分析与神经矩阵分解的算法，用于改进发音运动数据的可解释性和表示学习。 Jiachen Lian,Alan W Black,Yijing Lu,Louis Goldstein,Shinji Watanabe,Gopala K. Anumanchipalli eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Asma Elmaizi,Maria Merzouqi,Elkebir Sarhrouni,Ahmed hammouch,Chafik Nacir
title: Hybridization of filter and wrapper approaches for the dimensionality reduction and classification of hyperspectral images
title_zh: 用于高光谱图像降维和分类的过滤器和包装器方法的混合
comment: ef:Proceedings - 3rd International Conference on Advanced Technologies for Signal and Image Processing, ATSIP 2017, 2017, 8075549 - http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-85035329769&partnerID=MN8TOARS
comments: ef:Proceedings - 3rd International Conference on Advanced Technologies for Signal and Image Processing, ATSIP 2017, 2017, 8075549 - http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-85035329769&partnerID=MN8TOARS
abstract: The high dimensionality of hyperspectral images often imposes a heavy computational burden for image processing. Therefore, dimensionality reduction is often an essential step in order to remove the irrelevant, noisy and redundant bands. And consequently, increase the classification accuracy. However, identification of useful bands from hundreds or even thousands of related bands is a nontrivial task. This paper aims at identifying a small set of bands, for improving computational speed and prediction accuracy. Hence, we have proposed a hybrid algorithm through band selection for dimensionality reduction of hyperspectral images. The proposed approach combines mutual information gain (MIG), Minimum Redundancy Maximum Relevance (mRMR) and Error probability of Fano with Support Vector Machine Bands Elimination (SVM-PF). The proposed approach is compared to an effective reproduced filters approach based on mutual information. Experimental results on HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C have shown that the proposed approach outperforms the reproduced filters. Keywords - Hyperspectral images, Classification, band Selection, filter, wrapper, mutual information, information gain.

The proposed approach is compared to an effective reproduced filters approach based on mutual information. Experimental results on HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C have shown that the proposed approach outperforms the reproduced filters. Keywords - Hyperspectral images, Classification, band Selection, filter, wrapper, mutual information, information gain.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像的高维性通常会给图像处理带来沉重的计算负担。因此，降维通常是去除不相关、噪声和冗余频带的重要步骤。从而提高分类精度。然而，从数百甚至数千个相关频带中识别有用频带是一项艰巨的任务。本文旨在识别一小组频带，以提高计算速度和预测精度。因此，我们提出了一种通过波段选择来降低高光谱图像维数的混合算法。所提出的方法将互信息增益 (MIG)、最小冗余最大相关性 (mRMR) 和 Fano 错误概率与支持向量机频带消除 (SVM-PF) 相结合。将所提出的方法与基于互信息的有效再现滤波器方法进行比较。 HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C 上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于再现的滤波器。关键词 - 高光谱图像、分类、波段选择、滤波器、包装器、互信息、信息增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合滤波器和包装器方法的混合算法，用于高光谱图像的降维和分类。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像的高维特性导致计算负担重，需通过降维去除冗余波段以提高分类精度，但如何有效筛选关键波段是挑战。
AI.method: 融合互信息增益（MIG）、最小冗余最大相关性（mRMR）、Fano误差概率与支持向量机波段消除（SVM-PF）的混合方法，结合滤波器与包装器优势。
AI.result: 在AVIRIS 92AV3C数据集实验中，该方法优于传统滤波器方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 混合算法通过结合滤波器与包装器方法，有效提升了高光谱图像的降维与分类性能。

authors_text: Deepanway Ghosal,Navonil Majumder,Rada Mihalcea,Soujanya Poria
title: Two is Better than Many? Binary Classification as an Effective Approach to Multi-Choice Question Answering
title_zh: 两个比很多好？二元分类作为多项选择题回答的有效方法
abstract: We propose a simple refactoring of multi-choice question answering (MCQA) tasks as a series of binary classifications. The MCQA task is generally performed by scoring each (question, answer) pair normalized over all the pairs, and then selecting the answer from the pair that yield the highest score. For n answer choices, this is equivalent to an n-class classification setup where only one class (true answer) is correct. We instead show that classifying (question, true answer) as positive instances and (question, false answer) as negative instances is significantly more effective across various models and datasets. We show the efficacy of our proposed approach in different tasks -- abductive reasoning, commonsense question answering, science question answering, and sentence completion. Our DeBERTa binary classification model reaches the top or close to the top performance on public leaderboards for these tasks. The source code of the proposed approach is available at https://github.com/declare-lab/TEAM.
summary: We propose a simple refactoring of multi-choice question answering (MCQA) tasks as a series of binary classifications. The MCQA task is generally performed by scoring each (question, answer) pair normalized over all the pairs, and then selecting the answer from the pair that yield the highest score. For n answer choices, this is equivalent to an n-class classification setup where only one class (true answer) is correct. We instead show that classifying (question, true answer) as positive instances and (question, false answer) as negative instances is significantly more effective across various models and datasets. We show the efficacy of our proposed approach in different tasks -- abductive reasoning, commonsense question answering, science question answering, and sentence completion. Our DeBERTa binary classification model reaches the top or close to the top performance on public leaderboards for these tasks. The source code of the proposed approach is available at https://github.com/declare-lab/TEAM.
abstract_zh: 我们提出将多选题回答（MCQA）任务简单重构为一系列二元分类。 MCQA 任务通常是通过对所有对中标准化的每个（问题、答案）对进行评分，然后从得分最高的对中选择答案来执行的。对于 n 个答案选择，这相当于 n 类分类设置，其中只有一个类（真实答案）是正确的。相反，我们表明，在各种模型和数据集中，将（问题，正确答案）分类为正面实例，将（问题，错误答案）分类为负面实例，效果显着更有效。我们展示了我们提出的方法在不同任务中的有效性——溯因推理、常识问答、科学问答和句子完成。我们的 DeBERTa 二元分类模型在这些任务的公共排行榜上达到了顶级或接近顶级的表现。该方法的源代码可在 https://github.com/declare-lab/TEAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将多选题问答任务重构为二分类问题，通过对比不同模型和数据集的效果，验证该方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统多选题问答任务采用n类分类方法，但该方法在处理复杂任务时可能存在效率或准确性问题，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 将多选题中的正确答案与问题对作为正样本，错误答案与问题对作为负样本，构建二分类模型进行训练和预测。
AI.result: DeBERTa二分类模型在多个任务（如归纳推理、常识问答等）的公开榜单上达到或接近最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 二分类方法在多选题问答任务中表现优异，具有跨任务泛化能力，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Victor Dibia,Adam Fourney,Gagan Bansal,Forough Poursabzi-Sangdeh,Han Liu,Saleema Amershi
title: Aligning Offline Metrics and Human Judgments of Value for Code Generation Models
title_zh: 协调离线指标和人类对代码生成模型的价值判断
abstract: Large language models have demonstrated great potential to assist programmers in generating code. For such human-AI pair programming scenarios, we empirically demonstrate that while generated code is most often evaluated in terms of their functional correctness (i.e., whether generations pass available unit tests), correctness does not fully capture (e.g., may underestimate) the productivity gains these models may provide. Through a user study with N = 49 experienced programmers, we show that while correctness captures high-value generations, programmers still rate code that fails unit tests as valuable if it reduces the overall effort needed to complete a coding task. Finally, we propose a hybrid metric that combines functional correctness and syntactic similarity and show that it achieves a 14% stronger correlation with value and can therefore better represent real-world gains when evaluating and comparing models.
summary: Large language models have demonstrated great potential to assist programmers in generating code. For such human-AI pair programming scenarios, we empirically demonstrate that while generated code is most often evaluated in terms of their functional correctness (i.e., whether generations pass available unit tests), correctness does not fully capture (e.g., may underestimate) the productivity gains these models may provide. Through a user study with N = 49 experienced programmers, we show that while correctness captures high-value generations, programmers still rate code that fails unit tests as valuable if it reduces the overall effort needed to complete a coding task. Finally, we propose a hybrid metric that combines functional correctness and syntactic similarity and show that it achieves a 14% stronger correlation with value and can therefore better represent real-world gains when evaluating and comparing models.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型已显示出协助程序员生成代码的巨大潜力。对于这种人类-人工智能结对编程场景，我们凭经验证明，虽然生成的代码通常根据其功能正确性（即各代是否通过可用的单元测试）进行评估，但正确性并不能完全捕获（例如，可能低估）这些模型可能提供的生产力收益。通过对 N = 49 名经验丰富的程序员进行的用户研究，我们表明，虽然正确性捕获了高价值的生成，但如果单元测试失败的代码减少了完成编码任务所需的总体工作量，那么程序员仍然会将其视为有价值的代码。最后，我们提出了一种结合了功能正确性和句法相似性的混合指标，并表明它与价值的相关性增强了 14%，因此在评估和比较模型时可以更好地代表现实世界的收益。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在对齐代码生成模型的离线评估指标与人类判断的价值标准，提出结合功能正确性和语法相似度的混合评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标（如功能正确性）无法全面反映代码生成模型的实际价值，程序员可能认为不通过测试但能节省开发时间的代码同样具有高价值。
AI.method: 通过49名经验程序员的用户研究评估代码价值，设计结合功能正确性与语法相似度的混合指标进行对比分析。
AI.result: 混合指标相比单一功能正确性指标，与人类价值判断的相关性提升14%，更准确反映模型实际应用收益。
AI.conclusion: 混合评估指标能更全面衡量代码生成模型的价值，建议在模型比较与优化中采用该方法替代传统指标。

authors_text: Jinta Weng,Yue Hu,Jing Qiu,Heyan Huan
title: STPrompt: Semantic-guided and Task-driven prompts for Effective Few-shot Classification
title_zh: STPrompt：语义引导和任务驱动的提示，用于有效的小样本分类
abstract: The effectiveness of prompt learning has been demonstrated in different pre-trained language models. By formulating suitable template and choosing representative label mapping, prompt learning can be used as an efficient knowledge probe. However, finding suitable prompt in existing methods requires multiple experimental attempts or appropriate vector initialization on formulating suitable template and choosing representative label mapping, which it is more common in few-shot learning tasks. Motivating by PLM working process, we try to construct the prompt from task semantic perspective and thus propose the STPrompt -Semantic-guided and Task-driven Prompt model. Specifically, two novel prompts generated from the semantic dependency tree (Dep-prompt) and task-specific metadata description (Meta-prompt), are firstly constructed in a prompt augmented pool, and the proposed model would automatically select a suitable semantic prompt to motivating the prompt learning process. Our results show that the proposed model achieves the state-of-the-art performance in five different datasets of few-shot text classification tasks, which prove that more semantic and significant prompts could assume as a better knowledge proving tool.
summary: The effectiveness of prompt learning has been demonstrated in different pre-trained language models. By formulating suitable template and choosing representative label mapping, prompt learning can be used as an efficient knowledge probe. However, finding suitable prompt in existing methods requires multiple experimental attempts or appropriate vector initialization on formulating suitable template and choosing representative label mapping, which it is more common in few-shot learning tasks. Motivating by PLM working process, we try to construct the prompt from task semantic perspective and thus propose the STPrompt -Semantic-guided and Task-driven Prompt model. Specifically, two novel prompts generated from the semantic dependency tree (Dep-prompt) and task-specific metadata description (Meta-prompt), are firstly constructed in a prompt augmented pool, and the proposed model would automatically select a suitable semantic prompt to motivating the prompt learning process. Our results show that the proposed model achieves the state-of-the-art performance in five different datasets of few-shot text classification tasks, which prove that more semantic and significant prompts could assume as a better knowledge proving tool.
abstract_zh: 即时学习的有效性已在不同的预训练语言模型中得到证明。通过制定合适的模板并选择有代表性的标签映射，即时学习可以作为有效的知识探测。然而，在现有方法中找到合适的提示需要多次实验尝试或适当的向量初始化来制定合适的模板和选择代表性标签映射，这在少样本学习任务中更为常见。受PLM工作流程的启发，我们尝试从任务语义的角度构建提示，从而提出STPrompt-语义引导和任务驱动的提示模型。具体来说，首先在提示增强池中构建从语义依赖树（Dep-prompt）和任务特定元数据描述（Meta-prompt）生成的两个新颖的提示，并且所提出的模型将自动选择合适的语义提示来激励提示学习过程。我们的结果表明，所提出的模型在五个不同的少量文本分类任务数据集中实现了最先进的性能，这证明更多语义和更重要的提示可以作为更好的知识证明工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STPrompt方法，通过语义引导和任务驱动的提示机制提升小样本文本分类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有提示学习方法依赖大量实验或初始化，难以高效适应小样本任务，需从语义和任务角度优化提示生成。
AI.method: 构建语义依存树（Dep-prompt）和任务元数据描述（Meta-prompt）的提示池，自动选择最优语义提示进行学习。
AI.result: 在五个小样本分类数据集上取得SOTA性能，验证了语义化提示作为知识探针的有效性。
AI.conclusion: STPrompt通过语义与任务驱动的提示机制，显著提升了小样本分类效果，为提示学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Mitch Hill,Erik Nijkamp,Jonathan Mitchell,Bo Pang,Song-Chun Zhu
title: Learning Probabilistic Models from Generator Latent Spaces with Hat EBM
title_zh: 使用 Hat EBM 从生成器潜在空间学习概率模型
abstract: This work proposes a method for using any generator network as the foundation of an Energy-Based Model (EBM). Our formulation posits that observed images are the sum of unobserved latent variables passed through the generator network and a residual random variable that spans the gap between the generator output and the image manifold. One can then define an EBM that includes the generator as part of its forward pass, which we call the Hat EBM. The model can be trained without inferring the latent variables of the observed data or calculating the generator Jacobian determinant. This enables explicit probabilistic modeling of the output distribution of any type of generator network. Experiments show strong performance of the proposed method on (1) unconditional ImageNet synthesis at 128x128 resolution, (2) refining the output of existing generators, and (3) learning EBMs that incorporate non-probabilistic generators. Code and pretrained models to reproduce our results are available at https://github.com/point0bar1/hat-ebm.
summary: This work proposes a method for using any generator network as the foundation of an Energy-Based Model (EBM). Our formulation posits that observed images are the sum of unobserved latent variables passed through the generator network and a residual random variable that spans the gap between the generator output and the image manifold. One can then define an EBM that includes the generator as part of its forward pass, which we call the Hat EBM. The model can be trained without inferring the latent variables of the observed data or calculating the generator Jacobian determinant. This enables explicit probabilistic modeling of the output distribution of any type of generator network. Experiments show strong performance of the proposed method on (1) unconditional ImageNet synthesis at 128x128 resolution, (2) refining the output of existing generators, and (3) learning EBMs that incorporate non-probabilistic generators. Code and pretrained models to reproduce our results are available at https://github.com/point0bar1/hat-ebm.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种使用任何发电机网络作为基于能量的模型（EBM）基础的方法。我们的公式假设观察到的图像是通过生成器网络传递的未观察到的潜在变量和跨越生成器输出和图像流形之间间隙的剩余随机变量的总和。然后，我们可以定义一个 EBM，其中包含生成器作为其前向传递的一部分，我们将其称为 Hat EBM。无需推断观测数据的潜在变量或计算生成器雅可比行列式即可训练模型。这使得可以对任何类型的生成器网络的输出分布进行显式概率建模。实验表明，所提出的方法在以下方面具有强大的性能：(1) 128x128 分辨率下的无条件 ImageNet 合成；(2) 改进现有生成器的输出；(3) 学习包含非概率生成器的 EBM。可在 https://github.com/point0bar1/hat-ebm 上获取用于重现结果的代码和预训练模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生成器网络构建能量基模型（EBM）的方法，以实现对生成器输出分布的显式概率建模。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在利用生成器进行概率建模时需推断潜在变量或计算雅可比行列式，过程复杂。本文旨在提出无需这些步骤的EBM训练方法，提升灵活性和效率。
AI.method: 通过将图像视为生成器输出与残差变量的和，构建包含生成器的EBM（Hat EBM），训练时无需推断潜在变量或计算雅可比行列式，实现对生成器输出分布的显式概率建模。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在无条件ImageNet生成（128x128分辨率）、现有生成器输出优化及非概率生成器的EBM学习任务中均表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法无需复杂计算即可构建EBM，适用于各类生成器，实验验证了其有效性，并提供了可复现结果的代码与预训练模型。

motivation: 传统方法在利用生成器进行概率建模时需推断潜在变量或计算雅可比行列式，过程复杂。本文旨在提出无需这些步骤的EBM训练方法，提升灵活性和效率。
method: 通过将图像视为生成器输出与残差变量的和，构建包含生成器的EBM（Hat EBM），训练时无需推断潜在变量或计算雅可比行列式，实现对生成器输出分布的显式概率建模。
result: 实验表明，该方法在无条件ImageNet生成（128x128分辨率）、现有生成器输出优化及非概率生成器的EBM学习任务中均表现出色。
conclusion: 本文提出的方法无需复杂计算即可构建EBM，适用于各类生成器，实验验证了其有效性，并提供了可复现结果的代码与预训练模型。
search_text: Learning Probabilistic Models from Generator Latent Spaces with Hat EBM 使用 Hat EBM 从生成器潜在空间学习概率模型 This work proposes a method for using any generator network as the foundation of an Energy-Based Model (EBM). Our formulation posits that observed images are the sum of unobserved latent variables passed through the generator network and a residual random variable that spans the gap between the generator output and the image manifold. One can then define an EBM that includes the generator as part of its forward pass, which we call the Hat EBM. The model can be trained without inferring the latent variables of the observed data or calculating the generator Jacobian determinant. This enables explicit probabilistic modeling of the output distribution of any type of generator network. Experiments show strong performance of the proposed method on (1) unconditional ImageNet synthesis at 128x128 resolution, (2) refining the output of existing generators, and (3) learning EBMs that incorporate non-probabilistic generators. Code and pretrained models to reproduce our results are available at https://github.com/point0bar1/hat-ebm. 这项工作提出了一种使用任何发电机网络作为基于能量的模型（EBM）基础的方法。我们的公式假设观察到的图像是通过生成器网络传递的未观察到的潜在变量和跨越生成器输出和图像流形之间间隙的剩余随机变量的总和。然后，我们可以定义一个 EBM，其中包含生成器作为其前向传递的一部分，我们将其称为 Hat EBM。无需推断观测数据的潜在变量或计算生成器雅可比行列式即可训练模型。这使得可以对任何类型的生成器网络的输出分布进行显式概率建模。实验表明，所提出的方法在以下方面具有强大的性能：(1) 128x128 分辨率下的无条件 ImageNet 合成；(2) 改进现有生成器的输出；(3) 学习包含非概率生成器的 EBM。可在 https://github.com/point0bar1/hat-ebm 上获取用于重现结果的代码和预训练模型。 提出一种基于生成器网络构建能量基模型（EBM）的方法，以实现对生成器输出分布的显式概率建模。 Mitch Hill,Erik Nijkamp,Jonathan Mitchell,Bo Pang,Song-Chun Zhu cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Allison Irvine,Tan Dang,M. Murat Dundar,Bartek Rajwa
title: IM: An R-Package for Computation of Image Moments and Moment Invariants
title_zh: IM：用于计算图像矩和矩不变量的 R 包
abstract: Moment invariants are well-established and effective shape descriptors for image classification. In this report, we introduce a package for R-language, named IM, that implements the calculation of moments for images and allows the reconstruction of images from moments within an object-oriented framework. Several types of moments may be computed using the IM library, including discrete and continuous Chebyshev, Gegenbauer, Legendre, Krawtchouk, dual Hahn, generalized pseudo-Zernike, Fourier-Mellin, and radial harmonic Fourier moments. In addition, custom bivariate types of moments can be calculated using combinations of two different types of polynomials. A method of polar transformation of pixel coordinates is used to provide an approximate invariance to rotation for moments that are orthogonal over a rectangle. The different types of polynomials used to calculate moments are discussed in this report, as well as comparisons of reconstruction and running time. Examples of image classification using image moments are provided.
summary: Moment invariants are well-established and effective shape descriptors for image classification. In this report, we introduce a package for R-language, named IM, that implements the calculation of moments for images and allows the reconstruction of images from moments within an object-oriented framework. Several types of moments may be computed using the IM library, including discrete and continuous Chebyshev, Gegenbauer, Legendre, Krawtchouk, dual Hahn, generalized pseudo-Zernike, Fourier-Mellin, and radial harmonic Fourier moments. In addition, custom bivariate types of moments can be calculated using combinations of two different types of polynomials. A method of polar transformation of pixel coordinates is used to provide an approximate invariance to rotation for moments that are orthogonal over a rectangle. The different types of polynomials used to calculate moments are discussed in this report, as well as comparisons of reconstruction and running time. Examples of image classification using image moments are provided.
abstract_zh: 矩不变量是用于图像分类的成熟且有效的形状描述符。在本报告中，我们介绍了一个名为 IM 的 R 语言包，它实现了图像矩的计算，并允许在面向对象的框架内根据矩重建图像。可以使用 IM 库计算几种类型的矩，包括离散和连续 Chebyshev、Gegenbauer、Legendre、Krawtchouk、dual Hahn、广义伪 Zernike、Fourier-Mellin 和径向谐波 Fourier 矩。此外，可以使用两种不同类型多项式的组合来计算自定义双变量类型的矩。像素坐标的极坐标变换方法用于为矩形上正交的矩提供近似旋转不变性。本报告讨论了用于计算矩的不同类型的多项式，以及重建和运行时间的比较。提供了使用图像矩进行图像分类的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为IM的R语言软件包，用于计算图像矩和矩不变量，并支持图像重建。
AI.motivation: 图像矩不变量是图像分类的重要形状描述子，但缺乏一个集成多种矩计算方法的工具包，因此开发IM包以满足研究和应用需求。
AI.method: 通过实现离散和连续的多种正交矩（如Chebyshev、Legendre等），结合极坐标变换增强旋转不变性，并支持自定义双变量矩计算。
AI.result: 成功构建了IM包，支持多种矩类型计算与图像重建，通过实验比较了不同矩的重建效果和运行效率，并提供了分类示例。
AI.conclusion: IM包为图像分析提供了灵活的矩计算工具，有助于提升基于矩不变量的图像分类性能。

authors_text: Jun Xia,Yanqiao Zhu,Yuanqi Du,Stan Z. Li
title: A Systematic Survey of Chemical Pre-trained Models
title_zh: 化学预训练模型的系统调查
abstract: Deep learning has achieved remarkable success in learning representations for molecules, which is crucial for various biochemical applications, ranging from property prediction to drug design. However, training Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) from scratch often requires abundant labeled molecules, which are expensive to acquire in the real world. To alleviate this issue, tremendous efforts have been devoted to Molecular Pre-trained Models (CPMs), where DNNs are pre-trained using large-scale unlabeled molecular databases and then fine-tuned over specific downstream tasks. Despite the prosperity, there lacks a systematic review of this fast-growing field. In this paper, we present the first survey that summarizes the current progress of CPMs. We first highlight the limitations of training molecular representation models from scratch to motivate CPM studies. Next, we systematically review recent advances on this topic from several key perspectives, including molecular descriptors, encoder architectures, pre-training strategies, and applications. We also highlight the challenges and promising avenues for future research, providing a useful resource for both machine learning and scientific communities.
summary: Deep learning has achieved remarkable success in learning representations for molecules, which is crucial for various biochemical applications, ranging from property prediction to drug design. However, training Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) from scratch often requires abundant labeled molecules, which are expensive to acquire in the real world. To alleviate this issue, tremendous efforts have been devoted to Molecular Pre-trained Models (CPMs), where DNNs are pre-trained using large-scale unlabeled molecular databases and then fine-tuned over specific downstream tasks. Despite the prosperity, there lacks a systematic review of this fast-growing field. In this paper, we present the first survey that summarizes the current progress of CPMs. We first highlight the limitations of training molecular representation models from scratch to motivate CPM studies. Next, we systematically review recent advances on this topic from several key perspectives, including molecular descriptors, encoder architectures, pre-training strategies, and applications. We also highlight the challenges and promising avenues for future research, providing a useful resource for both machine learning and scientific communities.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在学习分子表示方面取得了显着的成功，这对于从性质预测到药物设计等各种生化应用至关重要。然而，从头开始训练深度神经网络（DNN）通常需要大量的标记分子，而在现实世界中获取这些分子的成本很高。为了缓解这个问题，人们在分子预训练模型 (CPM) 上投入了巨大的努力，其中 DNN 使用大规模未标记的分子数据库进行预训练，然后针对特定的下游任务进行微调。尽管繁荣，但对这个快速发展的领域缺乏系统的回顾。在本文中，我们提出了第一项调查，总结了 CPM 当前的进展。我们首先强调从头开始训练分子表示模型的局限性，以激发 CPM 研究。接下来，我们从分子描述符、编码器架构、预训练策略和应用等几个关键角度系统地回顾了该主题的最新进展。我们还强调了未来研究的挑战和有希望的途径，为机器学习和科学界提供有用的资源。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了化学预训练模型（CPMs）的研究进展，涵盖分子描述符、编码器架构、预训练策略及应用。
AI.motivation: 传统分子表示学习依赖大量标注数据，而实际获取成本高昂，预训练模型可通过大规模未标注数据缓解此问题，但该领域缺乏系统性总结。
AI.method: 从分子描述符、编码器架构、预训练策略及应用四个关键视角，系统梳理CPMs的最新研究，并分析挑战与未来方向。
AI.result: 总结了CPMs的当前进展，明确了其在分子表示学习中的优势，同时指出了数据偏差、可解释性等挑战及潜在研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为机器学习与化学领域提供了CPMs的全面参考，助力后续模型优化与跨学科应用探索。

authors_text: Yongqiang Wang,Zhehuai Chen,Chengjian Zheng,Yu Zhang,Wei Han,Parisa Haghani
title: Accelerating RNN-T Training and Inference Using CTC guidance
title_zh: 使用 CTC 指导加速 RNN-T 训练和推理
abstract: We propose a novel method to accelerate training and inference process of recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T) based on the guidance from a co-trained connectionist temporal classification (CTC) model. We made a key assumption that if an encoder embedding frame is classified as a blank frame by the CTC model, it is likely that this frame will be aligned to blank for all the partial alignments or hypotheses in RNN-T and it can be discarded from the decoder input. We also show that this frame reduction operation can be applied in the middle of the encoder, which result in significant speed up for the training and inference in RNN-T. We further show that the CTC alignment, a by-product of the CTC decoder, can also be used to perform lattice reduction for RNN-T during training. Our method is evaluated on the Librispeech and SpeechStew tasks. We demonstrate that the proposed method is able to accelerate the RNN-T inference by 2.2 times with similar or slightly better word error rates (WER).
summary: We propose a novel method to accelerate training and inference process of recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T) based on the guidance from a co-trained connectionist temporal classification (CTC) model. We made a key assumption that if an encoder embedding frame is classified as a blank frame by the CTC model, it is likely that this frame will be aligned to blank for all the partial alignments or hypotheses in RNN-T and it can be discarded from the decoder input. We also show that this frame reduction operation can be applied in the middle of the encoder, which result in significant speed up for the training and inference in RNN-T. We further show that the CTC alignment, a by-product of the CTC decoder, can also be used to perform lattice reduction for RNN-T during training. Our method is evaluated on the Librispeech and SpeechStew tasks. We demonstrate that the proposed method is able to accelerate the RNN-T inference by 2.2 times with similar or slightly better word error rates (WER).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于共同训练的联结时间分类（CTC）模型的指导来加速循环神经网络传感器（RNN-T）的训练和推理过程的新方法。我们做出了一个关键假设，如果编码器嵌入帧被 CTC 模型分类为空白帧，则对于 RNN-T 中的所有部分对齐或假设，该帧很可能会被对齐为空白，并且可以从解码器输入中丢弃它。我们还表明，这种帧缩减操作可以应用于编码器中间，从而显着加快 RNN-T 中的训练和推理速度。我们进一步表明，CTC 对齐（CTC 解码器的副产品）也可用于在训练期间对 RNN-T 执行晶格缩减。我们的方法在 Librispeech 和 SpeechStew 任务上进行了评估。我们证明，所提出的方法能够将 RNN-T 推理加速 2.2 倍，并且字错误率 (WER) 类似或稍好一些。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CTC模型指导的新方法，用于加速RNN-T的训练和推理过程。
AI.motivation: RNN-T在训练和推理过程中计算量较大，影响了其效率。本文希望通过利用CTC模型的指导来减少计算量，从而提高效率。
AI.method: 本文假设如果CTC模型将编码器嵌入的帧分类为空白帧，则在RNN-T中该帧可能对所有部分对齐或假设都对齐为空白，因此可以从解码器输入中丢弃。此外，CTC对齐结果可用于RNN-T训练中的格子减少。
AI.result: 在Librispeech和SpeechStew任务上的实验表明，该方法能够将RNN-T的推理速度提高2.2倍，同时保持相似或稍好的词错误率（WER）。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效加速了RNN-T的训练和推理过程，同时保持了较高的识别准确率，为实际应用提供了更高效的解决方案。

search_text: Accelerating RNN-T Training and Inference Using CTC guidance 使用 CTC 指导加速 RNN-T 训练和推理 We propose a novel method to accelerate training and inference process of recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T) based on the guidance from a co-trained connectionist temporal classification (CTC) model. We made a key assumption that if an encoder embedding frame is classified as a blank frame by the CTC model, it is likely that this frame will be aligned to blank for all the partial alignments or hypotheses in RNN-T and it can be discarded from the decoder input. We also show that this frame reduction operation can be applied in the middle of the encoder, which result in significant speed up for the training and inference in RNN-T. We further show that the CTC alignment, a by-product of the CTC decoder, can also be used to perform lattice reduction for RNN-T during training. Our method is evaluated on the Librispeech and SpeechStew tasks. We demonstrate that the proposed method is able to accelerate the RNN-T inference by 2.2 times with similar or slightly better word error rates (WER). 我们提出了一种基于共同训练的联结时间分类（CTC）模型的指导来加速循环神经网络传感器（RNN-T）的训练和推理过程的新方法。我们做出了一个关键假设，如果编码器嵌入帧被 CTC 模型分类为空白帧，则对于 RNN-T 中的所有部分对齐或假设，该帧很可能会被对齐为空白，并且可以从解码器输入中丢弃它。我们还表明，这种帧缩减操作可以应用于编码器中间，从而显着加快 RNN-T 中的训练和推理速度。我们进一步表明，CTC 对齐（CTC 解码器的副产品）也可用于在训练期间对 RNN-T 执行晶格缩减。我们的方法在 Librispeech 和 SpeechStew 任务上进行了评估。我们证明，所提出的方法能够将 RNN-T 推理加速 2.2 倍，并且字错误率 (WER) 类似或稍好一些。 本文提出了一种基于CTC模型指导的新方法，用于加速RNN-T的训练和推理过程。 Yongqiang Wang,Zhehuai Chen,Chengjian Zheng,Yu Zhang,Wei Han,Parisa Haghani eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Ziyu Shan,Qi Yang,Rui Ye,Yujie Zhang,Yiling Xu,Xiaozhong Xu,Shan Liu
title: GPA-Net:No-Reference Point Cloud Quality Assessment with Multi-task Graph Convolutional Network
title_zh: GPA-Net：多任务图卷积网络的无参考点云质量评估
abstract: With the rapid development of 3D vision, point cloud has become an increasingly popular 3D visual media content. Due to the irregular structure, point cloud has posed novel challenges to the related research, such as compression, transmission, rendering and quality assessment. In these latest researches, point cloud quality assessment (PCQA) has attracted wide attention due to its significant role in guiding practical applications, especially in many cases where the reference point cloud is unavailable. However, current no-reference metrics which based on prevalent deep neural network have apparent disadvantages. For example, to adapt to the irregular structure of point cloud, they require preprocessing such as voxelization and projection that introduce extra distortions, and the applied grid-kernel networks, such as Convolutional Neural Networks, fail to extract effective distortion-related features. Besides, they rarely consider the various distortion patterns and the philosophy that PCQA should exhibit shifting, scaling, and rotational invariance. In this paper, we propose a novel no-reference PCQA metric named the Graph convolutional PCQA network (GPA-Net). To extract effective features for PCQA, we propose a new graph convolution kernel, i.e., GPAConv, which attentively captures the perturbation of structure and texture. Then, we propose the multi-task framework consisting of one main task (quality regression) and two auxiliary tasks (distortion type and degree predictions). Finally, we propose a coordinate normalization module to stabilize the results of GPAConv under shift, scale and rotation transformations. Experimental results on two independent databases show that GPA-Net achieves the best performance compared to the state-of-the-art no-reference PCQA metrics, even better than some full-reference metrics in some cases.
summary: With the rapid development of 3D vision, point cloud has become an increasingly popular 3D visual media content. Due to the irregular structure, point cloud has posed novel challenges to the related research, such as compression, transmission, rendering and quality assessment. In these latest researches, point cloud quality assessment (PCQA) has attracted wide attention due to its significant role in guiding practical applications, especially in many cases where the reference point cloud is unavailable. However, current no-reference metrics which based on prevalent deep neural network have apparent disadvantages. For example, to adapt to the irregular structure of point cloud, they require preprocessing such as voxelization and projection that introduce extra distortions, and the applied grid-kernel networks, such as Convolutional Neural Networks, fail to extract effective distortion-related features. Besides, they rarely consider the various distortion patterns and the philosophy that PCQA should exhibit shifting, scaling, and rotational invariance. In this paper, we propose a novel no-reference PCQA metric named the Graph convolutional PCQA network (GPA-Net). To extract effective features for PCQA, we propose a new graph convolution kernel, i.e., GPAConv, which attentively captures the perturbation of structure and texture. Then, we propose the multi-task framework consisting of one main task (quality regression) and two auxiliary tasks (distortion type and degree predictions). Finally, we propose a coordinate normalization module to stabilize the results of GPAConv under shift, scale and rotation transformations. Experimental results on two independent databases show that GPA-Net achieves the best performance compared to the state-of-the-art no-reference PCQA metrics, even better than some full-reference metrics in some cases.
abstract_zh: 随着3D视觉的快速发展，点云已成为越来越受欢迎的3D视觉媒体内容。由于点云的不规则结构，给压缩、传输、渲染和质量评估等相关研究提出了新的挑战。在这些最新研究中，点云质量评估（PCQA）因其对实际应用的重要指导作用而受到广泛关注，特别是在许多参考点云不可用的情况下。然而，当前基于流行的深度神经网络的无参考指标具有明显的缺点。例如，为了适应点云的不规则结构，它们需要诸如体素化和投影之类的预处理，这会引入额外的畸变，并且所应用的网格核网络（例如卷积神经网络）无法提取有效的畸变相关特征。此外，他们很少考虑各种失真模式以及 PCQA 应该表现出平移、缩放和旋转不变性的理念。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的无参考 PCQA 度量，称为图卷积 PCQA 网络（GPA-Net）。为了提取 PCQA 的有效特征，我们提出了一种新的图卷积核，即 GPAConv，它专注于捕获结构和纹理的扰动。然后，我们提出了由一个主要任务（质量回归）和两个辅助任务（失真类型和程度预测）组成的多任务框架。最后，我们提出了一个坐标归一化模块来稳定 GPAConv 在移位、缩放和旋转变换下的结果。在两个独立数据库上的实验结果表明，与最先进的无参考 PCQA 指标相比，GPA-Net 实现了最佳性能，在某些情况下甚至优于某些全参考指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多任务图卷积网络的无参考点云质量评估方法GPA-Net，解决点云质量评估中结构不规则性和特征提取不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无参考点云质量评估方法依赖预处理引入失真，且无法有效提取结构和纹理扰动特征，同时缺乏对平移、缩放和旋转不变性的考虑。
AI.method: 设计新型图卷积核GPAConv以捕捉结构与纹理扰动，构建包含主任务（质量回归）和两个辅助任务（失真类型与程度预测）的多任务框架，并引入坐标归一化模块实现几何不变性。
AI.result: 在两个独立数据集上的实验表明，GPA-Net性能优于现有无参考指标，在部分场景下甚至超越全参考指标。
AI.conclusion: GPA-Net通过图卷积与多任务学习有效解决了点云质量评估中的关键挑战，为无参考评估提供了新思路。

authors_text: Seyed Mehdi Iranmanesh,Xiaotong Chen,Kuo-Chin Lien
title: Pair DETR: Contrastive Learning Speeds Up DETR Training
title_zh: 配对 DETR：对比学习加速 DETR 训练
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.06152
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.06152
abstract: The DETR object detection approach applies the transformer encoder and decoder architecture to detect objects and achieves promising performance. In this paper, we present a simple approach to address the main problem of DETR, the slow convergence, by using representation learning technique. In this approach, we detect an object bounding box as a pair of keypoints, the top-left corner and the center, using two decoders. By detecting objects as paired keypoints, the model builds up a joint classification and pair association on the output queries from two decoders. For the pair association we propose utilizing contrastive self-supervised learning algorithm without requiring specialized architecture. Experimental results on MS COCO dataset show that Pair DETR can converge at least 10x faster than original DETR and 1.5x faster than Conditional DETR during training, while having consistently higher Average Precision scores.
summary: The DETR object detection approach applies the transformer encoder and decoder architecture to detect objects and achieves promising performance. In this paper, we present a simple approach to address the main problem of DETR, the slow convergence, by using representation learning technique. In this approach, we detect an object bounding box as a pair of keypoints, the top-left corner and the center, using two decoders. By detecting objects as paired keypoints, the model builds up a joint classification and pair association on the output queries from two decoders. For the pair association we propose utilizing contrastive self-supervised learning algorithm without requiring specialized architecture. Experimental results on MS COCO dataset show that Pair DETR can converge at least 10x faster than original DETR and 1.5x faster than Conditional DETR during training, while having consistently higher Average Precision scores.
abstract_zh: DETR 目标检测方法应用 Transformer 编码器和解码器架构来检测目标并取得了良好的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的方法，通过使用表示学习技术来解决 DETR 的主要问题，即收敛速度慢。在这种方法中，我们使用两个解码器将对象边界框检测为一对关键点（左上角和中心）。通过将对象检测为配对关键点，该模型在两个解码器的输出查询上建立联合分类和配对关联。对于配对关联，我们建议利用对比自监督学习算法，而不需要专门的架构。 MS COCO 数据集上的实验结果表明，在训练过程中，Pair DETR 的收敛速度至少比原始 DETR 快 10 倍，比条件 DETR 快 1.5 倍，同时始终具有更高的平均精度分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pair DETR方法，通过对比学习加速DETR训练过程，同时保持检测精度。
AI.motivation: DETR模型存在训练收敛速度慢的问题，现有改进方法或需复杂架构或效果有限，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将目标检测视为关键点对检测（左上角与中心点），采用双解码器结构并结合对比自监督学习实现配对关联，无需特殊网络设计。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上，Pair DETR训练速度较原始DETR快10倍以上，比Conditional DETR快1.5倍，且平均精度持续更高。
AI.conclusion: 通过简单有效的配对关键点检测与对比学习，Pair DETR显著提升了DETR训练效率，验证了该方法在目标检测中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Pair DETR方法，通过对比学习加速DETR训练过程，同时保持检测精度。

search_text: Pair DETR: Contrastive Learning Speeds Up DETR Training 配对 DETR：对比学习加速 DETR 训练 The DETR object detection approach applies the transformer encoder and decoder architecture to detect objects and achieves promising performance. In this paper, we present a simple approach to address the main problem of DETR, the slow convergence, by using representation learning technique. In this approach, we detect an object bounding box as a pair of keypoints, the top-left corner and the center, using two decoders. By detecting objects as paired keypoints, the model builds up a joint classification and pair association on the output queries from two decoders. For the pair association we propose utilizing contrastive self-supervised learning algorithm without requiring specialized architecture. Experimental results on MS COCO dataset show that Pair DETR can converge at least 10x faster than original DETR and 1.5x faster than Conditional DETR during training, while having consistently higher Average Precision scores. DETR 目标检测方法应用 Transformer 编码器和解码器架构来检测目标并取得了良好的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单的方法，通过使用表示学习技术来解决 DETR 的主要问题，即收敛速度慢。在这种方法中，我们使用两个解码器将对象边界框检测为一对关键点（左上角和中心）。通过将对象检测为配对关键点，该模型在两个解码器的输出查询上建立联合分类和配对关联。对于配对关联，我们建议利用对比自监督学习算法，而不需要专门的架构。 MS COCO 数据集上的实验结果表明，在训练过程中，Pair DETR 的收敛速度至少比原始 DETR 快 10 倍，比条件 DETR 快 1.5 倍，同时始终具有更高的平均精度分数。 本文提出Pair DETR方法，通过对比学习加速DETR训练过程，同时保持检测精度。 Seyed Mehdi Iranmanesh,Xiaotong Chen,Kuo-Chin Lien cs.CV

authors_text: Moitreya Chatterjee,Narendra Ahuja,Anoop Cherian
title: Learning Audio-Visual Dynamics Using Scene Graphs for Audio Source Separation
title_zh: 使用场景图进行音频源分离来学习视听动力学
abstract: There exists an unequivocal distinction between the sound produced by a static source and that produced by a moving one, especially when the source moves towards or away from the microphone. In this paper, we propose to use this connection between audio and visual dynamics for solving two challenging tasks simultaneously, namely: (i) separating audio sources from a mixture using visual cues, and (ii) predicting the 3D visual motion of a sounding source using its separated audio. Towards this end, we present Audio Separator and Motion Predictor (ASMP) -- a deep learning framework that leverages the 3D structure of the scene and the motion of sound sources for better audio source separation. At the heart of ASMP is a 2.5D scene graph capturing various objects in the video and their pseudo-3D spatial proximities. This graph is constructed by registering together 2.5D monocular depth predictions from the 2D video frames and associating the 2.5D scene regions with the outputs of an object detector applied on those frames. The ASMP task is then mathematically modeled as the joint problem of: (i) recursively segmenting the 2.5D scene graph into several sub-graphs, each associated with a constituent sound in the input audio mixture (which is then separated) and (ii) predicting the 3D motions of the corresponding sound sources from the separated audio. To empirically evaluate ASMP, we present experiments on two challenging audio-visual datasets, viz. Audio Separation in the Wild (ASIW) and Audio Visual Event (AVE). Our results demonstrate that ASMP achieves a clear improvement in source separation quality, outperforming prior works on both datasets, while also estimating the direction of motion of the sound sources better than other methods.
summary: There exists an unequivocal distinction between the sound produced by a static source and that produced by a moving one, especially when the source moves towards or away from the microphone. In this paper, we propose to use this connection between audio and visual dynamics for solving two challenging tasks simultaneously, namely: (i) separating audio sources from a mixture using visual cues, and (ii) predicting the 3D visual motion of a sounding source using its separated audio. Towards this end, we present Audio Separator and Motion Predictor (ASMP) -- a deep learning framework that leverages the 3D structure of the scene and the motion of sound sources for better audio source separation. At the heart of ASMP is a 2.5D scene graph capturing various objects in the video and their pseudo-3D spatial proximities. This graph is constructed by registering together 2.5D monocular depth predictions from the 2D video frames and associating the 2.5D scene regions with the outputs of an object detector applied on those frames. The ASMP task is then mathematically modeled as the joint problem of: (i) recursively segmenting the 2.5D scene graph into several sub-graphs, each associated with a constituent sound in the input audio mixture (which is then separated) and (ii) predicting the 3D motions of the corresponding sound sources from the separated audio. To empirically evaluate ASMP, we present experiments on two challenging audio-visual datasets, viz. Audio Separation in the Wild (ASIW) and Audio Visual Event (AVE). Our results demonstrate that ASMP achieves a clear improvement in source separation quality, outperforming prior works on both datasets, while also estimating the direction of motion of the sound sources better than other methods.
abstract_zh: 静态声源产生的声音与移动声源产生的声音之间存在明确的区别，尤其是当声源靠近或远离麦克风时。在本文中，我们建议利用音频和视觉动力学之间的这种联系来同时解决两个具有挑战性的任务，即：（i）使用视觉线索将音频源从混合物中分离出来，以及（ii）使用分离的音频预测声源的 3D 视觉运动。为此，我们提出了音频分离器和运动预测器 (ASMP)——一种深度学习框架，它利用场景的 3D 结构和声源的运动来实现更好的音频源分离。 ASMP 的核心是一个 2.5D 场景图，用于捕获视频中的各种对象及其伪 3D 空间邻近度。该图是通过将 2D 视频帧的 2.5D 单目深度预测注册在一起并将 2.5D 场景区域与应用于这些帧的对象检测器的输出相关联来构建的。然后，ASMP 任务被数学建模为以下联合问题：(i) 将 2.5D 场景图递归地分割为多个子图，每个子图与输入音频混合物（然后被分离）中的组成声音相关联，以及 (ii) 从分离的音频中预测相应声源的 3D 运动。为了凭经验评估 ASMP，我们在两个具有挑战性的视听数据集上进行了实验，即：野外音频分离 (ASIW) 和视听事件 (AVE)。我们的结果表明，ASMP 在声源分离质量方面取得了明显的改进，在两个数据集上都优于先前的工作，同时还比其他方法更好地估计了声源的运动方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用音频-视觉动态关系及场景图进行音频源分离的方法，同时预测声源的3D运动。
AI.motivation: 静态与动态声源产生的声音存在显著差异，但现有方法未能有效结合视觉线索进行音频分离及运动预测。
AI.method: 提出ASMP框架，通过构建2.5D场景图（整合视频深度预测与目标检测结果），联合解决音频分离与3D运动预测问题。
AI.result: 在ASIW和AVE数据集上，ASMP在分离质量及运动方向估计上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ASMP通过建模音频-视觉动态关系，实现了更精准的音频分离与声源运动预测，验证了多模态信息融合的有效性。

authors_text: Roben Delos Reyes,Kyunghwan Son,Jinhwan Jung,Wan Ju Kang,Yung Yi
title: Curiosity-Driven Multi-Agent Exploration with Mixed Objectives
title_zh: 好奇心驱动的具有混合目标的多智能体探索
abstract: Intrinsic rewards have been increasingly used to mitigate the sparse reward problem in single-agent reinforcement learning. These intrinsic rewards encourage the agent to look for novel experiences, guiding the agent to explore the environment sufficiently despite the lack of extrinsic rewards. Curiosity-driven exploration is a simple yet efficient approach that quantifies this novelty as the prediction error of the agent's curiosity module, an internal neural network that is trained to predict the agent's next state given its current state and action. We show here, however, that naively using this curiosity-driven approach to guide exploration in sparse reward cooperative multi-agent environments does not consistently lead to improved results. Straightforward multi-agent extensions of curiosity-driven exploration take into consideration either individual or collective novelty only and thus, they do not provide a distinct but collaborative intrinsic reward signal that is essential for learning in cooperative multi-agent tasks. In this work, we propose a curiosity-driven multi-agent exploration method that has the mixed objective of motivating the agents to explore the environment in ways that are individually and collectively novel. First, we develop a two-headed curiosity module that is trained to predict the corresponding agent's next observation in the first head and the next joint observation in the second head. Second, we design the intrinsic reward formula to be the sum of the individual and joint prediction errors of this curiosity module. We empirically show that the combination of our curiosity module architecture and intrinsic reward formulation guides multi-agent exploration more efficiently than baseline approaches, thereby providing the best performance boost to MARL algorithms in cooperative navigation environments with sparse rewards.
summary: Intrinsic rewards have been increasingly used to mitigate the sparse reward problem in single-agent reinforcement learning. These intrinsic rewards encourage the agent to look for novel experiences, guiding the agent to explore the environment sufficiently despite the lack of extrinsic rewards. Curiosity-driven exploration is a simple yet efficient approach that quantifies this novelty as the prediction error of the agent's curiosity module, an internal neural network that is trained to predict the agent's next state given its current state and action. We show here, however, that naively using this curiosity-driven approach to guide exploration in sparse reward cooperative multi-agent environments does not consistently lead to improved results. Straightforward multi-agent extensions of curiosity-driven exploration take into consideration either individual or collective novelty only and thus, they do not provide a distinct but collaborative intrinsic reward signal that is essential for learning in cooperative multi-agent tasks. In this work, we propose a curiosity-driven multi-agent exploration method that has the mixed objective of motivating the agents to explore the environment in ways that are individually and collectively novel. First, we develop a two-headed curiosity module that is trained to predict the corresponding agent's next observation in the first head and the next joint observation in the second head. Second, we design the intrinsic reward formula to be the sum of the individual and joint prediction errors of this curiosity module. We empirically show that the combination of our curiosity module architecture and intrinsic reward formulation guides multi-agent exploration more efficiently than baseline approaches, thereby providing the best performance boost to MARL algorithms in cooperative navigation environments with sparse rewards.
abstract_zh: 内在奖励越来越多地用于缓解单代理强化学习中的稀疏奖励问题。这些内在奖励鼓励智能体寻找新奇的体验，引导智能体在缺乏外在奖励的情况下充分探索环境。好奇心驱动的探索是一种简单而有效的方法，它将这种新颖性量化为代理好奇心模块的预测误差，好奇心模块是一个内部神经网络，经过训练，可以根据代理的当前状态和动作来预测代理的下一个状态。然而，我们在这里表明，天真地使用这种好奇心驱动的方法来指导稀疏奖励合作多智能体环境中的探索并不能始终改善结果。好奇心驱动的探索的直接多智能体扩展仅考虑个人或集体的新颖性，因此，它们不提供对于协作多智能体任务中的学习至关重要的独特但协作的内在奖励信号。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种好奇心驱动的多智能体探索方法，该方法具有激励智能体以个体和集体新颖的方式探索环境的混合目标。首先，我们开发了一个双头好奇心模块，该模块经过训练可以预测第一个头中相应代理的下一个观察结果以及第二个头中的下一个联合观察结果。其次，我们将内在奖励公式设计为该好奇心模块的个体和联合预测误差之和。我们的经验表明，我们的好奇心模块架构和内在奖励公式的结合比基线方法更有效地指导多智能体探索，从而在奖励稀疏的合作导航环境中为 MARL 算法提供最佳性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合目标的多智能体好奇心驱动探索方法，通过结合个体和集体新颖性来提升稀疏奖励下的合作多智能体强化学习性能。
AI.motivation: 现有好奇心驱动方法在多智能体环境中仅考虑个体或集体新颖性，无法提供协作所需的差异化内在奖励信号，导致探索效率不足。
AI.method: 设计双头好奇心模块，分别预测个体下个观测和联合观测，并将个体与联合预测误差的加权和作为内在奖励公式。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在稀疏奖励的合作导航环境中显著优于基线方法，为MARL算法带来最佳性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 结合个体与集体目标的混合内在奖励机制能有效指导多智能体探索，是解决合作任务稀疏奖励问题的关键改进方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种混合目标的多智能体好奇心驱动探索方法，通过结合个体和集体新颖性来提升稀疏奖励下的合作多智能体强化学习性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有好奇心驱动方法在多智能体环境中仅考虑个体或集体新颖性，无法提供协作所需的差异化内在奖励信号，导致探索效率不足。
ai_content.method: 设计双头好奇心模块，分别预测个体下个观测和联合观测，并将个体与联合预测误差的加权和作为内在奖励公式。
