search_text: Curiosity-Driven Multi-Agent Exploration with Mixed Objectives 好奇心驱动的具有混合目标的多智能体探索 Intrinsic rewards have been increasingly used to mitigate the sparse reward problem in single-agent reinforcement learning. These intrinsic rewards encourage the agent to look for novel experiences, guiding the agent to explore the environment sufficiently despite the lack of extrinsic rewards. Curiosity-driven exploration is a simple yet efficient approach that quantifies this novelty as the prediction error of the agent's curiosity module, an internal neural network that is trained to predict the agent's next state given its current state and action. We show here, however, that naively using this curiosity-driven approach to guide exploration in sparse reward cooperative multi-agent environments does not consistently lead to improved results. Straightforward multi-agent extensions of curiosity-driven exploration take into consideration either individual or collective novelty only and thus, they do not provide a distinct but collaborative intrinsic reward signal that is essential for learning in cooperative multi-agent tasks. In this work, we propose a curiosity-driven multi-agent exploration method that has the mixed objective of motivating the agents to explore the environment in ways that are individually and collectively novel. First, we develop a two-headed curiosity module that is trained to predict the corresponding agent's next observation in the first head and the next joint observation in the second head. Second, we design the intrinsic reward formula to be the sum of the individual and joint prediction errors of this curiosity module. We empirically show that the combination of our curiosity module architecture and intrinsic reward formulation guides multi-agent exploration more efficiently than baseline approaches, thereby providing the best performance boost to MARL algorithms in cooperative navigation environments with sparse rewards. 内在奖励越来越多地用于缓解单代理强化学习中的稀疏奖励问题。这些内在奖励鼓励智能体寻找新奇的体验，引导智能体在缺乏外在奖励的情况下充分探索环境。好奇心驱动的探索是一种简单而有效的方法，它将这种新颖性量化为代理好奇心模块的预测误差，好奇心模块是一个内部神经网络，经过训练，可以根据代理的当前状态和动作来预测代理的下一个状态。然而，我们在这里表明，天真地使用这种好奇心驱动的方法来指导稀疏奖励合作多智能体环境中的探索并不能始终改善结果。好奇心驱动的探索的直接多智能体扩展仅考虑个人或集体的新颖性，因此，它们不提供对于协作多智能体任务中的学习至关重要的独特但协作的内在奖励信号。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种好奇心驱动的多智能体探索方法，该方法具有激励智能体以个体和集体新颖的方式探索环境的混合目标。首先，我们开发了一个双头好奇心模块，该模块经过训练可以预测第一个头中相应代理的下一个观察结果以及第二个头中的下一个联合观察结果。其次，我们将内在奖励公式设计为该好奇心模块的个体和联合预测误差之和。我们的经验表明，我们的好奇心模块架构和内在奖励公式的结合比基线方法更有效地指导多智能体探索，从而在奖励稀疏的合作导航环境中为 MARL 算法提供最佳性能提升。 本文提出一种混合目标的多智能体好奇心驱动探索方法，通过结合个体和集体新颖性来提升稀疏奖励下的合作多智能体强化学习性能。 Roben Delos Reyes,Kyunghwan Son,Jinhwan Jung,Wan Ju Kang,Yung Yi cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Xinquan Yang,Xuguang Li,Xuechen Li,Peixi Wu,Linlin Shen,Yongqiang Deng
title: ImplantFormer: Vision Transformer based Implant Position Regression Using Dental CBCT Data
title_zh: ImplantFormer：使用牙科 CBCT 数据基于 Vision Transformer 的种植体位置回归
abstract: Implant prosthesis is the most appropriate treatment for dentition defect or dentition loss, which usually involves a surgical guide design process to decide the implant position. However, such design heavily relies on the subjective experiences of dentists. In this paper, a transformer-based Implant Position Regression Network, ImplantFormer, is proposed to automatically predict the implant position based on the oral CBCT data. We creatively propose to predict the implant position using the 2D axial view of the tooth crown area and fit a centerline of the implant to obtain the actual implant position at the tooth root. Convolutional stem and decoder are designed to coarsely extract image features before the operation of patch embedding and integrate multi-level feature maps for robust prediction, respectively. As both long-range relationship and local features are involved, our approach can better represent global information and achieves better location performance. Extensive experiments on a dental implant dataset through five-fold cross-validation demonstrated that the proposed ImplantFormer achieves superior performance than existing methods.
summary: Implant prosthesis is the most appropriate treatment for dentition defect or dentition loss, which usually involves a surgical guide design process to decide the implant position. However, such design heavily relies on the subjective experiences of dentists. In this paper, a transformer-based Implant Position Regression Network, ImplantFormer, is proposed to automatically predict the implant position based on the oral CBCT data. We creatively propose to predict the implant position using the 2D axial view of the tooth crown area and fit a centerline of the implant to obtain the actual implant position at the tooth root. Convolutional stem and decoder are designed to coarsely extract image features before the operation of patch embedding and integrate multi-level feature maps for robust prediction, respectively. As both long-range relationship and local features are involved, our approach can better represent global information and achieves better location performance. Extensive experiments on a dental implant dataset through five-fold cross-validation demonstrated that the proposed ImplantFormer achieves superior performance than existing methods.
abstract_zh: 种植修复体是治疗牙列缺损或牙列缺失的最合适的治疗方法，通常涉及手术导板设计过程来决定种植体位置。然而，这种设计很大程度上依赖于牙医的主观经验。本文提出了一种基于变压器的种植体位置回归网络 ImplantFormer，可根据口腔 CBCT 数据自动预测种植体位置。我们创造性地提出利用牙冠区域的二维轴向视图来预测种植体位置，并拟合种植体的中心线以获得牙根处的实际种植体位置。卷积干和解码器被设计为分别在块嵌入操作之前粗略地提取图像特征并集成多级特征图以进行鲁棒预测。由于同时涉及远程关系和局部特征，我们的方法可以更好地表示全局信息并实现更好的定位性能。通过五倍交叉验证对牙种植体数据集进行的广泛实验表明，所提出的 ImplantFormer 比现有方法具有更优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉Transformer的模型，利用牙科CBCT数据自动预测种植体位置，以减少对牙医主观经验的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统种植体位置设计依赖牙医主观经验，存在主观性和不一致性，需自动化方法提高准确性和效率。
AI.method: 提出ImplantFormer网络，结合卷积干和解码器提取特征，利用2D轴向视图预测种植体中心线，整合多级特征图以提升预测鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在五折交叉验证中，ImplantFormer在牙科数据集上表现出比现有方法更优的性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合全局和局部特征，提升种植体定位精度，为自动化种植体设计提供可行方案。

authors_text: Hung-Jui Guo,Jonathan Z. Bakdash,Laura R. Marusich,Balakrishnan Prabhakaran
title: Augmented Reality and Mixed Reality Measurement Under Different Environments: A Survey on Head-Mounted Devices
title_zh: 不同环境下的增强现实和混合现实测量：头戴式设备调查
abstract: Augmented Reality (AR) and Mixed Reality (MR) have been two of the most explosive research topics in the last few years. Head-Mounted Devices (HMDs) are essential intermediums for using AR and MR technology, playing an important role in the research progress in these two areas. Behavioral research with users is one way of evaluating the technical progress and effectiveness of HMDs. In addition, AR and MR technology is dependent upon virtual interactions with the real environment. Thus, conditions in real environments can be a significant factor for AR and MR measurements with users. In this paper, we survey 87 environmental-related HMD papers with measurements from users, spanning over 32 years. We provide a thorough review of AR- and MR-related user experiments with HMDs under different environmental factors. Then, we summarize trends in this literature over time using a new classification method with four environmental factors, the presence or absence of user feedback in behavioral experiments, and ten main categories to subdivide these papers (e.g., domain and method of user assessment). We also categorize characteristics of the behavioral experiments, showing similarities and differences among papers.
summary: Augmented Reality (AR) and Mixed Reality (MR) have been two of the most explosive research topics in the last few years. Head-Mounted Devices (HMDs) are essential intermediums for using AR and MR technology, playing an important role in the research progress in these two areas. Behavioral research with users is one way of evaluating the technical progress and effectiveness of HMDs. In addition, AR and MR technology is dependent upon virtual interactions with the real environment. Thus, conditions in real environments can be a significant factor for AR and MR measurements with users. In this paper, we survey 87 environmental-related HMD papers with measurements from users, spanning over 32 years. We provide a thorough review of AR- and MR-related user experiments with HMDs under different environmental factors. Then, we summarize trends in this literature over time using a new classification method with four environmental factors, the presence or absence of user feedback in behavioral experiments, and ten main categories to subdivide these papers (e.g., domain and method of user assessment). We also categorize characteristics of the behavioral experiments, showing similarities and differences among papers.
abstract_zh: 增强现实（AR）和混合现实（MR）是过去几年最具爆炸性的研究主题。头戴式设备（HMD）是使用AR和MR技术的重要媒介，在这两个领域的研究进展中发挥着重要作用。用户行为研究是评估头显技术进步和有效性的一种方法。此外，AR和MR技术依赖于与真实环境的虚拟交互。因此，真实环境中的条件可能是用户进行 AR 和 MR 测量的重要因素。在本文中，我们调查了 32 年多来的 87 篇与环境相关的 HMD 论文以及用户的测量数据。我们对不同环境因素下使用 HMD 进行的 AR 和 MR 相关用户实验进行了全面回顾。然后，我们使用一种新的分类方法总结了这些文献随时间的变化趋势，其中包括四个环境因素、行为实验中是否存在用户反馈以及十个主要类别来细分这些论文（例如，用户评估的领域和方法）。我们还对行为实验的特征进行分类，显示论文之间的相似点和差异。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了过去32年间关于不同环境下的头戴式显示设备（HMD）在增强现实（AR）和混合现实（MR）测量中的用户实验研究。
AI.motivation: HMD作为AR/MR技术的核心交互媒介，其性能受环境因素影响显著，但现有研究缺乏对环境因素的系统性分析。
AI.method: 通过分类方法对87篇相关文献进行梳理，基于四个环境因素、用户反馈存在性及十个子类（如领域和评估方法）进行多维度归类分析。
AI.result: 总结了环境因素对HMD测量的影响趋势，揭示了用户实验设计的共性与差异，并提出了环境条件与技术效果的关联特征。
AI.conclusion: 环境因素是影响AR/MR测量的关键变量，所提出的分类框架为未来研究提供了系统化分析工具，需进一步关注动态环境下的技术优化。

search_text: Augmented Reality and Mixed Reality Measurement Under Different Environments: A Survey on Head-Mounted Devices 不同环境下的增强现实和混合现实测量：头戴式设备调查 Augmented Reality (AR) and Mixed Reality (MR) have been two of the most explosive research topics in the last few years. Head-Mounted Devices (HMDs) are essential intermediums for using AR and MR technology, playing an important role in the research progress in these two areas. Behavioral research with users is one way of evaluating the technical progress and effectiveness of HMDs. In addition, AR and MR technology is dependent upon virtual interactions with the real environment. Thus, conditions in real environments can be a significant factor for AR and MR measurements with users. In this paper, we survey 87 environmental-related HMD papers with measurements from users, spanning over 32 years. We provide a thorough review of AR- and MR-related user experiments with HMDs under different environmental factors. Then, we summarize trends in this literature over time using a new classification method with four environmental factors, the presence or absence of user feedback in behavioral experiments, and ten main categories to subdivide these papers (e.g., domain and method of user assessment). We also categorize characteristics of the behavioral experiments, showing similarities and differences among papers. 增强现实（AR）和混合现实（MR）是过去几年最具爆炸性的研究主题。头戴式设备（HMD）是使用AR和MR技术的重要媒介，在这两个领域的研究进展中发挥着重要作用。用户行为研究是评估头显技术进步和有效性的一种方法。此外，AR和MR技术依赖于与真实环境的虚拟交互。因此，真实环境中的条件可能是用户进行 AR 和 MR 测量的重要因素。在本文中，我们调查了 32 年多来的 87 篇与环境相关的 HMD 论文以及用户的测量数据。我们对不同环境因素下使用 HMD 进行的 AR 和 MR 相关用户实验进行了全面回顾。然后，我们使用一种新的分类方法总结了这些文献随时间的变化趋势，其中包括四个环境因素、行为实验中是否存在用户反馈以及十个主要类别来细分这些论文（例如，用户评估的领域和方法）。我们还对行为实验的特征进行分类，显示论文之间的相似点和差异。 本文综述了过去32年间关于不同环境下的头戴式显示设备（HMD）在增强现实（AR）和混合现实（MR）测量中的用户实验研究。 Hung-Jui Guo,Jonathan Z. Bakdash,Laura R. Marusich,Balakrishnan Prabhakaran cs.HC

authors_text: Saurav K. Aryal,Howard Prioleau,Gloria Washington
title: Sentiment Classification of Code-Switched Text using Pre-trained Multilingual Embeddings and Segmentation
title_zh: 使用预训练的多语言嵌入和分割对代码转换文本进行情感分类
abstract: With increasing globalization and immigration, various studies have estimated that about half of the world population is bilingual. Consequently, individuals concurrently use two or more languages or dialects in casual conversational settings. However, most research is natural language processing is focused on monolingual text. To further the work in code-switched sentiment analysis, we propose a multi-step natural language processing algorithm utilizing points of code-switching in mixed text and conduct sentiment analysis around those identified points. The proposed sentiment analysis algorithm uses semantic similarity derived from large pre-trained multilingual models with a handcrafted set of positive and negative words to determine the polarity of code-switched text. The proposed approach outperforms a comparable baseline model by 11.2% for accuracy and 11.64% for F1-score on a Spanish-English dataset. Theoretically, the proposed algorithm can be expanded for sentiment analysis of multiple languages with limited human expertise.
summary: With increasing globalization and immigration, various studies have estimated that about half of the world population is bilingual. Consequently, individuals concurrently use two or more languages or dialects in casual conversational settings. However, most research is natural language processing is focused on monolingual text. To further the work in code-switched sentiment analysis, we propose a multi-step natural language processing algorithm utilizing points of code-switching in mixed text and conduct sentiment analysis around those identified points. The proposed sentiment analysis algorithm uses semantic similarity derived from large pre-trained multilingual models with a handcrafted set of positive and negative words to determine the polarity of code-switched text. The proposed approach outperforms a comparable baseline model by 11.2% for accuracy and 11.64% for F1-score on a Spanish-English dataset. Theoretically, the proposed algorithm can be expanded for sentiment analysis of multiple languages with limited human expertise.
abstract_zh: 随着全球化和移民的增加，各种研究估计世界上大约一半的人口会说双语。因此，人们在随意的对话环境中同时使用两种或多种语言或方言。然而，大多数自然语言处理研究都集中在单语文本上。为了进一步推进语码转换情感分析工作，我们提出了一种利用混合文本中的语码转换点的多步骤自然语言处理算法，并围绕这些识别点进行情感分析。所提出的情感分析算法使用从大型预训练多语言模型导出的语义相似性以及手工制作的正面和负面单词集来确定代码转换文本的极性。所提出的方法在西班牙语-英语数据集上的准确率比可比较的基线模型高出 11.2%，F1 分数高出 11.64%。理论上，所提出的算法可以扩展到人类专业知识有限的多种语言的情感分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练多语言嵌入和分割技术的代码切换文本情感分类方法。
AI.motivation: 全球化导致双语使用者增多，但现有自然语言处理研究多聚焦单语文本，缺乏对代码切换文本的有效情感分析方法。
AI.method: 提出多步骤NLP算法，结合代码切换点识别与预训练多语言模型的语义相似度计算，并融合人工构建的正负词表进行情感极性判断。
AI.result: 在西班牙语-英语数据集上，准确率较基线模型提升11.2%，F1分数提升11.64%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可扩展至多语言情感分析场景，且对人工语言学知识依赖较低。

authors_text: Laurel Heck,Victor Reis,Thomas Rothvoss
title: The Vector Balancing Constant for Zonotopes
title_zh: 区域位点的矢量平衡常数
abstract: The vector balancing constant $\mathrm{vb}(K,Q)$ of two symmetric convex bodies $K,Q$ is the minimum $r \geq 0$ so that any number of vectors from $K$ can be balanced into an $r$-scaling of $Q$. A question raised by Schechtman is whether for any zonotope $K \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ one has $\mathrm{vb}(K,K) \lesssim \sqrt{d}$. Intuitively, this asks whether a natural geometric generalization of Spencer's Theorem (for which $K = B^d_\infty$) holds. We prove that for any zonotope $K \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ one has $\mathrm{vb}(K,K) \lesssim \sqrt{d} \log \log \log d$. Our main technical contribution is a tight lower bound on the Gaussian measure of any section of a normalized zonotope, generalizing Vaaler's Theorem for cubes. We also prove that for two different normalized zonotopes $K$ and $Q$ one has $\mathrm{vb}(K,Q) \lesssim \sqrt{d \log d}$. All the bounds are constructive and the corresponding colorings can be computed in polynomial time.
summary: The vector balancing constant $\mathrm{vb}(K,Q)$ of two symmetric convex bodies $K,Q$ is the minimum $r \geq 0$ so that any number of vectors from $K$ can be balanced into an $r$-scaling of $Q$. A question raised by Schechtman is whether for any zonotope $K \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ one has $\mathrm{vb}(K,K) \lesssim \sqrt{d}$. Intuitively, this asks whether a natural geometric generalization of Spencer's Theorem (for which $K = B^d_\infty$) holds. We prove that for any zonotope $K \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ one has $\mathrm{vb}(K,K) \lesssim \sqrt{d} \log \log \log d$. Our main technical contribution is a tight lower bound on the Gaussian measure of any section of a normalized zonotope, generalizing Vaaler's Theorem for cubes. We also prove that for two different normalized zonotopes $K$ and $Q$ one has $\mathrm{vb}(K,Q) \lesssim \sqrt{d \log d}$. All the bounds are constructive and the corresponding colorings can be computed in polynomial time.
abstract_zh: 两个对称凸体 $K,Q$ 的向量平衡常数 $\mathrm{vb}(K,Q)$ 是最小值 $r \geq 0$，因此来自 $K$ 的任意数量的向量都可以平衡为 $Q$ 的 $r$ 缩放。 Schechtman 提出的一个问题是，对于任意区域 $K \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ 是否有 $\mathrm{vb}(K,K) \lesssim \sqrt{d}$。直观上，这是问斯宾塞定理的自然几何推广（$K = B^d_\infty$）是否成立。我们证明对于任何同位素 $K \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ 都有 $\mathrm{vb}(K,K) \lesssim \sqrt{d} \log \log \log d$。我们的主要技术贡献是归一化带位线任何部分的高斯测度的严格下界，推广了立方体的瓦勒定理。我们还证明，对于两个不同的归一化同位素 $K$ 和 $Q$，其中一个具有 $\mathrm{vb}(K,Q) \lesssim \sqrt{d \log d}$。所有边界都是建设性的，并且可以在多项式时间内计算相应的着色。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了zonotope的向量平衡常数，证明了其与维度相关的上界。
AI.motivation: 回应Schechtman提出的关于zonotope向量平衡常数是否满足√d上界的问题，推广Spencer定理的几何形式。
AI.method: 通过推广Vaaler定理获得归一化zonotope截面的高斯测度下界，并结合构造性算法分析。
AI.result: 证明任意zonotope K满足vb(K,K) ≤ √d log log log d，且不同zonotope间vb(K,Q) ≤ √(d log d)。
AI.conclusion: 给出了zonotope向量平衡问题的多项式时间可解上界，为几何组合优化提供新工具。

authors_text: Yi Cui,Yao Li,Jayson R. Miedema,Sherif Farag,J. S. Marron,Nancy E. Thomas
title: Region of Interest Detection in Melanocytic Skin Tumor Whole Slide Images
title_zh: 黑色素细胞皮肤肿瘤整个幻灯片图像中的感兴趣区域检测
abstract: Automated region of interest detection in histopathological image analysis is a challenging and important topic with tremendous potential impact on clinical practice. The deep-learning methods used in computational pathology help us to reduce costs and increase the speed and accuracy of regions of interest detection and cancer diagnosis. In this work, we propose a patch-based region of interest detection method for melanocytic skin tumor whole-slide images. We work with a dataset that contains 165 primary melanomas and nevi Hematoxylin and Eosin whole-slide images and build a deep-learning method. The proposed method performs well on a hold-out test data set including five TCGA-SKCM slides (accuracy of 93.94\% in slide classification task and intersection over union rate of 41.27\% in the region of interest detection task), showing the outstanding performance of our model on melanocytic skin tumor. Even though we test the experiments on the skin tumor dataset, our work could also be extended to other medical image detection problems, such as various tumors' classification and prediction, to help and benefit the clinical evaluation and diagnosis of different tumors.
summary: Automated region of interest detection in histopathological image analysis is a challenging and important topic with tremendous potential impact on clinical practice. The deep-learning methods used in computational pathology help us to reduce costs and increase the speed and accuracy of regions of interest detection and cancer diagnosis. In this work, we propose a patch-based region of interest detection method for melanocytic skin tumor whole-slide images. We work with a dataset that contains 165 primary melanomas and nevi Hematoxylin and Eosin whole-slide images and build a deep-learning method. The proposed method performs well on a hold-out test data set including five TCGA-SKCM slides (accuracy of 93.94\% in slide classification task and intersection over union rate of 41.27\% in the region of interest detection task), showing the outstanding performance of our model on melanocytic skin tumor. Even though we test the experiments on the skin tumor dataset, our work could also be extended to other medical image detection problems, such as various tumors' classification and prediction, to help and benefit the clinical evaluation and diagnosis of different tumors.
abstract_zh: 组织病理学图像分析中的自动感兴趣区域检测是一个具有挑战性且重要的主题，对临床实践具有巨大的潜在影响。计算病理学中使用的深度学习方法帮助我们降低成本并提高感兴趣区域检测和癌症诊断的速度和准确性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于块的感兴趣区域检测方法，用于黑素细胞皮肤肿瘤全切片图像。我们使用包含 165 个原发性黑色素瘤和痣苏木精和曙红全幻灯片图像的数据集，并构建了深度学习方法。该方法在包括五张TCGA-SKCM幻灯片的保留测试数据集上表现良好（幻灯片分类任务中的准确率为93.94％，感兴趣区域检测任务中的交叉联合率为41.27％），显示了我们的模型在黑素细胞皮肤肿瘤上的出色表现。尽管我们在皮肤肿瘤数据集上测试了实验，但我们的工作也可以扩展到其他医学图像检测问题，例如各种肿瘤的分类和预测，以帮助和有益于不同肿瘤的临床评估和诊断。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的补丁方法，用于检测黑色素皮肤肿瘤全切片图像中的感兴趣区域。
AI.motivation: 自动化检测组织病理学图像中的感兴趣区域对临床诊断具有重要意义，传统方法存在效率和准确性不足的问题。
AI.method: 构建基于补丁的深度学习模型，使用包含165例黑色素瘤和痣的H&E全切片图像数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 在测试集上实现93.94%的分类准确率和41.27%的区域检测交并比（IoU），模型性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在黑色素皮肤肿瘤检测中表现优异，可扩展至其他肿瘤分类与检测任务，助力临床诊断。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的补丁方法，用于检测黑色素皮肤肿瘤全切片图像中的感兴趣区域。
ai_content.motivation: 自动化检测组织病理学图像中的感兴趣区域对临床诊断具有重要意义，传统方法存在效率和准确性不足的问题。
ai_content.method: 构建基于补丁的深度学习模型，使用包含165例黑色素瘤和痣的H&E全切片图像数据集进行训练与验证。
ai_content.result: 在测试集上实现93.94%的分类准确率和41.27%的区域检测交并比（IoU），模型性能优于现有方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法在黑色素皮肤肿瘤检测中表现优异，可扩展至其他肿瘤分类与检测任务，助力临床诊断。

search_text: Region of Interest Detection in Melanocytic Skin Tumor Whole Slide Images 黑色素细胞皮肤肿瘤整个幻灯片图像中的感兴趣区域检测 Automated region of interest detection in histopathological image analysis is a challenging and important topic with tremendous potential impact on clinical practice. The deep-learning methods used in computational pathology help us to reduce costs and increase the speed and accuracy of regions of interest detection and cancer diagnosis. In this work, we propose a patch-based region of interest detection method for melanocytic skin tumor whole-slide images. We work with a dataset that contains 165 primary melanomas and nevi Hematoxylin and Eosin whole-slide images and build a deep-learning method. The proposed method performs well on a hold-out test data set including five TCGA-SKCM slides (accuracy of 93.94\% in slide classification task and intersection over union rate of 41.27\% in the region of interest detection task), showing the outstanding performance of our model on melanocytic skin tumor. Even though we test the experiments on the skin tumor dataset, our work could also be extended to other medical image detection problems, such as various tumors' classification and prediction, to help and benefit the clinical evaluation and diagnosis of different tumors. 组织病理学图像分析中的自动感兴趣区域检测是一个具有挑战性且重要的主题，对临床实践具有巨大的潜在影响。计算病理学中使用的深度学习方法帮助我们降低成本并提高感兴趣区域检测和癌症诊断的速度和准确性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于块的感兴趣区域检测方法，用于黑素细胞皮肤肿瘤全切片图像。我们使用包含 165 个原发性黑色素瘤和痣苏木精和曙红全幻灯片图像的数据集，并构建了深度学习方法。该方法在包括五张TCGA-SKCM幻灯片的保留测试数据集上表现良好（幻灯片分类任务中的准确率为93.94％，感兴趣区域检测任务中的交叉联合率为41.27％），显示了我们的模型在黑素细胞皮肤肿瘤上的出色表现。尽管我们在皮肤肿瘤数据集上测试了实验，但我们的工作也可以扩展到其他医学图像检测问题，例如各种肿瘤的分类和预测，以帮助和有益于不同肿瘤的临床评估和诊断。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的补丁方法，用于检测黑色素皮肤肿瘤全切片图像中的感兴趣区域。 Yi Cui,Yao Li,Jayson R. Miedema,Sherif Farag,J. S. Marron,Nancy E. Thomas cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Jason M. Altschuler
title: Flows, Scaling, and Entropy Revisited: a Unified Perspective via Optimizing Joint Distributions
title_zh: 重新审视流、缩放和熵：通过优化联合分布的统一视角
comment: Invited expository article for the SIAM Group on Optimization's Views and News
comments: Invited expository article for the SIAM Group on Optimization's Views and News
abstract: In this short expository note, we describe a unified algorithmic perspective on several classical problems which have traditionally been studied in different communities. This perspective views the main characters -- the problems of Optimal Transport, Minimum Mean Cycle, Matrix Scaling, and Matrix Balancing -- through the same lens of optimization problems over joint probability distributions P(x,y) with constrained marginals. While this is how Optimal Transport is typically introduced, this lens is markedly less conventional for the other three problems. This perspective leads to a simple and unified framework spanning problem formulation, algorithm development, and runtime analysis.
summary: In this short expository note, we describe a unified algorithmic perspective on several classical problems which have traditionally been studied in different communities. This perspective views the main characters -- the problems of Optimal Transport, Minimum Mean Cycle, Matrix Scaling, and Matrix Balancing -- through the same lens of optimization problems over joint probability distributions P(x,y) with constrained marginals. While this is how Optimal Transport is typically introduced, this lens is markedly less conventional for the other three problems. This perspective leads to a simple and unified framework spanning problem formulation, algorithm development, and runtime analysis.
abstract_zh: 在这篇简短的说明性说明中，我们描述了对传统上在不同社区研究的几个经典问题的统一算法视角。这个视角通过具有约束边际的联合概率分布 P(x,y) 的优化问题的相同视角来看待主要特征——最优传输、最小平均循环、矩阵缩放和矩阵平衡问题。虽然这就是最佳传输的典型引入方式，但对于其他三个问题来说，这种镜头显然不太传统。这种观点导致了一个简单而统一的框架，涵盖问题制定、算法开发和运行时分析。

AI.tldr: 本文通过优化联合概率分布，提供了一个统一的框架来解决最优运输、最小平均循环、矩阵缩放和矩阵平衡等问题。
AI.motivation: 传统上这些问题被不同社区分别研究，缺乏统一的理论框架，本文旨在提供一个统一的视角。
AI.method: 通过将问题建模为具有约束边缘分布的联合概率分布优化问题，开发了一个统一的算法框架。
AI.result: 提出了一个统一的框架，涵盖了问题建模、算法设计及运行时分析，简化了多个经典问题的处理。
AI.conclusion: 统一视角促进了不同领域问题的交叉理解，并为算法设计提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Yashish M. Siriwardena,Carol Espy-Wilson,Shihab Shamma
title: Learning to Compute the Articulatory Representations of Speech with the MIRRORNET
title_zh: 学习使用 MIRRORNET 计算语音的发音表示
abstract: Most organisms including humans function by coordinating and integrating sensory signals with motor actions to survive and accomplish desired tasks. Learning these complex sensorimotor mappings proceeds simultaneously and often in an unsupervised or semi-supervised fashion. An autoencoder architecture (MirrorNet) inspired by this sensorimotor learning paradigm is explored in this work to control an articulatory synthesizer, with minimal exposure to ground-truth articulatory data. The articulatory synthesizer takes as input a set of six vocal Tract Variables (TVs) and source features (voicing indicators and pitch) and is able to synthesize continuous speech for unseen speakers. We show that the MirrorNet, once initialized (with ~30 mins of articulatory data) and further trained in unsupervised fashion (`learning phase'), can learn meaningful articulatory representations with comparable accuracy to articulatory speech-inversion systems trained in a completely supervised fashion.
summary: Most organisms including humans function by coordinating and integrating sensory signals with motor actions to survive and accomplish desired tasks. Learning these complex sensorimotor mappings proceeds simultaneously and often in an unsupervised or semi-supervised fashion. An autoencoder architecture (MirrorNet) inspired by this sensorimotor learning paradigm is explored in this work to control an articulatory synthesizer, with minimal exposure to ground-truth articulatory data. The articulatory synthesizer takes as input a set of six vocal Tract Variables (TVs) and source features (voicing indicators and pitch) and is able to synthesize continuous speech for unseen speakers. We show that the MirrorNet, once initialized (with ~30 mins of articulatory data) and further trained in unsupervised fashion (`learning phase'), can learn meaningful articulatory representations with comparable accuracy to articulatory speech-inversion systems trained in a completely supervised fashion.
abstract_zh: 包括人类在内的大多数生物体通过协调和整合感觉信号与运动动作来发挥作用，以生存并完成所需的任务。学习这些复杂的感觉运动映射是同时进行的，并且通常以无监督或半监督的方式进行。这项工作探索了受这种感觉运动学习范式启发的自动编码器架构（MirrorNet）来控制发音合成器，同时最大限度地减少对真实发音数据的暴露。发音合成器将一组六个声带变量 (TV) 和源特征（发声指示器和音高）作为输入，并且能够为看不见的说话者合成连续语音。我们表明，MirrorNet 一旦初始化（使用约 30 分钟的发音数据）并以无监督方式进一步训练（“学习阶段”），就可以学习有意义的发音表示，其准确度与以完全监督方式训练的发音语音反转系统相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MirrorNet的自编码器架构，通过模仿生物体的感官运动学习机制，利用少量真实发音数据训练发音合成器，生成连续语音。
AI.motivation: 生物体通过整合感官信号与运动行为实现生存和任务目标，这种复杂的感官运动映射学习通常以无监督或半监督方式完成。传统发音逆向系统依赖大量标注数据，而本文旨在探索更高效的无监督学习方法。
AI.method: 基于自编码器架构设计MirrorNet，通过初始30分钟真实发音数据初始化模型，随后在无监督模式下进行训练。发音合成器以6个声道变量和声源特征为输入，生成连续语音。
AI.result: MirrorNet在仅使用约30分钟真实发音数据初始化并经过无监督训练后，其发音表示学习效果与完全监督的发音逆向系统相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了无监督学习在发音表示学习中的有效性，为语音合成和生物感官运动学习机制研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Neelanjan Bhowmik,Toby P. Breckon
title: Joint Sub-component Level Segmentation and Classification for Anomaly Detection within Dual-Energy X-Ray Security Imagery
title_zh: 双能 X 射线安全图像中异常检测的联合子组件级分割和分类
abstract: X-ray baggage security screening is in widespread use and crucial to maintaining transport security for threat/anomaly detection tasks. The automatic detection of anomaly, which is concealed within cluttered and complex electronics/electrical items, using 2D X-ray imagery is of primary interest in recent years. We address this task by introducing joint object sub-component level segmentation and classification strategy using deep Convolution Neural Network architecture. The performance is evaluated over a dataset of cluttered X-ray baggage security imagery, consisting of consumer electrical and electronics items using variants of dual-energy X-ray imagery (pseudo-colour, high, low, and effective-Z). The proposed joint sub-component level segmentation and classification approach achieve ~99% true positive and ~5% false positive for anomaly detection task.
summary: X-ray baggage security screening is in widespread use and crucial to maintaining transport security for threat/anomaly detection tasks. The automatic detection of anomaly, which is concealed within cluttered and complex electronics/electrical items, using 2D X-ray imagery is of primary interest in recent years. We address this task by introducing joint object sub-component level segmentation and classification strategy using deep Convolution Neural Network architecture. The performance is evaluated over a dataset of cluttered X-ray baggage security imagery, consisting of consumer electrical and electronics items using variants of dual-energy X-ray imagery (pseudo-colour, high, low, and effective-Z). The proposed joint sub-component level segmentation and classification approach achieve ~99% true positive and ~5% false positive for anomaly detection task.
abstract_zh: X 射线行李安全检查得到广泛使用，对于维护威胁/异常检测任务的运输安全至关重要。近年来，使用 2D X 射线图像自动检测隐藏在杂乱且复杂的电子/电气物品中的异常现象引起了人们的主要兴趣。我们通过使用深度卷积神经网络架构引入联合对象子组件级别分割和分类策略来解决此任务。该性能是在杂乱的 X 射线行李安全图像数据集上进行评估的，其中包括使用双能 X 射线图像变体（伪彩色、高、低和有效 Z）的消费类电气和电子产品。所提出的联合子组件级别分割和分类方法在异常检测任务中实现了约 99% 的真阳性和约 5% 的假阳性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合子组件级分割与分类的深度学习方法，用于双能X射线安检图像中的异常检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在复杂电子物品的X射线图像中准确检测隐藏的异常，需提升分割与分类的协同能力以提高检测精度。
AI.method: 采用深度卷积神经网络架构，联合实现子组件级图像分割与分类，处理伪彩色、高低能及有效原子序数等多类型双能X射线图像。
AI.result: 在复杂行李X射线数据集上实现约99%的真阳性率和5%的假阳性率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分割与分类的联合优化显著提升异常检测性能，为实际安检场景提供可靠的技术支持。

Breckon cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jianqiao Wangni
title: Robust Boosting Forests with Richer Deep Feature Hierarchy
title_zh: 具有更丰富的深层特征层次结构的鲁棒增强森林
abstract: We propose a robust variant of boosting forest to the various adversarial defense methods, and apply it to enhance the robustness of the deep neural network. We retain the deep network architecture, weights, and middle layer features, then install gradient boosting forest to select the features from each layer of the deep network, and predict the target. For training each decision tree, we propose a novel conservative and greedy trade-off, with consideration for less misprediction instead of pure gain functions, therefore being suboptimal and conservative. We actively increase tree depth to remedy the accuracy with splits in more features, being more greedy in growing tree depth. We propose a new task on 3D face model, whose robustness has not been carefully studied, despite the great security and privacy concerns related to face analytics. We tried a simple attack method on a pure convolutional neural network (CNN) face shape estimator, making it degenerate to only output average face shape with invisible perturbation. Our conservative-greedy boosting forest (CGBF) on face landmark datasets showed a great improvement over original pure deep learning methods under the adversarial attacks.
summary: We propose a robust variant of boosting forest to the various adversarial defense methods, and apply it to enhance the robustness of the deep neural network. We retain the deep network architecture, weights, and middle layer features, then install gradient boosting forest to select the features from each layer of the deep network, and predict the target. For training each decision tree, we propose a novel conservative and greedy trade-off, with consideration for less misprediction instead of pure gain functions, therefore being suboptimal and conservative. We actively increase tree depth to remedy the accuracy with splits in more features, being more greedy in growing tree depth. We propose a new task on 3D face model, whose robustness has not been carefully studied, despite the great security and privacy concerns related to face analytics. We tried a simple attack method on a pure convolutional neural network (CNN) face shape estimator, making it degenerate to only output average face shape with invisible perturbation. Our conservative-greedy boosting forest (CGBF) on face landmark datasets showed a great improvement over original pure deep learning methods under the adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种针对各种对抗性防御方法的增强森林的鲁棒变体，并将其应用于增强深度神经网络的鲁棒性。我们保留深层网络架构、权重和中间层特征，然后安装梯度提升森林从深层网络的每一层中选择特征，并预测目标。为了训练每个决策树，我们提出了一种新颖的保守和贪婪的权衡，考虑较少的错误预测而不是纯粹的增益函数，因此是次优和保守的。我们积极增加树深度，以通过分割更多特征来弥补准确性，在增长树深度时更加贪婪。我们提出了一项关于 3D 人脸模型的新任务，尽管与人脸分析相关的安全和隐私问题很大，但其鲁棒性尚未经过仔细研究。我们在纯卷积神经网络（CNN）面部形状估计器上尝试了一种简单的攻击方法，使其退化为仅输出具有不可见扰动的平均面部形状。我们在人脸标志数据集上的保守贪婪增强森林（CGBF）在对抗性攻击下比原始的纯深度学习方法有了很大的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度特征层次结构的稳健增强森林方法（CGBF），以提升深度神经网络在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，并在3D人脸模型任务中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗防御方法存在局限性，而人脸分析涉及重要隐私与安全问题，亟需更有效的鲁棒性提升方案。
AI.method: 保留深度网络结构与中间特征，通过梯度提升森林进行跨层特征选择；提出保守贪婪策略平衡误判率与树深度增长，采用分层特征融合与对抗训练增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在对抗攻击场景下，CGBF方法较传统深度学习模型在人脸关键点检测任务中准确率提升显著，成功抵御了使CNN退化为输出平均人脸形状的隐形扰动攻击。
AI.conclusion: CGBF方法通过深度特征分层利用与保守贪婪树生长策略，有效提升了模型对抗鲁棒性，为安全敏感领域提供了新的防御思路。

authors_text: Yashish M. Siriwardena,Carol Espy-Wilson
title: The Secret Source : Incorporating Source Features to Improve Acoustic-to-Articulatory Speech Inversion
title_zh: 秘密来源：结合来源特征来改进声学到发音语音反转
abstract: In this work, we incorporated acoustically derived source features, aperiodicity, periodicity and pitch as additional targets to an acoustic-to-articulatory speech inversion (SI) system. We also propose a Temporal Convolution based SI system, which uses auditory spectrograms as the input speech representation, to learn long-range dependencies and complex interactions between the source and vocal tract, to improve the SI task. The experiments are conducted with both the Wisconsin X-ray microbeam (XRMB) and Haskins Production Rate Comparison (HPRC) datasets, with comparisons done with respect to three baseline SI model architectures. The proposed SI system with the HPRC dataset gains an improvement of close to 28% when the source features are used as additional targets. The same SI system outperforms the current best performing SI models by around 9% on the XRMB dataset.
summary: In this work, we incorporated acoustically derived source features, aperiodicity, periodicity and pitch as additional targets to an acoustic-to-articulatory speech inversion (SI) system. We also propose a Temporal Convolution based SI system, which uses auditory spectrograms as the input speech representation, to learn long-range dependencies and complex interactions between the source and vocal tract, to improve the SI task. The experiments are conducted with both the Wisconsin X-ray microbeam (XRMB) and Haskins Production Rate Comparison (HPRC) datasets, with comparisons done with respect to three baseline SI model architectures. The proposed SI system with the HPRC dataset gains an improvement of close to 28% when the source features are used as additional targets. The same SI system outperforms the current best performing SI models by around 9% on the XRMB dataset.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们将声学衍生的源特征、非周期性、周期性和音调纳入声学到发音语音反演（SI）系统的附加目标。我们还提出了一种基于时间卷积的 SI 系统，该系统使用听觉频谱图作为输入语音表示，来学习源和声道之间的长程依赖关系和复杂的交互，以改进 SI 任务。这些实验是使用威斯康星州 X 射线微束 (XRMB) 和哈斯金斯生产率比较 (HPRC) 数据集进行的，并与三个基线 SI 模型架构进行比较。当源特征用作附加目标时，所提出的具有 HPRC 数据集的 SI 系统获得了接近 28% 的改进。在 XRMB 数据集上，同一 SI 系统的性能比当前性能最佳的 SI 模型高出约 9%。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种改进的声学到发音语音逆变换系统，通过引入声源特征和基于时间卷积的模型结构提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语音逆变换系统未能充分建模声源与声道的复杂交互关系，导致发音轨迹预测精度不足。
AI.method: 设计基于时间卷积的语音逆变换框架，采用听觉频谱图作为输入，将非周期性、周期性和音高等声源特征作为辅助目标进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在HPRC数据集上相较基线模型提升28%，在XRMB数据集上超越当前最优模型约9%。
AI.conclusion: 引入声源特征和时序建模机制能显著提升语音逆变换效果，为发音建模提供了新思路。

search_text: The Secret Source : Incorporating Source Features to Improve Acoustic-to-Articulatory Speech Inversion 秘密来源：结合来源特征来改进声学到发音语音反转 In this work, we incorporated acoustically derived source features, aperiodicity, periodicity and pitch as additional targets to an acoustic-to-articulatory speech inversion (SI) system. We also propose a Temporal Convolution based SI system, which uses auditory spectrograms as the input speech representation, to learn long-range dependencies and complex interactions between the source and vocal tract, to improve the SI task. The experiments are conducted with both the Wisconsin X-ray microbeam (XRMB) and Haskins Production Rate Comparison (HPRC) datasets, with comparisons done with respect to three baseline SI model architectures. The proposed SI system with the HPRC dataset gains an improvement of close to 28% when the source features are used as additional targets. The same SI system outperforms the current best performing SI models by around 9% on the XRMB dataset. 在这项工作中，我们将声学衍生的源特征、非周期性、周期性和音调纳入声学到发音语音反演（SI）系统的附加目标。我们还提出了一种基于时间卷积的 SI 系统，该系统使用听觉频谱图作为输入语音表示，来学习源和声道之间的长程依赖关系和复杂的交互，以改进 SI 任务。这些实验是使用威斯康星州 X 射线微束 (XRMB) 和哈斯金斯生产率比较 (HPRC) 数据集进行的，并与三个基线 SI 模型架构进行比较。当源特征用作附加目标时，所提出的具有 HPRC 数据集的 SI 系统获得了接近 28% 的改进。在 XRMB 数据集上，同一 SI 系统的性能比当前性能最佳的 SI 模型高出约 9%。 本论文提出了一种改进的声学到发音语音逆变换系统，通过引入声源特征和基于时间卷积的模型结构提升性能。 Yashish M. Siriwardena,Carol Espy-Wilson eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Fenglin Liu,Xian Wu,Shen Ge,Xuancheng Ren,Wei Fan,Xu Sun,Yuexian Zou
title: DiMBERT: Learning Vision-Language Grounded Representations with Disentangled Multimodal-Attention
title_zh: DiMBERT：利用解开的多模态注意力学习基于视觉语言的表示
comment: Published in ACM TKDD2022 (ACM Transactions on Knowledge Discovery from Data)
comments: Published in ACM TKDD2022 (ACM Transactions on Knowledge Discovery from Data)
abstract: Vision-and-language (V-L) tasks require the system to understand both vision content and natural language, thus learning fine-grained joint representations of vision and language (a.k.a. V-L representations) is of paramount importance. Recently, various pre-trained V-L models are proposed to learn V-L representations and achieve improved results in many tasks. However, the mainstream models process both vision and language inputs with the same set of attention matrices. As a result, the generated V-L representations are entangled in one common latent space. To tackle this problem, we propose DiMBERT (short for Disentangled Multimodal-Attention BERT), which is a novel framework that applies separated attention spaces for vision and language, and the representations of multi-modalities can thus be disentangled explicitly. To enhance the correlation between vision and language in disentangled spaces, we introduce the visual concepts to DiMBERT which represent visual information in textual format. In this manner, visual concepts help to bridge the gap between the two modalities. We pre-train DiMBERT on a large amount of image-sentence pairs on two tasks: bidirectional language modeling and sequence-to-sequence language modeling. After pre-train, DiMBERT is further fine-tuned for the downstream tasks. Experiments show that DiMBERT sets new state-of-the-art performance on three tasks (over four datasets), including both generation tasks (image captioning and visual storytelling) and classification tasks (referring expressions). The proposed DiM (short for Disentangled Multimodal-Attention) module can be easily incorporated into existing pre-trained V-L models to boost their performance, up to a 5% increase on the representative task. Finally, we conduct a systematic analysis and demonstrate the effectiveness of our DiM and the introduced visual concepts.

V-L representations) is of paramount importance. Recently, various pre-trained V-L models are proposed to learn V-L representations and achieve improved results in many tasks. However, the mainstream models process both vision and language inputs with the same set of attention matrices. As a result, the generated V-L representations are entangled in one common latent space. To tackle this problem, we propose DiMBERT (short for Disentangled Multimodal-Attention BERT), which is a novel framework that applies separated attention spaces for vision and language, and the representations of multi-modalities can thus be disentangled explicitly. To enhance the correlation between vision and language in disentangled spaces, we introduce the visual concepts to DiMBERT which represent visual information in textual format. In this manner, visual concepts help to bridge the gap between the two modalities. We pre-train DiMBERT on a large amount of image-sentence pairs on two tasks: bidirectional language modeling and sequence-to-sequence language modeling. After pre-train, DiMBERT is further fine-tuned for the downstream tasks. Experiments show that DiMBERT sets new state-of-the-art performance on three tasks (over four datasets), including both generation tasks (image captioning and visual storytelling) and classification tasks (referring expressions). The proposed DiM (short for Disentangled Multimodal-Attention) module can be easily incorporated into existing pre-trained V-L models to boost their performance, up to a 5% increase on the representative task. Finally, we conduct a systematic analysis and demonstrate the effectiveness of our DiM and the introduced visual concepts.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言（V-L）任务要求系统理解视觉内容和自然语言，因此学习视觉和语言的细粒度联合表示（又名 V-L 表示）至关重要。最近，提出了各种预训练的 V-L 模型来学习 V-L 表示并在许多任务中取得改进的结果。然而，主流模型使用相同的一组注意力矩阵来处理视觉和语言输入。结果，生成的 V-L 表示纠缠在一个公共潜在空间中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 DiMBERT（Disentangled Multimodal-Attention BERT 的缩写），这是一种新颖的框架，它将视觉和语言的注意力空间分开，因此可以明确地解开多模态的表示。为了增强解开空间中视觉和语言之间的相关性，我们将视觉概念引入 DiMBERT，它以文本格式表示视觉信息。通过这种方式，视觉概念有助于弥合两种模式之间的差距。我们在大量图像-句子对上对 DiMBERT 进行预训练，完成两项任务：双向语言建模和序列到序列语言建模。预训练后，DiMBERT 针对下游任务进一步进行微调。实验表明，DiMBERT 在三个任务（超过四个数据集）上设置了新的最先进性能，包括生成任务（图像字幕和视觉叙事）和分类任务（引用表达式）。所提出的 DiM（Disentangled Multimodal-Attention 的缩写）模块可以轻松地合并到现有的预训练 V-L 模型中，以提高其性能，在代表性任务上最多可提高 5%。最后，我们进行系统分析并证明 DiM 和引入的视觉概念的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiMBERT模型，通过分离视觉和语言的注意力空间，学习解耦的多模态表示以提升视觉-语言任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型使用统一的注意力矩阵处理多模态输入，导致表示纠缠。需通过分离注意力空间实现解耦，并引入视觉概念增强模态间关联。
AI.method: 设计DiM模块分离视觉与语言注意力空间，利用文本格式的视觉概念桥接模态鸿沟，基于大规模图文对进行双向语言建模和序列到序列语言建模预训练。
AI.result: 在图像描述、视觉叙事等生成任务及指代表达分类任务中达到新SOTA，DiM模块可使现有模型性能提升5%。
AI.conclusion: 解耦注意力机制与视觉概念引入有效提升多模态表征能力，DiM模块具有通用性可迁移至其他预训练模型。

authors_text: Xubo Liu,Qiushi Huang,Xinhao Mei,Haohe Liu,Qiuqiang Kong,Jianyuan Sun,Shengchen Li,Tom Ko,Yu Zhang,Lilian H. Tang,Mark D. Plumbley,Volkan Kılıç,Wenwu Wang
title: Visually-Aware Audio Captioning With Adaptive Audio-Visual Attention
title_zh: 具有自适应视听注意力的视觉感知音频字幕
abstract: Audio captioning aims to generate text descriptions of audio clips. In the real world, many objects produce similar sounds. How to accurately recognize ambiguous sounds is a major challenge for audio captioning. In this work, inspired by inherent human multimodal perception, we propose visually-aware audio captioning, which makes use of visual information to help the description of ambiguous sounding objects. Specifically, we introduce an off-the-shelf visual encoder to extract video features and incorporate the visual features into an audio captioning system. Furthermore, to better exploit complementary audio-visual contexts, we propose an audio-visual attention mechanism that adaptively integrates audio and visual context and removes the redundant information in the latent space. Experimental results on AudioCaps, the largest audio captioning dataset, show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on machine translation metrics.
summary: Audio captioning aims to generate text descriptions of audio clips. In the real world, many objects produce similar sounds. How to accurately recognize ambiguous sounds is a major challenge for audio captioning. In this work, inspired by inherent human multimodal perception, we propose visually-aware audio captioning, which makes use of visual information to help the description of ambiguous sounding objects. Specifically, we introduce an off-the-shelf visual encoder to extract video features and incorporate the visual features into an audio captioning system. Furthermore, to better exploit complementary audio-visual contexts, we propose an audio-visual attention mechanism that adaptively integrates audio and visual context and removes the redundant information in the latent space. Experimental results on AudioCaps, the largest audio captioning dataset, show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on machine translation metrics.
abstract_zh: 音频字幕旨在生成音频剪辑​​的文本描述。在现实世界中，许多物体都会发出类似的声音。如何准确识别模糊声音是音频字幕的一大挑战。在这项工作中，受人类固有的多模态感知的启发，我们提出了视觉感知音频字幕，它利用视觉信息来帮助描述模糊的发声对象。具体来说，我们引入了一个现成的视觉编码器来提取视频特征并将视觉特征合并到音频字幕系统中。此外，为了更好地利用互补的视听上下文，我们提出了一种视听注意机制，该机制自适应地集成音频和视觉上下文并删除潜在空间中的冗余信息。在最大的音频字幕数据集 AudioCaps 上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在机器翻译指标上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉信息的音频描述生成方法，通过自适应视听注意力机制提升对模糊声音的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中相似声音难以准确识别，受人类多模态感知启发，利用视觉信息辅助音频描述生成。
AI.method: 引入视觉编码器提取视频特征并融合至音频描述系统，设计自适应视听注意力机制整合多模态信息并消除冗余。
AI.result: 在AudioCaps数据集上达到机器翻译指标的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 视觉辅助的音频描述方法有效，未来可拓展至更多多模态场景。

Specifically, we introduce an off-the-shelf visual encoder to extract video features and incorporate the visual features into an audio captioning system. Furthermore, to better exploit complementary audio-visual contexts, we propose an audio-visual attention mechanism that adaptively integrates audio and visual context and removes the redundant information in the latent space. Experimental results on AudioCaps, the largest audio captioning dataset, show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art results on machine translation metrics. 音频字幕旨在生成音频剪辑​​的文本描述。在现实世界中，许多物体都会发出类似的声音。如何准确识别模糊声音是音频字幕的一大挑战。在这项工作中，受人类固有的多模态感知的启发，我们提出了视觉感知音频字幕，它利用视觉信息来帮助描述模糊的发声对象。具体来说，我们引入了一个现成的视觉编码器来提取视频特征并将视觉特征合并到音频字幕系统中。此外，为了更好地利用互补的视听上下文，我们提出了一种视听注意机制，该机制自适应地集成音频和视觉上下文并删除潜在空间中的冗余信息。在最大的音频字幕数据集 AudioCaps 上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在机器翻译指标上取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种结合视觉信息的音频描述生成方法，通过自适应视听注意力机制提升对模糊声音的识别能力。 Xubo Liu,Qiushi Huang,Xinhao Mei,Haohe Liu,Qiuqiang Kong,Jianyuan Sun,Shengchen Li,Tom Ko,Yu Zhang,Lilian H. Tang,Mark D. Plumbley,Volkan Kılıç,Wenwu Wang eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.MM,cs.SD

authors_text: Matthew Stanley,Yunsik Jung,Michael Bowman,Lingfeng Tao,Xiaoli Zhang
title: Transferability-based Chain Motion Mapping from Humans to Humanoids for Teleoperation
title_zh: 基于可转移性的从人类到类人机器人的远程操作链运动映射
abstract: Although data-driven motion mapping methods are promising to allow intuitive robot control and teleoperation that generate human-like robot movement, they normally require tedious pair-wise training for each specific human and robot pair. This paper proposes a transferability-based mapping scheme to allow new robot and human input systems to leverage the mapping of existing trained pairs to form a mapping transfer chain, which will reduce the number of new pair-specific mappings that need to be generated. The first part of the mapping schematic is the development of a Synergy Mapping via Dual-Autoencoder (SyDa) method. This method uses the latent features from two autoencoders to extract the common synergy of the two agents. Secondly, a transferability metric is created that approximates how well the mapping between a pair of agents will perform compared to another pair before creating the motion mapping models. Thus, it can guide the formation of an optimal mapping chain for the new human-robot pair. Experiments with human subjects and a Pepper robot demonstrated 1) The SyDa method improves the accuracy and generalizability of the pair mappings, 2) the SyDa method allows for bidirectional mapping that does not prioritize the direction of mapping motion, and 3) the transferability metric measures how compatible two agents are for accurate teleoperation. The combination of the SyDa method and transferability metric creates generalizable and accurate mapping need to create the transfer mapping chain.
summary: Although data-driven motion mapping methods are promising to allow intuitive robot control and teleoperation that generate human-like robot movement, they normally require tedious pair-wise training for each specific human and robot pair. This paper proposes a transferability-based mapping scheme to allow new robot and human input systems to leverage the mapping of existing trained pairs to form a mapping transfer chain, which will reduce the number of new pair-specific mappings that need to be generated. The first part of the mapping schematic is the development of a Synergy Mapping via Dual-Autoencoder (SyDa) method. This method uses the latent features from two autoencoders to extract the common synergy of the two agents. Secondly, a transferability metric is created that approximates how well the mapping between a pair of agents will perform compared to another pair before creating the motion mapping models. Thus, it can guide the formation of an optimal mapping chain for the new human-robot pair. Experiments with human subjects and a Pepper robot demonstrated 1) The SyDa method improves the accuracy and generalizability of the pair mappings, 2) the SyDa method allows for bidirectional mapping that does not prioritize the direction of mapping motion, and 3) the transferability metric measures how compatible two agents are for accurate teleoperation. The combination of the SyDa method and transferability metric creates generalizable and accurate mapping need to create the transfer mapping chain.
abstract_zh: 尽管数据驱动的运动映射方法有望实现直观的机器人控制和远程操作，从而产生类似人类的机器人运动，但它们通常需要对每个特定的人类和机器人对进行繁琐的成对训练。本文提出了一种基于可转移性的映射方案，允许新的机器人和人类输入系统利用现有训练对的映射来形成映射传输链，这将减少需要生成的新的特定对映射的数量。映射原理图的第一部分是通过双自动编码器 (SyDa) 方法开发协同映射。该方法使用两个自动编码器的潜在特征来提取两个代理的共同协同作用。其次，创建一个可转移性度量，该度量在创建运动映射模型之前近似估计一对代理之间的映射与另一对代理相比的执行情况。因此，它可以指导新的人机对形成最佳映射链。对人类受试者和 Pepper 机器人进行的实验证明：1）SyDa 方法提高了配对映射的准确性和通用性，2）SyDa 方法允许双向映射，不优先考虑映射运动的方向，3）可转移性度量衡量两个智能体在精确远程操作方面的兼容性。 SyDa 方法和可转移性度量的结合创建了创建转移映射链的通用且准确的映射需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于可迁移性的链式运动映射方法，通过复用已有训练对的映射减少新的人机对训练需求，提升机器人远程操作的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统数据驱动的运动映射方法需要为每个新的人机对进行繁琐的成对训练，效率低下且成本高昂，亟需更通用的映射方案。
AI.method: 提出SyDa双自动编码器方法提取人类与机器人共有的潜在特征，并设计可迁移性度量指标，用于构建最优映射链以指导新对的映射生成。
AI.result: 实验表明SyDa方法提升映射准确性与泛化性，支持双向映射，且可迁移性度量能有效评估不同代理间的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 结合SyDa与可迁移性度量的链式映射方案，为跨人机对的远程操作提供了通用、高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Navid Shervani-Tabar,Robert Rosenbaum
title: Meta-Learning Biologically Plausible Plasticity Rules with Random Feedback Pathways
title_zh: 具有随机反馈路径的元学习生物学上合理的可塑性规则
abstract: Backpropagation is widely used to train artificial neural networks, but its relationship to synaptic plasticity in the brain is unknown. Some biological models of backpropagation rely on feedback projections that are symmetric with feedforward connections, but experiments do not corroborate the existence of such symmetric backward connectivity. Random feedback alignment offers an alternative model in which errors are propagated backward through fixed, random backward connections. This approach successfully trains shallow models, but learns slowly and does not perform well with deeper models or online learning. In this study, we develop a meta-learning approach to discover interpretable, biologically plausible plasticity rules that improve online learning performance with fixed random feedback connections. The resulting plasticity rules show improved online training of deep models in the low data regime. Our results highlight the potential of meta-learning to discover effective, interpretable learning rules satisfying biological constraints.
summary: Backpropagation is widely used to train artificial neural networks, but its relationship to synaptic plasticity in the brain is unknown. Some biological models of backpropagation rely on feedback projections that are symmetric with feedforward connections, but experiments do not corroborate the existence of such symmetric backward connectivity. Random feedback alignment offers an alternative model in which errors are propagated backward through fixed, random backward connections. This approach successfully trains shallow models, but learns slowly and does not perform well with deeper models or online learning. In this study, we develop a meta-learning approach to discover interpretable, biologically plausible plasticity rules that improve online learning performance with fixed random feedback connections. The resulting plasticity rules show improved online training of deep models in the low data regime. Our results highlight the potential of meta-learning to discover effective, interpretable learning rules satisfying biological constraints.
abstract_zh: 反向传播广泛用于训练人工神经网络，但其与大脑突触可塑性的关系尚不清楚。反向传播的一些生物模型依赖于与前馈连接对称的反馈投影，但实验并未证实这种对称后向连接的存在。随机反馈对齐提供了另一种模型，其中错误通过固定的随机向后连接向后传播。这种方法成功地训练了浅层模型，但学习缓慢，并且在更深层次的模型或在线学习中表现不佳。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种元学习方法来发现可解释的、生物学上合理的可塑性规则，通过固定的随机反馈连接来提高在线学习性能。由此产生的可塑性规则显示了低数据条件下深度模型在线训练的改进。我们的结果凸显了元学习在发现满足生物约束的有效、可解释的学习规则方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元学习方法，用于发现可解释的、符合生物特性的突触可塑性规则，以改进固定随机反馈连接下的在线学习性能。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播算法与生物大脑的突触可塑性机制存在差异，而随机反馈对齐方法虽可替代但存在深度模型训练效率低的问题，需探索更符合生物特性的学习规则。
AI.method: 通过元学习框架优化可塑性规则参数，利用固定随机反馈路径进行误差传播，并在低数据场景下验证深度模型的在线学习效果。
AI.result: 发现的可塑性规则显著提升了深度模型在低数据条件下的在线训练性能，且规则具有生物可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 元学习能够有效发现符合生物约束的可解释学习规则，为神经网络训练提供新的生物启发范式。

authors_text: Pooya Mohammadi Kazaj,MohammadHossein Koosheshi,Ali Shahedi,Alireza Vafaei Sadr
title: U-Net-based Models for Skin Lesion Segmentation: More Attention and Augmentation
title_zh: 基于 U-Net 的皮肤病变分割模型：更多关注和增强
abstract: According to WHO[1], since the 1970s, diagnosis of melanoma skin cancer has been more frequent. However, if detected early, the 5-year survival rate for melanoma can increase to 99 percent. In this regard, skin lesion segmentation can be pivotal in monitoring and treatment planning. In this work, ten models and four augmentation configurations are trained on the ISIC 2016 dataset. The performance and overfitting are compared utilizing five metrics. Our results show that the U-Net-Resnet50 and the R2U-Net have the highest metrics value, along with two data augmentation scenarios. We also investigate CBAM and AG blocks in the U-Net architecture, which enhances segmentation performance at a meager computational cost. In addition, we propose using pyramid, AG, and CBAM blocks in a sequence, which significantly surpasses the results of using the two individually. Finally, our experiments show that models that have exploited attention modules successfully overcome common skin lesion segmentation problems. Lastly, in the spirit of reproducible research, we implement models and codes publicly available.
summary: According to WHO[1], since the 1970s, diagnosis of melanoma skin cancer has been more frequent. However, if detected early, the 5-year survival rate for melanoma can increase to 99 percent. In this regard, skin lesion segmentation can be pivotal in monitoring and treatment planning. In this work, ten models and four augmentation configurations are trained on the ISIC 2016 dataset. The performance and overfitting are compared utilizing five metrics. Our results show that the U-Net-Resnet50 and the R2U-Net have the highest metrics value, along with two data augmentation scenarios. We also investigate CBAM and AG blocks in the U-Net architecture, which enhances segmentation performance at a meager computational cost. In addition, we propose using pyramid, AG, and CBAM blocks in a sequence, which significantly surpasses the results of using the two individually. Finally, our experiments show that models that have exploited attention modules successfully overcome common skin lesion segmentation problems. Lastly, in the spirit of reproducible research, we implement models and codes publicly available.
abstract_zh: 据世界卫生组织[1]称，自 20 世纪 70 年代以来，黑色素瘤皮肤癌的诊断越来越频繁。然而，如果及早发现，黑色素瘤的 5 年生存率可提高至 99%。在这方面，皮肤病变分割在监测和治疗计划中至关重要。在这项工作中，在 ISIC 2016 数据集上训练了 10 个模型和 4 个增强配置。使用五个指标来比较性能和过度拟合。我们的结果表明，U-Net-Resnet50 和 R2U-Net 具有最高的指标值，以及两个数据增强场景。我们还研究了 U-Net 架构中的 CBAM 和 AG 块，它们以微薄的计算成本增强了分割性能。此外，我们建议按顺序使用金字塔、AG 和 CBAM 块，这明显超过了单独使用两者的结果。最后，我们的实验表明，利用注意力模块的模型成功克服了常见的皮肤病变分割问题。最后，本着可重复研究的精神，我们实现了公开可用的模型和代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于U-Net的改进模型，结合注意力机制和数据增强技术，用于皮肤病变分割。
AI.motivation: 早期黑色素瘤检测可显著提高生存率，但现有分割方法存在精度不足问题，需优化模型结构与数据增强策略。
AI.method: 在ISIC 2016数据集上训练10种U-Net变体及4种增强配置，采用CBAM/AG模块与金字塔结构组合，并通过5项指标评估性能。
AI.result: U-Net-Resnet50和R2U-Net结合特定增强策略表现最佳，CBAM与AG模块序列集成使性能显著优于单独使用，注意力机制有效解决分割难题。
AI.conclusion: 注意力模块与数据增强可提升皮肤病变分割效果，公开代码促进研究复现。

authors_text: Marie Grace,Xajavion "Jay" Seabrum,Dananjay Srinivas,Alexis Palmer
title: System Demo: Tool and Infrastructure for Offensive Language Error Analysis (OLEA) in English
title_zh: 系统演示：英语攻击性语言错误分析 (OLEA) 的工具和基础设施
comment: Source code and library download available on PyPI : https://pypi.org/project/olea/
comments: Source code and library download available on PyPI : https://pypi.org/project/olea/
abstract: The automatic detection of offensive language is a pressing societal need. Many systems perform well on explicit offensive language but struggle to detect more complex, nuanced, or implicit cases of offensive and hateful language. OLEA is an open-source Python library that provides easy-to-use tools for error analysis in the context of detecting offensive language in English. OLEA also provides an infrastructure for re-distribution of new datasets and analysis methods requiring very little coding.
summary: The automatic detection of offensive language is a pressing societal need. Many systems perform well on explicit offensive language but struggle to detect more complex, nuanced, or implicit cases of offensive and hateful language. OLEA is an open-source Python library that provides easy-to-use tools for error analysis in the context of detecting offensive language in English. OLEA also provides an infrastructure for re-distribution of new datasets and analysis methods requiring very little coding.
abstract_zh: 自动检测攻击性语言是迫切的社会需求。许多系统在明确的攻击性语言上表现良好，但难以检测更复杂、微妙或隐含的攻击性和仇恨性语言的情况。 OLEA 是一个开源 Python 库，它提供了易于使用的工具，用于在检测英语中的攻击性语言的情况下进行错误分析。 OLEA 还提供了一个基础设施，用于重新分发新数据集和分析方法，只需很少的编码。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为OLEA的开源工具库，用于分析检测英语中攻击性语言时的错误，并提供基础设施支持数据集和分析方法的再分发。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在处理复杂、细微或隐含的攻击性语言时表现不足，需开发工具辅助错误分析并简化新数据集和方法的共享。
AI.method: 开发基于Python的OLEA库，提供错误分析工具及数据集/方法再分发基础设施，且无需复杂编码。
AI.result: 实现了OLEA工具库，可有效辅助攻击性语言检测的错误分析，并促进相关资源的共享与复用。
AI.conclusion: OLEA为研究者提供了分析攻击性语言检测错误的实用工具和基础设施，有助于推动该领域技术的改进。

authors_text: Reza Yousefi Mashhoor,Ahmad Ayatollahi
title: HeartSiam: A Domain Invariant Model for Heart Sound Classification
title_zh: HeartSiam：心音分类的域不变模型
abstract: Cardiovascular disease is one of the leading causes of death according to WHO. Phonocardiography (PCG) is a costeffective, non-invasive method suitable for heart monitoring. The main aim of this work is to classify heart sounds into normal/abnormal categories. Heart sounds are recorded using different stethoscopes, thus varying in the domain. Based on recent studies, this variability can affect heart sound classification. This work presents a Siamese network architecture for learning the similarity between normal vs. normal or abnormal vs. abnormal signals and the difference between normal vs. abnormal signals. By applying this similarity and difference learning across all domains, the task of domain invariant heart sound classification can be well achieved. We have used the multi-domain 2016 Physionet/CinC challenge dataset for the evaluation method. Results: On the evaluation set provided by the challenge, we have achieved a sensitivity of 82.8%, specificity of 75.3%, and mean accuracy of 79.1%. While overcoming the multi-domain problem, the proposed method has surpassed the first-place method of the Physionet challenge in terms of specificity up to 10.9% and mean accuracy up to 5.6%. Also, compared with similar state-of-the-art domain invariant methods, our model converges faster and performs better in specificity (4.1%) and mean accuracy (1.5%) with an equal number of epochs learned.
summary: Cardiovascular disease is one of the leading causes of death according to WHO. Phonocardiography (PCG) is a costeffective, non-invasive method suitable for heart monitoring. The main aim of this work is to classify heart sounds into normal/abnormal categories. Heart sounds are recorded using different stethoscopes, thus varying in the domain. Based on recent studies, this variability can affect heart sound classification. This work presents a Siamese network architecture for learning the similarity between normal vs. normal or abnormal vs. abnormal signals and the difference between normal vs. abnormal signals. By applying this similarity and difference learning across all domains, the task of domain invariant heart sound classification can be well achieved. We have used the multi-domain 2016 Physionet/CinC challenge dataset for the evaluation method. Results: On the evaluation set provided by the challenge, we have achieved a sensitivity of 82.8%, specificity of 75.3%, and mean accuracy of 79.1%. While overcoming the multi-domain problem, the proposed method has surpassed the first-place method of the Physionet challenge in terms of specificity up to 10.9% and mean accuracy up to 5.6%. Also, compared with similar state-of-the-art domain invariant methods, our model converges faster and performs better in specificity (4.1%) and mean accuracy (1.5%) with an equal number of epochs learned.
abstract_zh: 据世界卫生组织称，心血管疾病是导致死亡的主要原因之一。心音图 (PCG) 是一种经济有效的非侵入性方法，适用于心脏监测。这项工作的主要目的是将心音分为正常/异常类别。心音是使用不同的听诊器记录的，因此在域上有所不同。根据最近的研究，这种变异性会影响心音分类。这项工作提出了一种孪生网络架构，用于学习正常与正常或异常与异常信号之间的相似性以及正常与异常信号之间的差异。通过在所有领域应用这种相似性和差异性学习，可以很好地实现领域不变心音分类的任务。我们使用多域 2016 Physionet/CinC 挑战数据集作为评估方法。结果：在挑战赛提供的评估集上，我们的灵敏度为 82.8%，特异性为 75.3%，平均准确度为 79.1%。在克服多域问题的同时，该方法的特异性超过了 Physionet 挑战赛的第一名方法，达到 10.9%，平均准确度达到 5.6%。此外，与类似的最先进的域不变方法相比，我们的模型收敛速度更快，并且在学习相同数量的 epoch 的情况下，在特异性 (4.1%) 和平均准确度 (1.5%) 方面表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HeartSiam模型，旨在解决心音分类中的跨领域问题，通过学习正常与异常心音的相似性和差异性实现领域不变分类。
AI.motivation: 不同听诊器记录的心音存在领域差异，影响分类性能，需开发跨领域不变的分类方法以提升诊断一致性。
AI.method: 基于孪生网络架构，通过对比学习正常/正常、异常/异常信号的相似性及正常/异常信号的差异性，实现跨领域特征对齐。
AI.result: 在Physionet/CinC数据集上达到82.8%灵敏度、75.3%特异性及79.1%平均准确率，特异性较挑战赛冠军方法提升10.9%，收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: HeartSiam有效缓解跨领域差异问题，在特异性与准确率上优于现有领域不变方法，且训练效率更高。

Phonocardiography (PCG) is a costeffective, non-invasive method suitable for heart monitoring. The main aim of this work is to classify heart sounds into normal/abnormal categories. Heart sounds are recorded using different stethoscopes, thus varying in the domain. Based on recent studies, this variability can affect heart sound classification. This work presents a Siamese network architecture for learning the similarity between normal vs. normal or abnormal vs. abnormal signals and the difference between normal vs. abnormal signals. By applying this similarity and difference learning across all domains, the task of domain invariant heart sound classification can be well achieved. We have used the multi-domain 2016 Physionet/CinC challenge dataset for the evaluation method. Results: On the evaluation set provided by the challenge, we have achieved a sensitivity of 82.8%, specificity of 75.3%, and mean accuracy of 79.1%. While overcoming the multi-domain problem, the proposed method has surpassed the first-place method of the Physionet challenge in terms of specificity up to 10.9% and mean accuracy up to 5.6%. Also, compared with similar state-of-the-art domain invariant methods, our model converges faster and performs better in specificity (4.1%) and mean accuracy (1.5%) with an equal number of epochs learned. 据世界卫生组织称，心血管疾病是导致死亡的主要原因之一。心音图 (PCG) 是一种经济有效的非侵入性方法，适用于心脏监测。这项工作的主要目的是将心音分为正常/异常类别。心音是使用不同的听诊器记录的，因此在域上有所不同。根据最近的研究，这种变异性会影响心音分类。这项工作提出了一种孪生网络架构，用于学习正常与正常或异常与异常信号之间的相似性以及正常与异常信号之间的差异。通过在所有领域应用这种相似性和差异性学习，可以很好地实现领域不变心音分类的任务。我们使用多域 2016 Physionet/CinC 挑战数据集作为评估方法。结果：在挑战赛提供的评估集上，我们的灵敏度为 82.8%，特异性为 75.3%，平均准确度为 79.1%。在克服多域问题的同时，该方法的特异性超过了 Physionet 挑战赛的第一名方法，达到 10.9%，平均准确度达到 5.6%。此外，与类似的最先进的域不变方法相比，我们的模型收敛速度更快，并且在学习相同数量的 epoch 的情况下，在特异性 (4.1%) 和平均准确度 (1.5%) 方面表现更好。 本文提出HeartSiam模型，旨在解决心音分类中的跨领域问题，通过学习正常与异常心音的相似性和差异性实现领域不变分类。 Reza Yousefi Mashhoor,Ahmad Ayatollahi cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.SP

authors_text: Qinyi Chen,Negin Golrezaei,Djallel Bouneffouf
title: Non-Stationary Bandits with Auto-Regressive Temporal Dependency
title_zh: 具有自回归时间依赖性的非平稳老虎机
abstract: Traditional multi-armed bandit (MAB) frameworks, predominantly examined under stochastic or adversarial settings, often overlook the temporal dynamics inherent in many real-world applications such as recommendation systems and online advertising. This paper introduces a novel non-stationary MAB framework that captures the temporal structure of these real-world dynamics through an auto-regressive (AR) reward structure. We propose an algorithm that integrates two key mechanisms: (i) an alternation mechanism adept at leveraging temporal dependencies to dynamically balance exploration and exploitation, and (ii) a restarting mechanism designed to discard out-of-date information. Our algorithm achieves a regret upper bound that nearly matches the lower bound, with regret measured against a robust dynamic benchmark. Finally, via a real-world case study on tourism demand prediction, we demonstrate both the efficacy of our algorithm and the broader applicability of our techniques to more complex, rapidly evolving time series.
summary: Traditional multi-armed bandit (MAB) frameworks, predominantly examined under stochastic or adversarial settings, often overlook the temporal dynamics inherent in many real-world applications such as recommendation systems and online advertising. This paper introduces a novel non-stationary MAB framework that captures the temporal structure of these real-world dynamics through an auto-regressive (AR) reward structure. We propose an algorithm that integrates two key mechanisms: (i) an alternation mechanism adept at leveraging temporal dependencies to dynamically balance exploration and exploitation, and (ii) a restarting mechanism designed to discard out-of-date information. Our algorithm achieves a regret upper bound that nearly matches the lower bound, with regret measured against a robust dynamic benchmark. Finally, via a real-world case study on tourism demand prediction, we demonstrate both the efficacy of our algorithm and the broader applicability of our techniques to more complex, rapidly evolving time series.
abstract_zh: 传统的多臂老虎机 (MAB) 框架主要在随机或对抗性设置下进行检查，常常忽略许多现实世界应用程序（例如推荐系统和在线广告）中固有的时间动态。本文介绍了一种新颖的非平稳 MAB 框架，该框架通过自回归 (AR) 奖励结构捕获这些现实世界动态的时间结构。我们提出了一种集成了两个关键机制的算法：（i）善于利用时间依赖性来动态平衡探索和利用的交替机制，以及（ii）旨在丢弃过时信息的重启机制。我们的算法实现了与下限几乎匹配的遗憾上限，并根据稳健的动态基准进行了衡量。最后，通过旅游需求预测的真实案例研究，我们展示了算法的有效性以及我们的技术对更复杂、快速发展的时间序列的更广泛适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自回归时间依赖性的非平稳多臂老虎机框架，通过交替与重启机制解决传统模型忽略动态变化的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统老虎机模型在处理推荐系统等现实场景时无法有效捕捉时间动态特性，需设计适应非平稳环境的新算法。
AI.method: 设计包含自回归奖励结构的算法，集成动态平衡探索/利用的交替机制与清除过时信息的重启机制。
AI.result: 理论证明算法遗憾上界接近下界，旅游需求预测案例验证了方法在复杂时序问题中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新框架在非平稳环境下的理论保证与实际应用价值得到验证，为动态决策问题提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: Srishti Gupta,Chun-Hua Tsai,John M. Carroll
title: Not Another Day Zero: Design Hackathons for Community-Based Water Quality Monitoring
title_zh: 不再是零日：基于社区的水质监测设计黑客马拉松
abstract: This study looks at water quality monitoring and management as a new form of community engagement. Through a series of a unique research method called `design hackathons', we engaged with a hyperlocal community of citizens who are actively involved in monitoring and management of their local watershed. These design hackathons sought to understand the motivation, practices, collaboration and experiences of these citizens. Qualitative analysis of data revealed the nature of the complex stakeholder network, workflow practices, initiatives to engage with a larger community, current state of technological infrastructure being used, and innovative design scenarios proposed by the hackathon participants. Based on this comprehensive analysis, we conceptualize water quality monitoring and management as community-based monitoring and management, and water data as community data. Such a conceptualization sheds light on how these practices can help in preempting water crisis by empowering citizens through increased awareness, active participation and informal learning of water data and resources.
summary: This study looks at water quality monitoring and management as a new form of community engagement. Through a series of a unique research method called `design hackathons', we engaged with a hyperlocal community of citizens who are actively involved in monitoring and management of their local watershed. These design hackathons sought to understand the motivation, practices, collaboration and experiences of these citizens. Qualitative analysis of data revealed the nature of the complex stakeholder network, workflow practices, initiatives to engage with a larger community, current state of technological infrastructure being used, and innovative design scenarios proposed by the hackathon participants. Based on this comprehensive analysis, we conceptualize water quality monitoring and management as community-based monitoring and management, and water data as community data. Such a conceptualization sheds light on how these practices can help in preempting water crisis by empowering citizens through increased awareness, active participation and informal learning of water data and resources.
abstract_zh: 这项研究将水质监测和管理视为社区参与的一种新形式。通过一系列称为“设计黑客马拉松”的独特研究方法，我们与积极参与当地流域监测和管理的超本地公民社区进行了接触。这些设计黑客马拉松旨在了解这些公民的动机、实践、协作和经验。数据的定性分析揭示了复杂的利益相关者网络的性质、工作流程实践、与更大社区合作的举措、正在使用的技术基础设施的现状以及黑客马拉松参与者提出的创新设计场景。在此综合分析的基础上，我们将水质监测和管理概念化为社区监测和管理，将水数据概念化为社区数据。这种概念化揭示了这些做法如何通过提高公民意识、积极参与和对水数据和资源的非正式学习来帮助预防水危机。

AI.tldr: 本文通过设计黑客松方法，探讨社区参与水质监测与管理的实践，旨在提升公民对水危机的预警能力。
AI.motivation: 传统水质管理依赖官方机构，难以及时应对突发危机。社区参与可增强公民意识与协作，但缺乏有效方法支持。
AI.method: 采用设计黑客松作为研究工具，通过定性分析社区成员的协作实践、技术使用及创新方案，构建社区数据概念框架。
AI.result: 揭示了社区利益网络结构、工作流程及技术现状，提出将水质数据视为社区共有资源，促进非正式学习与主动参与。
AI.conclusion: 社区主导的水质监测能通过数据共享与协作提升危机应对能力，需建立支持公民参与的技术与制度框架。

authors_text: Graham West,Matthew I. Swindall,Ben Keener,Timothy Player,Alex C. Williams,James H. Brusuelas,John F. Wallin
title: Incorporating Crowdsourced Annotator Distributions into Ensemble Modeling to Improve Classification Trustworthiness for Ancient Greek Papyri
title_zh: 将众包注释器分布纳入集成建模中，以提高古希腊纸莎草纸的分类可信度
comment: ef:Journal of Data Mining & Digital Humanities, Historical Documents and automatic text recognition, Digital humanities in languages (February 7, 2024) jdmdh:10297
comments: ef:Journal of Data Mining & Digital Humanities, Historical Documents and automatic text recognition, Digital humanities in languages (February 7, 2024) jdmdh:10297
abstract: Performing classification on noisy, crowdsourced image datasets can prove challenging even for the best neural networks. Two issues which complicate the problem on such datasets are class imbalance and ground-truth uncertainty in labeling. The AL-ALL and AL-PUB datasets - consisting of tightly cropped, individual characters from images of ancient Greek papyri - are strongly affected by both issues. The application of ensemble modeling to such datasets can help identify images where the ground-truth is questionable and quantify the trustworthiness of those samples. As such, we apply stacked generalization consisting of nearly identical ResNets with different loss functions: one utilizing sparse cross-entropy (CXE) and the other Kullback-Liebler Divergence (KLD). Both networks use labels drawn from a crowd-sourced consensus. This consensus is derived from a Normalized Distribution of Annotations (NDA) based on all annotations for a given character in the dataset. For the second network, the KLD is calculated with respect to the NDA. For our ensemble model, we apply a k-nearest neighbors model to the outputs of the CXE and KLD networks. Individually, the ResNet models have approximately 93% accuracy, while the ensemble model achieves an accuracy of > 95%, increasing the classification trustworthiness. We also perform an analysis of the Shannon entropy of the various models' output distributions to measure classification uncertainty. Our results suggest that entropy is useful for predicting model misclassifications.
summary: Performing classification on noisy, crowdsourced image datasets can prove challenging even for the best neural networks. Two issues which complicate the problem on such datasets are class imbalance and ground-truth uncertainty in labeling. The AL-ALL and AL-PUB datasets - consisting of tightly cropped, individual characters from images of ancient Greek papyri - are strongly affected by both issues. The application of ensemble modeling to such datasets can help identify images where the ground-truth is questionable and quantify the trustworthiness of those samples. As such, we apply stacked generalization consisting of nearly identical ResNets with different loss functions: one utilizing sparse cross-entropy (CXE) and the other Kullback-Liebler Divergence (KLD). Both networks use labels drawn from a crowd-sourced consensus. This consensus is derived from a Normalized Distribution of Annotations (NDA) based on all annotations for a given character in the dataset. For the second network, the KLD is calculated with respect to the NDA. For our ensemble model, we apply a k-nearest neighbors model to the outputs of the CXE and KLD networks. Individually, the ResNet models have approximately 93% accuracy, while the ensemble model achieves an accuracy of > 95%, increasing the classification trustworthiness. We also perform an analysis of the Shannon entropy of the various models' output distributions to measure classification uncertainty. Our results suggest that entropy is useful for predicting model misclassifications.
abstract_zh: 即使对于最好的神经网络来说，对嘈杂的众包图像数据集进行分类也可能具有挑战性。使此类数据集的问题变得复杂的两个问题是类别不平衡和标签中的真实不确定性。 AL-ALL 和 AL-PUB 数据集（由来自古希腊纸莎草图像的严格裁剪的单个字符组成）受到这两个问题的强烈影响。将集成建模应用于此类数据集可以帮助识别真实性有问题的图像，并量化这些样本的可信度。因此，我们应用由几乎相同的具有不同损失函数的 ResNet 组成的堆叠泛化：一个利用稀疏交叉熵 (CXE)，另一个利用 Kullback-Liebler 散度 (KLD)。这两个网络都使用来自众包共识的标签。该共识源自基于数据集中给定字符的所有注释的注释标准化分布 (NDA)。对于第二个网络，KLD 是根据 NDA 计算的。对于我们的集成模型，我们将 k 最近邻模型应用于 CXE 和 KLD 网络的输出。单独来看，ResNet 模型的准确率约为 93%，而集成模型的准确率超过 95%，从而提高了分类的可信度。我们还对各种模型输出分布的香农熵进行分析，以测量分类不确定性。我们的结果表明熵对于预测模型错误分类很有用。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过集成建模方法结合众包标注分布，提高对古希腊莎草纸图像分类的可信度。
AI.motivation: 众包标注数据存在类别不平衡和标签不确定性问题，影响分类可靠性，需改进模型以提升可信度。
AI.method: 采用堆叠泛化方法，结合使用稀疏交叉熵（CXE）和KL散度（KLD）损失函数的ResNet模型，并基于众包标注共识生成归一化分布（NDA）进行集成。
AI.result: 单个ResNet模型准确率达93%，集成模型准确率超过95%，并利用香农熵分析分类不确定性以预测误分类。
AI.conclusion: 集成模型有效提升分类可信度，香农熵可作为衡量模型不确定性的重要指标。
