search_text: Incorporating Crowdsourced Annotator Distributions into Ensemble Modeling to Improve Classification Trustworthiness for Ancient Greek Papyri 将众包注释器分布纳入集成建模中，以提高古希腊纸莎草纸的分类可信度 Performing classification on noisy, crowdsourced image datasets can prove challenging even for the best neural networks. Two issues which complicate the problem on such datasets are class imbalance and ground-truth uncertainty in labeling. The AL-ALL and AL-PUB datasets - consisting of tightly cropped, individual characters from images of ancient Greek papyri - are strongly affected by both issues. The application of ensemble modeling to such datasets can help identify images where the ground-truth is questionable and quantify the trustworthiness of those samples. As such, we apply stacked generalization consisting of nearly identical ResNets with different loss functions: one utilizing sparse cross-entropy (CXE) and the other Kullback-Liebler Divergence (KLD). Both networks use labels drawn from a crowd-sourced consensus. This consensus is derived from a Normalized Distribution of Annotations (NDA) based on all annotations for a given character in the dataset. For the second network, the KLD is calculated with respect to the NDA. For our ensemble model, we apply a k-nearest neighbors model to the outputs of the CXE and KLD networks. Individually, the ResNet models have approximately 93% accuracy, while the ensemble model achieves an accuracy of > 95%, increasing the classification trustworthiness. We also perform an analysis of the Shannon entropy of the various models' output distributions to measure classification uncertainty. Our results suggest that entropy is useful for predicting model misclassifications. 即使对于最好的神经网络来说，对嘈杂的众包图像数据集进行分类也可能具有挑战性。使此类数据集的问题变得复杂的两个问题是类别不平衡和标签中的真实不确定性。 AL-ALL 和 AL-PUB 数据集（由来自古希腊纸莎草图像的严格裁剪的单个字符组成）受到这两个问题的强烈影响。将集成建模应用于此类数据集可以帮助识别真实性有问题的图像，并量化这些样本的可信度。因此，我们应用由几乎相同的具有不同损失函数的 ResNet 组成的堆叠泛化：一个利用稀疏交叉熵 (CXE)，另一个利用 Kullback-Liebler 散度 (KLD)。这两个网络都使用来自众包共识的标签。该共识源自基于数据集中给定字符的所有注释的注释标准化分布 (NDA)。对于第二个网络，KLD 是根据 NDA 计算的。对于我们的集成模型，我们将 k 最近邻模型应用于 CXE 和 KLD 网络的输出。单独来看，ResNet 模型的准确率约为 93%，而集成模型的准确率超过 95%，从而提高了分类的可信度。我们还对各种模型输出分布的香农熵进行分析，以测量分类不确定性。我们的结果表明熵对于预测模型错误分类很有用。 该论文通过集成建模方法结合众包标注分布，提高对古希腊莎草纸图像分类的可信度。 Graham West,Matthew I. Swindall,Ben Keener,Timothy Player,Alex C. Williams,James H. Brusuelas,John F. Wallin cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Václav Rozhoň,Bernhard Haeupler,Anders Martinsson,Christoph Grunau,Goran Zuzic
title: Parallel Breadth-First Search and Exact Shortest Paths and Stronger Notions for Approximate Distances
title_zh: 并行广度优先搜索和精确最短路径以及更强的近似距离概念
abstract: We introduce stronger notions for approximate single-source shortest-path distances, show how to efficiently compute them from weaker standard notions, and demonstrate the algorithmic power of these new notions and transformations. One application is the first work-efficient parallel algorithm for computing exact single-source shortest paths graphs -- resolving a major open problem in parallel computing. Given a source vertex in a directed graph with polynomially-bounded nonnegative integer lengths, the algorithm computes an exact shortest path tree in $m \log^{O(1)} n$ work and $n^{1/2+o(1)}$ depth. Previously, no parallel algorithm improving the trivial linear depths of Dijkstra's algorithm without significantly increasing the work was known, even for the case of undirected and unweighted graphs (i.e., for computing a BFS-tree). Our main result is a black-box transformation that uses $\log^{O(1)} n$ standard approximate distance computations to produce approximate distances which also satisfy the subtractive triangle inequality (up to a $(1+\varepsilon)$ factor) and even induce an exact shortest path tree in a graph with only slightly perturbed edge lengths. These strengthened approximations are algorithmically significantly more powerful and overcome well-known and often encountered barriers for using approximate distances. In directed graphs they can even be boosted to exact distances. This results in a black-box transformation of any (parallel or distributed) algorithm for approximate shortest paths in directed graphs into an algorithm computing exact distances at essentially no cost. Applying this to the recent breakthroughs of Fineman et al. for compute approximate SSSP-distances via approximate hopsets gives new parallel and distributed algorithm for exact shortest paths.
summary: We introduce stronger notions for approximate single-source shortest-path distances, show how to efficiently compute them from weaker standard notions, and demonstrate the algorithmic power of these new notions and transformations. One application is the first work-efficient parallel algorithm for computing exact single-source shortest paths graphs -- resolving a major open problem in parallel computing. Given a source vertex in a directed graph with polynomially-bounded nonnegative integer lengths, the algorithm computes an exact shortest path tree in $m \log^{O(1)} n$ work and $n^{1/2+o(1)}$ depth. Previously, no parallel algorithm improving the trivial linear depths of Dijkstra's algorithm without significantly increasing the work was known, even for the case of undirected and unweighted graphs (i.e., for computing a BFS-tree). Our main result is a black-box transformation that uses $\log^{O(1)} n$ standard approximate distance computations to produce approximate distances which also satisfy the subtractive triangle inequality (up to a $(1+\varepsilon)$ factor) and even induce an exact shortest path tree in a graph with only slightly perturbed edge lengths. These strengthened approximations are algorithmically significantly more powerful and overcome well-known and often encountered barriers for using approximate distances. In directed graphs they can even be boosted to exact distances. This results in a black-box transformation of any (parallel or distributed) algorithm for approximate shortest paths in directed graphs into an algorithm computing exact distances at essentially no cost. Applying this to the recent breakthroughs of Fineman et al. for compute approximate SSSP-distances via approximate hopsets gives new parallel and distributed algorithm for exact shortest paths.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了更强的近似单源最短路径距离的概念，展示了如何从较弱的标准概念有效地计算它们，并展示了这些新概念和转换的算法能力。其中一个应用程序是第一个用于计算精确的单源最短路径图的高效工作并行算法——解决了并行计算中的一个主要开放问题。给定具有多项式有界非负整数长度的有向图中的源顶点，该算法计算 $m \log^{O(1)} n$ 工作和 $n^{1/2+o(1)}$ 深度的精确最短路径树。此前，即使对于无向图和未加权图（即计算 BFS 树）的情况，也没有已知的并行算法可以在不显着增加工作量的情况下改进 Dijkstra 算法的琐碎线性深度。我们的主要结果是一个黑盒变换，它使用 $\log^{O(1)} n$ 标准近似距离计算来生成近似距离，该距离也满足减法三角形不等式（最多 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 因子），甚至在边长度仅略有扰动的图中产生精确的最短路径树。这些增强的近似在算法上明显更强大，并且克服了使用近似距离时众所周知且经常遇到的障碍。在有向图中，它们甚至可以提升到精确的距离。这导致有向图中近似最短路径的任何（并行或分布式）算法的黑盒转换为基本上免费计算精确距离的算法。将其应用于 Fineman 等人最近的突破。通过近似跳集计算近似 SSSP 距离，给出了精确最短路径的新并行分布式算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出更强的近似单源最短路径距离概念，并开发了首个工作高效的并行算法以计算精确的单源最短路径树。
AI.motivation: 传统并行算法无法在不显著增加工作量的情况下改进Dijkstra算法的线性深度，尤其在有向图和无权图中存在计算BFS树的瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过黑盒转换，利用标准近似距离计算生成满足减法三角不等式的近似距离，进而构建精确最短路径树，并可提升为精确距离。
AI.result: 设计出工作量为$ m \\log^{O(1)} n $、深度为$ n^{1/2+o(1)} $的并行算法，解决了并行计算领域长期存在的重大难题。
AI.conclusion: 该转换方法显著增强近似距离的算法能力，突破传统障碍，并可将现有近似最短路径算法高效转化为精确算法。

authors_text: Nicholas Soucy,Salimeh Yasaei Sekeh
title: Improving Hyperspectral Adversarial Robustness Under Multiple Attacks
title_zh: 提高多重攻击下的高光谱对抗鲁棒性
abstract: Semantic segmentation models classifying hyperspectral images (HSI) are vulnerable to adversarial examples. Traditional approaches to adversarial robustness focus on training or retraining a single network on attacked data, however, in the presence of multiple attacks these approaches decrease in performance compared to networks trained individually on each attack. To combat this issue we propose an Adversarial Discriminator Ensemble Network (ADE-Net) which focuses on attack type detection and adversarial robustness under a unified model to preserve per data-type weight optimally while robustifiying the overall network. In the proposed method, a discriminator network is used to separate data by attack type into their specific attack-expert ensemble network.
summary: Semantic segmentation models classifying hyperspectral images (HSI) are vulnerable to adversarial examples. Traditional approaches to adversarial robustness focus on training or retraining a single network on attacked data, however, in the presence of multiple attacks these approaches decrease in performance compared to networks trained individually on each attack. To combat this issue we propose an Adversarial Discriminator Ensemble Network (ADE-Net) which focuses on attack type detection and adversarial robustness under a unified model to preserve per data-type weight optimally while robustifiying the overall network. In the proposed method, a discriminator network is used to separate data by attack type into their specific attack-expert ensemble network.
abstract_zh: 对高光谱图像（HSI）进行分类的语义分割模型很容易受到对抗性示例的影响。传统的对抗鲁棒性方法侧重于针对受攻击数据训练或重新训练单个网络，但是，在存在多次攻击的情况下，与针对每次攻击单独训练的网络相比，这些方法的性能会下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种对抗性鉴别器集成网络（ADE-Net），它专注于统一模型下的攻击类型检测和对抗鲁棒性，以最佳地保留每个数据类型的权重，同时增强整个网络。在所提出的方法中，鉴别器网络用于根据攻击类型将数据分离到特定的攻击专家集成网络中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADE-Net方法，通过攻击类型检测和集成网络优化，提升高光谱图像分割模型在多种对抗攻击下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗鲁棒性方法在面对多种攻击时性能下降，单独训练每个攻击的网络效率低下，需统一模型处理多攻击场景。
AI.method: 设计对抗判别器集成网络（ADE-Net），利用判别器识别攻击类型并分配至对应专家网络，实现数据类型权重优化与整体鲁棒性提升。
AI.result: 实验表明ADE-Net在多种对抗攻击下表现优于传统方法，有效保持各数据类型的最优权重并增强模型整体抗扰能力。
AI.conclusion: ADE-Net通过统一框架实现攻击检测与鲁棒性优化，在多攻击场景下显著优于单独训练方法，为高光谱图像安全提供新思路。

search_text: Improving Hyperspectral Adversarial Robustness Under Multiple Attacks 提高多重攻击下的高光谱对抗鲁棒性 Semantic segmentation models classifying hyperspectral images (HSI) are vulnerable to adversarial examples. Traditional approaches to adversarial robustness focus on training or retraining a single network on attacked data, however, in the presence of multiple attacks these approaches decrease in performance compared to networks trained individually on each attack. To combat this issue we propose an Adversarial Discriminator Ensemble Network (ADE-Net) which focuses on attack type detection and adversarial robustness under a unified model to preserve per data-type weight optimally while robustifiying the overall network. In the proposed method, a discriminator network is used to separate data by attack type into their specific attack-expert ensemble network. 对高光谱图像（HSI）进行分类的语义分割模型很容易受到对抗性示例的影响。传统的对抗鲁棒性方法侧重于针对受攻击数据训练或重新训练单个网络，但是，在存在多次攻击的情况下，与针对每次攻击单独训练的网络相比，这些方法的性能会下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种对抗性鉴别器集成网络（ADE-Net），它专注于统一模型下的攻击类型检测和对抗鲁棒性，以最佳地保留每个数据类型的权重，同时增强整个网络。在所提出的方法中，鉴别器网络用于根据攻击类型将数据分离到特定的攻击专家集成网络中。 本文提出ADE-Net方法，通过攻击类型检测和集成网络优化，提升高光谱图像分割模型在多种对抗攻击下的鲁棒性。 Nicholas Soucy,Salimeh Yasaei Sekeh cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Alireza Roustazadeh,Behzad Ghanbarian,Frank Male,Mohammad B. Shadmand,Vahid Taslimitehrani,Larry W. Lake
title: Estimating oil recovery factor using machine learning: Applications of XGBoost classification
title_zh: 使用机器学习估算石油采收率：XGBoost 分类的应用
abstract: In petroleum engineering, it is essential to determine the ultimate recovery factor, RF, particularly before exploitation and exploration. However, accurately estimating requires data that is not necessarily available or measured at early stages of reservoir development. We, therefore, applied machine learning (ML), using readily available features, to estimate oil RF for ten classes defined in this study. To construct the ML models, we applied the XGBoost classification algorithm. Classification was chosen because recovery factor is bounded from 0 to 1, much like probability. Three databases were merged, leaving us with four different combinations to first train and test the ML models and then further evaluate them using an independent database including unseen data. The cross-validation method with ten folds was applied on the training datasets to assess the effectiveness of the models. To evaluate the accuracy and reliability of the models, the accuracy, neighborhood accuracy, and macro averaged f1 score were determined. Overall, results showed that the XGBoost classification algorithm could estimate the RF class with reasonable accuracies as high as 0.49 in the training datasets, 0.34 in the testing datasets and 0.2 in the independent databases used. We found that the reliability of the XGBoost model depended on the data in the training dataset meaning that the ML models were database dependent. The feature importance analysis and the SHAP approach showed that the most important features were reserves and reservoir area and thickness.
summary: In petroleum engineering, it is essential to determine the ultimate recovery factor, RF, particularly before exploitation and exploration. However, accurately estimating requires data that is not necessarily available or measured at early stages of reservoir development. We, therefore, applied machine learning (ML), using readily available features, to estimate oil RF for ten classes defined in this study. To construct the ML models, we applied the XGBoost classification algorithm. Classification was chosen because recovery factor is bounded from 0 to 1, much like probability. Three databases were merged, leaving us with four different combinations to first train and test the ML models and then further evaluate them using an independent database including unseen data. The cross-validation method with ten folds was applied on the training datasets to assess the effectiveness of the models. To evaluate the accuracy and reliability of the models, the accuracy, neighborhood accuracy, and macro averaged f1 score were determined. Overall, results showed that the XGBoost classification algorithm could estimate the RF class with reasonable accuracies as high as 0.49 in the training datasets, 0.34 in the testing datasets and 0.2 in the independent databases used. We found that the reliability of the XGBoost model depended on the data in the training dataset meaning that the ML models were database dependent. The feature importance analysis and the SHAP approach showed that the most important features were reserves and reservoir area and thickness.
abstract_zh: 在石油工程中，确定最终采收率 RF 至关重要，特别是在开采和勘探之前。然而，准确估计需要的数据不一定是在油藏开发的早期阶段可用或测量的。因此，我们应用机器学习 (ML)，使用现成的特征来估计本研究中定义的十个类别的石油 RF。为了构建 ML 模型，我们应用了 XGBoost 分类算法。选择分类是因为恢复因子限制在 0 到 1 之间，就像概率一样。三个数据库被合并，留下四种不同的组合来首先训练和测试机器学习模型，然后使用包含未见数据的独立数据库进一步评估它们。对训练数据集应用十倍交叉验证方法来评估模型的有效性。为了评估模型的准确性和可靠性，确定了准确性、邻域准确性和宏观平均 f1 分数。总体而言，结果表明 XGBoost 分类算法可以以合理的准确度估计 RF 类别，在训练数据集中高达 0.49，在测试数据集中高达 0.34，在所使用的独立数据库中高达 0.2。我们发现 XGBoost 模型的可靠性取决于训练数据集中的数据，这意味着 ML 模型依赖于数据库。特征重要性分析和 SHAP 方法表明，最重要的特征是储量、储层面积和厚度。

AI.tldr: 本文使用XGBoost分类算法估计石油工程中的油气回收率（RF），通过合并三个数据库并应用交叉验证方法进行模型训练和评估。
AI.motivation: 在石油工程中，早期阶段缺乏足够的数据导致油气回收率（RF）难以准确估计，需借助机器学习方法解决数据不足问题。
AI.method: 采用XGBoost分类算法，合并三个数据库生成四种组合进行训练与测试，使用十折交叉验证及独立数据库评估模型，通过准确率、邻域准确率和宏平均F1分数衡量效果。
AI.result: 训练集准确率达0.49，测试集为0.34，独立数据库为0.2；特征重要性分析显示储量、油藏面积和厚度为关键因素。
AI.conclusion: XGBoost模型的可靠性依赖于训练数据，且油藏储量、面积及厚度是影响回收率估计的核心特征。

authors_text: Alireza Vafaei Sadr,Bruce A. Bassett,Emmanuel Sekyi
title: Learning to Detect Interesting Anomalies
title_zh: 学习检测有趣的异常
abstract: Anomaly detection algorithms are typically applied to static, unchanging, data features hand-crafted by the user. But how does a user systematically craft good features for anomalies that have never been seen? Here we couple deep learning with active learning -- in which an Oracle iteratively labels small amounts of data selected algorithmically over a series of rounds -- to automatically and dynamically improve the data features for efficient outlier detection. This approach, AHUNT, shows excellent performance on MNIST, CIFAR10, and Galaxy-DESI data, significantly outperforming both standard anomaly detection and active learning algorithms with static feature spaces. Beyond improved performance, AHUNT also allows the number of anomaly classes to grow organically in response to Oracle's evaluations. Extensive ablation studies explore the impact of Oracle question selection strategy and loss function on performance. We illustrate how the dynamic anomaly class taxonomy represents another step towards fully personalized rankings of different anomaly classes that reflect a user's interests, allowing the algorithm to learn to ignore statistically significant but uninteresting outliers (e.g., noise). This should prove useful in the era of massive astronomical datasets serving diverse sets of users who can only review a tiny subset of the incoming data.
summary: Anomaly detection algorithms are typically applied to static, unchanging, data features hand-crafted by the user. But how does a user systematically craft good features for anomalies that have never been seen? Here we couple deep learning with active learning -- in which an Oracle iteratively labels small amounts of data selected algorithmically over a series of rounds -- to automatically and dynamically improve the data features for efficient outlier detection. This approach, AHUNT, shows excellent performance on MNIST, CIFAR10, and Galaxy-DESI data, significantly outperforming both standard anomaly detection and active learning algorithms with static feature spaces. Beyond improved performance, AHUNT also allows the number of anomaly classes to grow organically in response to Oracle's evaluations. Extensive ablation studies explore the impact of Oracle question selection strategy and loss function on performance. We illustrate how the dynamic anomaly class taxonomy represents another step towards fully personalized rankings of different anomaly classes that reflect a user's interests, allowing the algorithm to learn to ignore statistically significant but uninteresting outliers (e.g., noise). This should prove useful in the era of massive astronomical datasets serving diverse sets of users who can only review a tiny subset of the incoming data.
abstract_zh: 异常检测算法通常应用于用户手工制作的静态、不变的数据特征。但是用户如何系统地为从未见过的异常​​情况设计良好的特征呢？在这里，我们将深度学习与主动学习结合起来——Oracle 在一系列轮次中迭代地标记通过算法选择的少量数据——以自动、动态地改进数据特征，以实现高效的异常值检测。这种方法 AHUNT 在 MNIST、CIFAR10 和 Galaxy-DESI 数据上表现出出色的性能，显着优于标准异常检测和具有静态特征空间的主动学习算法。除了提高性能之外，AHUNT 还允许异常类的数量根据 Oracle 的评估有机增长。广泛的消融研究探讨了 Oracle 问题选择策略和损失函数对性能的影响。我们说明了动态异常类分类法如何代表对反映用户兴趣的不同异常类进行完全个性化排名的又一步，从而使算法能够学会忽略统计上显着但无趣的异常值（例如噪声）。在海量天文数据集服务于不同用户组的时代，这应该是有用的，而这些用户只能查看传入数据的一小部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AHUNT方法，结合深度学习与主动学习动态优化数据特征，以更高效检测用户感兴趣的异常。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测依赖人工设计的静态特征，难以应对未知异常类型，且无法根据用户需求动态调整异常分类。
AI.method: 通过Oracle迭代标注策略，结合深度学习模型动态优化特征空间，实现异常检测与分类的自适应更新。
AI.result: AHUNT在MNIST、CIFAR10和Galaxy-DESI数据集上显著优于传统方法，支持异常类别数量的动态扩展并减少无意义噪声干扰。
AI.conclusion: 动态异常分类框架可实现个性化异常排序，有效适应大规模天文数据场景中用户对异常的多样化需求。

ai_content_json.result: AHUNT在MNIST、CIFAR10和Galaxy-DESI数据集上显著优于传统方法，支持异常类别数量的动态扩展并减少无意义噪声干扰。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 动态异常分类框架可实现个性化异常排序，有效适应大规模天文数据场景中用户对异常的多样化需求。

tldr: 本文提出AHUNT方法，结合深度学习与主动学习动态优化数据特征，以更高效检测用户感兴趣的异常。
motivation: 传统异常检测依赖人工设计的静态特征，难以应对未知异常类型，且无法根据用户需求动态调整异常分类。
method: 通过Oracle迭代标注策略，结合深度学习模型动态优化特征空间，实现异常检测与分类的自适应更新。
result: AHUNT在MNIST、CIFAR10和Galaxy-DESI数据集上显著优于传统方法，支持异常类别数量的动态扩展并减少无意义噪声干扰。
conclusion: 动态异常分类框架可实现个性化异常排序，有效适应大规模天文数据场景中用户对异常的多样化需求。
search_text: Learning to Detect Interesting Anomalies 学习检测有趣的异常 Anomaly detection algorithms are typically applied to static, unchanging, data features hand-crafted by the user. But how does a user systematically craft good features for anomalies that have never been seen? Here we couple deep learning with active learning -- in which an Oracle iteratively labels small amounts of data selected algorithmically over a series of rounds -- to automatically and dynamically improve the data features for efficient outlier detection. This approach, AHUNT, shows excellent performance on MNIST, CIFAR10, and Galaxy-DESI data, significantly outperforming both standard anomaly detection and active learning algorithms with static feature spaces. Beyond improved performance, AHUNT also allows the number of anomaly classes to grow organically in response to Oracle's evaluations. Extensive ablation studies explore the impact of Oracle question selection strategy and loss function on performance. We illustrate how the dynamic anomaly class taxonomy represents another step towards fully personalized rankings of different anomaly classes that reflect a user's interests, allowing the algorithm to learn to ignore statistically significant but uninteresting outliers (e.g., noise). This should prove useful in the era of massive astronomical datasets serving diverse sets of users who can only review a tiny subset of the incoming data. 异常检测算法通常应用于用户手工制作的静态、不变的数据特征。但是用户如何系统地为从未见过的异常​​情况设计良好的特征呢？在这里，我们将深度学习与主动学习结合起来——Oracle 在一系列轮次中迭代地标记通过算法选择的少量数据——以自动、动态地改进数据特征，以实现高效的异常值检测。这种方法 AHUNT 在 MNIST、CIFAR10 和 Galaxy-DESI 数据上表现出出色的性能，显着优于标准异常检测和具有静态特征空间的主动学习算法。除了提高性能之外，AHUNT 还允许异常类的数量根据 Oracle 的评估有机增长。广泛的消融研究探讨了 Oracle 问题选择策略和损失函数对性能的影响。我们说明了动态异常类分类法如何代表对反映用户兴趣的不同异常类进行完全个性化排名的又一步，从而使算法能够学会忽略统计上显着但无趣的异常值（例如噪声）。在海量天文数据集服务于不同用户组的时代，这应该是有用的，而这些用户只能查看传入数据的一小部分。 本文提出AHUNT方法，结合深度学习与主动学习动态优化数据特征，以更高效检测用户感兴趣的异常。 Alireza Vafaei Sadr,Bruce A. Bassett,Emmanuel Sekyi cs.LG,astro-ph.IM,cs.AI,hep-ex,physics.data-an

authors_text: Zezhong Jin,Dading Zhong,Xiao Song,Zhaoyi Liu,Naipeng Ye,Qingcheng Zeng
title: Filter and evolve: progressive pseudo label refining for semi-supervised automatic speech recognition
title_zh: 过滤和进化：半监督自动语音识别的渐进式伪标签细化
abstract: Fine tuning self supervised pretrained models using pseudo labels can effectively improve speech recognition performance. But, low quality pseudo labels can misguide decision boundaries and degrade performance. We propose a simple yet effective strategy to filter low quality pseudo labels to alleviate this problem. Specifically, pseudo-labels are produced over the entire training set and filtered via average probability scores calculated from the model output. Subsequently, an optimal percentage of utterances with high probability scores are considered reliable training data with trustworthy labels. The model is iteratively updated to correct the unreliable pseudo labels to minimize the effect of noisy labels. The process above is repeated until unreliable pseudo abels have been adequately corrected. Extensive experiments on LibriSpeech show that these filtered samples enable the refined model to yield more correct predictions, leading to better ASR performances under various experimental settings.
summary: Fine tuning self supervised pretrained models using pseudo labels can effectively improve speech recognition performance. But, low quality pseudo labels can misguide decision boundaries and degrade performance. We propose a simple yet effective strategy to filter low quality pseudo labels to alleviate this problem. Specifically, pseudo-labels are produced over the entire training set and filtered via average probability scores calculated from the model output. Subsequently, an optimal percentage of utterances with high probability scores are considered reliable training data with trustworthy labels. The model is iteratively updated to correct the unreliable pseudo labels to minimize the effect of noisy labels. The process above is repeated until unreliable pseudo abels have been adequately corrected. Extensive experiments on LibriSpeech show that these filtered samples enable the refined model to yield more correct predictions, leading to better ASR performances under various experimental settings.
abstract_zh: 使用伪标签微调自监督预训练模型可以有效提高语音识别性能。但是，低质量的伪标签可能会误导决策边界并降低性能。我们提出了一种简单而有效的策略来过滤低质量的伪标签来缓解这个问题。具体来说，伪标签是在整个训练集上生成的，并通过根据模型输出计算的平均概率分数进行过滤。随后，具有高概率分数的话语的最佳百分比被认为是具有可信标签的可靠训练数据。迭代更新模型以纠正不可靠的伪标签，从而最大限度地减少噪声标签的影响。重复上述过程，直到不可靠的伪标签被充分纠正。 LibriSpeech 上的大量实验表明，这些过滤后的样本使精炼模型能够产生更正确的预测，从而在各种实验设置下获得更好的 ASR 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进式伪标签优化方法，通过过滤低质量伪标签提升半监督自动语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 伪标签质量参差不齐会导致模型决策边界偏差，从而降低半监督ASR效果。
AI.method: 通过模型输出的概率评分筛选伪标签，迭代更新模型以修正不可靠标签，重复直至伪标签质量达标。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上验证，该方法显著提升不同实验设置下的ASR性能。
AI.conclusion: 伪标签过滤与迭代优化策略能有效减少噪声干扰，提升半监督语音识别准确率。

authors_text: Alexandre Perez-Lebel,Marine Le Morvan,Gaël Varoquaux
title: Beyond calibration: estimating the grouping loss of modern neural networks
title_zh: 超越校准：估计现代神经网络的分组损失
comment: ef:ICLR 2023 -- The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations, May 2023, Kigali, Rwanda
comments: ef:ICLR 2023 -- The Eleventh International Conference on Learning Representations, May 2023, Kigali, Rwanda
abstract: The ability to ensure that a classifier gives reliable confidence scores is essential to ensure informed decision-making. To this end, recent work has focused on miscalibration, i.e., the over or under confidence of model scores. Yet calibration is not enough: even a perfectly calibrated classifier with the best possible accuracy can have confidence scores that are far from the true posterior probabilities. This is due to the grouping loss, created by samples with the same confidence scores but different true posterior probabilities. Proper scoring rule theory shows that given the calibration loss, the missing piece to characterize individual errors is the grouping loss. While there are many estimators of the calibration loss, none exists for the grouping loss in standard settings. Here, we propose an estimator to approximate the grouping loss. We show that modern neural network architectures in vision and NLP exhibit grouping loss, notably in distribution shifts settings, which highlights the importance of pre-production validation.
summary: The ability to ensure that a classifier gives reliable confidence scores is essential to ensure informed decision-making. To this end, recent work has focused on miscalibration, i.e., the over or under confidence of model scores. Yet calibration is not enough: even a perfectly calibrated classifier with the best possible accuracy can have confidence scores that are far from the true posterior probabilities. This is due to the grouping loss, created by samples with the same confidence scores but different true posterior probabilities. Proper scoring rule theory shows that given the calibration loss, the missing piece to characterize individual errors is the grouping loss. While there are many estimators of the calibration loss, none exists for the grouping loss in standard settings. Here, we propose an estimator to approximate the grouping loss. We show that modern neural network architectures in vision and NLP exhibit grouping loss, notably in distribution shifts settings, which highlights the importance of pre-production validation.
abstract_zh: 确保分类器给出可靠的置信度分数的能力对于确保明智的决策至关重要。为此，最近的工作重点是错误校准，即模型分数的置信度过高或过低。然而，校准还不够：即使是具有最佳准确度的完美校准的分类器，其置信度分数也可能与真实的后验概率相差甚远。这是由于具有相同置信度分数但不同真实后验概率的样本产生的分组损失。正确的评分规则理论表明，给定校准损失，表征个体错误的缺失部分是分组损失。虽然有许多校准损失的估计器，但标准设置中不存在分组损失的估计器。在这里，我们提出了一个估计器来近似分组损失。我们表明，视觉和 NLP 中的现代神经网络架构表现出分组损失，特别是在分布变化设置中，这凸显了预生产验证的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种估计现代神经网络分组损失的新方法，揭示了校准之外的模型置信度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注模型校准问题，但即使校准良好的模型仍可能因样本置信度与真实后验概率不匹配导致决策风险，需量化这种分组损失。
AI.method: 基于计分规则理论，设计分组损失估计器，通过分析视觉与NLP领域模型在分布偏移场景下的表现验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验证明现代神经网络普遍存在分组损失，尤其在分布偏移情况下，表明生产前需增加该指标的验证环节。
AI.conclusion: 分组损失是评估模型可靠性的重要指标，应与校准误差共同作为模型评估的核心维度。

authors_text: Haiguang Liao,Vinay Patil,Xuliang Dong,Devika Shanbhag,Elias Fallon,Taylor Hogan,Mirko Spasojevic,Levent Burak Kara
title: Hierarchical Automatic Power Plane Generation with Genetic Optimization and Multilayer Perceptron
title_zh: 利用遗传优化和多层感知器的分层自动电源平面生成
abstract: We present an automatic multilayer power plane generation method to accelerate the design of printed circuit boards (PCB). In PCB design, while automatic solvers have been developed to predict important indicators such as the IR-drop, power integrity, and signal integrity, the generation of the power plane itself still largely relies on laborious manual methods. Our automatic power plane generation approach is based on genetic optimization combined with a multilayer perceptron and is able to automatically generate power planes across a diverse set of problems with varying levels of difficulty. Our method GOMLP consists of an outer loop genetic optimizer (GO) and an inner loop multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that generate power planes automatically. The critical elements of our approach include contour detection, feature expansion, and a distance measure to enable island-minimizing complex power plane generation. We compare our approach to a baseline solution based on A*. The A* method consisting of a sequential island generation and merging process which can produce less than ideal solutions. Our experimental results show that on single layer power plane problems, our method outperforms A* in 71% of the problems with varying levels of board layout difficulty. We further describe H-GOMLP, which extends GOMLP to multilayer power plane problems using hierarchical clustering and net similarities based on the Hausdorff distance.
summary: We present an automatic multilayer power plane generation method to accelerate the design of printed circuit boards (PCB). In PCB design, while automatic solvers have been developed to predict important indicators such as the IR-drop, power integrity, and signal integrity, the generation of the power plane itself still largely relies on laborious manual methods. Our automatic power plane generation approach is based on genetic optimization combined with a multilayer perceptron and is able to automatically generate power planes across a diverse set of problems with varying levels of difficulty. Our method GOMLP consists of an outer loop genetic optimizer (GO) and an inner loop multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that generate power planes automatically. The critical elements of our approach include contour detection, feature expansion, and a distance measure to enable island-minimizing complex power plane generation. We compare our approach to a baseline solution based on A*. The A* method consisting of a sequential island generation and merging process which can produce less than ideal solutions. Our experimental results show that on single layer power plane problems, our method outperforms A* in 71% of the problems with varying levels of board layout difficulty. We further describe H-GOMLP, which extends GOMLP to multilayer power plane problems using hierarchical clustering and net similarities based on the Hausdorff distance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种自动多层电源平面生成方法来加速印刷电路板 (PCB) 的设计。在PCB设计中，虽然已经开发出自动求解器来预测IR压降、电源完整性和信号完整性等重要指标，但电源层本身的生成仍然在很大程度上依赖于费力的手动方法。我们的自动电源平面生成方法基于遗传优化与多层感知器相结合，能够针对不同难度级别的各种问题自动生成电源平面。我们的方法 GOMLP 由外环遗传优化器 (GO) 和内环多层感知器 (MLP) 组成，可自动生成功率平面。我们方法的关键要素包括轮廓检测、特征扩展和距离测量，以实现岛最小化复杂的电源平面生成。我们将我们的方法与基于 A* 的基准解决方案进行比较。 A* 方法由连续的岛生成和合并过程组成，可能会产生不太理想的解决方案。我们的实验结果表明，在单层电源层问题上，我们的方法在 71% 的具有不同级别的电路板布局难度的问题上优于 A*。我们进一步描述了 H-GOMLP，它使用分层聚类和基于 Hausdorff 距离的网络相似性将 GOMLP 扩展到多层电源平面问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于遗传优化和多层感知机的自动多层电源平面生成方法，用于加速印刷电路板（PCB）设计。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有自动求解器可预测PCB设计中的关键指标，但电源平面生成仍依赖耗时的手动方法，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 方法GOMLP结合遗传优化（GO）与多层感知机（MLP），包含轮廓检测、特征扩展和距离度量等关键模块，并通过H-GOMLP扩展至多层问题，利用层次聚类和Hausdorff距离计算网络相似性。
AI.result: 在单层电源平面问题中，GOMLP在71%的测试案例中优于A*算法；H-GOMLP成功扩展至多层电源平面生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为单层和多层电源平面生成提供了高效自动化方案，显著优于传统A*方法，在复杂PCB设计中具有应用潜力。

search_text: Hierarchical Automatic Power Plane Generation with Genetic Optimization and Multilayer Perceptron 利用遗传优化和多层感知器的分层自动电源平面生成 We present an automatic multilayer power plane generation method to accelerate the design of printed circuit boards (PCB). In PCB design, while automatic solvers have been developed to predict important indicators such as the IR-drop, power integrity, and signal integrity, the generation of the power plane itself still largely relies on laborious manual methods. Our automatic power plane generation approach is based on genetic optimization combined with a multilayer perceptron and is able to automatically generate power planes across a diverse set of problems with varying levels of difficulty. Our method GOMLP consists of an outer loop genetic optimizer (GO) and an inner loop multi-layer perceptron (MLP) that generate power planes automatically. The critical elements of our approach include contour detection, feature expansion, and a distance measure to enable island-minimizing complex power plane generation. We compare our approach to a baseline solution based on A*. The A* method consisting of a sequential island generation and merging process which can produce less than ideal solutions. Our experimental results show that on single layer power plane problems, our method outperforms A* in 71% of the problems with varying levels of board layout difficulty. We further describe H-GOMLP, which extends GOMLP to multilayer power plane problems using hierarchical clustering and net similarities based on the Hausdorff distance. 我们提出了一种自动多层电源平面生成方法来加速印刷电路板 (PCB) 的设计。在PCB设计中，虽然已经开发出自动求解器来预测IR压降、电源完整性和信号完整性等重要指标，但电源层本身的生成仍然在很大程度上依赖于费力的手动方法。我们的自动电源平面生成方法基于遗传优化与多层感知器相结合，能够针对不同难度级别的各种问题自动生成电源平面。我们的方法 GOMLP 由外环遗传优化器 (GO) 和内环多层感知器 (MLP) 组成，可自动生成功率平面。我们方法的关键要素包括轮廓检测、特征扩展和距离测量，以实现岛最小化复杂的电源平面生成。我们将我们的方法与基于 A* 的基准解决方案进行比较。 A* 方法由连续的岛生成和合并过程组成，可能会产生不太理想的解决方案。我们的实验结果表明，在单层电源层问题上，我们的方法在 71% 的具有不同级别的电路板布局难度的问题上优于 A*。我们进一步描述了 H-GOMLP，它使用分层聚类和基于 Hausdorff 距离的网络相似性将 GOMLP 扩展到多层电源平面问题。 本文提出了一种基于遗传优化和多层感知机的自动多层电源平面生成方法，用于加速印刷电路板（PCB）设计。 Haiguang Liao,Vinay Patil,Xuliang Dong,Devika Shanbhag,Elias Fallon,Taylor Hogan,Mirko Spasojevic,Levent Burak Kara cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Jieyu Zhao,Xuezhi Wang,Yao Qin,Jilin Chen,Kai-Wei Chang
title: Investigating Ensemble Methods for Model Robustness Improvement of Text Classifiers
title_zh: 研究用于提高文本分类器模型鲁棒性的集成方法
abstract: Large pre-trained language models have shown remarkable performance over the past few years. These models, however, sometimes learn superficial features from the dataset and cannot generalize to the distributions that are dissimilar to the training scenario. There have been several approaches proposed to reduce model's reliance on these bias features which can improve model robustness in the out-of-distribution setting. However, existing methods usually use a fixed low-capacity model to deal with various bias features, which ignore the learnability of those features. In this paper, we analyze a set of existing bias features and demonstrate there is no single model that works best for all the cases. We further show that by choosing an appropriate bias model, we can obtain a better robustness result than baselines with a more sophisticated model design.
summary: Large pre-trained language models have shown remarkable performance over the past few years. These models, however, sometimes learn superficial features from the dataset and cannot generalize to the distributions that are dissimilar to the training scenario. There have been several approaches proposed to reduce model's reliance on these bias features which can improve model robustness in the out-of-distribution setting. However, existing methods usually use a fixed low-capacity model to deal with various bias features, which ignore the learnability of those features. In this paper, we analyze a set of existing bias features and demonstrate there is no single model that works best for all the cases. We further show that by choosing an appropriate bias model, we can obtain a better robustness result than baselines with a more sophisticated model design.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练语言模型在过去几年中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，这些模型有时从数据集中学习表面特征，并且无法泛化到与训练场景不同的分布。已经提出了几种方法来减少模型对这些偏差特征的依赖，从而提高模型在分布外设置中的鲁棒性。然而，现有的方法通常使用固定的低容量模型来处理各种偏差特征，忽略了这些特征的可学习性。在本文中，我们分析了一组现有的偏差特征，并证明没有一个模型最适合所有情况。我们进一步表明，通过选择适当的偏差模型，我们可以获得比具有更复杂的模型设计的基线更好的鲁棒性结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过集成方法提升文本分类器在分布外场景下的模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖固定低容量模型处理偏差特征，无法适应不同分布场景，导致模型鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 分析现有偏差特征并验证不同模型对偏差特征的适应性，通过选择适配的偏差模型进行集成。
AI.result: 实验表明，选择合适的偏差模型可比基线方法获得更优的分布外鲁棒性表现。
AI.conclusion: 不存在通用最优模型，需根据偏差特征特性设计模型以提升鲁棒性。

ai_content.conclusion: 不存在通用最优模型，需根据偏差特征特性设计模型以提升鲁棒性。

authors_text: Mattia Pugliatti,Francesco Topputo
title: Boulders Identification on Small Bodies Under Varying Illumination Conditions
title_zh: 不同光照条件下小天体巨石识别
comment: 12 pages, 15 figures, 3rd Space Imaging Workshop, Atlanta, Georgia Tech
comments: 12 pages, 15 figures, 3rd Space Imaging Workshop, Atlanta, Georgia Tech
abstract: The capability to detect boulders on the surface of small bodies is beneficial for vision-based applications such as navigation and hazard detection during critical operations. This task is challenging due to the wide assortment of irregular shapes, the characteristics of the boulders population, and the rapid variability in the illumination conditions. The authors address this challenge by designing a multi-step training approach to develop a data-driven image processing pipeline to robustly detect and segment boulders scattered over the surface of a small body. Due to the limited availability of labeled image-mask pairs, the developed methodology is supported by two artificial environments designed in Blender specifically for this work. These are used to generate a large amount of synthetic image-label sets, which are made publicly available to the image processing community. The methodology presented addresses the challenges of varying illumination conditions, irregular shapes, fast training time, extensive exploration of the architecture design space, and domain gap between synthetic and real images from previously flown missions. The performance of the developed image processing pipeline is tested both on synthetic and real images, exhibiting good performances, and high generalization capabilities
summary: The capability to detect boulders on the surface of small bodies is beneficial for vision-based applications such as navigation and hazard detection during critical operations. This task is challenging due to the wide assortment of irregular shapes, the characteristics of the boulders population, and the rapid variability in the illumination conditions. The authors address this challenge by designing a multi-step training approach to develop a data-driven image processing pipeline to robustly detect and segment boulders scattered over the surface of a small body. Due to the limited availability of labeled image-mask pairs, the developed methodology is supported by two artificial environments designed in Blender specifically for this work. These are used to generate a large amount of synthetic image-label sets, which are made publicly available to the image processing community. The methodology presented addresses the challenges of varying illumination conditions, irregular shapes, fast training time, extensive exploration of the architecture design space, and domain gap between synthetic and real images from previously flown missions. The performance of the developed image processing pipeline is tested both on synthetic and real images, exhibiting good performances, and high generalization capabilities
abstract_zh: 检测小物体表面巨石的能力有利于基于视觉的应用，例如关键操作期间的导航和危险检测。由于不规则形状的种类繁多、巨石群的特征以及照明条件的快速变化，这项任务具有挑战性。作者通过设计一种多步骤训练方法来开发数据驱动的图像处理管道来应对这一挑战，以稳健地检测和分割散布在小物体表面的巨石。由于标记图像-掩模对的可用性有限，所开发的方法由 Blender 中专门为此工作设计的两个人工环境支持。这些用于生成大量合成图像标签集，这些图像标签集可供图像处理社区公开使用。所提出的方法解决了不同照明条件、不规则形状、快速训练时间、对架构设计空间的广泛探索以及来自先前飞行任务的合成图像和真实图像之间的域差距的挑战。所开发的图像处理管道的性能在合成图像和真实图像上进行了测试，表现出良好的性能和高泛化能力

AI.tldr: 开发一种鲁棒的图像处理流程，在光照条件变化的情况下识别小天体表面的巨石。
AI.motivation: 检测小天体表面巨石对导航和危险探测至关重要，但面临形状不规则、光照变化快及标注数据不足等挑战。
AI.method: 设计多阶段训练方法，结合Blender生成的合成数据集，构建数据驱动的图像处理流水线，并优化架构以缩小合成与真实图像间的领域差异。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图像上均表现出色，具有高泛化能力，且公开了合成数据集供社区使用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了光照变化与数据不足问题，为小天体表面分析提供了实用工具与公开资源。

These are used to generate a large amount of synthetic image-label sets, which are made publicly available to the image processing community. The methodology presented addresses the challenges of varying illumination conditions, irregular shapes, fast training time, extensive exploration of the architecture design space, and domain gap between synthetic and real images from previously flown missions. The performance of the developed image processing pipeline is tested both on synthetic and real images, exhibiting good performances, and high generalization capabilities 检测小物体表面巨石的能力有利于基于视觉的应用，例如关键操作期间的导航和危险检测。由于不规则形状的种类繁多、巨石群的特征以及照明条件的快速变化，这项任务具有挑战性。作者通过设计一种多步骤训练方法来开发数据驱动的图像处理管道来应对这一挑战，以稳健地检测和分割散布在小物体表面的巨石。由于标记图像-掩模对的可用性有限，所开发的方法由 Blender 中专门为此工作设计的两个人工环境支持。这些用于生成大量合成图像标签集，这些图像标签集可供图像处理社区公开使用。所提出的方法解决了不同照明条件、不规则形状、快速训练时间、对架构设计空间的广泛探索以及来自先前飞行任务的合成图像和真实图像之间的域差距的挑战。所开发的图像处理管道的性能在合成图像和真实图像上进行了测试，表现出良好的性能和高泛化能力 开发一种鲁棒的图像处理流程，在光照条件变化的情况下识别小天体表面的巨石。 Mattia Pugliatti,Francesco Topputo cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Alexander Mühlberg,Paul Ritter,Simon Langer,Chloë Goossens,Stefanie Nübler,Dominik Schneidereit,Oliver Taubmann,Felix Denzinger,Dominik Nörenberg,Michael Haug,Wolfgang H. Goldmann,Andreas K. Maier,Oliver Friedrich,Lucas Kreiss
title: SEMPAI: a Self-Enhancing Multi-Photon Artificial Intelligence for prior-informed assessment of muscle function and pathology
title_zh: SEMPAI：一种自我增强的多光子人工智能，用于对肌肉功能和病理进行事先知情评估
abstract: Deep learning (DL) shows notable success in biomedical studies. However, most DL algorithms work as a black box, exclude biomedical experts, and need extensive data. We introduce the Self-Enhancing Multi-Photon Artificial Intelligence (SEMPAI), that integrates hypothesis-driven priors in a data-driven DL approach for research on multiphoton microscopy (MPM) of muscle fibers. SEMPAI utilizes meta-learning to optimize prior integration, data representation, and neural network architecture simultaneously. This allows hypothesis testing and provides interpretable feedback about the origin of biological information in MPM images. SEMPAI performs joint learning of several tasks to enable prediction for small datasets. The method is applied on an extensive multi-study dataset resulting in the largest joint analysis of pathologies and function for single muscle fibers. SEMPAI outperforms state-of-the-art biomarkers in six of seven predictive tasks, including those with scarce data. SEMPAI's DL models with integrated priors are superior to those without priors and to prior-only machine learning approaches.
summary: Deep learning (DL) shows notable success in biomedical studies. However, most DL algorithms work as a black box, exclude biomedical experts, and need extensive data. We introduce the Self-Enhancing Multi-Photon Artificial Intelligence (SEMPAI), that integrates hypothesis-driven priors in a data-driven DL approach for research on multiphoton microscopy (MPM) of muscle fibers. SEMPAI utilizes meta-learning to optimize prior integration, data representation, and neural network architecture simultaneously. This allows hypothesis testing and provides interpretable feedback about the origin of biological information in MPM images. SEMPAI performs joint learning of several tasks to enable prediction for small datasets. The method is applied on an extensive multi-study dataset resulting in the largest joint analysis of pathologies and function for single muscle fibers. SEMPAI outperforms state-of-the-art biomarkers in six of seven predictive tasks, including those with scarce data. SEMPAI's DL models with integrated priors are superior to those without priors and to prior-only machine learning approaches.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 在生物医学研究中取得了显着的成功。然而，大多数深度学习算法都是黑匣子，排除了生物医学专家，并且需要大量数据。我们介绍了自我增强多光子人工智能 (SEMPAI)，它将假设驱动的先验集成到数据驱动的深度学习方法中，用于肌肉纤维多光子显微镜 (MPM) 的研究。 SEMPAI 利用元学习同时优化先前的集成、数据表示和神经网络架构。这允许进行假设检验并提供有关 MPM 图像中生物信息来源的可解释的反馈。 SEMPAI 对多个任务执行联合学习，以实现小型数据集的预测。该方法应用于广泛的多研究数据集，从而对单肌纤维的病理和功能进行最大的联合分析。 SEMPAI 在七项预测任务中的六项（包括数据稀缺的任务）中优于最先进的生物标记物。 SEMPAI 具有集成先验的深度学习模型优于没有先验的模型和仅先验的机器学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEMPAI方法，通过整合先验知识与深度学习，提升多光子显微镜下肌肉功能和病理分析的准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型在生物医学研究中存在黑箱问题、依赖大量数据且忽视专家先验知识，难以有效处理小数据集和复杂生物信息。
AI.method: 基于元学习优化先验整合、数据表示及神经网络架构，通过联合学习多个任务实现小数据预测，并应用于多研究数据集进行病理与功能联合分析。
AI.result: SEMPAI在七个预测任务中六个超越现有生物标志物，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现优异，整合先验的模型显著优于无先验模型和传统机器学习方法。
AI.conclusion: SEMPAI通过融合先验知识与元学习，为小数据生物医学研究提供了高可解释性、高性能的分析工具，推动肌肉病理与功能评估的发展。

authors_text: Ioannis Tsiamas,Gerard I. Gállego,José A. R. Fonollosa,Marta R. Costa-jussà
title: Efficient Speech Translation with Dynamic Latent Perceivers
title_zh: 利用动态潜在感知器进行高效语音翻译
abstract: Transformers have been the dominant architecture for Speech Translation in recent years, achieving significant improvements in translation quality. Since speech signals are longer than their textual counterparts, and due to the quadratic complexity of the Transformer, a down-sampling step is essential for its adoption in Speech Translation. Instead, in this research, we propose to ease the complexity by using a Perceiver encoder to map the speech inputs to a fixed-length latent representation. Furthermore, we introduce a novel way of training Perceivers, with Dynamic Latent Access (DLA), unlocking larger latent spaces without any additional computational overhead. Speech-to-Text Perceivers with DLA can match the performance of Transformer baselines across three language pairs in MuST-C. Finally, a DLA-trained model is easily adaptable to DLA at inference, and can be flexibly deployed with various computational budgets, without significant drops in translation quality.
summary: Transformers have been the dominant architecture for Speech Translation in recent years, achieving significant improvements in translation quality. Since speech signals are longer than their textual counterparts, and due to the quadratic complexity of the Transformer, a down-sampling step is essential for its adoption in Speech Translation. Instead, in this research, we propose to ease the complexity by using a Perceiver encoder to map the speech inputs to a fixed-length latent representation. Furthermore, we introduce a novel way of training Perceivers, with Dynamic Latent Access (DLA), unlocking larger latent spaces without any additional computational overhead. Speech-to-Text Perceivers with DLA can match the performance of Transformer baselines across three language pairs in MuST-C. Finally, a DLA-trained model is easily adaptable to DLA at inference, and can be flexibly deployed with various computational budgets, without significant drops in translation quality.
abstract_zh: 近年来，Transformers 一直是语音翻译的主导架构，在翻译质量方面取得了显着的进步。由于语音信号比文本信号长，并且由于 Transformer 的二次复杂度，因此下采样步骤对其在语音翻译中的采用至关重要。相反，在这项研究中，我们建议通过使用感知器编码器将语音输入映射到固定长度的潜在表示来降低复杂性。此外，我们引入了一种训练感知器的新方法，通过动态潜在访问（DLA），解锁更大的潜在空间，而无需任何额外的计算开销。具有 DLA 的语音到文本感知器可以与 MuST-C 中三种语言对的 Transformer 基线的性能相匹配。最后，经过 DLA 训练的模型在推理时很容易适应 DLA，并且可以灵活地部署各种计算预算，而不会显着降低翻译质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的语音翻译方法，通过动态潜在感知器（Dynamic Latent Perceivers）降低计算复杂度并提升灵活性。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在语音翻译中因二次复杂度导致计算开销大，需下采样处理长语音信号，而Perceiver架构可缓解此问题，但原有方法受限于潜在空间规模。
AI.method: 采用Perceiver编码器将语音映射为固定长度潜在表示，并引入动态潜在访问（DLA）训练方法，无需额外计算即可扩展潜在空间。
AI.result: 在MuST-C数据集的三个语言对上，DLA模型性能与Transformer基线相当，且推理时可灵活适配不同计算预算而无显著质量下降。
AI.conclusion: 动态潜在感知器在保持翻译质量的同时，显著提升了语音翻译的计算效率和部署灵活性。

authors_text: Mauro Conti,Jiaxin Li,Stjepan Picek
title: On the Vulnerability of Data Points under Multiple Membership Inference Attacks and Target Models
title_zh: 多重隶属推理攻击下数据点的脆弱性和目标模型
abstract: Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) infer whether a data point is in the training data of a machine learning model. It is a threat while being in the training data is private information of a data point. MIA correctly infers some data points as members or non-members of the training data. Intuitively, data points that MIA accurately detects are vulnerable. Considering those data points may exist in different target models susceptible to multiple MIAs, the vulnerability of data points under multiple MIAs and target models is worth exploring. This paper defines new metrics that can reflect the actual situation of data points' vulnerability and capture vulnerable data points under multiple MIAs and target models. From the analysis, MIA has an inference tendency to some data points despite a low overall inference performance. Additionally, we implement 54 MIAs, whose average attack accuracy ranges from 0.5 to 0.9, to support our analysis with our scalable and flexible platform, Membership Inference Attacks Platform (VMIAP). Furthermore, previous methods are unsuitable for finding vulnerable data points under multiple MIAs and different target models. Finally, we observe that the vulnerability is not characteristic of the data point but related to the MIA and target model.
summary: Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) infer whether a data point is in the training data of a machine learning model. It is a threat while being in the training data is private information of a data point. MIA correctly infers some data points as members or non-members of the training data. Intuitively, data points that MIA accurately detects are vulnerable. Considering those data points may exist in different target models susceptible to multiple MIAs, the vulnerability of data points under multiple MIAs and target models is worth exploring. This paper defines new metrics that can reflect the actual situation of data points' vulnerability and capture vulnerable data points under multiple MIAs and target models. From the analysis, MIA has an inference tendency to some data points despite a low overall inference performance. Additionally, we implement 54 MIAs, whose average attack accuracy ranges from 0.5 to 0.9, to support our analysis with our scalable and flexible platform, Membership Inference Attacks Platform (VMIAP). Furthermore, previous methods are unsuitable for finding vulnerable data points under multiple MIAs and different target models. Finally, we observe that the vulnerability is not characteristic of the data point but related to the MIA and target model.
abstract_zh: 成员推理攻击 (MIA) 推断数据点是否在机器学习模型的训练数据中。当训练数据是数据点的私人信息时，这是一种威胁。 MIA 正确地将某些数据点推断为训练数据的成员或非成员。直观上，MIA 准确检测到的数据点是脆弱的。考虑到这些数据点可能存在于容易受到多个MIA影响的不同目标模型中，因此数据点在多个MIA和目标模型下的脆弱性值得探讨。本文定义了新的指标，可以反映数据点脆弱性的实际情况，捕获多个MIA和目标模型下的脆弱数据点。从分析来看，MIA尽管总体推理性能较低，但对某些数据点有推理倾向。此外，我们还实施了 54 个 MIA，其平均攻击准确度范围为 0.5 到 0.9，以支持我们通过可扩展且灵活的平台成员推理攻击平台 (VMIAP) 进行分析。此外，以前的方法不适合在多个 MIA 和不同目​​标模型下查找易受攻击的数据点。最后，我们观察到该漏洞不是数据点的特征，而是与 MIA 和目标模型有关。

AI.tldr: 本文研究数据点在多种成员推理攻击（MIA）和目标模型下的脆弱性，提出新指标以量化这种脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法有效识别跨多种MIA和目标模型的脆弱数据点，需探索数据点脆弱性的实际影响因素。
AI.method: 定义新指标衡量数据点脆弱性，构建可扩展平台VMIAP实施54种MIA（准确率0.5-0.9），分析攻击与模型对脆弱性的影响。
AI.result: 发现MIA对部分数据点存在推理倾向，数据点脆弱性并非其固有属性，而是与特定MIA和目标模型相关。
AI.conclusion: 传统方法不适用于跨攻击和模型的脆弱性分析，需结合攻击特性与模型交互来评估数据点风险。

search_text: On the Vulnerability of Data Points under Multiple Membership Inference Attacks and Target Models 多重隶属推理攻击下数据点的脆弱性和目标模型 Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) infer whether a data point is in the training data of a machine learning model. It is a threat while being in the training data is private information of a data point. MIA correctly infers some data points as members or non-members of the training data. Intuitively, data points that MIA accurately detects are vulnerable. Considering those data points may exist in different target models susceptible to multiple MIAs, the vulnerability of data points under multiple MIAs and target models is worth exploring. This paper defines new metrics that can reflect the actual situation of data points' vulnerability and capture vulnerable data points under multiple MIAs and target models. From the analysis, MIA has an inference tendency to some data points despite a low overall inference performance. Additionally, we implement 54 MIAs, whose average attack accuracy ranges from 0.5 to 0.9, to support our analysis with our scalable and flexible platform, Membership Inference Attacks Platform (VMIAP). Furthermore, previous methods are unsuitable for finding vulnerable data points under multiple MIAs and different target models. Finally, we observe that the vulnerability is not characteristic of the data point but related to the MIA and target model. 成员推理攻击 (MIA) 推断数据点是否在机器学习模型的训练数据中。当训练数据是数据点的私人信息时，这是一种威胁。 MIA 正确地将某些数据点推断为训练数据的成员或非成员。直观上，MIA 准确检测到的数据点是脆弱的。考虑到这些数据点可能存在于容易受到多个MIA影响的不同目标模型中，因此数据点在多个MIA和目标模型下的脆弱性值得探讨。本文定义了新的指标，可以反映数据点脆弱性的实际情况，捕获多个MIA和目标模型下的脆弱数据点。从分析来看，MIA尽管总体推理性能较低，但对某些数据点有推理倾向。此外，我们还实施了 54 个 MIA，其平均攻击准确度范围为 0.5 到 0.9，以支持我们通过可扩展且灵活的平台成员推理攻击平台 (VMIAP) 进行分析。此外，以前的方法不适合在多个 MIA 和不同目​​标模型下查找易受攻击的数据点。最后，我们观察到该漏洞不是数据点的特征，而是与 MIA 和目标模型有关。 本文研究数据点在多种成员推理攻击（MIA）和目标模型下的脆弱性，提出新指标以量化这种脆弱性。 Mauro Conti,Jiaxin Li,Stjepan Picek cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Mattia Pugliatti,Francesco Topputo
title: DOORS: Dataset fOr bOuldeRs Segmentation. Statistical properties and Blender setup
title_zh: DOORS：巨石分割数据集。统计属性和 Blender 设置
comment: 16 pages, 19 figures, summary paper of a dataset
comments: 16 pages, 19 figures, summary paper of a dataset
abstract: The capability to detect boulders on the surface of small bodies is beneficial for vision-based applications such as hazard detection during critical operations and navigation. This task is challenging due to the wide assortment of irregular shapes, the characteristics of the boulders population, and the rapid variability in the illumination conditions. Moreover, the lack of publicly available labeled datasets for these applications damps the research about data-driven algorithms. In this work, the authors provide a statistical characterization and setup used for the generation of two datasets about boulders on small bodies that are made publicly available.
summary: The capability to detect boulders on the surface of small bodies is beneficial for vision-based applications such as hazard detection during critical operations and navigation. This task is challenging due to the wide assortment of irregular shapes, the characteristics of the boulders population, and the rapid variability in the illumination conditions. Moreover, the lack of publicly available labeled datasets for these applications damps the research about data-driven algorithms. In this work, the authors provide a statistical characterization and setup used for the generation of two datasets about boulders on small bodies that are made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 检测小物体表面巨石的能力有利于基于视觉的应用，例如关键操作和导航期间的危险检测。由于不规则形状的种类繁多、巨石群的特征以及照明条件的快速变化，这项任务具有挑战性。此外，这些应用程序缺乏公开可用的标记数据集，阻碍了数据驱动算法的研究。在这项工作中，作者提供了统计特征和设置，用于生成公开发布的关于小型天体上的巨石的两个数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DOORS数据集，用于小天体表面岩石分割任务，并公开统计特性与Blender生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的岩石分割数据集匮乏，限制了数据驱动算法的研究，亟需标准化数据支持视觉导航等关键应用。
AI.method: 基于Blender构建岩石生成管线，结合统计分析生成具有光照变化和形状多样性的岩石数据集。
AI.result: 发布两个公开数据集，包含岩石的统计特征描述及Blender生成配置方案，支持分割算法研发。
AI.conclusion: 所构建数据集填补了小天体岩石分割领域的数据空白，为后续算法研究提供标准化基准。

authors_text: Pengwei Wang
title: Latent Space is Feature Space: Regularization Term for GANs Training on Limited Dataset
title_zh: 潜在空间即特征空间：有限数据集上 GAN 训练的正则化术语
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) is currently widely used as an unsupervised image generation method. Current state-of-the-art GANs can generate photorealistic images with high resolution. However, a large amount of data is required, or the model would prone to generate images with similar patterns (mode collapse) and bad quality. I proposed an additional structure and loss function for GANs called LFM, trained to maximize the feature diversity between the different dimensions of the latent space to avoid mode collapse without affecting the image quality. Orthogonal latent vector pairs are created, and feature vector pairs extracted by discriminator are examined by dot product, with which discriminator and generator are in a novel adversarial relationship. In experiments, this system has been built upon DCGAN and proved to have improvement on Frechet Inception Distance (FID) training from scratch on CelebA Dataset. This system requires mild extra performance and can work with data augmentation methods. The code is available on github.com/penway/LFM.
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) is currently widely used as an unsupervised image generation method. Current state-of-the-art GANs can generate photorealistic images with high resolution. However, a large amount of data is required, or the model would prone to generate images with similar patterns (mode collapse) and bad quality. I proposed an additional structure and loss function for GANs called LFM, trained to maximize the feature diversity between the different dimensions of the latent space to avoid mode collapse without affecting the image quality. Orthogonal latent vector pairs are created, and feature vector pairs extracted by discriminator are examined by dot product, with which discriminator and generator are in a novel adversarial relationship. In experiments, this system has been built upon DCGAN and proved to have improvement on Frechet Inception Distance (FID) training from scratch on CelebA Dataset. This system requires mild extra performance and can work with data augmentation methods. The code is available on github.com/penway/LFM.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）目前被广泛用作无监督图像生成方法。当前最先进的 GAN 可以生成高分辨率的逼真图像。然而，需要大量的数据，否则模型很容易生成具有相似图案（模式崩溃）且质量较差的图像。我为 GAN 提出了一种名为 LFM 的附加结构和损失函数，经过训练可以最大化潜在空间不同维度之间的特征多样性，以避免模式崩溃而不影响图像质量。创建正交潜在向量对，并通过点积检查判别器提取的特征向量对，判别器和生成器处于一种新颖的对抗关系。在实验中，该系统基于 DCGAN 构建，并证明在 CelebA 数据集上从头开始对 Frechet Inception Distance (FID) 训练有改进。该系统需要轻微的额外性能，并且可以与数据增强方法一起使用。该代码可在 github.com/penway/LFM 上获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种正则化项LFM，用于在有限数据集上改进GAN训练，通过最大化潜在空间特征多样性以避免模式崩溃并保持图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN在有限数据集上易出现模式崩溃和图像质量差，需改进训练方法以提升生成效果。
AI.method: 设计LFM结构与损失函数，生成正交潜在向量对，并通过判别器提取的特征向量点积进行对抗训练，最大化潜在空间特征多样性。
AI.result: 在CelebA数据集上实验表明，LFM提升FID指标，训练效率高，且兼容数据增强方法。
AI.conclusion: LFM有效缓解GAN模式崩溃问题，在有限数据下提升生成质量，具有实用价值。

ai_content.conclusion: LFM有效缓解GAN模式崩溃问题，在有限数据下提升生成质量，具有实用价值。

authors_text: Brian Lucena
title: Nonparametric Probabilistic Regression with Coarse Learners
title_zh: 粗学习器的非参数概率回归
abstract: Probabilistic Regression refers to predicting a full probability density function for the target conditional on the features. We present a nonparametric approach to this problem which combines base classifiers (typically gradient boosted forests) trained on different coarsenings of the target value. By combining such classifiers and averaging the resulting densities, we are able to compute precise conditional densities with minimal assumptions on the shape or form of the density. We combine this approach with a structured cross-entropy loss function which serves to regularize and smooth the resulting densities. Prediction intervals computed from these densities are shown to have high fidelity in practice. Furthermore, examining the properties of these densities on particular observations can provide valuable insight. We demonstrate this approach on a variety of datasets and show competitive performance, particularly on larger datasets.
summary: Probabilistic Regression refers to predicting a full probability density function for the target conditional on the features. We present a nonparametric approach to this problem which combines base classifiers (typically gradient boosted forests) trained on different coarsenings of the target value. By combining such classifiers and averaging the resulting densities, we are able to compute precise conditional densities with minimal assumptions on the shape or form of the density. We combine this approach with a structured cross-entropy loss function which serves to regularize and smooth the resulting densities. Prediction intervals computed from these densities are shown to have high fidelity in practice. Furthermore, examining the properties of these densities on particular observations can provide valuable insight. We demonstrate this approach on a variety of datasets and show competitive performance, particularly on larger datasets.
abstract_zh: 概率回归是指根据特征预测目标的完整概率密度函数。我们提出了一种解决这个问题的非参数方法，该方法结合了在目标值的不同粗化上训练的基分类器（通常是梯度增强森林）。通过组合此类分类器并对所得密度进行平均，我们能够在对密度的形状或形式进行最小假设的情况下计算精确的条件密度。我们将这种方法与结构化交叉熵损失函数结合起来，该函数用于规范和平滑结果密度。根据这些密度计算的预测区间在实践中具有高保真度。此外，根据特定的观察结果检查这些密度的特性可以提供有价值的见解。我们在各种数据集上演示了这种方法，并显示出有竞争力的性能，特别是在较大的数据集上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非参数概率回归方法，通过结合不同目标值粗化版本的基础分类器，生成精确的条件概率密度函数。
AI.motivation: 传统概率回归方法对密度形式假设较多，而本文旨在减少假设，提升模型灵活性和预测精度。
AI.method: 利用梯度提升森林等基础分类器在目标值不同粗化版本上训练，通过密度平均生成条件密度，并结合结构化交叉熵损失函数进行正则化。
AI.result: 预测区间具有高保真度，且在多数据集上表现优异，尤其在大规模数据集上竞争力突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过灵活建模密度形式，有效提升了概率回归的精度和适用性，尤其适合复杂数据场景。

authors_text: Mattia Pugliatti,Francesco Topputo
title: Design of Convolutional Extreme Learning Machines for Vision-Based Navigation Around Small Bodies
title_zh: 用于小物体周围基于视觉的导航的卷积极限学习机的设计
comment: 27 pages, 12 figures, journal contribution submitted to JGCD
comments: 27 pages, 12 figures, journal contribution submitted to JGCD
abstract: Deep learning architectures such as convolutional neural networks are the standard in computer vision for image processing tasks. Their accuracy however often comes at the cost of long and computationally expensive training, the need for large annotated datasets, and extensive hyper-parameter searches. On the other hand, a different method known as convolutional extreme learning machine has shown the potential to perform equally with a dramatic decrease in training time. Space imagery, especially about small bodies, could be well suited for this method. In this work, convolutional extreme learning machine architectures are designed and tested against their deep-learning counterparts. Because of the relatively fast training time of the former, convolutional extreme learning machine architectures enable efficient exploration of the architecture design space, which would have been impractical with the latter, introducing a methodology for an efficient design of a neural network architecture for computer vision tasks. Also, the coupling between the image processing method and labeling strategy is investigated and demonstrated to play a major role when considering vision-based navigation around small bodies.
summary: Deep learning architectures such as convolutional neural networks are the standard in computer vision for image processing tasks. Their accuracy however often comes at the cost of long and computationally expensive training, the need for large annotated datasets, and extensive hyper-parameter searches. On the other hand, a different method known as convolutional extreme learning machine has shown the potential to perform equally with a dramatic decrease in training time. Space imagery, especially about small bodies, could be well suited for this method. In this work, convolutional extreme learning machine architectures are designed and tested against their deep-learning counterparts. Because of the relatively fast training time of the former, convolutional extreme learning machine architectures enable efficient exploration of the architecture design space, which would have been impractical with the latter, introducing a methodology for an efficient design of a neural network architecture for computer vision tasks. Also, the coupling between the image processing method and labeling strategy is investigated and demonstrated to play a major role when considering vision-based navigation around small bodies.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络等深度学习架构是图像处理任务的计算机视觉标准。然而，它们的准确性通常是以长期且计算成本高昂的训练、需要大型注释数据集和广泛的超参数搜索为代价的。另一方面，另一种称为卷积极限学习机的方法已显示出在显着减少训练时间的情况下具有同等性能的潜力。空间图像，特别是关于小天体的图像，可能非常适合这种方法。在这项工作中，卷积极限学习机器架构是针对深度学习机器架构进行设计和测试的。由于前者的训练时间相对较快，卷积极限学习机架构能够有效地探索架构设计空间，而这对于后者来说是不切实际的，从而引入了一种用于计算机视觉任务的神经网络架构的高效设计方法。此外，还研究了图像处理方法和标记策略之间的耦合，并证明在考虑围绕小物体进行基于视觉的导航时发挥着重要作用。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并测试了卷积极限学习机（C-ELM）架构，用于小天体周围基于视觉的导航任务，以替代传统深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽准确但训练耗时长、依赖大规模标注数据，而C-ELM能在保持性能的同时大幅减少训练时间，适合空间图像处理场景。
AI.method: 设计多种C-ELM架构并与其深度学习对手进行对比实验，通过快速训练探索网络结构设计空间，同时研究图像处理方法与标注策略的耦合关系。
AI.result: C-ELM在保持性能的前提下显著降低训练时间，验证了其在小天体视觉导航中的有效性，并证明图像处理与标注策略的耦合对任务成败具有关键影响。
AI.conclusion: C-ELM为计算机视觉任务提供了高效的神经网络设计方法，尤其适用于资源受限的空间探索场景，且需重视图像处理与标注策略的协同优化。

authors_text: Hasna Nhaila,Maria Merzouqi,Elkebir Sarhrouni,Ahmed Hammouch
title: Hyperspectral images classification and Dimensionality Reduction using Homogeneity feature and mutual information
title_zh: 使用同质性特征和互信息的高光谱图像分类和降维
comment: ef:2015 Intelligent Systems and Computer Vision, ISCV 2015, 2015, 7106167 - http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-84934343941&partnerID=MN8TOARS
comments: ef:2015 Intelligent Systems and Computer Vision, ISCV 2015, 2015, 7106167 - http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-84934343941&partnerID=MN8TOARS
abstract: The Hyperspectral image (HSI) contains several hundred bands of the same region called the Ground Truth (GT). The bands are taken in juxtaposed frequencies, but some of them are noisily measured or contain no information. For the classification, the selection of bands, affects significantly the results of classification, in fact, using a subset of relevant bands, these results can be better than those obtained using all bands, from which the need to reduce the dimensionality of the HSI. In this paper, a categorization of dimensionality reduction methods, according to the generation process, is presented. Furthermore, we reproduce an algorithm based on mutual information (MI) to reduce dimensionality by features selection and we introduce an algorithm using mutual information and homogeneity. The two schemas are a filter strategy. Finally, to validate this, we consider the case study AVIRIS HSI 92AV3C. Keywords: Hyperspectrale images; classification; features selection; mutual information; homogeneity
summary: The Hyperspectral image (HSI) contains several hundred bands of the same region called the Ground Truth (GT). The bands are taken in juxtaposed frequencies, but some of them are noisily measured or contain no information. For the classification, the selection of bands, affects significantly the results of classification, in fact, using a subset of relevant bands, these results can be better than those obtained using all bands, from which the need to reduce the dimensionality of the HSI. In this paper, a categorization of dimensionality reduction methods, according to the generation process, is presented. Furthermore, we reproduce an algorithm based on mutual information (MI) to reduce dimensionality by features selection and we introduce an algorithm using mutual information and homogeneity. The two schemas are a filter strategy. Finally, to validate this, we consider the case study AVIRIS HSI 92AV3C. Keywords: Hyperspectrale images; classification; features selection; mutual information; homogeneity
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像 (HSI) 包含同一区域的数百个波段，称为地面实况 (GT)。这些频段是在并列的频率中获取的，但其中一些是噪声测量的或不包含任何信息。对于分类来说，波段的选择，很大程度上影响了分类的结果，事实上，使用相关波段的子集，这些结果可以比使用所有波段得到的结果更好，由此需要降低HSI的维数。在本文中，根据生成过程，提出了降维方法的分类。此外，我们重现了一种基于互信息（MI）的算法，通过特征选择来降低维度，并引入了一种使用互信息和同质性的算法。这两个模式是一个过滤策略。最后，为了验证这一点，我们考虑案例研究 AVIRIS HSI 92AV3C。关键词：高光谱图像；分类;特征选择；相互信息；同质性

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于互信息和同质性特征的高光谱图像降维方法，用于提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像包含大量冗余或噪声波段，直接使用所有波段会导致分类性能下降，需通过降维选择关键特征。
AI.method: 分类降维方法并复现基于互信息的特征选择算法，提出结合互信息与同质性的新算法，均采用过滤策略。
AI.result: 在AVIRIS HSI 92AV3C数据集验证中，新方法有效提升分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 融合互信息与同质性特征的降维方法可优化高光谱图像分类，为后续研究提供新思路。

motivation: 高光谱图像包含大量冗余或噪声波段，直接使用所有波段会导致分类性能下降，需通过降维选择关键特征。
method: 分类降维方法并复现基于互信息的特征选择算法，提出结合互信息与同质性的新算法，均采用过滤策略。
result: 在AVIRIS HSI 92AV3C数据集验证中，新方法有效提升分类准确率。
conclusion: 融合互信息与同质性特征的降维方法可优化高光谱图像分类，为后续研究提供新思路。
search_text: Hyperspectral images classification and Dimensionality Reduction using Homogeneity feature and mutual information 使用同质性特征和互信息的高光谱图像分类和降维 The Hyperspectral image (HSI) contains several hundred bands of the same region called the Ground Truth (GT). The bands are taken in juxtaposed frequencies, but some of them are noisily measured or contain no information. For the classification, the selection of bands, affects significantly the results of classification, in fact, using a subset of relevant bands, these results can be better than those obtained using all bands, from which the need to reduce the dimensionality of the HSI. In this paper, a categorization of dimensionality reduction methods, according to the generation process, is presented. Furthermore, we reproduce an algorithm based on mutual information (MI) to reduce dimensionality by features selection and we introduce an algorithm using mutual information and homogeneity. The two schemas are a filter strategy. Finally, to validate this, we consider the case study AVIRIS HSI 92AV3C. Keywords: Hyperspectrale images; classification; features selection; mutual information; homogeneity 高光谱图像 (HSI) 包含同一区域的数百个波段，称为地面实况 (GT)。这些频段是在并列的频率中获取的，但其中一些是噪声测量的或不包含任何信息。对于分类来说，波段的选择，很大程度上影响了分类的结果，事实上，使用相关波段的子集，这些结果可以比使用所有波段得到的结果更好，由此需要降低HSI的维数。在本文中，根据生成过程，提出了降维方法的分类。此外，我们重现了一种基于互信息（MI）的算法，通过特征选择来降低维度，并引入了一种使用互信息和同质性的算法。这两个模式是一个过滤策略。最后，为了验证这一点，我们考虑案例研究 AVIRIS HSI 92AV3C。关键词：高光谱图像；分类;特征选择；相互信息；同质性 本文提出两种基于互信息和同质性特征的高光谱图像降维方法，用于提升分类效果。 Hasna Nhaila,Maria Merzouqi,Elkebir Sarhrouni,Ahmed Hammouch cs.CV

authors_text: Alejandro Gomez-Alanis,Lukas Drude,Andreas Schwarz,Rupak Vignesh Swaminathan,Simon Wiesler
title: Contextual-Utterance Training for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 自动语音识别的上下文话语训练
abstract: Recent studies of streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T)-based systems have fed the encoder with past contextual information in order to improve its word error rate (WER) performance. In this paper, we first propose a contextual-utterance training technique which makes use of the previous and future contextual utterances in order to do an implicit adaptation to the speaker, topic and acoustic environment. Also, we propose a dual-mode contextual-utterance training technique for streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. This proposed approach allows to make a better use of the available acoustic context in streaming models by distilling "in-place" the knowledge of a teacher, which is able to see both past and future contextual utterances, to the student which can only see the current and past contextual utterances. The experimental results show that a conformer-transducer system trained with the proposed techniques outperforms the same system trained with the classical RNN-T loss. Specifically, the proposed technique is able to reduce both the WER and the average last token emission latency by more than 6% and 40ms relative, respectively.
summary: Recent studies of streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) recurrent neural network transducer (RNN-T)-based systems have fed the encoder with past contextual information in order to improve its word error rate (WER) performance. In this paper, we first propose a contextual-utterance training technique which makes use of the previous and future contextual utterances in order to do an implicit adaptation to the speaker, topic and acoustic environment. Also, we propose a dual-mode contextual-utterance training technique for streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. This proposed approach allows to make a better use of the available acoustic context in streaming models by distilling "in-place" the knowledge of a teacher, which is able to see both past and future contextual utterances, to the student which can only see the current and past contextual utterances. The experimental results show that a conformer-transducer system trained with the proposed techniques outperforms the same system trained with the classical RNN-T loss. Specifically, the proposed technique is able to reduce both the WER and the average last token emission latency by more than 6% and 40ms relative, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近对基于流式自动语音识别 (ASR) 循环神经网络换能器 (RNN-T) 系统的研究为编码器提供了过去的上下文信息，以提高其误字率 (WER) 性能。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种上下文言语训练技术，该技术利用之前和未来的上下文言语来对说话者、主题和声学环境进行隐式适应。此外，我们还提出了一种用于流式自动语音识别（ASR）系统的双模式上下文话语训练技术。这种提出的方​​法允许通过“就地”提炼教师的知识，更好地利用流模型中可用的声学上下文，教师能够看到过去和未来的上下文话语，而学生只能看到当前和过去的上下文话语。实验结果表明，使用所提出的技术训练的适形变换器系统优于使用经典 RNN-T 损失训练的相同系统。具体来说，所提出的技术能够将 WER 和平均最后令牌发射延迟分别相对减少 6% 以上和 40 毫秒以上。

AI.tldr: 提出上下文话语训练和双模式上下文话语训练方法，以提升流式自动语音识别系统的性能
AI.motivation: 现有流式ASR系统仅利用过去上下文信息，限制了模型对说话人、主题及声学环境的适应能力，需引入未来上下文信息以提升性能
AI.method: 提出上下文话语训练技术，结合过去与未来上下文进行隐式适应；并设计双模式训练方法，通过知识蒸馏将教师模型（全上下文可见）的知识传递至学生模型（仅当前及过去上下文可见）
AI.result: 实验表明，采用所提方法的Conformer-Transducer系统相较传统RNN-T损失函数，词错误率降低6%，平均最后一个标记发射延迟减少40ms
AI.conclusion: 所提训练技术能有效提升流式ASR系统的识别准确率并降低延迟，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Hasna Nhaila,Elkebir Sarhrouni,Ahmed Hammouch
title: A Survey on Fundamental Concepts and Practical Challenges of Hyperspectral images
title_zh: 高光谱图像基本概念和实际挑战的调查
comment: ef:2014 2nd World Conference on Complex Systems, WCCS 2014, 2015, pp. 659-664, 7060990. http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-84929207477&partnerID=MN8TOARS
comments: ef:2014 2nd World Conference on Complex Systems, WCCS 2014, 2015, pp. 659-664, 7060990. http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-84929207477&partnerID=MN8TOARS
abstract: The Remote sensing provides a synoptic view of land by detecting the energy reflected from Earth's surface. The Hyperspectral images (HSI) use perfect sensors that extract more than a hundred of images, with more detailed information than using traditional Multispectral data. In this paper, we aim to study this aspect of communication in the case of passive reception. First, a brief overview of acquisition process and treatment of Hyperspectral images is provided. Then, we explain representation spaces and the various analysis methods of these images. Furthermore, the factors influencing this analysis are investigated and some applications, in this area, are presented. Finally, we explain the relationship between Hyperspectral images and Datamining and we outline the open issues related to this area. So we consider the case study: HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C. This study serves as map of route for integrating classification methods in the higher dimensionality data. Keywords-component: Hyperspectral images, Passive Sensing,Classification, Data mining.

Then, we explain representation spaces and the various analysis methods of these images. Furthermore, the factors influencing this analysis are investigated and some applications, in this area, are presented. Finally, we explain the relationship between Hyperspectral images and Datamining and we outline the open issues related to this area. So we consider the case study: HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C. This study serves as map of route for integrating classification methods in the higher dimensionality data. Keywords-component: Hyperspectral images, Passive Sensing,Classification, Data mining.
abstract_zh: 遥感通过检测地球表面反射的能量来提供陆地的概要视图。高光谱图像 (HSI) 使用完美的传感器，可提取一百多张图像，比使用传统的多光谱数据提供更详细的信息。在本文中，我们旨在研究被动接收情况下的通信的这方面。首先，简要概述高光谱图像的采集过程和处理。然后，我们解释表示空间和这些图像的各种分析方法。此外，还研究了影响该分析的因素，并介绍了该领域的一些应用。最后，我们解释了高光谱图像和数据挖掘之间的关系，并概述了与该领域相关的未决问题。因此，我们考虑案例研究：HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C。这项研究作为在高维数据中集成分类方法的路线图。关键词组件：高光谱图像、被动传感、分类、数据挖掘。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了高光谱图像（HSI）的基本概念与实际挑战，重点研究了被动接收条件下的通信问题，并探讨了其与数据挖掘的关系。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像提供比传统多光谱数据更丰富的信息，但其高维数据处理和分类面临挑战，需系统梳理分析方法与应用方向。
AI.method: 通过案例研究（AVIRIS 92AV3C数据集），综述HSI的获取与处理流程、表示空间、分析方法，并探讨影响因素及数据挖掘关联。
AI.result: 总结了HSI分析的关键技术、应用案例及数据挖掘的结合点，明确了高维数据分类方法整合的路线图与现存问题。
AI.conclusion: HSI研究需进一步解决高维数据处理与分类难题，数据挖掘技术的融合为未来研究提供了重要方向。

authors_text: Efklidis Katsaros,Piotr K. Ostrowski,Krzysztof Włódarczak,Emilia Lewandowska,Jacek Ruminski,Damian Siupka-Mróz,Łukasz Lassmann,Anna Jezierska,Daniel Węsierski
title: Multi-task Video Enhancement for Dental Interventions
title_zh: 牙科干预的多任务视频增强
abstract: A microcamera firmly attached to a dental handpiece allows dentists to continuously monitor the progress of conservative dental procedures. Video enhancement in video-assisted dental interventions alleviates low-light, noise, blur, and camera handshakes that collectively degrade visual comfort. To this end, we introduce a novel deep network for multi-task video enhancement that enables macro-visualization of dental scenes. In particular, the proposed network jointly leverages video restoration and temporal alignment in a multi-scale manner for effective video enhancement. Our experiments on videos of natural teeth in phantom scenes demonstrate that the proposed network achieves state-of-the-art results in multiple tasks with near real-time processing. We release Vident-lab at https://doi.org/10.34808/1jby-ay90, the first dataset of dental videos with multi-task labels to facilitate further research in relevant video processing applications.
summary: A microcamera firmly attached to a dental handpiece allows dentists to continuously monitor the progress of conservative dental procedures. Video enhancement in video-assisted dental interventions alleviates low-light, noise, blur, and camera handshakes that collectively degrade visual comfort. To this end, we introduce a novel deep network for multi-task video enhancement that enables macro-visualization of dental scenes. In particular, the proposed network jointly leverages video restoration and temporal alignment in a multi-scale manner for effective video enhancement. Our experiments on videos of natural teeth in phantom scenes demonstrate that the proposed network achieves state-of-the-art results in multiple tasks with near real-time processing. We release Vident-lab at https://doi.org/10.34808/1jby-ay90, the first dataset of dental videos with multi-task labels to facilitate further research in relevant video processing applications.
abstract_zh: 牢固地固定在牙科手机上的微型摄像头使牙医能够持续监控保守牙科手术的进展。视频辅助牙科干预中的视频增强可以缓解低光、噪音、模糊和相机抖动等共同降低视觉舒适度的问题。为此，我们引入了一种用于多任务视频增强的新颖深度网络，可以实现牙科场景的宏观可视化。特别是，所提出的网络以多尺度方式联合利用视频恢复和时间对齐来实现有效的视频增强。我们对幻像场景中的天然牙齿视频进行的实验表明，所提出的网络在近乎实时处理的多个任务中取得了最先进的结果。我们在 https://doi.org/10.34808/1jby-ay90 发布了 Vident-lab，这是第一个具有多任务标签的牙科视频数据集，以促进相关视频处理应用的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务视频增强网络，用于改善牙科手术中微摄像头视频的低光、噪声、模糊和相机抖动问题。
AI.motivation: 牙科手术中微摄像头视频常因光照不足、噪声、模糊和相机抖动导致视觉舒适度下降，影响手术效果。
AI.method: 设计多尺度联合视频修复与时间对齐的深度网络，通过多任务学习实现视频增强。
AI.result: 在仿真实验中达到多项任务的最先进效果，支持近实时处理，并发布首个含多任务标签的牙科视频数据集Vident-lab。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升牙科干预视频质量，为相关视频处理研究提供数据支持与技术参考。
