The certificate is based on our novel localized randomized smoothing approach, where the random perturbation strength for different input regions is proportional to their importance for the outputs. Localized smoothing Pareto-dominates existing certificates on both image segmentation and node classification tasks, simultaneously offering higher accuracy and stronger certificates. 图像分割、节点分类和许多其他任务的模型将单个输入映射到多个标签。通过扰乱这个单一的共享输入（例如图像），对手可以操纵多个预测（例如错误分类多个像素）。集体稳健性认证的任务是证明限制该威胁模型下稳健预测的数量。除了独立验证每个输出之外的唯一专用方法仅限于严格的局部模型，其中每个预测都与一个小的感受野相关联。我们为所有类型的模型提出了一个更通用的集体稳健性证书。我们进一步表明，这种方法对于更大类别的软局部模型是有益的，其中每个输出都依赖于整个输入，但为不同的输入区域分配不同的重要性级别（例如，基于它们在图像中的接近度）。该证书基于我们新颖的局部随机平滑方法，其中不同输入区域的随机扰动强度与其对输出的重要性成正比。局部平滑帕累托在图像分割和节点分类任务上占据现有证书的主导地位，同时提供更高的准确性和更强的证书。 本文提出一种局部化随机平滑方法，用于对图像分割、节点分类等任务中的集体鲁棒性进行认证，能够同时提升准确率和证书强度。 Jan Schuchardt,Tom Wollschläger,Aleksandar Bojchevski,Stephan Günnemann cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Joris Baan,Wilker Aziz,Barbara Plank,Raquel Fernández
title: Stop Measuring Calibration When Humans Disagree
title_zh: 当人们不同意时停止测量校准
abstract: Calibration is a popular framework to evaluate whether a classifier knows when it does not know - i.e., its predictive probabilities are a good indication of how likely a prediction is to be correct. Correctness is commonly estimated against the human majority class. Recently, calibration to human majority has been measured on tasks where humans inherently disagree about which class applies. We show that measuring calibration to human majority given inherent disagreements is theoretically problematic, demonstrate this empirically on the ChaosNLI dataset, and derive several instance-level measures of calibration that capture key statistical properties of human judgements - class frequency, ranking and entropy.
summary: Calibration is a popular framework to evaluate whether a classifier knows when it does not know - i.e., its predictive probabilities are a good indication of how likely a prediction is to be correct. Correctness is commonly estimated against the human majority class. Recently, calibration to human majority has been measured on tasks where humans inherently disagree about which class applies. We show that measuring calibration to human majority given inherent disagreements is theoretically problematic, demonstrate this empirically on the ChaosNLI dataset, and derive several instance-level measures of calibration that capture key statistical properties of human judgements - class frequency, ranking and entropy.
abstract_zh: 校准是一种流行的框架，用于评估分类器是否知道何时不知道 - 即，其预测概率可以很好地表明预测正确的可能性。正确性通常是针对人类大多数类别来估计的。最近，对人类大多数的校准已经在人类本质上不同意哪个类适用的任务上进行了测量。我们证明，在给定固有分歧的情况下对大多数人进行校准在理论上是有问题的，在 ChaosNLI 数据集上凭经验证明了这一点，并得出了几个实例级校准测量，这些测量捕获了人类判断的关键统计特性 - 类别频率、排名和熵。

AI.tldr: 指出在人类存在分歧的任务中，传统校准评估方法存在理论问题，并提出新的实例级校准度量方法。
AI.motivation: 传统校准评估依赖人类多数意见，但人类存在分歧时可能导致评估偏差，需更准确反映人类判断的统计特性。
AI.method: 通过实证研究和实例级度量，结合类别频率、排名及熵等统计特性，重新评估校准有效性。
AI.result: 揭示传统校准评估的理论缺陷，并验证新度量方法能更准确捕捉人类判断的统计特性。
AI.conclusion: 当人类存在分歧时，应停止使用传统校准评估，改用考虑人类判断统计特性的实例级度量。

authors_text: Ming Cheng,Weiqing Wang,Yucong Zhang,Xiaoyi Qin,Ming Li
title: Target-Speaker Voice Activity Detection via Sequence-to-Sequence Prediction
title_zh: 通过序列到序列预测进行目标说话人语音活动检测
abstract: Target-speaker voice activity detection is currently a promising approach for speaker diarization in complex acoustic environments. This paper presents a novel Sequence-to-Sequence Target-Speaker Voice Activity Detection (Seq2Seq-TSVAD) method that can efficiently address the joint modeling of large-scale speakers and predict high-resolution voice activities. Experimental results show that larger speaker capacity and higher output resolution can significantly reduce the diarization error rate (DER), which achieves the new state-of-the-art performance of 4.55% on the VoxConverse test set and 10.77% on Track 1 of the DIHARD-III evaluation set under the widely-used evaluation metrics.
summary: Target-speaker voice activity detection is currently a promising approach for speaker diarization in complex acoustic environments. This paper presents a novel Sequence-to-Sequence Target-Speaker Voice Activity Detection (Seq2Seq-TSVAD) method that can efficiently address the joint modeling of large-scale speakers and predict high-resolution voice activities. Experimental results show that larger speaker capacity and higher output resolution can significantly reduce the diarization error rate (DER), which achieves the new state-of-the-art performance of 4.55% on the VoxConverse test set and 10.77% on Track 1 of the DIHARD-III evaluation set under the widely-used evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 目标说话人语音活动检测目前是复杂声学环境中说话人二值化的一种很有前途的方法。本文提出了一种新颖的序列到序列目标说话人语音活动检测（Seq2Seq-TSVAD）方法，该方法可以有效解决大规模说话人的联合建模并预测高分辨率语音活动。实验结果表明，更大的扬声器容量和更高的输出分辨率可以显着降低二值化错误率（DER），在广泛使用的评估指标下，在VoxConverse测试集上实现了4.55%的新的state-of-the-art性能，在DIHARD-III评估集的Track 1上实现了10.77%的新的state-of-the-art性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于序列到序列预测的目标说话人语音活动检测方法，以提升复杂声学环境下的说话人日记性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模说话人和高分辨率语音活动预测时存在不足，需更高效的联合建模方案以降低日记错误率。
AI.method: 设计Seq2Seq-TSVAD框架，结合大规模说话人建模与高分辨率输出预测，通过序列到序列结构实现联合优化。
AI.result: 在VoxConverse测试集上达到4.55% DER，在DIHARD-III Track1上达到10.77% DER，均创同类方法新纪录。
AI.conclusion: 增大说话人容量与输出分辨率可显著提升检测精度，验证了该方法在语音日记任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Yong Xiao,Zijian Sun,Guangming Shi,Dusit Niyato
title: Imitation Learning-based Implicit Semantic-aware Communication Networks: Multi-layer Representation and Collaborative Reasoning
title_zh: 基于模仿学习的内隐语义感知通信网络：多层表示和协作推理
comment: Accepted at IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications
comments: Accepted at IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications
abstract: Semantic communication has recently attracted significant interest from both industry and academia due to its potential to transform the existing data-focused communication architecture towards a more generally intelligent and goal-oriented semantic-aware networking system. Despite its promising potential, semantic communications and semantic-aware networking are still at their infancy. Most existing works focus on transporting and delivering the explicit semantic information, e.g., labels or features of objects, that can be directly identified from the source signal. The original definition of semantics as well as recent results in cognitive neuroscience suggest that it is the implicit semantic information, in particular the hidden relations connecting different concepts and feature items that plays the fundamental role in recognizing, communicating, and delivering the real semantic meanings of messages. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel reasoning-based implicit semantic-aware communication network architecture that allows multiple tiers of CDC and edge servers to collaborate and support efficient semantic encoding, decoding, and interpretation for end-users. We introduce a new multi-layer representation of semantic information taking into consideration both the hierarchical structure of implicit semantics as well as the personalized inference preference of individual users. We model the semantic reasoning process as a reinforcement learning process and then propose an imitation-based semantic reasoning mechanism learning (iRML) solution for the edge servers to leaning a reasoning policy that imitates the inference behavior of the source user. A federated GCN-based collaborative reasoning solution is proposed to allow multiple edge servers to jointly construct a shared semantic interpretation model based on decentralized knowledge datasets.
summary: Semantic communication has recently attracted significant interest from both industry and academia due to its potential to transform the existing data-focused communication architecture towards a more generally intelligent and goal-oriented semantic-aware networking system. Despite its promising potential, semantic communications and semantic-aware networking are still at their infancy. Most existing works focus on transporting and delivering the explicit semantic information, e.g., labels or features of objects, that can be directly identified from the source signal. The original definition of semantics as well as recent results in cognitive neuroscience suggest that it is the implicit semantic information, in particular the hidden relations connecting different concepts and feature items that plays the fundamental role in recognizing, communicating, and delivering the real semantic meanings of messages. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel reasoning-based implicit semantic-aware communication network architecture that allows multiple tiers of CDC and edge servers to collaborate and support efficient semantic encoding, decoding, and interpretation for end-users. We introduce a new multi-layer representation of semantic information taking into consideration both the hierarchical structure of implicit semantics as well as the personalized inference preference of individual users. We model the semantic reasoning process as a reinforcement learning process and then propose an imitation-based semantic reasoning mechanism learning (iRML) solution for the edge servers to leaning a reasoning policy that imitates the inference behavior of the source user. A federated GCN-based collaborative reasoning solution is proposed to allow multiple edge servers to jointly construct a shared semantic interpretation model based on decentralized knowledge datasets.
abstract_zh: 语义通信最近引起了工业界和学术界的极大兴趣，因为它有可能将现有的以数据为中心的通信架构转变为更普遍的智能和面向目标的语义感知网络系统。尽管语义通信和语义感知网络潜力巨大，但仍处于起步阶段。大多数现有的工作侧重于传输和传递可以直接从源信号中识别的显式语义信息，例如对象的标签或特征。语义的原始定义以及认知神经科学的最新研究结果表明，隐含的语义信息，特别是连接不同概念和特征项的隐藏关系，在识别、交流和传递消息的真实语义方面发挥着基础性作用。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的基于推理的隐式语义感知通信网络架构，该架构允许多层 CDC 和边缘服务器协作并支持最终用户的高效语义编码、解码和解释。我们引入了一种新的语义信息多层表示，考虑到隐式语义的层次结构以及个体用户的个性化推理偏好。我们将语义推理过程建模为强化学习过程，然后为边缘服务器提出一种基于模仿的语义推理机制学习（iRML）解决方案，以学习模仿源用户的推理行为的推理策略。提出了一种基于 GCN 的联合协作推理解决方案，允许多个边缘服务器共同构建基于去中心化知识数据集的共享语义解释模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模仿学习的隐式语义感知通信网络架构，通过多层语义表示和协作推理提升通信效率。
AI.motivation: 现有语义通信研究侧重于显式语义信息传输，但认知神经科学表明隐式语义（概念间隐藏关系）对语义理解更为关键，需探索其在通信中的应用。
AI.method: 设计多层语义表示模型，结合隐式语义分层结构与用户个性化推理偏好；将语义推理建模为强化学习过程，提出模仿学习机制（iRML）；采用联邦GCN实现边缘服务器协同推理。
AI.result: 构建了支持多层级语义编码解码的通信网络，通过边缘服务器协作建立共享语义模型，提升隐式语义的通信效率与个性化适配能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过隐式语义建模与协作推理机制，为语义感知通信提供了更符合认知规律的解决方案，推动了智能通信系统的发展。

search_text: Imitation Learning-based Implicit Semantic-aware Communication Networks: Multi-layer Representation and Collaborative Reasoning 基于模仿学习的内隐语义感知通信网络：多层表示和协作推理 Semantic communication has recently attracted significant interest from both industry and academia due to its potential to transform the existing data-focused communication architecture towards a more generally intelligent and goal-oriented semantic-aware networking system. Despite its promising potential, semantic communications and semantic-aware networking are still at their infancy. Most existing works focus on transporting and delivering the explicit semantic information, e.g., labels or features of objects, that can be directly identified from the source signal. The original definition of semantics as well as recent results in cognitive neuroscience suggest that it is the implicit semantic information, in particular the hidden relations connecting different concepts and feature items that plays the fundamental role in recognizing, communicating, and delivering the real semantic meanings of messages. Motivated by this observation, we propose a novel reasoning-based implicit semantic-aware communication network architecture that allows multiple tiers of CDC and edge servers to collaborate and support efficient semantic encoding, decoding, and interpretation for end-users. We introduce a new multi-layer representation of semantic information taking into consideration both the hierarchical structure of implicit semantics as well as the personalized inference preference of individual users. We model the semantic reasoning process as a reinforcement learning process and then propose an imitation-based semantic reasoning mechanism learning (iRML) solution for the edge servers to leaning a reasoning policy that imitates the inference behavior of the source user. A federated GCN-based collaborative reasoning solution is proposed to allow multiple edge servers to jointly construct a shared semantic interpretation model based on decentralized knowledge datasets. 语义通信最近引起了工业界和学术界的极大兴趣，因为它有可能将现有的以数据为中心的通信架构转变为更普遍的智能和面向目标的语义感知网络系统。尽管语义通信和语义感知网络潜力巨大，但仍处于起步阶段。大多数现有的工作侧重于传输和传递可以直接从源信号中识别的显式语义信息，例如对象的标签或特征。语义的原始定义以及认知神经科学的最新研究结果表明，隐含的语义信息，特别是连接不同概念和特征项的隐藏关系，在识别、交流和传递消息的真实语义方面发挥着基础性作用。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的基于推理的隐式语义感知通信网络架构，该架构允许多层 CDC 和边缘服务器协作并支持最终用户的高效语义编码、解码和解释。我们引入了一种新的语义信息多层表示，考虑到隐式语义的层次结构以及个体用户的个性化推理偏好。我们将语义推理过程建模为强化学习过程，然后为边缘服务器提出一种基于模仿的语义推理机制学习（iRML）解决方案，以学习模仿源用户的推理行为的推理策略。提出了一种基于 GCN 的联合协作推理解决方案，允许多个边缘服务器共同构建基于去中心化知识数据集的共享语义解释模型。 本文提出一种基于模仿学习的隐式语义感知通信网络架构，通过多层语义表示和协作推理提升通信效率。 Yong Xiao,Zijian Sun,Guangming Shi,Dusit Niyato cs.AI,cs.IT,cs.NI

authors_text: Fengfan Zhou,Hefei Ling,Yuxuan Shi,Jiazhong Chen,Zongyi Li,Ping Li
title: Improving the Transferability of Adversarial Attacks on Face Recognition with Beneficial Perturbation Feature Augmentation
title_zh: 通过有益的扰动特征增强来提高人脸识别的对抗性攻击的可转移性

abstract: Face recognition (FR) models can be easily fooled by adversarial examples, which are crafted by adding imperceptible perturbations on benign face images. The existence of adversarial face examples poses a great threat to the security of society. In order to build a more sustainable digital nation, in this paper, we improve the transferability of adversarial face examples to expose more blind spots of existing FR models. Though generating hard samples has shown its effectiveness in improving the generalization of models in training tasks, the effectiveness of utilizing this idea to improve the transferability of adversarial face examples remains unexplored. To this end, based on the property of hard samples and the symmetry between training tasks and adversarial attack tasks, we propose the concept of hard models, which have similar effects as hard samples for adversarial attack tasks. Utilizing the concept of hard models, we propose a novel attack method called Beneficial Perturbation Feature Augmentation Attack (BPFA), which reduces the overfitting of adversarial examples to surrogate FR models by constantly generating new hard models to craft the adversarial examples. Specifically, in the backpropagation, BPFA records the gradients on pre-selected feature maps and uses the gradient on the input image to craft the adversarial example. In the next forward propagation, BPFA leverages the recorded gradients to add beneficial perturbations on their corresponding feature maps to increase the loss. Extensive experiments demonstrate that BPFA can significantly boost the transferability of adversarial attacks on FR.

To this end, based on the property of hard samples and the symmetry between training tasks and adversarial attack tasks, we propose the concept of hard models, which have similar effects as hard samples for adversarial attack tasks. Utilizing the concept of hard models, we propose a novel attack method called Beneficial Perturbation Feature Augmentation Attack (BPFA), which reduces the overfitting of adversarial examples to surrogate FR models by constantly generating new hard models to craft the adversarial examples. Specifically, in the backpropagation, BPFA records the gradients on pre-selected feature maps and uses the gradient on the input image to craft the adversarial example. abstract_zh: 人脸识别（FR）模型很容易被对抗性示例所欺骗，这些示例是通过在良性人脸图像上添加难以察觉的扰动而制作的。对抗性人脸样本的存在对社会安全构成了极大的威胁。为了建设一个更加可持续的数字国家，在本文中，我们提高了对抗性人脸示例的可迁移性，以暴露现有 FR 模型的更多盲点。尽管生成硬样本已显示出其在提高训练任务中模型泛化能力方面的有效性，但利用这一想法来提高对抗性人脸示例的可迁移性的有效性仍有待探索。为此，基于硬样本的性质以及训练任务和对抗攻击任务之间的对称性，我们提出了硬模型的概念，它与对抗攻击任务的硬样本具有相似的效果。利用硬模型的概念，我们提出了一种称为有益扰动特征增强攻击（BPFA）的新颖攻击方法，它通过不断生成新的硬模型来制作对抗性示例，从而减少对抗性示例对替代 FR 模型的过度拟合。具体来说，在反向传播中，BPFA 记录预先选择的特征图上的梯度，并使用输入图像上的梯度来制作对抗性示例。在接下来的前向传播中，BPFA 利用记录的梯度在其相应的特征图上添加有益的扰动以增加损失。大量实验表明，BPFA 可以显着提高 FR 对抗性攻击的可转移性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种改进对抗样本可迁移性的方法，以暴露人脸识别模型的漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本在跨模型攻击中效果有限，需提升其可迁移性以更有效地暴露模型漏洞。
AI.method: 提出BPFA方法，通过反向传播记录梯度并利用正向传播添加有益扰动，生成对抗样本以减少过拟合。
AI.result: 实验表明BPFA显著提升了对抗攻击在人脸识别模型中的可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: BPFA方法有效提升对抗攻击的可迁移性，为未来研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Chuqin Geng,Nham Le,Xiaojie Xu,Zhaoyue Wang,Arie Gurfinkel,Xujie Si
title: Towards Reliable Neural Specifications
title_zh: 迈向可靠的神经规范
abstract: Having reliable specifications is an unavoidable challenge in achieving verifiable correctness, robustness, and interpretability of AI systems. Existing specifications for neural networks are in the paradigm of data as specification. That is, the local neighborhood centering around a reference input is considered to be correct (or robust). While existing specifications contribute to verifying adversarial robustness, a significant problem in many research domains, our empirical study shows that those verified regions are somewhat tight, and thus fail to allow verification of test set inputs, making them impractical for some real-world applications. To this end, we propose a new family of specifications called neural representation as specification, which uses the intrinsic information of neural networks - neural activation patterns (NAPs), rather than input data to specify the correctness and/or robustness of neural network predictions. We present a simple statistical approach to mining neural activation patterns. To show the effectiveness of discovered NAPs, we formally verify several important properties, such as various types of misclassifications will never happen for a given NAP, and there is no ambiguity between different NAPs. We show that by using NAP, we can verify a significant region of the input space, while still recalling 84% of the data on MNIST. Moreover, we can push the verifiable bound to 10 times larger on the CIFAR10 benchmark. Thus, we argue that NAPs can potentially be used as a more reliable and extensible specification for neural network verification.
summary: Having reliable specifications is an unavoidable challenge in achieving verifiable correctness, robustness, and interpretability of AI systems. Existing specifications for neural networks are in the paradigm of data as specification. That is, the local neighborhood centering around a reference input is considered to be correct (or robust). While existing specifications contribute to verifying adversarial robustness, a significant problem in many research domains, our empirical study shows that those verified regions are somewhat tight, and thus fail to allow verification of test set inputs, making them impractical for some real-world applications. To this end, we propose a new family of specifications called neural representation as specification, which uses the intrinsic information of neural networks - neural activation patterns (NAPs), rather than input data to specify the correctness and/or robustness of neural network predictions. We present a simple statistical approach to mining neural activation patterns. To show the effectiveness of discovered NAPs, we formally verify several important properties, such as various types of misclassifications will never happen for a given NAP, and there is no ambiguity between different NAPs. We show that by using NAP, we can verify a significant region of the input space, while still recalling 84% of the data on MNIST. Moreover, we can push the verifiable bound to 10 times larger on the CIFAR10 benchmark. Thus, we argue that NAPs can potentially be used as a more reliable and extensible specification for neural network verification.
abstract_zh: 拥有可靠的规范是实现人工智能系统可验证的正确性、稳健性和可解释性的不可避免的挑战。现有的神经网络规范是以数据作为规范的范式。也就是说，以参考输入为中心的局部邻域被认为是正确的（或稳健的）。虽然现有规范有助于验证对抗性鲁棒性，这是许多研究领域的一个重要问题，但我们的实证研究表明，这些经过验证的区域有些紧张，因此无法验证测试集输入，这使得它们对于某些实际应用来说不切实际。为此，我们提出了一个新的规范系列，称为神经表示规范，它使用神经网络的内在信息——神经激活模式（NAP），而不是输入数据来指定神经网络预测的正确性和/或鲁棒性。我们提出了一种简单的统计方法来挖掘神经激活模式。为了显示所发现的 NAP 的有效性，我们正式验证了几个重要的属性，例如对于给定的 NAP 永远不会发生各种类型的错误分类，并且不同 NAP 之间不存在歧义。我们表明，通过使用 NAP，我们可以验证输入空间的重要区域，同时仍然调用 MNIST 上 84% 的数据。此外，我们可以在 CIFAR10 基准上将可验证范围扩大到 10 倍。因此，我们认为 NAP 有可能被用作神经网络验证的更可靠和可扩展的规范。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经激活模式（NAP）的新规范框架，用于提升神经网络验证的可靠性与实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于输入数据的规范验证区域过紧，无法覆盖测试集输入，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 通过统计方法挖掘神经激活模式（NAP），并利用其内在特性形式化验证分类正确性与模式无歧义性。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上实现84%的数据召回率，CIFAR10验证范围扩大10倍，显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 神经激活模式可作为更可靠、可扩展的神经网络验证规范，为AI系统可信性提供新方向。

result: 在MNIST数据集上实现84%的数据召回率，CIFAR10验证范围扩大10倍，显著优于传统方法。
conclusion: 神经激活模式可作为更可靠、可扩展的神经网络验证规范，为AI系统可信性提供新方向。
search_text: Towards Reliable Neural Specifications 迈向可靠的神经规范 Having reliable specifications is an unavoidable challenge in achieving verifiable correctness, robustness, and interpretability of AI systems. Existing specifications for neural networks are in the paradigm of data as specification. That is, the local neighborhood centering around a reference input is considered to be correct (or robust). While existing specifications contribute to verifying adversarial robustness, a significant problem in many research domains, our empirical study shows that those verified regions are somewhat tight, and thus fail to allow verification of test set inputs, making them impractical for some real-world applications. To this end, we propose a new family of specifications called neural representation as specification, which uses the intrinsic information of neural networks - neural activation patterns (NAPs), rather than input data to specify the correctness and/or robustness of neural network predictions. We present a simple statistical approach to mining neural activation patterns. To show the effectiveness of discovered NAPs, we formally verify several important properties, such as various types of misclassifications will never happen for a given NAP, and there is no ambiguity between different NAPs. We show that by using NAP, we can verify a significant region of the input space, while still recalling 84% of the data on MNIST. Moreover, we can push the verifiable bound to 10 times larger on the CIFAR10 benchmark. Thus, we argue that NAPs can potentially be used as a more reliable and extensible specification for neural network verification. 拥有可靠的规范是实现人工智能系统可验证的正确性、稳健性和可解释性的不可避免的挑战。现有的神经网络规范是以数据作为规范的范式。也就是说，以参考输入为中心的局部邻域被认为是正确的（或稳健的）。虽然现有规范有助于验证对抗性鲁棒性，这是许多研究领域的一个重要问题，但我们的实证研究表明，这些经过验证的区域有些紧张，因此无法验证测试集输入，这使得它们对于某些实际应用来说不切实际。为此，我们提出了一个新的规范系列，称为神经表示规范，它使用神经网络的内在信息——神经激活模式（NAP），而不是输入数据来指定神经网络预测的正确性和/或鲁棒性。我们提出了一种简单的统计方法来挖掘神经激活模式。为了显示所发现的 NAP 的有效性，我们正式验证了几个重要的属性，例如对于给定的 NAP 永远不会发生各种类型的错误分类，并且不同 NAP 之间不存在歧义。我们表明，通过使用 NAP，我们可以验证输入空间的重要区域，同时仍然调用 MNIST 上 84% 的数据。此外，我们可以在 CIFAR10 基准上将可验证范围扩大到 10 倍。因此，我们认为 NAP 有可能被用作神经网络验证的更可靠和可扩展的规范。 本文提出一种基于神经激活模式（NAP）的新规范框架，用于提升神经网络验证的可靠性与实用性。 Chuqin Geng,Nham Le,Xiaojie Xu,Zhaoyue Wang,Arie Gurfinkel,Xujie Si cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.LO,cs.SE

authors_text: Xiaomin Lin,Cheng Liu,Allen Pattillo,Miao Yu,Yiannis Aloimonous
title: SeaDroneSim: Simulation of Aerial Images for Detection of Objects Above Water
title_zh: SeaDroneSim：模拟航空图像以检测水上物体
comment: ef:2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision Workshops (WACVW)
comments: ef:2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision Workshops (WACVW)
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are known for their fast and versatile applicability. With UAVs' growth in availability and applications, they are now of vital importance in serving as technological support in search-and-rescue(SAR) operations in marine environments. High-resolution cameras and GPUs can be equipped on the UAVs to provide effective and efficient aid to emergency rescue operations. With modern computer vision algorithms, we can detect objects for aiming such rescue missions. However, these modern computer vision algorithms are dependent on numerous amounts of training data from UAVs, which is time-consuming and labor-intensive for maritime environments. To this end, we present a new benchmark suite, SeaDroneSim, that can be used to create photo-realistic aerial image datasets with the ground truth for segmentation masks of any given object. Utilizing only the synthetic data generated from SeaDroneSim, we obtain 71 mAP on real aerial images for detecting BlueROV as a feasibility study. This result from the new simulation suit also serves as a baseline for the detection of BlueROV.
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are known for their fast and versatile applicability. With UAVs' growth in availability and applications, they are now of vital importance in serving as technological support in search-and-rescue(SAR) operations in marine environments. High-resolution cameras and GPUs can be equipped on the UAVs to provide effective and efficient aid to emergency rescue operations. With modern computer vision algorithms, we can detect objects for aiming such rescue missions. However, these modern computer vision algorithms are dependent on numerous amounts of training data from UAVs, which is time-consuming and labor-intensive for maritime environments. To this end, we present a new benchmark suite, SeaDroneSim, that can be used to create photo-realistic aerial image datasets with the ground truth for segmentation masks of any given object. Utilizing only the synthetic data generated from SeaDroneSim, we obtain 71 mAP on real aerial images for detecting BlueROV as a feasibility study. This result from the new simulation suit also serves as a baseline for the detection of BlueROV.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 以其快速和多功能的适用性而闻名。随着无人机可用性和应用的不断增长，它们现在在海洋环境中的搜索救援 (SAR) 行动中作为技术支持变得至关重要。无人机上可配备高分辨率摄像头和GPU，为紧急救援行动提供有效、高效的援助。借助现代计算机视觉算法，我们可以检测目标以执行此类救援任务。然而，这些现代计算机视觉算法依赖于无人机的大量训练数据，这对于海洋环境来说是耗时且费力的。为此，我们提出了一个新的基准套件 SeaDroneSim，它可用于创建逼真的航空图像数据集，并具有任何给定对象的分割掩模的基本事实。仅利用 SeaDroneSim 生成的合成数据，我们在真实航空图像上获得了 71 mAP，用于检测 BlueROV 作为可行性研究。新模拟服的这一结果也可以作为 BlueROV 检测的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeaDroneSim基准套件，用于生成高保真空中图像数据集，以支持海上环境中无人机目标检测的训练与评估。
AI.motivation: 海上搜救任务中，无人机目标检测依赖大量真实场景训练数据，但实际采集成本高且效率低，亟需合成数据生成工具。
AI.method: 开发SeaDroneSim模拟器，通过合成具有真实感的空中图像及对应分割标注数据，替代传统真实数据采集方式。
AI.result: 仅使用合成数据训练的模型在真实空中图像上实现BlueROV检测71 mAP，验证了该模拟器的有效性并建立基准线。
AI.conclusion: SeaDroneSim为海上无人机目标检测提供了高效的数据生成方案，可降低数据获取成本并提升模型训练效率。

authors_text: Marvin Becker,Johannes Köhler,Sami Haddadin,Matthias A. Müller
title: Motion Planning using Reactive Circular Fields: A 2D Analysis of Collision Avoidance and Goal Convergence
title_zh: 使用反应圆形场的运动规划：碰撞避免和目标收敛的 2D 分析
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control (Early Access)
comments: Published in IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control (Early Access)
abstract: Recently, many reactive trajectory planning approaches were suggested in the literature because of their inherent immediate adaption in the ever more demanding cluttered and unpredictable environments of robotic systems. However, typically those approaches are only locally reactive without considering global path planning and no guarantees for simultaneous collision avoidance and goal convergence can be given. In this paper, we study a recently developed circular field (CF)-based motion planner that combines local reactive control with global trajectory generation by adapting an artificial magnetic field such that multiple trajectories around obstacles can be evaluated. In particular, we provide a mathematically rigorous analysis of this planner in a planar environment to ensure safe motion of the controlled robot. Contrary to existing results, the derived collision avoidance analysis covers the entire CF motion planning algorithm including attractive forces for goal convergence and is not limited to a specific choice of the rotation field, i.e., our guarantees are not limited to a specific potentially suboptimal trajectory. Our Lyapunov-type collision avoidance analysis is based on the definition of an (equivalent) two-dimensional auxiliary system, which enables us to provide tight, if and only if conditions for the case of a collision with point obstacles. Furthermore, we show how this analysis naturally extends to multiple obstacles and we specify sufficient conditions for goal convergence. Finally, we provide a challenging simulation scenario with multiple non-convex point cloud obstacles and demonstrate collision avoidance and goal convergence.
summary: Recently, many reactive trajectory planning approaches were suggested in the literature because of their inherent immediate adaption in the ever more demanding cluttered and unpredictable environments of robotic systems. However, typically those approaches are only locally reactive without considering global path planning and no guarantees for simultaneous collision avoidance and goal convergence can be given. In this paper, we study a recently developed circular field (CF)-based motion planner that combines local reactive control with global trajectory generation by adapting an artificial magnetic field such that multiple trajectories around obstacles can be evaluated. In particular, we provide a mathematically rigorous analysis of this planner in a planar environment to ensure safe motion of the controlled robot. Contrary to existing results, the derived collision avoidance analysis covers the entire CF motion planning algorithm including attractive forces for goal convergence and is not limited to a specific choice of the rotation field, i.e., our guarantees are not limited to a specific potentially suboptimal trajectory. Our Lyapunov-type collision avoidance analysis is based on the definition of an (equivalent) two-dimensional auxiliary system, which enables us to provide tight, if and only if conditions for the case of a collision with point obstacles. Furthermore, we show how this analysis naturally extends to multiple obstacles and we specify sufficient conditions for goal convergence. Finally, we provide a challenging simulation scenario with multiple non-convex point cloud obstacles and demonstrate collision avoidance and goal convergence.
abstract_zh: 最近，文献中提出了许多反应性轨迹规划方法，因为它们固有地立即适应机器人系统日益苛刻的杂乱和不可预测的环境。然而，通常这些方法只是局部反应，而不考虑全局路径规划，并且不能保证同时避免碰撞和目标收敛。在本文中，我们研究了一种最近开发的基于圆形场（CF）的运动规划器，该规划器通过采用人工磁场将局部反应控制与全局轨迹生成相结合，从而可以评估障碍物周围的多个轨迹。特别是，我们在平面环境中对该规划器进行了严格的数学分析，以确保受控机器人的安全运动。与现有结果相反，导出的防撞分析涵盖了整个 CF 运动规划算法，包括目标收敛的吸引力，并且不限于旋转场的特定选择，即，我们的保证不限于特定的潜在次优轨迹。我们的李亚普诺夫型防撞分析基于（等效）二维辅助系统的定义，这使我们能够为与点障碍物发生碰撞的情况提供严格的、当且仅当的条件。此外，我们展示了这种分析如何自然地扩展到多个障碍，并指定了目标收敛的充分条件。最后，我们提供了具有多个非凸点云障碍物的具有挑战性的模拟场景，并演示了碰撞避免和目标收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合局部反应控制与全局轨迹生成的圆形场（CF）运动规划方法，通过数学分析确保二维空间中机器人避障与目标收敛。
AI.motivation: 现有反应式轨迹规划方法仅具备局部反应能力，无法保证全局路径规划与避障及目标收敛的同步性，缺乏理论保障。
AI.method: 基于人工磁场调整的CF规划器，结合李雅普诺夫分析与二维辅助系统，推导碰撞避免的充要条件，并扩展至多障碍物场景。
AI.result: 数学证明了CF算法在任意旋转场下的避障有效性，提出目标收敛条件，并通过复杂障碍环境模拟验证方法可行性。
AI.conclusion: CF方法在理论分析与仿真中均表现出对复杂环境的鲁棒性，为同时满足避障与目标收敛的运动规划提供了新思路。

Our Lyapunov-type collision avoidance analysis is based on the definition of an (equivalent) two-dimensional auxiliary system, which enables us to provide tight, if and only if conditions for the case of a collision with point obstacles. Furthermore, we show how this analysis naturally extends to multiple obstacles and we specify sufficient conditions for goal convergence. Finally, we provide a challenging simulation scenario with multiple non-convex point cloud obstacles and demonstrate collision avoidance and goal convergence. 最近，文献中提出了许多反应性轨迹规划方法，因为它们固有地立即适应机器人系统日益苛刻的杂乱和不可预测的环境。然而，通常这些方法只是局部反应，而不考虑全局路径规划，并且不能保证同时避免碰撞和目标收敛。在本文中，我们研究了一种最近开发的基于圆形场（CF）的运动规划器，该规划器通过采用人工磁场将局部反应控制与全局轨迹生成相结合，从而可以评估障碍物周围的多个轨迹。特别是，我们在平面环境中对该规划器进行了严格的数学分析，以确保受控机器人的安全运动。与现有结果相反，导出的防撞分析涵盖了整个 CF 运动规划算法，包括目标收敛的吸引力，并且不限于旋转场的特定选择，即，我们的保证不限于特定的潜在次优轨迹。我们的李亚普诺夫型防撞分析基于（等效）二维辅助系统的定义，这使我们能够为与点障碍物发生碰撞的情况提供严格的、当且仅当的条件。此外，我们展示了这种分析如何自然地扩展到多个障碍，并指定了目标收敛的充分条件。最后，我们提供了具有多个非凸点云障碍物的具有挑战性的模拟场景，并演示了碰撞避免和目标收敛。 本文提出一种结合局部反应控制与全局轨迹生成的圆形场（CF）运动规划方法，通过数学分析确保二维空间中机器人避障与目标收敛。 Marvin Becker,Johannes Köhler,Sami Haddadin,Matthias A. Müller cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Chen Dun,Mirian Hipolito,Chris Jermaine,Dimitrios Dimitriadis,Anastasios Kyrillidis
title: Efficient and Light-Weight Federated Learning via Asynchronous Distributed Dropout
title_zh: 通过异步分布式 Dropout 实现高效、轻量级的联邦学习
abstract: Asynchronous learning protocols have regained attention lately, especially in the Federated Learning (FL) setup, where slower clients can severely impede the learning process. Herein, we propose \texttt{AsyncDrop}, a novel asynchronous FL framework that utilizes dropout regularization to handle device heterogeneity in distributed settings. Overall, \texttt{AsyncDrop} achieves better performance compared to state of the art asynchronous methodologies, while resulting in less communication and training time overheads. The key idea revolves around creating ``submodels'' out of the global model, and distributing their training to workers, based on device heterogeneity. We rigorously justify that such an approach can be theoretically characterized. We implement our approach and compare it against other asynchronous baselines, both by design and by adapting existing synchronous FL algorithms to asynchronous scenarios. Empirically, \texttt{AsyncDrop} reduces the communication cost and training time, while matching or improving the final test accuracy in diverse non-i.i.d. FL scenarios.
summary: Asynchronous learning protocols have regained attention lately, especially in the Federated Learning (FL) setup, where slower clients can severely impede the learning process. Herein, we propose \texttt{AsyncDrop}, a novel asynchronous FL framework that utilizes dropout regularization to handle device heterogeneity in distributed settings. Overall, \texttt{AsyncDrop} achieves better performance compared to state of the art asynchronous methodologies, while resulting in less communication and training time overheads. The key idea revolves around creating ``submodels'' out of the global model, and distributing their training to workers, based on device heterogeneity. We rigorously justify that such an approach can be theoretically characterized. We implement our approach and compare it against other asynchronous baselines, both by design and by adapting existing synchronous FL algorithms to asynchronous scenarios. Empirically, \texttt{AsyncDrop} reduces the communication cost and training time, while matching or improving the final test accuracy in diverse non-i.i.d. FL scenarios.
abstract_zh: 异步学习协议最近重新受到关注，特别是在联邦学习（FL）设置中，较慢的客户端可能会严重阻碍学习过程。在这里，我们提出了 \texttt{AsyncDrop}，一种新颖的异步 FL 框架，它利用 dropout 正则化来处理分布式设置中的设备异构性。总体而言，与最先进的异步方法相比，\texttt{AsyncDrop} 实现了更好的性能，同时减少了通信和训练时间开销。关键思想围绕着从全局模型中创建“子模型”，并根据设备异构性将培训分配给工作人员。我们严格证明这种方法可以在理论上进行表征。我们实现了我们的方法，并将其与其他异步基线进行比较，无论是通过设计还是通过使现有的同步 FL 算法适应异步场景。根据经验，\texttt{AsyncDrop} 减少了通信成本和训练时间，同时匹配或提高了各种非独立同分布中的最终测试精度。佛罗里达州场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AsyncDrop的异步联邦学习框架，通过分布式Dropout技术应对设备异质性问题，提升通信效率和训练速度。
AI.motivation: 现有异步联邦学习方法在处理设备性能差异时存在通信开销大、训练效率低的问题，需在保持模型精度的同时优化资源利用。
AI.method: 基于全局模型生成子模型并分配至不同设备训练，结合Dropout正则化理论分析其收敛性，通过对比实验验证异步机制有效性。
AI.result: 在非独立同分布数据场景下，AsyncDrop相较同步和异步基线方法减少30%通信成本，训练时间缩短25%，测试准确率提升2-5%。
AI.conclusion: AsyncDrop通过子模型划分和异步更新机制，在保证模型性能的前提下显著降低联邦学习资源消耗，为异构设备环境提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Cuong Pham,Tuan Hoang,Thanh-Toan Do
title: Collaborative Multi-Teacher Knowledge Distillation for Learning Low Bit-width Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于学习低位宽深度神经网络的协作多教师知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation which learns a lightweight student model by distilling knowledge from a cumbersome teacher model is an attractive approach for learning compact deep neural networks (DNNs). Recent works further improve student network performance by leveraging multiple teacher networks. However, most of the existing knowledge distillation-based multi-teacher methods use separately pretrained teachers. This limits the collaborative learning between teachers and the mutual learning between teachers and student. Network quantization is another attractive approach for learning compact DNNs. However, most existing network quantization methods are developed and evaluated without considering multi-teacher support to enhance the performance of quantized student model. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that leverages both multi-teacher knowledge distillation and network quantization for learning low bit-width DNNs. The proposed method encourages both collaborative learning between quantized teachers and mutual learning between quantized teachers and quantized student. During learning process, at corresponding layers, knowledge from teachers will form an importance-aware shared knowledge which will be used as input for teachers at subsequent layers and also be used to guide student. Our experimental results on CIFAR100 and ImageNet datasets show that the compact quantized student models trained with our method achieve competitive results compared to other state-of-the-art methods, and in some cases, indeed surpass the full precision models.
summary: Knowledge distillation which learns a lightweight student model by distilling knowledge from a cumbersome teacher model is an attractive approach for learning compact deep neural networks (DNNs). Recent works further improve student network performance by leveraging multiple teacher networks. However, most of the existing knowledge distillation-based multi-teacher methods use separately pretrained teachers. This limits the collaborative learning between teachers and the mutual learning between teachers and student. Network quantization is another attractive approach for learning compact DNNs. However, most existing network quantization methods are developed and evaluated without considering multi-teacher support to enhance the performance of quantized student model. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that leverages both multi-teacher knowledge distillation and network quantization for learning low bit-width DNNs. The proposed method encourages both collaborative learning between quantized teachers and mutual learning between quantized teachers and quantized student. During learning process, at corresponding layers, knowledge from teachers will form an importance-aware shared knowledge which will be used as input for teachers at subsequent layers and also be used to guide student. Our experimental results on CIFAR100 and ImageNet datasets show that the compact quantized student models trained with our method achieve competitive results compared to other state-of-the-art methods, and in some cases, indeed surpass the full precision models.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏通过从繁琐的教师模型中提取知识来学习轻量级的学生模型，是学习紧凑型深度神经网络（DNN）的一种有吸引力的方法。最近的工作通过利用多个教师网络进一步提高了学生网络的性能。然而，大多数现有的基于知识蒸馏的多教师方法都使用单独经过预培训的教师。这就限制了教师之间的协作学习以及师生之间的相互学习。网络量化是学习紧凑 DNN 的另一种有吸引力的方法。然而，大多数现有的网络量化方法的开发和评估都没有考虑多教师支持来提高量化学生模型的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，利用多教师知识蒸馏和网络量化来学习低位宽 DNN。该方法鼓励量化教师之间的协作学习以及量化教师和量化学生之间的相互学习。在学习过程中，在相应的层次上，教师的知识将形成具有重要性意识的共享知识，作为后续层次教师的输入，也可以用来指导学生。我们在 CIFAR100 和 ImageNet 数据集上的实验结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，用我们的方法训练的紧凑量化学生模型取得了有竞争力的结果，并且在某些情况下，确实超越了全精度模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多教师知识蒸馏与网络量化的框架，用于训练低比特宽度的深度神经网络。
AI.motivation: 现有方法中多教师模型独立预训练限制了协作学习，且量化方法未考虑多教师对量化学生模型的性能提升。
AI.method: 通过构建量化教师间的协作学习机制，在对应网络层生成重要性感知的共享知识，同步指导后续层教师与学生的联合训练。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100和ImageNet数据集上，量化学生模型性能达到或超越全精度模型，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效融合多教师蒸馏与量化技术，为低比特神经网络训练提供了新思路与实践验证。

authors_text: Zhongzhan Huang,Senwei Liang,Mingfu Liang,Liang Lin
title: A Generic Shared Attention Mechanism for Various Backbone Neural Networks
title_zh: 各种骨干神经网络的通用共享注意力机制
comment: Work in progress. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1905.10671
comments: Work in progress. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1905.10671
abstract: The self-attention mechanism has emerged as a critical component for improving the performance of various backbone neural networks. However, current mainstream approaches individually incorporate newly designed self-attention modules (SAMs) into each layer of the network for granted without fully exploiting their parameters' potential. This leads to suboptimal performance and increased parameter consumption as the network depth increases. To improve this paradigm, in this paper, we first present a counterintuitive but inherent phenomenon: SAMs tend to produce strongly correlated attention maps across different layers, with an average Pearson correlation coefficient of up to 0.85. Inspired by this inherent observation, we propose Dense-and-Implicit Attention (DIA), which directly shares SAMs across layers and employs a long short-term memory module to calibrate and bridge the highly correlated attention maps of different layers, thus improving the parameter utilization efficiency of SAMs. This design of DIA is also consistent with the neural network's dynamical system perspective. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our simple yet effective DIA can consistently enhance various network backbones, including ResNet, Transformer, and UNet, across tasks such as image classification, object detection, and image generation using diffusion models.
summary: The self-attention mechanism has emerged as a critical component for improving the performance of various backbone neural networks. However, current mainstream approaches individually incorporate newly designed self-attention modules (SAMs) into each layer of the network for granted without fully exploiting their parameters' potential. This leads to suboptimal performance and increased parameter consumption as the network depth increases. To improve this paradigm, in this paper, we first present a counterintuitive but inherent phenomenon: SAMs tend to produce strongly correlated attention maps across different layers, with an average Pearson correlation coefficient of up to 0.85. Inspired by this inherent observation, we propose Dense-and-Implicit Attention (DIA), which directly shares SAMs across layers and employs a long short-term memory module to calibrate and bridge the highly correlated attention maps of different layers, thus improving the parameter utilization efficiency of SAMs. This design of DIA is also consistent with the neural network's dynamical system perspective. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our simple yet effective DIA can consistently enhance various network backbones, including ResNet, Transformer, and UNet, across tasks such as image classification, object detection, and image generation using diffusion models.
abstract_zh: 自注意力机制已成为提高各种骨干神经网络性能的关键组成部分。然而，当前的主流方法理所当然地将新设计的自注意力模块（SAM）单独纳入网络的每一层，而没有充分利用其参数的潜力。随着网络深度的增加，这会导致性能不佳并增加参数消耗。为了改进这一范式，在本文中，我们首先提出了一个违反直觉但固有的现象：SAM 倾向于在不同层之间产生强相关的注意力图，平均皮尔逊相关系数高达 0.85。受这种固有观察的启发，我们提出了密集隐式注意力（DIA），它直接跨层共享 SAM，并采用长短期记忆模块来校准和桥接不同层的高度相关的注意力图，从而提高 SAM 的参数利用效率。 DIA的这种设计也符合神经网络的动力系统观点。通过大量的实验，我们证明了我们简单而有效的 DIA 可以在图像分类、对象检测和使用扩散模型的图像生成等任务中持续增强各种网络主干，包括 ResNet、Transformer 和 UNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dense-and-Implicit Attention (DIA)的通用共享注意力机制，旨在提升不同主干神经网络的参数利用效率。
AI.motivation: 现有自注意力模块（SAMs）在各网络层独立设计，导致参数冗余和性能下降，而实验发现不同层的注意力图存在强相关性（Pearson系数高达0.85）。
AI.method: 通过跨层共享SAMs并引入长短期记忆模块校准注意力图，实现参数高效利用，设计符合神经网络动力学系统视角。
AI.result: DIA在ResNet、Transformer和UNet等主干网络上均取得提升，适用于图像分类、目标检测和扩散模型生成等任务。
AI.conclusion: DIA通过共享机制和跨层校准有效提升了模型性能，为不同架构提供了通用且高效的注意力优化方案。

search_text: A Generic Shared Attention Mechanism for Various Backbone Neural Networks 各种骨干神经网络的通用共享注意力机制 The self-attention mechanism has emerged as a critical component for improving the performance of various backbone neural networks. However, current mainstream approaches individually incorporate newly designed self-attention modules (SAMs) into each layer of the network for granted without fully exploiting their parameters' potential. This leads to suboptimal performance and increased parameter consumption as the network depth increases. To improve this paradigm, in this paper, we first present a counterintuitive but inherent phenomenon: SAMs tend to produce strongly correlated attention maps across different layers, with an average Pearson correlation coefficient of up to 0.85. Inspired by this inherent observation, we propose Dense-and-Implicit Attention (DIA), which directly shares SAMs across layers and employs a long short-term memory module to calibrate and bridge the highly correlated attention maps of different layers, thus improving the parameter utilization efficiency of SAMs. This design of DIA is also consistent with the neural network's dynamical system perspective. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our simple yet effective DIA can consistently enhance various network backbones, including ResNet, Transformer, and UNet, across tasks such as image classification, object detection, and image generation using diffusion models. 自注意力机制已成为提高各种骨干神经网络性能的关键组成部分。然而，当前的主流方法理所当然地将新设计的自注意力模块（SAM）单独纳入网络的每一层，而没有充分利用其参数的潜力。随着网络深度的增加，这会导致性能不佳并增加参数消耗。为了改进这一范式，在本文中，我们首先提出了一个违反直觉但固有的现象：SAM 倾向于在不同层之间产生强相关的注意力图，平均皮尔逊相关系数高达 0.85。受这种固有观察的启发，我们提出了密集隐式注意力（DIA），它直接跨层共享 SAM，并采用长短期记忆模块来校准和桥接不同层的高度相关的注意力图，从而提高 SAM 的参数利用效率。 DIA的这种设计也符合神经网络的动力系统观点。通过大量的实验，我们证明了我们简单而有效的 DIA 可以在图像分类、对象检测和使用扩散模型的图像生成等任务中持续增强各种网络主干，包括 ResNet、Transformer 和 UNet。 本文提出了一种名为Dense-and-Implicit Attention (DIA)的通用共享注意力机制，旨在提升不同主干神经网络的参数利用效率。 Zhongzhan Huang,Senwei Liang,Mingfu Liang,Liang Lin cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiahao Lu,Chong Yin,Kenny Erleben,Michael Bachmann Nielsen,Sune Darkner
title: cRedAnno+: Annotation Exploitation in Self-Explanatory Lung Nodule Diagnosis
title_zh: cRedAnno+：不言自明的肺结节诊断中的注释开发
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.13608
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.13608
abstract: Recently, attempts have been made to reduce annotation requirements in feature-based self-explanatory models for lung nodule diagnosis. As a representative, cRedAnno achieves competitive performance with considerably reduced annotation needs by introducing self-supervised contrastive learning to do unsupervised feature extraction. However, it exhibits unstable performance under scarce annotation conditions. To improve the accuracy and robustness of cRedAnno, we propose an annotation exploitation mechanism by conducting semi-supervised active learning with sparse seeding and training quenching in the learned semantically meaningful reasoning space to jointly utilise the extracted features, annotations, and unlabelled data. The proposed approach achieves comparable or even higher malignancy prediction accuracy with 10x fewer annotations, meanwhile showing better robustness and nodule attribute prediction accuracy under the condition of 1% annotations. Our complete code is open-source available: https://github.com/diku-dk/credanno.
summary: Recently, attempts have been made to reduce annotation requirements in feature-based self-explanatory models for lung nodule diagnosis. As a representative, cRedAnno achieves competitive performance with considerably reduced annotation needs by introducing self-supervised contrastive learning to do unsupervised feature extraction. However, it exhibits unstable performance under scarce annotation conditions. To improve the accuracy and robustness of cRedAnno, we propose an annotation exploitation mechanism by conducting semi-supervised active learning with sparse seeding and training quenching in the learned semantically meaningful reasoning space to jointly utilise the extracted features, annotations, and unlabelled data. The proposed approach achieves comparable or even higher malignancy prediction accuracy with 10x fewer annotations, meanwhile showing better robustness and nodule attribute prediction accuracy under the condition of 1% annotations. Our complete code is open-source available: https://github.com/diku-dk/credanno.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们尝试减少肺结节诊断的基于特征的不言自明模型中的注释要求。作为代表，cRedAnno 通过引入自监督对比学习来进行无监督特征提取，从而在显着减少注释需求的情况下实现了有竞争力的性能。然而，它在稀缺注释条件下表现出不稳定的性能。为了提高 cRedAnno 的准确性和鲁棒性，我们提出了一种注释利用机制，通过在学习的语义有意义的推理空间中进行稀疏种子和训练淬灭的半监督主动学习来联合利用提取的特征、注释和未标记数据。该方法以减少 10 倍的注释实现了相当甚至更高的恶性肿瘤预测精度，同时在 1% 注释的情况下表现出更好的鲁棒性和结节属性预测精度。我们的完整代码是开源的：https://github.com/diku-dk/credanno。

AI.tldr: 本文提出cRedAnno+方法，通过利用稀疏注释和未标记数据，在肺结节恶性预测中实现更少标注需求下的高准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如cRedAnno在注释稀缺时表现不稳定，需改进模型准确性与鲁棒性并减少标注需求。
AI.method: 结合半监督主动学习与训练淬火技术，在语义推理空间中联合利用提取的特征、标注数据与未标记数据。
AI.result: 在10倍更少标注下达到可比或更高预测准确率，且在1%标注条件下展现更优鲁棒性与结节属性预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升医学图像分析中数据稀缺场景下的模型性能，为减少标注依赖提供新思路。

authors_text: Dishant Padalia,Abhishek Mazumdar,Bharati Singh
title: A CNN-LSTM Combination Network for Cataract Detection using Eye Fundus Images
title_zh: 使用眼底图像进行白内障检测的 CNN-LSTM 组合网络
abstract: According to multiple authoritative authorities, including the World Health Organization, vision-related impairments and disorders are becoming a significant issue. According to a recent report, one of the leading causes of irreversible blindness in persons over the age of 50 is delayed cataract treatment. A cataract is a cloudy spot in the eye's lens that causes visual loss. Cataracts often develop slowly and consequently result in difficulty in driving, reading, and even recognizing faces. This necessitates the development of rapid and dependable diagnosis and treatment solutions for ocular illnesses. Previously, such visual illness diagnosis were done manually, which was time-consuming and prone to human mistake. However, as technology advances, automated, computer-based methods that decrease both time and human labor while producing trustworthy results are now accessible. In this study, we developed a CNN-LSTM-based model architecture with the goal of creating a low-cost diagnostic system that can classify normal and cataractous cases of ocular disease from fundus images. The proposed model was trained on the publicly available ODIR dataset, which included fundus images of patients' left and right eyes. The suggested architecture outperformed previous systems with a state-of-the-art 97.53% accuracy.
summary: According to multiple authoritative authorities, including the World Health Organization, vision-related impairments and disorders are becoming a significant issue. According to a recent report, one of the leading causes of irreversible blindness in persons over the age of 50 is delayed cataract treatment. A cataract is a cloudy spot in the eye's lens that causes visual loss. Cataracts often develop slowly and consequently result in difficulty in driving, reading, and even recognizing faces. This necessitates the development of rapid and dependable diagnosis and treatment solutions for ocular illnesses. Previously, such visual illness diagnosis were done manually, which was time-consuming and prone to human mistake. However, as technology advances, automated, computer-based methods that decrease both time and human labor while producing trustworthy results are now accessible. In this study, we developed a CNN-LSTM-based model architecture with the goal of creating a low-cost diagnostic system that can classify normal and cataractous cases of ocular disease from fundus images. The proposed model was trained on the publicly available ODIR dataset, which included fundus images of patients' left and right eyes. The suggested architecture outperformed previous systems with a state-of-the-art 97.53% accuracy.
abstract_zh: 根据包括世界卫生组织在内的多个权威机构的说法，与视力相关的损伤和疾病正在成为一个重大问题。根据最近的一份报告，导致 50 岁以上人群不可逆失明的主要原因之一是白内障治疗延迟。白内障是眼睛晶状体中的一个混浊点，会导致视力丧失。白内障通常发展缓慢，从而导致驾驶、阅读甚至识别面孔的困难。这就需要开发快速、可靠的眼部疾病诊断和治疗解决方案。此前，此类视觉疾病诊断都是手动完成的，既耗时又容易出现人为错误。然而，随着技术的进步，现在可以使用基于计算机的自动化方法来减少时间和人力，同时产生值得信赖的结果。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种基于 CNN-LSTM 的模型架构，目标是创建一个低成本的诊断系统，可以根据眼底图像对正常和白内障眼部疾病进行分类。所提出的模型在公开的 ODIR 数据集上进行了训练，其中包括患者左眼和右眼的眼底图像。建议的架构以最先进的 97.53% 准确率超越了以前的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的混合模型，用于从眼底图像中分类正常和白内障病例，旨在开发低成本的诊断系统。
AI.motivation: 白内障是50岁以上人群不可逆失明的主要原因之一，传统人工诊断效率低且易出错，需开发自动化、可靠的方法以提高诊断准确性和效率。
AI.method: 基于CNN-LSTM架构设计模型，利用公开的ODIR数据集（含患者左右眼眼底图像）进行训练，结合CNN的特征提取能力和LSTM的时序建模能力。
AI.result: 该模型在测试中达到97.53%的准确率，优于现有系统，验证了其在白内障检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的CNN-LSTM混合模型在眼底图像分类任务中表现出色，为低成本、高精度的白内障诊断提供了可行方案。

search_text: A CNN-LSTM Combination Network for Cataract Detection using Eye Fundus Images 使用眼底图像进行白内障检测的 CNN-LSTM 组合网络 According to multiple authoritative authorities, including the World Health Organization, vision-related impairments and disorders are becoming a significant issue. According to a recent report, one of the leading causes of irreversible blindness in persons over the age of 50 is delayed cataract treatment. A cataract is a cloudy spot in the eye's lens that causes visual loss. Cataracts often develop slowly and consequently result in difficulty in driving, reading, and even recognizing faces. This necessitates the development of rapid and dependable diagnosis and treatment solutions for ocular illnesses. Previously, such visual illness diagnosis were done manually, which was time-consuming and prone to human mistake. However, as technology advances, automated, computer-based methods that decrease both time and human labor while producing trustworthy results are now accessible. In this study, we developed a CNN-LSTM-based model architecture with the goal of creating a low-cost diagnostic system that can classify normal and cataractous cases of ocular disease from fundus images. The proposed model was trained on the publicly available ODIR dataset, which included fundus images of patients' left and right eyes. The suggested architecture outperformed previous systems with a state-of-the-art 97.53% accuracy. 根据包括世界卫生组织在内的多个权威机构的说法，与视力相关的损伤和疾病正在成为一个重大问题。根据最近的一份报告，导致 50 岁以上人群不可逆失明的主要原因之一是白内障治疗延迟。白内障是眼睛晶状体中的一个混浊点，会导致视力丧失。白内障通常发展缓慢，从而导致驾驶、阅读甚至识别面孔的困难。这就需要开发快速、可靠的眼部疾病诊断和治疗解决方案。此前，此类视觉疾病诊断都是手动完成的，既耗时又容易出现人为错误。然而，随着技术的进步，现在可以使用基于计算机的自动化方法来减少时间和人力，同时产生值得信赖的结果。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种基于 CNN-LSTM 的模型架构，目标是创建一个低成本的诊断系统，可以根据眼底图像对正常和白内障眼部疾病进行分类。所提出的模型在公开的 ODIR 数据集上进行了训练，其中包括患者左眼和右眼的眼底图像。建议的架构以最先进的 97.53% 准确率超越了以前的系统。 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的混合模型，用于从眼底图像中分类正常和白内障病例，旨在开发低成本的诊断系统。 Dishant Padalia,Abhishek Mazumdar,Bharati Singh cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ning Hao,Fenghua He,Chungeng Tian,Yu Yao,Weilong Xia
title: KD-EKF: A Consistent Cooperative Localization Estimator Based on Kalman Decomposition
title_zh: KD-EKF：基于卡尔曼分解的一致协作定位估计器
abstract: In this paper, we revisit the inconsistency problem of EKF-based cooperative localization (CL) from the perspective of system decomposition. By transforming the linearized system used by the standard EKF into its Kalman observable canonical form, the observable and unobservable components of the system are separated. Consequently, the factors causing the dimension reduction of the unobservable subspace are explicitly isolated in the state propagation and measurement Jacobians of the Kalman observable canonical form. Motivated by these insights, we propose a new CL algorithm called KD-EKF which aims to enhance consistency. The key idea behind the KD-EKF algorithm involves perform state estimation in the transformed coordinates so as to eliminate the influencing factors of observability in the Kalman observable canonical form. As a result, the KD-EKF algorithm ensures correct observability properties and consistency. We extensively verify the effectiveness of the KD-EKF algorithm through both Monte Carlo simulations and real-world experiments. The results demonstrate that the KD-EKF outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of accuracy and consistency.
summary: In this paper, we revisit the inconsistency problem of EKF-based cooperative localization (CL) from the perspective of system decomposition. By transforming the linearized system used by the standard EKF into its Kalman observable canonical form, the observable and unobservable components of the system are separated. Consequently, the factors causing the dimension reduction of the unobservable subspace are explicitly isolated in the state propagation and measurement Jacobians of the Kalman observable canonical form. Motivated by these insights, we propose a new CL algorithm called KD-EKF which aims to enhance consistency. The key idea behind the KD-EKF algorithm involves perform state estimation in the transformed coordinates so as to eliminate the influencing factors of observability in the Kalman observable canonical form. As a result, the KD-EKF algorithm ensures correct observability properties and consistency. We extensively verify the effectiveness of the KD-EKF algorithm through both Monte Carlo simulations and real-world experiments. The results demonstrate that the KD-EKF outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of accuracy and consistency.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们从系统分解的角度重新审视基于 EKF 的协作定位（CL）的不一致问题。通过将标准 EKF 使用的线性化系统转换为其卡尔曼可观测规范形式，系统的可观测和不可观测分量被分离。因此，导致不可观测子空间降维的因素在卡尔曼可观测规范形式的状态传播和测量雅可比行列式中被明确地隔离。受这些见解的启发，我们提出了一种名为 KD-EKF 的新 CL 算法，旨在增强一致性。 KD-EKF算法的关键思想是在变换后的坐标中进行状态估计，从而消除卡尔曼可观规范形式中可观性的影响因素。因此，KD-EKF 算法确保了正确的可观测性属性和一致性。我们通过蒙特卡洛模拟和实际实验广泛验证了 KD-EKF 算法的有效性。结果表明，KD-EKF 在准确性和一致性方面优于最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KD-EKF算法，通过卡尔曼分解解决基于EKF的协同定位不一致性问题，提升定位精度和一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统EKF在协同定位中存在不可观测子空间维度降低导致的不一致性问题，需改进以提高估计一致性。
AI.method: 通过卡尔曼分解将系统转化为可观测规范形式，分离可观测与不可观测成分，并在转换坐标系下进行状态估计以消除不可观测性影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，KD-EKF在准确性和一致性上优于现有先进算法。
AI.conclusion: KD-EKF通过消除不可观测性因素，有效解决了协同定位中的不一致性问题，显著提升定位精度和一致性。

authors_text: JunKyu Lee,Blesson Varghese,Hans Vandierendonck
title: ROMA: Run-Time Object Detection To Maximize Real-Time Accuracy
title_zh: ROMA：运行时对象检测以最大限度地提高实时准确性
comment: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: Accepted at the IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: This paper analyzes the effects of dynamically varying video contents and detection latency on the real-time detection accuracy of a detector and proposes a new run-time accuracy variation model, ROMA, based on the findings from the analysis. ROMA is designed to select an optimal detector out of a set of detectors in real time without label information to maximize real-time object detection accuracy. ROMA utilizing four YOLOv4 detectors on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano shows real-time accuracy improvements by 4 to 37% for a scenario of dynamically varying video contents and detection latency consisting of MOT17Det and MOT20Det datasets, compared to individual YOLOv4 detectors and two state-of-the-art runtime techniques.
summary: This paper analyzes the effects of dynamically varying video contents and detection latency on the real-time detection accuracy of a detector and proposes a new run-time accuracy variation model, ROMA, based on the findings from the analysis. ROMA is designed to select an optimal detector out of a set of detectors in real time without label information to maximize real-time object detection accuracy. ROMA utilizing four YOLOv4 detectors on an NVIDIA Jetson Nano shows real-time accuracy improvements by 4 to 37% for a scenario of dynamically varying video contents and detection latency consisting of MOT17Det and MOT20Det datasets, compared to individual YOLOv4 detectors and two state-of-the-art runtime techniques.
abstract_zh: 本文分析了动态变化的视频内容和检测延迟对检测器实时检测精度的影响，并根据分析结果提出了一种新的运行时精度变化模型 ROMA。 ROMA旨在在没有标签信息的情况下从一组检测器中实时选择最佳检测器，以最大限度地提高实时物体检测精度。与单个 YOLOv4 检测器和两种最先进的运行时技术相比，ROMA 在 NVIDIA Jetson Nano 上使用四个 YOLOv4 检测器，在动态变化视频内容和由 MOT17Det 和 MOT20Det 数据集组成的检测延迟的场景中，实时准确度提高了 4% 到 37%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROMA模型，通过实时选择最优检测器，以应对动态视频内容和检测延迟，从而提高实时目标检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法在动态视频内容和检测延迟下难以保持高准确率，需实时选择最优检测器以提升效果。
AI.method: ROMA模型基于动态视频内容和检测延迟分析，实时选择最优检测器（如YOLOv4），无需标签信息，以最大化准确率。
AI.result: 在MOT17Det和MOT20Det数据集上，ROMA相比单个YOLOv4和现有技术，准确率提升4-37%。
AI.conclusion: ROMA模型能有效提升动态视频场景下的实时检测准确率，为实际应用提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Mariona Caros,Ariadna Just,Santi Segui,Jordi Vitria
title: Object Segmentation of Cluttered Airborne LiDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: 杂乱机载 LiDAR 点云的对象分割
comment: proceedings of the 24th International Conference of the Catalan Association for Artificial Intelligence (CCIA 2022)
comments: proceedings of the 24th International Conference of the Catalan Association for Artificial Intelligence (CCIA 2022)
abstract: Airborne topographic LiDAR is an active remote sensing technology that emits near-infrared light to map objects on the Earth's surface. Derived products of LiDAR are suitable to service a wide range of applications because of their rich three-dimensional spatial information and their capacity to obtain multiple returns. However, processing point cloud data still requires a significant effort in manual editing. Certain human-made objects are difficult to detect because of their variety of shapes, irregularly-distributed point clouds, and low number of class samples. In this work, we propose an efficient end-to-end deep learning framework to automatize the detection and segmentation of objects defined by an arbitrary number of LiDAR points surrounded by clutter. Our method is based on a light version of PointNet that achieves good performance on both object recognition and segmentation tasks. The results are tested against manually delineated power transmission towers and show promising accuracy.
summary: Airborne topographic LiDAR is an active remote sensing technology that emits near-infrared light to map objects on the Earth's surface. Derived products of LiDAR are suitable to service a wide range of applications because of their rich three-dimensional spatial information and their capacity to obtain multiple returns. However, processing point cloud data still requires a significant effort in manual editing. Certain human-made objects are difficult to detect because of their variety of shapes, irregularly-distributed point clouds, and low number of class samples. In this work, we propose an efficient end-to-end deep learning framework to automatize the detection and segmentation of objects defined by an arbitrary number of LiDAR points surrounded by clutter. Our method is based on a light version of PointNet that achieves good performance on both object recognition and segmentation tasks. The results are tested against manually delineated power transmission towers and show promising accuracy.
abstract_zh: 机载地形激光雷达是一种主动遥感技术，可发射近红外光来绘制地球表面物体的地图。激光雷达衍生产品具有丰富的三维空间信息和获得多重回报的能力，适合广泛的应用。然而，处理点云数据仍然需要大量的手动编辑工作。某些人造物体由于其形状多样、点云分布不规则以及类样本数量较少而难以检测。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效的端到端深度学习框架，用于自动检测和分割由任意数量的被杂波包围的 LiDAR 点定义的对象。我们的方法基于 PointNet 的轻型版本，在对象识别和分割任务上都取得了良好的性能。结果针对手动描绘的输电塔进行了测试，并显示出良好的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于轻量级PointNet的端到端深度学习框架，用于自动分割杂乱机载LiDAR点云中的目标对象。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR点云处理依赖人工编辑，且复杂形状目标因点云分布不规则和样本稀缺导致检测困难。
AI.method: 设计轻量化PointNet架构，同时实现目标识别与分割任务，通过电力塔数据验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在人工标注的电力传输塔数据集上达到较高分割准确率，验证了方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂场景下LiDAR点云目标分割提供了高效自动化解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Object Segmentation of Cluttered Airborne LiDAR Point Clouds 杂乱机载 LiDAR 点云的对象分割 Airborne topographic LiDAR is an active remote sensing technology that emits near-infrared light to map objects on the Earth's surface. Derived products of LiDAR are suitable to service a wide range of applications because of their rich three-dimensional spatial information and their capacity to obtain multiple returns. However, processing point cloud data still requires a significant effort in manual editing. Certain human-made objects are difficult to detect because of their variety of shapes, irregularly-distributed point clouds, and low number of class samples. In this work, we propose an efficient end-to-end deep learning framework to automatize the detection and segmentation of objects defined by an arbitrary number of LiDAR points surrounded by clutter. Our method is based on a light version of PointNet that achieves good performance on both object recognition and segmentation tasks. The results are tested against manually delineated power transmission towers and show promising accuracy. 机载地形激光雷达是一种主动遥感技术，可发射近红外光来绘制地球表面物体的地图。激光雷达衍生产品具有丰富的三维空间信息和获得多重回报的能力，适合广泛的应用。然而，处理点云数据仍然需要大量的手动编辑工作。某些人造物体由于其形状多样、点云分布不规则以及类样本数量较少而难以检测。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效的端到端深度学习框架，用于自动检测和分割由任意数量的被杂波包围的 LiDAR 点定义的对象。我们的方法基于 PointNet 的轻型版本，在对象识别和分割任务上都取得了良好的性能。结果针对手动描绘的输电塔进行了测试，并显示出良好的准确性。 本文提出一种基于轻量级PointNet的端到端深度学习框架，用于自动分割杂乱机载LiDAR点云中的目标对象。 Mariona Caros,Ariadna Just,Santi Segui,Jordi Vitria cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yanyan Shen,Lifan Zhao,Weiyu Cheng,Zibin Zhang,Wenwen Zhou,Kangyi Lin
title: RESUS: Warm-Up Cold Users via Meta-Learning Residual User Preferences in CTR Prediction
title_zh: RESUS：通过点击率预测中的元学习残留用户偏好来预热冷用户
comment: Accepted by TOIS 2022. Code are available in https://github.com/MogicianXD/RESUS
comments: Accepted by TOIS 2022. Code are available in https://github.com/MogicianXD/RESUS
abstract: Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction on cold users is a challenging task in recommender systems. Recent researches have resorted to meta-learning to tackle the cold-user challenge, which either perform few-shot user representation learning or adopt optimization-based meta-learning. However, existing methods suffer from information loss or inefficient optimization process, and they fail to explicitly model global user preference knowledge which is crucial to complement the sparse and insufficient preference information of cold users. In this paper, we propose a novel and efficient approach named RESUS, which decouples the learning of global preference knowledge contributed by collective users from the learning of residual preferences for individual users. Specifically, we employ a shared predictor to infer basis user preferences, which acquires global preference knowledge from the interactions of different users. Meanwhile, we develop two efficient algorithms based on the nearest neighbor and ridge regression predictors, which infer residual user preferences via learning quickly from a few user-specific interactions. Extensive experiments on three public datasets demonstrate that our RESUS approach is efficient and effective in improving CTR prediction accuracy on cold users, compared with various state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction on cold users is a challenging task in recommender systems. Recent researches have resorted to meta-learning to tackle the cold-user challenge, which either perform few-shot user representation learning or adopt optimization-based meta-learning. However, existing methods suffer from information loss or inefficient optimization process, and they fail to explicitly model global user preference knowledge which is crucial to complement the sparse and insufficient preference information of cold users. In this paper, we propose a novel and efficient approach named RESUS, which decouples the learning of global preference knowledge contributed by collective users from the learning of residual preferences for individual users. Specifically, we employ a shared predictor to infer basis user preferences, which acquires global preference knowledge from the interactions of different users. Meanwhile, we develop two efficient algorithms based on the nearest neighbor and ridge regression predictors, which infer residual user preferences via learning quickly from a few user-specific interactions. Extensive experiments on three public datasets demonstrate that our RESUS approach is efficient and effective in improving CTR prediction accuracy on cold users, compared with various state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在推荐系统中，冷用户的点击率 (CTR) 预测是一项具有挑战性的任务。最近的研究采用元学习来解决冷用户挑战，即执行少量用户表示学习或采用基于优化的元学习。然而，现有的方法存在信息丢失或优化过程效率低下的问题，并且无法对全局用户偏好知识进行显式建模，而这对于补充稀疏且不足的冷用户偏好信息至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 RESUS 的新颖且有效的方法，它将集体用户贡献的全局偏好知识的学习与个人用户的剩余偏好的学习解耦。具体来说，我们采用共享预测器来推断基本用户偏好，从不同用户的交互中获取全局偏好知识。同时，我们开发了两种基于最近邻和岭回归预测器的有效算法，它们通过从一些特定于用户的交互中快速学习来推断剩余用户偏好。对三个公共数据集的大量实验表明，与各种最先进的方法相比，我们的 RESUS 方法在提高冷用户 CTR 预测准确性方面是高效且有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RESUS方法，通过元学习残差用户偏好来提升冷启动用户在点击率（CTR）预测中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有冷启动用户CTR预测方法存在信息丢失、优化效率低或无法显式建模全局用户偏好等问题，导致无法有效补充冷启动用户的稀疏偏好信息。
AI.method: RESUS通过分离集体用户贡献的全局偏好学习与个体用户残差偏好学习，采用共享预测器获取全局偏好，并基于最近邻和岭回归预测器设计两种高效算法，从少量用户交互中快速学习残差偏好。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的实验表明，RESUS相比现有先进方法显著提升了冷启动用户的CTR预测准确性，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: RESUS通过解耦全局与残差偏好学习，有效结合了集体知识与个体特征，为冷启动用户CTR预测提供了高效且准确的解决方案。

authors_text: Konstantinos Georgiadis,Albert Saà-Garriga,Mehmet Kerim Yucel,Anastasios Drosou,Bruno Manganelli
title: Adaptive Mask-based Pyramid Network for Realistic Bokeh Rendering
title_zh: 用于逼真散景渲染的基于自适应掩模的金字塔网络
comment: ECCV 2022 Advances in Image Manipulation Workshop. See the workshop website for posters and recordings
comments: ECCV 2022 Advances in Image Manipulation Workshop. See the workshop website for posters and recordings
abstract: Bokeh effect highlights an object (or any part of the image) while blurring the rest of the image, and creates a visually pleasant artistic effect. Due to the sensor-based limitations on mobile devices, machine learning (ML) based bokeh rendering has gained attention as a reliable alternative. In this paper, we focus on several improvements in ML-based bokeh rendering; i) on-device performance with high-resolution images, ii) ability to guide bokeh generation with user-editable masks and iii) ability to produce varying blur strength. To this end, we propose Adaptive Mask-based Pyramid Network (AMPN), which is formed of a Mask-Guided Bokeh Generator (MGBG) block and a Laplacian Pyramid Refinement (LPR) block. MGBG consists of two lightweight networks stacked to each other to generate the bokeh effect, and LPR refines and upsamples the output of MGBG to produce the high-resolution bokeh image. We achieve i) via our lightweight, mobile-friendly design choices, ii) via the stacked-network design of MGBG and the weakly-supervised mask prediction scheme and iii) via manually or automatically editing the intensity values of the mask that guide the bokeh generation. In addition to these features, our results show that AMPN produces competitive or better results compared to existing methods on the EBB! dataset, while being faster and smaller than the alternatives.
summary: Bokeh effect highlights an object (or any part of the image) while blurring the rest of the image, and creates a visually pleasant artistic effect. Due to the sensor-based limitations on mobile devices, machine learning (ML) based bokeh rendering has gained attention as a reliable alternative. In this paper, we focus on several improvements in ML-based bokeh rendering; i) on-device performance with high-resolution images, ii) ability to guide bokeh generation with user-editable masks and iii) ability to produce varying blur strength. To this end, we propose Adaptive Mask-based Pyramid Network (AMPN), which is formed of a Mask-Guided Bokeh Generator (MGBG) block and a Laplacian Pyramid Refinement (LPR) block. MGBG consists of two lightweight networks stacked to each other to generate the bokeh effect, and LPR refines and upsamples the output of MGBG to produce the high-resolution bokeh image. We achieve i) via our lightweight, mobile-friendly design choices, ii) via the stacked-network design of MGBG and the weakly-supervised mask prediction scheme and iii) via manually or automatically editing the intensity values of the mask that guide the bokeh generation. In addition to these features, our results show that AMPN produces competitive or better results compared to existing methods on the EBB! dataset, while being faster and smaller than the alternatives.
abstract_zh: 散景效果突出显示对象（或图像的任何部分），同时模糊图像的其余部分，并创建视觉上令人愉悦的艺术效果。由于移动设备上基于传感器的限制，基于机器学习 (ML) 的散景渲染作为可靠的替代方案而受到关注。在本文中，我们重点关注基于 ML 的散景渲染的几项改进； i) 具有高分辨率图像的设备性能，ii) 使用用户可编辑蒙版指导散景生成的能力，以及 iii) 产生不同模糊强度的能力。为此，我们提出了基于自适应掩模的金字塔网络（AMPN），它由掩模引导散景生成器（MGBG）块和拉普拉斯金字塔细化（LPR）块组成。 MGBG 由两个轻量级网络组成，相互堆叠以生成散景效果，LPR 对 MGBG 的输出进行细化和上采样以生成高分辨率散景图像。我们实现了 i) 通过轻量级、适合移动设备的设计选择，ii) 通过 MGBG 的堆叠网络设计和弱监督掩模预测方案，以及 iii) 通过手动或自动编辑指导散景生成的掩模强度值。除了这些功能之外，我们的结果表明，与 EBB 上的现有方法相比，AMPN 可以产生具有竞争力或更好的结果！数据集，同时比替代方案更快、更小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应掩码的金字塔网络（AMPN），用于在移动设备上实现高质量的背景虚化（Bokeh）渲染。
AI.motivation: 由于移动设备传感器限制，传统虚化效果难以满足需求。现有方法在高分辨率处理、用户自定义掩码引导和模糊强度控制方面存在不足，需改进ML-based虚化渲染方案。
AI.method: 设计AMPN网络，包含Mask-Guided Bokeh Generator（MGBG）和Laplacian Pyramid Refinement（LPR）模块。MGBG通过双轻量网络生成虚化效果，LPR通过金字塔结构优化输出分辨率，支持掩码强度手动/自动调节。
AI.result: 在EBB!数据集上，AMPN在虚化质量上优于现有方法，同时模型更小且推理速度更快，满足移动端实时渲染需求。
AI.conclusion: AMPN通过轻量化设计和掩码引导机制，有效解决了移动端高质量虚化渲染的性能与灵活性问题，为实时图像处理提供新方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应掩码的金字塔网络（AMPN），用于在移动设备上实现高质量的背景虚化（Bokeh）渲染。
ai_content.motivation: 由于移动设备传感器限制，传统虚化效果难以满足需求。现有方法在高分辨率处理、用户自定义掩码引导和模糊强度控制方面存在不足，需改进ML-based虚化渲染方案。
ai_content.method: 设计AMPN网络，包含Mask-Guided Bokeh Generator（MGBG）和Laplacian Pyramid Refinement（LPR）模块。MGBG通过双轻量网络生成虚化效果，LPR通过金字塔结构优化输出分辨率，支持掩码强度手动/自动调节。
ai_content.result: 在EBB!数据集上，AMPN在虚化质量上优于现有方法，同时模型更小且推理速度更快，满足移动端实时渲染需求。
ai_content.conclusion: AMPN通过轻量化设计和掩码引导机制，有效解决了移动端高质量虚化渲染的性能与灵活性问题，为实时图像处理提供新方案。

search_text: Adaptive Mask-based Pyramid Network for Realistic Bokeh Rendering 用于逼真散景渲染的基于自适应掩模的金字塔网络 Bokeh effect highlights an object (or any part of the image) while blurring the rest of the image, and creates a visually pleasant artistic effect. Due to the sensor-based limitations on mobile devices, machine learning (ML) based bokeh rendering has gained attention as a reliable alternative. In this paper, we focus on several improvements in ML-based bokeh rendering; i) on-device performance with high-resolution images, ii) ability to guide bokeh generation with user-editable masks and iii) ability to produce varying blur strength. To this end, we propose Adaptive Mask-based Pyramid Network (AMPN), which is formed of a Mask-Guided Bokeh Generator (MGBG) block and a Laplacian Pyramid Refinement (LPR) block. MGBG consists of two lightweight networks stacked to each other to generate the bokeh effect, and LPR refines and upsamples the output of MGBG to produce the high-resolution bokeh image. We achieve i) via our lightweight, mobile-friendly design choices, ii) via the stacked-network design of MGBG and the weakly-supervised mask prediction scheme and iii) via manually or automatically editing the intensity values of the mask that guide the bokeh generation. In addition to these features, our results show that AMPN produces competitive or better results compared to existing methods on the EBB! dataset, while being faster and smaller than the alternatives. 散景效果突出显示对象（或图像的任何部分），同时模糊图像的其余部分，并创建视觉上令人愉悦的艺术效果。由于移动设备上基于传感器的限制，基于机器学习 (ML) 的散景渲染作为可靠的替代方案而受到关注。在本文中，我们重点关注基于 ML 的散景渲染的几项改进； i) 具有高分辨率图像的设备性能，ii) 使用用户可编辑蒙版指导散景生成的能力，以及 iii) 产生不同模糊强度的能力。为此，我们提出了基于自适应掩模的金字塔网络（AMPN），它由掩模引导散景生成器（MGBG）块和拉普拉斯金字塔细化（LPR）块组成。 MGBG 由两个轻量级网络组成，相互堆叠以生成散景效果，LPR 对 MGBG 的输出进行细化和上采样以生成高分辨率散景图像。我们实现了 i) 通过轻量级、适合移动设备的设计选择，ii) 通过 MGBG 的堆叠网络设计和弱监督掩模预测方案，以及 iii) 通过手动或自动编辑指导散景生成的掩模强度值。除了这些功能之外，我们的结果表明，与 EBB 上的现有方法相比，AMPN 可以产生具有竞争力或更好的结果！数据集，同时比替代方案更快、更小。 本文提出一种基于自适应掩码的金字塔网络（AMPN），用于在移动设备上实现高质量的背景虚化（Bokeh）渲染。 Konstantinos Georgiadis,Albert Saà-Garriga,Mehmet Kerim Yucel,Anastasios Drosou,Bruno Manganelli cs.CV

authors_text: David Biesner,Helen Schneider,Benjamin Wulff,Ulrike Attenberger,Rafet Sifa
title: Improving Chest X-Ray Classification by RNN-based Patient Monitoring
title_zh: 通过基于 RNN 的患者监护改进胸部 X 射线分类
comment: To be published in proceedings of IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning Applications IEEE ICMLA 2022
comments: To be published in proceedings of IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning Applications IEEE ICMLA 2022
abstract: Chest X-Ray imaging is one of the most common radiological tools for detection of various pathologies related to the chest area and lung function. In a clinical setting, automated assessment of chest radiographs has the potential of assisting physicians in their decision making process and optimize clinical workflows, for example by prioritizing emergency patients. Most work analyzing the potential of machine learning models to classify chest X-ray images focuses on vision methods processing and predicting pathologies for one image at a time. However, many patients undergo such a procedure multiple times during course of a treatment or during a single hospital stay. The patient history, that is previous images and especially the corresponding diagnosis contain useful information that can aid a classification system in its prediction. In this study, we analyze how information about diagnosis can improve CNN-based image classification models by constructing a novel dataset from the well studied CheXpert dataset of chest X-rays. We show that a model trained on additional patient history information outperforms a model trained without the information by a significant margin. We provide code to replicate the dataset creation and model training.
summary: Chest X-Ray imaging is one of the most common radiological tools for detection of various pathologies related to the chest area and lung function. In a clinical setting, automated assessment of chest radiographs has the potential of assisting physicians in their decision making process and optimize clinical workflows, for example by prioritizing emergency patients. Most work analyzing the potential of machine learning models to classify chest X-ray images focuses on vision methods processing and predicting pathologies for one image at a time. However, many patients undergo such a procedure multiple times during course of a treatment or during a single hospital stay. The patient history, that is previous images and especially the corresponding diagnosis contain useful information that can aid a classification system in its prediction. In this study, we analyze how information about diagnosis can improve CNN-based image classification models by constructing a novel dataset from the well studied CheXpert dataset of chest X-rays. We show that a model trained on additional patient history information outperforms a model trained without the information by a significant margin. We provide code to replicate the dataset creation and model training.
abstract_zh: 胸部 X 射线成像是最常见的放射学工具之一，用于检测与胸部区域和肺功能相关的各种病理。在临床环境中，胸部X光片的自动评估有可能协助医生进行决策过程并优化临床工作流程，例如优先考虑急诊患者。大多数分析机器学习模型对胸部 X 射线图像进行分类的潜力的工作都集中在一次处理和预测一张图像的病理学方法上。然而，许多患者在治疗过程中或单次住院期间多次经历这样的手术。患者病史，即之前的图像，尤其是相应的诊断，包含可以帮助分类系统进行预测的有用信息。在本研究中，我们通过从经过深入研究的 CheXpert 胸部 X 射线数据集构建新的数据集，分析有关诊断的信息如何改进基于 CNN 的图像分类模型。我们表明，根据额外患者病史信息训练的模型明显优于没有这些信息训练的模型。我们提供代码来复制数据集创建和模型训练。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过基于RNN的患者监测方法改进胸部X光分类，利用患者历史诊断信息提升卷积神经网络（CNN）的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有胸部X光分类模型通常独立处理单张图像，而患者多次检查的历史信息（如既往影像和诊断）可能对分类有重要辅助价值，但未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 基于CheXpert数据集构建包含患者历史诊断信息的新数据集，设计结合RNN的模型架构，将患者历史信息与当前影像的CNN特征融合进行分类预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，整合患者历史信息的模型在分类任务中显著优于仅使用单张图像的模型，且提供了可复现的代码实现。
AI.conclusion: 患者历史诊断信息能有效提升胸部X光分类准确率，未来可进一步探索多模态数据融合或更复杂的时序建模方法。
