authors_text: Samaneh Manavi Roodsari,Antal Huck-Horvath,Sara Freund,Azhar Zam,Georg Rauter,Wolfgang Schade,Philippe C. Cattin
title: Using Supervised Deep-Learning to Model Edge-FBG Shape Sensors
title_zh: 使用监督式深度学习对边缘 FBG 形状传感器进行建模
abstract: Continuum robots in robot-assisted minimally invasive surgeries provide adequate access to target anatomies that are not directly reachable through small incisions. Achieving precise and reliable motion control of such snake-like manipulators necessitates an accurate navigation system that requires no line-of-sight and is immune to electromagnetic noises. Fiber Bragg Grating (FBG) shape sensors, particularly edge-FBGs, are promising tools for this task. However, in edge-FBG sensors, the intensity ratio between Bragg wavelengths carries the strain information that can be affected by undesired bending-related phenomena, making standard characterization techniques less suitable for these sensors. We showed in our previous work that a deep learning model has the potential to extract the strain information from the full edge-FBG spectrum and accurately predict the sensor's shape. In this paper, we conduct a more thorough investigation to find a suitable architectural design with lower prediction errors. We use the Hyperband algorithm to search for optimal hyperparameters in two steps. First, we limit the search space to layer settings, where the best-performing configuration gets selected. Then, we modify the search space for tuning the training and loss calculation hyperparameters. We also analyze various data transformations on the input and output variables, as data rescaling can directly influence the model's performance. Moreover, we performed discriminative training using Siamese network architecture that employs two CNNs with identical parameters to learn similarity metrics between the spectra of similar target values. The best-performing network architecture among all evaluated configurations can predict the sensor's shape with a median tip error of 3.11 mm.

Achieving precise and reliable motion control of such snake-like manipulators necessitates an accurate navigation system that requires no line-of-sight and is immune to electromagnetic noises. Fiber Bragg Grating (FBG) shape sensors, particularly edge-FBGs, are promising tools for this task. However, in edge-FBG sensors, the intensity ratio between Bragg wavelengths carries the strain information that can be affected by undesired bending-related phenomena, making standard characterization techniques less suitable for these sensors. We showed in our previous work that a deep learning model has the potential to extract the strain information from the full edge-FBG spectrum and accurately predict the sensor's shape. In this paper, we conduct a more thorough investigation to find a suitable architectural design with lower prediction errors. We use the Hyperband algorithm to search for optimal hyperparameters in two steps. First, we limit the search space to layer settings, where the best-performing configuration gets selected. Then, we modify the search space for tuning the training and loss calculation hyperparameters. We also analyze various data transformations on the input and output variables, as data rescaling can directly influence the model's performance. Moreover, we performed discriminative training using Siamese network architecture that employs two CNNs with identical parameters to learn similarity metrics between the spectra of similar target values. The best-performing network architecture among all evaluated configurations can predict the sensor's shape with a median tip error of 3.11 mm.
abstract_zh: Continuum robots in robot-assisted minimally invasive surgeries provide adequate access to target anatomies that are not directly reachable through small incisions. Achieving precise and reliable motion control of such snake-like manipulators necessitates an accurate navigation system that requires no line-of-sight and is immune to electromagnetic noises. Fiber Bragg Grating (FBG) shape sensors, particularly edge-FBGs, are promising tools for this task.然而，在边缘 FBG 传感器中，布拉格波长之间的强度比携带可能受到不良弯曲相关现象影响的应变信息，使得标准表征技术不太适合这些传感器。 We showed in our previous work that a deep learning model has the potential to extract the strain information from the full edge-FBG spectrum and accurately predict the sensor's shape. In this paper, we conduct a more thorough investigation to find a suitable architectural design with lower prediction errors. We use the Hyperband algorithm to search for optimal hyperparameters in two steps. First, we limit the search space to layer settings, where the best-performing configuration gets selected. Then, we modify the search space for tuning the training and loss calculation hyperparameters.我们还分析输入和输出变量的各种数据转换，因为数据重新缩放可以直接影响模型的性能。 Moreover, we performed discriminative training using Siamese network architecture that employs two CNNs with identical parameters to learn similarity metrics between the spectra of similar target values. The best-performing network architecture among all evaluated configurations can predict the sensor's shape with a median tip error of 3.11 mm.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于监督深度学习的模型，用于准确预测边缘光纤光栅（edge-FBG）形状传感器的形状，以提升连续体机器人在微创手术中的运动控制精度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以准确提取edge-FBG传感器的应变信息，因其易受弯曲相关现象干扰，需开发更可靠的形状预测方法以满足手术机器人对无视线、抗电磁干扰导航系统的需求。
AI.method: 采用Hyperband算法分两阶段优化模型超参数：首先筛选最佳网络层结构，再调整训练与损失计算参数；通过数据变换分析提升模型性能，并引入双卷积神经网络的Siamese架构进行判别训练。
AI.result: 最优网络架构实现传感器形状预测的中位尖端误差为3.11毫米，显著优于传统表征技术。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法有效解决了edge-FBG传感器的形状预测难题，为微创手术中连续体机器人的精准控制提供了可行方案。

search_text: Using Supervised Deep-Learning to Model Edge-FBG Shape Sensors 使用监督式深度学习对边缘 FBG 形状传感器进行建模 Continuum robots in robot-assisted minimally invasive surgeries provide adequate access to target anatomies that are not directly reachable through small incisions. Achieving precise and reliable motion control of such snake-like manipulators necessitates an accurate navigation system that requires no line-of-sight and is immune to electromagnetic noises. Fiber Bragg Grating (FBG) shape sensors, particularly edge-FBGs, are promising tools for this task. However, in edge-FBG sensors, the intensity ratio between Bragg wavelengths carries the strain information that can be affected by undesired bending-related phenomena, making standard characterization techniques less suitable for these sensors. We showed in our previous work that a deep learning model has the potential to extract the strain information from the full edge-FBG spectrum and accurately predict the sensor's shape. In this paper, we conduct a more thorough investigation to find a suitable architectural design with lower prediction errors. We use the Hyperband algorithm to search for optimal hyperparameters in two steps. First, we limit the search space to layer settings, where the best-performing configuration gets selected. Then, we modify the search space for tuning the training and loss calculation hyperparameters. We also analyze various data transformations on the input and output variables, as data rescaling can directly influence the model's performance. Moreover, we performed discriminative training using Siamese network architecture that employs two CNNs with identical parameters to learn similarity metrics between the spectra of similar target values. The best-performing network architecture among all evaluated configurations can predict the sensor's shape with a median tip error of 3.11 mm. Continuum robots in robot-assisted minimally invasive surgeries provide adequate access to target anatomies that are not directly reachable through small incisions. Achieving precise and reliable motion control of such snake-like manipulators necessitates an accurate navigation system that requires no line-of-sight and is immune to electromagnetic noises. Fiber Bragg Grating (FBG) shape sensors, particularly edge-FBGs, are promising tools for this task.然而，在边缘 FBG 传感器中，布拉格波长之间的强度比携带可能受到不良弯曲相关现象影响的应变信息，使得标准表征技术不太适合这些传感器。 We showed in our previous work that a deep learning model has the potential to extract the strain information from the full edge-FBG spectrum and accurately predict the sensor's shape. In this paper, we conduct a more thorough investigation to find a suitable architectural design with lower prediction errors. We use the Hyperband algorithm to search for optimal hyperparameters in two steps. First, we limit the search space to layer settings, where the best-performing configuration gets selected. Then, we modify the search space for tuning the training and loss calculation hyperparameters.我们还分析输入和输出变量的各种数据转换，因为数据重新缩放可以直接影响模型的性能。 Moreover, we performed discriminative training using Siamese network architecture that employs two CNNs with identical parameters to learn similarity metrics between the spectra of similar target values. The best-performing network architecture among all evaluated configurations can predict the sensor's shape with a median tip error of 3.11 mm. 本文提出了一种基于监督深度学习的模型，用于准确预测边缘光纤光栅（edge-FBG）形状传感器的形状，以提升连续体机器人在微创手术中的运动控制精度。 Samaneh Manavi Roodsari,Antal Huck-Horvath,Sara Freund,Azhar Zam,Georg Rauter,Wolfgang Schade,Philippe C. authors_text: Paul Stoewer,Achim Schilling,Andreas Maier,Patrick Krauss
title: Neural Network based Formation of Cognitive Maps of Semantic Spaces and the Emergence of Abstract Concepts
title_zh: 基于神经网络的语义空间认知图的形成和抽象概念的出现
abstract: The hippocampal-entorhinal complex plays a major role in the organization of memory and thought. The formation of and navigation in cognitive maps of arbitrary mental spaces via place and grid cells can serve as a representation of memories and experiences and their relations to each other. The multi-scale successor representation is proposed to be the mathematical principle underlying place and grid cell computations. Here, we present a neural network, which learns a cognitive map of a semantic space based on 32 different animal species encoded as feature vectors. The neural network successfully learns the similarities between different animal species, and constructs a cognitive map of 'animal space' based on the principle of successor representations with an accuracy of around 30% which is near to the theoretical maximum regarding the fact that all animal species have more than one possible successor, i.e. nearest neighbor in feature space. Furthermore, a hierarchical structure, i.e. different scales of cognitive maps, can be modeled based on multi-scale successor representations. We find that, in fine-grained cognitive maps, the animal vectors are evenly distributed in feature space. In contrast, in coarse-grained maps, animal vectors are highly clustered according to their biological class, i.e. amphibians, mammals and insects. This could be a possible mechanism explaining the emergence of new abstract semantic concepts. Finally, even completely new or incomplete input can be represented by interpolation of the representations from the cognitive map with remarkable high accuracy of up to 95%. We conclude that the successor representation can serve as a weighted pointer to past memories and experiences, and may therefore be a crucial building block for future machine learning to include prior knowledge, and to derive context knowledge from novel input.

Here, we present a neural network, which learns a cognitive map of a semantic space based on 32 different animal species encoded as feature vectors. The neural network successfully learns the similarities between different animal species, and constructs a cognitive map of 'animal space' based on the principle of successor representations with an accuracy of around 30% which is near to the theoretical maximum regarding the fact that all animal species have more than one possible successor, i.e. nearest neighbor in feature space. Furthermore, a hierarchical structure, i.e. different scales of cognitive maps, can be modeled based on multi-scale successor representations. We find that, in fine-grained cognitive maps, the animal vectors are evenly distributed in feature space. In contrast, in coarse-grained maps, animal vectors are highly clustered according to their biological class, i.e. amphibians, mammals and insects. This could be a possible mechanism explaining the emergence of new abstract semantic concepts. Finally, even completely new or incomplete input can be represented by interpolation of the representations from the cognitive map with remarkable high accuracy of up to 95%. We conclude that the successor representation can serve as a weighted pointer to past memories and experiences, and may therefore be a crucial building block for future machine learning to include prior knowledge, and to derive context knowledge from novel input.
abstract_zh: 海马-内嗅复合体在记忆和思维的组织中发挥着重要作用。通过位置和网格细胞形成任意心理空间的认知地图并进行导航可以作为记忆和经验及其相互关系的表示。多尺度后继表示被提议作为位置和网格单元计算的数学原理。在这里，我们提出了一个神经网络，它根据编码为特征向量的 32 种不同动物物种来学习语义空间的认知图。神经网络成功地学习了不同动物物种之间的相似性，并基于后继表示原理构建了“动物空间”认知图，准确率约为 30%，接近理论最大值，考虑到所有动物物种都有不止一个可能的后继者，即特征空间中的最近邻居。此外，可以基于多尺度后继表示来对层次结构（即不同尺度的认知图）进行建模。我们发现，在细粒度的认知图中，动物向量均匀分布在特征空间中。相反，在粗粒度地图中，动物载体根据其生物类别（即两栖动物、哺乳动物和昆虫）高度聚类。这可能是解释新抽象语义概念出现的一种可能机制。最后，即使是全新的或不完整的输入也可以通过认知图的表示插值来表示，准确度高达 95%。我们的结论是，后继表示可以作为过去记忆和经验的加权指针，因此可能是未来机器学习包含先验知识并从新输入中获取上下文知识的关键构建块。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于神经网络的认知地图构建方法，通过多尺度继承表示原理，利用32种动物的特征向量学习语义空间中的相似性，并探索抽象概念的形成机制。
AI.motivation: 受海马体-内嗅皮层复合体在记忆组织中的作用启发，旨在通过认知地图的数学原理（继承表示）模拟大脑对语义空间的建模过程，并为机器学习提供整合先验知识的新思路。
AI.method: 设计神经网络模型，以32种动物的特征向量为输入，基于多尺度继承表示构建不同粒度的认知地图，通过相似性学习和插值方法验证模型效果。
AI.result: 模型在细粒度地图中实现动物向量均匀分布，在粗粒度地图中按生物类别聚类，新输入插值准确率达95%，整体相似性学习准确率约30%。
AI.conclusion: 继承表示可作为指向过往记忆的加权指针，为机器学习系统整合先验知识及从新输入中推导上下文信息提供关键理论支持。

authors_text: Fan Ouyang,Weiqi Xu,Mutlu Cukurova
title: An Artificial Intelligence driven Learning Analytics Method to Examine the Collaborative Problem solving Process from a Complex Adaptive Systems Perspective
title_zh: 一种人工智能驱动的学习分析方法，从复杂自适应系统的角度检查协作问题解决过程
comment: 27 pages, 8 Figures, Accepted to appear in the International Journal of Computer-Supported Collaborative Learning
comments: 27 pages, 8 Figures, Accepted to appear in the International Journal of Computer-Supported Collaborative Learning
abstract: Collaborative problem solving (CPS) enables student groups to complete learning tasks, construct knowledge, and solve problems. Previous research has argued the importance to examine the complexity of CPS, including its multimodality, dynamics, and synergy from the complex adaptive systems perspective. However, there is limited empirical research examining the adaptive and temporal characteristics of CPS which might lead to an oversimplified representation of the real complexity of the CPS process. To further understand the nature of CPS in online interaction settings, this research collected multimodal process and performance data (i.e., verbal audios, computer screen recordings, concept map data) and proposed a three-layered analytical framework that integrated AI algorithms with learning analytics to analyze the regularity of groups collaboration patterns. The results detected three types of collaborative patterns in groups, namely the behaviour-oriented collaborative pattern (Type 1) associated with medium-level performance, the communication - behaviour - synergistic collaborative pattern (Type 2) associated with high-level performance, and the communication-oriented collaborative pattern (Type 3) associated with low-level performance. The research further highlighted the multimodal, dynamic, and synergistic characteristics of groups collaborative patterns to explain the emergence of an adaptive, self-organizing system during the CPS process.
summary: Collaborative problem solving (CPS) enables student groups to complete learning tasks, construct knowledge, and solve problems. Previous research has argued the importance to examine the complexity of CPS, including its multimodality, dynamics, and synergy from the complex adaptive systems perspective. However, there is limited empirical research examining the adaptive and temporal characteristics of CPS which might lead to an oversimplified representation of the real complexity of the CPS process. To further understand the nature of CPS in online interaction settings, this research collected multimodal process and performance data (i.e., verbal audios, computer screen recordings, concept map data) and proposed a three-layered analytical framework that integrated AI algorithms with learning analytics to analyze the regularity of groups collaboration patterns. The results detected three types of collaborative patterns in groups, namely the behaviour-oriented collaborative pattern (Type 1) associated with medium-level performance, the communication - behaviour - synergistic collaborative pattern (Type 2) associated with high-level performance, and the communication-oriented collaborative pattern (Type 3) associated with low-level performance. The research further highlighted the multimodal, dynamic, and synergistic characteristics of groups collaborative patterns to explain the emergence of an adaptive, self-organizing system during the CPS process.
abstract_zh: 协作问题解决（CPS）使学生小组能够完成学习任务、构建知识和解决问题。先前的研究已经论证了从复杂自适应系统的角度检查 CPS 复杂性的重要性，包括其多模态、动态性和协同作用。然而，对 CPS 的适应性和时间特性的实证研究有限，这可能导致对 CPS 过程的真实复杂性的过度简化表示。为了进一步了解在线交互环境中 CPS 的本质，本研究收集了多模态过程和表现数据（即口头音频、计算机屏幕记录、概念图数据），并提出了一个三层分析框架，将人工智能算法与学习分析相结合，以分析群体协作模式的规律性。结果发现了三种类型的群体协作模式，即与中等绩效相关的行为导向协作模式（类型1）、与高水平绩效相关的沟通-行为-协同协作模式（类型2）和与低水平绩效相关的沟通导向协作模式（类型3）。该研究进一步强调了群体协作模式的多模式、动态和协同特征，以解释 CPS 过程中自适应、自组织系统的出现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人工智能的学习分析方法，从复杂适应系统视角探讨在线协作问题解决过程的动态特征。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽强调协作问题解决（CPS）的复杂性，但缺乏对CPS适应性和时间动态特征的实证分析，导致对其真实复杂性的简化描述。
AI.method: 采集多模态数据（语音、屏幕记录、概念图），构建融合AI算法的三层分析框架，识别小组协作模式规律。
AI.result: 发现三种协作模式：行为导向型（中等表现）、沟通-行为-协同型（高水平表现）和沟通导向型（低水平表现）。
AI.conclusion: CPS小组协作呈现多模态、动态和协同特征，形成适应性自组织系统，为理解协作学习机制提供新视角。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人工智能的学习分析方法，从复杂适应系统视角探讨在线协作问题解决过程的动态特征。

search_text: An Artificial Intelligence driven Learning Analytics Method to Examine the Collaborative Problem solving Process from a Complex Adaptive Systems Perspective 一种人工智能驱动的学习分析方法，从复杂自适应系统的角度检查协作问题解决过程 Collaborative problem solving (CPS) enables student groups to complete learning tasks, construct knowledge, and solve problems. Previous research has argued the importance to examine the complexity of CPS, including its multimodality, dynamics, and synergy from the complex adaptive systems perspective. However, there is limited empirical research examining the adaptive and temporal characteristics of CPS which might lead to an oversimplified representation of the real complexity of the CPS process. To further understand the nature of CPS in online interaction settings, this research collected multimodal process and performance data (i.e., verbal audios, computer screen recordings, concept map data) and proposed a three-layered analytical framework that integrated AI algorithms with learning analytics to analyze the regularity of groups collaboration patterns. The results detected three types of collaborative patterns in groups, namely the behaviour-oriented collaborative pattern (Type 1) associated with medium-level performance, the communication - behaviour - synergistic collaborative pattern (Type 2) associated with high-level performance, and the communication-oriented collaborative pattern (Type 3) associated with low-level performance. The research further highlighted the multimodal, dynamic, and synergistic characteristics of groups collaborative patterns to explain the emergence of an adaptive, self-organizing system during the CPS process. 协作问题解决（CPS）使学生小组能够完成学习任务、构建知识和解决问题。先前的研究已经论证了从复杂自适应系统的角度检查 CPS 复杂性的重要性，包括其多模态、动态性和协同作用。然而，对 CPS 的适应性和时间特性的实证研究有限，这可能导致对 CPS 过程的真实复杂性的过度简化表示。为了进一步了解在线交互环境中 CPS 的本质，本研究收集了多模态过程和表现数据（即口头音频、计算机屏幕记录、概念图数据），并提出了一个三层分析框架，将人工智能算法与学习分析相结合，以分析群体协作模式的规律性。结果发现了三种类型的群体协作模式，即与中等绩效相关的行为导向协作模式（类型1）、与高水平绩效相关的沟通-行为-协同协作模式（类型2）和与低水平绩效相关的沟通导向协作模式（类型3）。该研究进一步强调了群体协作模式的多模式、动态和协同特征，以解释 CPS 过程中自适应、自组织系统的出现。 本文提出一种基于人工智能的学习分析方法，从复杂适应系统视角探讨在线协作问题解决过程的动态特征。 Fan Ouyang,Weiqi Xu,Mutlu Cukurova cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Lisheng Wu,Ke Chen
title: Goal Exploration Augmentation via Pre-trained Skills for Sparse-Reward Long-Horizon Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过稀疏奖励长视野目标条件强化学习的预训练技能增强目标探索
comment: Accepted for publication in Machine Learning (Springer): 35 pages, 15 figures
comments: Accepted for publication in Machine Learning (Springer): 35 pages, 15 figures
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) often struggles to accomplish a sparse-reward long-horizon task in a complex environment. Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) has been employed to tackle this difficult problem via a curriculum of easy-to-reach sub-goals. In GCRL, exploring novel sub-goals is essential for the agent to ultimately find the pathway to the desired goal. How to explore novel sub-goals efficiently is one of the most challenging issues in GCRL. Several goal exploration methods have been proposed to address this issue but still struggle to find the desired goals efficiently. In this paper, we propose a novel learning objective by optimizing the entropy of both achieved and new goals to be explored for more efficient goal exploration in sub-goal selection based GCRL. To optimize this objective, we first explore and exploit the frequently occurring goal-transition patterns mined in the environments similar to the current task to compose skills via skill learning. Then, the pretrained skills are applied in goal exploration. Evaluation on a variety of spare-reward long-horizon benchmark tasks suggests that incorporating our method into several state-of-the-art GCRL baselines significantly boosts their exploration efficiency while improving or maintaining their performance. The source code is available at: https://github.com/GEAPS/GEAPS.

abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）通常难以在复杂的环境中完成稀疏奖励的长期任务。目标条件强化学习（GCRL）已被用来通过易于实现的子目标课程来解决这个难题。在 GCRL 中，探索新的子目标对于智能体最终找到实现所需目标的途径至关重要。如何有效地探索新颖的子目标是 GCRL 中最具挑战性的问题之一。已经提出了几种目标探索方法来解决这个问题，但仍然难以有效地找到所需的目标。在本文中，我们通过优化已实现目标和要探索的新目标的熵，提出了一种新颖的学习目标，以便在基于子目标选择的 GCRL 中更有效地进行目标探索。为了优化这个目标，我们首先探索和利用在与当前任务类似的环境中挖掘的频繁出现的目标转换模式，通过技能学习来组合技能。然后，将预训练的技能应用于目标探索。对各种备用奖励长期基准任务的评估表明，将我们的方法纳入几个最先进的 GCRL 基线中可以显着提高其探索效率，同时提高或保持其性能。源代码位于：https://github.com/GEAPS/GEAPS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过预训练技能增强目标探索的方法，以提高稀疏奖励长时域目标条件强化学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 目标条件强化学习（GCRL）在稀疏奖励任务中面临子目标探索效率低的问题，现有方法难以有效找到目标路径。
AI.method: 通过优化已实现目标和新探索目标的熵值，结合预训练技能（基于环境中的目标转移模式）提升子目标选择效率。
AI.result: 在多个稀疏奖励长时域基准任务中，该方法显著提升探索效率，同时保持或改进基线方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合熵优化与预训练技能的目标探索方法，有效解决了GCRL中的长时域稀疏奖励任务挑战。

authors_text: Ming Tong,Yongzhen Wang,Peng Cui,Xuefeng Yan,Mingqiang Wei
title: Semi-UFormer: Semi-supervised Uncertainty-aware Transformer for Image Dehazing
title_zh: Semi-UFormer：用于图像去雾的半监督不确定性感知变压器
abstract: Image dehazing is fundamental yet not well-solved in computer vision. Most cutting-edge models are trained in synthetic data, leading to the poor performance on real-world hazy scenarios. Besides, they commonly give deterministic dehazed images while neglecting to mine their uncertainty. To bridge the domain gap and enhance the dehazing performance, we propose a novel semi-supervised uncertainty-aware transformer network, called Semi-UFormer. Semi-UFormer can well leverage both the real-world hazy images and their uncertainty guidance information. Specifically, Semi-UFormer builds itself on the knowledge distillation framework. Such teacher-student networks effectively absorb real-world haze information for quality dehazing. Furthermore, an uncertainty estimation block is introduced into the model to estimate the pixel uncertainty representations, which is then used as a guidance signal to help the student network produce haze-free images more accurately. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Semi-UFormer generalizes well from synthetic to real-world images.
summary: Image dehazing is fundamental yet not well-solved in computer vision. Most cutting-edge models are trained in synthetic data, leading to the poor performance on real-world hazy scenarios. Besides, they commonly give deterministic dehazed images while neglecting to mine their uncertainty. To bridge the domain gap and enhance the dehazing performance, we propose a novel semi-supervised uncertainty-aware transformer network, called Semi-UFormer. Semi-UFormer can well leverage both the real-world hazy images and their uncertainty guidance information. Specifically, Semi-UFormer builds itself on the knowledge distillation framework. Such teacher-student networks effectively absorb real-world haze information for quality dehazing. Furthermore, an uncertainty estimation block is introduced into the model to estimate the pixel uncertainty representations, which is then used as a guidance signal to help the student network produce haze-free images more accurately. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Semi-UFormer generalizes well from synthetic to real-world images.
abstract_zh: 图像去雾是计算机视觉中的基础，但尚未得到很好的解决。大多数尖端模型都是在合成数据中进行训练的，导致在现实世界的模糊场景中表现不佳。此外，他们通常给出确定性的去雾图像，而忽略挖掘其不确定性。为了弥合域差距并增强去雾性能，我们提出了一种新型半监督不确定性感知变压器网络，称为 Semi-UFormer。 Semi-UFormer 可以很好地利用现实世界的模糊图像及其不确定性指导信息。具体来说，Semi-UFormer 建立在知识蒸馏框架之上。这种师生网络有效地吸收现实世界的雾霾信息以实现高质量的去雾。此外，模型中引入了不确定性估计块来估计像素不确定性表示，然后将其用作指导信号以帮助学生网络更准确地生成无雾图像。大量实验表明，Semi-UFormer 可以很好地从合成图像推广到真实世界图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督不确定性感知的Transformer网络Semi-UFormer，用于提升图像去雾性能，特别是在真实世界场景中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾模型依赖合成数据训练，导致在真实场景中表现不佳，且未考虑模型预测的不确定性。需解决领域差异问题并利用不确定性信息提升去雾效果。
AI.method: 基于知识蒸馏框架构建师生网络，利用真实世界雾霾图像与不确定性估计模块生成的像素级不确定性信号指导学生网络学习，实现高质量去雾。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Semi-UFormer能有效从合成数据迁移到真实场景，在多个基准数据集上取得优于现有方法的去雾效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合半监督学习与不确定性感知机制，Semi-UFormer成功缩小了合成数据与真实场景间的性能差距，为图像去雾任务提供了新思路。

result: 大量实验表明，Semi-UFormer能有效从合成数据迁移到真实场景，在多个基准数据集上取得优于现有方法的去雾效果。
conclusion: 通过结合半监督学习与不确定性感知机制，Semi-UFormer成功缩小了合成数据与真实场景间的性能差距，为图像去雾任务提供了新思路。
search_text: Semi-UFormer: Semi-supervised Uncertainty-aware Transformer for Image Dehazing Semi-UFormer：用于图像去雾的半监督不确定性感知变压器 Image dehazing is fundamental yet not well-solved in computer vision. Most cutting-edge models are trained in synthetic data, leading to the poor performance on real-world hazy scenarios. Besides, they commonly give deterministic dehazed images while neglecting to mine their uncertainty. To bridge the domain gap and enhance the dehazing performance, we propose a novel semi-supervised uncertainty-aware transformer network, called Semi-UFormer. Semi-UFormer can well leverage both the real-world hazy images and their uncertainty guidance information. Specifically, Semi-UFormer builds itself on the knowledge distillation framework. Such teacher-student networks effectively absorb real-world haze information for quality dehazing. Furthermore, an uncertainty estimation block is introduced into the model to estimate the pixel uncertainty representations, which is then used as a guidance signal to help the student network produce haze-free images more accurately. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Semi-UFormer generalizes well from synthetic to real-world images. 图像去雾是计算机视觉中的基础，但尚未得到很好的解决。大多数尖端模型都是在合成数据中进行训练的，导致在现实世界的模糊场景中表现不佳。此外，他们通常给出确定性的去雾图像，而忽略挖掘其不确定性。为了弥合域差距并增强去雾性能，我们提出了一种新型半监督不确定性感知变压器网络，称为 Semi-UFormer。 Semi-UFormer 可以很好地利用现实世界的模糊图像及其不确定性指导信息。具体来说，Semi-UFormer 建立在知识蒸馏框架之上。这种师生网络有效地吸收现实世界的雾霾信息以实现高质量的去雾。此外，模型中引入了不确定性估计块来估计像素不确定性表示，然后将其用作指导信号以帮助学生网络更准确地生成无雾图像。大量实验表明，Semi-UFormer 可以很好地从合成图像推广到真实世界图像。 本文提出一种半监督不确定性感知的Transformer网络Semi-UFormer，用于提升图像去雾性能，特别是在真实世界场景中的泛化能力。 Ming Tong,Yongzhen Wang,Peng Cui,Xuefeng Yan,Mingqiang Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Jun Hao Liew,Hanshu Yan,Daquan Zhou,Jiashi Feng
title: MagicMix: Semantic Mixing with Diffusion Models
title_zh: MagicMix：与扩散模型的语义混合
abstract: Have you ever imagined what a corgi-alike coffee machine or a tiger-alike rabbit would look like? In this work, we attempt to answer these questions by exploring a new task called semantic mixing, aiming at blending two different semantics to create a new concept (e.g., corgi + coffee machine -- > corgi-alike coffee machine). Unlike style transfer, where an image is stylized according to the reference style without changing the image content, semantic blending mixes two different concepts in a semantic manner to synthesize a novel concept while preserving the spatial layout and geometry. To this end, we present MagicMix, a simple yet effective solution based on pre-trained text-conditioned diffusion models. Motivated by the progressive generation property of diffusion models where layout/shape emerges at early denoising steps while semantically meaningful details appear at later steps during the denoising process, our method first obtains a coarse layout (either by corrupting an image or denoising from a pure Gaussian noise given a text prompt), followed by injection of conditional prompt for semantic mixing. Our method does not require any spatial mask or re-training, yet is able to synthesize novel objects with high fidelity. To improve the mixing quality, we further devise two simple strategies to provide better control and flexibility over the synthesized content. With our method, we present our results over diverse downstream applications, including semantic style transfer, novel object synthesis, breed mixing, and concept removal, demonstrating the flexibility of our method. More results can be found on the project page https://magicmix.github.io

In this work, we attempt to answer these questions by exploring a new task called semantic mixing, aiming at blending two different semantics to create a new concept (e.g., corgi + coffee machine -- > corgi-alike coffee machine). Unlike style transfer, where an image is stylized according to the reference style without changing the image content, semantic blending mixes two different concepts in a semantic manner to synthesize a novel concept while preserving the spatial layout and geometry. To this end, we present MagicMix, a simple yet effective solution based on pre-trained text-conditioned diffusion models. Motivated by the progressive generation property of diffusion models where layout/shape emerges at early denoising steps while semantically meaningful details appear at later steps during the denoising process, our method first obtains a coarse layout (either by corrupting an image or denoising from a pure Gaussian noise given a text prompt), followed by injection of conditional prompt for semantic mixing. Our method does not require any spatial mask or re-training, yet is able to synthesize novel objects with high fidelity. To improve the mixing quality, we further devise two simple strategies to provide better control and flexibility over the synthesized content. With our method, we present our results over diverse downstream applications, including semantic style transfer, novel object synthesis, breed mixing, and concept removal, demonstrating the flexibility of our method. More results can be found on the project page https://magicmix.github.io
abstract_zh: 你有没有想象过像柯基犬一样的咖啡机或像老虎一样的兔子会是什么样子？在这项工作中，我们试图通过探索一项称为语义混合的新任务来回答这些问题，旨在混合两种不同的语义以创建一个新概念（例如，柯基犬 + 咖啡机 - > 类似柯基犬的咖啡机）。与风格迁移不同，风格迁移根据参考风格对图像进行风格化而不改变图像内容，而语义混合以语义方式混合两个不同的概念，以合成一个新颖的概念，同时保留空间布局和几何形状。为此，我们提出了 MagicMix，这是一种基于预先训练的文本条件扩散模型的简单而有效的解决方案。受扩散模型的渐进生成特性的启发，其中布局/形状出现在早期去噪步骤中，而语义上有意义的细节出现在去噪过程中的后续步骤中，我们的方法首先获得粗略布局（通过破坏图像或在给定文本提示的情况下从纯高斯噪声中去噪），然后注入用于语义混合的条件提示。我们的方法不需要任何空间掩模或重新训练，但能够合成高保真度的新物体。为了提高混合质量，我们进一步设计了两种简单的策略，以对合成内容提供更好的控制和灵活性。通过我们的方法，我们在不同的下游应用中展示了我们的结果，包括语义样式迁移、新颖的对象合成、品种混合和概念删除，证明了我们方法的灵活性。更多结果可以在项目页面 https://magicmix.github.io 上找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出MagicMix方法，利用预训练的文本条件扩散模型实现语义混合任务，通过融合两个不同概念生成新型图像（如柯基犬与咖啡机的混合）。
AI.motivation: 现有风格迁移方法仅改变图像风格而不保留内容，无法实现语义层面的概念混合。本文旨在保留空间布局与几何结构的前提下，通过语义混合生成新型概念图像。
AI.method: 基于扩散模型的渐进生成特性，首先生成粗略布局（通过图像降噪或纯高斯噪声生成），随后注入条件提示进行语义混合，无需空间掩码或重新训练，并设计两种策略提升控制灵活性。
AI.result: 在语义风格迁移、新物体生成、品种混合及概念移除等下游任务中取得良好效果，验证了方法的灵活性与生成质量。
AI.conclusion: MagicMix通过简单有效的方法实现了无需掩码的语义混合，展示了扩散模型在概念融合任务中的强大潜力与应用价值。

authors_text: Linus Kreitner,Ivan Ezhov,Daniel Rueckert,Johannes C. Paetzold,Martin J. Menten
title: Automated analysis of diabetic retinopathy using vessel segmentation maps as inductive bias
title_zh: 使用血管分割图作为归纳偏差自动分析糖尿病视网膜病变
comment: Submission for MICCAI 2022 Diabetic Retinopathy Analysis Challenge (DRAC) Proceedings, DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.6362349
comments: Submission for MICCAI 2022 Diabetic Retinopathy Analysis Challenge (DRAC) Proceedings, DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.6362349
abstract: Recent studies suggest that early stages of diabetic retinopathy (DR) can be diagnosed by monitoring vascular changes in the deep vascular complex. In this work, we investigate a novel method for automated DR grading based on optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) images. Our work combines OCTA scans with their vessel segmentations, which then serve as inputs to task specific networks for lesion segmentation, image quality assessment and DR grading. For this, we generate synthetic OCTA images to train a segmentation network that can be directly applied on real OCTA data. We test our approach on MICCAI 2022's DR analysis challenge (DRAC). In our experiments, the proposed method performs equally well as the baseline model.
summary: Recent studies suggest that early stages of diabetic retinopathy (DR) can be diagnosed by monitoring vascular changes in the deep vascular complex. In this work, we investigate a novel method for automated DR grading based on optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) images. Our work combines OCTA scans with their vessel segmentations, which then serve as inputs to task specific networks for lesion segmentation, image quality assessment and DR grading. For this, we generate synthetic OCTA images to train a segmentation network that can be directly applied on real OCTA data. We test our approach on MICCAI 2022's DR analysis challenge (DRAC). In our experiments, the proposed method performs equally well as the baseline model.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，早期的糖尿病视网膜病变 (DR) 可以通过监测深部血管复合体的血管变化来诊断。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种基于光学相干断层扫描血管造影 (OCTA) 图像的自动 DR 分级的新方法。我们的工作将 OCTA 扫描与其血管分割相结合，然后将其作为特定任务网络的输入，用于病变分割、图像质量评估和 DR 分级。为此，我们生成合成 OCTA 图像来训练可直接应用于真实 OCTA 数据的分割网络。我们在 MICCAI 2022 的 DR 分析挑战 (DRAC) 上测试了我们的方法。在我们的实验中，所提出的方法与基线模型表现相同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视网膜血管分割图作为归纳偏置的糖尿病视网膜病变自动化分析方法，结合OCTA图像与分割图进行病变检测和疾病分级。
AI.motivation: 早期糖尿病视网膜病变可通过血管结构变化检测，但传统方法对细微血管病变敏感度不足，需探索更有效的自动化分析方案。
AI.method: 融合OCTA影像与血管分割图作为网络输入，通过合成数据训练分割模型，并在真实数据集（MICCAI 2022 DRAC）中验证病变分割、图像质量评估及疾病分级性能。
AI.result: 所提方法在DRAC挑战赛中与基线模型表现相当，证明了血管分割图作为归纳偏置的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 血管分割图可作为有效先验信息提升OCTA影像分析性能，合成数据训练策略可行，但需进一步验证临床适用性。

Our work combines OCTA scans with their vessel segmentations, which then serve as inputs to task specific networks for lesion segmentation, image quality assessment and DR grading. For this, we generate synthetic OCTA images to train a segmentation network that can be directly applied on real OCTA data. We test our approach on MICCAI 2022's DR analysis challenge (DRAC). In our experiments, the proposed method performs equally well as the baseline model. 最近的研究表明，早期的糖尿病视网膜病变 (DR) 可以通过监测深部血管复合体的血管变化来诊断。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种基于光学相干断层扫描血管造影 (OCTA) 图像的自动 DR 分级的新方法。我们的工作将 OCTA 扫描与其血管分割相结合，然后将其作为特定任务网络的输入，用于病变分割、图像质量评估和 DR 分级。为此，我们生成合成 OCTA 图像来训练可直接应用于真实 OCTA 数据的分割网络。我们在 MICCAI 2022 的 DR 分析挑战 (DRAC) 上测试了我们的方法。在我们的实验中，所提出的方法与基线模型表现相同。 本文提出一种基于视网膜血管分割图作为归纳偏置的糖尿病视网膜病变自动化分析方法，结合OCTA图像与分割图进行病变检测和疾病分级。 Linus Kreitner,Ivan Ezhov,Daniel Rueckert,Johannes C. Paetzold,Martin J. Menten eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Nnamdi Uzoukwu,Acep Purqon
title: Fuzzy Logic Model for Predicting the Heat Index
title_zh: 预测炎热指数的模糊逻辑模型
abstract: A fuzzy inference system was developed for predicting the heat index from temperature and relative humidity data. The effectiveness of fuzzy logic in using imprecise mapping of input to output to encode interconnectedness of system variables was exploited to uncover a linguistic model of how the temperature and humidity conditions impact the heat index in a growth room. The developed model achieved an R2 of 0.974 and a RMSE of 0.084 when evaluated on a test set, and the results were statistically significant (F1,5915 = 222900.858, p < 0.001). By providing the advantage of linguistic summarization of data trends as well as high prediction accuracy, the fuzzy logic model proved to be an effective machine learning method for heat control problems.
summary: A fuzzy inference system was developed for predicting the heat index from temperature and relative humidity data. The effectiveness of fuzzy logic in using imprecise mapping of input to output to encode interconnectedness of system variables was exploited to uncover a linguistic model of how the temperature and humidity conditions impact the heat index in a growth room. The developed model achieved an R2 of 0.974 and a RMSE of 0.084 when evaluated on a test set, and the results were statistically significant (F1,5915 = 222900.858, p < 0.001). By providing the advantage of linguistic summarization of data trends as well as high prediction accuracy, the fuzzy logic model proved to be an effective machine learning method for heat control problems.
abstract_zh: 开发了模糊推理系统，用于根据温度和相对湿度数据预测炎热指数。利用模糊逻辑在使用输入到输出的不精确映射来编码系统变量的互连性方面的有效性，揭示了温度和湿度条件如何影响生长室中的热指数的语言模型。在测试集上评估时，开发的模型的 R2 为 0.974，RMSE 为 0.084，结果具有统计显着性（F1,5915 = 222900.858，p < 0.001）。通过提供数据趋势的语言总结以及高预测精度的优势，模糊逻辑模型被证明是解决热控制问题的有效机器学习方法。

AI.tldr: 开发模糊逻辑模型预测热指数，基于温度和湿度数据。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理环境变量的不精确性，需利用模糊逻辑捕捉温度与湿度对热指数的复杂关联。
AI.method: 构建模糊推理系统，通过输入温度和湿度数据，建立模糊规则库并优化参数。
AI.conclusion: 模糊逻辑模型兼具高精度与语言解释性，适用于生长室等热控制场景。

authors_text: Ibai Laña,Ignacio,Olabarrieta,Javier Del Ser
title: Measuring the Confidence of Traffic Forecasting Models: Techniques, Experimental Comparison and Guidelines towards Their Actionability
title_zh: 衡量交通预测模型的置信度：技术、实验比较及其可操作性指南
abstract: The estimation of the amount of uncertainty featured by predictive machine learning models has acquired a great momentum in recent years. Uncertainty estimation provides the user with augmented information about the model's confidence in its predicted outcome. Despite the inherent utility of this information for the trustworthiness of the user, there is a thin consensus around the different types of uncertainty that one can gauge in machine learning models and the suitability of different techniques that can be used to quantify the uncertainty of a specific model. This subject is mostly non existent within the traffic modeling domain, even though the measurement of the confidence associated to traffic forecasts can favor significantly their actionability in practical traffic management systems. This work aims to cover this lack of research by reviewing different techniques and metrics of uncertainty available in the literature, and by critically discussing how confidence levels computed for traffic forecasting models can be helpful for researchers and practitioners working in this research area. To shed light with empirical evidence, this critical discussion is further informed by experimental results produced by different uncertainty estimation techniques over real traffic data collected in Madrid (Spain), rendering a general overview of the benefits and caveats of every technique, how they can be compared to each other, and how the measured uncertainty decreases depending on the amount, quality and diversity of data used to produce the forecasts.
summary: The estimation of the amount of uncertainty featured by predictive machine learning models has acquired a great momentum in recent years. Uncertainty estimation provides the user with augmented information about the model's confidence in its predicted outcome. Despite the inherent utility of this information for the trustworthiness of the user, there is a thin consensus around the different types of uncertainty that one can gauge in machine learning models and the suitability of different techniques that can be used to quantify the uncertainty of a specific model. This subject is mostly non existent within the traffic modeling domain, even though the measurement of the confidence associated to traffic forecasts can favor significantly their actionability in practical traffic management systems. This work aims to cover this lack of research by reviewing different techniques and metrics of uncertainty available in the literature, and by critically discussing how confidence levels computed for traffic forecasting models can be helpful for researchers and practitioners working in this research area. To shed light with empirical evidence, this critical discussion is further informed by experimental results produced by different uncertainty estimation techniques over real traffic data collected in Madrid (Spain), rendering a general overview of the benefits and caveats of every technique, how they can be compared to each other, and how the measured uncertainty decreases depending on the amount, quality and diversity of data used to produce the forecasts.
abstract_zh: 近年来，以预测机器学习模型为特征的不确定性估计获得了巨大的发展势头。不确定性估计为用户提供了有关模型对其预测结果的置信度的增强信息。尽管这些信息对于用户的可信度具有固有的效用，但人们在机器学习模型中可以衡量的不同类型的不确定性以及可用于量化特定模型的不确定性的不同技术的适用性方面仍存在薄弱的共识。尽管与交通预测相关的置信度测量可以显着有利于其在实际交通管理系统中的可操作性，但该主题在交通建模领域中基本上不存在。这项工作旨在通过回顾文献中可用的不同技术和不确定性指标，并批判性地讨论为交通预测模型计算的置信水平如何为该研究领域的研究人员和从业者提供帮助，从而弥补研究的不足。为了阐明经验证据，这一批判性讨论进一步参考了不同不确定性估计技术对马德里（西班牙）收集的实际交通数据所产生的实验结果，总体概述了每种技术的优点和注意事项，如何相互比较，以及测量的不确定性如何根据用于生成预测的数据的数量、质量和多样性而降低。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估交通预测模型的置信度，比较不同不确定性估计技术，并为实际应用提供指导。
AI.motivation: 尽管不确定性估计对模型可信度至关重要，但交通预测领域缺乏相关研究，且置信度测量有助于提升实际交通管理系统的实用性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有不确定性估计技术，并在马德里真实交通数据上进行实验，比较不同方法的优缺点。
AI.result: 实验结果展示了不同技术的优缺点，比较了它们的性能，并分析了数据量、质量和多样性对不确定性测量的影响。
AI.conclusion: 结论强调了不确定性估计在提升交通预测模型实用性中的重要性，并为未来研究和应用提供了指导。

authors_text: Masakazu Yoshimura,Junji Otsuka,Atsushi Irie,Takeshi Ohashi
title: Rawgment: Noise-Accounted RAW Augmentation Enables Recognition in a Wide Variety of Environments
title_zh: Rawgment：考虑噪声的 RAW 增强可在各种环境中进行识别
abstract: Image recognition models that work in challenging environments (e.g., extremely dark, blurry, or high dynamic range conditions) must be useful. However, creating training datasets for such environments is expensive and hard due to the difficulties of data collection and annotation. It is desirable if we could get a robust model without the need for hard-to-obtain datasets. One simple approach is to apply data augmentation such as color jitter and blur to standard RGB (sRGB) images in simple scenes. Unfortunately, this approach struggles to yield realistic images in terms of pixel intensity and noise distribution due to not considering the non-linearity of Image Signal Processors (ISPs) and noise characteristics of image sensors. Instead, we propose a noise-accounted RAW image augmentation method. In essence, color jitter and blur augmentation are applied to a RAW image before applying non-linear ISP, resulting in realistic intensity. Furthermore, we introduce a noise amount alignment method that calibrates the domain gap in the noise property caused by the augmentation. We show that our proposed noise-accounted RAW augmentation method doubles the image recognition accuracy in challenging environments only with simple training data.
summary: Image recognition models that work in challenging environments (e.g., extremely dark, blurry, or high dynamic range conditions) must be useful. However, creating training datasets for such environments is expensive and hard due to the difficulties of data collection and annotation. It is desirable if we could get a robust model without the need for hard-to-obtain datasets. One simple approach is to apply data augmentation such as color jitter and blur to standard RGB (sRGB) images in simple scenes. Unfortunately, this approach struggles to yield realistic images in terms of pixel intensity and noise distribution due to not considering the non-linearity of Image Signal Processors (ISPs) and noise characteristics of image sensors. Instead, we propose a noise-accounted RAW image augmentation method. In essence, color jitter and blur augmentation are applied to a RAW image before applying non-linear ISP, resulting in realistic intensity. Furthermore, we introduce a noise amount alignment method that calibrates the domain gap in the noise property caused by the augmentation. We show that our proposed noise-accounted RAW augmentation method doubles the image recognition accuracy in challenging environments only with simple training data.
abstract_zh: 在具有挑战性的环境（例如极暗、模糊或高动态范围条件）下工作的图像识别模型必须有用。然而，由于数据收集和注释的困难，为此类环境创建训练数据集既昂贵又困难。如果我们能够获得一个稳健的模型而不需要难以获得的数据集，那就太好了。一种简单的方法是将颜色抖动和模糊等数据增强应用于简单场景中的标准 RGB (sRGB) 图像。不幸的是，由于没有考虑图像信号处理器（ISP）的非线性和图像传感器的噪声特性，这种方法很难在像素强度和噪声分布方面产生真实的图像。相反，我们提出了一种考虑噪声的 RAW 图像增强方法。本质上，在应用非线性 ISP 之前，颜色抖动和模糊增强会应用于 RAW 图像，从而产生逼真的强度。此外，我们引入了一种噪声量对齐方法，该方法可以校准由增强引起的噪声属性中的域间隙。我们证明，我们提出的考虑噪声的 RAW 增强方法仅使用简单的训练数据即可在具有挑战性的环境中使图像识别精度提高一倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于RAW图像增强的噪声感知方法，以提升复杂环境下的图像识别性能。
AI.motivation: 在极端暗光、模糊或高动态范围等挑战性环境中，现有基于RGB图像的数据增强方法因未考虑图像信号处理器（ISP）非线性特性和传感器噪声，难以生成真实图像，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 在RAW图像上直接应用色彩抖动和模糊增强，再通过非线性ISP处理生成真实像素强度；引入噪声量对齐方法，校正增强过程中引起的噪声特性域间隙。
AI.result: 在仅使用简单训练数据的情况下，所提方法在挑战性环境中的图像识别准确率提升了一倍。
AI.conclusion: 噪声感知的RAW图像增强方法无需依赖昂贵的专用数据集，即可显著提升复杂环境下的模型鲁棒性。

ai_content_json.result: 在仅使用简单训练数据的情况下，所提方法在挑战性环境中的图像识别准确率提升了一倍。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 噪声感知的RAW图像增强方法无需依赖昂贵的专用数据集，即可显著提升复杂环境下的模型鲁棒性。

search_text: Rawgment: Noise-Accounted RAW Augmentation Enables Recognition in a Wide Variety of Environments Rawgment：考虑噪声的 RAW 增强可在各种环境中进行识别 Image recognition models that work in challenging environments (e.g., extremely dark, blurry, or high dynamic range conditions) must be useful. However, creating training datasets for such environments is expensive and hard due to the difficulties of data collection and annotation. It is desirable if we could get a robust model without the need for hard-to-obtain datasets. One simple approach is to apply data augmentation such as color jitter and blur to standard RGB (sRGB) images in simple scenes. Unfortunately, this approach struggles to yield realistic images in terms of pixel intensity and noise distribution due to not considering the non-linearity of Image Signal Processors (ISPs) and noise characteristics of image sensors. Instead, we propose a noise-accounted RAW image augmentation method. In essence, color jitter and blur augmentation are applied to a RAW image before applying non-linear ISP, resulting in realistic intensity. Furthermore, we introduce a noise amount alignment method that calibrates the domain gap in the noise property caused by the augmentation. We show that our proposed noise-accounted RAW augmentation method doubles the image recognition accuracy in challenging environments only with simple training data. 在具有挑战性的环境（例如极暗、模糊或高动态范围条件）下工作的图像识别模型必须有用。然而，由于数据收集和注释的困难，为此类环境创建训练数据集既昂贵又困难。如果我们能够获得一个稳健的模型而不需要难以获得的数据集，那就太好了。一种简单的方法是将颜色抖动和模糊等数据增强应用于简单场景中的标准 RGB (sRGB) 图像。不幸的是，由于没有考虑图像信号处理器（ISP）的非线性和图像传感器的噪声特性，这种方法很难在像素强度和噪声分布方面产生真实的图像。相反，我们提出了一种考虑噪声的 RAW 图像增强方法。本质上，在应用非线性 ISP 之前，颜色抖动和模糊增强会应用于 RAW 图像，从而产生逼真的强度。此外，我们引入了一种噪声量对齐方法，该方法可以校准由增强引起的噪声属性中的域间隙。我们证明，我们提出的考虑噪声的 RAW 增强方法仅使用简单的训练数据即可在具有挑战性的环境中使图像识别精度提高一倍。 本文提出了一种基于RAW图像增强的噪声感知方法，以提升复杂环境下的图像识别性能。 Masakazu Yoshimura,Junji Otsuka,Atsushi Irie,Takeshi Ohashi cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jason Fong,Yun Wang,Prabhav Agrawal,Vimal Manohar,Jilong Wu,Thilo Köhler,Qing He
title: Towards zero-shot Text-based voice editing using acoustic context conditioning, utterance embeddings, and reference encoders
title_zh: 使用声学上下文调节、话语嵌入和参考编码器实现零样本基于文本的语音编辑
abstract: Text-based voice editing (TBVE) uses synthetic output from text-to-speech (TTS) systems to replace words in an original recording. Recent work has used neural models to produce edited speech that is similar to the original speech in terms of clarity, speaker identity, and prosody. However, one limitation of prior work is the usage of finetuning to optimise performance: this requires further model training on data from the target speaker, which is a costly process that may incorporate potentially sensitive data into server-side models. In contrast, this work focuses on the zero-shot approach which avoids finetuning altogether, and instead uses pretrained speaker verification embeddings together with a jointly trained reference encoder to encode utterance-level information that helps capture aspects such as speaker identity and prosody. Subjective listening tests find that both utterance embeddings and a reference encoder improve the continuity of speaker identity and prosody between the edited synthetic speech and unedited original recording in the zero-shot setting.
summary: Text-based voice editing (TBVE) uses synthetic output from text-to-speech (TTS) systems to replace words in an original recording. Recent work has used neural models to produce edited speech that is similar to the original speech in terms of clarity, speaker identity, and prosody. However, one limitation of prior work is the usage of finetuning to optimise performance: this requires further model training on data from the target speaker, which is a costly process that may incorporate potentially sensitive data into server-side models. In contrast, this work focuses on the zero-shot approach which avoids finetuning altogether, and instead uses pretrained speaker verification embeddings together with a jointly trained reference encoder to encode utterance-level information that helps capture aspects such as speaker identity and prosody. Subjective listening tests find that both utterance embeddings and a reference encoder improve the continuity of speaker identity and prosody between the edited synthetic speech and unedited original recording in the zero-shot setting.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的语音编辑 (TBVE) 使用文本转语音 (TTS) 系统的合成输出来替换原始录音中的单词。最近的工作使用神经模型来生成编辑后的语音，在清晰度、说话者身份和韵律方面与原始语音相似。然而，先前工作的一个限制是使用微调来优化性能：这需要对目标说话者的数据进行进一步的模型训练，这是一个成本高昂的过程，可能会将潜在的敏感数据合并到服务器端模型中。相比之下，这项工作侧重于完全避免微调的零样本方法，而是使用预训练的说话人验证嵌入和联合训练的参考编码器来编码有助于捕获说话人身份和韵律等方面的话语级信息。主观听力测试发现，话语嵌入和参考编码器都提高了零样本设置中编辑的合成语音和未经编辑的原始录音之间说话者身份和韵律的连续性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需微调的零样本文本语音编辑方法，通过预训练说话人嵌入和参考编码器实现语音编辑。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖微调目标说话人数据，存在成本高和敏感数据风险，需探索无需微调的零样本解决方案。
AI.method: 结合预训练说话人验证嵌入与联合训练的参考编码器，编码语句级身份和韵律信息进行语音合成。
AI.result: 主观测试表明，该方法在零样本场景下显著提升编辑语音与原始录音在说话人连续性和韵律一致性。
AI.conclusion: 零样本方法有效避免微调需求，未来可优化模型结构或扩展至更多语音编辑场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需微调的零样本文本语音编辑方法，通过预训练说话人嵌入和参考编码器实现语音编辑。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法依赖微调目标说话人数据，存在成本高和敏感数据风险，需探索无需微调的零样本解决方案。

authors_text: Ramon Sanabria,Hao Tang,Sharon Goldwater
title: Analyzing Acoustic Word Embeddings from Pre-trained Self-supervised Speech Models
title_zh: 从预训练的自监督语音模型中分析声学词嵌入
abstract: Given the strong results of self-supervised models on various tasks, there have been surprisingly few studies exploring self-supervised representations for acoustic word embeddings (AWE), fixed-dimensional vectors representing variable-length spoken word segments. In this work, we study several pre-trained models and pooling methods for constructing AWEs with self-supervised representations. Owing to the contextualized nature of self-supervised representations, we hypothesize that simple pooling methods, such as averaging, might already be useful for constructing AWEs. When evaluating on a standard word discrimination task, we find that HuBERT representations with mean-pooling rival the state of the art on English AWEs. More surprisingly, despite being trained only on English, HuBERT representations evaluated on Xitsonga, Mandarin, and French consistently outperform the multilingual model XLSR-53 (as well as Wav2Vec 2.0 trained on English).
summary: Given the strong results of self-supervised models on various tasks, there have been surprisingly few studies exploring self-supervised representations for acoustic word embeddings (AWE), fixed-dimensional vectors representing variable-length spoken word segments. In this work, we study several pre-trained models and pooling methods for constructing AWEs with self-supervised representations. Owing to the contextualized nature of self-supervised representations, we hypothesize that simple pooling methods, such as averaging, might already be useful for constructing AWEs. When evaluating on a standard word discrimination task, we find that HuBERT representations with mean-pooling rival the state of the art on English AWEs. More surprisingly, despite being trained only on English, HuBERT representations evaluated on Xitsonga, Mandarin, and French consistently outperform the multilingual model XLSR-53 (as well as Wav2Vec 2.0 trained on English).
abstract_zh: 鉴于自监督模型在各种任务上取得的强劲成果，令人惊讶的是，很少有研究探索声学词嵌入（AWE）的自监督表示，即表示可变长度口语词段的固定维度向量。在这项工作中，我们研究了几种预训练模型和池化方法，用于构建具有自监督表示的 AWE。由于自监督表示的情境化性质，我们假设简单的池化方法（例如平均）可能已经可用于构建 AWE。在评估标准单词辨别任务时，我们发现采用均值池的 HuBERT 表示可与英语 AWE 的最新技术相媲美。更令人惊讶的是，尽管仅接受英语训练，但在 Xitsonga、普通话和法语上评估的 HuBERT 表示始终优于多语言模型 XLSR-53（以及在英语上训练的 Wav2Vec 2.0）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用预训练自监督语音模型生成声学词嵌入（AWE），并评估不同池化方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督模型在多项任务中表现优异，但针对声学词嵌入（AWE）的研究较少，且未充分探索简单池化方法的潜力。
AI.method: 实验多种预训练自监督模型（如HuBERT、XLSR-53）与池化方法（如平均池化），构建AWE并在词辨别任务中评估性能。
AI.result: HuBERT结合平均池化在英语AWE任务中达到最先进水平，且在Xitsonga、普通话、法语等语言上优于多语言模型XLSR-53。
AI.conclusion: 自监督模型的上下文相关表示使简单池化方法有效，且单语模型HuBERT在跨语言任务中可能优于多语言模型。

authors_text: Max Muzeau,Chengfang Ren,Sébastien Angelliaume,Mihai Datcu,Jean-Philippe Ovarlez
title: Deep Learning-Based Anomaly Detection in Synthetic Aperture Radar Imaging
title_zh: 合成孔径雷达成像中基于深度学习的异常检测
abstract: In this paper, we proposed to investigate unsupervised anomaly detection in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images. Our approach considers anomalies as abnormal patterns that deviate from their surroundings but without any prior knowledge of their characteristics. In the literature, most model-based algorithms face three main issues. First, the speckle noise corrupts the image and potentially leads to numerous false detections. Second, statistical approaches may exhibit deficiencies in modeling spatial correlation in SAR images. Finally, neural networks based on supervised learning approaches are not recommended due to the lack of annotated SAR data, notably for the class of abnormal patterns. Our proposed method aims to address these issues through a self-supervised algorithm. The speckle is first removed through the deep learning SAR2SAR algorithm. Then, an adversarial autoencoder is trained to reconstruct an anomaly-free SAR image. Finally, a change detection processing step is applied between the input and the output to detect anomalies. Experiments are performed to show the advantages of our method compared to the conventional Reed-Xiaoli algorithm, highlighting the importance of an efficient despeckling pre-processing step.
summary: In this paper, we proposed to investigate unsupervised anomaly detection in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images. Our approach considers anomalies as abnormal patterns that deviate from their surroundings but without any prior knowledge of their characteristics. In the literature, most model-based algorithms face three main issues. First, the speckle noise corrupts the image and potentially leads to numerous false detections. Second, statistical approaches may exhibit deficiencies in modeling spatial correlation in SAR images. Finally, neural networks based on supervised learning approaches are not recommended due to the lack of annotated SAR data, notably for the class of abnormal patterns. Our proposed method aims to address these issues through a self-supervised algorithm. The speckle is first removed through the deep learning SAR2SAR algorithm. Then, an adversarial autoencoder is trained to reconstruct an anomaly-free SAR image. Finally, a change detection processing step is applied between the input and the output to detect anomalies. Experiments are performed to show the advantages of our method compared to the conventional Reed-Xiaoli algorithm, highlighting the importance of an efficient despeckling pre-processing step.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出研究合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像中的无监督异常检测。我们的方法将异常视为偏离周围环境但事先不了解其特征的异常模式。在文献中，大多数基于模型的算法面临三个主要问题。首先，散斑噪声会破坏图像并可能导致大量错误检测。其次，统计方法在 SAR 图像空间相关性建模方面可能存在缺陷。最后，由于缺乏带注释的 SAR 数据，特别是对于异常模式类别，不推荐基于监督学习方法的神经网络。我们提出的方法旨在通过自我监督算法来解决这些问题。首先通过深度学习SAR2SAR算法去除散斑。然后，训练对抗性自动编码器来重建无异常的 SAR 图像。最后，在输入和输出之间应用变化检测处理步骤以检测异常。实验结果表明，与传统的 Reed-Xiaooli 算法相比，我们的方法具有优势，强调了高效去斑预处理步骤的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的无监督方法，用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像的异常检测，解决传统方法在去噪、空间建模和数据标注方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统SAR图像异常检测方法存在斑点噪声导致误报、统计模型空间相关性建模不足及监督学习缺乏标注数据等问题，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用自监督算法：1）用SAR2SAR网络去除斑点噪声；2）训练对抗自编码器重建无异常图像；3）通过输入输出差异检测异常。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于传统Reed-Xiaoli算法，验证了有效去噪预处理对提升异常检测性能的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自监督框架有效解决了SAR图像异常检测的核心挑战，为无监督场景提供了可行的技术路径。

search_text: Deep Learning-Based Anomaly Detection in Synthetic Aperture Radar Imaging 合成孔径雷达成像中基于深度学习的异常检测 In this paper, we proposed to investigate unsupervised anomaly detection in Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) images. Our approach considers anomalies as abnormal patterns that deviate from their surroundings but without any prior knowledge of their characteristics. In the literature, most model-based algorithms face three main issues. First, the speckle noise corrupts the image and potentially leads to numerous false detections. Second, statistical approaches may exhibit deficiencies in modeling spatial correlation in SAR images. Finally, neural networks based on supervised learning approaches are not recommended due to the lack of annotated SAR data, notably for the class of abnormal patterns. Our proposed method aims to address these issues through a self-supervised algorithm. The speckle is first removed through the deep learning SAR2SAR algorithm. Then, an adversarial autoencoder is trained to reconstruct an anomaly-free SAR image. Finally, a change detection processing step is applied between the input and the output to detect anomalies. authors_text: Changjie Lu
title: A Survey on Causal Representation Learning and Future Work for Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: 因果表示学习和医学图像分析未来工作的调查
abstract: Statistical machine learning algorithms have achieved state-of-the-art results on benchmark datasets, outperforming humans in many tasks. However, the out-of-distribution data and confounder, which have an unpredictable causal relationship, significantly degrade the performance of the existing models. Causal Representation Learning (CRL) has recently been a promising direction to address the causal relationship problem in vision understanding. This survey presents recent advances in CRL in vision. Firstly, we introduce the basic concept of causal inference. Secondly, we analyze the CRL theoretical work, especially in invariant risk minimization, and the practical work in feature understanding and transfer learning. Finally, we propose a future research direction in medical image analysis and CRL general theory.
summary: Statistical machine learning algorithms have achieved state-of-the-art results on benchmark datasets, outperforming humans in many tasks. However, the out-of-distribution data and confounder, which have an unpredictable causal relationship, significantly degrade the performance of the existing models. Causal Representation Learning (CRL) has recently been a promising direction to address the causal relationship problem in vision understanding. This survey presents recent advances in CRL in vision. Firstly, we introduce the basic concept of causal inference. Secondly, we analyze the CRL theoretical work, especially in invariant risk minimization, and the practical work in feature understanding and transfer learning. Finally, we propose a future research direction in medical image analysis and CRL general theory.
abstract_zh: 统计机器学习算法在基准数据集上取得了最先进的结果，在许多任务中优于人类。然而，分布外的数据和混杂因素具有不可预测的因果关系，显着降低了现有模型的性能。因果表示学习（CRL）最近成为解决视觉理解中因果关系问题的一个有前途的方向。这项调查展示了 CRL 在视觉领域的最新进展。首先，我们介绍因果推理的基本概念。其次，我们分析了 CRL 的理论工作，特别是在不变风险最小化方面，以及在特征理解和迁移学习方面的实际工作。最后，我们提出了医学图像分析和CRL一般理论的未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 综述因果表征学习（CRL）在视觉领域的最新进展，并探讨其在医学图像分析中的未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习模型在处理分布外数据和混杂因素时性能显著下降，而因果推理能有效解决此类因果关系问题。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析CRL的理论基础（如不变风险最小化）及实际应用（特征理解、迁移学习），并提出医学图像分析的未来方向。
AI.result: 系统梳理了CRL的理论与实践进展，明确了其在医学图像分析中的潜力，并指出了通用理论构建和跨领域应用的挑战。
AI.conclusion: CRL为解决医学图像分析中的因果偏差问题提供了新思路，但需进一步探索其通用理论框架与实际落地方法。

authors_text: Masato Kikuchi,Tadachika Ozono
title: Improving Multi-class Classifier Using Likelihood Ratio Estimation with Regularization
title_zh: 使用似然比估计和正则化改进多类分类器
comment: The 9th International Conference on Advanced Informatics: Concepts, Theory and Applications (ICAICTA 2022)
comments: The 9th International Conference on Advanced Informatics: Concepts, Theory and Applications (ICAICTA 2022)
abstract: The universal-set naive Bayes classifier (UNB)~\cite{Komiya:13}, defined using likelihood ratios (LRs), was proposed to address imbalanced classification problems. However, the LR estimator used in the UNB overestimates LRs for low-frequency data, degrading the classification performance. Our previous study~\cite{Kikuchi:19} proposed an effective LR estimator even for low-frequency data. This estimator uses regularization to suppress the overestimation, but we did not consider imbalanced data. In this paper, we integrated the estimator with the UNB. Our experiments with imbalanced data showed that our proposed classifier effectively adjusts the classification scores according to the class balance using regularization parameters and improves the classification performance.
summary: The universal-set naive Bayes classifier (UNB)~\cite{Komiya:13}, defined using likelihood ratios (LRs), was proposed to address imbalanced classification problems. However, the LR estimator used in the UNB overestimates LRs for low-frequency data, degrading the classification performance. Our previous study~\cite{Kikuchi:19} proposed an effective LR estimator even for low-frequency data. This estimator uses regularization to suppress the overestimation, but we did not consider imbalanced data. In this paper, we integrated the estimator with the UNB. Our experiments with imbalanced data showed that our proposed classifier effectively adjusts the classification scores according to the class balance using regularization parameters and improves the classification performance.
abstract_zh: 提出使用似然比（LR）定义的通用集朴素贝叶斯分类器（UNB）~\cite{Komiya:13}来解决不平衡的分类问题。然而，UNB 中使用的 LR 估计器高估了低频数据的 LR，从而降低了分类性能。我们之前的研究~\cite{Kikuchi:19}提出了一种有效的 LR 估计器，即使对于低频数据也是如此。该估计器使用正则化来抑制高估，但我们没有考虑不平衡数据。在本文中，我们将估计器与 UNB 集成。我们对不平衡数据的实验表明，我们提出的分类器使用正则化参数根据类平衡有效地调整分类分数，并提高分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合正则化的似然比估计方法，改进了处理不平衡数据的多分类分类器性能。
AI.motivation: 现有UNB分类器在低频数据上存在似然比高估问题，且未充分考虑不平衡数据场景下的性能优化需求。
AI.method: 将正则化似然比估计器与UNB分类器结合，通过调节正则化参数动态调整分类得分以适应类别分布差异。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效提升不平衡数据集上的分类准确率，验证了正则化参数对分类性能的优化作用。
AI.conclusion: 正则化似然比估计与UNB框架的结合为解决不平衡分类问题提供了有效技术路径。

Our previous study~\cite{Kikuchi:19} proposed an effective LR estimator even for low-frequency data. This estimator uses regularization to suppress the overestimation, but we did not consider imbalanced data. In this paper, we integrated the estimator with the UNB. Our experiments with imbalanced data showed that our proposed classifier effectively adjusts the classification scores according to the class balance using regularization parameters and improves the classification performance. 提出使用似然比（LR）定义的通用集朴素贝叶斯分类器（UNB）~\cite{Komiya:13}来解决不平衡的分类问题。然而，UNB 中使用的 LR 估计器高估了低频数据的 LR，从而降低了分类性能。我们之前的研究~\cite{Kikuchi:19}提出了一种有效的 LR 估计器，即使对于低频数据也是如此。该估计器使用正则化来抑制高估，但我们没有考虑不平衡数据。在本文中，我们将估计器与 UNB 集成。我们对不平衡数据的实验表明，我们提出的分类器使用正则化参数根据类平衡有效地调整分类分数，并提高分类性能。 本文提出了一种结合正则化的似然比估计方法，改进了处理不平衡数据的多分类分类器性能。 Masato Kikuchi,Tadachika Ozono cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Junyi Peng,Themos Stafylakis,Rongzhi Gu,Oldřich Plchot,Ladislav Mošner,Lukáš Burget,Jan Černocký
title: Parameter-efficient transfer learning of pre-trained Transformer models for speaker verification using adapters
title_zh: 使用适配器对预训练 Transformer 模型进行参数高效迁移学习，用于说话人验证
abstract: Recently, the pre-trained Transformer models have received a rising interest in the field of speech processing thanks to their great success in various downstream tasks. However, most fine-tuning approaches update all the parameters of the pre-trained model, which becomes prohibitive as the model size grows and sometimes results in overfitting on small datasets. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of applying parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) methods to reduce the required learnable parameters for adapting to speaker verification tasks. Specifically, during the fine-tuning process, the pre-trained models are frozen, and only lightweight modules inserted in each Transformer block are trainable (a method known as adapters). Moreover, to boost the performance in a cross-language low-resource scenario, the Transformer model is further tuned on a large intermediate dataset before directly fine-tuning it on a small dataset. With updating fewer than 4% of parameters, (our proposed) PETL-based methods achieve comparable performances with full fine-tuning methods (Vox1-O: 0.55%, Vox1-E: 0.82%, Vox1-H:1.73%).
summary: Recently, the pre-trained Transformer models have received a rising interest in the field of speech processing thanks to their great success in various downstream tasks. However, most fine-tuning approaches update all the parameters of the pre-trained model, which becomes prohibitive as the model size grows and sometimes results in overfitting on small datasets. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of applying parameter-efficient transfer learning (PETL) methods to reduce the required learnable parameters for adapting to speaker verification tasks. Specifically, during the fine-tuning process, the pre-trained models are frozen, and only lightweight modules inserted in each Transformer block are trainable (a method known as adapters). Moreover, to boost the performance in a cross-language low-resource scenario, the Transformer model is further tuned on a large intermediate dataset before directly fine-tuning it on a small dataset. With updating fewer than 4% of parameters, (our proposed) PETL-based methods achieve comparable performances with full fine-tuning methods (Vox1-O: 0.55%, Vox1-E: 0.82%, Vox1-H:1.73%).
abstract_zh: 最近，预训练的 Transformer 模型由于在各种下游任务中取得了巨大成功，在语音处理领域受到了越来越多的关注。然而，大多数微调方法都会更新预训练模型的所有参数，随着模型大小的增长，这会变得令人望而却步，有时会导致小数据集上的过度拟合。在本文中，我们对应用参数高效迁移学习（PETL）方法来减少适应说话人验证任务所需的可学习参数进行了全面分析。具体来说，在微调过程中，预训练的模型被冻结，只有插入每个 Transformer 块中的轻量级模块才可训练（这种方法称为适配器）。此外，为了提高跨语言低资源场景下的性能，Transformer 模型在大型中间数据集上进一步调优，然后直接在小型数据集上进行微调。通过更新不到 4％ 的参数，（我们提出的）基于 PETL 的方法实现了与完全微调方法相当的性能（Vox1-O：0.55％，Vox1-E：0.82％，Vox1-H：1.73％）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过参数高效迁移学习方法（PETL）结合适配器模块，减少预训练Transformer模型在说话人验证任务中的可学习参数量。
AI.motivation: 传统微调方法更新所有参数导致计算成本高且易过拟合，尤其在小数据集和跨语言低资源场景下效果不佳。
AI.method: 冻结预训练模型参数，在每个Transformer块中插入轻量级适配器模块进行训练；并先在大规模中间数据集上预训练，再在小数据集上微调。
AI.result: 仅更新不足4%参数的情况下，PETL方法在Vox1-O/E/H数据集上分别达到0.55%/0.82%/1.73%的验证性能，与全参数微调方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 适配器模块结合两阶段训练策略能有效降低参数开销，同时保持说话人验证性能，为低资源场景下的模型优化提供可行方案。

authors_text: Wei Li,Xue Xu,Xinyan Xiao,Jiachen Liu,Hu Yang,Guohao Li,Zhanpeng Wang,Zhifan Feng,Qiaoqiao She,Yajuan Lyu,Hua Wu
title: UPainting: Unified Text-to-Image Diffusion Generation with Cross-modal Guidance
title_zh: UPainting：具有跨模态指导的统一文本到图像扩散生成
abstract: Diffusion generative models have recently greatly improved the power of text-conditioned image generation. Existing image generation models mainly include text conditional diffusion model and cross-modal guided diffusion model, which are good at small scene image generation and complex scene image generation respectively. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective approach, namely UPainting, to unify simple and complex scene image generation, as shown in Figure 1. Based on architecture improvements and diverse guidance schedules, UPainting effectively integrates cross-modal guidance from a pretrained image-text matching model into a text conditional diffusion model that utilizes a pretrained Transformer language model as the text encoder. Our key findings is that combining the power of large-scale Transformer language model in understanding language and image-text matching model in capturing cross-modal semantics and style, is effective to improve sample fidelity and image-text alignment of image generation. In this way, UPainting has a more general image generation capability, which can generate images of both simple and complex scenes more effectively. To comprehensively compare text-to-image models, we further create a more general benchmark, UniBench, with well-written Chinese and English prompts in both simple and complex scenes. We compare UPainting with recent models and find that UPainting greatly outperforms other models in terms of caption similarity and image fidelity in both simple and complex scenes. UPainting project page \url{https://upainting.github.io/}.
summary: Diffusion generative models have recently greatly improved the power of text-conditioned image generation. Existing image generation models mainly include text conditional diffusion model and cross-modal guided diffusion model, which are good at small scene image generation and complex scene image generation respectively. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective approach, namely UPainting, to unify simple and complex scene image generation, as shown in Figure 1. Based on architecture improvements and diverse guidance schedules, UPainting effectively integrates cross-modal guidance from a pretrained image-text matching model into a text conditional diffusion model that utilizes a pretrained Transformer language model as the text encoder. Our key findings is that combining the power of large-scale Transformer language model in understanding language and image-text matching model in capturing cross-modal semantics and style, is effective to improve sample fidelity and image-text alignment of image generation. In this way, UPainting has a more general image generation capability, which can generate images of both simple and complex scenes more effectively. To comprehensively compare text-to-image models, we further create a more general benchmark, UniBench, with well-written Chinese and English prompts in both simple and complex scenes. We compare UPainting with recent models and find that UPainting greatly outperforms other models in terms of caption similarity and image fidelity in both simple and complex scenes. UPainting project page \url{https://upainting.github.io/}.
abstract_zh: 扩散生成模型最近极大地提高了文本条件图像生成的能力。现有的图像生成模型主要包括文本条件扩散模型和跨模态引导扩散模型，分别擅长小场景图像生成和复杂场景图像生成。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，即 UPainting，来统一简单和复杂的场景图像生成，如图 1 所示。基于架构改进和多样化的指导计划，UPainting 有效地将预训练的图像文本匹配模型的跨模态指导集成到使用预训练的 Transformer 语言模型作为文本编码器的文本条件扩散模型中。我们的主要发现是，将大规模 Transformer 语言模型在理解语言方面的能力与图像文本匹配模型在捕获跨模态语义和风格方面的能力相结合，可以有效提高图像生成的样本保真度和图像文本对齐。这样，UPainting就具备了更通用的图像生成能力，无论是简单场景还是复杂场景的图像都可以更有效地生成。为了全面比较文本到图像的模型，我们进一步创建了一个更通用的基准测试UniBench，在简单和复杂的场景中都提供了良好的中英文提示。我们将 UPainting 与最新模型进行比较，发现无论是简单场景还是复杂场景，UPainting 在标题相似度和图像保真度方面都远远优于其他模型。 UPainting 项目页面 \url{https://upainting.github.io/}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UPainting模型，通过结合跨模态引导与文本条件扩散生成，统一处理简单和复杂场景的文本到图像生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型分别擅长简单场景和复杂场景，缺乏统一框架，难以兼顾两者生成效果。
AI.method: 改进扩散模型架构并设计多样化引导策略，整合预训练Transformer语言模型与图像-文本匹配模型的跨模态语义信息。
AI.result: 在自建基准UniBench上，UPainting在中英文提示的简单和复杂场景中均显著优于现有模型，提升图像真实性与文本一致性。
AI.conclusion: UPainting通过跨模态融合实现更通用的图像生成能力，为文本到图像生成提供统一解决方案。

authors_text: Zhiyi Wang,Shaoguang Mao,Wenshan Wu,Yan Xia
title: Assessing Phrase Break of ESL speech with Pre-trained Language Models
title_zh: 使用预训练语言模型评估 ESL 语音的断句
abstract: This work introduces an approach to assessing phrase break in ESL learners' speech with pre-trained language models (PLMs). Different with traditional methods, this proposal converts speech to token sequences, and then leverages the power of PLMs. There are two sub-tasks: overall assessment of phrase break for a speech clip; fine-grained assessment of every possible phrase break position. Speech input is first force-aligned with texts, then pre-processed to a token sequence, including words and associated phrase break information. The token sequence is then fed into the pre-training and fine-tuning pipeline. In pre-training, a replaced break token detection module is trained with token data where each token has a certain percentage chance to be randomly replaced. In fine-tuning, overall and fine-grained scoring are optimized with text classification and sequence labeling pipeline, respectively. With the introduction of PLMs, the dependence on labeled training data has been greatly reduced, and performance has improved.
summary: This work introduces an approach to assessing phrase break in ESL learners' speech with pre-trained language models (PLMs). Different with traditional methods, this proposal converts speech to token sequences, and then leverages the power of PLMs. There are two sub-tasks: overall assessment of phrase break for a speech clip; fine-grained assessment of every possible phrase break position. Speech input is first force-aligned with texts, then pre-processed to a token sequence, including words and associated phrase break information. The token sequence is then fed into the pre-training and fine-tuning pipeline. In pre-training, a replaced break token detection module is trained with token data where each token has a certain percentage chance to be randomly replaced. In fine-tuning, overall and fine-grained scoring are optimized with text classification and sequence labeling pipeline, respectively. With the introduction of PLMs, the dependence on labeled training data has been greatly reduced, and performance has improved.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了一种使用预训练语言模型 (PLM) 评估 ESL 学习者语音中的断句的方法。与传统方法不同，该提案将语音转换为令牌序列，然后利用 PLM 的强大功能。有两个子任务：对语音片段的断句进行总体评估；对每个可能的断句位置进行细粒度的评估。语音输入首先与文本强制对齐，然后预处理为标记序列，包括单词和相关的短语中断信息。然后将令牌序列输入到预训练和微调管道中。在预训练中，替换的中断令牌检测模块使用令牌数据进行训练，其中每个令牌都有一定百分比的机会被随机替换。在微调中，整体和细粒度评分分别通过文本分类和序列标记管道进行优化。随着 PLM 的引入，对标记训练数据的依赖大大减少，性能也得到了提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用预训练语言模型评估英语作为第二语言学习者语音中的语篇断裂问题，包含整体评估和细粒度位置评估两个子任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量标注数据且效果有限，而预训练语言模型能通过迁移学习减少对标注数据的依赖并提升性能。
AI.method: 将语音强制对齐后转换为包含断裂信息的标记序列，预训练阶段通过随机替换断裂标记训练检测模块，微调阶段分别用文本分类（整体评估）和序列标注（细粒度评估）优化模型。
AI.result: 显著降低对标注数据的依赖，同时提升整体和细粒度评估的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 预训练语言模型为语篇断裂评估提供了有效解决方案，未来可进一步探索多模态融合与跨语言迁移。

search_text: Assessing Phrase Break of ESL speech with Pre-trained Language Models 使用预训练语言模型评估 ESL 语音的断句 This work introduces an approach to assessing phrase break in ESL learners' speech with pre-trained language models (PLMs). Different with traditional methods, this proposal converts speech to token sequences, and then leverages the power of PLMs. There are two sub-tasks: overall assessment of phrase break for a speech clip; fine-grained assessment of every possible phrase break position. Speech input is first force-aligned with texts, then pre-processed to a token sequence, including words and associated phrase break information. The token sequence is then fed into the pre-training and fine-tuning pipeline. In pre-training, a replaced break token detection module is trained with token data where each token has a certain percentage chance to be randomly replaced. In fine-tuning, overall and fine-grained scoring are optimized with text classification and sequence labeling pipeline, respectively. With the introduction of PLMs, the dependence on labeled training data has been greatly reduced, and performance has improved. 这项工作介绍了一种使用预训练语言模型 (PLM) 评估 ESL 学习者语音中的断句的方法。与传统方法不同，该提案将语音转换为令牌序列，然后利用 PLM 的强大功能。有两个子任务：对语音片段的断句进行总体评估；对每个可能的断句位置进行细粒度的评估。语音输入首先与文本强制对齐，然后预处理为标记序列，包括单词和相关的短语中断信息。然后将令牌序列输入到预训练和微调管道中。在预训练中，替换的中断令牌检测模块使用令牌数据进行训练，其中每个令牌都有一定百分比的机会被随机替换。在微调中，整体和细粒度评分分别通过文本分类和序列标记管道进行优化。随着 PLM 的引入，对标记训练数据的依赖大大减少，性能也得到了提高。 本文提出使用预训练语言模型评估英语作为第二语言学习者语音中的语篇断裂问题，包含整体评估和细粒度位置评估两个子任务。 Zhiyi Wang,Shaoguang Mao,Wenshan Wu,Yan Xia cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuke Lin,Xiaoyi Qin,Huahua Cui,Zhenyi Zhu,Ming Li
title: Laugh Betrays You? Learning Robust Speaker Representation From Speech Containing Non-Verbal Fragments
title_zh: 笑背叛了你？从包含非语言片段的语音中学习鲁棒的说话者表征
comment: see 2308.07056 which is a newer version of this work
comments: see 2308.07056 which is a newer version of this work
abstract: The success of automatic speaker verification shows that discriminative speaker representations can be extracted from neutral speech. However, as a kind of non-verbal voice, laughter should also carry speaker information intuitively. Thus, this paper focuses on exploring speaker verification about utterances containing non-verbal laughter segments. We collect a set of clips with laughter components by conducting a laughter detection script on VoxCeleb and part of the CN-Celeb dataset. To further filter untrusted clips, probability scores are calculated by our binary laughter detection classifier, which is pre-trained by pure laughter and neutral speech. After that, based on the clips whose scores are over the threshold, we construct trials under two different evaluation scenarios: Laughter-Laughter (LL) and Speech-Laughter (SL). Then a novel method called Laughter-Splicing based Network (LSN) is proposed, which can significantly boost performance in both scenarios and maintain the performance on the neutral speech, such as the VoxCeleb1 test set. Specifically, our system achieves relative 20% and 22% improvement on Laughter-Laughter and Speech-Laughter trials, respectively. The meta-data and sample clips have been released at https://github.com/nevermoreLin/Laugh_LSN.
summary: The success of automatic speaker verification shows that discriminative speaker representations can be extracted from neutral speech. However, as a kind of non-verbal voice, laughter should also carry speaker information intuitively. Thus, this paper focuses on exploring speaker verification about utterances containing non-verbal laughter segments. We collect a set of clips with laughter components by conducting a laughter detection script on VoxCeleb and part of the CN-Celeb dataset. To further filter untrusted clips, probability scores are calculated by our binary laughter detection classifier, which is pre-trained by pure laughter and neutral speech. After that, based on the clips whose scores are over the threshold, we construct trials under two different evaluation scenarios: Laughter-Laughter (LL) and Speech-Laughter (SL). Then a novel method called Laughter-Splicing based Network (LSN) is proposed, which can significantly boost performance in both scenarios and maintain the performance on the neutral speech, such as the VoxCeleb1 test set. Specifically, our system achieves relative 20% and 22% improvement on Laughter-Laughter and Speech-Laughter trials, respectively. The meta-data and sample clips have been released at https://github.com/nevermoreLin/Laugh_LSN.
abstract_zh: 自动说话人验证的成功表明，可以从中性语音中提取有区别的说话人表示。然而，笑声作为一种非语言的声音，也应该直观地承载说话人的信息。因此，本文重点探讨对包含非语言笑声片段的话语进行说话人验证。我们通过在 VoxCeleb 和 CN-Celeb 数据集的一部分上执行笑声检测脚本来收集一组包含笑声成分的剪辑。为了进一步过滤不受信任的剪辑，通过我们的二元笑声检测分类器计算概率分数，该分类器是通过纯笑声和中性语音进行预训练的。之后，根据分数超过阈值的剪辑，我们在两种不同的评估场景下构建试验：笑声（LL）和言语-笑声（SL）。然后提出了一种称为基于笑声拼接的网络（LSN）的新颖方法，该方法可以显着提高两种场景下的性能并保持中性语音（例如 VoxCeleb1 测试集）上的性能。具体来说，我们的系统在笑声和言语笑声试验上分别实现了 20% 和 22% 的相对改进。元数据和示例剪辑已在 https://github.com/nevermoreLin/Laugh_LSN 发布。

AI.tldr: 研究包含笑声的语音中的说话人验证问题，探索如何从含有非语言笑声片段的语音中提取鲁棒的说话人表示。
AI.motivation: 尽管中性语音能提取说话人信息，但笑声作为非语言声音可能也包含潜在信息，现有研究缺乏对此的有效利用，需探索其在说话人验证中的应用。
AI.method: 通过笑声检测脚本收集含笑声的语音片段，使用预训练分类器筛选可靠数据，构建两种评估场景，并提出LSN网络，结合笑声和语音信息提升验证性能。
AI.result: 在Laughter-Laughter和Speech-Laughter场景下分别提升20%和22%，同时保持中性语音验证性能，如VoxCeleb1测试集。
AI.conclusion: 证明笑声信息可用于提升说话人验证，LSN方法在多种场景下有效，且不影响中性语音性能，为非语言片段的利用提供新思路。
