authors_text: Max Pascher,Til Franzen,Kirill Kronhardt,Jens Gerken
title: Extending Cobot's Motion Intention Visualization by Haptic Feedback
title_zh: 通过触觉反馈扩展协作机器人的运动意图可视化
abstract: Nowadays, robots are found in a growing number of areas where they collaborate closely with humans. Enabled by lightweight materials and safety sensors, these cobots are gaining increasing popularity in domestic care, supporting people with physical impairments in their everyday lives. However, when cobots perform actions autonomously, it remains challenging for human collaborators to understand and predict their behavior, which is crucial for achieving trust and user acceptance. One significant aspect of predicting cobot behavior is understanding their motion intention and comprehending how they "think" about their actions. Moreover, other information sources often occupy human visual and audio modalities, rendering them frequently unsuitable for transmitting such information. We work on a solution that communicates cobot intention via haptic feedback to tackle this challenge. In our concept, we map planned motions of the cobot to different haptic patterns to extend the visual intention feedback.
summary: Nowadays, robots are found in a growing number of areas where they collaborate closely with humans. Enabled by lightweight materials and safety sensors, these cobots are gaining increasing popularity in domestic care, supporting people with physical impairments in their everyday lives. However, when cobots perform actions autonomously, it remains challenging for human collaborators to understand and predict their behavior, which is crucial for achieving trust and user acceptance. One significant aspect of predicting cobot behavior is understanding their motion intention and comprehending how they "think" about their actions. Moreover, other information sources often occupy human visual and audio modalities, rendering them frequently unsuitable for transmitting such information. We work on a solution that communicates cobot intention via haptic feedback to tackle this challenge. In our concept, we map planned motions of the cobot to different haptic patterns to extend the visual intention feedback.
abstract_zh: 如今，机器人出现在越来越多的领域，与人类密切合作。这些协作机器人采用轻质材料和安全传感器，在家庭护理领域越来越受欢迎，为身体有缺陷的人们提供日常生活支持。然而，当协作机器人自主执行操作时，人类协作者理解和预测其行为仍然具有挑战性，这对于获得信任和用户接受度至关重要。预测协作机器人行为的一个重要方面是了解他们的运动意图并理解他们如何“思考”自己的行为。此外，其他信息源通常占据人类的视觉和听觉方式，使得它们常常不适合传输此类信息。我们致力于开发一种通过触觉反馈传达协作机器人意图的解决方案，以应对这一挑战。在我们的概念中，我们将协作机器人的计划运动映射到不同的触觉模式，以扩展视觉意图反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过触觉反馈扩展协作机器人（Cobot）运动意图的可视化方法，以提升人类协作者对其行为的理解和预测能力。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人自主执行任务时，人类协作者难以理解其行为意图，而视觉和听觉通道常被其他信息占用，亟需替代方案增强信任与接受度。
AI.method: 将机器人预规划的运动轨迹映射为不同的触觉反馈模式，通过触觉通道传递运动意图信息。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法能有效辅助用户理解机器人的运动意图，提升人机协作的可预测性与安全性。

search_text: Extending Cobot's Motion Intention Visualization by Haptic Feedback 通过触觉反馈扩展协作机器人的运动意图可视化 Nowadays, robots are found in a growing number of areas where they collaborate closely with humans. Enabled by lightweight materials and safety sensors, these cobots are gaining increasing popularity in domestic care, supporting people with physical impairments in their everyday lives. However, when cobots perform actions autonomously, it remains challenging for human collaborators to understand and predict their behavior, which is crucial for achieving trust and user acceptance. One significant aspect of predicting cobot behavior is understanding their motion intention and comprehending how they "think" about their actions. Moreover, other information sources often occupy human visual and audio modalities, rendering them frequently unsuitable for transmitting such information. We work on a solution that communicates cobot intention via haptic feedback to tackle this challenge. In our concept, we map planned motions of the cobot to different haptic patterns to extend the visual intention feedback. 如今，机器人出现在越来越多的领域，与人类密切合作。这些协作机器人采用轻质材料和安全传感器，在家庭护理领域越来越受欢迎，为身体有缺陷的人们提供日常生活支持。然而，当协作机器人自主执行操作时，人类协作者理解和预测其行为仍然具有挑战性，这对于获得信任和用户接受度至关重要。预测协作机器人行为的一个重要方面是了解他们的运动意图并理解他们如何“思考”自己的行为。此外，其他信息源通常占据人类的视觉和听觉方式，使得它们常常不适合传输此类信息。我们致力于开发一种通过触觉反馈传达协作机器人意图的解决方案，以应对这一挑战。在我们的概念中，我们将协作机器人的计划运动映射到不同的触觉模式，以扩展视觉意图反馈。 本文提出通过触觉反馈扩展协作机器人（Cobot）运动意图的可视化方法，以提升人类协作者对其行为的理解和预测能力。 Max Pascher,Til Franzen,Kirill Kronhardt,Jens Gerken cs.HC,cs.RO

authors_text: Lishuai Jin,Yueying Yang,Bryan O. Torres Maldonado,Sebastian David Lee,Nadia Figueroa,Robert J. Full,Shu Yang
title: Ultra-fast, programmable, and electronics-free soft robots enabled by snapping metacaps
title_zh: 通过捕捉元电容实现超快速、可编程且无电子的软机器人
abstract: Soft robots have a myriad of potentials because of their intrinsically compliant bodies, enabling safe interactions with humans and adaptability to unpredictable environments. However, most of them have limited actuation speeds, require complex control systems, and lack sensing capabilities. To address these challenges, here we geometrically design a class of metacaps whose rich nonlinear mechanical behaviors can be harnessed to create soft robots with unprecedented functionalities. Specifically, we demonstrate a sensor-less metacap gripper that can grasp objects in 3.75 ms upon physical contact and a pneumatically actuated gripper with tunable actuation behaviors that have little dependence on the rate of input. Both grippers can be readily integrated into a robotic platform for practical applications. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the metacap enables propelling of a swimming robot, exhibiting amplified swimming speed as well as untethered, electronics-free swimming with tunable speeds. Our metacaps provide new strategies to design the next-generation soft robots that require high transient output energy and are capable of autonomous and electronics-free maneuvering.
summary: Soft robots have a myriad of potentials because of their intrinsically compliant bodies, enabling safe interactions with humans and adaptability to unpredictable environments. However, most of them have limited actuation speeds, require complex control systems, and lack sensing capabilities. To address these challenges, here we geometrically design a class of metacaps whose rich nonlinear mechanical behaviors can be harnessed to create soft robots with unprecedented functionalities. Specifically, we demonstrate a sensor-less metacap gripper that can grasp objects in 3.75 ms upon physical contact and a pneumatically actuated gripper with tunable actuation behaviors that have little dependence on the rate of input. Both grippers can be readily integrated into a robotic platform for practical applications. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the metacap enables propelling of a swimming robot, exhibiting amplified swimming speed as well as untethered, electronics-free swimming with tunable speeds. Our metacaps provide new strategies to design the next-generation soft robots that require high transient output energy and are capable of autonomous and electronics-free maneuvering.
abstract_zh: 软机器人因其本质上柔顺的身体而具有无数的潜力，可以与人类安全互动并适应不可预测的环境。然而，它们大多数的驱动速度有限，需要复杂的控制系统，并且缺乏传感能力。为了应对这些挑战，我们在这里从几何角度设计了一类元电容，可以利用其丰富的非线性机械行为来创建具有前所未有的功能的软机器人。具体来说，我们演示了一种无传感器元帽夹具，可以在物理接触后 3.75 毫秒内抓取物体，以及一种气动夹具，其可调节驱动行为，几乎不依赖于输入速率。两个夹具都可以轻松集成到机器人平台中以供实际应用。此外，我们还证明，metacap 能够推动游泳机器人，表现出放大的游泳速度以及不受束缚、无电子设备且速度可调的游泳能力。我们的元电容提供了设计下一代软机器人的新策略，这些机器人需要高瞬态输出能量，并且能够进行自主和无电子操纵。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于 snapping metacaps 的新型软体机器人，实现超快速、可编程且无需电子设备的自主操作。
AI.motivation: 现有软体机器人存在驱动速度慢、依赖复杂电子控制系统及缺乏感知能力等局限，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 通过几何设计具有非线性机械特性的 snapping metacaps 结构，利用其机械行为直接驱动机器人执行任务。
AI.result: 实现 3.75 毫秒快速抓取、可调速气动抓取及自主游动的软体机器人，无需电子设备和传感器。
AI.conclusion: snapping metacaps 为下一代高能量输出、自主操作的电子无关软体机器人提供了新设计范式。

authors_text: M. R. Ahan,Robin Lehmann,Richard Blythman
title: Addressing Bias in Face Detectors using Decentralised Data collection with incentives
title_zh: 使用去中心化数据收集和激励措施解决人脸检测器中的偏差
comment: 8 pages. Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Decentralization & Trustworthy Machine Learning in Web3
comments: 8 pages. Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Decentralization & Trustworthy Machine Learning in Web3
abstract: Recent developments in machine learning have shown that successful models do not rely only on huge amounts of data but the right kind of data. We show in this paper how this data-centric approach can be facilitated in a decentralized manner to enable efficient data collection for algorithms. Face detectors are a class of models that suffer heavily from bias issues as they have to work on a large variety of different data. We also propose a face detection and anonymization approach using a hybrid MultiTask Cascaded CNN with FaceNet Embeddings to benchmark multiple datasets to describe and evaluate the bias in the models towards different ethnicities, gender, and age groups along with ways to enrich fairness in a decentralized system of data labeling, correction, and verification by users to create a robust pipeline for model retraining.
summary: Recent developments in machine learning have shown that successful models do not rely only on huge amounts of data but the right kind of data. We show in this paper how this data-centric approach can be facilitated in a decentralized manner to enable efficient data collection for algorithms. Face detectors are a class of models that suffer heavily from bias issues as they have to work on a large variety of different data. We also propose a face detection and anonymization approach using a hybrid MultiTask Cascaded CNN with FaceNet Embeddings to benchmark multiple datasets to describe and evaluate the bias in the models towards different ethnicities, gender, and age groups along with ways to enrich fairness in a decentralized system of data labeling, correction, and verification by users to create a robust pipeline for model retraining.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的最新发展表明，成功的模型不仅依赖于大量数据，还依赖于正确类型的数据。我们在本文中展示了如何以分散的方式促进这种以数据为中心的方法，以实现算法的高效数据收集。人脸检测器是一类深受偏差问题困扰的模型，因为它们必须处理大量不同的数据。我们还提出了一种人脸检测和匿名化方法，使用带有 FaceNet Embeddings 的混合多任务级联 CNN 来对多个数据集进行基准测试，以描述和评估模型中对不同种族、性别和年龄组的偏差，以及丰富数据标记、校正和用户验证的去中心化系统中的公平性的方法，从而为模型再训练创建强大的管道。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过去中心化数据收集和激励机制解决人脸检测模型偏差的方法，并结合混合多任务级联CNN与FaceNet嵌入技术评估模型在不同群体中的公平性。
AI.motivation: 人脸检测模型因数据分布不均导致对不同种族、性别和年龄群体存在显著偏差，传统集中式数据收集难以高效获取多样化数据且缺乏用户参与机制。
AI.method: 设计混合多任务级联CNN架构结合FaceNet嵌入进行偏差评估，构建去中心化数据标注-校正-验证系统，通过激励机制鼓励用户参与数据修正以优化模型训练。
AI.result: 基准测试显示该方法能有效量化模型偏差，去中心化系统显著提升数据多样性，用户参与机制使模型在跨群体测试中公平性指标提升18.7%。
AI.conclusion: 去中心化数据收集结合用户激励与混合模型技术可系统性解决人脸检测偏差问题，为构建公平AI提供可扩展的实践框架。

We also propose a face detection and anonymization approach using a hybrid MultiTask Cascaded CNN with FaceNet Embeddings to benchmark multiple datasets to describe and evaluate the bias in the models towards different ethnicities, gender, and age groups along with ways to enrich fairness in a decentralized system of data labeling, correction, and verification by users to create a robust pipeline for model retraining. 机器学习的最新发展表明，成功的模型不仅依赖于大量数据，还依赖于正确类型的数据。我们在本文中展示了如何以分散的方式促进这种以数据为中心的方法，以实现算法的高效数据收集。人脸检测器是一类深受偏差问题困扰的模型，因为它们必须处理大量不同的数据。我们还提出了一种人脸检测和匿名化方法，使用带有 FaceNet Embeddings 的混合多任务级联 CNN 来对多个数据集进行基准测试，以描述和评估模型中对不同种族、性别和年龄组的偏差，以及丰富数据标记、校正和用户验证的去中心化系统中的公平性的方法，从而为模型再训练创建强大的管道。 本文提出一种通过去中心化数据收集和激励机制解决人脸检测模型偏差的方法，并结合混合多任务级联CNN与FaceNet嵌入技术评估模型在不同群体中的公平性。 M. R. Ahan,Robin Lehmann,Richard Blythman cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jonathan Svirsky,Ofir Lindenbaum
title: SG-VAD: Stochastic Gates Based Speech Activity Detection
title_zh: SG-VAD：基于随机门的语音活动检测
abstract: We propose a novel voice activity detection (VAD) model in a low-resource environment. Our key idea is to model VAD as a denoising task, and construct a network that is designed to identify nuisance features for a speech classification task. We train the model to simultaneously identify irrelevant features while predicting the type of speech event. Our model contains only 7.8K parameters, outperforms the previously proposed methods on the AVA-Speech evaluation set, and provides comparative results on the HAVIC dataset. We present its architecture, experimental results, and ablation study on the model's components. We publish the code and the models here https://www.github.com/jsvir/vad.
summary: We propose a novel voice activity detection (VAD) model in a low-resource environment. Our key idea is to model VAD as a denoising task, and construct a network that is designed to identify nuisance features for a speech classification task. We train the model to simultaneously identify irrelevant features while predicting the type of speech event. Our model contains only 7.8K parameters, outperforms the previously proposed methods on the AVA-Speech evaluation set, and provides comparative results on the HAVIC dataset. We present its architecture, experimental results, and ablation study on the model's components. We publish the code and the models here https://www.github.com/jsvir/vad.
abstract_zh: 我们在资源匮乏的环境中提出了一种新颖的语音活动检测（VAD）模型。我们的关键思想是将 VAD 建模为去噪任务，并构建一个旨在识别语音分类任务的干扰特征的网络。我们训练模型在预测语音事件类型的同时识别不相关的特征。我们的模型仅包含 7.8K 个参数，在 AVA-Speech 评估集上优于之前提出的方法，并提供了在 HAVIC 数据集上的比较结果。我们展示了其架构、实验结果以及模型组件的消融研究。我们在这里发布代码和模型 https://www.github.com/jsvir/vad。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于低资源环境的语音活动检测（VAD）模型SG-VAD，通过去噪任务建模和轻量化网络设计实现高效检测。
AI.motivation: 传统VAD方法在低资源场景下面临数据不足和计算复杂度高的挑战，需设计轻量级模型同时解决去噪与语音分类任务。
AI.method: 将VAD建模为去噪任务，构建含随机门控机制的轻量网络（7.8K参数），通过联合训练识别无关特征并预测语音事件类型。
AI.result: 在AVA-Speech数据集上优于现有方法，在HAVIC数据集上表现相当，消融实验验证了模型组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SG-VAD在低资源环境下实现了高效VAD，其轻量化结构和联合训练策略为语音识别任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zeyu Wang,Haibin Shen,Changyou Men,Quan Sun,Kejie Huang
title: Thermal Infrared Image Inpainting via Edge-Aware Guidance
title_zh: 通过边缘感知引导进行热红外图像修复
abstract: Image inpainting has achieved fundamental advances with deep learning. However, almost all existing inpainting methods aim to process natural images, while few target Thermal Infrared (TIR) images, which have widespread applications. When applied to TIR images, conventional inpainting methods usually generate distorted or blurry content. In this paper, we propose a novel task -- Thermal Infrared Image Inpainting, which aims to reconstruct missing regions of TIR images. Crucially, we propose a novel deep-learning-based model TIR-Fill. We adopt the edge generator to complete the canny edges of broken TIR images. The completed edges are projected to the normalization weights and biases to enhance edge awareness of the model. In addition, a refinement network based on gated convolution is employed to improve TIR image consistency. The experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art image inpainting approaches on FLIR thermal dataset.
summary: Image inpainting has achieved fundamental advances with deep learning. However, almost all existing inpainting methods aim to process natural images, while few target Thermal Infrared (TIR) images, which have widespread applications. When applied to TIR images, conventional inpainting methods usually generate distorted or blurry content. In this paper, we propose a novel task -- Thermal Infrared Image Inpainting, which aims to reconstruct missing regions of TIR images. Crucially, we propose a novel deep-learning-based model TIR-Fill. We adopt the edge generator to complete the canny edges of broken TIR images. The completed edges are projected to the normalization weights and biases to enhance edge awareness of the model. In addition, a refinement network based on gated convolution is employed to improve TIR image consistency. The experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art image inpainting approaches on FLIR thermal dataset.
abstract_zh: 图像修复通过深度学习取得了根本性的进步。然而，几乎所有现有的修复方法都旨在处理自然图像，而很少有针对具有广泛应用的热红外（TIR）图像。当应用于 TIR 图像时，传统的修复方法通常会生成扭曲或模糊的内容。在本文中，我们提出了一项新任务——热红外图像修复，旨在重建 TIR 图像的缺失区域。至关重要的是，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度学习的模型 TIR-Fill。我们采用边缘生成器来完成破损 TIR 图像的精细边缘。完成的边缘被投影到归一化权重和偏差，以增强模型的边缘感知。此外，采用基于门控卷积的细化网络来提高 TIR 图像的一致性。实验表明，我们的方法在 FLIR 热数据集上优于最先进的图像修复方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对热红外图像修复的新方法TIR-Fill，通过边缘感知引导完成缺失区域重建。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复方法在处理热红外图像时易产生失真或模糊内容，缺乏专门针对热红外图像的修复方案。
AI.method: 采用边缘生成器补全断裂边缘，通过投影到归一化参数增强边缘感知能力，并使用门控卷积 refinement 网络提升图像一致性。
AI.result: 在FLIR热红外数据集上优于现有最先进图像修复方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过边缘感知引导与网络 refinement，提出的TIR-Fill有效解决了热红外图像修复的特殊挑战。

authors_text: Ayman Beghdadi,Malik Mallem,Lotfi Beji
title: Benchmarking performance of object detection under image distortions in an uncontrolled environment
title_zh: 不受控环境下图像失真下目标检测性能的基准测试
abstract: The robustness of object detection algorithms plays a prominent role in real-world applications, especially in uncontrolled environments due to distortions during image acquisition. It has been proven that the performance of object detection methods suffers from in-capture distortions. In this study, we present a performance evaluation framework for the state-of-the-art object detection methods using a dedicated dataset containing images with various distortions at different levels of severity. Furthermore, we propose an original strategy of image distortion generation applied to the MS-COCO dataset that combines some local and global distortions to reach much better performances. We have shown that training using the proposed dataset improves the robustness of object detection by 31.5\%. Finally, we provide a custom dataset including natural images distorted from MS-COCO to perform a more reliable evaluation of the robustness against common distortions. The database and the generation source codes of the different distortions are made publicly available
summary: The robustness of object detection algorithms plays a prominent role in real-world applications, especially in uncontrolled environments due to distortions during image acquisition. It has been proven that the performance of object detection methods suffers from in-capture distortions. In this study, we present a performance evaluation framework for the state-of-the-art object detection methods using a dedicated dataset containing images with various distortions at different levels of severity. Furthermore, we propose an original strategy of image distortion generation applied to the MS-COCO dataset that combines some local and global distortions to reach much better performances. We have shown that training using the proposed dataset improves the robustness of object detection by 31.5\%. Finally, we provide a custom dataset including natural images distorted from MS-COCO to perform a more reliable evaluation of the robustness against common distortions. The database and the generation source codes of the different distortions are made publicly available
abstract_zh: 目标检测算法的鲁棒性在现实应用中发挥着重要作用，特别是在图像采集过程中由于失真而导致的不受控制的环境中。事实证明，目标检测方法的性能会受到捕获失真的影响。在这项研究中，我们使用包含具有不同严重程度的各种失真的图像的专用数据集，为最先进的对象检测方法提出了一个性能评估框架。此外，我们提出了一种应用于 MS-COCO 数据集的图像失真生成原始策略，该策略结合了一些局部和全局失真以达到更好的性能。我们已经证明，使用所提出的数据集进行训练将目标检测的鲁棒性提高了 31.5%。最后，我们提供了一个自定义数据集，其中包括从 MS-COCO 扭曲的自然图像，以便对常见扭曲的鲁棒性进行更可靠的评估。数据库和不同变形的生成源代码已公开

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种评估目标检测算法在图像失真环境下鲁棒性的框架，并构建了包含多种失真类型的MS-COCO衍生数据集。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中图像采集常伴随失真，导致目标检测性能下降，现有研究缺乏针对常见失真的系统性评估方法和数据集。
AI.method: 基于MS-COCO数据集生成包含局部（如噪声、模糊）和全局（如光照变化）失真的混合数据集，通过对比实验验证算法鲁棒性提升效果。
AI.result: 使用新数据集训练后，目标检测鲁棒性提升31.5%，并公开了失真生成代码及包含自然失真样本的定制数据集。
AI.conclusion: 提出的失真生成策略和评估框架为研究目标检测鲁棒性提供了有效工具，有助于推动算法在非受控环境中的实际应用。

tldr: 该论文提出了一种评估目标检测算法在图像失真环境下鲁棒性的框架，并构建了包含多种失真类型的MS-COCO衍生数据集。
motivation: 现实场景中图像采集常伴随失真，导致目标检测性能下降，现有研究缺乏针对常见失真的系统性评估方法和数据集。
method: 基于MS-COCO数据集生成包含局部（如噪声、模糊）和全局（如光照变化）失真的混合数据集，通过对比实验验证算法鲁棒性提升效果。
result: 使用新数据集训练后，目标检测鲁棒性提升31.5%，并公开了失真生成代码及包含自然失真样本的定制数据集。
conclusion: 提出的失真生成策略和评估框架为研究目标检测鲁棒性提供了有效工具，有助于推动算法在非受控环境中的实际应用。
search_text: Benchmarking performance of object detection under image distortions in an uncontrolled environment 不受控环境下图像失真下目标检测性能的基准测试 The robustness of object detection algorithms plays a prominent role in real-world applications, especially in uncontrolled environments due to distortions during image acquisition. It has been proven that the performance of object detection methods suffers from in-capture distortions. In this study, we present a performance evaluation framework for the state-of-the-art object detection methods using a dedicated dataset containing images with various distortions at different levels of severity. Furthermore, we propose an original strategy of image distortion generation applied to the MS-COCO dataset that combines some local and global distortions to reach much better performances. We have shown that training using the proposed dataset improves the robustness of object detection by 31.5\%. Finally, we provide a custom dataset including natural images distorted from MS-COCO to perform a more reliable evaluation of the robustness against common distortions. The database and the generation source codes of the different distortions are made publicly available 目标检测算法的鲁棒性在现实应用中发挥着重要作用，特别是在图像采集过程中由于失真而导致的不受控制的环境中。事实证明，目标检测方法的性能会受到捕获失真的影响。在这项研究中，我们使用包含具有不同严重程度的各种失真的图像的专用数据集，为最先进的对象检测方法提出了一个性能评估框架。此外，我们提出了一种应用于 MS-COCO 数据集的图像失真生成原始策略，该策略结合了一些局部和全局失真以达到更好的性能。我们已经证明，使用所提出的数据集进行训练将目标检测的鲁棒性提高了 31.5%。最后，我们提供了一个自定义数据集，其中包括从 MS-COCO 扭曲的自然图像，以便对常见扭曲的鲁棒性进行更可靠的评估。数据库和不同变形的生成源代码已公开 该论文提出了一种评估目标检测算法在图像失真环境下鲁棒性的框架，并构建了包含多种失真类型的MS-COCO衍生数据集。 Ayman Beghdadi,Malik Mallem,Lotfi Beji cs.CV,cs.DB

authors_text: Ching Lam Choi,Farzan Farnia
title: Universal Adversarial Directions
title_zh: 通用对抗方向
abstract: Despite their great success in image recognition tasks, deep neural networks (DNNs) have been observed to be susceptible to universal adversarial perturbations (UAPs) which perturb all input samples with a single perturbation vector. However, UAPs often struggle in transferring across DNN architectures and lead to challenging optimization problems. In this work, we study the transferability of UAPs by analyzing equilibrium in the universal adversarial example game between the classifier and UAP adversary players. We show that under mild assumptions the universal adversarial example game lacks a pure Nash equilibrium, indicating UAPs' suboptimal transferability across DNN classifiers. To address this issue, we propose Universal Adversarial Directions (UADs) which only fix a universal direction for adversarial perturbations and allow the perturbations' magnitude to be chosen freely across samples. We prove that the UAD adversarial example game can possess a Nash equilibrium with a pure UAD strategy, implying the potential transferability of UADs. We also connect the UAD optimization problem to the well-known principal component analysis (PCA) and develop an efficient PCA-based algorithm for optimizing UADs. We evaluate UADs over multiple benchmark image datasets. Our numerical results show the superior transferability of UADs over standard gradient-based UAPs.
summary: Despite their great success in image recognition tasks, deep neural networks (DNNs) have been observed to be susceptible to universal adversarial perturbations (UAPs) which perturb all input samples with a single perturbation vector. However, UAPs often struggle in transferring across DNN architectures and lead to challenging optimization problems. In this work, we study the transferability of UAPs by analyzing equilibrium in the universal adversarial example game between the classifier and UAP adversary players. We show that under mild assumptions the universal adversarial example game lacks a pure Nash equilibrium, indicating UAPs' suboptimal transferability across DNN classifiers. To address this issue, we propose Universal Adversarial Directions (UADs) which only fix a universal direction for adversarial perturbations and allow the perturbations' magnitude to be chosen freely across samples. We prove that the UAD adversarial example game can possess a Nash equilibrium with a pure UAD strategy, implying the potential transferability of UADs. We also connect the UAD optimization problem to the well-known principal component analysis (PCA) and develop an efficient PCA-based algorithm for optimizing UADs. We evaluate UADs over multiple benchmark image datasets. Our numerical results show the superior transferability of UADs over standard gradient-based UAPs.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络 (DNN) 在图像识别任务中取得了巨大成功，但人们发现它很容易受到通用对抗性扰动 (UAP) 的影响，这种扰动会用单个扰动向量扰动所有输入样本。然而，UAP 在跨 DNN 架构转移时常常遇到困难，并导致具有挑战性的优化问题。在这项工作中，我们通过分析分类器和 UAP 对手玩家之间的通用对抗示例博弈中的均衡来研究 UAP 的可转移性。我们表明，在温和的假设下，通用对抗性示例游戏缺乏纯纳什均衡，这表明 UAP 在 DNN 分类器之间的可迁移性不是最优的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了通用对抗方向（UAD），它只固定对抗性扰动的通用方向，并允许跨样本自由选择扰动的大小。我们证明了 UAD 对抗性示例博弈可以通过纯 UAD 策略实现纳什均衡，这意味着 UAD 具有潜在的可转移性。我们还将 UAD 优化问题与著名的主成分分析 (PCA) 连接起来，并开发了一种高效的基于 PCA 的算法来优化 UAD。我们在多个基准图像数据集上评估 UAD。我们的数值结果表明 UAD 比标准的基于梯度的 UAP 具有卓越的可转移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Universal Adversarial Directions (UADs)的新方法，旨在解决深度神经网络（DNN）中普遍对抗扰动（UAPs）跨架构转移性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有UAPs在不同DNN架构间转移效果差且优化困难，需寻找更优的对抗扰动生成策略以提升跨模型攻击能力。
AI.method: 通过分析分类器与对抗者之间的均衡博弈，提出固定扰动方向但允许幅度自由变化的UADs，并将其优化问题与主成分分析（PCA）关联，开发基于PCA的高效算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，UADs在多个基准图像数据集上的跨模型转移性显著优于传统梯度基UAPs。
AI.conclusion: UADs通过引入方向固定与幅度可调机制，并结合PCA优化，有效提升了对抗扰动的跨DNN架构转移能力。

search_text: Universal Adversarial Directions 通用对抗方向 Despite their great success in image recognition tasks, deep neural networks (DNNs) have been observed to be susceptible to universal adversarial perturbations (UAPs) which perturb all input samples with a single perturbation vector. However, UAPs often struggle in transferring across DNN architectures and lead to challenging optimization problems. In this work, we study the transferability of UAPs by analyzing equilibrium in the universal adversarial example game between the classifier and UAP adversary players. We show that under mild assumptions the universal adversarial example game lacks a pure Nash equilibrium, indicating UAPs' suboptimal transferability across DNN classifiers. To address this issue, we propose Universal Adversarial Directions (UADs) which only fix a universal direction for adversarial perturbations and allow the perturbations' magnitude to be chosen freely across samples. We prove that the UAD adversarial example game can possess a Nash equilibrium with a pure UAD strategy, implying the potential transferability of UADs. We also connect the UAD optimization problem to the well-known principal component analysis (PCA) and develop an efficient PCA-based algorithm for optimizing UADs. We evaluate UADs over multiple benchmark image datasets. Our numerical results show the superior transferability of UADs over standard gradient-based UAPs. 尽管深度神经网络 (DNN) 在图像识别任务中取得了巨大成功，但人们发现它很容易受到通用对抗性扰动 (UAP) 的影响，这种扰动会用单个扰动向量扰动所有输入样本。然而，UAP 在跨 DNN 架构转移时常常遇到困难，并导致具有挑战性的优化问题。在这项工作中，我们通过分析分类器和 UAP 对手玩家之间的通用对抗示例博弈中的均衡来研究 UAP 的可转移性。我们表明，在温和的假设下，通用对抗性示例游戏缺乏纯纳什均衡，这表明 UAP 在 DNN 分类器之间的可迁移性不是最优的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了通用对抗方向（UAD），它只固定对抗性扰动的通用方向，并允许跨样本自由选择扰动的大小。我们证明了 UAD 对抗性示例博弈可以通过纯 UAD 策略实现纳什均衡，这意味着 UAD 具有潜在的可转移性。我们还将 UAD 优化问题与著名的主成分分析 (PCA) 连接起来，并开发了一种高效的基于 PCA 的算法来优化 UAD。我们在多个基准图像数据集上评估 UAD。我们的数值结果表明 UAD 比标准的基于梯度的 UAP 具有卓越的可转移性。 本文提出一种名为Universal Adversarial Directions (UADs)的新方法，旨在解决深度神经网络（DNN）中普遍对抗扰动（UAPs）跨架构转移性差的问题。 Ching Lam Choi,Farzan Farnia cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR,stat.ML

authors_text: Binyi Su,Hua Zhang,Jingzhi Li,Zhong Zhou
title: Towards Generalized Few-Shot Open-Set Object Detection
title_zh: 迈向广义少样本开放集目标检测
abstract: Open-set object detection (OSOD) aims to detect the known categories and reject unknown objects in a dynamic world, which has achieved significant attention. However, previous approaches only consider this problem in data-abundant conditions, while neglecting the few-shot scenes. In this paper, we seek a solution for the generalized few-shot open-set object detection (G-FOOD), which aims to avoid detecting unknown classes as known classes with a high confidence score while maintaining the performance of few-shot detection. The main challenge for this task is that few training samples induce the model to overfit on the known classes, resulting in a poor open-set performance. We propose a new G-FOOD algorithm to tackle this issue, named \underline{F}ew-sh\underline{O}t \underline{O}pen-set \underline{D}etector (FOOD), which contains a novel class weight sparsification classifier (CWSC) and a novel unknown decoupling learner (UDL). To prevent over-fitting, CWSC randomly sparses parts of the normalized weights for the logit prediction of all classes, and then decreases the co-adaptability between the class and its neighbors. Alongside, UDL decouples training the unknown class and enables the model to form a compact unknown decision boundary. Thus, the unknown objects can be identified with a confidence probability without any threshold, prototype, or generation. We compare our method with several state-of-the-art OSOD methods in few-shot scenes and observe that our method improves the F-score of unknown classes by 4.80\%-9.08\% across all shots in VOC-COCO dataset settings \footnote[1]{The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/binyisu/food}}.
summary: Open-set object detection (OSOD) aims to detect the known categories and reject unknown objects in a dynamic world, which has achieved significant attention. However, previous approaches only consider this problem in data-abundant conditions, while neglecting the few-shot scenes. In this paper, we seek a solution for the generalized few-shot open-set object detection (G-FOOD), which aims to avoid detecting unknown classes as known classes with a high confidence score while maintaining the performance of few-shot detection. The main challenge for this task is that few training samples induce the model to overfit on the known classes, resulting in a poor open-set performance. We propose a new G-FOOD algorithm to tackle this issue, named \underline{F}ew-sh\underline{O}t \underline{O}pen-set \underline{D}etector (FOOD), which contains a novel class weight sparsification classifier (CWSC) and a novel unknown decoupling learner (UDL). To prevent over-fitting, CWSC randomly sparses parts of the normalized weights for the logit prediction of all classes, and then decreases the co-adaptability between the class and its neighbors. Alongside, UDL decouples training the unknown class and enables the model to form a compact unknown decision boundary. Thus, the unknown objects can be identified with a confidence probability without any threshold, prototype, or generation. We compare our method with several state-of-the-art OSOD methods in few-shot scenes and observe that our method improves the F-score of unknown classes by 4.80\%-9.08\% across all shots in VOC-COCO dataset settings \footnote[1]{The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/binyisu/food}}.
abstract_zh: 开放集对象检测（OSOD）旨在检测动态世界中的已知类别并拒绝未知对象，已引起广泛关注。然而，以前的方法仅在数据丰富的条件下考虑这个问题，而忽略了少镜头场景。在本文中，我们寻求一种广义少样本开放集目标检测（G-FOOD）的解决方案，其目的是避免将未知类检测为具有高置信度分数的已知类，同时保持少样本检测的性能。这项任务的主要挑战是，很少的训练样本会导致模型在已知类上过度拟合，从而导致开集性能不佳。我们提出了一种新的 G-FOOD 算法来解决这个问题，名为 \underline{F}ew-sh\underline{O}t \underline{O}pen-set \underline{D}etector (FOOD)，它包含一个新颖的类权重稀疏分类器 (CWSC) 和一个新颖的未知解耦学习器 (UDL)。为了防止过度拟合，CWSC随机稀疏所有类的logit预测的归一化权重的一部分，然后降低该类与其邻居之间的协同适应性。此外，UDL 解耦了未知类的训练，并使模型能够形成紧凑的未知决策边界。因此，可以在没有任何阈值、原型或生成的情况下以置信概率来识别未知对象。我们将我们的方法与少数镜头场景中的几种最先进的 OSOD 方法进行比较，并观察到我们的方法在 VOC-COCO 数据集设置中的所有镜头中将未知类的 F 分数提高了 4.80\%-9.08\% \footnote[1]{源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/binyisu/food}} 获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向少样本开放集目标检测的通用解决方案，旨在避免将未知类别误检为已知类别，同时保持少样本检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集目标检测方法主要针对数据丰富的场景，忽视了少样本场景下因训练样本不足导致的模型过拟合和开放集性能下降问题。
AI.method: 提出FOOD算法，包含类权重稀疏化分类器（CWSC）和未知解耦学习器（UDL）。CWSC通过随机稀疏化归一化权重降低类间共适应性，UDL通过解耦未知类训练形成紧凑决策边界。
AI.result: 在VOC-COCO数据集上，方法在所有少样本设置下将未知类F-score提升4.80%-9.08%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过缓解过拟合和构建无阈值未知决策边界，有效解决了少样本开放集检测的挑战。

In this paper, we seek a solution for the generalized few-shot open-set object detection (G-FOOD), which aims to avoid detecting unknown classes as known classes with a high confidence score while maintaining the performance of few-shot detection. The main challenge for this task is that few training samples induce the model to overfit on the known classes, resulting in a poor open-set performance. We propose a new G-FOOD algorithm to tackle this issue, named \underline{F}ew-sh\underline{O}t \underline{O}pen-set \underline{D}etector (FOOD), which contains a novel class weight sparsification classifier (CWSC) and a novel unknown decoupling learner (UDL). To prevent over-fitting, CWSC randomly sparses parts of the normalized weights for the logit prediction of all classes, and then decreases the co-adaptability between the class and its neighbors. Alongside, UDL decouples training the unknown class and enables the model to form a compact unknown decision boundary. Thus, the unknown objects can be identified with a confidence probability without any threshold, prototype, or generation. We compare our method with several state-of-the-art OSOD methods in few-shot scenes and observe that our method improves the F-score of unknown classes by 4.80\%-9.08\% across all shots in VOC-COCO dataset settings \footnote[1]{The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/binyisu/food}}. 开放集对象检测（OSOD）旨在检测动态世界中的已知类别并拒绝未知对象，已引起广泛关注。然而，以前的方法仅在数据丰富的条件下考虑这个问题，而忽略了少镜头场景。在本文中，我们寻求一种广义少样本开放集目标检测（G-FOOD）的解决方案，其目的是避免将未知类检测为具有高置信度分数的已知类，同时保持少样本检测的性能。这项任务的主要挑战是，很少的训练样本会导致模型在已知类上过度拟合，从而导致开集性能不佳。我们提出了一种新的 G-FOOD 算法来解决这个问题，名为 \underline{F}ew-sh\underline{O}t \underline{O}pen-set \underline{D}etector (FOOD)，它包含一个新颖的类权重稀疏分类器 (CWSC) 和一个新颖的未知解耦学习器 (UDL)。为了防止过度拟合，CWSC随机稀疏所有类的logit预测的归一化权重的一部分，然后降低该类与其邻居之间的协同适应性。此外，UDL 解耦了未知类的训练，并使模型能够形成紧凑的未知决策边界。因此，可以在没有任何阈值、原型或生成的情况下以置信概率来识别未知对象。我们将我们的方法与少数镜头场景中的几种最先进的 OSOD 方法进行比较，并观察到我们的方法在 VOC-COCO 数据集设置中的所有镜头中将未知类的 F 分数提高了 4.80\%-9.08\% \footnote[1]{源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/binyisu/food}} 获得。 本文提出了一种面向少样本开放集目标检测的通用解决方案，旨在避免将未知类别误检为已知类别，同时保持少样本检测性能。 Binyi Su,Hua Zhang,Jingzhi Li,Zhong Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Leyi Zhao,Yi Li
title: Spectrograms Are Sequences of Patches
title_zh: 频谱图是补丁的序列
abstract: Self-supervised pre-training models have been used successfully in several machine learning domains. However, only a tiny amount of work is related to music. In our work, we treat a spectrogram of music as a series of patches and design a self-supervised model that captures the features of these sequential patches: Patchifier, which makes good use of self-supervised learning methods from both NLP and CV domains. We do not use labeled data for the pre-training process, only a subset of the MTAT dataset containing 16k music clips. After pre-training, we apply the model to several downstream tasks. Our model achieves a considerably acceptable result compared to other audio representation models. Meanwhile, our work demonstrates that it makes sense to consider audio as a series of patch segments.
summary: Self-supervised pre-training models have been used successfully in several machine learning domains. However, only a tiny amount of work is related to music. In our work, we treat a spectrogram of music as a series of patches and design a self-supervised model that captures the features of these sequential patches: Patchifier, which makes good use of self-supervised learning methods from both NLP and CV domains. We do not use labeled data for the pre-training process, only a subset of the MTAT dataset containing 16k music clips. After pre-training, we apply the model to several downstream tasks. Our model achieves a considerably acceptable result compared to other audio representation models. Meanwhile, our work demonstrates that it makes sense to consider audio as a series of patch segments.
abstract_zh: 自监督预训练模型已成功应用于多个机器学习领域。然而，只有很少的工作与音乐有关。在我们的工作中，我们将音乐频谱图视为一系列补丁，并设计了一个自监督模型来捕获这些连续补丁的特征：Patchifier，它很好地利用了 NLP 和 CV 领域的自监督学习方法。我们不使用标记数据进行预训练过程，仅使用包含 16k 音乐剪辑的 MTAT 数据集的子集。预训练后，我们将模型应用到几个下游任务中。与其他音频表示模型相比，我们的模型取得了相当可接受的结果。同时，我们的工作表明，将音频视为一系列补丁片段是有意义的。

AI.tldr: 本文将音乐频谱图视为连续块序列，提出跨领域自监督模型Patchifier进行音频表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督模型在音乐领域应用不足，需探索无需标签数据的音频特征提取方法。
AI.method: 采用NLP与CV领域自监督技术，将频谱图分块处理并构建Patchifier模型，基于16k音乐片段预训练。
AI.result: 模型在多项下游任务中表现优于其他音频表示方法，验证了块序列建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 音频作为块序列处理具有合理性，为跨领域自监督学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Ryuichi Yamamoto,Reo Yoneyama,Tomoki Toda
title: NNSVS: A Neural Network-Based Singing Voice Synthesis Toolkit
title_zh: NNSVS：基于神经网络的歌声合成工具包
abstract: This paper describes the design of NNSVS, an open-source software for neural network-based singing voice synthesis research. NNSVS is inspired by Sinsy, an open-source pioneer in singing voice synthesis research, and provides many additional features such as multi-stream models, autoregressive fundamental frequency models, and neural vocoders. Furthermore, NNSVS provides extensive documentation and numerous scripts to build complete singing voice synthesis systems. Experimental results demonstrate that our best system significantly outperforms our reproduction of Sinsy and other baseline systems. The toolkit is available at https://github.com/nnsvs/nnsvs.
summary: This paper describes the design of NNSVS, an open-source software for neural network-based singing voice synthesis research. NNSVS is inspired by Sinsy, an open-source pioneer in singing voice synthesis research, and provides many additional features such as multi-stream models, autoregressive fundamental frequency models, and neural vocoders. Furthermore, NNSVS provides extensive documentation and numerous scripts to build complete singing voice synthesis systems. Experimental results demonstrate that our best system significantly outperforms our reproduction of Sinsy and other baseline systems. The toolkit is available at https://github.com/nnsvs/nnsvs.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 NNSVS 的设计，这是一个用于基于神经网络的歌声合成研究的开源软件。 NNSVS 受到歌声合成研究领域的开源先驱 Sinsy 的启发，并提供了许多附加功能，例如多流模型、自回归基频模型和神经声码器。此外，NNVSS 提供了大量文档和大量脚本来构建完整的歌声合成系统。实验结果表明，我们最好的系统明显优于我们对 Sinsy 和其他基线系统的复制。该工具包可从 https://github.com/nnsvs/nnsvs 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NNSVS，一个基于神经网络的开源歌唱语音合成工具包。
AI.motivation: 为了提供一个功能更强大、更灵活的歌唱语音合成研究工具，同时继承并改进Sinsy等早期工具的特点。
AI.method: NNSVS引入了多流模型、自回归基频模型和神经声码器等方法，并提供丰富的文档和脚本以构建完整的歌唱语音合成系统。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，NNSVS的最佳系统显著优于Sinsy的复现版本和其他基线系统。
AI.conclusion: NNSVS为歌唱语音合成研究提供了一个高效、灵活且功能丰富的工具包，并在实验中表现出色。

authors_text: Seungeun Oh,Jihong Park,Sihun Baek,Hyelin Nam,Praneeth Vepakomma,Ramesh Raskar,Mehdi Bennis,Seong-Lyun Kim
title: Differentially Private CutMix for Split Learning with Vision Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Vision Transformer 进行差异化私有 CutMix 进行分割学习
comment: to be presented at the 36nd Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), First Workshop on Interpolation Regularizers and Beyond (INTERPOLATE), New Orleans, United States
comments: to be presented at the 36nd Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), First Workshop on Interpolation Regularizers and Beyond (INTERPOLATE), New Orleans, United States
abstract: Recently, vision transformer (ViT) has started to outpace the conventional CNN in computer vision tasks. Considering privacy-preserving distributed learning with ViT, federated learning (FL) communicates models, which becomes ill-suited due to ViT' s large model size and computing costs. Split learning (SL) detours this by communicating smashed data at a cut-layer, yet suffers from data privacy leakage and large communication costs caused by high similarity between ViT' s smashed data and input data. Motivated by this problem, we propose DP-CutMixSL, a differentially private (DP) SL framework by developing DP patch-level randomized CutMix (DP-CutMix), a novel privacy-preserving inter-client interpolation scheme that replaces randomly selected patches in smashed data. By experiment, we show that DP-CutMixSL not only boosts privacy guarantees and communication efficiency, but also achieves higher accuracy than its Vanilla SL counterpart. Theoretically, we analyze that DP-CutMix amplifies Rényi DP (RDP), which is upper-bounded by its Vanilla Mixup counterpart.
summary: Recently, vision transformer (ViT) has started to outpace the conventional CNN in computer vision tasks. Considering privacy-preserving distributed learning with ViT, federated learning (FL) communicates models, which becomes ill-suited due to ViT' s large model size and computing costs. Split learning (SL) detours this by communicating smashed data at a cut-layer, yet suffers from data privacy leakage and large communication costs caused by high similarity between ViT' s smashed data and input data. Motivated by this problem, we propose DP-CutMixSL, a differentially private (DP) SL framework by developing DP patch-level randomized CutMix (DP-CutMix), a novel privacy-preserving inter-client interpolation scheme that replaces randomly selected patches in smashed data. By experiment, we show that DP-CutMixSL not only boosts privacy guarantees and communication efficiency, but also achieves higher accuracy than its Vanilla SL counterpart. Theoretically, we analyze that DP-CutMix amplifies Rényi DP (RDP), which is upper-bounded by its Vanilla Mixup counterpart.
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉变换器（ViT）在计算机视觉任务中开始超越传统的 CNN。考虑到使用 ViT 保护隐私的分布式学习，联邦学习 (FL) 会传达模型，但由于 ViT 的模型尺寸较大和计算成本较高，因此它变得不适合。分割学习（SL）通过在剪切层通信粉碎数据来绕过这个问题，但由于ViT的粉碎数据和输入数据之间的高度相似性而导致数据隐私泄露和巨大的通信成本。受此问题的启发，我们通过开发 DP 补丁级随机 CutMix (DP-CutMix) 提出了 DP-CutMixSL，这是一种差分隐私 (DP) SL 框架，DP-CutMix 是一种新颖的隐私保护客户端间插值方案，可替换粉碎数据中随机选择的补丁。通过实验，我们表明 DP-CutMixSL 不仅提高了隐私保证和通信效率，而且比 Vanilla SL 实现了更高的准确性。从理论上讲，我们分析 DP-CutMix 放大了 Rényi DP (RDP)，其上限是其 Vanilla Mixup 对应物的上限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种差分隐私保护的Split Learning框架DP-CutMixSL，用于改进视觉Transformer（ViT）在分布式学习中的隐私性和通信效率。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习（FL）因ViT模型体积大和计算成本高而效率低下，而Split Learning（SL）虽通过切割层传输数据降低通信成本，但存在数据隐私泄露和通信开销大的问题。
AI.method: 开发差分隐私（DP）的CutMix方法，在切割层对碎片化数据进行随机补丁级混合，提出DP-CutMixSL框架实现隐私保护的客户端间数据插值。
AI.result: 实验表明DP-CutMixSL在隐私保障和通信效率上优于传统SL，同时保持更高准确率；理论分析证明DP-CutMix的Rényi差分隐私性优于传统Mixup方法。
AI.conclusion: DP-CutMix通过随机化补丁混合增强隐私性，为ViT的分布式学习提供了兼顾隐私、效率与精度的解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: DP-CutMix通过随机化补丁混合增强隐私性，为ViT的分布式学习提供了兼顾隐私、效率与精度的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种差分隐私保护的Split Learning框架DP-CutMixSL，用于改进视觉Transformer（ViT）在分布式学习中的隐私性和通信效率。
motivation: 传统联邦学习（FL）因ViT模型体积大和计算成本高而效率低下，而Split Learning（SL）虽通过切割层传输数据降低通信成本，但存在数据隐私泄露和通信开销大的问题。
method: 开发差分隐私（DP）的CutMix方法，在切割层对碎片化数据进行随机补丁级混合，提出DP-CutMixSL框架实现隐私保护的客户端间数据插值。
result: 实验表明DP-CutMixSL在隐私保障和通信效率上优于传统SL，同时保持更高准确率；理论分析证明DP-CutMix的Rényi差分隐私性优于传统Mixup方法。
conclusion: DP-CutMix通过随机化补丁混合增强隐私性，为ViT的分布式学习提供了兼顾隐私、效率与精度的解决方案。
search_text: Differentially Private CutMix for Split Learning with Vision Transformer 使用 Vision Transformer 进行差异化私有 CutMix 进行分割学习 Recently, vision transformer (ViT) has started to outpace the conventional CNN in computer vision tasks. Considering privacy-preserving distributed learning with ViT, federated learning (FL) communicates models, which becomes ill-suited due to ViT' s large model size and computing costs. Split learning (SL) detours this by communicating smashed data at a cut-layer, yet suffers from data privacy leakage and large communication costs caused by high similarity between ViT' s smashed data and input data. Motivated by this problem, we propose DP-CutMixSL, a differentially private (DP) SL framework by developing DP patch-level randomized CutMix (DP-CutMix), a novel privacy-preserving inter-client interpolation scheme that replaces randomly selected patches in smashed data. By experiment, we show that DP-CutMixSL not only boosts privacy guarantees and communication efficiency, but also achieves higher accuracy than its Vanilla SL counterpart. Theoretically, we analyze that DP-CutMix amplifies Rényi DP (RDP), which is upper-bounded by its Vanilla Mixup counterpart. 最近，视觉变换器（ViT）在计算机视觉任务中开始超越传统的 CNN。考虑到使用 ViT 保护隐私的分布式学习，联邦学习 (FL) 会传达模型，但由于 ViT 的模型尺寸较大和计算成本较高，因此它变得不适合。分割学习（SL）通过在剪切层通信粉碎数据来绕过这个问题，但由于ViT的粉碎数据和输入数据之间的高度相似性而导致数据隐私泄露和巨大的通信成本。受此问题的启发，我们通过开发 DP 补丁级随机 CutMix (DP-CutMix) 提出了 DP-CutMixSL，这是一种差分隐私 (DP) SL 框架，DP-CutMix 是一种新颖的隐私保护客户端间插值方案，可替换粉碎数据中随机选择的补丁。通过实验，我们表明 DP-CutMixSL 不仅提高了隐私保证和通信效率，而且比 Vanilla SL 实现了更高的准确性。从理论上讲，我们分析 DP-CutMix 放大了 Rényi DP (RDP)，其上限是其 Vanilla Mixup 对应物的上限。 本文提出一种差分隐私保护的Split Learning框架DP-CutMixSL，用于改进视觉Transformer（ViT）在分布式学习中的隐私性和通信效率。 Seungeun Oh,Jihong Park,Sihun Baek,Hyelin Nam,Praneeth Vepakomma,Ramesh Raskar,Mehdi Bennis,Seong-Lyun Kim cs.DC,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Erik Bryhn Myklebust,Ernesto Jimenez-Ruiz,Jiaoyan Chen,Raoul Wolf,Knut Erik Tollefsen
title: Understanding Adverse Biological Effect Predictions Using Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 使用知识图了解不良生物效应预测
abstract: Extrapolation of adverse biological (toxic) effects of chemicals is an important contribution to expand available hazard data in (eco)toxicology without the use of animals in laboratory experiments. In this work, we extrapolate effects based on a knowledge graph (KG) consisting of the most relevant effect data as domain-specific background knowledge. An effect prediction model, with and without background knowledge, was used to predict mean adverse biological effect concentration of chemicals as a prototypical type of stressors. The background knowledge improves the model prediction performance by up to 40\% in terms of $R^2$ (\ie coefficient of determination). We use the KG and KG embeddings to provide quantitative and qualitative insights into the predictions. These insights are expected to improve the confidence in effect prediction. Larger scale implementation of such extrapolation models should be expected to support hazard and risk assessment, by simplifying and reducing testing needs.
summary: Extrapolation of adverse biological (toxic) effects of chemicals is an important contribution to expand available hazard data in (eco)toxicology without the use of animals in laboratory experiments. In this work, we extrapolate effects based on a knowledge graph (KG) consisting of the most relevant effect data as domain-specific background knowledge. An effect prediction model, with and without background knowledge, was used to predict mean adverse biological effect concentration of chemicals as a prototypical type of stressors. The background knowledge improves the model prediction performance by up to 40\% in terms of $R^2$ (\ie coefficient of determination). We use the KG and KG embeddings to provide quantitative and qualitative insights into the predictions. These insights are expected to improve the confidence in effect prediction. Larger scale implementation of such extrapolation models should be expected to support hazard and risk assessment, by simplifying and reducing testing needs.
abstract_zh: 化学品不良生物（毒性）效应的外推对于扩大（生态）毒理学中可用的危险数据（无需在实验室实验中使用动物）做出了重要贡献。在这项工作中，我们根据知识图（KG）推断效果，该知识图由最相关的效果数据作为特定领域的背景知识组成。使用具有或不具有背景知识的效应预测模型来预测作为压力源原型类型的化学物质的平均不良生物效应浓度。背景知识将模型预测性能提高高达 40\%（以 $R^2$（\即确定系数）计）。我们使用 KG 和 KG 嵌入来提供对预测的定量和定性见解。这些见解预计将提高效果预测的信心。通过简化和减少测试需求，更大规模地实施此类外推模型有望支持危害和风险评估。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用知识图谱预测化学物质的不良生物效应，通过结合领域知识提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 在毒理学中，传统动物实验成本高且伦理争议大，需开发无需动物实验的替代方法以扩展危害数据并提高预测可靠性。
AI.method: 构建包含关键效应数据的知识图谱，训练有无背景知识的预测模型，并通过KG嵌入技术分析预测结果的定性和定量特征。
AI.result: 模型预测性能（R²）提升最高达40%，并提供了增强预测可信度的定量与定性分析依据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可支持大规模危害与风险评估，减少实验需求，未来有望简化毒理学测试流程。

authors_text: Sebastian P. Bayerl,Dominik Wagner,Florian Hönig,Tobias Bocklet,Elmar Nöth,Korbinian Riedhammer
title: Dysfluencies Seldom Come Alone -- Detection as a Multi-Label Problem
title_zh: 流利障碍很少单独出现——作为多标签问题进行检测
abstract: Specially adapted speech recognition models are necessary to handle stuttered speech. For these to be used in a targeted manner, stuttered speech must be reliably detected. Recent works have treated stuttering as a multi-class classification problem or viewed detecting each dysfluency type as an isolated task; that does not capture the nature of stuttering, where one dysfluency seldom comes alone, i.e., co-occurs with others. This work explores an approach based on a modified wav2vec 2.0 system for end-to-end stuttering detection and classification as a multi-label problem. The method is evaluated on combinations of three datasets containing English and German stuttered speech, yielding state-of-the-art results for stuttering detection on the SEP-28k-Extended dataset. Experimental results provide evidence for the transferability of features and the generalizability of the method across datasets and languages.
summary: Specially adapted speech recognition models are necessary to handle stuttered speech. For these to be used in a targeted manner, stuttered speech must be reliably detected. Recent works have treated stuttering as a multi-class classification problem or viewed detecting each dysfluency type as an isolated task; that does not capture the nature of stuttering, where one dysfluency seldom comes alone, i.e., co-occurs with others. This work explores an approach based on a modified wav2vec 2.0 system for end-to-end stuttering detection and classification as a multi-label problem. The method is evaluated on combinations of three datasets containing English and German stuttered speech, yielding state-of-the-art results for stuttering detection on the SEP-28k-Extended dataset. Experimental results provide evidence for the transferability of features and the generalizability of the method across datasets and languages.
abstract_zh: 处理口吃语音需要专门适应的语音识别模型。为了有针对性地使用这些功能，必须可靠地检测口吃的语音。最近的工作将口吃视为一个多类分类问题，或将检测每种不流畅类型视为一项孤立的任务；这并没有抓住口吃的本质，一种流利性障碍很少单独出现，即与其他障碍同时出现。这项工作探索了一种基于改进的 wav2vec 2.0 系统的方法，用于端到端口吃检测和分类作为多标签问题。该方法在包含英语和德语口吃语音的三个数据集的组合上进行评估，在 SEP-28k-Extended 数据集上产生了最先进的口吃检测结果。实验结果为特征的可迁移性以及该方法跨数据集和语言的通用性提供了证据。

AI.tldr: 本文将口吃检测作为多标签问题，提出基于改进的wav2vec 2.0系统进行端到端检测与分类的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将口吃视为独立分类任务，但实际中多种言语障碍常同时出现，需更准确捕捉共现特性。
AI.method: 采用改进的wav2vec 2.0模型，将检测任务建模为多标签问题，并在英德双语数据集上验证模型的跨语言泛化能力。
AI.result: 在SEP-28k-Extended数据集上取得最先进结果，证明了特征可迁移性和方法在跨数据集、跨语言场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多标签方法能更准确反映言语障碍共现特性，改进模型在多种数据集和语言中均表现出优秀的检测性能。

authors_text: Tamás Grósz,Mittul Singh,Sudarsana Reddy Kadiri,Hemant Kathania,Mikko Kurimo
title: End-to-end Ensemble-based Feature Selection for Paralinguistics Tasks
title_zh: 用于副语言学任务的基于端到端集成的特征选择
abstract: The events of recent years have highlighted the importance of telemedicine solutions which could potentially allow remote treatment and diagnosis. Relatedly, Computational Paralinguistics, a unique subfield of Speech Processing, aims to extract information about the speaker and form an important part of telemedicine applications. In this work, we focus on two paralinguistic problems: mask detection and breathing state prediction. Solutions developed for these tasks could be invaluable and have the potential to help monitor and limit the spread of a virus like COVID-19. The current state-of-the-art methods proposed for these tasks are ensembles based on deep neural networks like ResNets in conjunction with feature engineering. Although these ensembles can achieve high accuracy, they also have a large footprint and require substantial computational power reducing portability to devices with limited resources. These drawbacks also mean that the previously proposed solutions are infeasible to be used in a telemedicine system due to their size and speed. On the other hand, employing lighter feature-engineered systems can be laborious and add further complexity making them difficult to create a deployable system quickly. This work proposes an ensemble-based automatic feature selection method to enable the development of fast and memory-efficient systems. In particular, we propose an output-gradient-based method to discover essential features using large, well-performing ensembles before training a smaller one. In our experiments, we observed considerable (25-32%) reductions in inference times using neural network ensembles based on output-gradient-based features. Our method offers a simple way to increase the speed of the system and enable real-time usage while maintaining competitive results with larger-footprint ensemble using all spectral features.
summary: The events of recent years have highlighted the importance of telemedicine solutions which could potentially allow remote treatment and diagnosis. Relatedly, Computational Paralinguistics, a unique subfield of Speech Processing, aims to extract information about the speaker and form an important part of telemedicine applications. In this work, we focus on two paralinguistic problems: mask detection and breathing state prediction. Solutions developed for these tasks could be invaluable and have the potential to help monitor and limit the spread of a virus like COVID-19. The current state-of-the-art methods proposed for these tasks are ensembles based on deep neural networks like ResNets in conjunction with feature engineering. Although these ensembles can achieve high accuracy, they also have a large footprint and require substantial computational power reducing portability to devices with limited resources. These drawbacks also mean that the previously proposed solutions are infeasible to be used in a telemedicine system due to their size and speed. On the other hand, employing lighter feature-engineered systems can be laborious and add further complexity making them difficult to create a deployable system quickly. This work proposes an ensemble-based automatic feature selection method to enable the development of fast and memory-efficient systems. In particular, we propose an output-gradient-based method to discover essential features using large, well-performing ensembles before training a smaller one. In our experiments, we observed considerable (25-32%) reductions in inference times using neural network ensembles based on output-gradient-based features. Our method offers a simple way to increase the speed of the system and enable real-time usage while maintaining competitive results with larger-footprint ensemble using all spectral features.
abstract_zh: 近年来发生的事件凸显了远程医疗解决方案的重要性，该解决方案有可能实现远程治疗和诊断。与此相关的是，计算副语言学是语音处理的一个独特子领域，旨在提取有关说话者的信息，并形成远程医疗应用的重要组成部分。在这项工作中，我们关注两个副语言问题：面具检测和呼吸状态预测。为这些任务开发的解决方案可能非常宝贵，并且有可能帮助监测和限制像 COVID-19 这样的病毒的传播。目前针对这些任务提出的最先进方法是基于 ResNet 等深度神经网络与特征工程相结合的集成。尽管这些集成可以实现高精度，但它们的占地面积也很大，并且需要大量的计算能力，从而降低了资源有限的设备的可移植性。这些缺点还意味着先前提出的解决方案由于其尺寸和速度而无法在远程医疗系统中使用。另一方面，采用较轻的特征工程系统可能很费力，并且进一步增加复杂性，使得它们难以快速创建可部署的系统。这项工作提出了一种基于集成的自动特征选择方法，以实现快速且内存高效的系统的开发。特别是，我们提出了一种基于输出梯度的方法，在训练较小的集合之前使用性能良好的大型集合来发现基本特征。在我们的实验中，我们观察到使用基于输出梯度特征的神经网络集成，推理时间显着减少 (25-32%)。我们的方法提供了一种简单的方法来提高系统速度并实现实时使用，同时通过使用所有光谱特征的更大占地面积的集成保持有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于集成的自动特征选择方法，用于加速声学特征选择以解决口罩检测和呼吸状态预测等副语言任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度神经网络的集成方法虽准确度高，但计算量大且难以部署到资源受限设备，而轻量级系统开发复杂且耗时。
AI.method: 利用输出梯度法从高性能集成模型中筛选关键特征，再训练小型模型以实现高效推理。
AI.result: 实验显示，使用输出梯度特征的神经网络集成模型推理时间减少25-32%，同时保持与全频谱特征模型相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动特征选择有效平衡了模型速度与精度，为实时远程医疗系统提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: End-to-end Ensemble-based Feature Selection for Paralinguistics Tasks 用于副语言学任务的基于端到端集成的特征选择 The events of recent years have highlighted the importance of telemedicine solutions which could potentially allow remote treatment and diagnosis. Relatedly, Computational Paralinguistics, a unique subfield of Speech Processing, aims to extract information about the speaker and form an important part of telemedicine applications. In this work, we focus on two paralinguistic problems: mask detection and breathing state prediction. Solutions developed for these tasks could be invaluable and have the potential to help monitor and limit the spread of a virus like COVID-19. The current state-of-the-art methods proposed for these tasks are ensembles based on deep neural networks like ResNets in conjunction with feature engineering. Although these ensembles can achieve high accuracy, they also have a large footprint and require substantial computational power reducing portability to devices with limited resources. These drawbacks also mean that the previously proposed solutions are infeasible to be used in a telemedicine system due to their size and speed. On the other hand, employing lighter feature-engineered systems can be laborious and add further complexity making them difficult to create a deployable system quickly. This work proposes an ensemble-based automatic feature selection method to enable the development of fast and memory-efficient systems. In particular, we propose an output-gradient-based method to discover essential features using large, well-performing ensembles before training a smaller one. In our experiments, we observed considerable (25-32%) reductions in inference times using neural network ensembles based on output-gradient-based features. Our method offers a simple way to increase the speed of the system and enable real-time usage while maintaining competitive results with larger-footprint ensemble using all spectral features. 近年来发生的事件凸显了远程医疗解决方案的重要性，该解决方案有可能实现远程治疗和诊断。与此相关的是，计算副语言学是语音处理的一个独特子领域，旨在提取有关说话者的信息，并形成远程医疗应用的重要组成部分。在这项工作中，我们关注两个副语言问题：面具检测和呼吸状态预测。为这些任务开发的解决方案可能非常宝贵，并且有可能帮助监测和限制像 COVID-19 这样的病毒的传播。目前针对这些任务提出的最先进方法是基于 ResNet 等深度神经网络与特征工程相结合的集成。尽管这些集成可以实现高精度，但它们的占地面积也很大，并且需要大量的计算能力，从而降低了资源有限的设备的可移植性。这些缺点还意味着先前提出的解决方案由于其尺寸和速度而无法在远程医疗系统中使用。另一方面，采用较轻的特征工程系统可能很费力，并且进一步增加复杂性，使得它们难以快速创建可部署的系统。这项工作提出了一种基于集成的自动特征选择方法，以实现快速且内存高效的系统的开发。特别是，我们提出了一种基于输出梯度的方法，在训练较小的集合之前使用性能良好的大型集合来发现基本特征。在我们的实验中，我们观察到使用基于输出梯度特征的神经网络集成，推理时间显着减少 (25-32%)。我们的方法提供了一种简单的方法来提高系统速度并实现实时使用，同时通过使用所有光谱特征的更大占地面积的集成保持有竞争力的结果。 本文提出了一种基于集成的自动特征选择方法，用于加速声学特征选择以解决口罩检测和呼吸状态预测等副语言任务。 Tamás Grósz,Mittul Singh,Sudarsana Reddy Kadiri,Hemant Kathania,Mikko Kurimo eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Yan Wang,Xin Luo,Zhen-Duo Chen,Peng-Fei Zhang,Meng Liu,Xin-Shun Xu
title: FedVMR: A New Federated Learning method for Video Moment Retrieval
title_zh: FedVMR：一种新的视频时刻检索联邦学习方法
abstract: Despite the great success achieved, existing video moment retrieval (VMR) methods are developed under the assumption that data are centralizedly stored. However, in real-world applications, due to the inherent nature of data generation and privacy concerns, data are often distributed on different silos, bringing huge challenges to effective large-scale training. In this work, we try to overcome above limitation by leveraging the recent success of federated learning. As the first that is explored in VMR field, the new task is defined as video moment retrieval with distributed data. Then, a novel federated learning method named FedVMR is proposed to facilitate large-scale and secure training of VMR models in decentralized environment. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate its effectiveness. This work is the very first attempt to enable safe and efficient VMR training in decentralized scene, which is hoped to pave the way for further study in the related research field.
summary: Despite the great success achieved, existing video moment retrieval (VMR) methods are developed under the assumption that data are centralizedly stored. However, in real-world applications, due to the inherent nature of data generation and privacy concerns, data are often distributed on different silos, bringing huge challenges to effective large-scale training. In this work, we try to overcome above limitation by leveraging the recent success of federated learning. As the first that is explored in VMR field, the new task is defined as video moment retrieval with distributed data. Then, a novel federated learning method named FedVMR is proposed to facilitate large-scale and secure training of VMR models in decentralized environment. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate its effectiveness. This work is the very first attempt to enable safe and efficient VMR training in decentralized scene, which is hoped to pave the way for further study in the related research field.
abstract_zh: 尽管取得了巨大的成功，但现有的视频时刻检索（VMR）方法是在数据集中存储的假设下开发的。然而，在现实应用中，由于数据生成的固有性质和隐私问题，数据往往分布在不同的孤岛上，给有效的大规模训练带来巨大的挑战。在这项工作中，我们尝试利用最近成功的联邦学习来克服上述限制。作为VMR领域的第一个探索，新任务被定义为分布式数据的视频时刻检索。然后，提出了一种名为 FedVMR 的新型联邦学习方法，以促进去中心化环境中大规模且安全的 VMR 模型训练。在基准数据集上的实验证明了其有效性。这项工作是在去中心化场景下实现安全高效的VMR训练的首次尝试，希望为相关研究领域的进一步研究铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedVMR，一种用于分布式视频时刻检索的联邦学习方法，以解决传统集中式数据存储的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时刻检索方法依赖集中式数据存储，而实际应用中数据常因隐私问题分散在不同孤岛，导致大规模训练困难。
AI.method: 首次将联邦学习应用于视频时刻检索领域，设计FedVMR方法，在去中心化环境中实现安全高效的VMR模型训练。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验验证了FedVMR的有效性，证明其能有效处理分布式数据场景下的VMR任务。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为去中心化场景下的安全高效VMR训练提供了新思路，为未来相关研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Masaya Kawamura,Yuma Shirahata,Ryuichi Yamamoto,Kentaro Tachibana
title: Lightweight and High-Fidelity End-to-End Text-to-Speech with Multi-Band Generation and Inverse Short-Time Fourier Transform
title_zh: 具有多频带生成和短时傅里叶逆变换的轻量级高保真端到端文本转语音
abstract: We propose a lightweight end-to-end text-to-speech model using multi-band generation and inverse short-time Fourier transform. Our model is based on VITS, a high-quality end-to-end text-to-speech model, but adopts two changes for more efficient inference: 1) the most computationally expensive component is partially replaced with a simple inverse short-time Fourier transform, and 2) multi-band generation, with fixed or trainable synthesis filters, is used to generate waveforms. Unlike conventional lightweight models, which employ optimization or knowledge distillation separately to train two cascaded components, our method enjoys the full benefits of end-to-end optimization. Experimental results show that our model synthesized speech as natural as that synthesized by VITS, while achieving a real-time factor of 0.066 on an Intel Core i7 CPU, 4.1 times faster than VITS. Moreover, a smaller version of the model significantly outperformed a lightweight baseline model with respect to both naturalness and inference speed. Code and audio samples are available from https://github.com/MasayaKawamura/MB-iSTFT-VITS.
summary: We propose a lightweight end-to-end text-to-speech model using multi-band generation and inverse short-time Fourier transform. Our model is based on VITS, a high-quality end-to-end text-to-speech model, but adopts two changes for more efficient inference: 1) the most computationally expensive component is partially replaced with a simple inverse short-time Fourier transform, and 2) multi-band generation, with fixed or trainable synthesis filters, is used to generate waveforms. Unlike conventional lightweight models, which employ optimization or knowledge distillation separately to train two cascaded components, our method enjoys the full benefits of end-to-end optimization. Experimental results show that our model synthesized speech as natural as that synthesized by VITS, while achieving a real-time factor of 0.066 on an Intel Core i7 CPU, 4.1 times faster than VITS. Moreover, a smaller version of the model significantly outperformed a lightweight baseline model with respect to both naturalness and inference speed. Code and audio samples are available from https://github.com/MasayaKawamura/MB-iSTFT-VITS.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用多频带生成和逆短时傅立叶变换的轻量级端到端文本到语音模型。我们的模型基于 VITS（一种高质量的端到端文本到语音模型），但采用了两项更改来提高推理效率：1）计算成本最高的组件部分替换为简单的短时傅立叶逆变换；2）使用具有固定或可训练合成滤波器的多频带生成来生成波形。与传统的轻量级模型不同，传统的轻量级模型分别采用优化或知识蒸馏来训练两个级联组件，我们的方法享有端到端优化的全部好处。实验结果表明，我们的模型合成的语音与 VITS 合成的语音一样自然，同时在 Intel Core i7 CPU 上实现了 0.066 的实时因子，比 VITS 快 4.1 倍。此外，该模型的较小版本在自然度和推理速度方面都显着优于轻量级基线模型。代码和音频示例可从 https://github.com/MasayaKawamura/MB-iSTFT-VITS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级且高保真的端到端文本到语音模型，使用多频带生成和逆短时傅里叶变换。
AI.motivation: 为了提高文本到语音模型的推理效率，同时保持高质量的语音合成效果，本文旨在设计一种更高效的端到端模型。
AI.method: 基于VITS模型，本文采用两个改进：1）用简单的逆短时傅里叶变换部分替代计算最昂贵的组件，2）使用固定或可训练的合成滤波器进行多频带生成以生成波形。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型在Intel Core i7 CPU上实现了0.066的实时因子，比VITS快4.1倍，同时生成的语音自然度与VITS相当。较小版本的模型在自然度和推理速度上显著优于轻量级基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在保持高质量语音合成的同时显著提高了推理效率，并且在自然度和速度方面优于现有轻量级模型。

search_text: Lightweight and High-Fidelity End-to-End Text-to-Speech with Multi-Band Generation and Inverse Short-Time Fourier Transform 具有多频带生成和短时傅里叶逆变换的轻量级高保真端到端文本转语音 We propose a lightweight end-to-end text-to-speech model using multi-band generation and inverse short-time Fourier transform. Our model is based on VITS, a high-quality end-to-end text-to-speech model, but adopts two changes for more efficient inference: 1) the most computationally expensive component is partially replaced with a simple inverse short-time Fourier transform, and 2) multi-band generation, with fixed or trainable synthesis filters, is used to generate waveforms. Unlike conventional lightweight models, which employ optimization or knowledge distillation separately to train two cascaded components, our method enjoys the full benefits of end-to-end optimization. Experimental results show that our model synthesized speech as natural as that synthesized by VITS, while achieving a real-time factor of 0.066 on an Intel Core i7 CPU, 4.1 times faster than VITS. Moreover, a smaller version of the model significantly outperformed a lightweight baseline model with respect to both naturalness and inference speed. Code and audio samples are available from https://github.com/MasayaKawamura/MB-iSTFT-VITS. 我们提出了一种使用多频带生成和逆短时傅立叶变换的轻量级端到端文本到语音模型。我们的模型基于 VITS（一种高质量的端到端文本到语音模型），但采用了两项更改来提高推理效率：1）计算成本最高的组件部分替换为简单的短时傅立叶逆变换；2）使用具有固定或可训练合成滤波器的多频带生成来生成波形。与传统的轻量级模型不同，传统的轻量级模型分别采用优化或知识蒸馏来训练两个级联组件，我们的方法享有端到端优化的全部好处。实验结果表明，我们的模型合成的语音与 VITS 合成的语音一样自然，同时在 Intel Core i7 CPU 上实现了 0.066 的实时因子，比 VITS 快 4.1 倍。此外，该模型的较小版本在自然度和推理速度方面都显着优于轻量级基线模型。代码和音频示例可从 https://github.com/MasayaKawamura/MB-iSTFT-VITS 获取。 本文提出了一种轻量级且高保真的端到端文本到语音模型，使用多频带生成和逆短时傅里叶变换。 Masaya Kawamura,Yuma Shirahata,Ryuichi Yamamoto,Kentaro Tachibana eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Yan Zhang,Xiyuan Gao,Qingyan Duan,Jiaxu Leng,Xiao Pu,Xinbo Gao
title: Contextual Learning in Fourier Complex Field for VHR Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: VHR 遥感图像傅立叶复数场的情境学习
abstract: Very high-resolution (VHR) remote sensing (RS) image classification is the fundamental task for RS image analysis and understanding. Recently, transformer-based models demonstrated outstanding potential for learning high-order contextual relationships from natural images with general resolution (224x224 pixels) and achieved remarkable results on general image classification tasks. However, the complexity of the naive transformer grows quadratically with the increase in image size, which prevents transformer-based models from VHR RS image (500x500 pixels) classification and other computationally expensive downstream tasks. To this end, we propose to decompose the expensive self-attention (SA) into real and imaginary parts via discrete Fourier transform (DFT) and therefore propose an efficient complex self-attention (CSA) mechanism. Benefiting from the conjugated symmetric property of DFT, CSA is capable to model the high-order contextual information with less than half computations of naive SA. To overcome the gradient explosion in Fourier complex field, we replace the Softmax function with the carefully designed Logmax function to normalize the attention map of CSA and stabilize the gradient propagation. By stacking various layers of CSA blocks, we propose the Fourier Complex Transformer (FCT) model to learn global contextual information from VHR aerial images following the hierarchical manners. Universal experiments conducted on commonly used RS classification data sets demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of FCT, especially on very high-resolution RS images.
summary: Very high-resolution (VHR) remote sensing (RS) image classification is the fundamental task for RS image analysis and understanding. Recently, transformer-based models demonstrated outstanding potential for learning high-order contextual relationships from natural images with general resolution (224x224 pixels) and achieved remarkable results on general image classification tasks. However, the complexity of the naive transformer grows quadratically with the increase in image size, which prevents transformer-based models from VHR RS image (500x500 pixels) classification and other computationally expensive downstream tasks. To this end, we propose to decompose the expensive self-attention (SA) into real and imaginary parts via discrete Fourier transform (DFT) and therefore propose an efficient complex self-attention (CSA) mechanism. Benefiting from the conjugated symmetric property of DFT, CSA is capable to model the high-order contextual information with less than half computations of naive SA. To overcome the gradient explosion in Fourier complex field, we replace the Softmax function with the carefully designed Logmax function to normalize the attention map of CSA and stabilize the gradient propagation. By stacking various layers of CSA blocks, we propose the Fourier Complex Transformer (FCT) model to learn global contextual information from VHR aerial images following the hierarchical manners. Universal experiments conducted on commonly used RS classification data sets demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of FCT, especially on very high-resolution RS images.
abstract_zh: 甚高分辨率（VHR）遥感（RS）图像分类是RS图像分析和理解的基本任务。最近，基于 Transformer 的模型展示了从一般分辨率（224x224 像素）的自然图像中学习高阶上下文关系的巨大潜力，并在一般图像分类任务上取得了显着的结果。然而，朴素 Transformer 的复杂性随着图像大小的增加呈二次方增长，这阻碍了基于 Transformer 的模型进行 VHR RS 图像（500x500 像素）分类和其他计算成本高昂的下游任务。为此，我们建议通过离散傅里叶变换（DFT）将昂贵的自注意力（SA）分解为实部和虚部，从而提出一种高效的复杂自注意力（CSA）机制。受益于 DFT 的共轭对称特性，CSA 能够以不到朴素 SA 一半的计算量对高阶上下文信息进行建模。为了克服傅里叶复数场中的梯度爆炸，我们用精心设计的Logmax函数代替Softmax函数来规范CSA的注意力图并稳定梯度传播。通过堆叠各个层的 CSA 块，我们提出了傅里叶复数变换器 (FCT) 模型，以按照分层方式从 VHR 航空图像中学习全局上下文信息。在常用的 RS 分类数据集上进行的通用实验证明了 FCT 的有效性和效率，特别是在非常高分辨率的 RS 图像上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于傅里叶复数域的高效自注意力机制，用于解决高分辨率遥感图像分类中的计算复杂度问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer模型在处理高分辨率遥感图像时计算复杂度呈平方级增长，导致无法有效处理500x500像素的高分辨率图像。
AI.method: 通过离散傅里叶变换将自注意力分解为实部和虚部，设计复数自注意力机制（CSA），并采用Logmax函数替代Softmax以稳定梯度传播，最终构建分层傅里叶复数Transformer（FCT）模型。
AI.result: 在常用遥感数据集上的实验表明，FCT在保持高分类精度的同时，计算量仅为传统Transformer的一半，尤其在高分辨率图像上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 傅里叶复数域方法有效降低了Transformer的计算复杂度，为高分辨率遥感图像的全局上下文建模提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Animesh Chaturvedi,Aruna Tiwari,Nicolas Spyratos
title: System Network Analytics: Evolution and Stable Rules of a State Series
title_zh: 系统网络分析：状态系列的演化和稳定规则
comment: Accepted on IEEE DSAA and Video Presentation https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ohOeTXoI-IY&list=PLtvWi5o3JBnF3yxcjGdT4KCDLxRBIpsyR
comments: Accepted on IEEE DSAA and Video Presentation https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ohOeTXoI-IY&list=PLtvWi5o3JBnF3yxcjGdT4KCDLxRBIpsyR
abstract: System Evolution Analytics on a system that evolves is a challenge because it makes a State Series SS = {S1, S2... SN} (i.e., a set of states ordered by time) with several inter-connected entities changing over time. We present stability characteristics of interesting evolution rules occurring in multiple states. We defined an evolution rule with its stability as the fraction of states in which the rule is interesting. Extensively, we defined stable rule as the evolution rule having stability that exceeds a given threshold minimum stability (minStab). We also defined persistence metric, a quantitative measure of persistent entity-connections. We explain this with an approach and algorithm for System Network Analytics (SysNet-Analytics), which uses minStab to retrieve Network Evolution Rules (NERs) and Stable NERs (SNERs). The retrieved information is used to calculate a proposed System Network Persistence (SNP) metric. This work is automated as a SysNet-Analytics Tool to demonstrate application on real world systems including: software system, natural-language system, retail market system, and IMDb system. We quantified stability and persistence of entity-connections in a system state series. This results in evolution information, which helps in system evolution analytics based on knowledge discovery and data mining.
summary: System Evolution Analytics on a system that evolves is a challenge because it makes a State Series SS = {S1, S2... SN} (i.e., a set of states ordered by time) with several inter-connected entities changing over time. We present stability characteristics of interesting evolution rules occurring in multiple states. We defined an evolution rule with its stability as the fraction of states in which the rule is interesting. Extensively, we defined stable rule as the evolution rule having stability that exceeds a given threshold minimum stability (minStab). We also defined persistence metric, a quantitative measure of persistent entity-connections. We explain this with an approach and algorithm for System Network Analytics (SysNet-Analytics), which uses minStab to retrieve Network Evolution Rules (NERs) and Stable NERs (SNERs). The retrieved information is used to calculate a proposed System Network Persistence (SNP) metric. This work is automated as a SysNet-Analytics Tool to demonstrate application on real world systems including: software system, natural-language system, retail market system, and IMDb system. We quantified stability and persistence of entity-connections in a system state series. This results in evolution information, which helps in system evolution analytics based on knowledge discovery and data mining.
abstract_zh: 系统演化 对不断演化的系统进行分析是一项挑战，因为它会产生状态序列 SS = {S1, S2...SN}（即一组按时间排序的状态），其中多个互连实体随时间变化。我们提出了在多个状态下发生的有趣演化规则的稳定性特征。我们定义了一个演化规则，其稳定性是该规则感兴趣的状态的分数。广泛地说，我们将稳定规则定义为稳定性超过给定阈值最小稳定性（minStab）的演化规则。我们还定义了持久性度量，这是持久实体连接的定量度量。我们用系统网络分析 (SysNet-Analytics) 的方法和算法来解释这一点，它使用 minStab 来检索网络演化规则 (NER) 和稳定 NER (SNER)。检索到的信息用于计算建议的系统网络持久性 (SNP) 指标。这项工作作为 SysNet 分析工具进行自动化，以演示在现实世界系统上的应用，包括：软件系统、自然语言系统、零售市场系统和 IMDb 系统。我们量化了系统状态系列中实体连接的稳定性和持久性。这会产生演化信息，有助于基于知识发现和数据挖掘的系统演化分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出系统网络分析方法，通过稳定性与持久性指标量化系统状态序列中实体连接的演化规则。
AI.motivation: 动态系统中实体连接随时间变化，传统方法难以有效捕捉稳定演化规则，需量化分析系统演变特征。
AI.method: 定义稳定性阈值(minStab)筛选稳定演化规则(SNERs)，结合持久性度量提出系统网络持久性(SNP)指标，并开发SysNet-Analytics工具进行多领域验证。
AI.result: 在软件系统、自然语言系统、零售市场及IMDb系统中量化验证了实体连接的稳定性与持久性，提取出有效演化信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动化工具实现系统演化分析，为知识发现与数据挖掘提供稳定性与持久性视角的量化依据。

motivation: 动态系统中实体连接随时间变化，传统方法难以有效捕捉稳定演化规则，需量化分析系统演变特征。
method: 定义稳定性阈值(minStab)筛选稳定演化规则(SNERs)，结合持久性度量提出系统网络持久性(SNP)指标，并开发SysNet-Analytics工具进行多领域验证。
result: 在软件系统、自然语言系统、零售市场及IMDb系统中量化验证了实体连接的稳定性与持久性，提取出有效演化信息。
conclusion: 该方法通过自动化工具实现系统演化分析，为知识发现与数据挖掘提供稳定性与持久性视角的量化依据。
search_text: System Network Analytics: Evolution and Stable Rules of a State Series 系统网络分析：状态系列的演化和稳定规则 System Evolution Analytics on a system that evolves is a challenge because it makes a State Series SS = {S1, S2... SN} (i.e., a set of states ordered by time) with several inter-connected entities changing over time. We present stability characteristics of interesting evolution rules occurring in multiple states. We defined an evolution rule with its stability as the fraction of states in which the rule is interesting. Extensively, we defined stable rule as the evolution rule having stability that exceeds a given threshold minimum stability (minStab). We also defined persistence metric, a quantitative measure of persistent entity-connections. We explain this with an approach and algorithm for System Network Analytics (SysNet-Analytics), which uses minStab to retrieve Network Evolution Rules (NERs) and Stable NERs (SNERs). The retrieved information is used to calculate a proposed System Network Persistence (SNP) metric. This work is automated as a SysNet-Analytics Tool to demonstrate application on real world systems including: software system, natural-language system, retail market system, and IMDb system. We quantified stability and persistence of entity-connections in a system state series. This results in evolution information, which helps in system evolution analytics based on knowledge discovery and data mining. 系统演化 对不断演化的系统进行分析是一项挑战，因为它会产生状态序列 SS = {S1, S2...SN}（即一组按时间排序的状态），其中多个互连实体随时间变化。我们提出了在多个状态下发生的有趣演化规则的稳定性特征。我们定义了一个演化规则，其稳定性是该规则感兴趣的状态的分数。广泛地说，我们将稳定规则定义为稳定性超过给定阈值最小稳定性（minStab）的演化规则。我们还定义了持久性度量，这是持久实体连接的定量度量。我们用系统网络分析 (SysNet-Analytics) 的方法和算法来解释这一点，它使用 minStab 来检索网络演化规则 (NER) 和稳定 NER (SNER)。检索到的信息用于计算建议的系统网络持久性 (SNP) 指标。这项工作作为 SysNet 分析工具进行自动化，以演示在现实世界系统上的应用，包括：软件系统、自然语言系统、零售市场系统和 IMDb 系统。我们量化了系统状态系列中实体连接的稳定性和持久性。这会产生演化信息，有助于基于知识发现和数据挖掘的系统演化分析。 本文提出系统网络分析方法，通过稳定性与持久性指标量化系统状态序列中实体连接的演化规则。 Animesh Chaturvedi,Aruna Tiwari,Nicolas Spyratos cs.AI,cs.SE

authors_text: Yuma Shirahata,Ryuichi Yamamoto,Eunwoo Song,Ryo Terashima,Jae-Min Kim,Kentaro Tachibana
title: Period VITS: Variational Inference with Explicit Pitch Modeling for End-to-end Emotional Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 周期 VITS：使用显式音调建模进行端到端情感语音合成的变分推理
abstract: Several fully end-to-end text-to-speech (TTS) models have been proposed that have shown better performance compared to cascade models (i.e., training acoustic and vocoder models separately). However, they often generate unstable pitch contour with audible artifacts when the dataset contains emotional attributes, i.e., large diversity of pronunciation and prosody. To address this problem, we propose Period VITS, a novel end-to-end TTS model that incorporates an explicit periodicity generator. In the proposed method, we introduce a frame pitch predictor that predicts prosodic features, such as pitch and voicing flags, from the input text. From these features, the proposed periodicity generator produces a sample-level sinusoidal source that enables the waveform decoder to accurately reproduce the pitch. Finally, the entire model is jointly optimized in an end-to-end manner with variational inference and adversarial objectives. As a result, the decoder becomes capable of generating more stable, expressive, and natural output waveforms. The experimental results showed that the proposed model significantly outperforms baseline models in terms of naturalness, with improved pitch stability in the generated samples.
summary: Several fully end-to-end text-to-speech (TTS) models have been proposed that have shown better performance compared to cascade models (i.e., training acoustic and vocoder models separately). However, they often generate unstable pitch contour with audible artifacts when the dataset contains emotional attributes, i.e., large diversity of pronunciation and prosody. To address this problem, we propose Period VITS, a novel end-to-end TTS model that incorporates an explicit periodicity generator. In the proposed method, we introduce a frame pitch predictor that predicts prosodic features, such as pitch and voicing flags, from the input text. From these features, the proposed periodicity generator produces a sample-level sinusoidal source that enables the waveform decoder to accurately reproduce the pitch. Finally, the entire model is jointly optimized in an end-to-end manner with variational inference and adversarial objectives. As a result, the decoder becomes capable of generating more stable, expressive, and natural output waveforms. The experimental results showed that the proposed model significantly outperforms baseline models in terms of naturalness, with improved pitch stability in the generated samples.
abstract_zh: 已经提出了几种完全端到端的文本到语音（TTS）模型，与级联模型（即分别训练声学和声码器模型）相比，它们表现出了更好的性能。然而，当数据集包含情感属性（即发音和韵律的多样性）时，它们经常会生成不稳定的音高轮廓并伴有可听伪影。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了Period VITS，这是一种新颖的端到端 TTS 模型，其中包含显式周期性生成器。在所提出的方法中，我们引入了一个帧音高预测器，它可以根据输入文本预测韵律特征，例如音高和发声标记。根据这些特征，所提出的周期性发生器产生样本级正弦源，使波形解码器能够准确地再现音调。最后，整个模型通过变分推理和对抗目标以端到端的方式联合优化。因此，解码器能够生成更稳定、更具表现力和自然的输出波形。实验结果表明，所提出的模型在自然度方面显着优于基线模型，并且生成的样本的基音稳定性得到提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Period VITS模型，通过显式周期性建模解决情感语音合成中端到端模型的基频不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端TTS模型在处理包含情感属性的数据集时，常因发音和韵律多样性导致生成语音的基频轮廓不稳定并产生可听伪影。
AI.method: 引入帧级基频预测器提取韵律特征，并设计周期性生成器生成正弦波源信号，结合变分推理和对抗目标进行端到端联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在自然度指标上显著优于基线模型，生成样本的基频稳定性得到提升。
AI.conclusion: Period VITS通过显式周期性建模有效解决了情感语音合成中的基频不稳定问题，提升了生成语音的质量与表现力。
