authors_text: Borko Bošković,Jana Herzog,Janez Brest
title: Parallel Self-Avoiding Walks for a Low-Autocorrelation Binary Sequences Problem
title_zh: 低自相关二元序列问题的并行自回避游走
abstract: A low-autocorrelation binary sequences problem with a high figure of merit factor represents a formidable computational challenge. An efficient parallel computing algorithm is required to reach the new best-known solutions for this problem. Therefore, we developed the $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ solver for the skew-symmetric search space. The developed solver takes the advantage of parallel computing on graphics processing units. The solver organized the search process as a sequence of parallel and contiguous self-avoiding walks and achieved a speedup factor of 387 compared with $\mathit{lssOrel}$, its predecessor. The $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ solver belongs to stochastic solvers and can not guarantee the optimality of solutions. To mitigate this problem, we established the predictive model of stopping conditions according to the small instances for which the optimal skew-symmetric solutions are known. With its help and 99% probability, the $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ solver found all the known and seven new best-known skew-symmetric sequences for odd instances from $L=121$ to $L=223$. For larger instances, the solver can not reach 99% probability within our limitations, but it still found several new best-known binary sequences. We also analyzed the trend of the best merit factor values, and it shows that as sequence size increases, the value of the merit factor also increases, and this trend is flatter for larger instances.
summary: A low-autocorrelation binary sequences problem with a high figure of merit factor represents a formidable computational challenge. An efficient parallel computing algorithm is required to reach the new best-known solutions for this problem. Therefore, we developed the $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ solver for the skew-symmetric search space. The developed solver takes the advantage of parallel computing on graphics processing units. The solver organized the search process as a sequence of parallel and contiguous self-avoiding walks and achieved a speedup factor of 387 compared with $\mathit{lssOrel}$, its predecessor. The $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ solver belongs to stochastic solvers and can not guarantee the optimality of solutions. To mitigate this problem, we established the predictive model of stopping conditions according to the small instances for which the optimal skew-symmetric solutions are known. With its help and 99% probability, the $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ solver found all the known and seven new best-known skew-symmetric sequences for odd instances from $L=121$ to $L=223$. For larger instances, the solver can not reach 99% probability within our limitations, but it still found several new best-known binary sequences. We also analyzed the trend of the best merit factor values, and it shows that as sequence size increases, the value of the merit factor also increases, and this trend is flatter for larger instances.
abstract_zh: 具有高品质因数的低自相关二进制序列问题代表着巨大的计算挑战。需要一种高效的并行计算算法来找到该问题的新的最著名的解决方案。因此，我们为斜对称搜索空间开发了 $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ 求解器。开发的求解器利用了图形处理单元上并行计算的优势。该求解器将搜索过程组织为一系列并行且连续的自回避行走，与它的前身 $\mathit{lssOrel}$ 相比，加速系数达到了 387。 $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$求解器属于随机求解器，不能保证解的最优性。为了缓解这个问题，我们根据已知最佳斜对称解的小实例建立了停止条件的预测模型。借助其帮助和 99% 的概率，$\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ 求解器找到了从 $L=121$ 到 $L=223$ 的奇数实例的所有已知和七个新的最知名的倾斜对称序列。对于较大的实例，求解器在我们的限制内无法达到 99% 的概率，但它仍然发现了几个新的最著名的二进制序列。我们还分析了最佳指标因子值的趋势，结果表明，随着序列大小的增加，指标因子的值也会增加，并且对于较大的实例，这种趋势更加平坦。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于并行自避行走的算法，用于求解低自相关二进制序列问题，通过GPU加速显著提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 低自相关二进制序列的最优解计算复杂度高，传统方法效率不足，需开发高效并行算法突破计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 开发sokol_skew求解器，利用GPU并行计算实现自避行走搜索，结合已知小规模最优解建立停止条件预测模型。
AI.result: 相比前代算法提速387倍，在L=121至223的奇数长度序列中以99%概率发现7个新最优解，并揭示merit因数随长度增长趋缓的规律。
AI.conclusion: 并行自避行走方法显著提升搜索效率，为大规模低自相关序列优化提供新思路，但大实例仍存在解的完备性挑战。

With its help and 99% probability, the $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ solver found all the known and seven new best-known skew-symmetric sequences for odd instances from $L=121$ to $L=223$. For larger instances, the solver can not reach 99% probability within our limitations, but it still found several new best-known binary sequences. We also analyzed the trend of the best merit factor values, and it shows that as sequence size increases, the value of the merit factor also increases, and this trend is flatter for larger instances. 具有高品质因数的低自相关二进制序列问题代表着巨大的计算挑战。需要一种高效的并行计算算法来找到该问题的新的最著名的解决方案。因此，我们为斜对称搜索空间开发了 $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ 求解器。开发的求解器利用了图形处理单元上并行计算的优势。该求解器将搜索过程组织为一系列并行且连续的自回避行走，与它的前身 $\mathit{lssOrel}$ 相比，加速系数达到了 387。 $\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$求解器属于随机求解器，不能保证解的最优性。为了缓解这个问题，我们根据已知最佳斜对称解的小实例建立了停止条件的预测模型。借助其帮助和 99% 的概率，$\mathit{sokol}_{\mathit{skew}}$ 求解器找到了从 $L=121$ 到 $L=223$ 的奇数实例的所有已知和七个新的最知名的倾斜对称序列。对于较大的实例，求解器在我们的限制内无法达到 99% 的概率，但它仍然发现了几个新的最著名的二进制序列。我们还分析了最佳指标因子值的趋势，结果表明，随着序列大小的增加，指标因子的值也会增加，并且对于较大的实例，这种趋势更加平坦。 本文提出一种基于并行自避行走的算法，用于求解低自相关二进制序列问题，通过GPU加速显著提升计算效率。 Borko Bošković,Jana Herzog,Janez Brest cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Yiqiang Cai,Shengchen Li
title: Exploring the Effects of Channel Sparsity on Neural Network Pruning for Acoustic Scene Classification
title_zh: 探索通道稀疏性对声学场景分类神经网络修剪的影响
abstract: Acoustic Scene Classification (ASC) algorithms are usually expected to be deployed in resource-constrained systems. Existing works reduce the complexity of ASC algorithms by pruning some components, e.g. pruning channels in neural network. In practice, neural networks are often trained with sparsification such that unimportant channels can be found and further pruned. However, little efforts have been made to explore the the impact of channel sparsity on neural network pruning. To fully utilize the benefits of pruning for ASC, and to make sure the model performs consistently, we need a more profound comprehension of channel sparsification and its effects. This paper examines the internal weights acquired by convolutional neural networks that will undergone pruning. The study discusses how these weights can be utilized to create a novel metric, Weight Skewness (WS), for quantifying the sparsity of channels. We also provide a new approach to compare the performance of different pruning methods, which balances the trade-off between accuracy and complexity. The experiment results demonstrate that 1) applying higher channel sparsity to models can achieve greater compression rates while maintaining acceptable levels of accuracy; 2) the selection of pruning method has little influence on result 1); 3) MobileNets exhibit more significant benefits from channel sparsification than VGGNets and ResNets.
summary: Acoustic Scene Classification (ASC) algorithms are usually expected to be deployed in resource-constrained systems. Existing works reduce the complexity of ASC algorithms by pruning some components, e.g. pruning channels in neural network. In practice, neural networks are often trained with sparsification such that unimportant channels can be found and further pruned. However, little efforts have been made to explore the the impact of channel sparsity on neural network pruning. To fully utilize the benefits of pruning for ASC, and to make sure the model performs consistently, we need a more profound comprehension of channel sparsification and its effects. This paper examines the internal weights acquired by convolutional neural networks that will undergone pruning. The study discusses how these weights can be utilized to create a novel metric, Weight Skewness (WS), for quantifying the sparsity of channels. We also provide a new approach to compare the performance of different pruning methods, which balances the trade-off between accuracy and complexity. The experiment results demonstrate that 1) applying higher channel sparsity to models can achieve greater compression rates while maintaining acceptable levels of accuracy; 2) the selection of pruning method has little influence on result 1); 3) MobileNets exhibit more significant benefits from channel sparsification than VGGNets and ResNets.
abstract_zh: 声学场景分类 (ASC) 算法通常预计部署在资源受限的系统中。现有的工作通过修剪一些组件来降低 ASC 算法的复杂性，例如神经网络中的修剪通道。在实践中，神经网络通常通过稀疏化进行训练，以便可以找到并进一步修剪不重要的通道。然而，很少有人努力探索通道稀疏性对神经网络剪枝的影响。为了充分利用 ASC 剪枝的好处，并确保模型性能一致，我们需要对通道稀疏化及其影响有更深刻的理解。本文研究了将经过剪枝的卷积神经网络获得的内部权重。该研究讨论了如何利用这些权重来创建一种新颖的指标——权重偏度（WS），以量化通道的稀疏性。我们还提供了一种新方法来比较不同剪枝方法的性能，从而平衡了准确性和复杂性之间的权衡。实验结果表明：1）对模型应用更高的通道稀疏度可以实现更高的压缩率，同时保持可接受的精度水平； 2）剪枝方法的选择对结果1）影响不大； 3）MobileNets 比 VGGNets 和 ResNets 表现出更显着的通道稀疏化优势。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通道稀疏性对神经网络剪枝在声学场景分类中的影响，提出新的权重偏斜度量方法并分析不同网络结构的剪枝效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分探索通道稀疏性对剪枝的影响，而ASC算法需在资源受限设备部署，需平衡模型压缩与准确率。
AI.method: 通过分析卷积神经网络内部权重，提出权重偏斜（WS）度量通道稀疏性，并设计兼顾准确率与复杂度的剪枝方法对比框架。
AI.result: 1) 高通道稀疏性可实现更高压缩率且保持准确率；2) 剪枝方法对结果影响较小；3) MobileNet比VGGNet/ResNet更受益于通道稀疏化。
AI.conclusion: 通道稀疏性是ASC模型剪枝的关键因素，MobileNet结构在剪枝优化中表现更优，需针对性设计剪枝策略。

authors_text: Huajian Si,Zeyong Wei,Zhe Zhu,Honghua Chen,Dong Liang,Weiming Wang,Mingqiang Wei
title: LBF:Learnable Bilateral Filter For Point Cloud Denoising
title_zh: LBF：用于点云去噪的可学习双边滤波器
abstract: Bilateral filter (BF) is a fast, lightweight and effective tool for image denoising and well extended to point cloud denoising. However, it often involves continual yet manual parameter adjustment; this inconvenience discounts the efficiency and user experience to obtain satisfied denoising results. We propose LBF, an end-to-end learnable bilateral filtering network for point cloud denoising; to our knowledge, this is the first time. Unlike the conventional BF and its variants that receive the same parameters for a whole point cloud, LBF learns adaptive parameters for each point according its geometric characteristic (e.g., corner, edge, plane), avoiding remnant noise, wrongly-removed geometric details, and distorted shapes. Besides the learnable paradigm of BF, we have two cores to facilitate LBF. First, different from the local BF, LBF possesses a global-scale feature perception ability by exploiting multi-scale patches of each point. Second, LBF formulates a geometry-aware bi-directional projection loss, leading the denoising results to being faithful to their underlying surfaces. Users can apply our LBF without any laborious parameter tuning to achieve the optimal denoising results. Experiments show clear improvements of LBF over its competitors on both synthetic and real-scanned datasets.
summary: Bilateral filter (BF) is a fast, lightweight and effective tool for image denoising and well extended to point cloud denoising. However, it often involves continual yet manual parameter adjustment; this inconvenience discounts the efficiency and user experience to obtain satisfied denoising results. We propose LBF, an end-to-end learnable bilateral filtering network for point cloud denoising; to our knowledge, this is the first time. Unlike the conventional BF and its variants that receive the same parameters for a whole point cloud, LBF learns adaptive parameters for each point according its geometric characteristic (e.g., corner, edge, plane), avoiding remnant noise, wrongly-removed geometric details, and distorted shapes. Besides the learnable paradigm of BF, we have two cores to facilitate LBF. First, different from the local BF, LBF possesses a global-scale feature perception ability by exploiting multi-scale patches of each point. Second, LBF formulates a geometry-aware bi-directional projection loss, leading the denoising results to being faithful to their underlying surfaces. Users can apply our LBF without any laborious parameter tuning to achieve the optimal denoising results. Experiments show clear improvements of LBF over its competitors on both synthetic and real-scanned datasets.
abstract_zh: 双边滤波器（BF）是一种快速、轻量级且有效的图像去噪工具，并很好地扩展到点云去噪。然而，它通常涉及持续的手动参数调整；这种不便降低了获得满意的去噪结果的效率和用户体验。我们提出LBF，一种用于点云去噪的端到端可学习双边滤波网络；据我们所知，这是第一次。与传统的 BF 及其变体接收整个点云的相同参数不同，LBF 根据每个点的几何特征（例如角、边缘、平面）学习自适应参数，避免残留噪声、错误删除的几何细节和扭曲的形状。除了 BF 的可学习范式之外，我们还有两个核心来促进 LBF。首先，与局部BF不同，LBF通过利用每个点的多尺度补丁而拥有全局尺度的特征感知能力。其次，LBF 制定了几何感知的双向投影损失，使去噪结果忠实于其底层表面。用户可以应用我们的LBF，无需任何费力的参数调整即可获得最佳的去噪结果。实验表明，LBF 在合成数据集和真实扫描数据集上均优于竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LBF（可学习双边滤波器），用于点云去噪任务，通过自适应参数学习和几何感知损失函数提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统双边滤波需手动调整参数，效率低且易残留噪声或破坏几何细节，亟需自动化且自适应的点云去噪方法。
AI.method: 设计端到端可学习双边滤波网络，为每个点学习几何特征自适应参数，结合多尺度补丁全局感知与几何感知双向投影损失。
AI.result: 在合成与真实点云数据集上，LBF相较现有方法显著提升去噪效果，无需参数调优即可获得最优结果。
AI.conclusion: LBF通过自适应参数学习和全局几何感知机制，有效解决了传统双边滤波的局限性，为点云去噪提供高效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出LBF（可学习双边滤波器），用于点云去噪任务，通过自适应参数学习和几何感知损失函数提升去噪效果。

authors_text: Shrajan Bhandary,Zahra Babaiee,Dejan Kostyszyn,Tobias Fechter,Constantinos Zamboglou,Anca-Ligia Grosu,Radu Grosu
title: IB-U-Nets: Improving medical image segmentation tasks with 3D Inductive Biased kernels
title_zh: IB-U-Nets：使用 3D 归纳偏置内核改进医学图像分割任务
abstract: Despite the success of convolutional neural networks for 3D medical-image segmentation, the architectures currently used are still not robust enough to the protocols of different scanners, and the variety of image properties they produce. Moreover, access to large-scale datasets with annotated regions of interest is scarce, and obtaining good results is thus difficult. To overcome these challenges, we introduce IB-U-Nets, a novel architecture with inductive bias, inspired by the visual processing in vertebrates. With the 3D U-Net as the base, we add two 3D residual components to the second encoder blocks. They provide an inductive bias, helping U-Nets to segment anatomical structures from 3D images with increased robustness and accuracy. We compared IB-U-Nets with state-of-the-art 3D U-Nets on multiple modalities and organs, such as the prostate and spleen, using the same training and testing pipeline, including data processing, augmentation and cross-validation. Our results demonstrate the superior robustness and accuracy of IB-U-Nets, especially on small datasets, as is typically the case in medical-image analysis. IB-U-Nets source code and models are publicly available.
summary: Despite the success of convolutional neural networks for 3D medical-image segmentation, the architectures currently used are still not robust enough to the protocols of different scanners, and the variety of image properties they produce. Moreover, access to large-scale datasets with annotated regions of interest is scarce, and obtaining good results is thus difficult. To overcome these challenges, we introduce IB-U-Nets, a novel architecture with inductive bias, inspired by the visual processing in vertebrates. With the 3D U-Net as the base, we add two 3D residual components to the second encoder blocks. They provide an inductive bias, helping U-Nets to segment anatomical structures from 3D images with increased robustness and accuracy. We compared IB-U-Nets with state-of-the-art 3D U-Nets on multiple modalities and organs, such as the prostate and spleen, using the same training and testing pipeline, including data processing, augmentation and cross-validation. Our results demonstrate the superior robustness and accuracy of IB-U-Nets, especially on small datasets, as is typically the case in medical-image analysis. IB-U-Nets source code and models are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 尽管卷积神经网络在 3D 医学图像分割方面取得了成功，但目前使用的架构对于不同扫描仪的协议及其产生的各种图像属性仍然不够稳健。此外，对带有注释的感兴趣区域的大规模数据集的访问很少，因此很难获得良好的结果。为了克服这些挑战，我们引入了 IB-U-Nets，这是一种具有归纳偏差的新颖架构，其灵感来自脊椎动物的视觉处理。以 3D U-Net 为基础，我们向第二个编码器块添加两个 3D 残差组件。它们提供归纳偏差，帮助 U-Net 从 3D 图像中分割解剖结构，提高鲁棒性和准确性。我们使用相同的训练和测试流程（包括数据处理、增强和交叉验证），在多种模式和器官（例如前列腺和脾脏）上将 IB-U-Net 与最先进的 3D U-Net 进行比较。我们的结果证明了 IB-U-Net 的卓越鲁棒性和准确性，尤其是在小型数据集上，就像医学图像分析中的典型情况一样。 IB-U-Nets 源代码和模型是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IB-U-Nets，通过引入3D归纳偏置核提升医学图像分割任务的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有3D卷积神经网络在医学图像分割中对不同扫描仪协议和图像特性敏感，且标注数据稀缺，难以获得稳定结果。
AI.method: 以3D U-Net为基底，在第二编码器模块添加两个带归纳偏置的3D残差组件，增强对解剖结构的分割能力。
AI.result: 在前列腺、脾脏等多器官和模态数据上验证，IB-U-Nets在小数据集上表现更优，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 归纳偏置设计有效提升了医学图像分割的准确性与鲁棒性，为数据稀缺场景提供可行方案。

With the 3D U-Net as the base, we add two 3D residual components to the second encoder blocks. authors_text: Ligen Shi,Chang Liu,Di He,Xing Zhao,Jun Qiu
title: Matching entropy based disparity estimation from light field
title_zh: 基于光场的匹配熵视差估计
abstract: A major challenge for matching-based depth estimation is to prevent mismatches in occlusion and smooth regions. An effective matching window satisfying three characteristics: texture richness, disparity consistency and anti-occlusion should be able to prevent mismatches to some extent. According to these characteristics, we propose matching entropy in the spatial domain of light field to measure the amount of correct information in a matching window, which provides the criterion for matching window selection. Based on matching entropy regularization, we establish an optimization model for depth estimation with a matching cost fidelity term. To find the optimum, we propose a two-step adaptive matching algorithm. First, the region type is adaptively determined to identify occluding, occluded, smooth and textured regions. Then, the matching entropy criterion is used to adaptively select the size and shape of matching windows, as well as the visible viewpoints. The two-step process can reduce mismatches and redundant calculations by selecting effective matching windows. The experimental results on synthetic and real data show that the proposed method can effectively improve the accuracy of depth estimation in occlusion and smooth regions and has strong robustness for different noise levels. Therefore, high-precision depth estimation from 4D light field data is achieved.
summary: A major challenge for matching-based depth estimation is to prevent mismatches in occlusion and smooth regions. An effective matching window satisfying three characteristics: texture richness, disparity consistency and anti-occlusion should be able to prevent mismatches to some extent. According to these characteristics, we propose matching entropy in the spatial domain of light field to measure the amount of correct information in a matching window, which provides the criterion for matching window selection. Based on matching entropy regularization, we establish an optimization model for depth estimation with a matching cost fidelity term. To find the optimum, we propose a two-step adaptive matching algorithm. First, the region type is adaptively determined to identify occluding, occluded, smooth and textured regions. Then, the matching entropy criterion is used to adaptively select the size and shape of matching windows, as well as the visible viewpoints. The two-step process can reduce mismatches and redundant calculations by selecting effective matching windows. The experimental results on synthetic and real data show that the proposed method can effectively improve the accuracy of depth estimation in occlusion and smooth regions and has strong robustness for different noise levels. Therefore, high-precision depth estimation from 4D light field data is achieved.
abstract_zh: 基于匹配的深度估计的一个主要挑战是防止遮挡和平滑区域的不匹配。满足纹理丰富度、视差一致性和抗遮挡三个特征的有效匹配窗口应该能够在一定程度上防止失配。根据这些特点，我们提出了光场空间域的匹配熵来衡量匹配窗口中正确信息的数量，为匹配窗口的选择提供了准则。基于匹配熵正则化，我们建立了具有匹配成本保真项的深度估计优化模型。为了找到最优值，我们提出了一种两步自适应匹配算法。首先，自适应地确定区域类型以识别遮挡、被遮挡、平滑和纹理区域。然后，使用匹配熵准则自适应地选择匹配窗口的大小和形状以及可见视点。两步过程可以通过选择有效的匹配窗口来减少失配和冗余计算。合成数据和真实数据的实验结果表明，该方法能够有效提高遮挡和平滑区域深度估计的精度，并且对不同噪声水平具有较强的鲁棒性。因此，实现了4D光场数据的高精度深度估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于匹配熵的光场视差估计方法，通过优化匹配窗口选择提升深度估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统基于匹配的深度估计方法在遮挡和光滑区域易产生误匹配，需设计兼顾纹理丰富性、视差一致性和抗遮挡特性的匹配窗口。
AI.method: 提出空间域匹配熵度量匹配窗口信息量，建立包含匹配代价保真项的优化模型，并设计两步自适应算法：区域类型识别与匹配窗口参数自适应选择。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证了方法在遮挡和光滑区域的深度估计精度提升，且对不同噪声水平具有强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过匹配熵正则化与自适应窗口选择，实现了4D光场数据的高精度深度估计。

authors_text: Liangchen Song,Anpei Chen,Zhong Li,Zhang Chen,Lele Chen,Junsong Yuan,Yi Xu,Andreas Geiger
title: NeRFPlayer: A Streamable Dynamic Scene Representation with Decomposed Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: NeRFPlayer：具有分解神经辐射场的可流式动态场景表示
abstract: Visually exploring in a real-world 4D spatiotemporal space freely in VR has been a long-term quest. The task is especially appealing when only a few or even single RGB cameras are used for capturing the dynamic scene. To this end, we present an efficient framework capable of fast reconstruction, compact modeling, and streamable rendering. First, we propose to decompose the 4D spatiotemporal space according to temporal characteristics. Points in the 4D space are associated with probabilities of belonging to three categories: static, deforming, and new areas. Each area is represented and regularized by a separate neural field. Second, we propose a hybrid representations based feature streaming scheme for efficiently modeling the neural fields. Our approach, coined NeRFPlayer, is evaluated on dynamic scenes captured by single hand-held cameras and multi-camera arrays, achieving comparable or superior rendering performance in terms of quality and speed comparable to recent state-of-the-art methods, achieving reconstruction in 10 seconds per frame and interactive rendering.
summary: Visually exploring in a real-world 4D spatiotemporal space freely in VR has been a long-term quest. The task is especially appealing when only a few or even single RGB cameras are used for capturing the dynamic scene. To this end, we present an efficient framework capable of fast reconstruction, compact modeling, and streamable rendering. First, we propose to decompose the 4D spatiotemporal space according to temporal characteristics. Points in the 4D space are associated with probabilities of belonging to three categories: static, deforming, and new areas. Each area is represented and regularized by a separate neural field. Second, we propose a hybrid representations based feature streaming scheme for efficiently modeling the neural fields. Our approach, coined NeRFPlayer, is evaluated on dynamic scenes captured by single hand-held cameras and multi-camera arrays, achieving comparable or superior rendering performance in terms of quality and speed comparable to recent state-of-the-art methods, achieving reconstruction in 10 seconds per frame and interactive rendering.
abstract_zh: 在 VR 中自由地在现实世界 4D 时空空间中进行视觉探索一直是一个长期的追求。当仅使用几个甚至单个 RGB 摄像机来捕捉动态场景时，该任务尤其有吸引力。为此，我们提出了一个能够快速重建、紧凑建模和流式渲染的高效框架。首先，我们建议根据时间特征分解 4D 时空空间。 4D 空间中的点与属于三类的概率相关：静态区域、变形区域和新区域。每个区域都由一个单独的神经场表示和规范化。其次，我们提出了一种基于混合表示的特征流方案，用于有效地建模神经场。我们的方法被称为 NeRFPlayer，在单手持相机和多相机阵列捕获的动态场景上进行评估，在质量和速度方面实现了与最新最先进方法相当或更高的渲染性能，实现了每帧 10 秒的重建和交互式渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeRFPlayer，一种基于分解神经辐射场的流式动态场景表示方法，可在单目或多个相机捕捉的动态场景中实现快速重建与交互式渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有动态场景重建方法在计算效率与实时渲染能力上存在不足，难以满足VR中对4D时空的自由探索需求，尤其在单目相机采集条件下。
AI.method: 通过时间特征分解4D时空为静态、变形和新区域三类，分别用独立神经场建模，并设计混合特征流方案实现高效神经场表示与流式渲染。
AI.result: 在单目手持相机与多相机阵列数据集上，NeRFPlayer达到每帧10秒的重建速度与交互式渲染性能，质量与速度均优于或接近最新方法。
AI.conclusion: NeRFPlayer通过时空分解与混合流式表示，在动态场景重建效率与渲染交互性方面取得显著进展，为VR应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: NeRFPlayer: A Streamable Dynamic Scene Representation with Decomposed Neural Radiance Fields NeRFPlayer：具有分解神经辐射场的可流式动态场景表示 Visually exploring in a real-world 4D spatiotemporal space freely in VR has been a long-term quest. The task is especially appealing when only a few or even single RGB cameras are used for capturing the dynamic scene. To this end, we present an efficient framework capable of fast reconstruction, compact modeling, and streamable rendering. First, we propose to decompose the 4D spatiotemporal space according to temporal characteristics. Points in the 4D space are associated with probabilities of belonging to three categories: static, deforming, and new areas. Each area is represented and regularized by a separate neural field. Second, we propose a hybrid representations based feature streaming scheme for efficiently modeling the neural fields. Our approach, coined NeRFPlayer, is evaluated on dynamic scenes captured by single hand-held cameras and multi-camera arrays, achieving comparable or superior rendering performance in terms of quality and speed comparable to recent state-of-the-art methods, achieving reconstruction in 10 seconds per frame and interactive rendering. 在 VR 中自由地在现实世界 4D 时空空间中进行视觉探索一直是一个长期的追求。当仅使用几个甚至单个 RGB 摄像机来捕捉动态场景时，该任务尤其有吸引力。为此，我们提出了一个能够快速重建、紧凑建模和流式渲染的高效框架。首先，我们建议根据时间特征分解 4D 时空空间。 4D 空间中的点与属于三类的概率相关：静态区域、变形区域和新区域。每个区域都由一个单独的神经场表示和规范化。其次，我们提出了一种基于混合表示的特征流方案，用于有效地建模神经场。我们的方法被称为 NeRFPlayer，在单手持相机和多相机阵列捕获的动态场景上进行评估，在质量和速度方面实现了与最新最先进方法相当或更高的渲染性能，实现了每帧 10 秒的重建和交互式渲染。 本文提出NeRFPlayer，一种基于分解神经辐射场的流式动态场景表示方法，可在单目或多个相机捕捉的动态场景中实现快速重建与交互式渲染。 Liangchen Song,Anpei Chen,Zhong Li,Zhang Chen,Lele Chen,Junsong Yuan,Yi Xu,Andreas Geiger cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.MM

authors_text: Jongwoo Park,Kumara Kahatapitiya,Donghyun Kim,Shivchander Sudalairaj,Quanfu Fan,Michael S. Ryoo
title: Grafting Vision Transformers
title_zh: 嫁接视觉变形金刚
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have recently become the state-of-the-art across many computer vision tasks. In contrast to convolutional networks (CNNs), ViTs enable global information sharing even within shallow layers of a network, i.e., among high-resolution features. However, this perk was later overlooked with the success of pyramid architectures such as Swin Transformer, which show better performance-complexity trade-offs. In this paper, we present a simple and efficient add-on component (termed GrafT) that considers global dependencies and multi-scale information throughout the network, in both high- and low-resolution features alike. It has the flexibility of branching out at arbitrary depths and shares most of the parameters and computations of the backbone. GrafT shows consistent gains over various well-known models which includes both hybrid and pure Transformer types, both homogeneous and pyramid structures, and various self-attention methods. In particular, it largely benefits mobile-size models by providing high-level semantics. On the ImageNet-1k dataset, GrafT delivers +3.9%, +1.4%, and +1.9% top-1 accuracy improvement to DeiT-T, Swin-T, and MobileViT-XXS, respectively. Our code and models will be made available.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have recently become the state-of-the-art across many computer vision tasks. In contrast to convolutional networks (CNNs), ViTs enable global information sharing even within shallow layers of a network, i.e., among high-resolution features. However, this perk was later overlooked with the success of pyramid architectures such as Swin Transformer, which show better performance-complexity trade-offs. In this paper, we present a simple and efficient add-on component (termed GrafT) that considers global dependencies and multi-scale information throughout the network, in both high- and low-resolution features alike. It has the flexibility of branching out at arbitrary depths and shares most of the parameters and computations of the backbone. GrafT shows consistent gains over various well-known models which includes both hybrid and pure Transformer types, both homogeneous and pyramid structures, and various self-attention methods. In particular, it largely benefits mobile-size models by providing high-level semantics. On the ImageNet-1k dataset, GrafT delivers +3.9%, +1.4%, and +1.9% top-1 accuracy improvement to DeiT-T, Swin-T, and MobileViT-XXS, respectively. Our code and models will be made available.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 最近已成为许多计算机视觉任务中最先进的技术。与卷积网络 (CNN) 相比，ViT 即使在网络的浅层（即高分辨率特征之间）也可以实现全局信息共享。然而，随着 Swin Transformer 等金字塔架构的成功，这种优势后来被忽视了，它显示出更好的性能与复杂性权衡。在本文中，我们提出了一个简单而高效的附加组件（称为 GrafT），它考虑了整个网络的全局依赖性和多尺度信息，无论是高分辨率还是低分辨率特征。它具有在任意深度分支的灵活性，并共享主干的大部分参数和计算。 GrafT 与各种知名模型相比表现出一致的增益，其中包括混合和纯 Transformer 类型、同构和金字塔结构以及各种自注意力方法。特别是，它通过提供高级语义极大地有利于移动尺寸模型。在 ImageNet-1k 数据集上，GrafT 分别比 DeiT-T、Swin-T 和 MobileViT-XXS 的 top-1 准确率提高了 +3.9%、+1.4% 和 +1.9%。我们的代码和模型将可供使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GrafT的简单高效附加组件，通过融合全局依赖关系和多尺度信息提升视觉Transformer（ViT）性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT具有全局信息共享优势，但金字塔结构（如Swin Transformer）在性能与复杂度平衡上表现更优，需改进ViT的效率与准确性。
AI.method: 设计GrafT模块，在任意网络深度分支，共享主干参数，同时处理高低分辨率特征，整合全局与多尺度信息。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k数据集上，GrafT使DeiT-T、Swin-T、MobileViT-XXS的top-1准确率分别提升3.9%、1.4%、1.9%，显著增强轻量模型语义表现。
AI.conclusion: GrafT适用于多种Transformer架构，有效提升模型性能，尤其对移动端模型优化显著，代码与模型将公开。

Ryoo cs.CV

authors_text: Ilja Baumann,Dominik Wagner,Franziska Braun,Sebastian P. Bayerl,Elmar Nöth,Korbinian Riedhammer,Tobias Bocklet
title: Influence of Utterance and Speaker Characteristics on the Classification of Children with Cleft Lip and Palate
title_zh: 言语和说话者特征对唇腭裂儿童分类的影响
abstract: Recent findings show that pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 models are reliable feature extractors for various speaker characteristics classification tasks. We show that latent representations extracted at different layers of a pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 system can be used as features for binary classification to distinguish between children with Cleft Lip and Palate (CLP) and a healthy control group. The results indicate that the distinction between CLP and healthy voices, especially with latent representations from the lower and middle encoder layers, reaches an accuracy of 100%. We test the classifier to find influencing factors for classification using unseen out-of-domain healthy and pathologic corpora with varying characteristics: age, spoken content, and acoustic conditions. Cross-pathology and cross-healthy tests reveal that the trained classifiers are unreliable if there is a mismatch between training and out-of-domain test data in, e.g., age, spoken content, or acoustic conditions.
summary: Recent findings show that pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 models are reliable feature extractors for various speaker characteristics classification tasks. We show that latent representations extracted at different layers of a pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 system can be used as features for binary classification to distinguish between children with Cleft Lip and Palate (CLP) and a healthy control group. The results indicate that the distinction between CLP and healthy voices, especially with latent representations from the lower and middle encoder layers, reaches an accuracy of 100%. We test the classifier to find influencing factors for classification using unseen out-of-domain healthy and pathologic corpora with varying characteristics: age, spoken content, and acoustic conditions. Cross-pathology and cross-healthy tests reveal that the trained classifiers are unreliable if there is a mismatch between training and out-of-domain test data in, e.g., age, spoken content, or acoustic conditions.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究结果表明，预训练的 wav2vec 2.0 模型是各种说话人特征分类任务的可靠特征提取器。我们证明，在预训练的 wav2vec 2.0 系统的不同层提取的潜在表示可以用作二元分类的特征，以区分唇腭裂 (CLP) 儿童和健康对照组。结果表明，CLP 和健康语音之间的区分，尤其是来自下层和中层编码器层的潜在表示，达到了 100% 的准确度。我们测试分类器，以使用未见过的域外健康和病理语料库来寻找分类的影响因素，这些语料库具有不同的特征：年龄、口语内容和声学条件。跨病理学和跨健康测试表明，如果训练数据和域外测试数据（例如年龄、口语内容或声学条件）不匹配，则经过训练的分类器是不可靠的。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了使用预训练wav2vec 2.0模型的潜在表示来区分唇腭裂儿童与健康对照组的二分类任务。
AI.motivation: 预训练wav2vec 2.0模型在说话人特征分类任务中表现出可靠性，但需验证其在唇腭裂儿童语音分类中的有效性及泛化能力。
AI.method: 从预训练wav2vec 2.0系统的不同编码层提取潜在表示作为特征，构建二分类模型，并通过不同年龄、语音内容和声学条件的测试数据评估分类器的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 使用中低层编码器特征时分类准确率达100%，但跨病理和跨健康测试显示训练与测试数据在年龄、语音内容或声学条件不匹配时分类不可靠。
AI.conclusion: wav2vec 2.0的潜在表示可有效区分唇腭裂与健康儿童语音，但模型泛化能力受训练与测试数据分布差异的影响。

method: 从预训练wav2vec 2.0系统的不同编码层提取潜在表示作为特征，构建二分类模型，并通过不同年龄、语音内容和声学条件的测试数据评估分类器的鲁棒性。
result: 使用中低层编码器特征时分类准确率达100%，但跨病理和跨健康测试显示训练与测试数据在年龄、语音内容或声学条件不匹配时分类不可靠。
conclusion: wav2vec 2.0的潜在表示可有效区分唇腭裂与健康儿童语音，但模型泛化能力受训练与测试数据分布差异的影响。
search_text: Influence of Utterance and Speaker Characteristics on the Classification of Children with Cleft Lip and Palate 言语和说话者特征对唇腭裂儿童分类的影响 Recent findings show that pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 models are reliable feature extractors for various speaker characteristics classification tasks. We show that latent representations extracted at different layers of a pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 system can be used as features for binary classification to distinguish between children with Cleft Lip and Palate (CLP) and a healthy control group. The results indicate that the distinction between CLP and healthy voices, especially with latent representations from the lower and middle encoder layers, reaches an accuracy of 100%. We test the classifier to find influencing factors for classification using unseen out-of-domain healthy and pathologic corpora with varying characteristics: age, spoken content, and acoustic conditions. Cross-pathology and cross-healthy tests reveal that the trained classifiers are unreliable if there is a mismatch between training and out-of-domain test data in, e.g., age, spoken content, or acoustic conditions. 最近的研究结果表明，预训练的 wav2vec 2.0 模型是各种说话人特征分类任务的可靠特征提取器。我们证明，在预训练的 wav2vec 2.0 系统的不同层提取的潜在表示可以用作二元分类的特征，以区分唇腭裂 (CLP) 儿童和健康对照组。结果表明，CLP 和健康语音之间的区分，尤其是来自下层和中层编码器层的潜在表示，达到了 100% 的准确度。我们测试分类器，以使用未见过的域外健康和病理语料库来寻找分类的影响因素，这些语料库具有不同的特征：年龄、口语内容和声学条件。跨病理学和跨健康测试表明，如果训练数据和域外测试数据（例如年龄、口语内容或声学条件）不匹配，则经过训练的分类器是不可靠的。 该论文研究了使用预训练wav2vec 2.0模型的潜在表示来区分唇腭裂儿童与健康对照组的二分类任务。 Ilja Baumann,Dominik Wagner,Franziska Braun,Sebastian P. Bayerl,Elmar Nöth,Korbinian Riedhammer,Tobias Bocklet eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Tianze Wu,Shaoshan Liu,Bo Yu,Sa Wang,Yungang Bao,Weisong Shi
title: INTERNEURON: A Middleware with Multi-Network Communication Reliability for Infrastructure Vehicle Cooperative Autonomous Driving
title_zh: INTERNEURON：基础设施车辆协同自动驾驶的多网络通信可靠性中间件
abstract: Infrastructure-Vehicle Cooperative Autonomous Driving (IVCAD) is a new paradigm of autonomous driving, which relies on the cooperation between intelligent roads and autonomous vehicles. This paradigm has been shown to be safer and more efficient compared to the on-vehicle-only autonomous driving paradigm. Our real-world deployment data indicates that the effectiveness of IVCAD is constrained by reliability and performance of commercial communication networks. This paper targets this exact problem, and proposes INTERNEURON, a middleware to achieve high communication reliability between intelligent roads and autonomous vehicles, in the context of IVCAD. Specifically, INTERNEURON dynamically matches IVCAD applications and the underlying communication technologies based on varying communication performance and quality needs. Evaluation results confirm that INTERNEURON reduces deadline violations by more than 95\%, significantly improving the reliability of IVCAD systems.
summary: Infrastructure-Vehicle Cooperative Autonomous Driving (IVCAD) is a new paradigm of autonomous driving, which relies on the cooperation between intelligent roads and autonomous vehicles. This paradigm has been shown to be safer and more efficient compared to the on-vehicle-only autonomous driving paradigm. Our real-world deployment data indicates that the effectiveness of IVCAD is constrained by reliability and performance of commercial communication networks. This paper targets this exact problem, and proposes INTERNEURON, a middleware to achieve high communication reliability between intelligent roads and autonomous vehicles, in the context of IVCAD. Specifically, INTERNEURON dynamically matches IVCAD applications and the underlying communication technologies based on varying communication performance and quality needs. Evaluation results confirm that INTERNEURON reduces deadline violations by more than 95\%, significantly improving the reliability of IVCAD systems.
abstract_zh: 基础设施-车辆协同自动驾驶（IVCAD）是自动驾驶的新范式，它依赖于智能道路和自动驾驶车辆之间的协作。与车载自动驾驶范式相比，这种范式已被证明更安全、更高效。我们的实际部署数据表明，IVCAD 的有效性受到商业通信网络的可靠性和性能的限制。本文针对这个问题，提出了 INTERNEURON，一种在 IVCAD 背景下实现智能道路和自动驾驶车辆之间高通信可靠性的中间件。具体来说，INTERNEURON 根据不同的通信性能和质量需求动态匹配 IVCAD 应用程序和底层通信技术。评估结果证实，INTERNEURON 将截止期限违规情况减少了 95% 以上，显着提高了 IVCAD 系统的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出INTERNEURON中间件，旨在通过多网络通信可靠性技术提升基础设施与自动驾驶车辆协同系统的通信稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有基础设施-车辆协同自动驾驶（IVCAD）系统因依赖商业通信网络，面临可靠性不足和性能瓶颈问题，制约了其安全性和效率。
AI.method: 设计动态匹配机制，根据通信性能和质量需求变化，智能选择适配的底层通信技术以保障关键任务的实时性与可靠性。
AI.result: 实验表明INTERNEURON使截止期限违反率降低95%以上，显著提升了IVCAD系统的通信可靠性。
AI.conclusion: INTERNEURON通过动态网络适配技术有效解决了IVCAD通信可靠性难题，为智能交通系统提供了可行的中间件方案。

authors_text: Atsushi Ando,Ryo Masumura,Akihiko Takashima,Satoshi Suzuki,Naoki Makishima,Keita Suzuki,Takafumi Moriya,Takanori Ashihara,Hiroshi Sato
title: On the Use of Modality-Specific Large-Scale Pre-Trained Encoders for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 关于使用特定于模态的大规模预训练编码器进行多模态情感分析
abstract: This paper investigates the effectiveness and implementation of modality-specific large-scale pre-trained encoders for multimodal sentiment analysis~(MSA). Although the effectiveness of pre-trained encoders in various fields has been reported, conventional MSA methods employ them for only linguistic modality, and their application has not been investigated. This paper compares the features yielded by large-scale pre-trained encoders with conventional heuristic features. One each of the largest pre-trained encoders publicly available for each modality are used; CLIP-ViT, WavLM, and BERT for visual, acoustic, and linguistic modalities, respectively. Experiments on two datasets reveal that methods with domain-specific pre-trained encoders attain better performance than those with conventional features in both unimodal and multimodal scenarios. We also find it better to use the outputs of the intermediate layers of the encoders than those of the output layer. The codes are available at https://github.com/ando-hub/MSA_Pretrain.
summary: This paper investigates the effectiveness and implementation of modality-specific large-scale pre-trained encoders for multimodal sentiment analysis~(MSA). Although the effectiveness of pre-trained encoders in various fields has been reported, conventional MSA methods employ them for only linguistic modality, and their application has not been investigated. This paper compares the features yielded by large-scale pre-trained encoders with conventional heuristic features. One each of the largest pre-trained encoders publicly available for each modality are used; CLIP-ViT, WavLM, and BERT for visual, acoustic, and linguistic modalities, respectively. Experiments on two datasets reveal that methods with domain-specific pre-trained encoders attain better performance than those with conventional features in both unimodal and multimodal scenarios. We also find it better to use the outputs of the intermediate layers of the encoders than those of the output layer. The codes are available at https://github.com/ando-hub/MSA_Pretrain.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了用于多模态情感分析（MSA）的特定模态大规模预训练编码器的有效性和实现。尽管预训练编码器在各个领域的有效性已经被报道，但传统的 MSA 方法仅将它们用于语言模态，并且它们的应用尚未得到研究。本文将大规模预训练编码器产生的特征与传统的启发式特征进行了比较。使用每个模态公开可用的最大预训练编码器； CLIP-ViT、WavLM 和 BERT 分别用于视觉、听觉和语言模式。对两个数据集的实验表明，在单模态和多模态场景中，具有特定领域预训练编码器的方法比具有传统特征的方法获得了更好的性能。我们还发现使用编码器中间层的输出比使用输出层的输出更好。这些代码可从 https://github.com/ando-hub/MSA_Pretrain 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用特定模态的大规模预训练编码器进行多模态情感分析的效果与实现方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练编码器在多个领域表现出色，但传统多模态情感分析方法仅局限于语言模态，其他模态的预训练编码器应用尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 采用视觉、听觉、语言模态各自最大的公开预训练编码器（CLIP-ViT、WavLM、BERT），对比其特征与传统启发式特征，并测试中间层输出效果。
AI.result: 实验显示，使用领域特定预训练编码器在单模态和多模态任务中均优于传统特征，且中间层输出效果更佳。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定预训练编码器能有效提升多模态情感分析性能，中间层输出比最终层更具优势，为未来研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Zhengyang Chen,Yao Qian,Bing Han,Yanmin Qian,Michael Zeng
title: A comprehensive study on self-supervised distillation for speaker representation learning
title_zh: 说话人表征学习自监督蒸馏的综合研究
abstract: In real application scenarios, it is often challenging to obtain a large amount of labeled data for speaker representation learning due to speaker privacy concerns. Self-supervised learning with no labels has become a more and more promising way to solve it. Compared with contrastive learning, self-distilled approaches use only positive samples in the loss function and thus are more attractive. In this paper, we present a comprehensive study on self-distilled self-supervised speaker representation learning, especially on critical data augmentation. Our proposed strategy of audio perturbation augmentation has pushed the performance of the speaker representation to a new limit. The experimental results show that our model can achieve a new SoTA on Voxceleb1 speaker verification evaluation benchmark ( i.e., equal error rate (EER) 2.505%, 2.473%, and 4.791% for trial Vox1-O, Vox1-E and Vox1-H , respectively), discarding any speaker labels in the training phase.
summary: In real application scenarios, it is often challenging to obtain a large amount of labeled data for speaker representation learning due to speaker privacy concerns. Self-supervised learning with no labels has become a more and more promising way to solve it. Compared with contrastive learning, self-distilled approaches use only positive samples in the loss function and thus are more attractive. In this paper, we present a comprehensive study on self-distilled self-supervised speaker representation learning, especially on critical data augmentation. Our proposed strategy of audio perturbation augmentation has pushed the performance of the speaker representation to a new limit. The experimental results show that our model can achieve a new SoTA on Voxceleb1 speaker verification evaluation benchmark ( i.e., equal error rate (EER) 2.505%, 2.473%, and 4.791% for trial Vox1-O, Vox1-E and Vox1-H , respectively), discarding any speaker labels in the training phase.
abstract_zh: 在实际应用场景中，由于说话人隐私问题，获取大量标记数据用于说话人表示学习通常具有挑战性。无标签的自监督学习已成为越来越有前途的解决方法。与对比学习相比，自蒸馏方法在损失函数中仅使用正样本，因此更具吸引力。在本文中，我们对自蒸馏自监督说话人表示学习进行了全面的研究，特别是在关键数据增强方面。我们提出的音频扰动增强策略将说话人表示的性能推向了新的极限。实验结果表明，我们的模型可以在 Voxceleb1 说话人验证评估基准上实现新的 SoTA（即，试验 Vox1-O、Vox1-E 和 Vox1-H 的等错误率 (EER) 分别为 2.505%、2.473% 和 4.791%），并在训练阶段丢弃任何说话人标签。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自监督蒸馏在说话人表示学习中的应用，重点探讨关键数据增强策略，提出了一种音频扰动增强方法以提升说话人表示性能。

AI.method: 提出基于音频扰动增强的自蒸馏框架，在训练阶段完全去除说话人标签，通过正样本损失函数优化说话人表示学习。
AI.result: 在Voxceleb1说话人验证基准测试中，模型在Vox1-O/Vox1-E/Vox1-H三个测试集上分别达到2.505%、2.473%和4.791%的等错误率，刷新了现有最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新的数据增强策略和自蒸馏方法，本文在无标签条件下实现了说话人表示学习的性能突破，为隐私敏感场景下的语音模型训练提供了新思路。

search_text: A comprehensive study on self-supervised distillation for speaker representation learning 说话人表征学习自监督蒸馏的综合研究 In real application scenarios, it is often challenging to obtain a large amount of labeled data for speaker representation learning due to speaker privacy concerns. Self-supervised learning with no labels has become a more and more promising way to solve it. Compared with contrastive learning, self-distilled approaches use only positive samples in the loss function and thus are more attractive. In this paper, we present a comprehensive study on self-distilled self-supervised speaker representation learning, especially on critical data augmentation. Our proposed strategy of audio perturbation augmentation has pushed the performance of the speaker representation to a new limit. The experimental results show that our model can achieve a new SoTA on Voxceleb1 speaker verification evaluation benchmark ( i.e., equal error rate (EER) 2.505%, 2.473%, and 4.791% for trial Vox1-O, Vox1-E and Vox1-H , respectively), discarding any speaker labels in the training phase. 在实际应用场景中，由于说话人隐私问题，获取大量标记数据用于说话人表示学习通常具有挑战性。无标签的自监督学习已成为越来越有前途的解决方法。与对比学习相比，自蒸馏方法在损失函数中仅使用正样本，因此更具吸引力。在本文中，我们对自蒸馏自监督说话人表示学习进行了全面的研究，特别是在关键数据增强方面。我们提出的音频扰动增强策略将说话人表示的性能推向了新的极限。实验结果表明，我们的模型可以在 Voxceleb1 说话人验证评估基准上实现新的 SoTA（即，试验 Vox1-O、Vox1-E 和 Vox1-H 的等错误率 (EER) 分别为 2.505%、2.473% 和 4.791%），并在训练阶段丢弃任何说话人标签。 本文研究了自监督蒸馏在说话人表示学习中的应用，重点探讨关键数据增强策略，提出了一种音频扰动增强方法以提升说话人表示性能。 Zhengyang Chen,Yao Qian,Bing Han,Yanmin Qian,Michael Zeng cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Baian Chen,Lipeng Gu,Xin Zhuang,Yiyang Shen,Weiming Wang,Mingqiang Wei
title: PSFormer: Point Transformer for 3D Salient Object Detection
title_zh: PSFormer：用于 3D 显着物体检测的点变换器
abstract: We propose PSFormer, an effective point transformer model for 3D salient object detection. PSFormer is an encoder-decoder network that takes full advantage of transformers to model the contextual information in both multi-scale point- and scene-wise manners. In the encoder, we develop a Point Context Transformer (PCT) module to capture region contextual features at the point level; PCT contains two different transformers to excavate the relationship among points. In the decoder, we develop a Scene Context Transformer (SCT) module to learn context representations at the scene level; SCT contains both Upsampling-and-Transformer blocks and Multi-context Aggregation units to integrate the global semantic and multi-level features from the encoder into the global scene context. Experiments show clear improvements of PSFormer over its competitors and validate that PSFormer is more robust to challenging cases such as small objects, multiple objects, and objects with complex structures.
summary: We propose PSFormer, an effective point transformer model for 3D salient object detection. PSFormer is an encoder-decoder network that takes full advantage of transformers to model the contextual information in both multi-scale point- and scene-wise manners. In the encoder, we develop a Point Context Transformer (PCT) module to capture region contextual features at the point level; PCT contains two different transformers to excavate the relationship among points. In the decoder, we develop a Scene Context Transformer (SCT) module to learn context representations at the scene level; SCT contains both Upsampling-and-Transformer blocks and Multi-context Aggregation units to integrate the global semantic and multi-level features from the encoder into the global scene context. Experiments show clear improvements of PSFormer over its competitors and validate that PSFormer is more robust to challenging cases such as small objects, multiple objects, and objects with complex structures.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PSFormer，一种用于 3D 显着目标检测的有效点变换器模型。 PSFormer 是一种编码器-解码器网络，它充分利用变压器以多尺度点和场景方式对上下文信息进行建模。在编码器中，我们开发了点上下文变换器（PCT）模块来捕获点级别的区域上下文特征； PCT包含两个不同的变压器来挖掘点之间的关系。在解码器中，我们开发了场景上下文变换器（SCT）模块来学习场景级别的上下文表示； SCT 包含上采样和变换器块和多上下文聚合单元，用于将编码器的全局语义和多级特征集成到全局场景上下文中。实验表明，PSFormer 相对于竞争对手有明显的改进，并验证 PSFormer 对于小物体、多个物体和具有复杂结构的物体等具有挑战性的情况更加稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PSFormer，一种基于点变压器的3D显著物体检测模型，通过编码器-解码器结构建模多尺度点与场景级上下文信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂场景（如小物体、多物体及结构复杂物体）时存在局限，需更高效的上下文建模机制提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.method: 编码器采用Point Context Transformer（PCT）模块，通过双变压器挖掘点间关系；解码器使用Scene Context Transformer（SCT）模块，结合上采样-变压器块与多上下文聚合单元整合全局语义与多级特征。
AI.result: 实验表明PSFormer在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在小物体、多物体及复杂结构场景中表现更稳健。
AI.conclusion: PSFormer通过多尺度上下文建模有效提升了3D显著物体检测的准确性与鲁棒性，为复杂场景检测提供了新思路。

search_text: PSFormer: Point Transformer for 3D Salient Object Detection PSFormer：用于 3D 显着物体检测的点变换器 We propose PSFormer, an effective point transformer model for 3D salient object detection. PSFormer is an encoder-decoder network that takes full advantage of transformers to model the contextual information in both multi-scale point- and scene-wise manners. In the encoder, we develop a Point Context Transformer (PCT) module to capture region contextual features at the point level; PCT contains two different transformers to excavate the relationship among points. In the decoder, we develop a Scene Context Transformer (SCT) module to learn context representations at the scene level; SCT contains both Upsampling-and-Transformer blocks and Multi-context Aggregation units to integrate the global semantic and multi-level features from the encoder into the global scene context. Experiments show clear improvements of PSFormer over its competitors and validate that PSFormer is more robust to challenging cases such as small objects, multiple objects, and objects with complex structures. 我们提出了 PSFormer，一种用于 3D 显着目标检测的有效点变换器模型。 PSFormer 是一种编码器-解码器网络，它充分利用变压器以多尺度点和场景方式对上下文信息进行建模。在编码器中，我们开发了点上下文变换器（PCT）模块来捕获点级别的区域上下文特征； PCT包含两个不同的变压器来挖掘点之间的关系。在解码器中，我们开发了场景上下文变换器（SCT）模块来学习场景级别的上下文表示； SCT 包含上采样和变换器块和多上下文聚合单元，用于将编码器的全局语义和多级特征集成到全局场景上下文中。实验表明，PSFormer 相对于竞争对手有明显的改进，并验证 PSFormer 对于小物体、多个物体和具有复杂结构的物体等具有挑战性的情况更加稳健。 本文提出PSFormer，一种基于点变压器的3D显著物体检测模型，通过编码器-解码器结构建模多尺度点与场景级上下文信息。 Baian Chen,Lipeng Gu,Xin Zhuang,Yiyang Shen,Weiming Wang,Mingqiang Wei cs.CV

authors_text: Junfan Lin,Jianlong Chang,Lingbo Liu,Guanbin Li,Liang Lin,Qi Tian,Chang Wen Chen
title: Being Comes from Not-being: Open-vocabulary Text-to-Motion Generation with Wordless Training
title_zh: 存在来自不存在：通过无词训练生成开放词汇文本到动作
abstract: Text-to-motion generation is an emerging and challenging problem, which aims to synthesize motion with the same semantics as the input text. However, due to the lack of diverse labeled training data, most approaches either limit to specific types of text annotations or require online optimizations to cater to the texts during inference at the cost of efficiency and stability. In this paper, we investigate offline open-vocabulary text-to-motion generation in a zero-shot learning manner that neither requires paired training data nor extra online optimization to adapt for unseen texts. Inspired by the prompt learning in NLP, we pretrain a motion generator that learns to reconstruct the full motion from the masked motion. During inference, instead of changing the motion generator, our method reformulates the input text into a masked motion as the prompt for the motion generator to ``reconstruct'' the motion. In constructing the prompt, the unmasked poses of the prompt are synthesized by a text-to-pose generator. To supervise the optimization of the text-to-pose generator, we propose the first text-pose alignment model for measuring the alignment between texts and 3D poses. And to prevent the pose generator from overfitting to limited training texts, we further propose a novel wordless training mechanism that optimizes the text-to-pose generator without any training texts. The comprehensive experimental results show that our method obtains a significant improvement against the baseline methods. The code is available at https://github.com/junfanlin/oohmg.
summary: Text-to-motion generation is an emerging and challenging problem, which aims to synthesize motion with the same semantics as the input text. However, due to the lack of diverse labeled training data, most approaches either limit to specific types of text annotations or require online optimizations to cater to the texts during inference at the cost of efficiency and stability. In this paper, we investigate offline open-vocabulary text-to-motion generation in a zero-shot learning manner that neither requires paired training data nor extra online optimization to adapt for unseen texts. Inspired by the prompt learning in NLP, we pretrain a motion generator that learns to reconstruct the full motion from the masked motion. During inference, instead of changing the motion generator, our method reformulates the input text into a masked motion as the prompt for the motion generator to ``reconstruct'' the motion. In constructing the prompt, the unmasked poses of the prompt are synthesized by a text-to-pose generator. To supervise the optimization of the text-to-pose generator, we propose the first text-pose alignment model for measuring the alignment between texts and 3D poses. And to prevent the pose generator from overfitting to limited training texts, we further propose a novel wordless training mechanism that optimizes the text-to-pose generator without any training texts. The comprehensive experimental results show that our method obtains a significant improvement against the baseline methods. The code is available at https://github.com/junfanlin/oohmg.
abstract_zh: 文本到运动的生成是一个新兴且具有挑战性的问题，其目的是合成与输入文本具有相同语义的运动。然而，由于缺乏多样化的标记训练数据，大多数方法要么仅限于特定类型的文本注释，要么需要在线优化以在推理过程中迎合文本，但以效率和稳定性为代价。在本文中，我们以零样本学习方式研究离线开放词汇文本到运动的生成，既不需要配对训练数据，也不需要额外的在线优化来适应看不见的文本。受到 NLP 即时学习的启发，我们预训练了一个运动生成器，它学习从屏蔽运动中重建完整的运动。在推理过程中，我们的方法不是更改运动生成器，而是将输入文本重新表述为屏蔽运动，作为运动生成器“重建”运动的提示。在构建提示时，提示的未屏蔽姿势由文本到姿势生成器合成。为了监督文本到姿势生成器的优化，我们提出了第一个文本姿势对齐模型，用于测量文本和 3D 姿势之间的对齐。为了防止姿势生成器过度拟合有限的训练文本，我们进一步提出了一种新颖的无词训练机制，可以在没有任何训练文本的情况下优化文本到姿势生成器。综合实验结果表明，我们的方法相对于基线方法获得了显着的改进。代码可在 https://github.com/junfanlin/oohmg 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需配对训练数据和在线优化的开放词汇文本到运动生成方法，通过零样本学习实现高效稳定的运动合成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到运动生成方法受限于标注数据不足，需依赖特定文本标注或在线优化，导致效率与稳定性不足。
AI.method: 受自然语言处理提示学习启发，预训练运动生成器通过掩码运动重建学习；推理时将文本转化为掩码运动提示，结合文本到姿态生成器与文本-姿态对齐模型，并引入无文本训练机制避免过拟合。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多项指标上显著优于基线方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过零样本学习和无文本训练机制，有效解决了开放词汇文本到运动生成中的数据与效率瓶颈。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需配对训练数据和在线优化的开放词汇文本到运动生成方法，通过零样本学习实现高效稳定的运动合成。
ai_content.motivation: 现有文本到运动生成方法受限于标注数据不足，需依赖特定文本标注或在线优化，导致效率与稳定性不足。

search_text: Being Comes from Not-being: Open-vocabulary Text-to-Motion Generation with Wordless Training 存在来自不存在：通过无词训练生成开放词汇文本到动作 Text-to-motion generation is an emerging and challenging problem, which aims to synthesize motion with the same semantics as the input text. However, due to the lack of diverse labeled training data, most approaches either limit to specific types of text annotations or require online optimizations to cater to the texts during inference at the cost of efficiency and stability. In this paper, we investigate offline open-vocabulary text-to-motion generation in a zero-shot learning manner that neither requires paired training data nor extra online optimization to adapt for unseen texts. Inspired by the prompt learning in NLP, we pretrain a motion generator that learns to reconstruct the full motion from the masked motion. During inference, instead of changing the motion generator, our method reformulates the input text into a masked motion as the prompt for the motion generator to ``reconstruct'' the motion. In constructing the prompt, the unmasked poses of the prompt are synthesized by a text-to-pose generator. To supervise the optimization of the text-to-pose generator, we propose the first text-pose alignment model for measuring the alignment between texts and 3D poses. And to prevent the pose generator from overfitting to limited training texts, we further propose a novel wordless training mechanism that optimizes the text-to-pose generator without any training texts. The comprehensive experimental results show that our method obtains a significant improvement against the baseline methods. The code is available at https://github.com/junfanlin/oohmg. 文本到运动的生成是一个新兴且具有挑战性的问题，其目的是合成与输入文本具有相同语义的运动。然而，由于缺乏多样化的标记训练数据，大多数方法要么仅限于特定类型的文本注释，要么需要在线优化以在推理过程中迎合文本，但以效率和稳定性为代价。在本文中，我们以零样本学习方式研究离线开放词汇文本到运动的生成，既不需要配对训练数据，也不需要额外的在线优化来适应看不见的文本。受到 NLP 即时学习的启发，我们预训练了一个运动生成器，它学习从屏蔽运动中重建完整的运动。在推理过程中，我们的方法不是更改运动生成器，而是将输入文本重新表述为屏蔽运动，作为运动生成器“重建”运动的提示。在构建提示时，提示的未屏蔽姿势由文本到姿势生成器合成。为了监督文本到姿势生成器的优化，我们提出了第一个文本姿势对齐模型，用于测量文本和 3D 姿势之间的对齐。为了防止姿势生成器过度拟合有限的训练文本，我们进一步提出了一种新颖的无词训练机制，可以在没有任何训练文本的情况下优化文本到姿势生成器。综合实验结果表明，我们的方法相对于基线方法获得了显着的改进。代码可在 https://github.com/junfanlin/oohmg 获取。 本文提出了一种无需配对训练数据和在线优化的开放词汇文本到运动生成方法，通过零样本学习实现高效稳定的运动合成。 Junfan Lin,Jianlong Chang,Lingbo Liu,Guanbin Li,Liang Lin,Qi Tian,Chang Wen Chen cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Hamid Fsian,Vahid Mohammadi,Pierre Gouton,Saeid Minaei
title: Comparison of Stereo Matching Algorithms for the Development of Disparity Map
title_zh: 视差图开发的立体匹配算法比较
abstract: Stereo Matching is one of the classical problems in computer vision for the extraction of 3D information but still controversial for accuracy and processing costs. The use of matching techniques and cost functions is crucial in the development of the disparity map. This paper presents a comparative study of six different stereo matching algorithms including Block Matching (BM), Block Matching with Dynamic Programming (BMDP), Belief Propagation (BP), Gradient Feature Matching (GF), Histogram of Oriented Gradient (HOG), and the proposed method. Also three cost functions namely Mean Squared Error (MSE), Sum of Absolute Differences (SAD), Normalized Cross-Correlation (NCC) were used and compared. The stereo images used in this study were from the Middlebury Stereo Datasets provided with perfect and imperfect calibrations. Results show that the selection of matching function is quite important and also depends on the images properties. Results showed that the BP algorithm in most cases provided better results getting accuracies over 95%.
summary: Stereo Matching is one of the classical problems in computer vision for the extraction of 3D information but still controversial for accuracy and processing costs. The use of matching techniques and cost functions is crucial in the development of the disparity map. This paper presents a comparative study of six different stereo matching algorithms including Block Matching (BM), Block Matching with Dynamic Programming (BMDP), Belief Propagation (BP), Gradient Feature Matching (GF), Histogram of Oriented Gradient (HOG), and the proposed method. Also three cost functions namely Mean Squared Error (MSE), Sum of Absolute Differences (SAD), Normalized Cross-Correlation (NCC) were used and compared. The stereo images used in this study were from the Middlebury Stereo Datasets provided with perfect and imperfect calibrations. Results show that the selection of matching function is quite important and also depends on the images properties. Results showed that the BP algorithm in most cases provided better results getting accuracies over 95%.
abstract_zh: 立体匹配是计算机视觉中提取 3D 信息的经典问题之一，但其准确性和处理成本仍然存在争议。匹配技术和成本函数的使用对于视差图的开发至关重要。本文对六种不同的立体匹配算法进行了比较研究，包括块匹配（BM）、动态规划块匹配（BMDP）、置信传播（BP）、梯度特征匹配（GF）、定向梯度直方图（HOG）以及所提出的方法。还使用并比较了三个成本函数，即均方误差（MSE）、绝对差和（SAD）、归一化互相关（NCC）。本研究中使用的立体图像来自提供完美和不完美校准的 Middlebury 立体数据集。结果表明，匹配函数的选择非常重要，并且还取决于图像的特性。结果表明，BP 算法在大多数情况下都能提供更好的结果，准确率超过 95%。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了六种立体匹配算法及三种成本函数在生成视差图中的效果。
AI.motivation: 立体匹配在准确性和处理成本上存在争议，需寻找更优算法和成本函数组合。
AI.method: 采用Middlebury数据集，对比Block Matching、Belief Propagation等六种算法及MSE、SAD等三种成本函数。
AI.result: BP算法在多数情况下准确率超过95%，匹配函数选择对结果影响显著。
AI.conclusion: 匹配函数的选择需结合图像特性，BP算法在实验中表现最优。

authors_text: Zhaowei Chen,Peng Li,Zeyong Wei,Honghua Chen,Haoran Xie,Mingqiang Wei,Fu Lee Wang
title: GeoGCN: Geometric Dual-domain Graph Convolution Network for Point Cloud Denoising
title_zh: GeoGCN：用于点云去噪的几何双域图卷积网络
abstract: We propose GeoGCN, a novel geometric dual-domain graph convolution network for point cloud denoising (PCD). Beyond the traditional wisdom of PCD, to fully exploit the geometric information of point clouds, we define two kinds of surface normals, one is called Real Normal (RN), and the other is Virtual Normal (VN). RN preserves the local details of noisy point clouds while VN avoids the global shape shrinkage during denoising. GeoGCN is a new PCD paradigm that, 1) first regresses point positions by spatialbased GCN with the help of VNs, 2) then estimates initial RNs by performing Principal Component Analysis on the regressed points, and 3) finally regresses fine RNs by normalbased GCN. Unlike existing PCD methods, GeoGCN not only exploits two kinds of geometry expertise (i.e., RN and VN) but also benefits from training data. Experiments validate that GeoGCN outperforms SOTAs in terms of both noise-robustness and local-and-global feature preservation.
summary: We propose GeoGCN, a novel geometric dual-domain graph convolution network for point cloud denoising (PCD). Beyond the traditional wisdom of PCD, to fully exploit the geometric information of point clouds, we define two kinds of surface normals, one is called Real Normal (RN), and the other is Virtual Normal (VN). RN preserves the local details of noisy point clouds while VN avoids the global shape shrinkage during denoising. GeoGCN is a new PCD paradigm that, 1) first regresses point positions by spatialbased GCN with the help of VNs, 2) then estimates initial RNs by performing Principal Component Analysis on the regressed points, and 3) finally regresses fine RNs by normalbased GCN. Unlike existing PCD methods, GeoGCN not only exploits two kinds of geometry expertise (i.e., RN and VN) but also benefits from training data. Experiments validate that GeoGCN outperforms SOTAs in terms of both noise-robustness and local-and-global feature preservation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 GeoGCN，一种用于点云去噪（PCD）的新型几何双域图卷积网络。超越PCD的传统智慧，为了充分利用点云的几何信息，我们定义了两种表面法线，一种称为真实法线（RN），另一种称为虚拟法线（VN）。 RN 保留了噪声点云的局部细节，而 VN 则避免了去噪过程​​中的全局形状收缩。 GeoGCN 是一种新的 PCD 范例，1）首先在 VN 的帮助下通过基于空间的 GCN 回归点位置，2）然后通过对回归点执行主成分分析来估计初始 RN，3）最后通过基于法线的 GCN 回归精细 RN。与现有的 PCD 方法不同，GeoGCN 不仅利用两种几何专业知识（即 RN 和 VN），而且还受益于训练数据。实验验证了 GeoGCN 在噪声鲁棒性和局部和全局特征保留方面均优于 SOTA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoGCN，一种基于几何双域图卷积网络的点云去噪方法，通过结合真实法线和虚拟法线提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统点云去噪方法未能充分挖掘几何信息，导致局部细节丢失或整体形状收缩。本文旨在通过引入两种法线（真实法线和虚拟法线）来平衡局部细节保留与全局形状保持。
AI.method: GeoGCN分三步实现：1) 利用虚拟法线辅助空间图卷积回归点位置；2) 对回归点进行主成分分析估计初始真实法线；3) 基于真实法线的图卷积网络优化法线估计。
AI.result: 实验表明GeoGCN在噪声鲁棒性和局部-全局特征保持方面优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GeoGCN通过融合几何先验知识与训练数据，为点云去噪提供了新的范式，有效解决了传统方法的局限性。

authors_text: Jiashu Wu,Yang Wang,Binhui Xie,Shuang Li,Hao Dai,Kejiang Ye,Chengzhong Xu
title: Joint Semantic Transfer Network for IoT Intrusion Detection
title_zh: 用于物联网入侵检测的联合语义传输网络
comment: Accepted by IEEE Internet of Things Journal
comments: Accepted by IEEE Internet of Things Journal
abstract: In this paper, we propose a Joint Semantic Transfer Network (JSTN) towards effective intrusion detection for large-scale scarcely labelled IoT domain. As a multi-source heterogeneous domain adaptation (MS-HDA) method, the JSTN integrates a knowledge rich network intrusion (NI) domain and another small-scale IoT intrusion (II) domain as source domains, and preserves intrinsic semantic properties to assist target II domain intrusion detection. The JSTN jointly transfers the following three semantics to learn a domain-invariant and discriminative feature representation. The scenario semantic endows source NI and II domain with characteristics from each other to ease the knowledge transfer process via a confused domain discriminator and categorical distribution knowledge preservation. It also reduces the source-target discrepancy to make the shared feature space domain-invariant. Meanwhile, the weighted implicit semantic transfer boosts discriminability via a fine-grained knowledge preservation, which transfers the source categorical distribution to the target domain. The source-target divergence guides the importance weighting during knowledge preservation to reflect the degree of knowledge learning. Additionally, the hierarchical explicit semantic alignment performs centroid-level and representative-level alignment with the help of a geometric similarity-aware pseudo-label refiner, which exploits the value of unlabelled target II domain and explicitly aligns feature representations from a global and local perspective in a concentrated manner. Comprehensive experiments on various tasks verify the superiority of the JSTN against state-of-the-art comparing methods, on average a 10.3% of accuracy boost is achieved. The statistical soundness of each constituting component and the computational efficiency are also verified.
summary: In this paper, we propose a Joint Semantic Transfer Network (JSTN) towards effective intrusion detection for large-scale scarcely labelled IoT domain. As a multi-source heterogeneous domain adaptation (MS-HDA) method, the JSTN integrates a knowledge rich network intrusion (NI) domain and another small-scale IoT intrusion (II) domain as source domains, and preserves intrinsic semantic properties to assist target II domain intrusion detection. The JSTN jointly transfers the following three semantics to learn a domain-invariant and discriminative feature representation. The scenario semantic endows source NI and II domain with characteristics from each other to ease the knowledge transfer process via a confused domain discriminator and categorical distribution knowledge preservation. It also reduces the source-target discrepancy to make the shared feature space domain-invariant. Meanwhile, the weighted implicit semantic transfer boosts discriminability via a fine-grained knowledge preservation, which transfers the source categorical distribution to the target domain. The source-target divergence guides the importance weighting during knowledge preservation to reflect the degree of knowledge learning. Additionally, the hierarchical explicit semantic alignment performs centroid-level and representative-level alignment with the help of a geometric similarity-aware pseudo-label refiner, which exploits the value of unlabelled target II domain and explicitly aligns feature representations from a global and local perspective in a concentrated manner. Comprehensive experiments on various tasks verify the superiority of the JSTN against state-of-the-art comparing methods, on average a 10.3% of accuracy boost is achieved. The statistical soundness of each constituting component and the computational efficiency are also verified.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种联合语义传输网络（JSTN），旨在对大规模几乎没有标记的物联网领域进行有效的入侵检测。作为一种多源异构域适应（MS-HDA）方法，JSTN将知识丰富的网络入侵（NI）域和另一个小规模物联网入侵（II）域集成为源域，并保留内在语义属性以辅助目标II域入侵检测。 JSTN 联合传输以下三种语义来学习领域不变和判别性的特征表示。场景语义赋予源 NI 和 II 域彼此的特征，通过混淆域鉴别器和分类分布知识保存来简化知识转移过程。它还减少了源-目标差异，使共享特征空间具有域不变性。同时，加权隐式语义转移通过细粒度的知识保存提高了可辨别性，将源分类分布转移到目标域。源目标分歧指导知识保存时的重要性加权，以反映知识学习的程度。此外，分层显式语义对齐借助几何相似性感知伪标签细化器执行质心级和代表级对齐，该细化器利用未标记的目标II域的价值，并以集中的方式从全局和局部角度显式对齐特征表示。对各种任务的综合实验验证了 JSTN 相对于最先进的比较方法的优越性，平均准确率提高了 10.3%。还验证了每个组成部分的统计合理性和计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合语义迁移网络（JSTN），用于解决大规模、标签稀缺的物联网（IoT）领域入侵检测问题。
AI.motivation: 物联网领域数据标签稀缺且分布复杂，传统方法难以有效迁移知识，需通过多源异构领域自适应技术提升检测性能。
AI.method: JSTN通过整合知识丰富的网络入侵（NI）域和小规模物联网入侵（II）域作为源域，联合迁移场景语义、加权隐式语义和层次显式语义，实现领域不变且具有判别性的特征表示。
AI.result: 在多个任务上的实验表明，JSTN平均准确率较现有方法提升10.3%，且方法的统计显著性和计算效率均得到验证。
AI.conclusion: JSTN通过多粒度语义迁移有效解决了物联网领域标签稀缺问题，为跨领域入侵检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Joint Semantic Transfer Network for IoT Intrusion Detection 用于物联网入侵检测的联合语义传输网络 In this paper, we propose a Joint Semantic Transfer Network (JSTN) towards effective intrusion detection for large-scale scarcely labelled IoT domain. As a multi-source heterogeneous domain adaptation (MS-HDA) method, the JSTN integrates a knowledge rich network intrusion (NI) domain and another small-scale IoT intrusion (II) domain as source domains, and preserves intrinsic semantic properties to assist target II domain intrusion detection. The JSTN jointly transfers the following three semantics to learn a domain-invariant and discriminative feature representation. The scenario semantic endows source NI and II domain with characteristics from each other to ease the knowledge transfer process via a confused domain discriminator and categorical distribution knowledge preservation. It also reduces the source-target discrepancy to make the shared feature space domain-invariant. Meanwhile, the weighted implicit semantic transfer boosts discriminability via a fine-grained knowledge preservation, which transfers the source categorical distribution to the target domain. The source-target divergence guides the importance weighting during knowledge preservation to reflect the degree of knowledge learning. Additionally, the hierarchical explicit semantic alignment performs centroid-level and representative-level alignment with the help of a geometric similarity-aware pseudo-label refiner, which exploits the value of unlabelled target II domain and explicitly aligns feature representations from a global and local perspective in a concentrated manner. Comprehensive experiments on various tasks verify the superiority of the JSTN against state-of-the-art comparing methods, on average a 10.3% of accuracy boost is achieved. The statistical soundness of each constituting component and the computational efficiency are also verified. 在本文中，我们提出了一种联合语义传输网络（JSTN），旨在对大规模几乎没有标记的物联网领域进行有效的入侵检测。作为一种多源异构域适应（MS-HDA）方法，JSTN将知识丰富的网络入侵（NI）域和另一个小规模物联网入侵（II）域集成为源域，并保留内在语义属性以辅助目标II域入侵检测。 JSTN 联合传输以下三种语义来学习领域不变和判别性的特征表示。场景语义赋予源 NI 和 II 域彼此的特征，通过混淆域鉴别器和分类分布知识保存来简化知识转移过程。它还减少了源-目标差异，使共享特征空间具有域不变性。同时，加权隐式语义转移通过细粒度的知识保存提高了可辨别性，将源分类分布转移到目标域。源目标分歧指导知识保存时的重要性加权，以反映知识学习的程度。此外，分层显式语义对齐借助几何相似性感知伪标签细化器执行质心级和代表级对齐，该细化器利用未标记的目标II域的价值，并以集中的方式从全局和局部角度显式对齐特征表示。对各种任务的综合实验验证了 JSTN 相对于最先进的比较方法的优越性，平均准确率提高了 10.3%。还验证了每个组成部分的统计合理性和计算效率。 本文提出了一种联合语义迁移网络（JSTN），用于解决大规模、标签稀缺的物联网（IoT）领域入侵检测问题。 Jiashu Wu,Yang Wang,Binhui Xie,Shuang Li,Hao Dai,Kejiang Ye,Chengzhong Xu cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Jogendra Nath Kundu,Suvaansh Bhambri,Akshay Kulkarni,Hiran Sarkar,Varun Jampani,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Subsidiary Prototype Alignment for Universal Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 通用域适应的辅助原型对齐
abstract: Universal Domain Adaptation (UniDA) deals with the problem of knowledge transfer between two datasets with domain-shift as well as category-shift. The goal is to categorize unlabeled target samples, either into one of the "known" categories or into a single "unknown" category. A major problem in UniDA is negative transfer, i.e. misalignment of "known" and "unknown" classes. To this end, we first uncover an intriguing tradeoff between negative-transfer-risk and domain-invariance exhibited at different layers of a deep network. It turns out we can strike a balance between these two metrics at a mid-level layer. Towards designing an effective framework based on this insight, we draw motivation from Bag-of-visual-Words (BoW). Word-prototypes in a BoW-like representation of a mid-level layer would represent lower-level visual primitives that are likely to be unaffected by the category-shift in the high-level features. We develop modifications that encourage learning of word-prototypes followed by word-histogram based classification. Following this, subsidiary prototype-space alignment (SPA) can be seen as a closed-set alignment problem, thereby avoiding negative transfer. We realize this with a novel word-histogram-related pretext task to enable closed-set SPA, operating in conjunction with goal task UniDA. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on top of existing UniDA techniques, yielding state-of-the-art performance across three standard UniDA and Open-Set DA object recognition benchmarks.
summary: Universal Domain Adaptation (UniDA) deals with the problem of knowledge transfer between two datasets with domain-shift as well as category-shift. The goal is to categorize unlabeled target samples, either into one of the "known" categories or into a single "unknown" category. A major problem in UniDA is negative transfer, i.e. misalignment of "known" and "unknown" classes. To this end, we first uncover an intriguing tradeoff between negative-transfer-risk and domain-invariance exhibited at different layers of a deep network. It turns out we can strike a balance between these two metrics at a mid-level layer. Towards designing an effective framework based on this insight, we draw motivation from Bag-of-visual-Words (BoW). Word-prototypes in a BoW-like representation of a mid-level layer would represent lower-level visual primitives that are likely to be unaffected by the category-shift in the high-level features. We develop modifications that encourage learning of word-prototypes followed by word-histogram based classification. Following this, subsidiary prototype-space alignment (SPA) can be seen as a closed-set alignment problem, thereby avoiding negative transfer. We realize this with a novel word-histogram-related pretext task to enable closed-set SPA, operating in conjunction with goal task UniDA. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach on top of existing UniDA techniques, yielding state-of-the-art performance across three standard UniDA and Open-Set DA object recognition benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 通用域适应（UniDA）通过域转移和类别转移来处理两个数据集之间的知识转移问题。目标是将未标记的目标样本分类为“已知”类别之一或单个“未知”类别。 UniDA 的一个主要问题是负迁移，即“已知”和“未知”类别的错位。为此，我们首先揭示了深层网络不同层所表现出的负转移风险和域不变性之间有趣的权衡。事实证明，我们可以在中层实现这两个指标之间的平衡。为了根据这种见解设计一个有效的框架，我们从视觉词袋（BoW）中汲取了动力。中层的类似于 BoW 的表示中的单词原型将表示较低级别的视觉基元，这些基元可能不受高级特征中类别转换的影响。我们开发了一些修改，鼓励学习单词原型，然后进行基于单词直方图的分类。在此之后，辅助原型空间对齐（SPA）可以被视为闭集对齐问题，从而避免负迁移。我们通过一种新颖的与词直方图相关的借口任务来实现这一点，以启用闭集 SPA，与目标任务 UniDA 结合运行。我们展示了我们的方法在现有 UniDA 技术之上的有效性，在三个标准 UniDA 和 Open-Set DA 对象识别基准测试中产生了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种子任务原型对齐方法，通过解决通用领域自适应中的负迁移问题，提升目标域样本分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有UniDA方法易受负迁移影响，作者发现深度网络中间层存在负迁移风险与领域不变性的权衡，受BoW启发提出基于原型对齐的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建中间层词原型表示，设计词直方图分类器，并引入预训练任务实现闭集原型空间对齐（SPA），避免负迁移。
AI.result: 在三个标准UniDA和开放集DA基准测试中取得最先进性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过中间层原型对齐与闭集任务设计，有效缓解负迁移问题，为通用领域自适应提供新思路。

authors_text: Sriram Narayanan,Dinesh Jayaraman,Manmohan Chandraker
title: Long-HOT: A Modular Hierarchical Approach for Long-Horizon Object Transport
title_zh: Long-HOT：用于长视野对象传输的模块化分层方法
abstract: We address key challenges in long-horizon embodied exploration and navigation by proposing a new object transport task and a novel modular framework for temporally extended navigation. Our first contribution is the design of a novel Long-HOT environment focused on deep exploration and long-horizon planning where the agent is required to efficiently find and pick up target objects to be carried and dropped at a goal location, with load constraints and optional access to a container if it finds one. Further, we propose a modular hierarchical transport policy (HTP) that builds a topological graph of the scene to perform exploration with the help of weighted frontiers. Our hierarchical approach uses a combination of motion planning algorithms to reach point goals within explored locations and object navigation policies for moving towards semantic targets at unknown locations. Experiments on both our proposed Habitat transport task and on MultiOn benchmarks show that our method significantly outperforms baselines and prior works. Further, we validate the effectiveness of our modular approach for long-horizon transport by demonstrating meaningful generalization to much harder transport scenes with training only on simpler versions of the task.
summary: We address key challenges in long-horizon embodied exploration and navigation by proposing a new object transport task and a novel modular framework for temporally extended navigation. Our first contribution is the design of a novel Long-HOT environment focused on deep exploration and long-horizon planning where the agent is required to efficiently find and pick up target objects to be carried and dropped at a goal location, with load constraints and optional access to a container if it finds one. Further, we propose a modular hierarchical transport policy (HTP) that builds a topological graph of the scene to perform exploration with the help of weighted frontiers. Our hierarchical approach uses a combination of motion planning algorithms to reach point goals within explored locations and object navigation policies for moving towards semantic targets at unknown locations. Experiments on both our proposed Habitat transport task and on MultiOn benchmarks show that our method significantly outperforms baselines and prior works. Further, we validate the effectiveness of our modular approach for long-horizon transport by demonstrating meaningful generalization to much harder transport scenes with training only on simpler versions of the task.
abstract_zh: 我们通过提出一种新的对象传输任务和一种用于时间扩展导航的新颖模块化框架来解决长视野探索和导航中的关键挑战。我们的第一个贡献是设计一种新颖的 Long-HOT 环境，专注于深度探索和长期规划，其中代理需要有效地查找和拾取要在目标位置携带和投放的目标物体，并具有负载约束和在找到容器时可选择访问容器的能力。此外，我们提出了一种模块化分层传输策略（HTP），它构建了场景的拓扑图，以在加权边界的帮助下进行探索。我们的分层方法使用运动规划算法的组合来达到探索位置内的点目标和对象导航策略，以朝着未知位置的语义目标移动。对我们提出的栖息地运输任务和 MultiOn 基准的实验表明，我们的方法显着优于基线和先前的工作。此外，我们通过仅对更简单的任务版本进行训练，证明对更困难的运输场景的有意义的泛化，验证了我们的模块化方法对于长视野运输的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Long-HOT环境和模块化分层运输策略（HTP），解决长时程物体运输任务中的探索与导航挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在长时程任务中存在探索效率低、规划能力不足的问题，需设计更高效的模块化框架应对复杂场景。
AI.method: 构建拓扑图进行探索，结合加权前沿与运动规划算法，通过分层策略实现目标点导航与语义目标定位。
AI.result: 在Habitat和MultiOn基准测试中显著优于基线方法，并能泛化至更复杂的运输场景。
AI.conclusion: 模块化分层方法有效提升了长时程物体运输的性能，证明了其在复杂环境中的适应性与扩展性。

authors_text: Lin Guan,Karthik Valmeekam,Subbarao Kambhampati
title: Relative Behavioral Attributes: Filling the Gap between Symbolic Goal Specification and Reward Learning from Human Preferences
title_zh: 相对行为属性：填补象征性目标规范和根据人类偏好进行奖励学习之间的差距
abstract: Generating complex behaviors that satisfy the preferences of non-expert users is a crucial requirement for AI agents. Interactive reward learning from trajectory comparisons (a.k.a. RLHF) is one way to allow non-expert users to convey complex objectives by expressing preferences over short clips of agent behaviors. Even though this parametric method can encode complex tacit knowledge present in the underlying tasks, it implicitly assumes that the human is unable to provide richer feedback than binary preference labels, leading to intolerably high feedback complexity and poor user experience. While providing a detailed symbolic closed-form specification of the objectives might be tempting, it is not always feasible even for an expert user. However, in most cases, humans are aware of how the agent should change its behavior along meaningful axes to fulfill their underlying purpose, even if they are not able to fully specify task objectives symbolically. Using this as motivation, we introduce the notion of Relative Behavioral Attributes, which allows the users to tweak the agent behavior through symbolic concepts (e.g., increasing the softness or speed of agents' movement). We propose two practical methods that can learn to model any kind of behavioral attributes from ordered behavior clips. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods on four tasks with nine different behavioral attributes, showing that once the attributes are learned, end users can produce desirable agent behaviors relatively effortlessly, by providing feedback just around ten times. This is over an order of magnitude less than that required by the popular learning-from-human-preferences baselines. The supplementary video and source code are available at: https://guansuns.github.io/pages/rba.
summary: Generating complex behaviors that satisfy the preferences of non-expert users is a crucial requirement for AI agents. Interactive reward learning from trajectory comparisons (a.k.a. RLHF) is one way to allow non-expert users to convey complex objectives by expressing preferences over short clips of agent behaviors. Even though this parametric method can encode complex tacit knowledge present in the underlying tasks, it implicitly assumes that the human is unable to provide richer feedback than binary preference labels, leading to intolerably high feedback complexity and poor user experience. While providing a detailed symbolic closed-form specification of the objectives might be tempting, it is not always feasible even for an expert user. However, in most cases, humans are aware of how the agent should change its behavior along meaningful axes to fulfill their underlying purpose, even if they are not able to fully specify task objectives symbolically. Using this as motivation, we introduce the notion of Relative Behavioral Attributes, which allows the users to tweak the agent behavior through symbolic concepts (e.g., increasing the softness or speed of agents' movement). We propose two practical methods that can learn to model any kind of behavioral attributes from ordered behavior clips. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods on four tasks with nine different behavioral attributes, showing that once the attributes are learned, end users can produce desirable agent behaviors relatively effortlessly, by providing feedback just around ten times. This is over an order of magnitude less than that required by the popular learning-from-human-preferences baselines. The supplementary video and source code are available at: https://guansuns.github.io/pages/rba.
abstract_zh: 生成满足非专家用户偏好的复杂行为是人工智能代理的关键要求。通过轨迹比较进行交互式奖励学习（又名 RLHF）是一种允许非专家用户通过表达对智能体行为短片的偏好来传达复杂目标的方法。尽管这种参数化方法可以对底层任务中存在的复杂隐性知识进行编码，但它隐含地假设人类无法提供比二元偏好标签更丰富的反馈，从而导致难以忍受的高反馈复杂性和糟糕的用户体验。虽然提供目标的详细符号封闭形式规范可能很诱人，但即使对于专家用户来说也并不总是可行的。然而，在大多数情况下，人类知道代理应该如何沿着有意义的轴改变其行为以实现其潜在目的，即使他们无法象征性地完全指定任务目标。以此为动机，我们引入了相对行为属性的概念，它允许用户通过符号概念来调整代理行为（例如，增加代理移动的柔软度或速度）。我们提出了两种实用的方法，可以学习从有序行为片段中建模任何类型的行为属性。我们展示了我们的方法在具有九种不同行为属性的四项任务上的有效性，表明一旦学习了这些属性，最终用户只需提供大约十次反馈就可以相对轻松地产生理想的代理行为。这比流行的从人类偏好学习基线所需的数量级要低一个数量级。补充视频和源代码可在以下网址获取：https://guansuns.github.io/pages/rba。

AI.tldr: 本文提出相对行为属性（RBA）方法，通过符号化概念让用户更高效地调整AI代理行为，弥补符号目标规范与基于人类偏好的奖励学习之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有基于人类偏好的强化学习方法反馈复杂度高且用户体验差，而符号化目标规范难以实现。用户通常能通过行为轴调整指导代理，无需完整符号描述。
AI.method: 提出两种从有序行为片段中学习行为属性的实用方法，允许用户通过符号化参数（如速度、柔软度）调整代理行为。
AI.result: 在四个任务九种属性测试中，用户仅需约十次反馈即可生成理想行为，较基线方法减少一个数量级的反馈需求。
AI.conclusion: RBA方法显著降低反馈复杂度，使用户能通过少量符号化调整高效达成目标，为非专家用户与AI协作提供新范式。
